75 |        1523 +  Die Implementierung baut auf der bestehenden HEFL-Infrastruktur auf und integriert sich nahtlos in das Gesamtsystem, während sie moderne UX-Standards 
76 |             + und Best Practices befolgt.
77 |        1524 +  
78 |        1525 +  ## Backend-Implementierung
79 |        1526 +  
80 |        1527 +  ### 📋 Backend-Architektur Überblick
81 |        1528 +  
82 |        1529 +  Das Backend für das Evaluation & Discussion Forum folgt der etablierten NestJS-Architektur des HEFL-Systems und maximiert die Wiederverwendung 
83 |             + bestehender Komponenten.
84 |        1530 +  
85 |        1531 +  #### **Kernprinzipien:**
86 |        1532 +  - **Modulare Architektur** mit klarer Trennung der Verantwortlichkeiten
87 |        1533 +  - **Dünnere Controller** - nur HTTP-Layer-Handling
88 |        1534 +  - **Service-Layer** für gesamte Geschäftslogik
89 |        1535 +  - **Prisma ORM** für typsichere Datenbankoperationen
90 |        1536 +  - **DTO-basierte Validierung** mit `class-validator`
91 |        1537 +  - **JWT-basierte Authentifizierung** mit Role-Based Access Control
92 |        1538 +  - **WebSocket-Integration** für Real-time Updates
93 |        1539 +  
94 |        1540 +  ### 🗄️ Datenbank-Schema Erweiterungen
95 |        1541 +  
96 |        1542 +  #### **Bestehende Modelle (Wiederverwendung):**
97 |        1543 +  - ✅ `User` - Benutzer-Management
98 |        1544 +  - ✅ `Module` - Kurs-/Modul-Zuordnung
99 |        1545 +  - ✅ `File` - PDF-Datei-Management
100 |        1546 +  - ✅ `Discussion` - Grundlegende Diskussionslogik
101 |        1547 +  - ✅ `Message` - Kommentar-System
102 |        1548 +  - ✅ `Vote` - Bewertungs-System
103 |        1549 +  - ✅ `AnonymousUser` - Anonymisierung
104 |        1550 +  - ✅ `Notification` - Real-time Benachrichtigungen
105 |        1551 +  
106 |        1552 +  #### **Neue Modelle (Evaluation-spezifisch):**
107 |        1553 +  
108 |        1554 +  ```prisma
109 |        1555 +  // Evaluation Submissions
110 |        1556 +  model EvaluationSubmission {
111 |        1557 +    id          String            @id @default(cuid())
112 |        1558 +    title       String
113 |        1559 +    authorId    Int
114 |        1560 +    pdfFileId   Int
115 |        1561 +    moduleId    Int
116 |        1562 +    status      EvaluationStatus  @default(DRAFT)
117 |        1563 +    phase       EvaluationPhase   @default(DISCUSSION)
118 |        1564 +    submittedAt DateTime
119 |        1565 +    createdAt   DateTime          @default(now())
120 |        1566 +    updatedAt   DateTime          @updatedAt
121 |        1567 +  
122 |        1568 +    // Relations
123 |        1569 +    author      User              @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id])
124 |        1570 +    pdfFile     File              @relation(fields: [pdfFileId], references: [id])
125 |        1571 +    module      Module            @relation(fields: [moduleId], references: [id])
126 |        1572 +    
127 |        1573 +    // Evaluation-specific relations
128 |        1574 +    categories  EvaluationCategory[]
129 |        1575 +    comments    EvaluationComment[]
130 |        1576 +    votes       EvaluationVote[]
131 |        1577 +    anonymousUsers AnonymousEvaluationUser[]
132 |        1578 +    
133 |        1579 +    @@map("evaluation_submissions")
134 |        1580 +  }
135 |        1581 +  
136 |        1582 +  // Evaluation Categories
137 |        1583 +  model EvaluationCategory {
138 |        1584 +    id             Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
139 |        1585 +    submissionId   String
140 |        1586 +    name           String
141 |        1587 +    description    String?
142 |        1588 +    weight         Float              @default(1.0)
143 |        1589 +    order          Int                @default(0)
144 |        1590 +    
145 |        1591 +    // Relations
146 |        1592 +    submission     EvaluationSubmission @relation(fields: [submissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
147 |        1593 +    comments       EvaluationComment[]
148 |        1594 +    ratings        EvaluationRating[]
149 |        1595 +    
150 |        1596 +    @@unique([submissionId, name])
151 |        1597 +    @@map("evaluation_categories")
152 |        1598 +  }
153 |        1599 +  
154 |        1600 +  // Evaluation Comments
155 |        1601 +  model EvaluationComment {
156 |        1602 +    id             Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
157 |        1603 +    submissionId   String
158 |        1604 +    categoryId     Int?
159 |        1605 +    authorId       Int
160 |        1606 +    content        String
161 |        1607 +    parentId       Int?
162 |        1608 +    createdAt      DateTime           @default(now())
163 |        1609 +    updatedAt      DateTime           @updatedAt
164 |        1610 +    
165 |        1611 +    // Relations
166 |        1612 +    submission     EvaluationSubmission @relation(fields: [submissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
167 |        1613 +    category       EvaluationCategory? @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
168 |        1614 +    author         User               @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id])
169 |        1615 +    parent         EvaluationComment? @relation("CommentReplies", fields: [parentId], references: [id])
170 |        1616 +    replies        EvaluationComment[] @relation("CommentReplies")
171 |        1617 +    votes          EvaluationVote[]
172 |        1618 +    
173 |        1619 +    @@map("evaluation_comments")
174 |        1620 +  }
175 |        1621 +  
176 |        1622 +  // Evaluation Votes
177 |        1623 +  model EvaluationVote {
178 |        1624 +    id        Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
179 |        1625 +    commentId Int
180 |        1626 +    userId    Int
181 |        1627 +    voteType  VoteType
182 |        1628 +    createdAt DateTime           @default(now())
183 |        1629 +    
184 |        1630 +    // Relations
185 |        1631 +    comment   EvaluationComment  @relation(fields: [commentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
186 |        1632 +    user      User               @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
187 |        1633 +    
188 |        1634 +    @@unique([commentId, userId])
189 |        1635 +    @@map("evaluation_votes")
190 |        1636 +  }
191 |        1637 +  
192 |        1638 +  // Evaluation Ratings
193 |        1639 +  model EvaluationRating {
194 |        1640 +    id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
195 |        1641 +    submissionId String
196 |        1642 +    categoryId   Int
197 |        1643 +    userId       Int
198 |        1644 +    rating       Int                @db.SmallInt // 1-5 rating
199 |        1645 +    comment      String?
200 |        1646 +    createdAt    DateTime           @default(now())
[TRUNCATED]

1 | /* To learn more about this file see: https://angular.io/config/tsconfig. */
2 | {
3 |   "compileOnSave": false,
4 |   "compilerOptions": {
5 |     "resolveJsonModule": true,
6 |     "baseUrl": "./",
7 |     "outDir": "./dist/out-tsc",
8 |     "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
9 |     "esModuleInterop": true,
10 |     "strict": true,
11 |     "noImplicitOverride": true,
12 |     "noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature": true,
13 |     "noImplicitReturns": true,
14 |     "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
15 |     "sourceMap": true,
16 |     "declaration": false,
17 |     "experimentalDecorators": true,
18 |     "moduleResolution": "bundler",
19 |     "importHelpers": true,
20 |     "target": "ES2022",
21 |     "module": "ES2022",
22 |     "useDefineForClassFields": false,
23 |     "jsx": "react",
24 |     "lib": [
25 |       "ES2022",
26 |       "dom"
27 |     ],
28 |     "paths": {
29 |       // "@Interfaces/*" alias removed as per user request
30 |       "@DTOs/index": ["../shared/dtos/index.ts"],
31 |       "@UMLearnServices/*": ["./src/app/Modules/umlearn/services/*"]
32 |     },
33 |     "types": ["node"]
34 |   },
35 |   "angularCompilerOptions": {
36 |     "enableI18nLegacyMessageIdFormat": false,
37 |     "strictInjectionParameters": true,
38 |     "strictInputAccessModifiers": true,
39 |     "strictTemplates": true
40 |   },
41 |   "include":[
42 |     "src/**/*.ts",
43 |     "src/**/*.tsx",
44 |     "src/**/*.html",
45 |     "src/**/*.css",
46 |     "src/**/*.scss",
47 |     "src/declarations/pdfjsDeclaration.d.ts"
48 |   ],
49 |   "skipLibCheck": true, // Fixed typo skib -> skip
50 | }

1 | /* self hostet fonts and icons*/
2 | @import 'styles/roboto.scss';
3 | @import 'styles/material-icons.scss';
4 | @import 'tailwindcss/base';
5 | @import 'tailwindcss/components';
6 | @import 'tailwindcss/utilities';
7 | 
8 | html,
9 | body {
10 |   height: 100%;
11 | }
12 | body {
13 |   margin: 0;
14 |   font-family: Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;
15 |   background-color: #f5f5f5;
16 | }
17 | 
18 | @media print {
19 |   #printContainer > .printedPage {
20 |     width: 99%;
21 |   }
22 | }
23 | 
24 | .discussionDialog {
25 |   max-height: 95vh;
26 |   overflow: auto;
27 | }
28 | 
29 | // MCSlider dialog panel styling
30 | .mcslider-dialog-panel {
31 |   .mat-mdc-dialog-container {
32 |     padding: 0 !important;
33 |     border-radius: 12px !important;
34 |     box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) !important;
35 |     overflow: hidden !important;
36 |     height: 85vh !important;
37 |     max-height: 85vh !important;
38 |     width: 90vw !important;
39 |     max-width: 900px !important;
40 |     display: flex !important;
41 |     flex-direction: column !important;
42 |   }
43 | 
44 |   .mat-mdc-dialog-content {
45 |     padding: 0 !important;
46 |     margin: 0 !important;
47 |     max-height: none !important;
48 |     flex: 1 !important;
49 |     display: flex !important;
50 |     flex-direction: column !important;
51 |     overflow: hidden !important;
52 |   }
53 | 
54 |   .mat-mdc-dialog-actions {
55 |     padding: 0 !important;
56 |     margin: 0 !important;
57 |     flex-shrink: 0 !important;
58 |   }
59 | }
60 | 
61 | .notification-snackbar-container {
62 |   background-color: transparent !important;
63 |   box-shadow: none !important;
64 |   padding: 0 !important;
65 | }
66 | // workaround preventing a angular-tailwind bug that summons a blue vertical line on activated mat-form-field elements with appearance="outline"
67 | .mdc-notched-outline__notch {
68 |   border-right: none !important;
69 | }
70 | 
71 | // Standart Design for Lists which are dynamically loaded (e.g. task descriptions)
72 | mat-card-content {
73 |   ul,
74 |   ol {
75 |     list-style-position: inside;
76 |     padding-left: 20px;
77 |     margin-bottom: 15px;
78 | 
79 |     li {
80 |       margin-bottom: 8px;
81 |       line-height: 1.5;
82 |     }
83 |   }
84 | 
85 |   ul {
86 |     list-style-type: disc;
87 |   }
88 | 
89 |   ol {
90 |     list-style-type: decimal;
91 |   }
92 | }

src/app/app-routing.module.ts
```
1 | import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Routes } from '@angular/router';
3 | import { RouterModule } from '@angular/router';
4 | import { ContentBoardComponent } from './Pages/contentBoard/contentBoard.component';
5 | import { AppComponent } from './app.component';
6 | import { DashboardComponent } from './Pages/dashboard/dashboard.component';
7 | import { ConceptOverviewComponent } from './Pages/conceptOverview/conceptOverview.component';
8 | import { CodeTaskComponent } from './Pages/contentView/contentElement/codeTask/codeTask.component';
9 | import { PdfViewerComponent } from './Pages/contentView/contentElement/pdfViewer/pdfViewer.component';
10 | import { GraphComponent } from './Pages/graph/graph.component';
11 | import { MobileNavigatorComponent } from './Pages/mobile-navigator/mobile-navigator.component';
12 | import { HighlightNavigatorComponent } from './Pages/highlight-navigator/highlight-navigator.component';
13 | import { ChatBotComponent } from './Pages/chat-bot/chat-bot.component';
14 | import { VideoTimeStampComponent } from './Pages/chat-bot/video-time-stamp/video-time-stamp.component';
15 | import { DiscussionViewComponent } from './Pages/discussion/discussion-view/discussion-view.component';
16 | import { DiscussionListComponent } from './Pages/discussion/discussion-list/discussion-list.component';
17 | // just for testing
18 | import { FileUploadComponent } from './Pages/test/file-upload/file-upload.component';
19 | import { LoginComponent } from './Pages/login/login.component';
20 | import { LoggedInGuard } from './Guards/is-logged-in.guard';
21 | import { TaskEvaluationOverviewComponent } from './Pages/task-evaluation-overview/task-evaluation-overview.component';
22 | import { EditFreetextComponent } from './Pages/lecturersView/edit-freetext/edit-freetext.component';
23 | import { EditChoiceComponent } from './Pages/lecturersView/edit-choice/edit-choice.component';
24 | import { EditCodingComponent } from './Pages/lecturersView/edit-coding/edit-coding.component';
25 | import { EditGraphComponent } from './Pages/lecturersView/edit-graph/edit-graph.component';
26 | import { EditFillinComponent } from './Pages/lecturersView/edit-fillin/edit-fillin.component';
27 | import { AdminGuard } from './Guards/is-admin.guard';
28 | import { McTaskCreationComponent } from './Pages/contentView/contentElement/mc-task-creation/mc-task-creation.component';
29 | import { NotRegisteredComponent } from './Pages/not-registered/not-registered.component';
30 | import { RegisteredForSubjectGuard } from './Guards/registered-for-subject.guard';
31 | import { NavigationPreferenceGuard } from './Guards/navigation-preference.guard';
32 | import { GraphTasksComponent } from './Modules/graph-tasks/graph-tasks.component';
33 | import { DynamicQuestionComponent } from './Pages/dynamic-question/dynamic-question.component';
34 | import { EditUmlComponent } from './Pages/lecturersView/edit-uml/edit-uml.component';
35 | import { EditCodeGameComponent } from './Pages/lecturersView/edit-code-game/edit-code-game.component';
36 | import { EvaluationDiscussionForumComponent } from './Pages/evaluation-discussion-forum/evaluation-discussion-forum/evaluation-discussion-forum.component';
37 | 
38 | const routes: Routes = [
39 |   { path: '', redirectTo: '/login', pathMatch: 'full' },
40 |   { path: 'login', component: LoginComponent },
41 |   { path: 'app', component: AppComponent },
42 |   { path: 'not-registered', component: NotRegisteredComponent, canActivate: [LoggedInGuard] },
43 |   {
44 |     path: 'forum',
45 |     component: EvaluationDiscussionForumComponent,
46 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
47 |   },
48 |   {
49 |     path: 'forum/:submissionId',
50 |     component: EvaluationDiscussionForumComponent,
51 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
52 |   },
53 |   {
54 |     path: 'dashboard',
55 |     component: DashboardComponent,
56 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
57 |     children: [
58 |       {
59 |         path: 'contentBoard',
60 |         component: ContentBoardComponent,
61 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
62 |       },
63 |       {
64 |         path: 'concept',
65 |         component: ConceptOverviewComponent,
66 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
67 |       },
68 |       {
69 |         path: 'concept/:conceptId',
70 |         component: ConceptOverviewComponent,
71 |         children: [
72 |           {
73 |             path: 'question/:questionId',
74 |             component: DynamicQuestionComponent,
75 |             canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
76 |           },
77 |         ],
78 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
79 |       },
80 |       {
81 |         path: 'discussion',
82 |         component: DiscussionListComponent,
83 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
84 |       },
85 |       {
86 |         path: 'codeTask',
87 |         component: CodeTaskComponent,
88 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
89 |       },
90 |       {
91 |         path: 'pdfViewer/:uniqueIdentifier',
92 |         component: PdfViewerComponent,
93 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
94 |       },
95 |       {
96 |         path: 'graph',
97 |         component: GraphComponent,
98 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard, NavigationPreferenceGuard],
99 |       },
100 |       {
101 |         path: 'mobile-navigator',
102 |         component: MobileNavigatorComponent,
103 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard, NavigationPreferenceGuard],
104 |       },
105 |       {
106 |         path: 'highlight-navigator',
107 |         component: HighlightNavigatorComponent,
108 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard, NavigationPreferenceGuard],
109 |       },
110 |       {
111 |         path: 'chatbot',
112 |         component: ChatBotComponent,
113 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
114 |       },
115 |       {
116 |         path: 'video',
117 |         component: VideoTimeStampComponent,
118 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
119 |       },
120 |       {
121 |         path: 'task-evaluation-overview',
122 |         component: TaskEvaluationOverviewComponent,
123 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
124 |       },
125 |       {
126 |         path: 'mcqcreation',
127 |         component: McTaskCreationComponent,
128 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
129 |       },
130 |       // lecturers view
131 |       {
132 |         path: 'editchoice/:questionId',
133 |         component: EditChoiceComponent,
134 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
135 |       },
136 |       {
137 |         path: 'editcoding/:questionId',
138 |         component: EditCodingComponent,
139 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
140 |       },
141 |       {
142 |         path: 'editfillin/:questionId',
143 |         component: EditFillinComponent,
144 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
145 |       },
146 |       {
147 |         path: 'editfreetext/:questionId',
148 |         component: EditFreetextComponent,
149 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
150 |       },
151 |       {
152 |         path: 'editgraph/:questionId',
153 |         component: EditGraphComponent,
154 |         canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
155 |       },
156 |       // just for testing
157 |       { path: 'file-upload', component: FileUploadComponent, canActivate: [LoggedInGuard] },
158 |     ],
159 |   },
160 |   {
161 |     path: 'discussion-view/:discussionId',
162 |     component: DiscussionViewComponent,
163 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
164 |   },
165 |   {
166 |     path: 'task-evaluation-overview',
167 |     component: TaskEvaluationOverviewComponent,
168 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
169 |   },
170 | 
171 |   {
172 |     path: 'mcqcreation',
173 |     component: McTaskCreationComponent,
174 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
175 |   },
176 | 
177 |   // lecturers view
178 |   {
179 |     path: 'editchoice/:questionId',
180 |     component: EditChoiceComponent,
181 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
182 |   },
183 |   {
184 |     path: 'editcoding/:questionId',
185 |     component: EditCodingComponent,
186 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
187 |   },
188 |   {
189 |     path: 'editfillin/:questionId',
190 |     component: EditFillinComponent,
191 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
192 |   },
193 |   {
194 |     path: 'editfreetext/:questionId',
195 |     component: EditFreetextComponent,
196 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
197 |   },
198 |   {
199 |     path: 'editgraph/:questionId',
200 |     component: EditGraphComponent,
201 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
202 |   },
203 |   {
204 |     path: 'edituml/:questionId',
205 |     component: EditUmlComponent,
206 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
207 |   },
208 |   {
209 |     path: 'editcodegame/:questionId',
210 |     component: EditCodeGameComponent,
211 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
212 |   },
213 | 
214 |   // just for testing
215 |   { path: 'file-upload', component: FileUploadComponent, canActivate: [LoggedInGuard] },
216 | 
217 |   { path: 'graphtask/:questionId', component: GraphTasksComponent, canActivate: [LoggedInGuard] },
218 | 
219 |   // Tutor-Kai as lazy loaded module (https://medium.com/@jaydeepvpatil225/feature-module-with-lazy-loading-in-angular-15-53bb8e15d193) Maybe we can use the same for UML Tasks?
220 |   {
221 |     path: 'tutor-kai',
222 |     loadChildren: () => import('./Modules/tutor-kai/tutor-kai.module').then(m => m.TutorKaiModule),
223 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
224 |   },
225 |   // UMLearn as lazy loaded module
226 |   {
227 |     path: 'umlearn',
228 |     loadChildren: () => import('./Modules/umlearn/umlearn.module').then(m => m.UmlearnModule),
229 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, RegisteredForSubjectGuard],
230 |   },
231 | 
232 |   {
233 |     path: 'admin',
234 |     loadChildren: () => import('./Pages/admin/admin.module').then(m => m.AdminModule),
235 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard, AdminGuard],
236 |   },
237 |   {
238 |     path: 'teacher',
239 |     loadChildren: () => import('./Pages/teacher/teacher.module').then(m => m.TeacherModule),
240 |     canActivate: [LoggedInGuard], // Assuming teachers need to be logged in
241 |   },
242 | ];
243 | @NgModule({
244 |   imports: [
245 |     RouterModule.forRoot(routes, {
246 |       // preloadingStrategy: PreloadAllModules, // PreloadAllModules needs to be imported if used. Removing for now to fix immediate error.
247 |       paramsInheritanceStrategy: 'emptyOnly', // Default in Angular 17
248 |       // Add other router configuration options that are no longer part of the public API
249 |       scrollPositionRestoration: 'disabled', // Default value
250 |       anchorScrolling: 'disabled', // Default value
251 |       onSameUrlNavigation: 'ignore', // Default value
252 |       enableTracing: false, // Default value
253 |     }),
254 |   ],
255 |   exports: [RouterModule],
256 | })
257 | export class AppRoutingModule {}
```

src/app/app.component.html
```
1 | <app-header (chatToggle)="toggleChatBot()"></app-header>
2 | 
3 | <!-- Entfernung des Graph-Navigation Buttons aus der alten Position -->
4 | <div class="main-container">
5 |   <div class="content-wrapper">
6 |     <router-outlet></router-outlet>
7 |   </div>
8 | 
9 |   <mat-toolbar class="footer">
10 |     <!-- Linke Seite: Version -->
11 |     <div class="left-content">
12 |       <button style="font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer">Version: {{ version }}</button>
13 |       <!--
14 |         <mat-divider vertical="true" class="divider"></mat-divider>
15 |         <button mat-button style="font-size:15px;">User: {{userMail? userMail : "nicht eingeloggt"}} </button>
16 |         -->
17 |     </div>
18 | 
19 |     <!-- Zentrierte Inhalte für Impressum, Datenschutz und Hilfe -->
20 |     <div class="center-content">
21 |       <button mat-button (click)="openImpressum()">Impressum</button>
22 |       <mat-divider vertical="true" class="divider"></mat-divider>
23 |       <button mat-button (click)="openContact()">Hilfe</button>
24 |       <mat-divider vertical="true" class="divider"></mat-divider>
25 |       <button mat-button (click)="openDatenschutz()">Datenschutz</button>
26 |     </div>
27 | 
28 |     <!-- Rechte Seite: Fortschritt und Admin -->
29 |     <div class="right-content">
30 |       <mat-slide-toggle
31 |         *ngIf="userRole === 'ADMIN'"
32 |         (change)="onToggleEditorMode()"
33 |         [checked]="editModeActive"
34 |         color="primary"
35 |         style="margin-right: 10px"
36 |       >
37 |         Edit Mode
38 |       </mat-slide-toggle>
39 |       <mat-divider
40 |         vertical="true"
41 |         class="divider"
42 |         *ngIf="userIsLoggedIn && userRole === 'ADMIN'"
43 |       ></mat-divider>
44 | 
45 |       <button
46 |         mat-button
47 |         *ngIf="userIsLoggedIn"
48 |         style="font-size: 15px; font-weight: bolder"
49 |         (click)="showProgress()"
50 |       >
51 |         <mat-icon>trending_up</mat-icon> Fortschritt
52 |       </button>
53 |       <mat-divider
54 |         vertical="true"
55 |         class="divider"
56 |         *ngIf="userIsLoggedIn && userRole === 'ADMIN'"
57 |       ></mat-divider>
58 | 
59 |       <button
60 |         mat-button
61 |         *ngIf="userRole === 'ADMIN'"
62 |         routerLink="/admin"
63 |         style="font-size: 15px; font-weight: bolder"
64 |       >
65 |         <mat-icon>admin_panel_settings</mat-icon> Admin
66 |       </button>
67 |     </div>
68 |   </mat-toolbar>
69 | 
70 |   <!-- Chat-Popup nur einblenden, wenn es aktiv ist -->
71 |   <div *ngIf="chatActive" class="chat-popup">
72 |     <app-chat-bot (close)="toggleChatBot()"></app-chat-bot>
73 |   </div>
74 | 
75 |   <div class="tablet-space"></div>
76 | </div>
```

src/app/app.component.scss
```
1 | /*
2 | Ipad notices
3 | - Brave and Firefox do not render underneath the safe area
4 | - Chrome and Safari do render underneath the safe area, but are additionally sending the safe-area-inset values
5 |  */
6 | 
7 | .toolbar-item-spacer {
8 |   flex: 1 1 auto;
9 | }
10 | 
11 | .main-container {
12 |   position: relative;
13 |   height: calc(100vh - 60px); /* 60px header + 30px footer */
14 | 
15 |   overflow-x: hidden;
16 | 
17 |   /* Safari-specific styles */
18 |   @supports (-webkit-touch-callout: none) {
19 |     // for ipads brave and firefox we can use 100% while for chrome and safari we need to subtract the safe-area-inset values
20 |     height: calc(100% - env(safe-area-inset-top) - env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
21 |   }
22 | }
23 | 
24 | .content-wrapper {
25 |   padding: 8px;
26 |   height: 100%;
27 |   overflow-y: auto;
28 | }
29 | 
30 | .tablet-space {
31 |   @supports (-webkit-touch-callout: none) {
32 |     height: 30px; //footer-height
33 |   }
34 | }
35 | 
36 | .app-sidenav {
37 |   width: 230px;
38 | }
39 | 
40 | .app-sidenav-content {
41 |   display: flex;
42 |   height: 100vh;
43 |   align-items: center;
44 |   justify-content: center;
45 | }
46 | 
47 | .mat-divider {
48 |   margin-top: 16px;
49 |   margin-bottom: 16px;
50 |   background-color: lightgrey;
51 | }
52 | 
53 | .footer {
54 |   z-index: 1000;
55 |   height: 30px; /* Reduzierte Höhe */
56 |   position: fixed;
57 |   bottom: 0;
58 |   width: 100%;
59 |   display: flex;
60 |   align-items: center;
61 |   justify-content: space-between;
62 |   font-size: 10px; /* Reduzierte Schriftgröße */
63 |   color: #434c5e;
64 |   padding: 0 10px;
65 |   overflow-x: auto;
66 |   overflow-y: hidden;
67 |   white-space: nowrap;
68 | 
69 |   /* Safari-specific styles */
70 |   @supports (-webkit-hyphens: none) {
71 |     // important only for ipads safari
72 |     bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom);
73 |   }
74 | }
75 | 
76 | .left-content,
77 | .center-content,
78 | .right-content {
79 |   display: flex;
80 |   align-items: center;
81 |   cursor: pointer;
82 | }
83 | 
84 | .center-content {
85 |   justify-content: center;
86 |   gap: 8px; /* Etwas kleinerer Abstand zwischen den Elementen */
87 | }
88 | 
89 | .divider {
90 |   height: 15px; /* Reduzierte Höhe für visuelle Trennzeichen */
91 |   background-color: lightgrey;
92 | }
93 | 
94 | button,
95 | a {
96 |   line-height: 1; /* Reduziert den Zeilenabstand, um die Elemente kompakter zu machen */
97 |   padding: 0 5px; /* Reduziertes Padding für Buttons und Links */
98 | }
99 | 
100 | .mat-button {
101 |   min-height: 0; /* Entfernt die Mindesthöhe für mat-buttons, um sie kleiner zu machen */
102 |   height: auto; /* Ermöglicht es den Buttons, sich der kleineren Höhe anzupassen */
103 |   padding: 0 5px; /* Reduziert das Padding für eine kompaktere Erscheinung */
104 | }
105 | 
106 | .bell {
107 |   margin-top: 10px;
108 |   overflow-y: auto;
109 |   overflow-x: auto;
110 | }
```

src/app/app.component.spec.ts
```
1 | import { TestBed } from '@angular/core/testing';
2 | import { RouterTestingModule } from '@angular/router/testing';
3 | import { AppComponent } from './app.component';
4 | 
5 | describe('AppComponent', () => {
6 |   beforeEach(async () => {
7 |     await TestBed.configureTestingModule({
8 |       imports: [RouterTestingModule],
9 |       declarations: [AppComponent],
10 |     }).compileComponents();
11 |   });
12 | 
13 |   it('should create the app', () => {
14 |     const fixture = TestBed.createComponent(AppComponent);
15 |     const app = fixture.componentInstance;
16 |     expect(app).toBeTruthy();
17 |   });
18 | 
19 |   it(`should have as title 'client_angular'`, () => {
20 |     const fixture = TestBed.createComponent(AppComponent);
21 |     const app = fixture.componentInstance;
22 |     expect(app.title).toEqual('client_angular');
23 |   });
24 | 
25 |   it('should render title', () => {
26 |     const fixture = TestBed.createComponent(AppComponent);
27 |     fixture.detectChanges();
28 |     const compiled = fixture.nativeElement as HTMLElement;
29 |     expect(compiled.querySelector('.content span')?.textContent).toContain(
30 |       'client_angular app is running!',
31 |     );
32 |   });
33 | });
```

src/app/app.component.ts
```
1 | import { UserService } from './Services/auth/user.service';
2 | import { ToolbarService } from './Services/toolbar/toolbar.service';
3 | import { OnInit } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { Component } from '@angular/core';
5 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
6 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
7 | import { version } from '@DTOs/version';
8 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
9 | import { ConfirmationBoxComponent } from './Pages/confirmation-box/confirmation-box.component';
10 | 
11 | @Component({
12 |   selector: 'app-root',
13 |   templateUrl: './app.component.html',
14 |   styleUrls: ['./app.component.scss'],
15 | })
16 | export class AppComponent implements OnInit {
17 |   userMail: string = '';
18 |   userRole: string = '';
19 |   version: string = '';
20 |   userIsLoggedIn: boolean = false;
21 | 
22 |   editModeActive: boolean = false;
23 |   chatActive: boolean = false;
24 |   constructor(
25 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
26 |     private readonly router: Router,
27 |     public dialog: MatDialog,
28 |     public toolbarService: ToolbarService,
29 |   ) {
30 |     this.version = version; // Client Version Number
31 |     // Subscribe to the authentication observable
32 |     this.userService.isAuthenticated$.subscribe(isAuthenticated => {
33 |       this.userIsLoggedIn = isAuthenticated;
34 |       if (isAuthenticated) {
35 |         this.userMail = userService.getEmail();
36 |         this.userRole = userService.getRole();
37 |         if (this.userRole != 'ADMIN') {
38 |           this.userService.disableEditMode();
39 |         }
40 |       }
41 |     });
42 |   }
43 | 
44 |   openContact() {
45 |     const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(ContactComponent);
46 |     dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {});
47 |   }
48 | 
49 |   openDatenschutz() {
50 |     const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(DatenschutzComponent);
51 |     dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {});
52 |   }
53 | 
54 |   openImpressum() {
55 |     const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(ImpressumComponent);
56 |     dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {});
57 |   }
58 | 
59 |   showProgress() {
60 |     this.userService.getUserTotalProgress().subscribe(data => {
61 |       const userTotalProgress = data;
62 |       const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(ProgressComponent);
63 |       dialogRef.componentInstance.userTotalProgress = userTotalProgress;
64 |       dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {});
65 |     });
66 |     //console.log("User Total Progress: " + userTotalProgress);
67 |   }
68 | 
69 |   // lecturers view
70 |   onToggleEditorMode() {
71 |     this.editModeActive = !this.editModeActive;
72 |     if (this.editModeActive) {
73 |       this.userService.enableEditMode();
74 |     } else {
75 |       this.userService.disableEditMode();
76 |     }
77 |   }
78 | 
79 |   ngOnInit() {
80 |     //this.toolbarService.show();
81 |     //this.disableConsoleInProduction()
82 |   }
83 | 
84 |   toggleChatBot(): void {
85 |     console.log('toggleChatBot called, current state:', this.chatActive);
86 |     this.chatActive = !this.chatActive;
87 |     console.log('toggleChatBot new state:', this.chatActive);
88 |   }
89 | 
90 |   disableConsoleInProduction(): void {
91 |     if (environment.production) {
92 |       console.warn(`🚨 Console output is disabled on production!`);
93 |       console.log = function (): void {};
94 |       console.debug = function (): void {};
95 |       console.warn = function (): void {};
96 |       console.info = function (): void {};
97 |     }
98 |   }
99 | 
100 |   logOut(logOutAllUserDevices: boolean) {
101 |     if (logOutAllUserDevices) {
102 |       const dialog = this.dialog.open(ConfirmationBoxComponent, {
103 |         data: {
104 |           title: 'Abmeldung bestätigen',
105 |           message: 'Möchten Sie sich wirklich von allen Geräten abmelden?',
106 |           decline: 'Abbrechen',
107 |           accept: 'Abmelden',
108 |           swapButtons: false,
109 |           swapColors: true,
110 |         },
111 |       });
112 | 
113 |       dialog.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {
114 |         if (result) {
115 |           this.userService.logout(true).then(() => {
116 |             this.userIsLoggedIn = false;
117 | 
118 |             // Open CAS logout URL in a new tab
119 |             window.open('https://cas.zimt.uni-siegen.de/cas/logout', '_blank');
120 | 
121 |             // Navigate to the login page in the current tab
122 |             this.router.navigate(['/login']);
123 |           });
124 |         }
125 |       });
126 |     } else {
127 |       this.userService.logout(false).then(() => {
128 |         this.userIsLoggedIn = false;
129 | 
130 |         // Open CAS logout URL in a new tab
131 |         window.open('https://cas.zimt.uni-siegen.de/cas/logout', '_blank');
132 | 
133 |         // Navigate to the login page in the current tab
134 |         this.router.navigate(['/login']);
135 |       });
136 |     }
137 |   }
138 | }
139 | 
140 | @Component({
141 |   selector: 'impressum',
142 |   templateUrl: './about/impressum.html',
143 | })
144 | export class ImpressumComponent {}
145 | 
146 | @Component({
147 |   selector: 'datenschutz',
148 |   templateUrl: './about/datenschutz.html',
149 | })
150 | export class DatenschutzComponent {}
151 | 
152 | @Component({
153 |   selector: 'contact',
154 |   templateUrl: './about/contact.html',
155 | })
156 | export class ContactComponent {
157 |   constructor(public dialog: MatDialog) {}
158 | }
159 | 
160 | @Component({
161 |   selector: 'progressInfo',
162 |   templateUrl: './about/progress.html',
163 | })
164 | export class ProgressComponent {
165 |   userTotalProgress: number = -1;
166 | }
```

src/assets/prism-ghcolors.css
```
1 | /**
2 |  * GHColors theme by Avi Aryan (http://aviaryan.in)
3 |  * Inspired by Github syntax coloring
4 |  */
5 | 
6 | code[class*="language-"],
7 | pre[class*="language-"] {
8 | 	color: #393A34;
9 | 	font-family: "Consolas", "Bitstream Vera Sans Mono", "Courier New", Courier, monospace;
10 | 	direction: ltr;
11 | 	text-align: left;
12 | 	white-space: pre;
13 | 	word-spacing: normal;
14 | 	word-break: normal;
15 | 	font-size: .9em;
16 | 	line-height: 1.2em;
17 | 
18 | 	-moz-tab-size: 4;
19 | 	-o-tab-size: 4;
20 | 	tab-size: 4;
21 | 
22 | 	-webkit-hyphens: none;
23 | 	-moz-hyphens: none;
24 | 	-ms-hyphens: none;
25 | 	hyphens: none;
26 | }
27 | 
28 | pre > code[class*="language-"] {
29 | 	font-size: 1em;
30 | }
31 | 
32 | pre[class*="language-"]::-moz-selection, pre[class*="language-"] ::-moz-selection,
33 | code[class*="language-"]::-moz-selection, code[class*="language-"] ::-moz-selection {
34 | 	background: #b3d4fc;
35 | }
36 | 
37 | pre[class*="language-"]::selection, pre[class*="language-"] ::selection,
38 | code[class*="language-"]::selection, code[class*="language-"] ::selection {
39 | 	background: #b3d4fc;
40 | }
41 | 
42 | /* Code blocks */
43 | pre[class*="language-"] {
44 | 	padding: 1em;
45 | 	margin: .5em 0;
46 | 	overflow: auto;
47 | 	border: 1px solid #dddddd;
48 | 	background-color: white;
49 | }
50 | 
51 | /* Inline code */
52 | :not(pre) > code[class*="language-"] {
53 | 	padding: .2em;
54 | 	padding-top: 1px;
55 | 	padding-bottom: 1px;
56 | 	background: #f8f8f8;
57 | 	border: 1px solid #dddddd;
58 | }
59 | 
60 | .token.comment,
61 | .token.prolog,
62 | .token.doctype,
63 | .token.cdata {
64 | 	color: #999988;
65 | 	font-style: italic;
66 | }
67 | 
68 | .token.namespace {
69 | 	opacity: .7;
70 | }
71 | 
72 | .token.string,
73 | .token.attr-value {
74 | 	color: #e3116c;
75 | }
76 | 
77 | .token.punctuation,
78 | .token.operator {
79 | 	color: #393A34; /* no highlight */
80 | }
81 | 
82 | .token.entity,
83 | .token.url,
84 | .token.symbol,
85 | .token.number,
86 | .token.boolean,
87 | .token.variable,
88 | .token.constant,
89 | .token.property,
90 | .token.regex,
91 | .token.inserted {
92 | 	color: #36acaa;
93 | }
94 | 
95 | .token.atrule,
96 | .token.keyword,
97 | .token.attr-name,
98 | .language-autohotkey .token.selector {
99 | 	color: #00a4db;
100 | }
101 | 
102 | .token.function,
103 | .token.deleted,
104 | .language-autohotkey .token.tag {
105 | 	color: #9a050f;
106 | }
107 | 
108 | .token.tag,
109 | .token.selector,
110 | .language-autohotkey .token.keyword {
111 | 	color: #00009f;
112 | }
113 | 
114 | .token.important,
115 | .token.function,
116 | .token.bold {
117 | 	font-weight: bold;
118 | }
119 | 
120 | .token.italic {
121 | 	font-style: italic;
122 | }
```

src/styles/sprotty-styles.scss
```
1 | // sprotty styles
2 | //nord colors
3 | $concept-header-color: #3b4252;
4 | $concept-background-color: #d8dee9;
5 | 
6 | $mini-concept-background: #3b4252;
7 | 
8 | $leaf-concept-color: darken(#5e81ac, 10%);
9 | $leaf-concept-border: #3b4252;
10 | 
11 | $title-text-color: #eceff4;
12 | 
13 | $edge-color: #2e3440;
14 | 
15 | $progress-goal: #e9dbc0;
16 | $progress-achieved: #88bb21;
17 | 
18 | $highlight-color: #8fbcbb;
19 | $dark-highlight-color: #5e81ac;
20 | 
21 | .sprotty-graph {
22 |   width: 100%;
23 |   height: 47vh;
24 |   font-size: 15pt;
25 | }
26 | 
27 | .sprotty-edge {
28 |   fill: none;
29 |   stroke: $edge-color;
30 |   stroke-width: 4px;
31 | }
32 | 
33 | .sprotty-node.concept {
34 |   fill: $concept-background-color; //#d8d9e2;
35 |   stroke: $concept-header-color; //#2b356e;
36 |   stroke-width: 3;
37 |   filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 1));
38 | }
39 | 
40 | .sprotty-node.leaf-concept {
41 |   fill: $leaf-concept-color; //#2b356e;
42 |   stroke: $leaf-concept-border; //#2b356e;
43 |   stroke-width: 2;
44 |   filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 1));
45 | }
46 | 
47 | .sprotty-node.mini-concept {
48 |   fill: $mini-concept-background; //#2b356e;
49 |   stroke: #3b4252; //#2b356e;
50 |   stroke-width: 2;
51 | }
52 | 
53 | .sprotty-concept-header {
54 |   fill: #3b4252//#2b356e;
55 | }
56 | 
57 | // text {
58 | //     stroke-width: 0;
59 | //     stroke: #000;
60 | //     fill: #000;
61 | //     font-family: sans-serif;
62 | //     font-size: 12pt;
63 | //     text-anchor: middle;
64 | // }
65 | 
66 | .sprotty-node {
67 |   stroke-width: 0;
68 |   font-weight: bold;
69 | }
70 | 
71 | .sprotty-button {
72 |   fill: #fff;
73 |   stroke-width: 1;
74 |   cursor: pointer;
75 | }
76 | 
77 | .sprotty-node.selected {
78 |   stroke-width: 4;
79 |   stroke: $highlight-color;
80 |   //filter: drop-shadow(0px 0px 8px #2b356e);
81 | }
82 | 
83 | .sprotty-node.mouseover:not(.selected) {
84 |   stroke-width: 4;
85 | }
86 | 
87 | .sprotty-label {
88 |   stroke-width: 0;
89 |   fill: #000000;
90 |   font-weight: inherit;
91 |   text-align: inherit;
92 |   font-size: 100%;
93 | }
94 | 
95 | .sprotty-label.heading {
96 |   font-weight: bold;
97 |   fill: #eceff4;
98 |   //display: inline-block;
99 |   //width: 100%;
100 | }
101 | 
102 | .sprotty-edge.selected {
103 |   stroke: $highlight-color;
104 |   stroke-width: 4px;
105 | }
106 | 
107 | .sprotty-edge.mouseover:not(.selected) {
108 |   stroke-width: 3px;
109 | }
110 | 
111 | .sprotty-missing {
112 |   stroke-width: 1;
113 |   stroke: #f00;
114 |   fill: #f00;
115 |   font-size: 14pt;
116 |   text-anchor: middle;
117 | }
118 | 
119 | .sprotty-popup-title {
120 |   font-weight: bold;
121 |   margin-bottom: 10px;
122 | }
123 | 
124 | .sprotty-popup-body > p {
125 |   margin-bottom: 2px;
126 | }
127 | 
128 | .class-context-menu {
129 |   background-color: #dee2e6;
130 |   display: flex;
131 |   flex-direction: column;
132 |   position: fixed;
133 |   border: 1px solid #adb5bd;
134 |   border-radius: 3px;
135 |   padding: 1px;
136 |   color: #000;
137 | }
138 | 
139 | .class-context-menu-item {
140 |   background-color: #dee2e6;
141 |   padding: 2px;
142 |   padding-left: 15px;
143 |   padding-right: 15px;
144 |   min-width: 100px;
145 |   font-family: sans-serif;
146 |   cursor: default;
147 | }
148 | 
149 | .class-context-menu-item.disabled-action {
150 |   color: darkgray;
151 | }
152 | 
153 | .class-context-menu-item:empty {
154 |   padding: 0px;
155 |   border-bottom: 1.5px solid #adb5bd;
156 |   margin-left: 15px;
157 |   margin-right: 15px;
158 |   margin-top: 4px;
159 |   margin-bottom: 4px;
160 | }
161 | 
162 | .class-context-menu-item:hover:not(.disabled-action) {
163 |   color: $dark-highlight-color;
164 | }
165 | 
166 | .sprotty-progress-bar-segment {
167 |   stroke: none;
168 | }
169 | 
170 | .sprotty-progress-bar-segment.achieved {
171 |   fill: $progress-achieved; /* Color for achieved segments */
172 | }
173 | 
174 | .sprotty-progress-bar-segment.goal {
175 |   fill: $progress-goal; /* Color for goal segments */
176 | }
177 | 
178 | .sprotty-progress-bar-segment.leaf {
179 |   stroke-width: 2; // Border width
180 |   stroke: $leaf-concept-border;
181 | }
182 | 
183 | .sprotty-progress-bar-border {
184 |   stroke-width: 1; // Border width
185 |   stroke: $concept-header-color;
186 |   stroke-width: 2;
187 |   fill: none;
188 | }
189 | 
190 | .sprotty-hidden {
191 |   position: fixed;
192 | }
```

src/app/about/contact.html
```
1 | <h2 mat-dialog-title>Kontakt, Fragen und Hilfe.</h2>
2 | <mat-dialog-content class="mat-typography">
3 |   <h2 style="font-style: bold">Euer Feedback hilft uns weiter!</h2>
4 |   <p>
5 |     Ob Fehler, Verbesserungsvorschläge oder Fragen, eure Nachrichten helfen uns, GOALS zu verbessern
6 |     und weiterzuentwickeln.
7 |   </p>
8 |   <p>
9 |     Schreibt uns also einfach direkt und formlos eine E-Mail an
10 |     <a style="font-weight: bold" href="mailto:goals@uni-siegen.de">goals&#64;uni-siegen.de</a>.
11 |   </p>
12 |   <p>Wir melden uns dann so schnell wie möglich bei euch zurück :)</p>
13 | </mat-dialog-content>
14 | <mat-dialog-actions align="end">
15 |   <button mat-button mat-dialog-close>Okay</button>
16 |   <!-- <button mat-button [mat-dialog-close]="true" cdkFocusInitial>Installieren</button>-->
17 | </mat-dialog-actions>
```

src/app/about/datenschutz.html
```
1 | <h3 mat-dialog-title>Datenschutzerklärung</h3>
2 | <mat-dialog-content class="mat-typography">
3 |   <h2>1. Datenschutz auf einen Blick</h2>
4 |   <h3 style="font-weight: bold">Allgemeine Hinweise</h3>
5 |   <p>
6 |     Die folgenden Hinweise geben einen einfachen &Uuml;berblick dar&uuml;ber, was mit Ihren
7 |     personenbezogenen Daten passiert, wenn Sie diese Website besuchen. Personenbezogene Daten sind
8 |     alle Daten, mit denen Sie pers&ouml;nlich identifiziert werden k&ouml;nnen. Ausf&uuml;hrliche
9 |     Informationen zum Thema Datenschutz entnehmen Sie unserer unter diesem Text aufgef&uuml;hrten
10 |     Datenschutzerkl&auml;rung.
11 |   </p>
12 |   <h3 style="font-weight: bold">Datenerfassung auf dieser Website</h3>
13 |   <h4>Wer ist verantwortlich f&uuml;r die Datenerfassung auf dieser Website?</h4>
14 |   <p>
15 |     Die Datenverarbeitung auf dieser Website erfolgt durch den Websitebetreiber. Dessen Kontaktdaten
16 |     k&ouml;nnen Sie dem Abschnitt &bdquo;Hinweis zur Verantwortlichen Stelle&ldquo; in dieser
17 |     Datenschutzerkl&auml;rung entnehmen.
18 |   </p>
19 |   <h4>Wie erfassen wir Ihre Daten?</h4>
20 |   <p>
21 |     Ihre Daten werden zum einen dadurch erhoben, dass Sie uns diese mitteilen. Hierbei kann es sich
22 |     z.&nbsp;B. um Daten handeln, die Sie in ein Kontaktformular eingeben.
23 |   </p>
24 |   <p>
25 |     Andere Daten werden automatisch oder nach Ihrer Einwilligung beim Besuch der Website durch
26 |     unsere IT-Systeme erfasst. Das sind vor allem technische Daten (z.&nbsp;B. Internetbrowser,
27 |     Betriebssystem oder Uhrzeit des Seitenaufrufs). Die Erfassung dieser Daten erfolgt automatisch,
28 |     sobald Sie diese Website betreten.
29 |   </p>
30 |   <h4>Wof&uuml;r nutzen wir Ihre Daten?</h4>
31 |   <p>
32 |     Ein Teil der Daten wird erhoben, um eine fehlerfreie Bereitstellung der Website zu
33 |     gew&auml;hrleisten. Andere Daten k&ouml;nnen zur Analyse Ihres Nutzerverhaltens verwendet
34 |     werden.
35 |   </p>
36 |   <h4>Welche Rechte haben Sie bez&uuml;glich Ihrer Daten?</h4>
37 |   <p>
38 |     Sie haben jederzeit das Recht, unentgeltlich Auskunft &uuml;ber Herkunft, Empf&auml;nger und
39 |     Zweck Ihrer gespeicherten personenbezogenen Daten zu erhalten. Sie haben au&szlig;erdem ein
40 |     Recht, die Berichtigung oder L&ouml;schung dieser Daten zu verlangen. Wenn Sie eine Einwilligung
41 |     zur Datenverarbeitung erteilt haben, k&ouml;nnen Sie diese Einwilligung jederzeit f&uuml;r die
42 |     Zukunft widerrufen. Au&szlig;erdem haben Sie das Recht, unter bestimmten Umst&auml;nden die
43 |     Einschr&auml;nkung der Verarbeitung Ihrer personenbezogenen Daten zu verlangen. Des Weiteren
44 |     steht Ihnen ein Beschwerderecht bei der zust&auml;ndigen Aufsichtsbeh&ouml;rde zu.
45 |   </p>
46 |   <p>
47 |     Hierzu sowie zu weiteren Fragen zum Thema Datenschutz k&ouml;nnen Sie sich jederzeit an uns
48 |     wenden.
49 |   </p>
50 |   <h2>2. Hosting</h2>
51 |   <p>Wir hosten die Inhalte unserer Website bei folgendem Anbieter:</p>
52 |   <h3 style="font-weight: bold">Internes Hosting</h3>
53 |   <p>
54 |     Diese Website wird intern gehostet und ist nur aus dem VPN der Universität Siegen für
55 |     Universitätsmitglieder erreichbar. Die personenbezogenen Daten, die auf dieser Website erfasst
56 |     werden, werden auf den Servern des Hosters / der Hoster gespeichert. Hierbei kann es sich
57 |     v.&nbsp;a. um IP-Adressen, Kontaktanfragen, Meta- und Kommunikationsdaten, Benutzernamen,
58 |     Websitezugriffe und sonstige Daten, die &uuml;ber eine Website generiert werden, handeln.
59 |   </p>
60 |   <p>
61 |     Das externe Hosting erfolgt zum Zwecke der Vertragserf&uuml;llung gegen&uuml;ber unseren
62 |     potenziellen und bestehenden Kunden (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. b DSGVO) und im Interesse einer
63 |     sicheren, schnellen und effizienten Bereitstellung unseres Online-Angebots durch einen
64 |     professionellen Anbieter (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. f DSGVO). Sofern eine entsprechende Einwilligung
65 |     abgefragt wurde, erfolgt die Verarbeitung ausschlie&szlig;lich auf Grundlage von Art. 6 Abs. 1
66 |     lit. a DSGVO und &sect; 25 Abs. 1 TTDSG, soweit die Einwilligung die Speicherung von Cookies
67 |     oder den Zugriff auf Informationen im Endger&auml;t des Nutzers (z.&nbsp;B.
68 |     Device-Fingerprinting) im Sinne des TTDSG umfasst. Die Einwilligung ist jederzeit widerrufbar.
69 |   </p>
70 |   <p>
71 |     Unser(e) Hoster wird bzw. werden Ihre Daten nur insoweit verarbeiten, wie dies zur
72 |     Erf&uuml;llung seiner Leistungspflichten erforderlich ist und unsere Weisungen in Bezug auf
73 |     diese Daten befolgen.
74 |   </p>
75 |   <p>Wir setzen folgende(n) Hoster ein:</p>
76 |   <p>Universität Siegen (ZIMT)</p>
77 |   <h2>3. Allgemeine Hinweise und Pflicht&shy;informationen</h2>
78 |   <h3 style="font-weight: bold">Datenschutz</h3>
79 |   <p>
80 |     Die Betreiber dieser Seiten nehmen den Schutz Ihrer pers&ouml;nlichen Daten sehr ernst. Wir
81 |     behandeln Ihre personenbezogenen Daten vertraulich und entsprechend den gesetzlichen
82 |     Datenschutzvorschriften sowie dieser Datenschutzerkl&auml;rung.
83 |   </p>
84 |   <p>
85 |     Wenn Sie diese Website benutzen, werden verschiedene personenbezogene Daten erhoben.
86 |     Personenbezogene Daten sind Daten, mit denen Sie pers&ouml;nlich identifiziert werden
87 |     k&ouml;nnen. Die vorliegende Datenschutzerkl&auml;rung erl&auml;utert, welche Daten wir erheben
88 |     und wof&uuml;r wir sie nutzen. Sie erl&auml;utert auch, wie und zu welchem Zweck das geschieht.
89 |   </p>
90 |   <p>
91 |     Wir weisen darauf hin, dass die Daten&uuml;bertragung im Internet (z.&nbsp;B. bei der
92 |     Kommunikation per E-Mail) Sicherheitsl&uuml;cken aufweisen kann. Ein l&uuml;ckenloser Schutz der
93 |     Daten vor dem Zugriff durch Dritte ist nicht m&ouml;glich.
94 |   </p>
95 |   <h3 style="font-weight: bold">Hinweis zur verantwortlichen Stelle</h3>
96 |   <p>Die verantwortliche Stelle f&uuml;r die Datenverarbeitung auf dieser Website ist:</p>
97 |   <p>
98 |     Lehrstuhl Betriebssysteme und verteilte Systeme<br />
99 |     H&ouml;lderlinstra&szlig;e 3a<br />
100 |     57076 Siegen
101 |   </p>
102 | 
103 |   <p>
104 |     Telefon: 02717404047<br />
105 |     E-Mail: goals&#64;uni-siegen.de
106 |   </p>
107 |   <p>
108 |     Verantwortliche Stelle ist die nat&uuml;rliche oder juristische Person, die allein oder
109 |     gemeinsam mit anderen &uuml;ber die Zwecke und Mittel der Verarbeitung von personenbezogenen
110 |     Daten (z.&nbsp;B. Namen, E-Mail-Adressen o. &Auml;.) entscheidet.
111 |   </p>
112 | 
113 |   <h3 style="font-weight: bold">Speicherdauer</h3>
114 |   <p>
115 |     Soweit innerhalb dieser Datenschutzerkl&auml;rung keine speziellere Speicherdauer genannt wurde,
116 |     verbleiben Ihre personenbezogenen Daten bei uns, bis der Zweck f&uuml;r die Datenverarbeitung
117 |     entf&auml;llt. Wenn Sie ein berechtigtes L&ouml;schersuchen geltend machen oder eine
118 |     Einwilligung zur Datenverarbeitung widerrufen, werden Ihre Daten gel&ouml;scht, sofern wir keine
119 |     anderen rechtlich zul&auml;ssigen Gr&uuml;nde f&uuml;r die Speicherung Ihrer personenbezogenen
120 |     Daten haben (z.&nbsp;B. steuer- oder handelsrechtliche Aufbewahrungsfristen); im letztgenannten
121 |     Fall erfolgt die L&ouml;schung nach Fortfall dieser Gr&uuml;nde.
122 |   </p>
123 |   <h3 style="font-weight: bold">
124 |     Allgemeine Hinweise zu den Rechtsgrundlagen der Datenverarbeitung auf dieser Website
125 |   </h3>
126 |   <p>
127 |     Sofern Sie in die Datenverarbeitung eingewilligt haben, verarbeiten wir Ihre personenbezogenen
128 |     Daten auf Grundlage von Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. a DSGVO bzw. Art. 9 Abs. 2 lit. a DSGVO, sofern
129 |     besondere Datenkategorien nach Art. 9 Abs. 1 DSGVO verarbeitet werden. Im Falle einer
130 |     ausdr&uuml;cklichen Einwilligung in die &Uuml;bertragung personenbezogener Daten in Drittstaaten
131 |     erfolgt die Datenverarbeitung au&szlig;erdem auf Grundlage von Art. 49 Abs. 1 lit. a DSGVO.
132 |     Sofern Sie in die Speicherung von Cookies oder in den Zugriff auf Informationen in Ihr
133 |     Endger&auml;t (z.&nbsp;B. via Device-Fingerprinting) eingewilligt haben, erfolgt die
134 |     Datenverarbeitung zus&auml;tzlich auf Grundlage von &sect; 25 Abs. 1 TTDSG. Die Einwilligung ist
135 |     jederzeit widerrufbar. Sind Ihre Daten zur Vertragserf&uuml;llung oder zur Durchf&uuml;hrung
136 |     vorvertraglicher Ma&szlig;nahmen erforderlich, verarbeiten wir Ihre Daten auf Grundlage des Art.
137 |     6 Abs. 1 lit. b DSGVO. Des Weiteren verarbeiten wir Ihre Daten, sofern diese zur Erf&uuml;llung
138 |     einer rechtlichen Verpflichtung erforderlich sind auf Grundlage von Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. c DSGVO.
139 |     Die Datenverarbeitung kann ferner auf Grundlage unseres berechtigten Interesses nach Art. 6 Abs.
140 |     1 lit. f DSGVO erfolgen. &Uuml;ber die jeweils im Einzelfall einschl&auml;gigen Rechtsgrundlagen
141 |     wird in den folgenden Abs&auml;tzen dieser Datenschutzerkl&auml;rung informiert.
142 |   </p>
143 |   <h3 style="font-weight: bold">Widerruf Ihrer Einwilligung zur Datenverarbeitung</h3>
144 |   <p>
145 |     Viele Datenverarbeitungsvorg&auml;nge sind nur mit Ihrer ausdr&uuml;cklichen Einwilligung
146 |     m&ouml;glich. Sie k&ouml;nnen eine bereits erteilte Einwilligung jederzeit widerrufen. Die

src/app/Directives/draggable-height.directive.ts
```
1 | import { ElementRef, Renderer2, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Directive } from '@angular/core';
3 | @Directive({
4 |   selector: '[appDraggableHeight]', // Defines the selector to be used in templates for applying this directive.
5 | })
6 | export class DraggableHeightDirective implements OnInit {
7 |   private resizeHandle!: HTMLElement; // Handle for the element used to drag and resize.
8 | 
9 |   constructor(
10 |     private readonly el: ElementRef,
11 |     private readonly renderer: Renderer2,
12 |   ) {
13 |     // ElementRef is used to access the host element.
14 |     // Renderer2 is used for rendering purposes which is a more secure way to manipulate the DOM.
15 |   }
16 | 
17 |   ngOnInit() {
18 |     // Lifecycle hook that is called after Angular has initialized all data-bound properties.
19 |     this.resizeHandle = this.el.nativeElement.querySelector('.resize-handle');
20 | 
21 |     // Attach mousedown event listener if the resize handle is found.
22 |     if (this.resizeHandle) {
23 |       this.resizeHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', this.onMousedown.bind(this));
24 |     }
25 |   }
26 | 
27 |   onMousedown(event: MouseEvent) {
28 |     event.preventDefault(); // Prevents any default action associated with this event.
29 | 
30 |     const startY = event.clientY; // Starting Y-coordinate of the mouse.
31 |     const startHeight = parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(this.el.nativeElement).height, 10); // Starting height of the element.
32 | 
33 |     const mouseMove = (moveEvent: MouseEvent) => {
34 |       moveEvent.preventDefault(); // Prevent default action during move.
35 |       const newHeight = startHeight + (moveEvent.clientY - startY); // Calculate new height based on mouse movement.
36 |       const vh = window.innerHeight * 0.01; // Calculate value of 1vh based on current window height.
37 |       let newHeightVh = newHeight / vh; // Convert new height to vh units.
38 | 
39 |       newHeightVh = Math.max(10, Math.min(newHeightVh, 50)); // Constrain the height between 10vh and 50vh.
40 | 
41 |       this.renderer.setStyle(this.el.nativeElement, 'height', `${newHeightVh}vh`); // Apply the new height.
42 |     };
43 | 
44 |     const mouseUp = () => {
45 |       // Cleanup: remove event listeners when resizing is complete.
46 |       document.removeEventListener('mousemove', mouseMove);
47 |       document.removeEventListener('mouseup', mouseUp);
48 |     };
49 | 
50 |     // Attach mousemove and mouseup event listeners to document.
51 |     document.addEventListener('mousemove', mouseMove);
52 |     document.addEventListener('mouseup', mouseUp);
53 |   }
54 | }
```

src/app/Guards/is-admin.guard.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
3 | import { UserService } from '../Services/auth/user.service';
4 | 
5 | /**
6 |  * This guard checks if the user is logged in and redirects to the login page if not.
7 |  */
8 | @Injectable()
9 | export class AdminGuard {
10 |   constructor(
11 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
12 |     private readonly router: Router,
13 |   ) {}
14 | 
15 |   /**
16 |    * Checks if the user is logged in and redirects to the login page if not.
17 |    * @returns { Promise<boolean> } True if the user is logged in, false if not.
18 |    */
19 |   async canActivate(): Promise<boolean> {
20 |     const userRole = this.userService.getRole();
21 |     if (userRole !== 'ADMIN') {
22 |       this.router.navigate(['/login']);
23 |       return false;
24 |     }
25 |     return true;
26 |   }
27 | }
```

src/app/Guards/is-logged-in.guard.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
3 | import { UserService } from '../Services/auth/user.service';
4 | 
5 | /**
6 |  * This guard checks if the user is logged in and redirects to the login page if not.
7 |  */
8 | @Injectable()
9 | export class LoggedInGuard {
10 |   constructor(
11 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
12 |     private readonly router: Router,
13 |   ) {}
14 | 
15 |   /**
16 |    * Checks if the user is logged in and redirects to the login page if not.
17 |    * @returns { Promise<boolean> } True if the user is logged in, false if not.
18 |    */
19 |   async canActivate(): Promise<boolean> {
20 |     const isLoggedIn = this.userService.isUserLoggedIn();
21 |     if (!isLoggedIn) {
22 |       this.router.navigate(['/login']);
23 |       return false;
24 |     }
25 |     return true;
26 |   }
27 | }
```

src/app/Guards/navigation-preference.guard.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { ActivatedRouteSnapshot, RouterStateSnapshot, Router } from '@angular/router';
3 | import {
4 |   NavigationPreferenceService,
5 |   NavigationType,
6 | } from '../Services/navigation/navigation-preference.service';
7 | 
8 | @Injectable({
9 |   providedIn: 'root',
10 | })
11 | export class NavigationPreferenceGuard {
12 |   constructor(
13 |     private readonly navigationPreferenceService: NavigationPreferenceService,
14 |     private readonly router: Router,
15 |   ) {}
16 | 
17 |   canActivate(route: ActivatedRouteSnapshot, state: RouterStateSnapshot): boolean {
18 |     const preference = this.navigationPreferenceService.currentPreference;
19 |     const url = state.url;
20 | 
21 |     const currentPath = url.includes('/graph')
22 |       ? ('graph' as const)
23 |       : url.includes('/mobile-navigator')
24 |         ? ('mobile' as const)
25 |         : url.includes('/highlight-navigator')
26 |           ? ('highlight' as const)
27 |           : null;
28 | 
29 |     if (currentPath && currentPath !== preference) {
30 |       this.redirectBasedOnPreference(preference);
31 |       return false;
32 |     }
33 | 
34 |     return true;
35 |   }
36 | 
37 |   private redirectBasedOnPreference(preference: NavigationType): void {
38 |     const routes = {
39 |       graph: '/dashboard/graph',
40 |       mobile: '/dashboard/mobile-navigator',
41 |       highlight: '/dashboard/highlight-navigator',
42 |     } as const;
43 |     this.router.navigate([routes[preference]]);
44 |   }
45 | }
```

src/app/Guards/registered-for-subject.guard.ts

1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { ActivatedRouteSnapshot, RouterStateSnapshot, UrlTree, Router } from '@angular/router';
3 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { UserService } from '../Services/auth/user.service';
5 | 
6 | @Injectable({
7 |   providedIn: 'root',
8 | })
9 | export class RegisteredForSubjectGuard {
10 |   constructor(
11 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
12 |     private readonly router: Router,
13 |   ) {}
14 | 
15 |   canActivate(
16 |     route: ActivatedRouteSnapshot,
17 |     state: RouterStateSnapshot,
18 |   ): Observable<boolean | UrlTree> | Promise<boolean | UrlTree> | boolean | UrlTree {
19 |     if (this.userService.isRegisteredForSubject('Tragkonstruktion 3')) {
20 |       // ToDo Make dynamic
21 |       return true;
22 |     } else {
23 |       return this.router.createUrlTree(['/not-registered']);
24 |     }
25 |   }
26 | }
```

src/app/Interceptors/auth-interceptor.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import {
3 |   HttpInterceptor,
4 |   HttpRequest,
5 |   HttpHandler,
6 |   HttpEvent,
7 |   HttpErrorResponse,
8 | } from '@angular/common/http';
9 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
10 | import { switchMap, throwError } from 'rxjs';
11 | import { catchError } from 'rxjs/operators';
12 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
13 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
14 | import { UserService } from '../Services/auth/user.service';
15 | 
16 | /**
17 |  * The AuthInterceptor class intercepts Http requests and
18 |  * adds an "Authorization" header with the current access token.
19 |  */
20 | @Injectable()
21 | export class AuthInterceptor implements HttpInterceptor {
22 |   constructor(
23 |     private readonly router: Router,
24 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
25 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
26 |   ) {}
27 | 
28 |   /**
29 |    * Intercepts HTTP requests to add authentication headers and handle errors.
30 |    *
31 |    * @param request - The outgoing HTTP request.
32 |    * @param next - The next interceptor in the chain.
33 |    * @returns An observable of the HTTP event.
34 |    */
35 |   intercept(request: HttpRequest<any>, next: HttpHandler): Observable<HttpEvent<any>> {
36 |     // Exclude Helper-App requests from all authentication processing
37 |     if (
38 |       request.url.includes('localhost:3001') ||
39 |       request.url.includes('127.0.0.1:3001') ||
40 |       request.headers.has('Skip-Auth-Interceptor')
41 |     ) {
42 |       console.log('AuthInterceptor: Skipping Helper-App request:', request.url);
43 |       return next.handle(request);
44 |     }
45 | 
46 |     const accessToken = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
47 |     const deviceId = this.userService.getDeviceId();
48 | 
49 |     // Add the device ID to the request
50 |     if (deviceId) {
51 |       request = request.clone({
52 |         setHeaders: {
53 |           'Device-ID': deviceId,
54 |         },
55 |       });
56 |     }
57 | 
58 |     // Exclude the refresh-token request from interception, after the device ID is added
59 |     if (request.url.includes('/auth/refresh')) {
60 |       return next.handle(request);
61 |     }
62 | 
63 |     // Add the access token to the request
64 |     if (accessToken) {
65 |       request = request.clone({
66 |         setHeaders: {
67 |           Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
68 |         },
69 |       });
70 |     }
71 | 
72 |     // send cloned request with header to the next handler.
73 |     return next.handle(request).pipe(
74 |       catchError((err: HttpErrorResponse) => {
75 |         this.checkError(err);
76 | 
77 |         if (err.status === 403 || err.status === 498) {
78 |           this.userService.removeTokens();
79 |           this.router.navigate(['/login']);
80 |         }
81 | 
82 |         if (err.status === 401) {
83 |           // Access token expired, try refreshing
84 |           console.log('Access token expired, trying to refresh...');
85 | 
86 |           const refreshToken = this.userService.getRefreshToken();
87 |           if (!refreshToken) {
88 |             // Refresh token is expired or not available
89 |             // redirect to login page
90 |             this.router.navigate(['/login']);
91 |             return throwError(() => new Error('Unauthorized'));
92 |           }
93 | 
94 |           return this.userService.refreshTokens(refreshToken).pipe(
95 |             switchMap(() => {
96 |               // Retry the original request with the new access token
97 |               console.log('Access token refreshed successfully, retrying original request...');
98 |               request = request.clone({
99 |                 setHeaders: {
100 |                   Authorization: `Bearer ${this.userService.getAccessToken()}`,
101 |                   'Device-ID': deviceId,
102 |                 },
103 |               });
104 |               return next.handle(request);
105 |             }),
106 |             catchError((error: any) => {
107 |               // Refresh token is invalid or expired
108 |               this.openSnackBar('Sitzung abgelaufen. Bitte erneut anmelden', 'Warning');
109 |               this.userService.removeTokens();
110 | 
111 |               this.router.navigate(['/login']);
112 |               return throwError(() => new Error('Unauthorized'));
113 |             }),
114 |           );
115 |         } else {
116 |           return throwError(() => err);
117 |         }
118 | 
119 |         return throwError(err);
120 |       }),
121 |     );
122 |   }
123 | 
124 |   /**
125 |    * Checks the error status and handles it accordingly.
126 |    *
127 |    * @param error - The error object to be checked.
128 |    */
129 |   checkError(error: any) {
130 |     if (error.status === 401) {
131 |       return; // Unauthorized error is handled in the interceptor
132 |     } else if (error.status === 429) {
133 |       this.openSnackBar(
134 |         'Too many requests in a short time. Please try again in a minute.',
135 |         'Warning',
136 |       );
137 |     } else if (error.status === 403) {
138 |       this.openSnackBar('Authorization failed.', 'Warning');
139 |     } else {
140 |       this.openSnackBar(
141 |         `An error occurred. Please check the console.\n${error.statusText}`,
142 |         'Warning',
143 |       );
144 |     }
145 |   }
146 | 
147 |   /**
148 |    * Open a MatSnackBar with the provided message and icon.
149 |    *
150 |    * @param message - The message to display
151 |    * @param icon - The icon to display
152 |    */
153 |   private openSnackBar(message: string, icon: string): void {
154 |     this.snackBar.open(message, '', {
155 |       duration: 3000, // Time duration in milliseconds to display the snackbar
156 |       panelClass: ['snackbar'],
157 |       horizontalPosition: 'center',
158 |       verticalPosition: 'bottom',
159 |     });
160 |   }
161 | }
```

src/app/Interceptors/version.interceptor.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { HttpEvent, HttpInterceptor, HttpHandler, HttpRequest } from '@angular/common/http';
3 | import { HttpResponse } from '@angular/common/http';
4 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
5 | import { tap } from 'rxjs/operators';
6 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
7 | import { version } from '@DTOs/version';
8 | 
9 | @Injectable()
10 | export class VersionInterceptor implements HttpInterceptor {
11 |   constructor(private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar) {}
12 |   snackBarIsActive: boolean = false;
13 | 
14 |   intercept(req: HttpRequest<any>, next: HttpHandler): Observable<HttpEvent<any>> {
15 |     return next.handle(req).pipe(
16 |       tap(event => {
17 |         if (event instanceof HttpResponse) {
18 |           const serverVersion = event.headers.get('X-App-Version');
19 |           if (serverVersion && serverVersion !== version) {
20 |             if (!this.snackBarIsActive) {
21 |               this.showReloadSnackbar();
22 |               this.snackBarIsActive = true;
23 |             }
24 |           }
25 |         }
26 |       }),
27 |     );
28 |   }
29 | 
30 |   /**
31 |    * Displays a snackbar with an option to reload the application for a new version.
32 |    */
33 |   showReloadSnackbar() {
34 |     const snackBarRef = this.snackBar.open(
35 |       'Eine neue Version der Anwendung ist verfügbar!',
36 |       'Neu laden',
37 |       {
38 |         horizontalPosition: 'center',
39 |         verticalPosition: 'bottom',
40 |       },
41 |     );
42 | 
43 |     snackBarRef.onAction().subscribe(() => {
44 |       this.snackBarIsActive = false;
45 |       this.forceReload();
46 |     });
47 |   }
48 | 
49 |   /**
50 |    * Forces the browser to reload to the current page with a nocache parameter to avoid caching issues.
51 |    */
52 |   forceReload() {
53 |     const currentUrl = window.location.href;
54 |     const separator = currentUrl.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';
55 |     const newUrl = `${currentUrl}${separator}nocache=${new Date().getTime()}`;
56 |     window.location.href = newUrl;
57 |   }
58 | }
```
