src/app/Services/bat-rhino.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { HttpClient, HttpErrorResponse } from '@angular/common/http';
3 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { throwError, of } from 'rxjs';
5 | import { catchError, map, tap } from 'rxjs/operators';
6 | import { environment } from '../../environments/environment';
7 | import {
8 |   BatRhinoRequest,
9 |   BatRhinoResponse,
10 |   RhinoPathDetectionResponse,
11 |   BatRhinoSetupStatus,
12 | } from '../../../../shared/dtos/bat-rhino.dto';
13 | 
14 | /**
15 |  * BatRhinoService
16 |  * Service für die .bat-Skript-basierte Rhino-Integration
17 |  * Verwendet direkte HTTP-Aufrufe ohne Proxy-Konfiguration
18 |  */
19 | @Injectable({
20 |   providedIn: 'root',
21 | })
22 | export class BatRhinoService {
23 |   private readonly baseUrl = `${environment.server}/api/rhinobat`;
24 | 
25 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
26 | 
27 |   /**
28 |    * Führt Rhino-Befehle direkt aus (ohne Download)
29 |    * Best Practice: Ein-Klick-Lösung für sofortige Rhino-Ausführung
30 |    * @param request - Anfrage mit Rhino-Befehl und Dateipfad
31 |    * @returns Observable mit Ausführungsergebnis
32 |    */
33 |   executeDirectly(request: BatRhinoRequest): Observable<BatRhinoResponse> {
34 |     console.log('🔧 BatRhinoService: Executing Rhino directly with request:', request);
35 | 
36 |     // Map BatRhinoRequest to DirectRhinoLaunchRequest format expected by backend
37 |     const directRequest = {
38 |       filePath: request.filePath,
39 |       rhinoPath: undefined, // Let backend auto-detect
40 |       showViewport: request.showViewport || true,
41 |       batchMode: request.batchMode || true,
42 |     };
43 | 
44 |     console.log('🔧 BatRhinoService: Mapped request for direct execution:', directRequest);
45 | 
46 |     return this.http.post<any>(`${this.baseUrl}/launch-direct`, directRequest).pipe(
47 |       map(response => ({
48 |         success: response.success || false,
49 |         message: response.message || 'Unbekannte Antwort',
50 |         batScriptPath: undefined, // Not provided by direct execution
51 |         downloadUrl: undefined, // Not provided by direct execution
52 |         executionId: response.processId?.toString(), // Map processId to executionId
53 |         rhinoPath: response.rhinoPath,
54 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
55 |       })),
56 |       tap((response: BatRhinoResponse) => {
57 |         if (response.success) {
58 |           console.log('✅ BatRhinoService: Direct execution successful:', response);
59 |         } else {
60 |           console.error('❌ BatRhinoService: Direct execution failed:', response);
61 |         }
62 |       }),
63 |       catchError(error => {
64 |         console.error('🚨 BatRhinoService: Direct execution error:', error);
65 |         return of({
66 |           success: false,
67 |           message: `Fehler bei der direkten Rhino-Ausführung: ${
68 |             error.error?.message || error.message
69 |           }`,
70 |           timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
71 |         });
72 |       }),
73 |     );
74 |   }
75 | 
76 |   /**
77 |    * Generiert .bat-Skript für Rhino-Integration
78 |    * @param request - Anfrage mit Rhino-Befehl und Dateipfad
79 |    * @returns Observable mit Generierungsergebnis
80 |    */
81 |   generateScript(request: BatRhinoRequest): Observable<BatRhinoResponse> {
82 |     console.log('🔧 BatRhinoService: Generating script with request:', request);
83 | 
84 |     return this.http.post<BatRhinoResponse>(`${this.baseUrl}/generate-script`, request).pipe(
85 |       map(response => {
86 |         console.log('✅ BatRhinoService: Script generation successful:', response);
87 |         return response;
88 |       }),
89 |       catchError(this.handleError),
90 |     );
91 |   }
92 | 
93 |   /**
94 |    * Erkennt automatisch den Rhino-Installationspfad
95 |    * @returns Observable mit erkannten Rhino-Installationen
96 |    */
97 |   detectRhinoPath(): Observable<RhinoPathDetectionResponse> {
98 |     console.log('🔍 BatRhinoService: Detecting Rhino path...');
99 | 
100 |     return this.http.get<RhinoPathDetectionResponse>(`${this.baseUrl}/detect-rhino-path`).pipe(
101 |       map(response => {
102 |         console.log('✅ BatRhinoService: Rhino path detection result:', response);
103 |         return response;
104 |       }),
105 |       catchError(this.handleError),
106 |     );
107 |   }
108 | 
109 |   /**
110 |    * Überprüft den Setup-Status des Bat-Rhino Systems
111 |    * @returns Observable mit Setup-Status-Informationen
112 |    */
113 |   getSetupStatus(): Observable<BatRhinoSetupStatus> {
114 |     console.log('📊 BatRhinoService: Getting setup status...');
115 | 
116 |     return this.http.get<BatRhinoSetupStatus>(`${this.baseUrl}/setup-status`).pipe(
117 |       map(response => {
118 |         console.log('✅ BatRhinoService: Setup status retrieved:', response);
119 |         return response;
120 |       }),
121 |       catchError(this.handleError),
122 |     );
123 |   }
124 | 
125 |   /**
126 |    * Erstellt eine Standard-Anfrage für Grasshopper-Dateien
127 |    * @param filePath - Pfad zur Grasshopper-Datei
128 |    * @returns Vorkonfigurierte BatRhinoRequest
129 |    */
130 |   createGrasshopperRequest(filePath: string): BatRhinoRequest {
131 |     const rhinoCommand = `_-Grasshopper B D W L W H D O "${filePath}" W _MaxViewport _Enter`;
132 | 
133 |     return {
134 |       filePath: filePath,
135 |       rhinoCommand: rhinoCommand,
136 |       showViewport: true,
137 |       batchMode: true,
138 |       outputDirectory: undefined, // Verwendet Server-Standard
139 |     };
140 |   }
141 | 
142 |   /**
143 |    * Behandelt HTTP-Fehler und gibt benutzerfreundliche Fehlermeldungen zurück
144 |    * @param error - HTTP-Fehler-Response
145 |    * @returns Observable mit Fehlermeldung
146 |    */
147 |   private readonly handleError = (error: HttpErrorResponse): Observable<never> => {
148 |     let errorMessage = 'Ein unbekannter Fehler ist aufgetreten';
149 | 
150 |     if (error.error instanceof ErrorEvent) {
151 |       // Client-seitiger Fehler
152 |       errorMessage = `Client-Fehler: ${error.error.message}`;
153 |     } else {
154 |       // Server-seitiger Fehler
155 |       switch (error.status) {
156 |         case 401:
157 |           errorMessage = 'Nicht autorisiert. Bitte melden Sie sich an.';
158 |           break;
159 |         case 403:
160 |           errorMessage = 'Zugriff verweigert. Unzureichende Berechtigung.';
161 |           break;
162 |         case 404:
163 |           errorMessage = 'Bat-Rhino Service nicht gefunden. Ist der Server gestartet?';
164 |           break;
165 |         case 500:
166 |           errorMessage = 'Server-Fehler bei der Skript-Generierung.';
167 |           break;
168 |         default:
169 |           errorMessage = `Server-Fehler: ${error.status} - ${error.message}`;
170 |       }
171 | 
172 |       // Zusätzliche Fehlerdetails aus der Server-Response
173 |       if (error.error?.message) {
174 |         errorMessage += ` Details: ${error.error.message}`;
175 |       }
176 |     }
177 | 
178 |     console.error('🚨 BatRhinoService Error:', errorMessage, error);
179 |     return throwError(() => new Error(errorMessage));
180 |   };
181 | }
```

src/app/Services/mcslider-rhino-integration.service.ts
```
1 | /**
2 |  * McSlider Rhino Integration Service - Optimized Version
3 |  * Verwaltet die Integration zwischen McSlider-Komponente und Rhino-Fokussierung
4 |  * Stellt Business Logic für automatische Rhino-Rückleitung bereit
5 |  */
6 | 
7 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
8 | import { Observable, of, Subject, BehaviorSubject, timer, merge } from 'rxjs';
9 | import {
10 |   delay,
11 |   catchError,
12 |   tap,
13 |   switchMap,
14 |   debounceTime,
15 |   throttleTime,
16 |   shareReplay,
17 |   retry,
18 |   retryWhen,
19 |   take,
20 |   filter,
21 |   map,
22 |   finalize
23 | } from 'rxjs/operators';
24 | import { RhinoFocusService } from './rhino-focus.service';
25 | import { RhinoFocusRequestDTO, RhinoFocusResponseDTO } from '@DTOs/rhino-window.dto';
26 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
27 | 
28 | /**
29 |  * Logging-Level für strukturiertes Logging
30 |  */
31 | enum LogLevel {
32 |   DEBUG = 0,
33 |   INFO = 1,
34 |   WARN = 2,
35 |   ERROR = 3,
36 |   NONE = 4
37 | }
38 | 
39 | /**
40 |  * Erweiterte Konfiguration für McSlider-Rhino Integration
41 |  */
42 | interface McSliderRhinoConfig {
43 |   enabled: boolean;
44 |   autoFocusAfterSubmission: boolean;
45 |   autoFocusAfterCompletion: boolean;
46 |   autoFocusOnClose: boolean;
47 |   delayAfterSubmissionMs: number;
48 |   delayAfterCompletionMs: number;
49 |   delayOnCloseMs: number;
50 |   silentMode: boolean;
51 |   logging: {
52 |     enabled: boolean;
53 |     level: LogLevel;
54 |   };
55 |   rateLimiting: {
56 |     enabled: boolean;
57 |     minIntervalMs: number;
58 |     maxAttemptsPerMinute: number;
59 |   };
60 |   retry: {
61 |     enabled: boolean;
62 |     maxAttempts: number;
63 |     delayMs: number;
64 |   };
65 |   caching: {
66 |     enabled: boolean;
67 |     availabilityCacheMs: number;
68 |   };
69 | }
70 | 
71 | /**
72 |  * Environment-abhängige Standard-Konfiguration
73 |  */
74 | const DEFAULT_CONFIG: McSliderRhinoConfig = {
75 |   enabled: true,
76 |   autoFocusAfterSubmission: true,
77 |   autoFocusAfterCompletion: true,
78 |   autoFocusOnClose: true,
79 |   delayAfterSubmissionMs: 800,
80 |   delayAfterCompletionMs: 1200,
81 |   delayOnCloseMs: 300,
82 |   silentMode: environment.production,
83 |   logging: {
84 |     enabled: !environment.production,
85 |     level: environment.production ? LogLevel.WARN : LogLevel.DEBUG
86 |   },
87 |   rateLimiting: {
88 |     enabled: true,
89 |     minIntervalMs: 1000,
90 |     maxAttemptsPerMinute: 5
91 |   },
92 |   retry: {
93 |     enabled: true,
94 |     maxAttempts: 3,
95 |     delayMs: 1000
96 |   },
97 |   caching: {
98 |     enabled: true,
99 |     availabilityCacheMs: 30000
100 |   }
101 | };
102 | 
103 | /**
104 |  * Ereignis-Typen für Rhino-Integration
105 |  */
106 | export enum RhinoIntegrationEvent {
107 |   QUESTION_SUBMITTED = 'question_submitted',
108 |   ALL_QUESTIONS_COMPLETED = 'all_questions_completed',
109 |   COMPONENT_CLOSED = 'component_closed',
110 |   RETRY_QUESTION = 'retry_question',
111 |   MANUAL_SWITCH = 'manual_switch',
112 | }
113 | 
114 | /**
115 |  * Kontext-Informationen für Rhino-Integration
116 |  */
117 | export interface RhinoIntegrationContext {
118 |   event: RhinoIntegrationEvent;
119 |   questionIndex?: number;
120 |   totalQuestions?: number;
121 |   score?: number;
122 |   maxScore?: number;
123 |   isCorrect?: boolean;
124 |   source?: string;
125 |   attempt?: number;
126 |   timestamp: string;
127 | }
128 | 
129 | /**
130 |  * Fokussierungs-Request für interne Verarbeitung
131 |  */
132 | interface FocusRequest {
133 |   context: RhinoIntegrationContext;
134 |   delayMs: number;
135 |   reason: string;
136 |   priority: number; // 0 = niedrig, 1 = normal, 2 = hoch
137 | }
138 | 
139 | /**
140 |  * Metrics für Monitoring und Debugging
141 |  */
142 | interface ServiceMetrics {
143 |   totalRequests: number;
144 |   successfulRequests: number;
145 |   failedRequests: number;
146 |   throttledRequests: number;
147 |   lastRequestTime: Date | null;
148 |   averageResponseTime: number;
149 |   requestsByEvent: Record<RhinoIntegrationEvent, number>;
150 | }
151 | 
152 | @Injectable({
153 |   providedIn: 'root',
154 | })
155 | export class McSliderRhinoIntegrationService {
156 |   private config: McSliderRhinoConfig = { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG };
157 | 
158 |   // RxJS-basierte Request-Verarbeitung
159 |   private readonly focusRequests$ = new Subject<FocusRequest>();
160 |   private readonly priorityRequests$ = new Subject<FocusRequest>();
161 |   private rateLimitedFocus$!: Observable<RhinoFocusResponseDTO>;
162 | 
163 |   // Caching für Availability-Check
164 |   private readonly availabilitySubject$ = new BehaviorSubject<boolean>(true);
165 |   private readonly cacheInvalidation$ = new Subject<void>();
166 | 
167 |   // Metrics und Monitoring
168 |   private readonly metrics: ServiceMetrics = {
169 |     totalRequests: 0,
170 |     successfulRequests: 0,
171 |     failedRequests: 0,
172 |     throttledRequests: 0,
173 |     lastRequestTime: null,
174 |     averageResponseTime: 0,
175 |     requestsByEvent: {
176 |       [RhinoIntegrationEvent.QUESTION_SUBMITTED]: 0,
177 |       [RhinoIntegrationEvent.ALL_QUESTIONS_COMPLETED]: 0,
178 |       [RhinoIntegrationEvent.COMPONENT_CLOSED]: 0,
179 |       [RhinoIntegrationEvent.RETRY_QUESTION]: 0,
180 |       [RhinoIntegrationEvent.MANUAL_SWITCH]: 0
181 |     }
182 |   };
183 | 
184 |   constructor(private readonly rhinoFocusService: RhinoFocusService) {
185 |     this.initializeService();
186 |     this.log(LogLevel.INFO, 'McSliderRhinoIntegrationService initialized with optimized architecture');
187 |   }
188 | 
189 |   /**
190 |    * Initialisiert den Service mit optimierten RxJS-Streams
191 |    */
192 |   private initializeService(): void {
193 |     this.initializeRateLimitedFocus();
194 |     this.initializeAvailabilityCache();
195 |     this.initializeMetricsReset();
196 |   }
197 | 
198 |   /**
199 |    * Initialisiert RxJS-basierte Request-Verarbeitung
200 |    */
201 |   private initializeRateLimitedFocus(): void {
202 |     // Normale Requests mit Rate Limiting
203 |     const normalRequests$ = this.focusRequests$.pipe(
204 |       filter(() => this.config.rateLimiting.enabled),
205 |       debounceTime(this.config.rateLimiting.minIntervalMs / 2),
206 |       throttleTime(this.config.rateLimiting.minIntervalMs),
207 |       tap(() => this.log(LogLevel.DEBUG, 'Processing normal request'))
208 |     );
209 | 
210 |     // Priority Requests (manuelle Switches) ohne Rate Limiting
211 |     const priorityRequests$ = this.priorityRequests$.pipe(
212 |       tap(() => this.log(LogLevel.DEBUG, 'Processing priority request'))
213 |     );
214 | 
215 |     // Merge beide Streams mit Priorität für manuelle Requests
216 |     this.rateLimitedFocus$ = merge(priorityRequests$, normalRequests$).pipe(
217 |       switchMap(request => this.processFocusRequest(request)),
218 |       shareReplay({ bufferSize: 1, refCount: true })
219 |     );
220 |   }
221 | 
222 |   /**
223 |    * Initialisiert Availability-Cache
224 |    */
225 |   private initializeAvailabilityCache(): void {
226 |     if (this.config.caching.enabled) {
227 |       // Cache-Refresh alle 30 Sekunden
228 |       timer(0, this.config.caching.availabilityCacheMs).pipe(
229 |         switchMap(() => this.checkRhinoAvailability()),
230 |         tap(available => this.availabilitySubject$.next(available))
231 |       ).subscribe();
232 |     }
233 |   }
234 | 
235 |   /**
236 |    * Initialisiert Metrics-Reset
237 |    */
238 |   private initializeMetricsReset(): void {
239 |     // Reset Request-Counter alle Minute
240 |     timer(60000, 60000).subscribe(() => {
241 |       this.metrics.totalRequests = Math.max(0, this.metrics.totalRequests - 1);
242 |       this.log(LogLevel.DEBUG, 'Metrics reset performed');
243 |     });
244 |   }
245 | 
246 |   /**
247 |    * Verarbeitet Fokussierungs-Request mit optimierter Error-Handling
248 |    */
249 |   private processFocusRequest(request: FocusRequest): Observable<RhinoFocusResponseDTO> {
250 |     const startTime = Date.now();
251 |     this.updateMetrics(request);
252 | 
253 |     return of(null).pipe(
254 |       delay(request.delayMs),
255 |       tap(() => this.log(LogLevel.DEBUG, `Processing focus request: ${request.reason}`, request.context)),
256 |       switchMap(() => this.rhinoFocusService.focusFirstAvailableWindow()),
257 | 
258 |       // Optimierte Retry-Logic mit exponential backoff
259 |       retryWhen(errors =>
260 |         errors.pipe(
261 |           tap(error => this.log(LogLevel.WARN, `Retry focus request due to: ${error.message}`)),
262 |           switchMap((error, index) => {
263 |             if (!this.config.retry.enabled || index >= this.config.retry.maxAttempts) {
264 |               throw error;
265 |             }
266 |             const delayMs = this.config.retry.delayMs * Math.pow(2, index);
267 |             return timer(delayMs);
268 |           }),
269 |           take(this.config.retry.maxAttempts)
270 |         )
271 |       ),
272 | 
273 |       // Success/Error Handling mit Metrics
274 |       tap(result => {
275 |         const responseTime = Date.now() - startTime;
276 |         this.updateResponseMetrics(result.success, responseTime);
277 | 
278 |         if (result.success) {
279 |           this.log(LogLevel.INFO, `Successfully focused Rhino ${request.reason}`, {
280 |             responseTime,
281 |             context: request.context
282 |           });
283 |           this.logSuccessfulIntegration(request.context, result);
284 |         } else {
285 |           this.log(LogLevel.WARN, `Failed to focus Rhino ${request.reason}: ${result.message}`, {
286 |             responseTime,
287 |             context: request.context
288 |           });
289 |           this.logFailedIntegration(request.context, result);
290 |         }
291 |       }),
292 | 
293 |       catchError(error => this.handleFocusError(request.context, error, request.reason))
294 |     );
295 |   }
296 | 
297 |   /**
298 |    * Aktualisiert Metrics für Request
299 |    */
300 |   private updateMetrics(request: FocusRequest): void {
301 |     this.metrics.totalRequests++;
302 |     this.metrics.lastRequestTime = new Date();
303 |     this.metrics.requestsByEvent[request.context.event]++;
304 |   }
305 | 
306 |   /**
307 |    * Aktualisiert Response-Metrics
308 |    */
309 |   private updateResponseMetrics(success: boolean, responseTime: number): void {
310 |     if (success) {
311 |       this.metrics.successfulRequests++;
312 |     } else {
313 |       this.metrics.failedRequests++;
314 |     }
315 | 
316 |     // Berechne durchschnittliche Response-Zeit
317 |     const totalResponses = this.metrics.successfulRequests + this.metrics.failedRequests;
318 |     this.metrics.averageResponseTime =
319 |       (this.metrics.averageResponseTime * (totalResponses - 1) + responseTime) / totalResponses;
320 |   }
321 | 
322 |   /**
323 |    * Strukturiertes Logging mit konfigurierbaren Levels
324 |    */
325 |   private log(level: LogLevel, message: string, data?: any): void {
326 |     if (!this.config.logging.enabled || level < this.config.logging.level) {
327 |       return;
328 |     }
329 | 
330 |     const logPrefix = '[RhinoIntegration]';
331 |     const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Services/rhino-focus.service.ts
```
1 | /**
2 |  * Rhino Focus Service
3 |  * Verwaltet die Kommunikation mit dem Backend für Rhino-Fenster-Management
4 |  * Stellt Angular-Services für Rhino-Fokussierung bereit
5 |  */
6 | 
7 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
8 | import { HttpClient, HttpErrorResponse } from '@angular/common/http';
9 | import { Observable, throwError, of } from 'rxjs';
10 | import { catchError, retry, timeout, map, switchMap } from 'rxjs/operators';
11 | import { environment } from '../../environments/environment';
12 | import {
13 |   RhinoWindowInfoDTO,
14 |   RhinoFocusRequestDTO,
15 |   RhinoFocusResponseDTO,
16 |   RhinoWindowStatusDTO,
17 |   WindowsApiAvailabilityDTO,
18 |   UnifiedRhinoFocusResponseDTO,
19 |   NativeFocusRequestDTO,
20 | } from '@DTOs/index';
21 | 
22 | /**
23 |  * Konfiguration für Rhino Focus Service
24 |  */
25 | interface RhinoFocusConfig {
26 |   enabled: boolean;
27 |   retryAttempts: number;
28 |   timeoutMs: number;
29 |   delayBeforeFocusMs: number;
30 |   fallbackOnError: boolean;
31 |   useNativeImplementation: boolean;
32 |   preferUnifiedApproach: boolean;
33 | }
34 | 
35 | /**
36 |  * Standard-Konfiguration
37 |  */
38 | const DEFAULT_CONFIG: RhinoFocusConfig = {
39 |   enabled: true,
40 |   retryAttempts: 2,
41 |   timeoutMs: 5000,
42 |   delayBeforeFocusMs: 500,
43 |   fallbackOnError: true,
44 |   useNativeImplementation: true,
45 |   preferUnifiedApproach: true,
46 | };
47 | 
48 | @Injectable({
49 |   providedIn: 'root',
50 | })
51 | export class RhinoFocusService {
52 |   private readonly baseUrl = `${environment.server}/api/rhinodirect`;
53 |   private config: RhinoFocusConfig = { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG };
54 |   private isAvailable: boolean | null = null;
55 | 
56 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {
57 |     console.log('🎯 RhinoFocusService initialized');
58 |     this.checkAvailability();
59 |   }
60 | 
61 |   /**
62 |    * Konfiguration aktualisieren
63 |    * @param config - Neue Konfiguration
64 |    */
65 |   updateConfig(config: Partial<RhinoFocusConfig>): void {
66 |     this.config = { ...this.config, ...config };
67 |     console.log('⚙️ RhinoFocusService config updated:', this.config);
68 |   }
69 | 
70 |   /**
71 |    * Aktuelle Konfiguration abrufen
72 |    * @returns Aktuelle Konfiguration
73 |    */
74 |   getConfig(): RhinoFocusConfig {
75 |     return { ...this.config };
76 |   }
77 | 
78 |   /**
79 |    * Prüft die Verfügbarkeit der Windows API
80 |    * @returns Observable mit Verfügbarkeitsstatus
81 |    */
82 |   checkAvailability(): Observable<boolean> {
83 |     if (!this.config.enabled) {
84 |       this.isAvailable = false;
85 |       return of(false);
86 |     }
87 | 
88 |     return this.http.get<WindowsApiAvailabilityDTO>(`${this.baseUrl}/test-windows-api`).pipe(
89 |       timeout(this.config.timeoutMs),
90 |       map(response => {
91 |         this.isAvailable = response.available;
92 |         console.log('🧪 Rhino API availability:', response);
93 |         return response.available;
94 |       }),
95 |       catchError(error => {
96 |         console.warn('⚠️ Rhino API availability check failed:', error);
97 |         this.isAvailable = false;
98 |         return of(false);
99 |       }),
100 |     );
101 |   }
102 | 
103 |   /**
104 |    * Fokussiert ein Rhino-Fenster mit der besten verfügbaren Methode
105 |    * @param request - Fokussierungs-Anfrage
106 |    * @returns Observable mit Fokussierungs-Ergebnis
107 |    */
108 |   focusRhinoWindow(request: RhinoFocusRequestDTO = {}): Observable<RhinoFocusResponseDTO> {
109 |     console.log('is config enabled', this.config.enabled);
110 |     console.log('is available', this.isAvailable);
111 |     console.log('prefer unified approach', this.config.preferUnifiedApproach);
112 |     
113 |     if (!this.config.enabled || this.isAvailable === false) {
114 |       console.log('🚫 Rhino focus disabled or unavailable');
115 |       return of({
116 |         success: false,
117 |         message: 'Rhino-Fokussierung nicht verfügbar',
118 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
119 |       });
120 |     }
121 | 
122 |     // Use unified approach if preferred and available
123 |     if (this.config.preferUnifiedApproach) {
124 |       return this.focusRhinoWindowUnified(request).pipe(
125 |         map((unifiedResponse: UnifiedRhinoFocusResponseDTO) => ({
126 |           success: unifiedResponse.success,
127 |           message: unifiedResponse.message,
128 |           windowInfo: unifiedResponse.windowInfo,
129 |           timestamp: unifiedResponse.timestamp,
130 |         })),
131 |       );
132 |     }
133 | 
134 |     // Fallback to original PowerShell method
135 |     return this.focusRhinoWindowPowerShell(request);
136 |   }
137 | 
138 |   /**
139 |    * Fokussiert ein Rhino-Fenster mit unified approach (native + PowerShell fallback)
140 |    * @param request - Fokussierungs-Anfrage
141 |    * @returns Observable mit unified Fokussierungs-Ergebnis
142 |    */
143 |   focusRhinoWindowUnified(request: RhinoFocusRequestDTO = {}): Observable<UnifiedRhinoFocusResponseDTO> {
144 |     console.log('🎯 Unified Rhino focus:', request);
145 | 
146 |     if (!this.config.enabled || this.isAvailable === false) {
147 |       console.log('🚫 Rhino unified focus disabled or unavailable');
148 |       return of({
149 |         success: false,
150 |         message: 'Rhino-Fokussierung nicht verfügbar',
151 |         implementation: 'error',
152 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
153 |       });
154 |     }
155 | 
156 |     // Standard-Werte setzen
157 |     const focusRequest: RhinoFocusRequestDTO = {
158 |       bringToFront: true,
159 |       restoreIfMinimized: true,
160 |       ...request,
161 |     };
162 | 
163 |     return this.http.post<UnifiedRhinoFocusResponseDTO>(`${this.baseUrl}/focus-window-unified`, focusRequest).pipe(
164 |       timeout(this.config.timeoutMs),
165 |       retry(this.config.retryAttempts),
166 |       map((response: UnifiedRhinoFocusResponseDTO) => {
167 |         console.log('✅ Unified Rhino focus result:', response);
168 |         return response;
169 |       }),
170 |       catchError(error => this.handleError<UnifiedRhinoFocusResponseDTO>('focusRhinoWindowUnified', error, {
171 |         success: false,
172 |         message: 'Unified focus failed',
173 |         implementation: 'error',
174 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
175 |       })),
176 |     );
177 |   }
178 | 
179 |   /**
180 |    * Fokussiert ein Rhino-Fenster nur mit der nativen Implementierung
181 |    * @param windowHandle - Window Handle des zu fokussierenden Fensters
182 |    * @returns Observable mit native Fokussierungs-Ergebnis
183 |    */
184 |   focusRhinoWindowNative(windowHandle: string | number): Observable<UnifiedRhinoFocusResponseDTO> {
185 |     console.log('🚀 Native Rhino focus:', windowHandle);
186 | 
187 |     if (!this.config.enabled || !this.config.useNativeImplementation || this.isAvailable === false) {
188 |       console.log('🚫 Native Rhino focus disabled or unavailable');
189 |       return of({
190 |         success: false,
191 |         message: 'Native Rhino-Fokussierung nicht verfügbar oder deaktiviert',
192 |         implementation: 'error',
193 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
194 |       });
195 |     }
196 | 
197 |     const nativeRequest: NativeFocusRequestDTO = {
198 |       windowHandle,
199 |     };
200 | 
201 |     return this.http.post<UnifiedRhinoFocusResponseDTO>(`${this.baseUrl}/focus-window-native`, nativeRequest).pipe(
202 |       timeout(this.config.timeoutMs),
203 |       retry(this.config.retryAttempts),
204 |       map((response: UnifiedRhinoFocusResponseDTO) => {
205 |         console.log('✅ Native Rhino focus result:', response);
206 |         return response;
207 |       }),
208 |       catchError(error => this.handleError<UnifiedRhinoFocusResponseDTO>('focusRhinoWindowNative', error, {
209 |         success: false,
210 |         message: 'Native focus failed',
211 |         implementation: 'error',
212 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
213 |       })),
214 |     );
215 |   }
216 | 
217 |   /**
218 |    * Fokussiert ein Rhino-Fenster mit der ursprünglichen PowerShell-Implementierung
219 |    * @param request - Fokussierungs-Anfrage
220 |    * @returns Observable mit Fokussierungs-Ergebnis
221 |    */
222 |   focusRhinoWindowPowerShell(request: RhinoFocusRequestDTO = {}): Observable<RhinoFocusResponseDTO> {
223 |     console.log('🔄 PowerShell Rhino focus:', request);
224 | 
225 |     if (!this.config.enabled || this.isAvailable === false) {
226 |       console.log('🚫 PowerShell Rhino focus disabled or unavailable');
227 |       return of({
228 |         success: false,
229 |         message: 'Rhino-Fokussierung nicht verfügbar',
230 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
231 |       });
232 |     }
233 | 
234 |     // Standard-Werte setzen
235 |     const focusRequest: RhinoFocusRequestDTO = {
236 |       bringToFront: true,
237 |       restoreIfMinimized: true,
238 |       ...request,
239 |     };
240 | 
241 |     return this.http.post<RhinoFocusResponseDTO>(`${this.baseUrl}/focus-window`, focusRequest).pipe(
242 |       timeout(this.config.timeoutMs),
243 |       retry(this.config.retryAttempts),
244 |       map((response: RhinoFocusResponseDTO) => {
245 |         console.log('✅ PowerShell Rhino focus result:', response);
246 |         return response;
247 |       }),
248 |       catchError(error => this.handleError<RhinoFocusResponseDTO>('focusRhinoWindowPowerShell', error)),
249 |     );
250 |   }
251 | 
252 |   /**
253 |    * Fokussiert Rhino mit Verzögerung
254 |    * @param request - Fokussierungs-Anfrage
255 |    * @param delayMs - Verzögerung in Millisekunden (optional)
256 |    * @returns Observable mit Fokussierungs-Ergebnis
257 |    */
258 |   focusRhinoWindowDelayed(
259 |     request: RhinoFocusRequestDTO = {},
260 |     delayMs?: number,
261 |   ): Observable<RhinoFocusResponseDTO> {
262 |     const delay = delayMs ?? this.config.delayBeforeFocusMs;
263 | 
264 |     return new Observable(observer => {
265 |       setTimeout(() => {
266 |         this.focusRhinoWindow(request).subscribe({
267 |           next: result => observer.next(result),
268 |           error: error => observer.error(error),
269 |           complete: () => observer.complete(),
270 |         });
271 |       }, delay);
272 |     });
273 |   }
274 | 
275 |   /**
276 |    * Ermittelt Rhino-Fenster-Informationen
277 |    * @returns Observable mit Fenster-Informationen
278 |    */
279 |   getRhinoWindowInfo(): Observable<RhinoWindowInfoDTO[]> {
280 |     if (!this.config.enabled || this.isAvailable === false) {
281 |       console.log('🚫 Rhino window info disabled or unavailable');
282 |       return of([]);
283 |     }
284 | 
285 |     return this.http.get<RhinoWindowInfoDTO[]>(`${this.baseUrl}/window-info`).pipe(
286 |       timeout(this.config.timeoutMs),
287 |       retry(this.config.retryAttempts),
288 |       map(windows => {
289 |         console.log('🔍 Rhino windows found:', windows.length);
290 |         return windows;
291 |       }),
292 |       catchError(error => this.handleError('getRhinoWindowInfo', error, [])),
293 |     );
294 |   }
295 | 
296 |   /**
297 |    * Prüft den Status von Rhino-Fenstern
298 |    * @returns Observable mit Fenster-Status
299 |    */
300 |   checkRhinoWindowStatus(): Observable<RhinoWindowStatusDTO> {
301 |     if (!this.config.enabled || this.isAvailable === false) {
302 |       console.log('🚫 Rhino window status disabled or unavailable');
303 |       return of({
304 |         isActive: false,
305 |         totalWindows: 0,
306 |       });
307 |     }
308 | 
309 |     return this.http.get<RhinoWindowStatusDTO>(`${this.baseUrl}/window-status`).pipe(
310 |       timeout(this.config.timeoutMs),
311 |       retry(this.config.retryAttempts),
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Services/task-mock-data.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | 
3 | /**
4 |  * Interface for task view data to maintain type safety
5 |  */
6 | export interface TaskViewData {
7 |   contentNodeId: number;
8 |   contentElementId: number;
9 |   id: number;
10 |   name: string;
11 |   type: string;
12 |   progress: number;
13 |   description?: string;
14 | }
15 | 
16 | /**
17 |  * Service providing mock data for different task types
18 |  * This service provides sample data for MC, fill-in and free text tasks
19 |  */
20 | @Injectable({
21 |   providedIn: 'root',
22 | })
23 | export class TaskMockDataService {
24 |   constructor() {}
25 | 
26 |   /**
27 |    * Returns mock data for a Multiple Choice task
28 |    */
29 |   getMcTaskMockData(): TaskViewData {
30 |     return {
31 |       contentNodeId: 1,
32 |       contentElementId: 101,
33 |       id: 1001,
34 |       name: 'Multiple Choice Beispielaufgabe',
35 |       type: 'mcTask',
36 |       progress: 0,
37 |       description: 'Eine Beispielaufgabe vom Typ Multiple Choice',
38 |     };
39 |   }
40 | 
41 |   /**
42 |    * Returns mock data for a Fill-in task
43 |    */
44 |   getFillInTaskMockData(): TaskViewData {
45 |     return {
46 |       contentNodeId: 2,
47 |       contentElementId: 102,
48 |       id: 1002,
49 |       name: 'Lückentext Beispielaufgabe',
50 |       type: 'fillInTask',
51 |       progress: 0,
52 |       description: 'Eine Beispielaufgabe vom Typ Lückentext',
53 |     };
54 |   }
55 | 
56 |   /**
57 |    * Returns mock data for a Free Text task
58 |    */
59 |   getFreeTextTaskMockData(): TaskViewData {
60 |     return {
61 |       contentNodeId: 3,
62 |       contentElementId: 103,
63 |       id: 1003,
64 |       name: 'Freitext Beispielaufgabe',
65 |       type: 'freeTextTask',
66 |       progress: 0,
67 |       description: 'Eine Beispielaufgabe vom Typ Freitext',
68 |     };
69 |   }
70 | }
```

src/styles/highlightThemes/atom-one-dark-reasonable.css
```
1 | /*
2 | 
3 | Atom One Dark With support for ReasonML by Gidi Morris, based off work by Daniel Gamage
4 | 
5 | Original One Dark Syntax theme from https://github.com/atom/one-dark-syntax
6 | 
7 | */
8 | .hljs {
9 |   color: #abb2bf;
10 |   background: #282c34;
11 | }
12 | .hljs-keyword, .hljs-operator {
13 |   color: #F92672;
14 | }
15 | .hljs-pattern-match {
16 |   color: #F92672;
17 | }
18 | .hljs-pattern-match .hljs-constructor {
19 |   color: #61aeee;
20 | }
21 | .hljs-function {
22 |   color: #61aeee;
23 | }
24 | .hljs-function .hljs-params {
25 |   color: #A6E22E;
26 | }
27 | .hljs-function .hljs-params .hljs-typing {
28 |   color: #FD971F;
29 | }
30 | .hljs-module-access .hljs-module {
31 |   color: #7e57c2;
32 | }
33 | .hljs-constructor {
34 |   color: #e2b93d;
35 | }
36 | .hljs-constructor .hljs-string {
37 |   color: #9CCC65;
38 | }
39 | .hljs-comment, .hljs-quote {
40 |   color: #b18eb1;
41 |   font-style: italic;
42 | }
43 | .hljs-doctag, .hljs-formula {
44 |   color: #c678dd;
45 | }
46 | .hljs-section, .hljs-name, .hljs-selector-tag, .hljs-deletion, .hljs-subst {
47 |   color: #e06c75;
48 | }
49 | .hljs-literal {
50 |   color: #56b6c2;
51 | }
52 | .hljs-string, .hljs-regexp, .hljs-addition, .hljs-attribute, .hljs-meta .hljs-string {
53 |   color: #98c379;
54 | }
55 | .hljs-built_in,
56 | .hljs-title.class_,
57 | .hljs-class .hljs-title {
58 |   color: #e6c07b;
59 | }
60 | .hljs-attr, .hljs-variable, .hljs-template-variable, .hljs-type, .hljs-selector-class, .hljs-selector-attr, .hljs-selector-pseudo, .hljs-number {
61 |   color: #d19a66;
62 | }
63 | .hljs-symbol, .hljs-bullet, .hljs-link, .hljs-meta, .hljs-selector-id, .hljs-title {
64 |   color: #61aeee;
65 | }
66 | .hljs-emphasis {
67 |   font-style: italic;
68 | }
69 | .hljs-strong {
70 |   font-weight: bold;
71 | }
72 | .hljs-link {
73 |   text-decoration: underline;
74 | }
```

1 | /*
2 | 
3 | Atom One Light by Daniel Gamage
4 | Original One Light Syntax theme from https://github.com/atom/one-light-syntax
5 | 
6 | base:    #fafafa
7 | mono-1:  #383a42
8 | mono-2:  #686b77

14 | hue-5:   #e45649

18 | 
19 | */

59 | }

65 | 
66 | .hljs-attr,
67 | .hljs-variable,
68 | .hljs-template-variable,
69 | .hljs-type,
70 | .hljs-selector-class,
71 | .hljs-selector-attr,
72 | .hljs-selector-pseudo,
73 | .hljs-number {
74 |   color: #986801;
75 | }
76 | 
77 | .hljs-symbol,
78 | .hljs-bullet,
79 | .hljs-link,
80 | .hljs-meta,
81 | .hljs-selector-id,
82 | .hljs-title {
83 |   color: #4078f2;
84 | }
85 | 
86 | .hljs-emphasis {
87 |   font-style: italic;
88 | }
89 | 
90 | .hljs-strong {
91 |   font-weight: bold;
92 | }
93 | 
94 | .hljs-link {
95 |   text-decoration: underline;
96 | }
```

src/styles/highlightThemes/nord.css
```
1 | /*
2 |  * Copyright (c) 2017-present Arctic Ice Studio <development@arcticicestudio.com>
3 |  * Copyright (c) 2017-present Sven Greb <development@svengreb.de>
4 |  *

8 |  * License:    MIT
9 |  * References:
10 |  *   https://github.com/arcticicestudio/nord
11 |  */
12 | 
13 | /*
14 | 
15 | Polar Night
16 | 
17 | #2E3440
18 | #3B4252
19 | #434C5E
20 | #4C566A
21 | 
22 | Snow Storm
23 | 
24 | #D8DEE9
25 | #E5E9F0
26 | #ECEFF4
27 | 
28 | Frost
29 | 
30 | #8FBCBB
31 | #88C0D0
32 | #81A1C1
33 | #5E81AC
34 | 
35 | Aurora
36 | 
37 | #BF616A
38 | #D08770
39 | #EBCB8B
40 | #A3BE8C
41 | #B48EAD
42 | 
43 | */
44 | 
45 | .hljs {
46 |   background: #2E3440;
47 |   display: block;
48 |   overflow-x: auto;
49 |   padding: 0.5em;
50 | }
51 | 
52 | .hljs,
53 | .hljs-subst {
54 |   color: #D8DEE9;
55 | }
56 | 
57 | .hljs-selector-tag {
58 |   color: #81A1C1;
59 | }
60 | 
61 | .hljs-selector-id {
62 |   color: #8FBCBB;
63 |   font-weight: bold;
64 | }
65 | 
66 | .hljs-selector-class {
67 |   color: #8FBCBB;
68 | }
69 | 
70 | .hljs-selector-attr {
71 |   color: #8FBCBB;
72 | }
73 | 
74 | .hljs-property {
75 |   color: #88C0D0;
76 | }
77 | 
78 | .hljs-selector-pseudo {
79 |   color: #88C0D0;
80 | }
81 | 
82 | .hljs-addition {
83 |   background-color: rgba(163, 190, 140, 0.5);
84 | }
85 | 
86 | .hljs-deletion {
87 |   background-color: rgba(191, 97, 106, 0.5);
88 | }
89 | 
90 | .hljs-built_in,
91 | .hljs-type {
92 |   color: #8FBCBB;
93 | }
94 | 
95 | .hljs-class {
96 |   color: #8FBCBB;
97 | }
98 | 
99 | .hljs-function {
100 |   color: #88C0D0;
101 | }
102 | 
103 | .hljs-title.hljs-function,
104 | .hljs-function > .hljs-title {
105 |   color: #88C0D0;
106 | }
107 | 
108 | .hljs-keyword,
109 | .hljs-literal,
110 | .hljs-symbol {
111 |   color: #81A1C1;
112 | }
113 | 
114 | .hljs-number {
115 |   color: #B48EAD;
116 | }
117 | 
118 | .hljs-regexp {
119 |   color: #EBCB8B;
120 | }
121 | 
122 | .hljs-string {
123 |   color: #A3BE8C;
124 | }
125 | 
126 | .hljs-title {
127 |   color: #8FBCBB;
128 | }
129 | 
130 | .hljs-params {
131 |   color: #D8DEE9;
132 | }
133 | 
134 | .hljs-bullet {
135 |   color: #81A1C1;
136 | }
137 | 
138 | .hljs-code {
139 |   color: #8FBCBB;

141 |

144 | }

src/app/Modules/code-game/code-game-routing.module.ts
```
1 | import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Routes } from '@angular/router';
3 | import { RouterModule } from '@angular/router';
4 | import { WorkspaceComponent } from './sites/workspace/workspace.component';
5 | 
6 | const routes: Routes = [
7 |   {
8 |     path: 'code-game/:taskId',
9 |     component: WorkspaceComponent,
10 |   },
11 | ];
12 | 
13 | @NgModule({
14 |   imports: [RouterModule.forChild(routes)],
15 |   exports: [RouterModule],
16 | })
17 | export class CodeGameRoutingModule {}
```

1 | import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { CommonModule, NgOptimizedImage } from '@angular/common';

6 | import { CodeEditorComponent } from './sites/code-editor/code-editor.component';

8 | import { HelpDialogComponent } from './sites/help-dialog/help-dialog.component';

22 |     MonacoEditorModule,
23 |     MarkdownModule,

25 |   ],

27 | })
28 | export class CodeGameModule {}

4 | import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
5 | import { CdkDrag, DragDropModule } from '@angular/cdk/drag-drop';
6 | import { NodeGraphComponent } from './node-graph/node-graph.component';
7 | import { GraphStructureComponent } from './graph-structure/graph-structure.component';
8 | import { EdgeGraphComponent } from './edge-graph/edge-graph.component';
9 | import { EdgeToolsetGraphComponent } from './edge-toolset-graph/edge-toolset-graph.component';
10 | import { AssignmentContainerComponent } from './assignment-container/assignment-container.component';
11 | import { MatButtonToggleModule } from '@angular/material/button-toggle';
12 | import { MatProgressSpinnerModule } from '@angular/material/progress-spinner';
13 | import { MaterialModule } from '../material.module';
14 | import { GraphTutorialDialogComponent } from './graph-tutorial-dialog/graph-tutorial-dialog.component';

18 |     GraphTasksComponent,
19 |     NodeGraphComponent,
20 |     GraphStructureComponent,
21 |     EdgeGraphComponent,
22 |     EdgeToolsetGraphComponent,
23 |     AssignmentContainerComponent,
24 |     GraphTutorialDialogComponent,
25 |   ],

27 |     CommonModule,
28 |     CdkDrag,
29 |     FormsModule,
30 |     DragDropModule,

32 |     MatProgressSpinnerModule,
33 |     MaterialModule,
34 |   ],

38 | export class GraphTasksModule {}

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/tutor-kai.module.ts
```
1 | import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
3 | 
4 | // Routing
5 | import { TutorKaiRoutingModule } from './tutor-kai-routing.module';
6 | 
7 | // Components
8 | import { TutorKaiComponent } from './tutor-kai.component';
9 | import { StudentWorkspaceComponent } from './sites/student-workspace/student-workspace.component';
10 | import { CodeEditorComponent } from './sites/code-editor/code-editor.component';
11 | import { VideoTimeStampComponent } from './sites/video-time-stamp/video-time-stamp.component';
12 | import { RatingComponent } from './components/rating/rating.component';
13 | import { FeedbackPanelComponent } from './components/feedback-panel/feedback-panel.component';
14 | import { CodeEditorWrapperComponent } from './components/code-editor-wrapper/code-editor-wrapper.component';
15 | import { TerminalOutputComponent } from './components/terminal-output/terminal-output.component';
16 | import { TestIndicatorsComponent } from './components/test-indicators/test-indicators.component';
17 | import { TestDetailsDialogComponent } from './components/test-indicators/test-details-dialog/test-details-dialog.component';
18 | import { EditorTabsComponent } from './components/editor-tabs/editor-tabs.component';
19 | import { FileExplorerComponent } from './components/file-explorer/file-explorer.component';
20 | 
21 | import { FeedbackPanelTutorFeedbackComponent } from './components/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback.component';
22 | import { FeedbackHintConfirmationDialogComponent } from './components/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback/feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog/feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog.component';
23 | // Modules
24 | import { ReactiveFormsModule, FormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
25 | import { MonacoEditorModule } from 'ngx-monaco-editor-v2';
26 | import { ToastrModule } from 'ngx-toastr';
27 | import { MarkdownModule } from 'ngx-markdown';
28 | import { MaterialModule } from '../material.module';
29 | 
30 | // Services
31 | import { WorkspaceStateService } from './services/workspace-state.service';
32 | import { FileSystemService } from './services/file-system.service';
33 | 
34 | @NgModule({
35 |   declarations: [
36 |     TutorKaiComponent,
37 |     StudentWorkspaceComponent,
38 |     CodeEditorComponent,
39 |     VideoTimeStampComponent,
40 |     RatingComponent,
41 |     FeedbackPanelComponent,
42 |     CodeEditorWrapperComponent,
43 |     TerminalOutputComponent,
44 |     TestIndicatorsComponent,
45 |     TestDetailsDialogComponent,
46 |     EditorTabsComponent,
47 |     FileExplorerComponent,
48 |     FeedbackPanelTutorFeedbackComponent,
49 |     FeedbackHintConfirmationDialogComponent,
50 |   ],
51 |   imports: [
52 |     CommonModule,
53 |     TutorKaiRoutingModule,
54 |     ReactiveFormsModule,
55 |     FormsModule,
56 |     MaterialModule,
57 |     MarkdownModule.forRoot(),
58 |     ToastrModule.forRoot(),
59 |     MonacoEditorModule.forRoot(),
60 |   ],
61 |   exports: [
62 |     CodeEditorComponent,
63 |     VideoTimeStampComponent,
64 |     RatingComponent,
65 |     FeedbackPanelComponent,
66 |     CodeEditorWrapperComponent,
67 |     TerminalOutputComponent,
68 |     TestIndicatorsComponent,
69 |     EditorTabsComponent,
70 |     FileExplorerComponent,
71 |     FeedbackPanelTutorFeedbackComponent,
72 |   ],
73 |   providers: [WorkspaceStateService, FileSystemService],
74 | })
75 | export class TutorKaiModule {}
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/_nord-light-theme.scss
```
1 | $tab-height: 40px;
2 | /**
3 |  * Nord Light Theme for tutor-kai module
4 |  * A light theme implementation of the Nord color palette
5 |  * Reference: https://www.nordtheme.com/docs/colors-and-palettes
6 |  */
7 | 
8 | // Polar Night (For text, dark UI elements on light backgrounds)
9 | $nord-light-text-primary: #2e3440; // nord0
10 | $nord-light-text-secondary: #3b4252; // nord1
11 | $nord-light-text-tertiary: #434c5e; // nord2
12 | $nord-light-ui-dark: #4c566a; // nord3
13 | 
14 | // Snow Storm (For backgrounds, light UI elements)
15 | $nord-light-border: #d8dee9; // nord4
16 | $nord-light-bg-secondary: #e5e9f0; // nord5
17 | $nord-light-bg-primary: #eceff4; // nord6
18 | 
19 | // Frost (Accents)
20 | $nord-light-accent-frost-1: #8fbcbb; // nord7 (Teal)
21 | $nord-light-accent-frost-2: #88c0d0; // nord8 (Light Blue)
22 | $nord-light-accent-frost-3: #81a1c1; // nord9 (Medium Blue)
23 | $nord-light-accent-frost-4: #5e81ac; // nord10 (Dark Blue) - Often good for primary actions
24 | 
25 | // Aurora (Accents)
26 | $nord-light-accent-aurora-1: #bf616a; // nord11 (Red - Errors)
27 | $nord-light-accent-aurora-2: #d08770; // nord12 (Orange - Warnings)
28 | $nord-light-accent-aurora-3: #ebcb8b; // nord13 (Yellow - Highlights/Stars)
29 | $nord-light-accent-aurora-4: #a3be8c; // nord14 (Green - Success/Passed)
30 | $nord-light-accent-aurora-5: #b48ead; // nord15 (Purple - Secondary Accent)
31 | 
32 | // Semantic alias variables (for common use cases)
33 | $nord-light-error: $nord-light-accent-aurora-1;
34 | $nord-light-warning: $nord-light-accent-aurora-2;
35 | $nord-light-highlight: $nord-light-accent-aurora-3;
36 | $nord-light-success: $nord-light-accent-aurora-4;
37 | $nord-light-info: $nord-light-accent-frost-3;
38 | $nord-light-primary: $nord-light-accent-frost-4;
```

1 | import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';

4 | import { EditorComponent } from './pages/editor/editor.component';

11 | ];

16 | })

src/app/Modules/umlearn/umlearn.module.ts
```
1 | import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
3 | 
4 | import { EditorComponent } from './pages/editor/editor.component';
5 | import { EditorPopupComponent } from './pages/editor/editor-popup/editor-popup.component';
6 | import { EditorNodeComponent } from './pages/editor/editor-node/editor-node.component';
7 | import { EditorEdgeNewComponent } from './pages/editor/editor-edge-new/editor-edge-new.component';
8 | import { ConfirmationComponent } from './pages/confirmation/confirmation.component';
9 | import { NotificationComponent } from './pages/notification/notification.component';
10 | import { EdgeGrabPointComponent } from './pages/editor/editor-edge-new/edge-grab-point/edge-grab-point.component';
11 | import { MaterialModule } from '../material.module';
12 | import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
13 | import { TinymceComponent } from './pages/tinymce/tinymce.component';
14 | import { TaskWorkspaceComponent } from './pages/task-workspace/task-workspace.component';
15 | import { UmlearnRoutingModule } from './umlearn-routing.module';
16 | import { EditorModule, TINYMCE_SCRIPT_SRC } from '@tinymce/tinymce-angular';
17 | import { TaskDescriptionPopupComponent } from './pages/task-creation/task-description-popup/task-description-popup.component';
18 | import { TaskCreationComponent } from './pages/task-creation/task-creation.component';
19 | import { TooltippComponent } from './pages/tooltip/tooltipp.component';
20 | import { EditorCommunicationService } from '@UMLearnServices/editor-communication.service';
21 | 
22 | @NgModule({
23 |   declarations: [
24 |     EditorComponent,
25 |     EditorPopupComponent,
26 |     EditorNodeComponent,
27 |     EditorEdgeNewComponent,
28 |     ConfirmationComponent,
29 |     NotificationComponent,
30 |     EdgeGrabPointComponent,
31 |     TinymceComponent,
32 |     TaskWorkspaceComponent,
33 |     TaskDescriptionPopupComponent,
34 |     TaskCreationComponent,
35 |     TooltippComponent,
36 |   ],
37 |   imports: [CommonModule, MaterialModule, FormsModule, UmlearnRoutingModule],
38 |   providers: [{ provide: TINYMCE_SCRIPT_SRC, useValue: 'tinymce/tinymce.min.js' }, EditorModule],
39 |   exports: [TaskCreationComponent, EditorComponent],
40 | })
41 | export class UmlearnModule {}
```

src/app/Pages/admin/admin-routing.module.ts
```
1 | import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Routes } from '@angular/router';
3 | import { RouterModule } from '@angular/router';
4 | import { UserListComponent } from './user-list/user-list.component';
5 | import { UserProgressComponent } from './user-progress/user-progress.component';
6 | import { AdminGuard } from '../../Guards/is-admin.guard';
7 | 
8 | const routes: Routes = [
9 |   {
10 |     path: '',
11 |     canActivate: [AdminGuard],
12 |     children: [
13 |       { path: '', component: UserListComponent },
14 |       { path: 'user-progress/:userId', component: UserProgressComponent },
15 |     ],
16 |   },
17 | ];
18 | 
19 | @NgModule({
20 |   imports: [RouterModule.forChild(routes)],
21 |   exports: [RouterModule],
22 | })
23 | export class AdminRoutingModule {}
```

src/app/Pages/admin/admin.module.ts
```
1 | import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
3 | import { FormsModule, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
4 | import { AdminRoutingModule } from './admin-routing.module';
5 | import { UserListComponent } from './user-list/user-list.component';
6 | import { UserProgressComponent } from './user-progress/user-progress.component';
7 | import { MatTableModule } from '@angular/material/table';
8 | import { MatInputModule } from '@angular/material/input';
9 | import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
10 | import { MatCheckboxModule } from '@angular/material/checkbox';
11 | import { MatSortModule } from '@angular/material/sort';
12 | import { MatSelectModule } from '@angular/material/select';
13 | import { MatFormFieldModule } from '@angular/material/form-field';
14 | import { MatPaginatorModule } from '@angular/material/paginator';
15 | import { MatCardModule } from '@angular/material/card';
16 | import { MatProgressBarModule } from '@angular/material/progress-bar';
17 | import { MatSnackBarModule } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
18 | import { NgxChartsModule } from '@swimlane/ngx-charts';
19 | 
20 | @NgModule({
21 |   declarations: [UserListComponent, UserProgressComponent],
22 |   imports: [
23 |     CommonModule,
24 |     AdminRoutingModule,
25 |     FormsModule,
26 |     ReactiveFormsModule,
27 |     MatTableModule,
28 |     MatInputModule,
29 |     MatButtonModule,
30 |     MatCheckboxModule,
31 |     MatSortModule,
32 |     MatSelectModule,
33 |     MatFormFieldModule,
34 |     MatPaginatorModule,
35 |     MatCardModule,
36 |     MatProgressBarModule,
37 |     MatSnackBarModule,
38 |     NgxChartsModule,
39 |   ],
40 | })
41 | export class AdminModule {}
```

src/app/Pages/app-header/app-header.component.html
```
1 | <mat-toolbar class="app-header">
2 |   <!-- Linke Seite: Logo, Goals-Icon und Chat-Icon -->
3 |   <div class="left-content">
4 |     <img
5 |       src="assets/img/logo_hefl2.png"
6 |       alt="HEFL Logo"
7 |       class="app-logo"
8 |       (click)="navigateToPreviousRoute()"
9 |     />
10 |     <!-- User Menü -->
11 |     <button
12 |       mat-button
13 |       [matMenuTriggerFor]="userMenu"
14 |       *ngIf="userIsLoggedIn"
15 |       class="user-menu-button"
16 |     >
17 |       <mat-icon>account_circle</mat-icon>
18 |       <span class="username">{{ userMail }}</span>
19 |     </button>
20 |     <mat-menu #userMenu="matMenu">
21 |       <button mat-menu-item (click)="logOut(false)">Abmelden</button>
22 |       <button mat-menu-item (click)="logOut(true)">Von allen Geräten abmelden</button>
23 |     </mat-menu>
24 |   </div>
25 | 
26 |   <!-- Mitte: Navigation Toggle Button (Mobile/Graph) -->
27 |   <div class="center-content">
28 |     <app-navigation-preference-toggle
29 |       *ngIf="showNavToggle"
30 |       class="nav-toggle"
31 |     ></app-navigation-preference-toggle>
32 |   </div>
33 | 
34 |   <!-- Rechte Seite: Notification und User-Menü -->
35 |   <div class="right-content">
36 |     <!-- Chat-Button -->
37 |     <button
38 |       mat-button
39 |       *ngIf="userIsLoggedIn"
40 |       class="chat-button"
41 |       matTooltip="Chat öffnen"
42 |       (click)="toggleChatBot()"
43 |     >
44 |       <mat-icon>chat</mat-icon>
45 |       <span>KaiGPT</span>
46 |     </button>
47 | 
48 |     <!-- Notification Bell -->
49 |     <div *ngIf="userIsLoggedIn" class="notification-container">
50 |       <app-notification-bell></app-notification-bell>
51 |     </div>
52 |   </div>
53 | </mat-toolbar>
```

1 | .app-header {
2 |   top: 0;
3 |   left: 0;
4 |   right: 0;

7 |   background-color: #434c5e;

src/app/Pages/app-header/app-header.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit, Component, EventEmitter, Output } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
3 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
4 | import { Location } from '@angular/common';
5 | import { ConfirmationBoxComponent } from 'src/app/Pages/confirmation-box/confirmation-box.component';
6 | import { UserService } from 'src/app/Services/auth/user.service';
7 | import { NavigationPreferenceService } from 'src/app/Services/navigation/navigation-preference.service';
8 | 
9 | @Component({
10 |   selector: 'app-header',
11 |   templateUrl: './app-header.component.html',
12 |   styleUrls: ['./app-header.component.scss'],
13 | })
14 | export class AppHeaderComponent implements OnInit {
15 |   @Output() chatToggle = new EventEmitter<void>();
16 | 
17 |   userMail: string = '';
18 |   userRole: string = '';
19 |   userIsLoggedIn: boolean = false;
20 |   showNavToggle: boolean = true;
21 | 
22 |   /**
23 |    * Toggles the chat bot visibility and emits the event to parent component
24 |    */
25 |   toggleChatBot(): void {
26 |     this.chatToggle.emit();
27 |   }
28 | 
29 |   /**
30 |    * Navigiert zum Dashboard
31 |    */
32 |   navigateToDashboard(): void {
33 |     this.router.navigate(['/dashboard']);
34 |   }
35 | 
36 |   constructor(
37 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
38 |     private readonly router: Router,
39 |     public dialog: MatDialog,
40 |     private readonly navigationPreferenceService: NavigationPreferenceService,
41 |     private readonly location: Location,
42 |   ) {
43 |     // Subscribe to the authentication observable
44 |     this.userService.isAuthenticated$.subscribe(isAuthenticated => {
45 |       this.userIsLoggedIn = isAuthenticated;
46 |       if (isAuthenticated) {
47 |         this.userMail = userService.getEmail();
48 |         this.userRole = userService.getRole();
49 |       }
50 |     });
51 |   }
52 | 
53 |   ngOnInit(): void {
54 |     // Prüfe, ob wir auf einer Route sind, die den Navigation Toggle anzeigen soll
55 |     this.router.events.subscribe(() => {
56 |       const currentUrl = this.router.url;
57 |       // Hier könnte man die Anzeige basierend auf der Route steuern
58 |       this.showNavToggle = !currentUrl.includes('/login');
59 |     });
60 |   }
61 | 
62 |   navigateToPreviousRoute(): void {
63 |     this.location.back();
64 |   }
65 | 
66 |   logOut(logOutAllUserDevices: boolean): void {
67 |     if (logOutAllUserDevices) {
68 |       const dialog = this.dialog.open(ConfirmationBoxComponent, {
69 |         data: {
70 |           title: 'Abmeldung bestätigen',
71 |           message: 'Möchten Sie sich wirklich von allen Geräten abmelden?',
72 |           decline: 'Abbrechen',
73 |           accept: 'Abmelden',
74 |           swapButtons: false,
75 |           swapColors: true,
76 |         },
77 |       });
78 | 
79 |       dialog.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {
80 |         if (result) {
81 |           this.userService.logout(true).then(() => {
82 |             this.userIsLoggedIn = false;
83 | 
84 |             // Open CAS logout URL in a new tab
85 |             window.open('https://cas.zimt.uni-siegen.de/cas/logout', '_blank');
86 | 
87 |             // Navigate to the login page in the current tab
88 |             this.router.navigate(['/login']);
89 |           });
90 |         }
91 |       });
92 |     } else {
93 |       this.userService.logout(false).then(() => {
94 |         this.userIsLoggedIn = false;
95 | 
96 |         // Open CAS logout URL in a new tab
97 |         window.open('https://cas.zimt.uni-siegen.de/cas/logout', '_blank');
98 | 
99 |         // Navigate to the login page in the current tab
100 |         this.router.navigate(['/login']);
101 |       });
102 |     }
103 |   }
104 | }
```

1 | $orange: #ff893b;
2 | $black: #465461;
3 | $blue: #729ca2;

5 | $white: #ecf3f4;
6 | 
7 | .chat-wrapper {
8 |   height: 100%;
9 |   display: flex;
10 |   flex-direction: column;
11 |   border-radius: 8px;
12 |   overflow: hidden;
13 | }
14 | 
15 | .chat-header {
16 |   background-color: $black;
17 |   color: white;
18 |   padding: 8px 16px;
19 |   display: flex;
20 |   justify-content: space-between;
21 |   align-items: center;

25 |     flex-grow: 1;
26 |     text-align: center;

src/app/Pages/chat-bot/chat-bot.component.ts
```
1 | import { animate, state, style, transition, trigger } from '@angular/animations';
2 | import { Component, EventEmitter, Output } from '@angular/core';
3 | 
4 | enum DisplayType {
5 |   Fixed = 'fixed-chat',
6 |   Collapsible = 'collapsible-chat',
7 |   Embedded = 'embedded-chat',
8 | }
9 | 
10 | @Component({
11 |   selector: 'app-chat-bot',
12 |   templateUrl: './chat-bot.component.html',
13 |   styleUrls: ['./chat-bot.component.scss'],
14 |   animations: [
15 |     // Animation for rotating the icon
16 |     trigger('rotateAnimation', [
17 |       state('rotated', style({ transform: 'rotate(0deg)' })),
18 |       state('default', style({ transform: 'rotate(-360deg)' })),
19 |       transition('default => rotated', animate('500ms ease-out')),
20 |       transition('rotated => default', animate('500ms ease-out')),
21 |     ]),
22 |     // Animation for fading in and out
23 |     trigger('fadeAnimation', [
24 |       transition(':enter', [
25 |         style({ opacity: 0 }),
26 |         animate('150ms ease-in-out', style({ opacity: 1 })),
27 |       ]),
28 |       transition(':leave', [
29 |         style({ opacity: 1 }),
30 |         animate('150ms ease-in-out', style({ opacity: 0 })),
31 |       ]),
32 |     ]),
33 |   ],
34 | })
35 | export class ChatBotComponent {
36 |   @Output() close = new EventEmitter<void>();
37 | 
38 |   public isOpen = true; // Always open in the popup view
39 |   public iconState = 'default'; // State for the rotation animation
40 |   public displayType = DisplayType; // Enum for display types
41 | 
42 |   /**
43 |    * Emits the close event to the parent component.
44 |    */
45 |   public onChatClose(): void {
46 |     this.close.emit();
47 |   }
48 | }
```

src/app/Pages/competencies/competencies.component.html
```
1 | <h1>Compentcies which are required or trained by Content connected to the chosen ConceptNode</h1>
2 | 
3 | <!-- Main container using Flexbox to align tables horizontally -->
4 | <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between">
5 |   <!-- Trained By Table -->
6 |   <div style="flex: 1; margin-right: 20px">
7 |     <!-- Added margin-right here -->
8 | 
9 |     <mat-table [dataSource]="contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy">
10 |       <!-- Define columns -->
11 |       <ng-container matColumnDef="trainedBy">
12 |         <mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef> Trained by </mat-header-cell>
13 |         <!-- One Cell for each ContentsForConceptDTO.trainedBy[] ContentDTO-->
14 |         <mat-cell *matCellDef="let content">
15 |           <span
16 |             matTooltip="Content Node Name: {{ content.name }} Content Node Description: {{
17 |               content.description
18 |             }}"
19 |           >
20 |             <b>Content Node {{ content.contentNodeId }}</b
21 |             >, which also trains:</span
22 |           >
23 |           <!-- Using an unordered list for bullet points for each Id in ContentDTO.trainsConceptIds[] -->
24 |           <ul>
25 |             <li *ngFor="let id of content.trainsConceptIds">Concept Node {{ id }}</li>
26 |           </ul>
27 |         </mat-cell>
28 |       </ng-container>
29 | 
30 |       <!-- Header row definition -->
31 |       <mat-header-row *matHeaderRowDef="['trainedBy']"></mat-header-row>
32 | 
33 |       <!-- Data row definition -->
34 |       <mat-row *matRowDef="let row; columns: ['trainedBy']"></mat-row>
35 |     </mat-table>
36 |   </div>
37 | 
38 |   <!-- Required By Table -->
39 |   <div style="flex: 1">
40 |     <mat-table [dataSource]="contentsForActiveConceptNode.requiredBy">
41 |       <!-- Define columns -->
42 |       <ng-container matColumnDef="requiredBy">
43 |         <mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef> Required By </mat-header-cell>
44 |         <!-- One Cell for each ContentsForConceptDTO.requiredBy[] ContentDTO-->
45 |         <mat-cell *matCellDef="let content">
46 |           <span
47 |             matTooltip="Content Node Name: {{ content.name }} Content Node Description: {{
48 |               content.description
49 |             }}"
50 |           >
51 |             <b>Content Node {{ content.contentNodeId }}</b
52 |             >, which also requieres:</span
53 |           >
54 |           <!-- Using an unordered list for bullet points for each Id in ContentDTO.requiresConceptIds[]-->
55 |           <ul>
56 |             <li *ngFor="let id of content.requiresConceptIds">Concept Node {{ id }}</li>
57 |           </ul>
58 |         </mat-cell>
59 |       </ng-container>
60 | 
61 |       <!-- Header row definition -->
62 |       <mat-header-row *matHeaderRowDef="['requiredBy']"></mat-header-row>
63 | 
64 |       <!-- Data row definition -->
65 |       <mat-row *matRowDef="let row; columns: ['requiredBy']"></mat-row>
66 |     </mat-table>
67 |   </div>
68 | </div>
```

src/app/Pages/conceptOverview/conceptOverview.component.css
```
1 | .grid-container {
2 |   display: grid;
3 |   grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
4 |   gap: 16px;
5 | }
6 | 
7 | .header {
8 |   display: flex;
9 |   align-items: center;
10 |   justify-content: space-between;
11 | }
12 | 
13 | .button-group {
14 |   /* Optional: zusätzliche Stildefinitionen für die Button-Gruppe */
15 | }
16 | 
17 | .button-group button.active {
18 | 
19 |   background-color: #3b4252;
20 |   color: white;
21 | }
22 | .button-group button {
23 |   border-color: #3b4252; /* Blau */
24 |   border: 2px solid #3b4252 !important;
25 |   color: #3b4252;
26 |   margin-left: 5px;
27 | }
28 | 
29 | .mat-elevation-z8 {
30 |   background: #eceff4;
31 |   color: black;
32 | }
33 | 
34 | .content {
35 |   height: 20h;
36 |   margin: 16px;
37 |   /* margin-left: 32px; */
38 |   padding:16px;
39 | 
40 |   contain: content;
41 |   overflow-y: hidden;
42 |   scrollbar-width: thin;
43 | 
44 |   font-size: 14px;
45 |   border-radius: 10px;
46 | }
47 | 
48 | .tab-content-container {
49 |   margin: 5px;
50 |   border-radius: 10px;
51 |   flex-direction: column;
52 |   justify-content: center;
53 | /*   background-color: #C0E0FC; */
54 |   background-color: #eceff4;
55 | }
56 | 
57 | @media screen and (orientation: portrait){
58 |   .tab-content-container {
59 |     padding: 0px;
60 |     padding-top: 10px;
61 |     padding-bottom: 10px;
62 |   }
63 | }
64 | 
65 | @media screen and (orientation: landscape){
66 |   .tab-content-container {
67 |     padding: 10px;
68 |   }
69 | }
70 | 
71 | @media screen and (max-width: 800px) {
72 |   .button-group {
73 |     margin-bottom: 10px;
74 |     justify-content: center;
75 |     display: flex;
76 |     flex-direction: row;
77 |     align-items: center;
78 |   }
79 | 
80 | }
81 | 
82 | .dynamic-content {
83 |   flex: 3;
84 |   padding: 20px;
85 |   overflow-y: auto;
86 | }
87 | 
88 | .loading-container {
89 |   display: flex;
90 |   flex-direction: column;
91 |   align-items: center;
92 |   justify-content: center;
93 |   padding: 2rem;
94 |   margin: 1rem;
95 |   text-align: center;
96 |   min-height: 200px;
97 | }
```

src/app/Pages/conceptOverview/conceptOverview.component.html
```
1 | <!-- <div *ngIf="(isHandset$ | async) === true" class="button-group" style="display: flex;">
2 |   <button mat-button [ngClass]="{'active': activeTab === 'content'}" (click)="activeTab = 'content'">Bearbeiten</button>
3 |   <button mat-button [ngClass]="{'active': activeTab === 'discussion'}" (click)="activeTab = 'discussion'">Diskutieren</button>
4 | </div> -->
5 | <div
6 |   *ngIf="activeConceptNode.databaseId > 0 && activeConceptNode.name !== 'dummys'"
7 |   class="content mat-elevation-z8"
8 | >
9 |   <div
10 |     *ngIf="(isHandset$ | async) === true && !editModeActive"
11 |     class="button-group"
12 |     style="display: flex"
13 |   >
14 |     <button
15 |       mat-button
16 |       [ngClass]="{ active: activeTab === 'content' }"
17 |       (click)="activeTab = 'content'"
18 |     >
19 |       Bearbeiten
20 |     </button>
21 |     <button
22 |       mat-button
23 |       [ngClass]="{ active: activeTab === 'discussion' }"
24 |       (click)="activeTab = 'discussion'"
25 |     >
26 |       Diskutieren
27 |     </button>
28 |   </div>
29 |   <div class="header">
30 |     <h1 *ngIf="sSS.isLandscape | async" matTooltip="Id: {{ activeConceptNode.databaseId }}">
31 |       {{ activeConceptNode.name }}
32 |     </h1>
33 |     <h1 *ngIf="!(sSS.isLandscape | async)">{{ activeConceptNode.name }}</h1>
34 |     <div *ngIf="(isHandset$ | async) === false && !editModeActive" class="button-group">
35 |       <button
36 |         mat-button
37 |         [ngClass]="{ active: activeTab === 'content' }"
38 |         (click)="activeTab = 'content'"
39 |       >
40 |         Bearbeiten
41 |       </button>
42 |       <button
43 |         mat-button
44 |         [ngClass]="{ active: activeTab === 'discussion' }"
45 |         (click)="activeTab = 'discussion'"
46 |       >
47 |         Diskutieren
48 |       </button>
49 |     </div>
50 |   </div>
51 | 
52 |   <p>{{ activeConceptNode.description }}</p>
53 | 
54 |   <button *ngIf="editModeActive" mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="onCreateContentNode()">
55 |     ContentNode hinzufügen
56 |   </button>
57 | 
58 |   <!-- <div [ngStyle]="{'display': activeTab === 'content' ? 'block' : 'none'}" class="tab-content-container">
59 |     <app-contentBoard class="tab-content" [contentsForActiveConceptNode]="contentsForActiveConceptNode"
60 |       [activeConceptNodeId]="activeConceptNode.databaseId" (fetchContentsForConcept)="onFetchContentsForConcept()"></app-contentBoard>
61 |   </div> -->
62 | 
63 |   <div
64 |     [ngStyle]="{ display: activeTab === 'content' ? 'block' : 'none' }"
65 |     class="tab-content-container"
66 |   >
67 |     <app-content-list
68 |       class="tab-content"
69 |       [contentsForActiveConceptNode]="contentsForActiveConceptNode"
70 |       [activeConceptNodeId]="activeConceptNode.databaseId"
71 |       (fetchContentsForConcept)="onFetchContentsForConcept()"
72 |     >
73 |       <div class="action-buttons-top">
74 |         <button mat-stroked-button color="primary">
75 |           <mat-icon>picture_as_pdf</mat-icon>
76 |           PDF
77 |         </button>
78 |         <button mat-stroked-button color="primary">
79 |           <mat-icon>play_circle_outline</mat-icon>
80 |           Video
81 |         </button>
82 |       </div>
83 |       <router-outlet></router-outlet>
84 |     </app-content-list>
85 |   </div>
86 | 
87 |   <div
88 |     *ngIf="!editModeActive"
89 |     [ngStyle]="{ display: activeTab === 'discussion' ? 'block' : 'none' }"
90 |     class="tab-content-container"
91 |   >
92 |     <app-discussion-list [activeConceptNodeId]="activeConceptNode.databaseId"></app-discussion-list>
93 |   </div>
94 | </div>
95 | 
96 | <!-- Loading indicator while concept data is being loaded -->
97 | <div
98 |   *ngIf="activeConceptNode.databaseId <= 0 || activeConceptNode.name === 'dummys'"
99 |   class="loading-container mat-elevation-z8"
100 | >
101 |   <mat-spinner diameter="40"></mat-spinner>
102 |   <p>Loading concept data...</p>
103 | </div>
104 | 
105 | <style>
106 |   .action-buttons-top {
107 |     display: flex;
108 |     gap: 12px;
109 |     margin-top: 16px;
110 |     margin-bottom: 24px;
111 |   }
112 | 
113 |   .action-buttons-top button {
114 |     display: flex;
115 |     align-items: center;
116 |     gap: 8px;
117 |   }
118 | </style>
```
