src/app/Pages/conceptOverview/conceptOverview.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnDestroy, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { Observable, Subscription } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { filter, map } from 'rxjs';
5 | import { GraphCommunicationService } from 'src/app/Services/graph/graphCommunication.service';
6 | import {
7 |   ConceptNodeDTO,
8 |   ContentsForConceptDTO,
9 |   LinkableContentNodeDTO,
10 |   QuestionDTO,
11 | } from '@DTOs/index';
12 | import { ContentService } from 'src/app/Services/content/content.service';
13 | import { BreakpointObserver } from '@angular/cdk/layout';
14 | import { Breakpoints } from '@angular/cdk/layout';
15 | import { ScreenSizeService } from 'src/app/Services/mobile/screen-size.service';
16 | import { UserService } from 'src/app/Services/auth/user.service';
17 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
18 | import { CreateContentNodeDialogComponent } from '../lecturersView/create-content-node-dialog/create-content-node-dialog.component';
19 | import { ContentLinkerService } from 'src/app/Services/contentLinker/content-linker.service';
20 | import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
21 | import { NavigationEnd } from '@angular/router';
22 | import { QuestionDataService } from 'src/app/Services/question/question-data.service';
23 | import { GraphDataService } from 'src/app/Services/graph/graph-data.service';
24 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
25 | 
26 | @Component({
27 |   selector: 'app-conceptOverview',
28 |   templateUrl: './conceptOverview.component.html',
29 |   styleUrls: ['./conceptOverview.component.css'],
30 | })
31 | export class ConceptOverviewComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
32 |   private readonly graphCommunicationService: GraphCommunicationService =
33 |     GraphCommunicationService.getInstance();
34 |   isQuestionRoute = false;
35 |   private readonly activeConceptNodeSubscription: Subscription;
36 |   activeTab: string = 'content';
37 |   isHandset$: Observable<boolean> = this.bps
38 |     .observe(Breakpoints.Handset)
39 |     .pipe(map(result => result.matches));
40 | 
41 |   // for lecturers view
42 |   protected isAdmin: boolean = false;
43 |   protected editModeActive: boolean = false;
44 | 
45 |   // init with dummy node
46 |   activeConceptNode: ConceptNodeDTO = {
47 |     databaseId: -1,
48 |     name: 'dummys',
49 |     level: 0,
50 |     description: 'dummy',
51 |     expanded: false,
52 |     parentIds: [],
53 |     childIds: [],
54 |     prerequisiteEdgeIds: [],
55 |     successorEdgeIds: [],
56 |     edgeChildIds: [],
57 |   };
58 |   activeQuestionId: number | null = null;
59 |   activeQuestion: any;
60 |   // init empty
61 |   contentsForActiveConceptNode: ContentsForConceptDTO = {
62 |     trainedBy: [],
63 |     requiredBy: [],
64 |   };
65 | 
66 |   constructor(
67 |     private readonly contentService: ContentService,
68 |     private readonly bps: BreakpointObserver,
69 |     public sSS: ScreenSizeService,
70 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
71 |     private readonly dialog: MatDialog,
72 |     private readonly contentLinkerSerivce: ContentLinkerService,
73 |     private readonly route: ActivatedRoute,
74 |     private readonly questionService: QuestionDataService,
75 |     private readonly router: Router,
76 |     private readonly graphDataService: GraphDataService,
77 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
78 |   ) {
79 |     this.isAdmin = this.userService.getRole() === 'ADMIN';
80 | 
81 |     // subscribe to activeConceptNode changes in the graph and update the activeConceptNode and contentsForActiveConceptNode accordingly
82 |     this.activeConceptNodeSubscription = this.graphCommunicationService.currentActiveNode.subscribe(
83 |       activeConceptNode => {
84 |         if (activeConceptNode.databaseId > 0) {
85 |           // dummy node is 0 - only update if a real node is selected
86 |           this.activeConceptNode = activeConceptNode;
87 |           this.contentService
88 |             .fetchContentsForConcept(this.activeConceptNode.databaseId)
89 |             .subscribe(contentsForConcept => {
90 |               this.contentsForActiveConceptNode = contentsForConcept;
91 |               console.log('contentsForActiveConceptNode', this.contentsForActiveConceptNode);
92 |             });
93 |         }
94 |       },
95 |     );
96 |     this.router.events.pipe(filter(event => event instanceof NavigationEnd)).subscribe(() => {
97 |       this.isQuestionRoute = this.router.url.includes('/question/');
98 |     });
99 |   }
100 | 
101 |   ngOnInit() {
102 |     //this.isAdmin = this.userService.isAdmin();
103 | 
104 |     // Prüfen auf 'id' Parameter in der Route
105 |     this.route.paramMap.subscribe(params => {
106 |       const conceptId = params.get('conceptId');
107 |       const questionId = params.get('questionId');
108 | 
109 |       if (conceptId) {
110 |         this.activeConceptNode.databaseId = +conceptId;
111 |         this.loadConceptNode(this.activeConceptNode.databaseId);
112 |       }
113 | 
114 |       if (questionId) {
115 |         this.activeQuestionId = +questionId;
116 |         console.log(typeof this.activeQuestionId);
117 |         this.loadQuestion(this.activeQuestionId);
118 |       }
119 |     });
120 |     this.bps
121 |       .observe([Breakpoints.Handset, Breakpoints.Tablet, Breakpoints.Web])
122 |       .subscribe(result => {});
123 |     this.userService.hasEditModeActive$.subscribe(hasEditModeActive => {
124 |       this.editModeActive = hasEditModeActive;
125 |     });
126 |   }
127 | 
128 |   /**
129 |    * Navigates to the dynamic question route with questionType
130 |    */
131 |   loadQuestion(questionId: number) {
132 |     this.questionService.getQuestionData(questionId).subscribe((question: QuestionDTO) => {
133 |       this.navigateToQuestion(this.activeConceptNode.databaseId, question.id);
134 |     });
135 |   }
136 | 
137 |   /**
138 |    * Navigates to the dynamic question route
139 |    * @param conceptId
140 |    * @param questionId
141 |    * @param questionType
142 |    */
143 |   navigateToQuestion(conceptId: number, questionId: number): void {
144 |     this.router.navigate(['/dashboard/concept', conceptId, 'question', questionId]);
145 |   }
146 | 
147 |   loadConceptNode(conceptNodeId: number) {
148 |     // First, fetch contents for the concept
149 |     this.contentService.fetchContentsForConcept(conceptNodeId).subscribe(contentsForConcept => {
150 |       this.contentsForActiveConceptNode = contentsForConcept;
151 |     });
152 | 
153 |     // When navigating directly to a concept URL, we need to fetch concept node data
154 |     // and update the activeConceptNode instead of showing dummy values
155 |     if (this.activeConceptNode.databaseId === -1 || this.activeConceptNode.name === 'dummys') {
156 |       // We'll use GraphDataService to fetch the concept graph and extract the node
157 |       this.graphDataService
158 |         .fetchUserGraph(1) // Using module ID 1 as default; adjust if needed
159 |         .subscribe(graph => {
160 |           // Check if the concept node exists in the graph
161 |           if (graph.nodeMap[conceptNodeId]) {
162 |             const conceptNode = graph.nodeMap[conceptNodeId];
163 |             // Update the active concept node
164 |             this.activeConceptNode = conceptNode;
165 |             // Also notify the GraphCommunicationService to keep state consistent
166 |             this.graphCommunicationService.changeActiveNode(conceptNode);
167 |           }
168 |         });
169 |     }
170 |   }
171 | 
172 |   /**
173 |    * Opens a dialog to create a content node if the user is an admin.
174 |    * Creates a new linked content node based on the dialog result and updates the contents for the active concept node.
175 |    */
176 |   onCreateContentNode() {
177 |     console.log('onCreateContentNode called');
178 |     if (this.isAdmin) {
179 |       console.log('User is admin, opening dialog to create content node');
180 |       const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(CreateContentNodeDialogComponent, {
181 |         width: '400px',
182 |       });
183 | 
184 |       dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {
185 |         if (result) {
186 |           const linkableContentNode: LinkableContentNodeDTO = {
187 |             conceptNodeId: this.activeConceptNode.databaseId,
188 |             name: result.name,
189 |             description: result.description !== '' ? result.description : undefined,
190 |             awardsLevel: result.difficulty,
191 |           };
192 |           this.contentLinkerSerivce
193 |             .createLinkedContentNode(linkableContentNode)
194 |             .subscribe(newContentNode => {
195 |               // update the contents for the active concept node
196 |               this.contentService
197 |                 .fetchContentsForConcept(this.activeConceptNode.databaseId)
198 |                 .subscribe(
199 |                   contentsForConcept => (this.contentsForActiveConceptNode = contentsForConcept),
200 |                 );
201 |             });
202 |         }
203 |       });
204 |     }
205 |   }
206 | 
207 |   /**
208 |    * Fetches contents for the active concept node.
209 |    */
210 |   onFetchContentsForConcept() {
211 |     this.contentService
212 |       .fetchContentsForConcept(this.activeConceptNode.databaseId)
213 |       .subscribe(contentsForConcept => (this.contentsForActiveConceptNode = contentsForConcept));
214 |   }
215 | 
216 |   // unsubscribe to prevent memory leaks after component is destroyed
217 |   ngOnDestroy() {
218 |     if (this.activeConceptNodeSubscription) {
219 |       this.activeConceptNodeSubscription.unsubscribe();
220 |     }
221 |   }
222 | }
```

src/app/Pages/confirmation-box/confirmation-box.component.html
```
1 | <div style="border: 2px solid rgb(255, 87, 34)">
2 |   <h1 mat-dialog-title>{{ data.title }}</h1>
3 |   <div mat-dialog-content>
4 |     <p>{{ data.message }}</p>
5 |   </div>
6 |   <div mat-dialog-actions align="end">
7 |     <div *ngIf="!data.swapButtons; else swap">
8 |       <button
9 |         #accept
10 |         mat-flat-button
11 |         [color]="!data.swapColors ? 'primary' : 'warn'"
12 |         tabindex="-1"
13 |         [mat-dialog-close]="true"
14 |       >
15 |         {{ data.accept }}
16 |       </button>
17 |       <button
18 |         #decline
19 |         mat-flat-button
20 |         [color]="!data.swapColors ? 'warn' : 'primary'"
21 |         mat-dialog-close
22 |       >
23 |         {{ data.decline }}
24 |       </button>
25 |     </div>
26 |     <ng-template #swap>
27 |       <button
28 |         #decline
29 |         mat-flat-button
30 |         [color]="!data.swapColors ? 'warn' : 'primary'"
31 |         mat-dialog-close
32 |       >
33 |         {{ data.decline }}
34 |       </button>
35 |       <button
36 |         #accept
37 |         mat-flat-button
38 |         [color]="!data.swapColors ? 'primary' : 'warn'"
39 |         tabindex="-1"
40 |         [mat-dialog-close]="true"
41 |       >
42 |         {{ data.accept }}
43 |       </button>
44 |     </ng-template>
45 |   </div>
46 | </div>
```

1 | import { Component, Inject } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA } from '@angular/material/dialog';
3 | 
4 | @Component({
5 |   selector: 'app-confirmation',
6 |   templateUrl: './confirmation-box.component.html',
7 |   styleUrls: ['./confirmation-box.component.scss'],
8 | })
9 | export class ConfirmationBoxComponent {
10 |   constructor(
11 |     @Inject(MAT_DIALOG_DATA)
12 |     public data: {
13 |       title: string;
14 |       message: string;
15 |       decline: string;
16 |       accept: string;
17 |       swapButtons: boolean;
18 |       swapColors: boolean;
19 |     },
20 |   ) {}
21 | }

src/app/Pages/content-list/content-list.component.html
```
1 | <div class="content-list-container">
2 |   <!-- Search and Sort section -->
3 |   <div style="display: flex">
4 |     <div class="search-bar">
5 |       <!-- <h3>Suchen</h3> -->
6 |       <mat-form-field
7 |         appearance="outline"
8 |         subscriptSizing="dynamic"
9 |         style="background-color: white"
10 |       >
11 |         <mat-icon matPrefix>search</mat-icon>
12 |         <input
13 |           matInput
14 |           type="text"
15 |           [(ngModel)]="searchTerm"
16 |           (keyup)="applyFilter()"
17 |           placeholder="Suche nach Inhalten"
18 |         />
19 |         <button
20 |           *ngIf="searchTerm"
21 |           matSuffix
22 |           mat-icon-button
23 |           aria-label="Clear"
24 |           (click)="searchTerm = ''; applyFilter()"
25 |         >
26 |           <mat-icon>close</mat-icon>
27 |         </button>
28 |       </mat-form-field>
29 |     </div>
30 |   </div>
31 | 
32 |   <!-- Task section -->
33 |   <mat-accordion class="content-list" multi="true">
34 |     <mat-expansion-panel
35 |       *ngFor="let content of filteredContents; let i = index"
36 |       [expanded]="false"
37 |       class="content-list-item"
38 |     >
39 |       <mat-expansion-panel-header>
40 |         <mat-panel-title style="flex-grow: 3">
41 |           {{ content.name }}
42 |         </mat-panel-title>
43 |         <mat-panel-description class="content-list-element-header-description">
44 |           <!-- stars to show difficulty and progress -->
45 |           <div class="content-list-element-header-stars">
46 |             <mat-icon *ngFor="let reached of getLevels(content.levelProgress || 0)">star</mat-icon>
47 |             <mat-icon *ngFor="let level of getLevels(content.level - (content.levelProgress || 0))"
48 |               >star_border</mat-icon
49 |             >
50 |           </div>
51 | 
52 |           <!-- more indicators -->
53 |           <div class="content-list-element-header-indicators">
54 |             <mat-icon
55 |               *ngIf="hasContentElementType(content, 'QUESTION')"
56 |               matTooltip="Enthält Übungsaufgaben."
57 |               >rate_review</mat-icon
58 |             >
59 |             <mat-icon
60 |               class="node-question"
61 |               *ngIf="content.questionMarked"
62 |               matTooltip="Mindestens ein Inhalt wurde mit einem ? markiert."
63 |               >help</mat-icon
64 |             >
65 | 
66 |             <!-- Direct Bat-Rhino Button (executes Rhino directly via .bat script) -->
67 |             <mat-icon
68 |               *ngIf="hasContentElementType(content, 'QUESTION')"
69 |               class="direct-bat-rhino-launcher-icon"
70 |               matTooltip="⚡ Rhino direkt ausführen (Ein-Klick-Lösung)"
71 |               (click)="onRhinoBatDirectButtonClick($event)"
72 |               [style.cursor]="'pointer'"
73 |               [style.color]="'#E91E63'"
74 |               [style.margin-left]="'4px'"
75 |               [style.font-weight]="'bold'"
76 |             >
77 |               flash_on
78 |             </mat-icon>
79 |           </div>
80 |         </mat-panel-description>
81 |       </mat-expansion-panel-header>
82 |       <!-- the content item body -->
83 |       <div class="content-list-element-introduction">
84 |         <!-- stars to show difficulty and progress - only in mobile view -->
85 |         <div class="content-list-element-introduction-stars">
86 |           <mat-icon *ngFor="let reached of getLevels(content.levelProgress || 0)">star</mat-icon>
87 |           <mat-icon *ngFor="let level of getLevels(content.level - (content.levelProgress || 0))"
88 |             >star_border</mat-icon
89 |           >
90 |         </div>
91 | 
92 |         <!-- description -->
93 |         <p class="content-list-element-description">{{ content.description }}</p>
94 | 
95 |         <!-- button bar -->
96 |         <div class="content-list-element-introduction-buttons">
97 |           <button
98 |             *ngIf="hasContentElementType(content, 'PDF')"
99 |             mat-raised-button
100 |             color="primary"
101 |             (click)="onContentClick(content, ['PDF'], $event)"
102 |           >
103 |             <mat-icon>picture_as_pdf</mat-icon>
104 |             PDF
105 |           </button>
106 |           <button
107 |             *ngIf="hasContentElementType(content, 'VIDEO')"
108 |             mat-raised-button
109 |             color="primary"
110 |             (click)="onContentClick(content, ['VIDEO'], $event)"
111 |           >
112 |             <mat-icon>play_circle_outline</mat-icon>
113 |             Video
114 |           </button>
115 |         </div>
116 |       </div>
117 |       <h2 style="margin-top: 10px">Aufgaben</h2>
118 |       <div class="content-list-element-items">
119 |         <app-content-list-item
120 |           *ngFor="let task of getQuestions(content)"
121 |           [contentElementData]="task"
122 |           [contentNodeId]="content.contentNodeId"
123 |           [allContentElements]="getQuestions(content)"
124 |           (scoreUpdated)="onScoreUpdated(content, $event)"
125 |           (fetchContentsForConcept)="fetchContentsForConcept.emit()"
126 |           (contentElementDeleted)="onContentElementDeleted(content.contentNodeId, $event)"
127 |         ></app-content-list-item>
128 |       </div>
129 | 
130 |       <!-- edit mode actions -->
131 |       <mat-action-row *ngIf="isAdmin && editModeActive">
132 |         <button
133 |           mat-mini-fab
134 |           color="accent"
135 |           (click)="onMoveContentUp(content)"
136 |           matTooltip="Bereich nach oben verschieben"
137 |         >
138 |           <mat-icon>arrow_upward</mat-icon>
139 |         </button>
140 |         <button
141 |           mat-mini-fab
142 |           color="accent"
143 |           (click)="onMoveContentDown(content)"
144 |           matTooltip="Bereich nach unten verschieben"
145 |         >
146 |           <mat-icon>arrow_downward</mat-icon>
147 |         </button>
148 |         <button
149 |           mat-mini-fab
150 |           color="primary"
151 |           (click)="onEditContentNode(content)"
152 |           matTooltip="Bereich bearbeiten"
153 |         >
154 |           <mat-icon>edit</mat-icon>
155 |         </button>
156 |         <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="onAddTask(content.contentNodeId)">
157 |           <mat-icon>add</mat-icon>
158 |           Aufgabe hinzufügen
159 |         </button>
160 |         <!-- TODO: enable button after deletion implementation -->
161 |         <button
162 |           mat-raised-button
163 |           disabled
164 |           color="warn"
165 |           (click)="onDeleteContentNode(content.contentNodeId)"
166 |         >
167 |           <mat-icon>delete</mat-icon>
168 |           Diesen Bereich löschen
169 |         </button>
170 |       </mat-action-row>
171 |     </mat-expansion-panel>
172 |   </mat-accordion>
173 | </div>
```

src/app/Pages/content-list/content-list.component.scss
```
1 | .content-list-container {
2 |   display: flex;
3 |   flex-direction: column;
4 |   gap: 10px;
5 | }
6 | 
7 | .search-bar {
8 |   display: flex;
9 |   flex-direction: row;
10 | }
11 | 
12 | .content-list {
13 |   display: flex;
14 |   flex-direction: column;
15 |   gap: 5px;
16 | }
17 | 
18 | .content-list-element-header-description {
19 |   justify-content: space-between;
20 |   align-items: center;
21 | 
22 |   @media screen and (max-width: 400px) {
23 |     display: none;
24 |   }
25 | }
26 | 
27 | .content-list-element-introduction-stars {
28 |   display: none;
29 | 
30 |   @media screen and (max-width: 400px) {
31 |     display: inline;
32 |   }
33 | }
34 | 
35 | .content-list-element-header-indicators {
36 |   display: flex;
37 |   flex-direction: row;
38 |   gap: 10px;
39 | }
40 | 
41 | .rhino-launcher-icon {
42 |   transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
43 | 
44 |   &:hover {
45 |     color: #45a049 !important;
46 |     transform: scale(1.1);
47 |   }
48 | 
49 |   &:active {
50 |     transform: scale(0.95);
51 |   }
52 | }
53 | 
54 | // Modern Rhino API launcher icon styling
55 | .modern-rhino-launcher-icon {
56 |   transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out;
57 |   position: relative;
58 | 
59 |   &:hover {
60 |     color: #1976d2 !important;
61 |     transform: scale(1.2) rotate(5deg);
62 |     filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.6));
63 |   }
64 | 
65 |   &:active {
66 |     transform: scale(0.9) rotate(-2deg);
67 |   }
68 | 
69 |   // Pulse animation for modern API button
70 |   animation: modernPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
71 | }
72 | 
73 | @keyframes modernPulse {
74 |   0% {
75 |     transform: scale(1);
76 |     filter: brightness(1);
77 |   }
78 |   50% {
79 |     transform: scale(1.05);
80 |     filter: brightness(1.2);
81 |   }
82 |   100% {
83 |     transform: scale(1);
84 |     filter: brightness(1);
85 |   }
86 | }
87 | 
88 | .content-list-element-introduction {
89 |   display: flex;
90 |   flex-direction: row;
91 |   justify-content: space-between;
92 |   gap: 15px;
93 | 
94 |   @media screen and (max-width: 800px) {
95 |     flex-direction: column;
96 |   }
97 | }
98 | 
99 | .content-list-element-introduction-buttons {
100 |   display: flex;
101 |   flex-direction: row;
102 |   gap: 8px;
103 | }
104 | 
105 | .content-list-element-description {
106 |   width: fit-content;
107 |   margin: 4px;
108 | }
109 | 
110 | .content-list-element-items {
111 |   display: grid;
112 |   overflow: auto;
113 |   align-content: start;
114 |   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, 400px);
115 |   justify-content: start;
116 |   justify-items: center;
117 |   grid-gap: 15px;
118 | 
119 |   /* margin: 0 20px 20px; */
120 |   padding: 5px;
121 |   height: 100%;
122 |   /* width: calc(100% - 40px) !important; */
123 |   /* we use a grid to provide the last row to be left-aligned */
124 | 
125 |   @media screen and (max-width: 580px) {
126 |     grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, 350px);
127 |   }
128 | 
129 |   @media screen and (max-width: 400px) {
130 |     grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, 260px);
131 |   }
132 | }
```

src/app/Pages/content-list/content-list.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit, OnChanges, Component, EventEmitter, Input, Output } from '@angular/core';
2 | import {
3 |   ContentDTO,
4 |   ContentElementDTO,
5 |   ContentsForConceptDTO,
6 |   LinkableContentElementDTO,
7 | } from '@DTOs/index';
8 | import { contentElementType } from '@DTOs/index';
9 | import { animate, state, style, transition, trigger } from '@angular/animations';
10 | import { ScreenSizeService } from 'src/app/Services/mobile/screen-size.service';
11 | import { ProgressService } from 'src/app/Services/progress/progress.service';
12 | import { MatDialog, MatDialogConfig } from '@angular/material/dialog';
13 | import { firstValueFrom } from 'rxjs';
14 | import { ContentViewComponent } from '../contentView/contentView.component';
15 | import { UserService } from 'src/app/Services/auth/user.service';
16 | import { CreateContentElementDialogComponent } from '../lecturersView/create-content-element-dialog/create-content-element-dialog.component';
17 | import { ContentLinkerService } from 'src/app/Services/contentLinker/content-linker.service';
18 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
19 | import { ConfirmationService } from 'src/app/Services/confirmation/confirmation.service';
20 | import { ContentListNodeEditDialogComponent } from './content-list-node-edit-dialog/content-list-node-edit-dialog.component';
21 | import { BatRhinoService } from '../../Services/bat-rhino.service';
22 | 
23 | @Component({
24 |   selector: 'app-content-list',
25 |   templateUrl: './content-list.component.html',
26 |   styleUrls: ['./content-list.component.scss'],
27 |   animations: [
28 |     trigger('contentExpand', [
29 |       state(
30 |         'collapsed',
31 |         style({
32 |           height: '0',
33 |           opacity: 0,
34 |           overflow: 'hidden',
35 |         }),
36 |       ),
37 |       state(
38 |         'expanded',
39 |         style({
40 |           height: '*',
41 |           opacity: 1,
42 |         }),
43 |       ),
44 |       transition('collapsed <=> expanded', animate('200ms ease-out')),
45 |     ]),
46 |   ],
47 | })
48 | export class ContentListComponent implements OnInit, OnChanges {
49 |   @Input() activeConceptNodeId: any;
50 |   @Input() contentsForActiveConceptNode: ContentsForConceptDTO = {
51 |     trainedBy: [],
52 |     requiredBy: [],
53 |   };
54 | 
55 |   filteredContents: ContentDTO[] = [];
56 | 
57 |   searchTerm: string = '';
58 |   expandedIndex = 0;
59 |   panelOpenState = false;
60 | 
61 |   // emitter for refreshing
62 |   @Output() fetchContentsForConcept = new EventEmitter<void>();
63 | 
64 |   @Output() rhinoButtonClicked = new EventEmitter<void>();
65 | 
66 |   protected isAdmin: boolean = false;
67 |   protected editModeActive: boolean = false;
68 | 
69 |   constructor(
70 |     private readonly dialog: MatDialog,
71 |     private readonly sSS: ScreenSizeService,
72 |     private readonly progressService: ProgressService,
73 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
74 |     private readonly contentLinkerService: ContentLinkerService,
75 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
76 |     private readonly confirmService: ConfirmationService,
77 |     private readonly batRhinoService: BatRhinoService,
78 |   ) {
79 |     this.isAdmin = this.userService.getRole() === 'ADMIN';
80 |   }
81 | 
82 |   ngOnInit() {
83 |     this.userService.hasEditModeActive$.subscribe(hasEditModeActive => {
84 |       this.editModeActive = hasEditModeActive;
85 |     });
86 |   }
87 | 
88 |   ngOnChanges() {
89 |     if (this.contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy.length > 0) {
90 |       // Sortiere nach position, falls vorhanden
91 |       this.filteredContents = [...this.contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy].sort((a, b) => {
92 |         // Wenn beide Positionen vorhanden sind, sortiere danach
93 |         if (a.position != null && b.position != null) {
94 |           if (a.position === b.position) {
95 |             // Bei gleichen Positionen: nach contentNodeId als Fallback sortieren
96 |             return a.contentNodeId - b.contentNodeId;
97 |           }
98 |           return a.position - b.position;
99 |         }
100 |         // Wenn nur eine Position vorhanden ist, sortiere die mit Position zuerst
101 |         if (a.position != null) return -1;
102 |         if (b.position != null) return 1;
103 |         // Wenn keine Position vorhanden ist, sortiere nach contentNodeId
104 |         return a.contentNodeId - b.contentNodeId;
105 |       });
106 |     }
107 |   }
108 | 
109 |   /**
110 |    * Generates an array with a specified number of elements.
111 |    *
112 |    * @param num - The number of elements in the array.
113 |    * @returns An array with the specified number of elements.
114 |    */
115 |   getLevels(num: number): number[] {
116 |     return new Array(num);
117 |   }
118 | 
119 |   /**
120 |    * Checks if the given content has at least one content element of the specified type.
121 |    *
122 |    * @param content - The content object to check.
123 |    * @param type - The type of content element to look for.
124 |    * @returns `true` if the content has at least one element of the specified type, otherwise `false`.
125 |    */
126 |   hasContentElementType(content: ContentDTO, type: string): boolean {
127 |     return content.contentElements.some(element => element.type === type);
128 |   }
129 | 
130 |   /**
131 |    * Filters and returns the content elements of type QUESTION from the given content.
132 |    *
133 |    * @param {ContentDTO} content - The content object containing content elements.
134 |    * @returns {ContentElement[]} An array of content elements that are of type QUESTION.
135 |    */
136 |   getQuestions(content: ContentDTO): ContentElementDTO[] {
137 |     return content.contentElements.filter(element => element.type === contentElementType.QUESTION);
138 |   }
139 | 
140 |   /**
141 |    * Retrieves the attachments from the given content.
142 |    * Filters the content elements to include only those of type PDF or VIDEO.
143 |    *
144 |    * @param content - The content object containing content elements.
145 |    * @returns An array of content elements that are either of type PDF or VIDEO.
146 |    */
147 |   getAttachments(content: ContentDTO): ContentElementDTO[] {
148 |     return content.contentElements.filter(
149 |       element =>
150 |         element.type === contentElementType.PDF || element.type === contentElementType.VIDEO,
151 |     );
152 |   }
153 | 
154 |   /**
155 |    * Handles the click event on a content item.
156 |    *
157 |    * @param content - The content data transfer object (DTO) representing the clicked content.
158 |    * @param type - An array of strings representing the type of the content.
159 |    * @param event - The mouse event triggered by the click.
160 |    *
161 |    * This method stops the propagation of the click event, configures and opens a dialog to display the content,
162 |    * and updates the progress if the content type is not "VIDEO" or "PDF". If the content is fully completed (100% progress),
163 |    * it triggers a graph update.
164 |    */
165 |   async onContentClick(content: ContentDTO, type: string[], event: MouseEvent) {
166 |     event.stopPropagation();
167 |     const dialogConfig = new MatDialogConfig();
168 |     const isLandscape = await firstValueFrom(this.sSS.isLandscape);
169 | 
170 |     // Set dialog dimensions based on screen orientation
171 |     dialogConfig.width = isLandscape ? '70vw' : '90%';
172 |     dialogConfig.maxHeight = isLandscape ? '95vh' : '80vh';
173 | 
174 |     // Set dialog data
175 |     dialogConfig.data = {
176 |       contentViewData: content,
177 |       conceptNodeId: this.activeConceptNodeId,
178 |       contentTypes: type,
179 |     };
180 | 
181 |     // Open the dialog
182 |     const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(ContentViewComponent, dialogConfig);
183 | 
184 |     // Handle dialog close event
185 |     // We use this to update the data source and refresh graph is progress is 100%
186 |     if (type[0] != 'VIDEO' && type[0] != 'PDF') {
187 |       // Dont update progress for video and pdf
188 |       dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(() => {
189 |         // Find the updated content in contentsForActiveConceptNode
190 |         const updatedContent = this.contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy.find(
191 |           c => c.contentNodeId === content.contentNodeId,
192 |         );
193 | 
194 |         // If the content is fully completed (100% progress), trigger a graph update
195 |         if (updatedContent && updatedContent.progress > 99) {
196 |           this.progressService.answerSubmitted();
197 |         }
198 |       });
199 |     }
200 |   }
201 | 
202 |   // TODO: update total score without reloading
203 |   onScoreUpdated(contentNode: ContentDTO, elementData: ContentElementDTO) {
204 |     //console.log("Score updated:", elementData.question?.progress);
205 |     const foundContent = this.contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy.find(
206 |       content => content.contentNodeId === contentNode.contentNodeId,
207 |     );
208 |     if (foundContent) {
209 |       const foundElement = foundContent.contentElements.find(
210 |         element => element.id === elementData.id,
211 |       );
212 |       if (foundElement?.question && elementData.question) {
213 |         foundElement.question.progress = elementData.question.progress;
214 |         foundContent.progress = this.progressService.calculateProgress(foundContent);
215 |         if (elementData.question.progress == 100) {
216 |           foundContent.levelProgress = this.progressService.calculateLevelProgress(foundContent);
217 |         }
218 |       }
219 |     }
220 |     this.applyFilter();
221 |   }
222 | 
223 |   /**
224 |    * Filters the contents based on the provided search term.
225 |    *
226 |    * @param term - The search term to filter the contents. If not provided, defaults to an empty string.
227 |    *
228 |    * If the term is not an empty string, it updates the searchTerm property with the provided term.
229 |    * Then, it filters the contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy array based on whether the concatenated
230 |    * string of content name and content elements (id and title) includes the search term (case insensitive).
231 |    * If the term is an empty string, it resets the filteredContents to the original contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy array.
232 |    */
233 |   applyFilter(term: string = '') {
234 |     if (term !== '') this.searchTerm = term;
235 |     if (this.searchTerm != '') {
236 |       this.filteredContents = this.contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy.filter(content => {
237 |         let context: string = content.name + ' ';
238 |         content.contentElements.forEach(element => {
239 |           context += element.id + ' ' + element.title + ' ';
240 |         });
241 |         return context.toLowerCase().includes(this.searchTerm.toLowerCase());
242 |       });
243 |     } else {
244 |       this.filteredContents = this.contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy;
245 |     }
246 |   }
247 | 
248 |   /**
249 |    * Opens a dialog to create a new task.
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentView.component.html
```
1 | <!-- Create a Card for each Content Element and display PDF, Video etc. depending on type-->
2 | <!-- <div class="center"> -->
3 | <mat-card
4 |   *ngFor="let contentElem of viewableElements; index as i; let l = count"
5 |   class="contentView-card"
6 | >
7 |   <!--Show Content Title, if it has any-->
8 |   <mat-card-header *ngIf="contentElem.title">
9 |     <mat-card-title-group>
10 |       <mat-card-title>
11 |         {{ contentViewData.name }} ( {{ i + 1 }} von {{ l }} ) - Zuletzt geöffnet:
12 |         {{ readableDate }}
13 |       </mat-card-title>
14 |       <!-- We could add an subtitle or icon to the header aswell
15 |       <mat-card-subtitle>Extra large</mat-card-subtitle>
16 |       <img mat-card-xl-image src="https://material.angular.io/assets/img/examples/shiba2.jpg" >
17 |       -->
18 | 
19 |       <!-- Create Button for each Content Element to create a new Discussion -->
20 |       <button
21 |         (click)="onCreateDiscussion(contentElem.id)"
22 |         mat-stroked-button
23 |         color="primary"
24 |         style="text-align: center"
25 |       >
26 |         Frage stellen
27 |       </button>
28 |     </mat-card-title-group>
29 |   </mat-card-header>
30 | 
31 |   <mat-card-content
32 |     *ngIf="contentTypes.includes(contentElem.type)"
33 |     style="height: 100%; overflow: auto"
34 |   >
35 |     <!--********** BEGIN: Show Content depending on type **********-->
36 | 
37 |     <!--PDF-->
38 |     <div
39 |       *ngIf="contentElem.type === 'PDF' && contentElem.file && !isSafari"
40 |       class="contentElement-Container"
41 |     >
42 |       <!-- Our current PDF Component cant be initialized multiple times... using an iframe instead for now -->
43 |       <app-pdfViewer [uniqueIdentifier]="contentElem.file.uniqueIdentifier"></app-pdfViewer>
44 |     </div>
45 |     <div
46 |       *ngIf="contentElem.type === 'PDF' && contentElem.file && isSafari"
47 |       class="contentElement-Container"
48 |     >
49 |       <!-- Our current PDF Component cant be initialized multiple times... using an iframe instead for now -->
50 |       <!-- <p class="message-code">Safari unterstützt den PDF Viewer nicht. Wir empfehlen hierfür die Nutzung eines alternativen Browsers, z.B. Google Chrome.</p> -->
51 |       <app-pdfViewer [uniqueIdentifier]="contentElem.file.uniqueIdentifier"></app-pdfViewer>
52 |     </div>
53 | 
54 |     <!--VIDEO-->
55 |     <div *ngIf="contentElem.type === 'VIDEO' && contentElem.file" class="contentElement-Container">
56 |       <app-videoViewer [uniqueIdentifier]="contentElem.file.uniqueIdentifier"></app-videoViewer>
57 |     </div>
58 | 
59 |     <!--CODE-->
60 |     <div *ngIf="contentElem.type === 'CODE'" class="contentElement-Container contentElement-Code">
61 |       <p class="message-code">Code kann noch nicht dargestellt werden.</p>
62 |     </div>
63 | 
64 |     <!-- QUESTION -->
65 |     <div *ngIf="contentElem.type === 'QUESTION'" class="contentElement-Container">
66 |       <p class="message-code">Hier werden die Aufgaben angezeigt.</p>
67 |       <!-- <app-mcTask>  [uniqueIdentifier]=""></app-mcTask> -->
68 |     </div>
69 | 
70 |     <!--Show additional Content Text, if it has any-->
71 |     <div *ngIf="contentElem.text" class="contentElement-Container">
72 |       {{ contentElem.text }}
73 |     </div>
74 | 
75 |     <!-- Create Button for each Content Element to mark the Element as 'Completed'  -->
76 |     <!-- <div class="progressButton-Container">
77 |       <button class="progress-button" (click)="onToggleCheckmark(contentElem.id)" mat-stroked-button
78 |         [ngStyle]="applyCheckmarkStyles(contentElem.id)">
79 |         <mat-icon class="small-icon">check</mat-icon>
80 |         <p class="button-text"> Ich habe diesen Inhalt verstanden.</p>
81 |       </button> -->
82 |     <!-- Create Button for each Content Element to mark the Element as 'Open Question'  -->
83 |     <!-- <button class="progress-button" (click)="onToggleQuestionmark(contentElem.id)" mat-stroked-button
84 |         [ngStyle]="applyQuestionmarkStyles(contentElem.id)">
85 |         <mat-icon class="small-icon">?</mat-icon>
86 |         <p class="button-text"> Für später markieren.</p>
87 |       </button>
88 |     </div> -->
89 | 
90 |     <!--********** END: Show Content depending on type **********-->
91 |   </mat-card-content>
92 | 
93 |   <mat-card-actions style="justify-content: center">
94 |     <button
95 |       class="progress-button"
96 |       (click)="onToggleCheckmark(contentElem.id)"
97 |       mat-stroked-button
98 |       [ngStyle]="applyCheckmarkStyles(contentElem.id)"
99 |     >
100 |       <mat-icon class="small-icon">check</mat-icon>
101 |       <p class="button-text">Ich habe diesen Inhalt verstanden.</p>
102 |     </button>
103 |     <!-- Create Button for each Content Element to mark the Element as 'Open Question'  -->
104 |     <button
105 |       class="progress-button"
106 |       (click)="onToggleQuestionmark(contentElem.id)"
107 |       mat-stroked-button
108 |       [ngStyle]="applyQuestionmarkStyles(contentElem.id)"
109 |     >
110 |       <mat-icon class="small-icon">?</mat-icon>
111 |       <p class="button-text">Für später markieren.</p>
112 |     </button>
113 |   </mat-card-actions>
114 | </mat-card>
115 | <!-- </div> -->
116 | <!--
117 |   <h2>For Debugging the stringyfied ContentElements:</h2>
118 |   <ul>
119 |   <li *ngFor="let contentElem of contentViewData.contentElements">
120 |     {{tempForTest(contentElem)}}
121 |   </li>
122 |   </ul>
123 | -->
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentView.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, Inject } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { ContentDTO, ContentElementDTO } from '@DTOs/content.dto';
4 | import { MatDialogRef } from '@angular/material/dialog';
5 | import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA } from '@angular/material/dialog';
6 | import { DomSanitizer, SafeResourceUrl } from '@angular/platform-browser';
7 | import { DiscussionDialogService } from 'src/app/Services/discussion/discussion-dialog.service';
8 | import { ContentService } from 'src/app/Services/content/content.service';
9 | 
10 | @Component({
11 |   selector: 'app-contentView',
12 |   templateUrl: './contentView.component.html',
13 |   styleUrls: ['./contentView.component.css'],
14 | })
15 | export class ContentViewComponent implements OnInit {
16 |   contentViewData: ContentDTO;
17 |   activeConceptNodeId: number;
18 |   contentTypes: string[];
19 |   viewableElements: ContentElementDTO[] = [];
20 |   applyCompletedStyle: boolean[] = [];
21 |   applyQuestionStyle: boolean[] = [];
22 |   lastOpenedDate: Date = new Date();
23 |   readableDate: string = 'dummy date';
24 |   elementCount: number = 0;
25 |   pdfCount: number = 0;
26 |   isSafari: boolean = false;
27 | 
28 |   // Get Data from Dialog
29 |   constructor(
30 |     public dialogRef: MatDialogRef<ContentViewComponent>,
31 |     @Inject(MAT_DIALOG_DATA) public data: any,
32 |     private readonly sanitizer: DomSanitizer,
33 |     private readonly discussionDialogService: DiscussionDialogService,
34 |     private readonly contentService: ContentService,
35 |   ) {
36 |     this.contentViewData = data.contentViewData as ContentDTO;
37 |     this.activeConceptNodeId = data.conceptNodeId as number;
38 |     this.contentTypes = data.contentTypes;
39 |     this.elementCount = this.contentViewData.contentElements.length;
40 |     // filter contentElements by type
41 |     this.viewableElements = this.contentViewData.contentElements.filter(x =>
42 |       this.contentTypes.includes(x.type),
43 |     );
44 |     // sort contentElements by position
45 |     this.viewableElements = this.viewableElements.sort(
46 |       (a, b) => a.positionInSpecificContentView - b.positionInSpecificContentView,
47 |     );
48 |     // set default button style
49 |     for (let i = 0; i < this.contentViewData.contentElements.length; i++) {
50 |       this.applyCompletedStyle[i] = false;
51 |       this.applyQuestionStyle[i] = false;
52 |     }
53 |     this.pdfCount = this.getPdfCount();
54 | 
55 |     // check if browser is Safari
56 |     // pdfViewer component is not supported in Safari therefor a warning message is displayed
57 |     this.isSafari = /^((?!chrome|android).)*safari/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
58 |   }
59 | 
60 |   // for testing -> print ContentElems as String
61 |   tempForTest(data: ContentElementDTO): string {
62 |     return JSON.stringify(data);
63 |   }
64 | 
65 |   ngOnInit() {
66 |     this.getLastOpenedDate();
67 |     for (let i = 0; i < this.contentViewData.contentElements.length; i++) {
68 |       this.contentService
69 |         .getContentElementStatus(this.contentViewData.contentElements[i].id)
70 |         .subscribe(status => {
71 |           if (status.userStatusCompleted) {
72 |             this.applyCompletedStyle[i] = true;
73 |           } else {
74 |             this.applyCompletedStyle[i] = false;
75 |           }
76 |           if (status.userStatusQuestion) {
77 |             this.applyQuestionStyle[i] = true;
78 |           } else {
79 |             this.applyQuestionStyle[i] = false;
80 |           }
81 |         });
82 |     }
83 |   }
84 | 
85 |   /**
86 |    * @description
87 |    * Returns the pdf url for the iframe
88 |    * (we need iframe for multiple pdfs in a row: https://pdfviewer.net/extended-pdf-viewer/side-by-side)
89 |    * @param {string} uniqueIdentifier - uuid of the pdf
90 |    * @returns {SafeResourceUrl} - pdf url for the iframe
91 |    */
92 |   getPdfUrl(uniqueIdentifier: string): SafeResourceUrl {
93 |     return this.sanitizer.bypassSecurityTrustResourceUrl(`/pdfViewer/${uniqueIdentifier}`);
94 |   }
95 | 
96 |   /**
97 |    * @description
98 |    * Returns the number of pdfs for the current content node
99 |    * @returns {number} - number of pdfs
100 |    */
101 |   getPdfCount(): number {
102 |     return this.contentViewData.contentElements.filter(x => x.type === 'PDF').length;
103 |   }
104 | 
105 |   /**
106 |    * @description
107 |    * Handles the click event of the discussion button
108 |    * Opens a dialog for creating a new discussion/question
109 |    * @param {number} contentElementId - id of the content element
110 |    */
111 |   onCreateDiscussion(contentElementId: number) {
112 |     this.discussionDialogService.openDiscussionCreation(
113 |       this.activeConceptNodeId,
114 |       this.contentViewData.contentNodeId,
115 |       contentElementId,
116 |     );
117 |     this.dialogRef.close();
118 |   }
119 | 
120 |   /**
121 |    * @description
122 |    * Handles the click event of the checkmark button
123 |    * Toggles the completion status of the content element
124 |    * Toggles the appearance of the checkmark button
125 |    * @param {number} contentElementId - id of the content element
126 |    */
127 |   onToggleCheckmark(contentElementId: number) {
128 |     const position = this.contentViewData.contentElements.findIndex(x => x.id === contentElementId);
129 |     this.contentService
130 |       .toggleContentElementCompletionStatus(
131 |         contentElementId,
132 |         this.activeConceptNodeId,
133 |         this.contentViewData.level,
134 |       )
135 |       .subscribe(status => (this.applyCompletedStyle[position] = status));
136 |   }
137 | 
138 |   /**
139 |    * @description
140 |    * Handles the click event of the questionmark button
141 |    * Toggles the question status of the content element
142 |    * Toggles the appearance of the questionmark button
143 |    * @param {number} contentElementId - id of the content element
144 |    */
145 |   onToggleQuestionmark(contentElementId: number) {
146 |     const position = this.contentViewData.contentElements.findIndex(x => x.id === contentElementId);
147 |     this.contentService
148 |       .toggleContentElementQuestionStatus(contentElementId)
149 |       .subscribe(status => (this.applyQuestionStyle[position] = status));
150 |     if (!this.applyQuestionStyle[position]) {
151 |       this.contentViewData.questionMarked = true;
152 |     } else {
153 |       for (let i = 0; i < this.applyQuestionStyle.length; i++) {
154 |         if (this.applyQuestionStyle[i] && i !== position) {
155 |           this.contentViewData.questionMarked = true;
156 |           return;
157 |         }
158 |         this.contentViewData.questionMarked = false;
159 |       }
160 |     }
161 |   }
162 | 
163 |   /**
164 |    * @description
165 |    * Applies the styles for the checkmark button within contentView
166 |    * @param contentElementId - id of the content element
167 |    */
168 |   applyCheckmarkStyles(contentElementId: number) {
169 |     const position = this.contentViewData.contentElements.findIndex(x => x.id === contentElementId);
170 | 
171 |     let styles = { color: 'red', 'background-color': 'white' };
172 |     if (this.applyCompletedStyle[position]) {
173 |       styles = { color: 'white', 'background-color': '#a3be8c' };
174 |     } else {
175 |       styles = { color: 'gray', 'background-color': 'white' };
176 |     }
177 |     return styles;
178 |   }
179 | 
180 |   /**
181 |    * @description
182 |    * Applies the styles for the questionmark button within contentView
183 |    * @param contentElementId - id of the content element
184 |    */
185 |   applyQuestionmarkStyles(contentElementId: number) {
186 |     const position = this.contentViewData.contentElements.findIndex(x => x.id === contentElementId);
187 | 
188 |     let styles = { color: 'white', 'background-color': 'red' };
189 |     if (this.applyQuestionStyle[position]) {
190 |       styles = { color: 'white', 'background-color': '#b48ead' };
191 |     } else {
192 |       styles = { color: 'gray', 'background-color': 'white' };
193 |     }
194 |     return styles;
195 |   }
196 | 
197 |   /**
198 |    * @description
199 |    * Returns the date of the last time the content node was opened
200 |    */
201 |   getLastOpenedDate() {
202 |     this.contentService
203 |       .updateLastOpenedDate(this.contentViewData.contentNodeId)
204 |       .subscribe(status => {
205 |         this.lastOpenedDate = new Date(status);
206 |         this.readableDate = this.getDateDisplay(this.lastOpenedDate);
207 |       });
208 |   }
209 |   /**
210 |    * Returns the date in a human readable format
211 |    * @param date
212 |    * @returns string - date in a human readable format
213 |    */
214 |   getDateDisplay(date: Date): string {
215 |     const today = new Date();
216 |     const newDate = new Date(date);
217 |     const dbDate = new Date(date);
218 |     today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0); // set time to 00:00:00.000
219 |     if (newDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0) === today.getTime()) {
220 |       return `Heute ${dbDate.getHours()}:${dbDate.getMinutes() < 10 ? '0' : ''}${dbDate.getMinutes()} Uhr`;
221 |     } else {
222 |       return `${newDate.getDate()}.${newDate.getMonth() + 1}.${newDate.getFullYear()}`;
223 |     }
224 |   }
225 | }
```

src/app/Pages/contentBoard/contentBoard.component.css

1 | .content-container {
2 |   display: block;
3 |   margin-top: 8px;
4 |   overflow-x: auto;
5 | }
6 | 
7 | .node-progress {
8 |   width: 35%;
9 |   margin: auto;
10 |   margin-left: 10px;
11 |   margin-right: 5%;
12 | }
13 | 
14 | .node-question {
15 |   margin-right: 10px;
16 | }
17 | 
18 | .content-view {
19 |   width: fit-content;
20 |   margin-right: 10px;
21 |   margin-top: 2px;
22 | }
23 | 
24 | .description {
25 |   width: fit-content;
26 |   margin: 4px;
27 | }
28 | 
29 | .panel-title {
30 |   width: fit-content;
31 | }
32 | 
33 | .level-icon {
34 |   margin-left: 1px;
35 |   color: orange;
36 | }
37 | .level-icon-container {
38 |     display: flex;
39 |     flex-direction: row;
40 | }
41 | 
42 | ::ng-deep .mat-expansion-panel-header[aria-disabled=true] {
43 |   color: rgba(0,0,0,.87);
44 | }
45 | 
46 | .mat-table {
47 |   width: 100%; /* Stellt sicher, dass die Tabelle die Breite ihres Containers ausfüllt */
48 |   min-width: 600px; /* Minimale Breite der Tabelle, bevor Scrollen aktiviert wird */
49 | }
50 | 
51 | mat-icon {
52 |   cursor: pointer;
53 |   overflow: visible
54 | 
55 | }
56 | @media screen and (max-width: 1000px) {
57 | 
58 |   .level-icon-container {
59 |     display: flex;
60 |     flex-direction: row;
61 |   }
62 | 
63 |   .mat-expansion-panel-header {
64 |     display: flex;
65 |   }
66 | 
67 |   .mat-expansion-panel-description {
68 |     font-size: 8px;
69 |   }
70 | 
71 |   .mobile-button {
72 |     margin-bottom: 10px;
73 |   }
74 | }

src/app/Pages/contentBoard/contentBoard.component.html
```
1 | <div class="content-container" class="mat-elevation-z8">
2 |   <mat-accordion multi="true">
3 |     <mat-expansion-panel
4 |       [hideToggle]="!hasContentElementType(content, 'QUESTION')"
5 |       *ngFor="let content of contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy; let i = index"
6 |     >
7 |       <!-- <mat-expansion-panel [disabled]="!hasContentElementType(content, 'QUESTION')" [hideToggle]="!hasContentElementType(content, 'QUESTION')" *ngFor="let content of contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy; let i = index"></mat-expansion-panel> -->
8 |       <mat-expansion-panel-header fxLayout="row">
9 |         <mat-panel-title class="panel-title">
10 |           {{ content.name }}
11 |           <div *ngIf="content.progress == 100">
12 |             <mat-icon class="level-icon" *ngFor="let level of getLevels(content.level)"
13 |               >star</mat-icon
14 |             >
15 |           </div>
16 |           <div *ngIf="content.progress < 100" class="level-icon-container">
17 |             <mat-icon class="level-icon" *ngFor="let level of getLevels(content.level)"
18 |               >star_border</mat-icon
19 |             >
20 |           </div>
21 |           <mat-icon
22 |             *ngIf="hasContentElementType(content, 'QUESTION')"
23 |             matTooltip="Enthält Übungsaufgaben."
24 |             >rate_review</mat-icon
25 |           >
26 |           <mat-icon
27 |             class="node-question"
28 |             *ngIf="content.questionMarked"
29 |             matTooltip="Mindestens ein Inhalt wurde mit einem ? markiert."
30 |             >help</mat-icon
31 |           >
32 |         </mat-panel-title>
33 |         <p
34 |           *ngIf="!(sSS.isHandset | async) && !editModeActive"
35 |           class="level-progress"
36 |           matTooltip="Der Fortschritt wird durch die abschlossenen Teilinhalte berechnet."
37 |           style="margin-top: 10px"
38 |         >
39 |           Level-Fortschritt:
40 |         </p>
41 |         <mat-progress-bar
42 |           *ngIf="!(sSS.isHandset | async) && !editModeActive"
43 |           matTooltip="Der Fortschritt wird durch die abschlossenen Teilinhalte berechnet."
44 |           class="node-progress"
45 |           mode="determinate"
46 |           [value]="content.progress"
47 |         ></mat-progress-bar>
48 |         <button
49 |           *ngIf="!(sSS.isHandset | async)"
50 |           class="content-view"
51 |           [style.visibility]="hasContentElementType(content, 'PDF') ? 'visible' : 'hidden'"
52 |           matTooltip="Zeigt alle PDF (z.B. Vorlesungsfolien) zum Thema an. Über diese Ansicht können einzelne Elemente als erledigt markiert und der Fortschritt erhöht werden."
53 |           mat-raised-button
54 |           color="primary"
55 |           (click)="onContentClick(content, ['PDF'], $event)"
56 |         >
57 |           PDF
58 |         </button>
59 |         <button
60 |           *ngIf="!(sSS.isHandset | async)"
61 |           class="content-view"
62 |           [style.visibility]="hasContentElementType(content, 'VIDEO') ? 'visible' : 'hidden'"
63 |           matTooltip="Zeigt alle Videos (z.B. Vorlesungsaufzeichungen) zum Thema an. Über diese Ansicht können einzelne Elemente als erledigt markiert und der Fortschritt erhöht werden."
64 |           mat-raised-button
65 |           color="primary"
66 |           (click)="onContentClick(content, ['VIDEO'], $event)"
67 |         >
68 |           Video
69 |         </button>
70 |       </mat-expansion-panel-header>
71 | 
72 |       <div class="mobile-button" *ngIf="sSS.isHandset | async">
73 |         <button
74 |           class="content-view"
75 |           [style.visibility]="hasContentElementType(content, 'PDF') ? 'visible' : 'hidden'"
76 |           matTooltip="Zeigt alle PDF (z.B. Vorlesungsfolien) zum Thema an. Über diese Ansicht können einzelne Elemente als erledigt markiert und der Fortschritt erhöht werden."
77 |           mat-raised-button
78 |           color="primary"
79 |           (click)="onContentClick(content, ['PDF'], $event)"
80 |         >
81 |           PDF
82 |         </button>
83 |         <button
84 |           class="content-view"
85 |           [style.visibility]="hasContentElementType(content, 'VIDEO') ? 'visible' : 'hidden'"
86 |           matTooltip="Zeigt alle Videos (z.B. Vorlesungsaufzeichungen) zum Thema an. Über diese Ansicht können einzelne Elemente als erledigt markiert und der Fortschritt erhöht werden."
87 |           mat-raised-button
88 |           color="primary"
89 |           (click)="onContentClick(content, ['VIDEO'], $event)"
90 |         >
91 |           Video
92 |         </button>
93 |       </div>
94 |       <div *ngIf="!editModeActive">
95 |         <mat-divider *ngIf="sSS.isHandset | async"></mat-divider>
96 |         <div *ngIf="sSS.isHandset | async">
97 |           <p
98 |             matTooltip="Der Fortschritt wird durch die abschlossenen Teilinhalte berechnet."
99 |             style="margin-top: 10px"
100 |           >
101 |             Level-Fortschritt:
102 |           </p>
103 |           <mat-progress-bar
104 |             style="margin-bottom: 15px"
105 |             matTooltip="Der Fortschritt wird durch die abschlossenen Teilinhalte berechnet."
106 |             mode="determinate"
107 |             [value]="content.progress"
108 |             >asdasd</mat-progress-bar
109 |           >
110 |         </div>
111 |         <mat-divider *ngIf="sSS.isHandset | async"></mat-divider>
112 |       </div>
113 |       <mat-panel-description>
114 |         <p class="description">
115 |           {{ content.description }}
116 |         </p>
117 |       </mat-panel-description>
118 |       <!-- table with the content node details and elements -->
119 |       <div class="content-container" *ngIf="hasContentElementType(content, 'QUESTION')">
120 |         <h3>Fragenübersicht</h3>
121 | 
122 |         <div>
123 |           <table mat-table [dataSource]="getFilteredData(content.contentNodeId)" mat-sort>
124 |             <!-- Position Column -->
125 |             <ng-container matColumnDef="id">
126 |               <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef>ID</th>
127 |               <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let element">{{ element.id }}</td>
128 |             </ng-container>
129 | 
130 |             <!-- Name Column -->
131 |             <ng-container matColumnDef="name">
132 |               <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef>Name</th>
133 |               <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let element">{{ element.name }}</td>
134 |             </ng-container>
135 | 
136 |             <!-- Type Column -->
137 |             <ng-container matColumnDef="type">
138 |               <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef>Fragentyp</th>
139 |               <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let element">{{ genBetterElementNames(element.type) }}</td>
140 |             </ng-container>
141 | 
142 |             <!-- Attempts Column -> not used anymore
143 |             <ng-container matColumnDef="attempts">
144 |               <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef> Versuche </th>
145 |               <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let element"> {{ element.attempts }} </td>
146 |             </ng-container>
147 |             -->
148 | 
149 |             <!-- Level Column -> not used anymore, because the level shown in the content node title
150 |             <ng-container matColumnDef="level">
151 |               <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef> Level </th>
152 |               <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let element"> {{ element.level }} </td>
153 |             </ng-container>
154 |             -->
155 | 
156 |             <!-- Progress Column -->
157 |             <ng-container matColumnDef="progress">
158 |               <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef>Fortschritt</th>
159 |               <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let row">
160 |                 <mat-progress-spinner
161 |                   [value]="row.progress"
162 |                   [mode]="'determinate'"
163 |                   [diameter]="30"
164 |                 ></mat-progress-spinner>
165 |               </td>
166 |             </ng-container>
167 | 
168 |             <!-- Symbol Column -->
169 |             <ng-container matColumnDef="actions">
170 |               <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef>Aktion</th>
171 |               <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let element">
172 |                 <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; gap: 10px">
173 |                   <button
174 |                     mat-raised-button
175 |                     color="primary"
176 |                     (click)="onTaskClick(element, content)"
177 |                     class="button"
178 |                   >
179 |                     Öffnen
180 |                   </button>
181 |                   <button
182 |                     *ngIf="isAdmin && editModeActive"
183 |                     mat-icon-button
184 |                     color="primary"
185 |                     (click)="onTaskEdit(element)"
186 |                     class="button"
187 |                   >
188 |                     <mat-icon>edit</mat-icon>
189 |                   </button>
190 |                   <button
191 |                     *ngIf="isAdmin && editModeActive"
192 |                     mat-icon-button
193 |                     color="warn"
194 |                     (click)="onTaskDelete(element)"
195 |                     class="button"
196 |                     style="margin-left: 20px"
197 |                   >
198 |                     <mat-icon>delete</mat-icon>
199 |                   </button>
200 |                 </div>
201 |               </td>
202 |             </ng-container>
203 | 
204 |             <tr mat-header-row *matHeaderRowDef="displayedColumns"></tr>
205 |             <tr mat-row *matRowDef="let row; columns: displayedColumns"></tr>
206 |           </table>
207 |         </div>
208 |       </div>
209 | 
210 |       <mat-action-row *ngIf="isAdmin && editModeActive">
211 |         <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="onNewTask(content.contentNodeId)">
212 |           Frage hinzufügen
213 |         </button>
214 |         <button
215 |           mat-raised-button
216 |           color="warn"
217 |           (click)="onContentNodeDelete(content.contentNodeId)"
218 |           disabled
219 |         >
220 |           ContentNode Löschen
221 |         </button>
222 |       </mat-action-row>
223 |     </mat-expansion-panel>
224 |   </mat-accordion>
225 | </div>
```

src/app/Pages/contentBoard/contentBoard.component.ts
```
1 | import { ProgressService } from 'src/app/Services/progress/progress.service';
2 | import { ContentDTO, ContentsForConceptDTO, LinkableContentElementDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
3 | import { questionType } from '@DTOs/index';
4 | import { OnChanges, OnDestroy, OnInit, AfterViewInit } from '@angular/core';
5 | import { Component, EventEmitter, Input, Output, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
6 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
7 | import { MatDialog, MatDialogRef } from '@angular/material/dialog';
8 | import { MatDialogConfig } from '@angular/material/dialog';
9 | import { ContentViewComponent } from '../contentView/contentView.component';
10 | import { MatTableDataSource } from '@angular/material/table';
11 | import { MatSort } from '@angular/material/sort';
12 | import { McTaskComponent } from '../contentView/contentElement/mcTask/mcTask.component';
13 | import { FreeTextTaskComponent } from '../contentView/contentElement/free-text-task/free-text-task.component';
14 | import { firstValueFrom, lastValueFrom, Subject, takeUntil } from 'rxjs';
15 | import { ScreenSizeService } from 'src/app/Services/mobile/screen-size.service';
16 | import { UserService } from 'src/app/Services/auth/user.service';
17 | import { CreateContentElementDialogComponent } from '../lecturersView/create-content-element-dialog/create-content-element-dialog.component';
18 | import { ContentLinkerService } from 'src/app/Services/contentLinker/content-linker.service';
19 | import { ConfirmationService } from 'src/app/Services/confirmation/confirmation.service';
20 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
21 | import { FillinTaskNewComponent } from '../contentView/contentElement/fill-in-task-new/fill-in-task-new.component';
22 | import { TaskViewData } from '@DTOs/index';
23 | import { QuestionDataService } from 'src/app/Services/question/question-data.service';
24 | import { MatAccordion } from '@angular/material/expansion';
25 | 
26 | /**
27 |  * @deprecated This component is no longer used in the application and should not longer be used.
28 |  * Please refer to the new content-list component in the content-list folder.
29 |  */
30 | @Component({
31 |   selector: 'app-contentBoard',
32 |   templateUrl: './contentBoard.component.html',
33 |   styleUrls: ['./contentBoard.component.css'],
34 | })
35 | export class ContentBoardComponent implements OnInit, OnChanges, OnDestroy, AfterViewInit {
36 |   /**
37 |    * Event emitter that triggers a refresh of the contents for the current concept
38 |    * Used to notify parent components when content needs to be reloaded
39 |    */
40 |   @Output() fetchContentsForConcept = new EventEmitter<void>();
41 | 
42 |   /**
43 |    * The ID of the currently active concept node
44 |    * Used to identify which concept's content should be displayed
45 |    * Can be undefined if no concept is selected
46 |    */
47 |   @Input() activeConceptNodeId: number | undefined;
48 | 
49 |   /**
50 |    * The contents for the active concept node
51 |    */
52 |   @Input() contentsForActiveConceptNode: ContentsForConceptDTO = {
53 |     trainedBy: [],
54 |     requiredBy: [],
55 |   };
56 | 
57 |   @ViewChild(MatSort) sort: MatSort;
58 | 
59 |   /**
60 |    * Columns to be displayed in the table
61 |    */
62 |   displayedColumns: string[] = ['id', 'name', 'type', 'progress', 'actions'];
63 | 
64 |   /**
65 |    * Data source for the MatTable
66 |    */
67 |   dataSource: MatTableDataSource<TaskViewData>;
68 | 
69 |   /**
70 |    * Subject to manage subscriptions and trigger their unsubscription on component destruction
71 |    */
72 |   private readonly destroy$ = new Subject<void>();
73 | 
74 |   // for lecturers view
75 |   protected isAdmin: boolean = false;
76 |   protected editModeActive: boolean = false;
77 | 
78 |   constructor(
79 |     private readonly router: Router,
80 |     public dialog: MatDialog,
81 |     public sSS: ScreenSizeService,
82 |     private readonly progressService: ProgressService,
83 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
84 |     private readonly contentLinkerService: ContentLinkerService,
85 |     private readonly confirmService: ConfirmationService,
86 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
87 |   ) {
88 |     // Initialize the data source for the table
89 |     this.dataSource = new MatTableDataSource<TaskViewData>();
90 |     this.sort = new MatSort();
91 | 
92 |     // for lecturers view
93 |     this.isAdmin = this.userService.getRole() === 'ADMIN';
94 |   }
95 | 
96 |   ngOnInit() {
97 |     // Subscribe to screen size changes for responsive design
98 |     this.userService.hasEditModeActive$.subscribe(hasEditModeActive => {
99 |       this.editModeActive = hasEditModeActive;
100 |       if (hasEditModeActive) {
101 |         this.updateDisplayedColumns(['id', 'name', 'type', 'progress', 'actions']);
102 |       } else {
103 |         this.sSS.isHandset.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(isHandset => {
104 |           if (isHandset) {
105 |             this.updateDisplayedColumns(['name', 'type', 'progress', 'actions']);
106 |           }
107 |         });
108 | 
109 |         this.sSS.isTablet.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(isTablet => {
110 |           if (isTablet) {
111 |             this.updateDisplayedColumns(['id', 'name', 'type', 'progress', 'actions']);
112 |           }
113 |         });
114 |       }
115 |     });
116 |   }
117 | 
118 |   /**
119 |    * @description
120 |    * Updates the columns displayed in the table based on screen size
121 |    * @param columns - Array of column names to be displayed
122 |    */
123 |   updateDisplayedColumns(columns: string[]) {
124 |     this.displayedColumns = columns;
125 |   }
126 | 
127 |   /**
128 |    * @description
129 |    * Lifecycle hook that is called when any data-bound property of a directive changes.
130 |    * Updates the data source when the input properties change.
131 |    */
132 |   ngOnChanges() {
133 |     this.updateDataSource();
134 |   }
135 | 
136 |   /**
137 |    * @description
138 |    * Lifecycle hook that is called after the view has been initialized.
139 |    * Sets up sorting for the table.
140 |    */
141 |   ngAfterViewInit() {
142 |     this.dataSource.sort = this.sort;
143 |   }
144 | 
145 |   /**
146 |    * @description
147 |    * Lifecycle hook that is called when the component is about to be destroyed.
148 |    * Cleans up subscriptions to prevent memory leaks.
149 |    */
150 |   ngOnDestroy() {
151 |     this.destroy$.next();
152 |     this.destroy$.complete();
153 |   }
154 | 
155 |   /**
156 |    * @description
157 |    * Handles the click event for content elements Video and PDF.
158 |    * Opens a dialog to display the content and updates progress if necessary.
159 |    * @param {ContentDTO} content - The ContentDTO object that was clicked
160 |    * @param {string[]} type - Array of content types
161 |    * @param {MouseEvent} event - The mouse event
162 |    */
163 |   async onContentClick(content: ContentDTO, type: string[], event: MouseEvent) {
164 |     // Prevent event propagation to parent elements
165 |     event.stopPropagation();
166 | 
167 |     const dialogConfig = new MatDialogConfig();
168 | 
169 |     // Determine if the device is in landscape mode
170 |     const isLandscape = await firstValueFrom(this.sSS.isLandscape);
171 | 
172 |     // Set dialog dimensions based on screen orientation
173 |     dialogConfig.width = isLandscape ? '70vw' : '90%';
174 |     dialogConfig.maxHeight = isLandscape ? '95vh' : '80vh';
175 | 
176 |     // Set dialog data
177 |     dialogConfig.data = {
178 |       contentViewData: content,
179 |       conceptNodeId: this.activeConceptNodeId,
180 |       contentTypes: type,
181 |     };
182 | 
183 |     // Open the dialog
184 |     const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(ContentViewComponent, dialogConfig);
185 | 
186 |     // Handle dialog close event
187 |     // We use this to update the data source and refresh graph is progress is 100%
188 |     if (type[0] != 'VIDEO' && type[0] != 'PDF') {
189 |       // Dont update progress for video and pdf
190 |       dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(() => {
191 |         // Find the updated content in contentsForActiveConceptNode
192 |         const updatedContent = this.contentsForActiveConceptNode.trainedBy.find(
193 |           c => c.contentNodeId === content.contentNodeId,
194 |         );
195 | 
196 |         // If the content is fully completed (100% progress), trigger a graph update
197 |         if (updatedContent && updatedContent.progress > 99) {
198 |           this.progressService.answerSubmitted();
199 |         }
200 |       });
201 |     }
202 |   }
203 | 
204 |   /**
205 |    * @description
206 |    * Handles the click event for content elements MC, SC, FreeText, or CodingQuestion
207 |    * Opens a dialog or navigates to the appropriate component based on the task type.
208 |    * @param {TaskViewData} selectedTask - The TaskViewData object that was clicked (The task)
209 |    * @param {ContentDTO} selectedContentNode - The ContentDTO object that was clicked (Contains the tasks)
210 |    */
211 |   async onTaskClick(selectedTask: TaskViewData, selectedContentNode: ContentDTO) {
212 |     const dialogConfig = new MatDialogConfig();
213 |     dialogConfig.data = {
214 |       taskViewData: selectedTask,
215 |       conceptId: this.activeConceptNodeId,
216 |       questionId: selectedTask.id,
217 |     };
218 |     dialogConfig.width = 'auto';
219 |     dialogConfig.maxHeight = '95vh';
220 |     const conceptId = this.activeConceptNodeId;
221 |     const taskId = selectedTask.id;
222 | 
223 |     if (conceptId === undefined || taskId === undefined) {
224 |       console.error('Concept ID or Task ID is undefined');
225 |       this.snackBar.open('Ungültige Konzept-ID oder Task-ID.', 'Schließen', { duration: 3000 });
226 |       return;
227 |     }
228 |     let dialogRef:
229 |       | MatDialogRef<McTaskComponent | FreeTextTaskComponent | FillinTaskNewComponent>
230 |       | undefined;
231 | 
232 |     switch (selectedTask.type) {
233 |       case questionType.SINGLECHOICE:
234 |       case questionType.MULTIPLECHOICE:
235 |       case questionType.FILLIN:
236 |         await this.router.navigate([`/dashboard/concept/${conceptId}/question/${taskId}`]);
237 |         break;
238 |       case questionType.FREETEXT:
239 |         await this.router.navigate([`/dashboard/concept/${conceptId}/question/${taskId}`]);
240 |         break;
241 |       case questionType.CODE:
242 |         // Navigate to coding question component
243 |         this.router.navigate([this.getRouterLink('CodingQuestion', selectedTask.id)]);
244 |         break;
245 |       case questionType.GRAPH:
246 |         // Navigate to graph question component
247 |         await this.router.navigate([`/graphtask/${taskId}`], {
248 |           queryParams: {
249 |             concept: conceptId,
250 |             questionId: taskId,
251 |           },
252 |         });
253 |         return;
254 |       case questionType.FILLIN:
255 |         dialogRef = this.dialog.open(FillinTaskNewComponent, { ...dialogConfig, width: '50vw' });
256 |         break;
257 |       case questionType.UML:
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Pages/dashboard/dashboard.component.css
```
1 | .mat-elevation-z8 {
2 |   background: #eceff4;
3 | }
4 | 
5 | .resize-handle {
6 |   display: flex; /* Ermöglicht die Verwendung von Flexbox */
7 |   align-items: center; /* Zentriert den Inhalt vertikal */
8 |   justify-content: center; /* Zentriert den Inhalt horizontal */
9 |   width: 100px; /* Setzt die Breite des Handles */
10 |   height: 50px; /* Erhöht die Höhe, um mehr Platz für ein größeres Icon zu schaffen */
11 |   cursor: ns-resize; /* Ändert den Mauszeiger, um die Ziehbarkeit anzuzeigen */
12 |   position: absolute;
13 |   bottom: -8px;
14 |   left: 50%; /* Positioniert den Handle in der Mitte des Elternelements */
15 |   transform: translateX(-50%); /* Zentriert den Handle genau, indem es um die Hälfte seiner Breite nach links verschoben wird */
16 | }
17 | 
18 | .content {
19 |   margin: 16px;
20 |   /* margin-left: 32px; */
21 |   padding:16px;
22 |   contain: content;
23 |   overflow-y: hide; /* Hide vertical scrollbar because we can already move content by clicking on whitespace */
24 |   scrollbar-width: thin;
25 | 
26 |   font-size: 14px;
27 |   color: lightgrey;
28 |   border-radius: 10px;
29 | }
30 | 
31 | .graph {
32 |   height: 50vh;
33 | }
34 | 
35 | .lectureview-button {
36 |   position: fixed;
37 |   width: 48px;
38 |   height: 48px;
39 |   top: 30px;
40 |   right: 90px;
41 |   z-index: 1000; /* Stellen Sie sicher, dass der Button über anderen Elementen liegt */
42 |   background-color: #3f51b5; /* Farbe des Buttons */
43 |   color: white; /* Farbe des Symbols */
44 | }
45 | 
46 | .navigation-preference-toggle {
47 |   display: flex;
48 |   justify-content: flex-end;
49 |   padding: 8px 16px;
50 |   margin-bottom: 8px;
51 | }
```

1 | <div appDraggableHeight class="content graph mat-elevation-z8">
2 |   <ng-container [ngSwitch]="currentNavigator">
3 |     <app-graph *ngSwitchCase="'graph'"></app-graph>
4 |     <app-mobile-navigator *ngSwitchCase="'mobile'"></app-mobile-navigator>
5 |     <app-highlight-navigator *ngSwitchCase="'highlight'"></app-highlight-navigator>
6 |   </ng-container>
7 |   <div class="resize-handle">
8 |     <mat-icon
9 |       aria-hidden="false"
10 |       aria-label="Example drag handle icon"
11 |       style="transform: scale(2); color: black"
12 |       >drag_handle</mat-icon
13 |     >
14 |   </div>
15 | </div>
16 | <!-- <div *ngIf="(sSS.isHandset | async)">You are on a handset device.</div>
17 | <div *ngIf="(sSS.isWeb | async)">You are on a web device.</div>
18 | <div *ngIf="(sSS.isTablet | async)">You are on a tablet device.</div>
19 | <div *ngIf="(sSS.isLandscape | async)">You are in landscape.</div>
20 | <div *ngIf="!(sSS.isLandscape | async)">You are in portrait.</div> -->
21 | <router-outlet></router-outlet>
22 | 
23 | <!-- lecturers view -->

src/app/Pages/dashboard/dashboard.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnDestroy, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { Title } from '@angular/platform-browser';
4 | import { Subscription } from 'rxjs';
5 | import { ScreenSizeService } from 'src/app/Services/mobile/screen-size.service';
6 | import {
7 |   NavigationPreferenceService,
8 |   NavigationType,
9 | } from 'src/app/Services/navigation/navigation-preference.service';
10 | import { NotificationService } from 'src/app/Services/notification/notification.service';
11 | import { ToolbarService } from 'src/app/Services/toolbar/toolbar.service';
12 | 
13 | @Component({
14 |   selector: 'app-dashboard',
15 |   templateUrl: './dashboard.component.html',
16 |   styleUrls: ['./dashboard.component.css'],
17 | })
18 | export class DashboardComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
19 |   unreadCount: number = 0;
20 |   private readonly subscriptions: Subscription[] = [];
21 | 
22 |   currentNavigationPreference: NavigationType = 'graph';
23 |   isLandscapeView = false;
24 | 
25 |   constructor(
26 |     public toolbarService: ToolbarService,
27 |     public sSS: ScreenSizeService,
28 |     private readonly title: Title,
29 |     private readonly notificationService: NotificationService,
30 |     private readonly navigationPreferenceService: NavigationPreferenceService,
31 |   ) {
32 |     toolbarService.show();
33 |     this.title.setTitle('GOALS: Dashboard');
34 |     sSS.isHandset.subscribe(result => {
35 |       console.log('HANDSET', result);
36 |     });
37 |     sSS.isWeb.subscribe(result => {
38 |       console.log('WEB', result);
39 |     });
40 |   }
41 | 
42 |   get isMobile() {
43 |     return window.innerWidth < 768;
44 |   }
45 | 
46 |   ngOnInit() {
47 |     console.log('🔍 [Dashboard] ngOnInit() - Component initializing...');
48 | 
49 |     // Ensure WebSocket connection is established
50 |     this.notificationService.initializeWebSocket();
51 | 
52 |     this.subscriptions.push(
53 |       this.notificationService.getUnreadCount().subscribe(count => {
54 |         this.unreadCount = count;
55 |       }),
56 |       this.notificationService.getNotifications().subscribe(),
57 |       this.navigationPreferenceService.preference$.subscribe(preference => {
58 |         this.currentNavigationPreference = preference;
59 |       }),
60 |       this.sSS.isLandscape.subscribe(isLandscape => {
61 |         this.isLandscapeView = isLandscape;
62 |       }),
63 |     );
64 |   }
65 | 
66 |   /**
67 |    * Returns which navigator to show based on the current preference
68 |    */
69 |   get currentNavigator(): 'graph' | 'mobile' | 'highlight' {
70 |     return this.currentNavigationPreference;
71 |   }
72 | 
73 |   ngOnDestroy() {
74 |     console.log('🔍 [Dashboard] Component destroying...');
75 |     // Unsubscribe from all subscriptions to avoid memory leaks
76 |     this.subscriptions.forEach(sub => sub.unsubscribe());
77 |   }
78 | }
```
