src/app/Services/auth/user.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
3 | import { BehaviorSubject } from 'rxjs';
4 | import jwt_decode from 'jwt-decode';
5 | import { globalRole } from '@DTOs/roles.enum';
6 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
7 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
8 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
9 | import { HttpClient, HttpErrorResponse } from '@angular/common/http';
10 | import { v4 as uuid } from 'uuid';
11 | import { catchError, finalize, tap } from 'rxjs/operators';
12 | 
13 | interface SubjectInfo {
14 |   subjectId: number;
15 |   subjectname: string;
16 |   role: string;
17 |   registeredForSL: boolean;
18 | }
19 | 
20 | @Injectable({
21 |   providedIn: 'root',
22 | })
23 | export class UserService {
24 |   private readonly DEVICE_ID_KEY = 'deviceId';
25 |   deviceID: string = this.getDeviceId();
26 |   isAuthenticated$: Observable<boolean>;
27 |   hasEditModeActive$: Observable<boolean>;
28 | 
29 |   constructor(
30 |     private readonly router: Router,
31 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
32 |     private readonly http: HttpClient,
33 |   ) {
34 |     this.isAuthenticated$ = new BehaviorSubject<boolean>(false);
35 |     this.hasEditModeActive$ = new BehaviorSubject<boolean>(false);
36 |   }
37 | 
38 |   /**
39 |    * This method is used to handle the login
40 |    * @param username the username (email)
41 |    * @param password the password
42 |    * @returns { Promise<boolean> } a promise containing a boolean indicating whether the login was successful
43 |    */
44 |   login(username: string, password: string): Promise<boolean> {
45 |     return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
46 |       const credentials = { email: username, password: password };
47 |       console.log('Attempting login with:', { email: username, password: '******' });
48 |       console.log('Server URL:', environment.server + '/auth/login');
49 | 
50 |       this.http.post(environment.server + '/auth/login', credentials).subscribe({
51 |         next: (response: any) => {
52 |           console.log('Login successful:', response);
53 |           const accessToken = response.accessToken;
54 |           const refreshToken = response.refreshToken;
55 |           localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken);
56 |           localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken);
57 |           this.openSnackBar('Hallo ' + username);
58 |           this.router.navigate(['/dashboard']);
59 |           resolve(true);
60 |         },
61 |         error: (error: HttpErrorResponse) => {
62 |           console.error('Login error:', error);
63 |           console.error('Error status:', error.status);
64 |           console.error('Error message:', error.message);
65 |           if (error.error instanceof ErrorEvent) {
66 |             console.error('Client-side error:', error.error.message);
67 |           } else {
68 |             console.error('Server-side error:', error.error);
69 |           }
70 |           this.openSnackBar('Der Login ist fehlgeschlagen. Bitte überprüfen Sie Ihre Eingaben.');
71 |           resolve(false);
72 |         },
73 |       });
74 |     });
75 |   }
76 | 
77 |   /**
78 |    * Logs out the user from the application.
79 |    *
80 |    * @param { boolean } logoutFromAllDevices - Indicates whether to log out from all devices.
81 |    * @returns { Promise<boolean> } - A promise that resolves to true if the logout was successful, otherwise false.
82 |    */
83 |   logout(logoutFromAllDevices: boolean): Promise<boolean> {
84 |     const url = logoutFromAllDevices
85 |       ? environment.server + '/auth/logoutAllUserDevices'
86 |       : environment.server + '/auth/logout';
87 | 
88 |     return new Promise<boolean>(async resolve => {
89 |       this.http
90 |         .get(url)
91 |         .pipe(
92 |           finalize(() => {
93 |             this.removeTokens();
94 |             this.router.navigate(['/login']);
95 |           }),
96 |         )
97 |         .subscribe({
98 |           next: (response: any) => {
99 |             if (response.message === 'Logout successful') {
100 |               this.openSnackBar('Erfolgreich abgemeldet.');
101 |               resolve(true);
102 |             } else if (response.message === 'Logout from all devices successful') {
103 |               this.openSnackBar('Erfolgreich von allen Geräten abgemeldet.');
104 |               resolve(true);
105 |             } else {
106 |               this.openSnackBar('Fehler bei der Abmeldung.');
107 |               resolve(false);
108 |             }
109 |           },
110 |           error: (error: any) => {
111 |             this.openSnackBar('Fehler bei der Abmeldung.');
112 |             resolve(false);
113 |           },
114 |           complete: () => {},
115 |         });
116 |     });
117 |   }
118 | 
119 |   /**
120 |    * Logs out all users by making an HTTP GET request to the server's logout endpoint.
121 |    *
122 |    * @returns { Promise<boolean> } A promise that resolves to `true` if all users were
123 |    * successfully logged out, or `false` if there was an error.
124 |    */
125 |   logoutAllUser(): Promise<boolean> {
126 |     return new Promise<boolean>(async resolve => {
127 |       this.http
128 |         .get(environment.server + '/auth/logoutAllUser')
129 |         .pipe(
130 |           finalize(() => {
131 |             this.removeTokens();
132 |             this.router.navigate(['/login']);
133 |           }),
134 |         )
135 |         .subscribe({
136 |           next: (response: any) => {
137 |             if (response.message === 'All user logout out successful') {
138 |               this.openSnackBar('Alle Nutzer erfolgreich abgemeldet.');
139 |               resolve(true);
140 |             } else {
141 |               this.openSnackBar('Fehler bei der Abmeldung aller Nutzer.');
142 |               resolve(false);
143 |             }
144 |           },
145 |           error: (error: any) => {
146 |             this.openSnackBar('Fehler bei der Abmeldung aller Nutzer.');
147 |             resolve(false);
148 |           },
149 |           complete: () => {},
150 |         });
151 |     });
152 |   }
153 | 
154 |   /**
155 |    * Checks if the user is registered for the specified subject
156 |    * @param subjectName The name of the subject to check
157 |    * @returns { boolean } A boolean indicating whether the user is registered
158 |    */
159 |   isRegisteredForSubject(subjectName: string): boolean {
160 |     const decodedToken = this.decodeAccessToken();
161 |     if (decodedToken?.subjects) {
162 |       const subject = decodedToken.subjects.find((s: SubjectInfo) => s.subjectname === subjectName);
163 |       return subject ? subject.registeredForSL : false;
164 |     }
165 |     return false;
166 |   }
167 | 
168 |   /**
169 |    * Checks if the user is logged in by verifying the existence of authentication tokens.
170 |    * - `accessToken`: Gets from local storage
171 |    *
172 |    * @returns A boolean value representing whether the user is logged in
173 |    */
174 |   isUserLoggedIn(): boolean {
175 |     const isAuthenticated = Boolean(localStorage.getItem('accessToken'));
176 |     (this.isAuthenticated$ as BehaviorSubject<boolean>).next(isAuthenticated);
177 |     return isAuthenticated;
178 |   }
179 | 
180 |   /**
181 |    * Sets the access and refresh tokens in the local storage and updates the authentication status.
182 |    *
183 |    * @param accessToken - The access token to be stored.
184 |    * @param refreshToken - The refresh token to be stored.
185 |    */
186 |   setTokens(accessToken: string, refreshToken: string): void {
187 |     localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken);
188 |     localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken);
189 |     (this.isAuthenticated$ as BehaviorSubject<boolean>).next(true); // Update authentication status
190 |   }
191 | 
192 |   /**
193 |    * Removes both accessToken, refreshToken and deviceId from local storage,
194 |    * if either of them exists.
195 |    */
196 |   removeTokens(): void {
197 |     const accessToken = 'accessToken';
198 |     const refreshToken = 'refreshToken';
199 |     const deviceId = this.DEVICE_ID_KEY;
200 | 
201 |     if (
202 |       localStorage.getItem(accessToken) &&
203 |       localStorage.getItem(refreshToken) &&
204 |       localStorage.getItem(deviceId)
205 |     ) {
206 |       localStorage.removeItem(accessToken);
207 |       localStorage.removeItem(refreshToken);
208 |       localStorage.removeItem(deviceId);
209 |       (this.isAuthenticated$ as BehaviorSubject<boolean>).next(false); // Update authentication status
210 |     }
211 |   }
212 | 
213 |   /**
214 |    * This function gets the access token from the local storage.
215 |    * @returns { string } The access token.
216 |    */
217 |   getAccessToken(): string {
218 |     const accessToken = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
219 |     if (accessToken) {
220 |       return accessToken;
221 |     } else {
222 |       throw new Error('No access token found');
223 |     }
224 |   }
225 | 
226 |   /**
227 |    * Retrieves the refresh token from the local storage.
228 |    *
229 |    * @returns { string } The refresh token.
230 |    * @throws { Error } If no refresh token is found in the local storage.
231 |    */
232 |   getRefreshToken(): string {
233 |     const refreshToken = localStorage.getItem('refreshToken');
234 |     if (refreshToken) {
235 |       return refreshToken;
236 |     } else {
237 |       throw new Error('No refresh token found');
238 |     }
239 |   }
240 | 
241 |   /**
242 |    * Refreshes the access and refresh tokens using the provided refresh token.
243 |    *
244 |    * @param { string } refreshToken - The refresh token used to obtain new access and refresh tokens.
245 |    * @returns { Observable<any> } - An observable that emits the server's response or an error.
246 |    */
247 |   refreshTokens(refreshToken: string): Observable<any> {
248 |     return this.http
249 |       .get(environment.server + '/auth/refresh', {
250 |         headers: {
251 |           Authorization: `Bearer ${refreshToken}`,
252 |         },
253 |       })
254 |       .pipe(
255 |         tap((response: any) => {
256 |           // Update the access token in local storage or cookie
257 |           const accessToken = response.accessToken;
258 |           const refreshToken = response.refreshToken;
259 |           localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken);
260 |           localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken);
261 |         }),
262 |         catchError((error: any) => {
263 |           this.openSnackBar('Sitzung abgelaufen. Bitte erneut anmelden');
264 |           this.removeTokens();
265 |           return error;
266 |         }),
267 |       );
268 |   }
269 | 
270 |   /**
271 |    * Retrieves the device ID from local storage. If the device ID does not exist,
272 |    * it generates a new one, stores it in local storage, and then returns it.
273 |    *
274 |    * @returns { string } The device ID.
275 |    * @throws { Error } If a new device ID could not be generated.
276 |    */
277 |   getDeviceId(): string {
278 |     let deviceId = localStorage.getItem(this.DEVICE_ID_KEY);
279 | 
280 |     if (!deviceId) {
281 |       deviceId = uuid();
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Services/ai/llm.service.ts
```
1 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
2 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
5 | 
6 | export interface ChatSession {
7 |   id: number;
8 |   title: string;
9 |   createdAt: string;
10 |   messages: ChatBotMessage[];
11 | }
12 | 
13 | export interface ChatBotMessage {
14 |   id: number;
15 |   question: string;
16 |   answer: string;
17 |   createdAt: string;
18 |   isBot: boolean;
19 |   ratingByStudent?: number;
20 |   sessionId?: number;
21 | }
22 | 
23 | @Injectable({
24 |   providedIn: 'root',
25 | })
26 | export class LlmService {
27 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
28 | 
29 |   /**
30 |    * Gets all chat sessions for the current user
31 |    * @returns Observable of chat sessions array
32 |    */
33 |   getChatSessions(): Observable<ChatSession[]> {
34 |     return this.http.get<ChatSession[]>(`${environment.server}/chat-bot/sessions`);
35 |   }
36 | 
37 |   /**
38 |    * Gets a basic answer from the LLM.
39 |    * @param question The question to ask.
40 |    * @returns Observable of the answer.
41 |    */
42 |   getLlmAnswer(question: string): Observable<{ answer: string }> {
43 |     return this.http.post<{ answer: string }>(`${environment.server}/chat-bot/ask/basic`, {
44 |       question,
45 |     });
46 |   }
47 | 
48 |   /**
49 |    * Gets a dialog-based answer from the LLM.
50 |    * @param context The context of the conversation.
51 |    * @param question The question to ask.
52 |    * @param dialogSessionId The ID of the dialog session.
53 |    * @param sessionId Optional ID of an existing chat session.
54 |    * @returns Observable of the response.
55 |    */
56 |   getLlmAnswerDialog(
57 |     context: { role: string; content: string }[],
58 |     question: string,
59 |     dialogSessionId: string,
60 |     url: string, // Added url parameter
61 |     sessionId?: number,
62 |   ): Observable<ChatBotMessage> {
63 |     return this.http.post<ChatBotMessage>(`${environment.server}/chat-bot/ask/basic/getDialog`, {
64 |       context,
65 |       question,
66 |       dialogSessionId,
67 |       sessionId,
68 |       url, // Added url to payload
69 |     });
70 |   }
71 | }
```

src/app/Services/confirmation/confirmation.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
3 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
5 | import { ConfirmationBoxComponent } from 'src/app/Pages/confirmation-box/confirmation-box.component';
6 | 
7 | interface ConfirmOptions {
8 |   title?: string;
9 |   message?: string;
10 |   acceptLabel?: string;
11 |   declineLabel?: string;
12 |   swapButtons?: boolean;
13 |   swapColors?: boolean;
14 |   accept?: () => void;
15 |   decline?: () => void;
16 | }
17 | 
18 | @Injectable({
19 |   providedIn: 'root',
20 | })
21 | export class ConfirmationService {
22 |   constructor(private readonly dialog: MatDialog) {}
23 | 
24 |   /**
25 |    * Shows a confirmation dialog
26 |    *
27 |    * @example this.confirm({ title: "Attention!", message: "Are you sure?", accept: () => { console.log("confirmed"); }, decline: () => { console.log("declined"); } });
28 |    * @param options
29 |    */
30 |   confirm(options: ConfirmOptions): Observable<boolean> {
31 |     const resultSubject = new Subject<boolean>();
32 |     const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(ConfirmationBoxComponent, {
33 |       data: {
34 |         title: options.title || 'Achtung!',
35 |         message: options.message || 'Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie diese Aktion durchführen möchten?',
36 |         decline: options.declineLabel || 'Abbrechen',
37 |         accept: options.acceptLabel || 'Bestätigen',
38 |         swapButtons: options.swapButtons || false,
39 |         swapColors: options.swapColors || false,
40 |       },
41 |       autoFocus: false,
42 |     });
43 |     dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {
44 |       if (result && typeof result === 'boolean') {
45 |         resultSubject.next(result);
46 |         if (result && options.accept) {
47 |           options.accept();
48 |         } else if (!result && options.decline) {
49 |           options.decline();
50 |         }
51 |       } else {
52 |         resultSubject.next(false);
53 |         if (options.decline) {
54 |           options.decline();
55 |         }
56 |       }
57 |       resultSubject.complete();
58 |     });
59 |     return resultSubject.asObservable();
60 |   }
61 | }
```

6 |   providedIn: 'root',
7 | })
8 | export class ConceptSelectionService {
9 |   private readonly selectedConceptIdSubject = new BehaviorSubject<number | null>(null);
10 |   selectedConceptId$: Observable<number | null> = this.selectedConceptIdSubject.asObservable();
11 | 
12 |   constructor() {}
13 | 
14 |   /**
15 |    * Sets the selected concept ID
16 |    * @param conceptId The ID of the selected concept
17 |    */
18 |   setSelectedConceptId(conceptId: number): void {
19 |     this.selectedConceptIdSubject.next(conceptId);
20 |   }
21 | 
22 |   /**
23 |    * Clears the selected concept ID
24 |    */
25 |   clearSelectedConceptId(): void {
26 |     this.selectedConceptIdSubject.next(null);
27 |   }
28 | }

```
1 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
2 | import { HttpErrorResponse } from '@angular/common/http';
3 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { ContentsForConceptDTO, ContentElementStatusDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
5 | import { ConceptNodeDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
6 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
7 | import { catchError, tap, Subject } from 'rxjs';
8 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
9 | import { ConceptNode } from '@DTOs/conceptNode.dto';
10 | 
11 | @Injectable({
12 |   providedIn: 'root',
13 | })
14 | export class ContentService {
15 |   public toggleCheckmarkStatus: Subject<{ contentElementId: number; isCompleted: boolean }> =
16 |     new Subject<{ contentElementId: number; isCompleted: boolean }>();
17 |   public toggleQuestionmarkStatus: Subject<{ contentElementId: number; hasQuestion: boolean }> =
18 |     new Subject<{ contentElementId: number; hasQuestion: boolean }>();
19 |   // public lastOpenedDate: Subject<Date> = new Subject<Date>();
20 | 
21 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
22 | 
23 |   /**
24 |    * Fetches all content for a specific conceptNode.
25 |    * @param conceptId The id of a concept node.
26 |    * @returns ContentsForConceptDTO - an object with two arrays of ContentDTO objects. One for the requiredBy and one for trainedBy relations.
27 |    */
28 |   fetchContentsForConcept(conceptId: number): Observable<ContentsForConceptDTO> {
29 |     return this.http.get<ContentsForConceptDTO>(
30 |       environment.server + `/content/byConceptNode/${conceptId}`,
31 |     );
32 |   }
33 | 
34 |   /**
35 |    *
36 |    * @returns All conceptNames in the database.
37 |    */
38 |   fetchAllConceptNames(): Observable<string[]> {
39 |     return this.http.get<string[]>(environment.server + `/content/concepts`);
40 |   }
41 | 
42 |   getConcepts(): Observable<ConceptNode[]> {
43 |     return this.http.get<ConceptNode[]>(environment.server + `/content/conceptsFull`);
44 |   }
45 | 
46 |   /**
47 |    * Fetches the completion status of a content element for a specific user.
48 |    * @param contentElementId The id of a content element.
49 |    * @returns ContentElementStatusDTO - the status of the content element.
50 |    */
51 |   getContentElementStatus(contentElementId: number): Observable<ContentElementStatusDTO> {
52 |     return this.http.get<ContentElementStatusDTO>(
53 |       environment.server + `/content/status/${contentElementId}`,
54 |     );
55 |   }
56 | 
57 |   /**
58 |    * Toggles the completion status of a content element for a specific user.
59 |    * @param contentElementId The id of a content element.
60 |    * @returns ContentElementStatusDTO - the status of the content element.
61 |    */
62 |   toggleContentElementCompletionStatus(
63 |     contentElementId: number,
64 |     conceptNodeId: number,
65 |     level: number,
66 |   ): Observable<boolean> {
67 |     console.log(
68 |       'toggleContentElementCompletionStatus: ' +
69 |         contentElementId +
70 |         ' ' +
71 |         conceptNodeId +
72 |         ' ' +
73 |         level,
74 |     );
75 |     return this.http
76 |       .get<boolean>(
77 |         environment.server +
78 |           `/content/toggleCheckmark/${contentElementId}/${conceptNodeId}/${level}`,
79 |       )
80 |       .pipe(
81 |         tap((status: boolean) => {
82 |           this.toggleCheckmarkStatus.next({
83 |             contentElementId: contentElementId,
84 |             isCompleted: status,
85 |           });
86 |         }),
87 |       );
88 |   }
89 | 
90 |   /**
91 |    * Toggles the completion status of a content element for a specific user.
92 |    * @param contentElementId The id of a content element.
93 |    * @returns ContentElementStatusDTO - the status of the content element.
94 |    */
95 |   toggleContentElementQuestionStatus(contentElementId: number): Observable<boolean> {
96 |     return this.http
97 |       .get<boolean>(environment.server + `/content/toggleQuestionmark/${contentElementId}`)
98 |       .pipe(
99 |         tap((status: boolean) => {
100 |           this.toggleQuestionmarkStatus.next({
101 |             contentElementId: contentElementId,
102 |             hasQuestion: status,
103 |           });
104 |         }),
105 |       );
106 |   }
107 | 
108 |   /**
109 |    * Fetches the last opened date of a content node for a specific user.
110 |    * @param contentNodeId The id of a content node.
111 |    * @returns Date - the last opened date of the content node.
112 |    */
113 |   updateLastOpenedDate(contentNodeId: number): Observable<Date> {
114 |     //console.log('ContentService: updateLastOpenedDate');
115 |     return this.http.get<Date>(environment.server + `/content/lastOpenedDate/${contentNodeId}`);
116 |   }
117 | }
```

```
1 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
2 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { LinkableContentElementDTO, LinkableContentNodeDTO, QuestionDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
4 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
5 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
6 | 
7 | @Injectable({
8 |   providedIn: 'root',
9 | })
10 | export class ContentLinkerService {
11 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
12 | 
13 |   /**
14 |    * Creates a linked content node.
15 |    *
16 |    * @param contentNode - The linkable content node DTO.
17 |    * @returns An observable of the created linkable content node DTO.
18 |    */
19 |   createLinkedContentNode(contentNode: LinkableContentNodeDTO): Observable<LinkableContentNodeDTO> {
20 |     return this.http.post<LinkableContentNodeDTO>(
21 |       environment.server + '/content/linker/createLinkedContentNode',
22 |       contentNode,
23 |     );
24 |   }
25 | 
26 |   /**
27 |    * Creates a linked question.
28 |    *
29 |    * @param linkableQuestion - The linkable question to create.
30 |    * @returns An observable of type `QuestionDTO` representing the created question.
31 |    */
32 |   createLinkedContentElement(
33 |     linkableContentElement: LinkableContentElementDTO,
34 |   ): Observable<LinkableContentElementDTO> {
35 |     return this.http.post<LinkableContentElementDTO>(
36 |       environment.server + '/content/linker/createLinkedContentElement',
37 |       linkableContentElement,
38 |     );
39 |   }
40 | 
41 |   /**
42 |    * Unlinks a content element by its ID.
43 |    *
44 |    * @param contentElementId - The ID of the content element to unlink.
45 |    * @returns An Observable that emits a boolean indicating the success of the operation.
46 |    */
47 |   unlinkContentElement(contentElementId: number): Observable<boolean> {
48 |     return this.http.get<boolean>(
49 |       environment.server + '/content/linker/unlinkContentElement/' + contentElementId,
50 |     );
51 |   }
52 | 
53 |   /**
54 |    * Fetches a list of unlinked questions from the server.
55 |    *
56 |    * @returns An Observable that emits an array of QuestionDTO objects representing the unlinked questions.
57 |    */
58 |   getUnlinkedQuestions(): Observable<QuestionDTO[]> {
59 |     return this.http.get<QuestionDTO[]>(environment.server + '/content/linker/unlinkedQuestions');
60 |   }
61 | 
62 |   /**
63 |    * Updates the position of a content node.
64 |    *
65 |    * @param contentNodeId - The ID of the content node to update.
66 |    * @param newPosition - The new position for the content node.
67 |    * @returns An Observable that emits a boolean indicating the success of the operation.
68 |    */
69 |   updateContentNodePosition(contentNodeId: number, newPosition: number): Observable<boolean> {
70 |     return this.http.get<boolean>(
71 |       `${environment.server}/content/updatePosition/${contentNodeId}/${newPosition}`,
72 |     );
73 |   }
74 | 
75 |   /**
76 |    * Aktualisiert einen ContentNode (Name, Beschreibung, Level)
77 |    */
78 |   updateContentNode(
79 |     contentNodeId: number,
80 |     data: { name: string; description: string; difficulty: number },
81 |   ): Observable<boolean> {
82 |     return this.http.patch<boolean>(`${environment.server}/content/update/${contentNodeId}`, data);
83 |   }
84 | }
```

src/app/Services/discussion/discussion-creation.service.ts
```
1 | import {
2 |   AnonymousUserDTO,
3 |   discussionCreationDTO,
4 |   discussionMessageCreationDTO,
5 |   discussionNodeNamesDTO,
6 | } from '@DTOs/index';
7 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
8 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
9 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs/internal/Observable';
10 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
11 | 
12 | @Injectable({
13 |   providedIn: 'root',
14 | })
15 | export class DiscussionCreationService {
16 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
17 | 
18 |   /**
19 |    * Returns the anonymous user for the logged in user by discussion id
20 |    * @param discussionId
21 |    * @returns Observable<AnonymousUserDTO>
22 |    */
23 |   getAnonymousUser(discussionId: number): Observable<AnonymousUserDTO> {
24 |     return this.http.get<AnonymousUserDTO>(
25 |       environment.server + `/discussion/creation/anonymousUser/${discussionId}`,
26 |     );
27 |   }
28 | 
29 |   /**
30 |    * Creates a new discussion message in the database and returns it
31 |    * @param message
32 |    * @returns Observable<discussionMessageCreationDTO>
33 |    */
34 |   createDiscussionMessage(
35 |     message: discussionMessageCreationDTO,
36 |   ): Observable<discussionMessageCreationDTO> {
37 |     return this.http.post<discussionMessageCreationDTO>(
38 |       environment.server + '/discussion/creation/messages/create',
39 |       message,
40 |     );
41 |   }
42 | 
43 |   /**
44 |    * Creates a new discussion in the database and returns it
45 |    * @param discussion
46 |    * @returns Observable<number>
47 |    */
48 |   createDiscussion(discussion: discussionCreationDTO): Observable<number> {
49 |     return this.http.post<number>(environment.server + '/discussion/creation/create', discussion);
50 |   }
51 | 
52 |   /**
53 |    * Returns the names of the concept node, content node and content element for the related ids
54 |    * @param conceptNodeId
55 |    * @param contentNodeId
56 |    * @param contentElementId
57 |    * @returns
58 |    */
59 |   getNodeNames(
60 |     conceptNodeId: number,
61 |     contentNodeId: number,
62 |     contentElementId: number,
63 |   ): Observable<discussionNodeNamesDTO> {
64 |     return this.http.get<discussionNodeNamesDTO>(
65 |       environment.server +
66 |         `/discussion/creation/nodeNames/${conceptNodeId}/${contentNodeId}/${contentElementId}`,
67 |     );
68 |   }
69 | }
```

src/app/Services/discussion/discussion-dialog.service.ts
```
1 | import { discussionFilterContentNodeDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
2 | import { ContentDTO, discussionCreationDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
3 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
5 | import { DiscussionCreationComponent } from 'src/app/Pages/discussion/discussion-creation/discussion-creation.component';
6 | import { DiscussionPrecreationComponent } from 'src/app/Pages/discussion/discussion-creation/discussion-precreation/discussion-precreation.component';
7 | import { DiscussionListService } from './discussion-list.service';
8 | import { Observable, firstValueFrom } from 'rxjs';
9 | import { ScreenSizeService } from '../mobile/screen-size.service';
10 | 
11 | @Injectable({
12 |   providedIn: 'root',
13 | })
14 | export class DiscussionDialogService {
15 |   constructor(
16 |     public sSS: ScreenSizeService,
17 |     private readonly dialog: MatDialog,
18 |     private readonly listService: DiscussionListService,
19 |   ) {}
20 | 
21 |   /**
22 |    * Opens the discussion creation dialog. The dialog is used to choose a content node for the discussion.
23 |    * This function does not connect a discussion to a contentElement
24 |    * @param conceptNode
25 |    * @param contentNodes
26 |    * @param userId
27 |    */
28 |   async openContentSelection(conceptNode: number): Promise<number> {
29 |     return new Promise<number>((resolve, reject) => {
30 |       this.listService.getFilterContentNodes(conceptNode).subscribe(contentNodes => {
31 |         const landsub = this.sSS.isLandscape.subscribe(isLandscape => {
32 |           const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(DiscussionPrecreationComponent, {
33 |             width: isLandscape ? '40vw' : '80%',
34 |             data: contentNodes,
35 |           });
36 | 
37 |           dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe((result: discussionFilterContentNodeDTO) => {
38 |             if (result) {
39 |               //console.log("created discussion id: ");
40 |               //console.log(result);
41 |               this.openDiscussionCreation(conceptNode, result.id, -1).then((result: number) => {
42 |                 resolve(result);
43 |               });
44 |             } else {
45 |               reject('No result'); // Reject the promise with an error message
46 |             }
47 |           });
48 |         });
49 |         landsub.unsubscribe();
50 |       });
51 |     });
52 |   }
53 | 
54 |   /**
55 |    * Opens the discussion creation dialog. Here the user can create a discussion for the given concept and content node
56 |    * @param discussionData
57 |    */
58 |   async openDiscussionCreation(
59 |     conceptNodeId: number,
60 |     contentNodeId: number,
61 |     contentElementId: number,
62 |   ): Promise<number> {
63 |     const isLandscape = await firstValueFrom(this.sSS.isLandscape);
64 |     return new Promise<number>((resolve, reject) => {
65 |       const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(DiscussionCreationComponent, {
66 |         width: isLandscape ? '50vw' : '80%',
67 |         panelClass: 'discussionDialog',
68 |         data: {
69 |           id: -1,
70 |           title: '',
71 |           conceptNodeId: conceptNodeId,
72 |           contentNodeId: contentNodeId,
73 |           contentElementId: contentElementId,
74 |           authorId: -1,
75 |           isSolved: false,
76 |         },
77 |       });
78 | 
79 |       dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe((result: number) => {
80 |         if (result && result != -1) {
81 |           //console.log("created discussion id: " + result);
82 |           const url = `/discussion-view/${result}`;
83 |           window.open(url, '_blank');
84 |           resolve(result);
85 |         } else {
86 |           //console.log("no discussion created");
87 |           reject('No discussion created');
88 |         }
89 |       });
90 |     });
91 |   }
92 | }
```

1 | import { discussionDTO, discussionFilterContentNodeDTO, discussionFilterDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
2 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
3 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs/internal/Observable';
5 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
6 | 
7 | @Injectable({
8 |   providedIn: 'root',
9 | })
10 | export class DiscussionListService {
11 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
12 | 
13 |   /**
14 |    * Returns a list of discussions with the given filter data
15 |    * @param filterData
16 |    * @returns discussionDTO[]
17 |    */
18 |   getDiscussions(filterData: discussionFilterDTO): Observable<discussionDTO[]> {
19 |     return this.http.get<discussionDTO[]>(environment.server + `/discussion/list/`, {
20 |       params: { ...filterData } as any,
21 |     });
22 |   }
23 | 
24 |   /**
25 |    * Returns a list of content nodes that are trained by the given concept node - used for the filter
26 |    * @param conceptNodeId
27 |    * @returns discussionFilterContentNodeDTO[]
28 |    */
29 |   getFilterContentNodes(conceptNodeId: number): Observable<discussionFilterContentNodeDTO[]> {
30 |     return this.http.get<discussionFilterContentNodeDTO[]>(
31 |       environment.server + `/discussion/list/filterContentNodes/${conceptNodeId}`,
32 |     );
33 |   }
34 | }

src/app/Services/discussion/discussion-view.service.ts
```
1 | import { discussionDTO, discussionMessageDTO, nodeNameDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
2 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
3 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { Subject, tap } from 'rxjs';
5 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs/internal/Observable';
6 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
7 | 
8 | @Injectable({
9 |   providedIn: 'root',
10 | })
11 | export class DiscussionViewService {
12 |   public toggleStatus: Subject<{ messageId: number; isSolution: boolean }> = new Subject<{
13 |     messageId: number;
14 |     isSolution: boolean;
15 |   }>();
16 | 
17 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
18 | 
19 |   /** Returns the name of the concept node for a given discussion
20 |    *
21 |    * @param discussionId
22 |    * @returns the name of the concept node
23 |    */
24 |   getConceptNodeName(discussionId: number): Observable<nodeNameDTO> {
25 |     return this.http.get<nodeNameDTO>(
26 |       environment.server + `/discussion/view/conceptNodeName/${discussionId}`,
27 |     );
28 |   }
29 | 
30 |   /**
31 |    * This function returns a discussion for a given id
32 |    * @param discussionId
33 |    * @returns the discussion
34 |    */
35 |   getDiscussion(discussionId: number): Observable<discussionDTO> {
36 |     return this.http.get<discussionDTO>(environment.server + `/discussion/view/${discussionId}`);
37 |   }
38 | 
39 |   /**
40 |    * This function returns all messages for a given discussion
41 |    * @param discussionId
42 |    * @returns the messages
43 |    */
44 |   getMessages(discussionId: number): Observable<discussionMessageDTO[]> {
45 |     return this.http.get<discussionMessageDTO[]>(
46 |       environment.server + `/discussion/view/messages/${discussionId}`,
47 |     );
48 |   }
49 | 
50 |   /**
51 |    * Toggles the solution status of a message and returns and sets the solution status of the discussion
52 |    * @param messageId
53 |    * @returns the new solution status as boolean
54 |    */
55 |   toggleSolution(messageId: number): Observable<boolean> {
56 |     //console.log('DiscussionViewService: toggleSolution')
57 |     return this.http
58 |       .get<boolean>(environment.server + `/discussion/view/messages/toggleSolution/${messageId}`)
59 |       .pipe(
60 |         tap((toggleStatus: boolean) => {
61 |           this.toggleStatus.next({ messageId: messageId, isSolution: toggleStatus });
62 |         }),
63 |       );
64 |   }
65 | }
```

src/app/Services/evaluation/comment-panel-state.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { BehaviorSubject, Observable } from 'rxjs';
3 | 
4 | /**
5 |  * Service to manage the expand/collapse state of comment reply panels
6 |  * 
7 |  * This service provides centralized state management for comment panel visibility,
8 |  * allowing users to expand/collapse reply sections while maintaining state across
9 |  * component re-renders and optionally persisting state in localStorage.
10 |  */
11 | @Injectable({
12 |   providedIn: 'root'
13 | })
14 | export class CommentPanelStateService {
15 |   // Map to track which comment panels are expanded/collapsed
16 |   // Key: commentId, Value: isExpanded (true = expanded, false = collapsed)
17 |   private panelStates = new BehaviorSubject<Map<string, boolean>>(new Map());
18 |   
19 |   // Observable for components to subscribe to panel state changes
20 |   public panelStates$ = this.panelStates.asObservable();
21 |   
22 |   // Local storage key for persisting panel states
23 |   private readonly STORAGE_KEY = 'hefl_comment_panel_states';
24 |   
25 |   constructor() {
26 |     this.loadFromLocalStorage();
27 |   }
28 | 
29 |   /**
30 |    * Gets the current expansion state of a comment panel
31 |    * @param commentId The ID of the comment
32 |    * @returns True if expanded, false if collapsed (default: false)
33 |    */
34 |   isPanelExpanded(commentId: string): boolean {
35 |     const currentStates = this.panelStates.value;
36 |     return currentStates.get(commentId) ?? false;
37 |   }
38 | 
39 |   /**
40 |    * Sets the expansion state of a comment panel
41 |    * @param commentId The ID of the comment
42 |    * @param isExpanded True to expand, false to collapse
43 |    */
44 |   setPanelState(commentId: string, isExpanded: boolean): void {
45 |     const currentStates = new Map(this.panelStates.value);
46 |     currentStates.set(commentId, isExpanded);
47 |     
48 |     this.panelStates.next(currentStates);
49 |     this.saveToLocalStorage();
50 |   }
51 | 
52 |   /**
53 |    * Toggles the expansion state of a comment panel
54 |    * @param commentId The ID of the comment
55 |    * @returns The new expansion state
56 |    */
57 |   togglePanelState(commentId: string): boolean {
58 |     const currentState = this.isPanelExpanded(commentId);
59 |     const newState = !currentState;
60 |     
61 |     this.setPanelState(commentId, newState);
62 |     return newState;
63 |   }
64 | 
65 |   /**
66 |    * Expands all comment panels
67 |    */
68 |   expandAllPanels(commentIds: string[]): void {
69 |     const currentStates = new Map(this.panelStates.value);
70 |     
71 |     commentIds.forEach(commentId => {
72 |       currentStates.set(commentId, true);
73 |     });
74 |     
75 |     this.panelStates.next(currentStates);
76 |     this.saveToLocalStorage();
77 |   }
78 | 
79 |   /**
80 |    * Collapses all comment panels
81 |    */
82 |   collapseAllPanels(commentIds: string[]): void {
83 |     const currentStates = new Map(this.panelStates.value);
84 |     
85 |     commentIds.forEach(commentId => {
86 |       currentStates.set(commentId, false);
87 |     });
88 |     
89 |     this.panelStates.next(currentStates);
90 |     this.saveToLocalStorage();
91 |   }
92 | 
93 |   /**
94 |    * Gets an observable for a specific comment panel state
95 |    * @param commentId The ID of the comment
96 |    * @returns Observable<boolean> that emits true when expanded, false when collapsed
97 |    */
98 |   getPanelState(commentId: string): Observable<boolean> {
99 |     return new Observable(subscriber => {
100 |       // Subscribe to panel states and emit only changes for this specific comment
101 |       const subscription = this.panelStates$.subscribe(statesMap => {
102 |         const isExpanded = statesMap.get(commentId) ?? false;
103 |         subscriber.next(isExpanded);
104 |       });
105 | 
106 |       // Return cleanup function
107 |       return () => subscription.unsubscribe();
108 |     });
109 |   }
110 | 
111 |   /**
112 |    * Clears all panel states (useful for cleanup or reset)
113 |    */
114 |   clearAllStates(): void {
115 |     this.panelStates.next(new Map());
116 |     this.clearLocalStorage();
117 |   }
118 | 
119 |   /**
120 |    * Gets the count of currently expanded panels
121 |    * @returns Number of expanded panels
122 |    */
123 |   getExpandedPanelCount(): number {
124 |     const currentStates = this.panelStates.value;
125 |     let count = 0;
126 |     
127 |     currentStates.forEach(isExpanded => {
128 |       if (isExpanded) count++;
129 |     });
130 |     
131 |     return count;
132 |   }
133 | 
134 |   /**
135 |    * Checks if any panels are currently expanded
136 |    * @returns True if at least one panel is expanded
137 |    */
138 |   hasExpandedPanels(): boolean {
139 |     return this.getExpandedPanelCount() > 0;
140 |   }
141 | 
142 |   // =============================================================================
143 |   // PRIVATE METHODS - LOCAL STORAGE PERSISTENCE
144 |   // =============================================================================
145 | 
146 |   /**
147 |    * Loads panel states from localStorage
148 |    */
149 |   private loadFromLocalStorage(): void {
150 |     try {
151 |       const stored = localStorage.getItem(this.STORAGE_KEY);
152 |       if (stored) {
153 |         const stateObject = JSON.parse(stored);
154 |         // Convert object back to Map
155 |         const stateMap = new Map<string, boolean>(Object.entries(stateObject));
156 |         this.panelStates.next(stateMap);
157 |         
158 |         console.log('📂 Loaded comment panel states from localStorage:', stateMap.size, 'states');
159 |       }
160 |     } catch (error) {
161 |       console.warn('⚠️ Failed to load comment panel states from localStorage:', error);
162 |       // Continue with empty state if localStorage fails
163 |     }
164 |   }
165 | 
166 |   /**
167 |    * Saves current panel states to localStorage
168 |    */
169 |   private saveToLocalStorage(): void {
170 |     try {
171 |       const currentStates = this.panelStates.value;
172 |       // Convert Map to object for JSON serialization
173 |       const stateObject = Object.fromEntries(currentStates);
174 |       localStorage.setItem(this.STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(stateObject));
175 |       
176 |       console.log('💾 Saved comment panel states to localStorage:', currentStates.size, 'states');
177 |     } catch (error) {
178 |       console.warn('⚠️ Failed to save comment panel states to localStorage:', error);
179 |       // Continue without persistence if localStorage fails
180 |     }
181 |   }
182 | 
183 |   /**
184 |    * Clears panel states from localStorage
185 |    */
186 |   private clearLocalStorage(): void {
187 |     try {
188 |       localStorage.removeItem(this.STORAGE_KEY);
189 |       console.log('🗑️ Cleared comment panel states from localStorage');
190 |     } catch (error) {
191 |       console.warn('⚠️ Failed to clear comment panel states from localStorage:', error);
192 |     }
193 |   }
194 | }
```

src/app/Services/evaluation/evaluation-discussion.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
3 | import { Observable, BehaviorSubject } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { map, tap, switchMap } from 'rxjs/operators';
5 | import { environment } from '../../../environments/environment';
6 | // Import all evaluation DTOs
7 | import {
8 |   EvaluationSubmissionDTO,
9 |   EvaluationCategoryDTO,
10 |   EvaluationDiscussionDTO,
11 |   EvaluationCommentDTO,
12 |   CreateEvaluationCommentDTO,
13 |   CreateEvaluationRatingDTO,
14 |   VoteType,
15 |   VoteResultDTO,
16 |   CommentStatsDTO,
17 |   AnonymousEvaluationUserDTO,
18 |   EvaluationRatingDTO,
19 |   RatingStatsDTO,
20 |   PhaseSwitchRequestDTO,
21 |   PhaseSwitchResponseDTO,
22 |   UserVoteResponseDTO
23 | } from '@DTOs/index';
24 | 
25 | @Injectable({
26 |   providedIn: 'root'
27 | })
28 | export class EvaluationDiscussionService {
29 |   private readonly apiUrls = {
30 |     submissions: `${environment.server}/evaluation-submissions`,
31 |     comments: `${environment.server}/evaluation-comments`,
32 |     ratings: `${environment.server}/evaluation-ratings`,
33 |     sessions: `${environment.server}/evaluation-sessions`
34 |   };
35 | 
36 |   // State subjects for real-time updates
37 |   private commentsSubject = new BehaviorSubject<EvaluationCommentDTO[]>([]);
38 |   private ratingsSubject = new BehaviorSubject<EvaluationRatingDTO[]>([]);
39 | 
40 |   constructor(private http: HttpClient) {
41 |     // Using real backend APIs - no mock data initialization needed
42 |   }
43 | 
44 |   // =============================================================================
45 |   // CORE API METHODS
46 |   // =============================================================================
47 | 
48 |   getSubmission(submissionId: string): Observable<EvaluationSubmissionDTO> {
49 |     return this.http.get<EvaluationSubmissionDTO>(`${this.apiUrls.submissions}/${submissionId}`);
50 |   }
51 | 
52 |   /**
53 |    * Gets evaluation categories from the sessions endpoint
54 |    * Requires sessionId - gets it from current submission
55 |    */
56 |   getCategories(sessionId?: number): Observable<EvaluationCategoryDTO[]> {
57 |     if (sessionId) {
58 |       return this.http.get<EvaluationCategoryDTO[]>(`${this.apiUrls.sessions}/${sessionId}/categories`);
59 |     }
60 | 
61 |     // If no sessionId provided, throw error - calling code should provide it
62 |     throw new Error('SessionId required for categories endpoint');
63 |   }
64 | 
65 |   getDiscussionsByCategory(
66 |     submissionId: string,
67 |     categoryId: string
68 |   ): Observable<EvaluationDiscussionDTO[]> {
69 |     console.log('🔍 getDiscussionsByCategory service call', submissionId, categoryId);
70 |     // Phase 2.1: Transform EvaluationCommentDTO[] response to EvaluationDiscussionDTO[]
71 |     return this.http.get<EvaluationCommentDTO[]>(
72 |       `${this.apiUrls.comments}?submissionId=${submissionId}&categoryId=${categoryId}`
73 |     ).pipe(
74 |       map(comments => {
75 |         // Backend returns comments directly, but frontend expects discussion containers
76 |         console.log('🔄 Transforming', comments.length, 'comments to discussion format');
77 | 
78 |         if (comments.length === 0) {
79 |           return [];
80 |         }
81 | 
82 |         // Create a single discussion container for this category
83 |         const discussion: EvaluationDiscussionDTO = {
84 |           id: `discussion-${submissionId}-${categoryId}`,
85 |           submissionId,
86 |           categoryId: parseInt(categoryId),
87 |           comments: comments,
88 |           createdAt: new Date(),
89 |           totalComments: comments.length,
90 |           availableComments: 3, // System default
91 |           usedComments: comments.length
92 |         };
93 | 
94 |         console.log('✅ Discussion created with', discussion.totalComments, 'comments');
95 |         return [discussion];
96 |       })
97 |     );
98 |   }
99 | 
100 |   createComment(comment: CreateEvaluationCommentDTO): Observable<EvaluationCommentDTO> {
101 |     console.log('createComment in frontend:', comment);
102 |     return this.http.post<EvaluationCommentDTO>(`${this.apiUrls.comments}`, comment).pipe(
103 |       tap(newComment => {
104 |         // Update local state for real-time updates
105 |         this.commentsSubject.next([...this.commentsSubject.value, newComment]);
106 |       })
107 |     );
108 |   }
109 | 
110 |   /**
111 |    * Votes on a comment
112 |    * Corrected parameter name to match backend expectation
113 |    */
114 |   voteComment(commentId: string, voteType: VoteType): Observable<VoteResultDTO> {
115 |     return this.http.post<VoteResultDTO>(`${this.apiUrls.comments}/${commentId}/vote`, { voteType });
116 |   }
117 | 
118 |   /**
119 |    * Gets the current user's vote status for a specific comment
120 |    * @param commentId - The comment ID
121 |    * @returns Observable<VoteType | null> - The user's vote or null
122 |    */
123 |   getUserVoteForComment(commentId: string): Observable<VoteType | null> {
124 |     return this.http.get<UserVoteResponseDTO>(`${this.apiUrls.comments}/${commentId}/user-vote`)
125 |       .pipe(
126 |         map(response => response.voteType)
127 |       );
128 |   }
129 | 
130 |   /**
131 |    * Gets comprehensive comment statistics for a submission
132 |    * Includes per-category limits and usage tracking
133 |    */
134 |   getCommentStats(submissionId: string): Observable<CommentStatsDTO> {
135 |     return this.http.get<CommentStatsDTO>(`${this.apiUrls.submissions}/${submissionId}/comment-stats`);
136 |   }
137 | 
138 |   // =============================================================================
139 |   // ANONYMOUS USER MANAGEMENT
140 |   // =============================================================================
141 | 
142 |   /**
143 |    * Gets anonymous user for a submission
144 |    * Corrected to match backend implementation (GET instead of POST)
145 |    */
146 |   getOrCreateAnonymousUser(submissionId: string): Observable<AnonymousEvaluationUserDTO> {
147 |     return this.http.get<AnonymousEvaluationUserDTO>(`${this.apiUrls.submissions}/${submissionId}/anonymous-user`);
148 |   }
149 | 
150 |   // =============================================================================
151 |   // RATING SYSTEM
152 |   // =============================================================================
153 | 
154 |   createRating(rating: CreateEvaluationRatingDTO): Observable<EvaluationRatingDTO> {
155 |     return this.http.post<EvaluationRatingDTO>(`${this.apiUrls.ratings}`, rating).pipe(
156 |       tap(newRating => {
157 |         // Update local state for real-time updates
158 |         const currentRatings = this.ratingsSubject.value;
159 |         // Remove existing rating for this user/category
160 |         const filteredRatings = currentRatings.filter(
161 |           r => !(r.userId === newRating.userId && r.categoryId === newRating.categoryId && r.submissionId === newRating.submissionId)
162 |         );
163 |         this.ratingsSubject.next([...filteredRatings, newRating]);
164 |       })
165 |     );
166 |   }
167 | 
168 |   /**
169 |    * Gets rating statistics for a specific category
170 |    * Corrected URL path to match backend implementation
171 |    */
172 |   getRatingStats(submissionId: string, categoryId: string): Observable<RatingStatsDTO> {
173 |     return this.http.get<RatingStatsDTO>(`${this.apiUrls.ratings}/submission/${submissionId}/category/${categoryId}/stats`);
174 |   }
175 | 
176 |   // =============================================================================
177 |   // PHASE MANAGEMENT
178 |   // =============================================================================
179 | 
180 |   /**
181 |    * Switches evaluation phase using session-based approach
182 |    * Gets sessionId from submission first, then switches phase
183 |    */
184 |   switchPhase(request: PhaseSwitchRequestDTO): Observable<PhaseSwitchResponseDTO> {
185 |     // First get the submission to extract sessionId
186 |     return this.getSubmission(request.submissionId).pipe(
187 |       switchMap(submission => {
188 |         // Now call phase switch with the sessionId
189 |         return this.http.post<PhaseSwitchResponseDTO>(`${this.apiUrls.sessions}/${submission.sessionId}/switch-phase`, {
190 |           phase: request.targetPhase
191 |         });
192 |       })
193 |     );
194 |   }
195 | 
196 |   /**
197 |    * Alternative submission-based phase switching (more efficient)
198 |    * Directly switches phase using submission ID without additional API call
199 |    */
200 |   switchPhaseBySubmission(request: PhaseSwitchRequestDTO): Observable<any> {
201 |     return this.http.post(`${this.apiUrls.submissions}/${request.submissionId}/switch-phase`, {
202 |       targetPhase: request.targetPhase,
203 |       reason: request.reason
204 |     });
205 |   }
206 | 
207 |   // =============================================================================
208 |   // REAL-TIME UPDATES SIMULATION
209 |   // =============================================================================
210 | 
211 |   subscribeToDiscussionUpdates(submissionId: string): Observable<any> {
212 |     // Real-time updates will be handled by WebSocket/Socket.IO integration
213 |     return this.commentsSubject.asObservable().pipe(
214 |       map(comments => ({
215 |         type: 'comment-added',
216 |         submissionId,
217 |         comments: comments.filter(c => c.submissionId === submissionId)
218 |       }))
219 |     );
220 |   }
221 | 
222 |   // =============================================================================
223 |   // PRIVATE HELPER METHODS
224 |   // =============================================================================
225 | 
226 |   // All mock methods removed - using real backend APIs
227 | }
```

src/app/Services/evaluation/evaluation-mock-data.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Observable, BehaviorSubject, of } from 'rxjs';
3 | import { map } from 'rxjs/operators';
4 | 
5 | import {
6 |   EvaluationSubmissionDTO,
7 |   EvaluationCategoryDTO,
8 |   EvaluationDiscussionDTO,
9 |   EvaluationCommentDTO,
10 |   EvaluationRatingDTO,
11 |   CommentStatsDTO,
12 |   CategoryStatsDTO,
13 |   AnonymousEvaluationUserDTO,
14 |   RatingStatsDTO,
15 |   VoteResultDTO,
16 |   VoteUpdateData,
17 |   EvaluationPhase,
18 |   EvaluationStatus,
19 |   VoteType,
20 |   EVALUATION_CATEGORIES,
21 |   AuthorDTO
22 | } from '@DTOs/index';
23 | 
24 | @Injectable({
25 |   providedIn: 'root'
26 | })
27 | export class EvaluationMockDataService {
28 | 
29 |   // Local state for interactive demo
30 |   private mockSubmissionSubject = new BehaviorSubject<EvaluationSubmissionDTO>(this.createMockSubmission());
31 |   private mockCommentsSubject = new BehaviorSubject<Map<number, EvaluationCommentDTO[]>>(this.createMockCommentsMap());
32 |   private mockVoteLimitsSubject = new BehaviorSubject<Map<number, {plusVotes: number, minusVotes: number}>>(this.createMockVoteLimits());
33 |   private mockRatingsSubject = new BehaviorSubject<EvaluationRatingDTO[]>(this.createMockRatings());
34 | 
35 |   private nextCommentId = 20; // Start counter for new comments
36 |   private nextVoteId = 50; // Start counter for new votes
37 | 
38 |   constructor() {}
39 | 
40 |   // =============================================================================
41 |   // CORE DATA GETTERS
42 |   // =============================================================================
43 | 
44 |   getMockSubmission(): Observable<EvaluationSubmissionDTO> {
45 |     return this.mockSubmissionSubject.asObservable();
46 |   }
47 | 
48 |   getMockCategories(): EvaluationCategoryDTO[] {
49 |     return [
50 |       EVALUATION_CATEGORIES.VOLLSTAENDIGKEIT,
51 |       EVALUATION_CATEGORIES.GRAFISCHE_DARSTELLUNG,
52 |       EVALUATION_CATEGORIES.VERGLEICHBARKEIT,
53 |       EVALUATION_CATEGORIES.KOMPLEXITAET
54 |     ];
55 |   }
56 | 
57 |   getMockDiscussions(categoryId: number): Observable<EvaluationDiscussionDTO[]> {
58 |     return this.mockCommentsSubject.pipe(
59 |       map(commentsMap => {
60 |         const comments = commentsMap.get(categoryId) || [];
61 |         return [{
62 |           id: `discussion-${categoryId}-001`,
63 |           submissionId: "demo-submission-001",
64 |           categoryId: categoryId,
65 |           comments: comments,
66 |           createdAt: new Date('2024-01-15T10:00:00Z'),
67 |           totalComments: comments.length,
68 |           availableComments: 3,
69 |           usedComments: Math.min(comments.length, 3)
70 |         }];
71 |       })
72 |     );
73 |   }
74 | 
75 |   getMockAnonymousUser(): AnonymousEvaluationUserDTO {
76 |     return {
77 |       id: 999, // Changed from string to number to match DTO
78 |       userId: 999,
79 |       submissionId: "demo-submission-001",
80 |       displayName: "Sie (Demo-Modus)",
81 |       colorCode: "#4CAF50",
82 |       createdAt: new Date('2024-01-15T10:00:00Z')
83 |     };
84 |   }
85 | 
86 |   getMockCommentStats(): Observable<CommentStatsDTO> {
87 |     return this.mockCommentsSubject.pipe(
88 |       map(commentsMap => {
89 |         const categories = this.getMockCategories();
90 |         const categoryStats: CategoryStatsDTO[] = categories.map(cat => {
91 |           const comments = commentsMap.get(cat.id) || [];
92 |           const usedComments = Math.min(comments.length, 3);
93 |           const availableComments = 3 - usedComments;
94 | 
95 |           return {
96 |             categoryId: cat.id,
97 |             categoryName: cat.displayName,
98 |             availableComments: availableComments,
99 |             usedComments: usedComments,
100 |             isLimitReached: availableComments === 0,
101 |             lastCommentAt: comments.length > 0 ? comments[0].createdAt : undefined,
102 |             indicatorColor: availableComments > 1 ? 'success' : availableComments === 1 ? 'warn' : 'error',
103 |             availabilityText: `${availableComments}/3 verfügbar`,
104 |             availabilityIcon: availableComments > 0 ? 'add' : 'block'
105 |           };
106 |         });
107 | 
108 |         const totalUsed = categoryStats.reduce((sum, cat) => sum + cat.usedComments, 0);
109 |         const totalAvailable = categoryStats.reduce((sum, cat) => sum + cat.availableComments, 0);
110 | 
111 |         return {
112 |           submissionId: "demo-submission-001",
113 |           totalAvailable: totalAvailable,
114 |           totalUsed: totalUsed,
115 |           categories: categoryStats,
116 |           overallProgress: Math.round((totalUsed / (totalUsed + totalAvailable)) * 100),
117 |           averageUsage: totalUsed / categories.length,
118 |           userLimits: {
119 |             userId: 999,
120 |             totalLimit: 12,
121 |             totalUsed: totalUsed,
122 |             canComment: totalUsed < 12
123 |           }
124 |         };
125 |       })
126 |     );
127 |   }
128 | 
129 |   getMockVoteLimits(): Observable<Map<number, {plusVotes: number, minusVotes: number}>> {
130 |     return this.mockVoteLimitsSubject.asObservable();
131 |   }
132 | 
133 |   getMockRatingStats(categoryId: number): Observable<RatingStatsDTO> {
134 |     return this.mockRatingsSubject.pipe(
135 |       map(ratings => {
136 |         const categoryRatings = ratings.filter(r => r.categoryId === categoryId);
137 |         const scores = categoryRatings.map(r => r.score);
138 |         const averageScore = scores.length > 0 ? scores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / scores.length : 0;
139 | 
140 |         // Create score distribution
141 |         const scoreDistribution = [];
142 |         for (let score = 0; score <= 10; score++) {
143 |           const count = categoryRatings.filter(r => r.score === score).length;
144 |           if (count > 0) {
145 |             scoreDistribution.push({ score, count });
146 |           }
147 |         }
148 | 
149 |         const userRating = categoryRatings.find(r => r.userId === 999);
150 | 
151 |         return {
152 |           submissionId: "demo-submission-001",
153 |           categoryId: categoryId,
154 |           averageScore: Math.round(averageScore * 10) / 10,
155 |           totalRatings: categoryRatings.length,
156 |           scoreDistribution: scoreDistribution,
157 |           userRating: userRating?.score,
158 |           userHasRated: !!userRating
159 |         };
160 |       })
161 |     );
162 |   }
163 | 
164 |   // =============================================================================
165 |   // INTERACTIVE DEMO METHODS
166 |   // =============================================================================
167 | 
168 |   addMockComment(categoryId: number, content: string): Observable<EvaluationCommentDTO> {
169 |     const newComment: EvaluationCommentDTO = {
170 |       id: `comment-${this.nextCommentId++}`,
171 |       submissionId: "demo-submission-001",
172 |       categoryId: categoryId,
173 |       authorId: 999,
174 |       content: content.trim(),
175 |       createdAt: new Date(),
176 |       updatedAt: new Date(),
177 | 
178 |       author: {
179 |         id: "999",
180 |         type: "anonymous",
181 |         displayName: "Sie (Demo-Modus)",
182 |         colorCode: "#4CAF50"
183 |       },
184 | 
185 |       votes: [],
186 |       voteStats: {
187 |         upVotes: 0,
188 |         downVotes: 0,
189 |         totalVotes: 0,
190 |         score: 0
191 |       },
192 | 
193 |       replies: [],
194 |       replyCount: 0
195 |     };
196 | 
197 |     // Update local state
198 |     const currentComments = new Map(this.mockCommentsSubject.value);
199 |     const categoryComments = currentComments.get(categoryId) || [];
200 |     categoryComments.unshift(newComment); // Add to beginning
201 |     currentComments.set(categoryId, categoryComments);
202 |     this.mockCommentsSubject.next(currentComments);
203 | 
204 |     return of(newComment);
205 |   }
206 | 
207 |   voteMockComment(commentId: string, voteType: VoteType, categoryId: number): Observable<VoteResultDTO> {
208 |     const currentComments = new Map(this.mockCommentsSubject.value);
209 |     const categoryComments = currentComments.get(categoryId) || [];
210 | 
211 |     const commentIndex = categoryComments.findIndex(c => c.id === commentId);
212 |     if (commentIndex === -1) {
213 |       throw new Error('Comment not found');
214 |     }
215 | 
216 |     const comment = categoryComments[commentIndex];
217 | 
218 |     // Simulate vote logic
219 |     let upvotes = comment.voteStats.upVotes;
220 |     let downvotes = comment.voteStats.downVotes;
221 |     let userVote: VoteType = null;
222 | 
223 |     // Check current user vote (simulate)
224 |     const existingUserVote = comment.votes.find(v => v.userId === 999);
225 | 
226 |     if (voteType === 'UP') {
227 |       if (existingUserVote?.voteType === 'UP') {
228 |         // Remove upvote
229 |         upvotes--;
230 |         userVote = null;
231 |       } else {
232 |         if (existingUserVote?.voteType === 'DOWN') {
233 |           downvotes--;
234 |         }
235 |         upvotes++;
236 |         userVote = 'UP';
237 |       }
238 |     } else if (voteType === 'DOWN') {
239 |       if (existingUserVote?.voteType === 'DOWN') {
240 |         // Remove downvote
241 |         downvotes--;
242 |         userVote = null;
243 |       } else {
244 |         if (existingUserVote?.voteType === 'UP') {
245 |           upvotes--;
246 |         }
247 |         downvotes++;
248 |         userVote = 'DOWN';
249 |       }
250 |     }
251 | 
252 |     // Update comment
253 |     comment.voteStats = {
254 |       upVotes: upvotes,
255 |       downVotes: downvotes,
256 |       totalVotes: upvotes + downvotes,
257 |       score: upvotes - downvotes
258 |     };
259 | 
260 |     // Update votes array
261 |     if (existingUserVote) {
262 |       const voteIndex = comment.votes.findIndex(v => v.userId === 999);
263 |       if (userVote === null) {
264 |         comment.votes.splice(voteIndex, 1);
265 |       } else {
266 |         comment.votes[voteIndex].voteType = userVote;
267 |       }
268 |     } else if (userVote !== null) {
269 |       comment.votes.push({
270 |         id: `vote-${this.nextVoteId++}`,
271 |         commentId: commentId,
272 |         userId: 999,
273 |         voteType: userVote,
274 |         createdAt: new Date()
275 |       });
276 |     }
277 | 
278 |     // Update state
279 |     categoryComments[commentIndex] = comment;
280 |     currentComments.set(categoryId, categoryComments);
281 |     this.mockCommentsSubject.next(currentComments);
282 | 
283 |     // Update vote limits
284 |     this.updateVoteLimits(categoryId, voteType, userVote !== null);
285 | 
286 |     return of({
287 |       commentId: commentId,
288 |       upvotes: upvotes,
289 |       downvotes: downvotes,
290 |       voteStats: {
291 |         upVotes: upvotes,
292 |         downVotes: downvotes,
293 |         totalVotes: upvotes + downvotes,
294 |         score: upvotes - downvotes,
295 |       },
296 |       userVote: userVote,
297 |       netVotes: upvotes - downvotes
298 |     });
299 |   }
300 | 
301 |   rateMockCategory(categoryId: number, score: number): Observable<EvaluationRatingDTO> {
302 |     const newRating: EvaluationRatingDTO = {
303 |       id: `rating-${categoryId}-999`,
304 |       submissionId: "demo-submission-001",
305 |       userId: 999,
306 |       categoryId: categoryId,
307 |       score: score,
308 |       createdAt: new Date(),
309 |       updatedAt: new Date()
310 |     };
311 | 
312 |     // Update local ratings
313 |     const currentRatings = this.mockRatingsSubject.value;
314 |     const filteredRatings = currentRatings.filter(r => !(r.categoryId === categoryId && r.userId === 999));
315 |     this.mockRatingsSubject.next([...filteredRatings, newRating]);
316 | 
317 |     return of(newRating);
318 |   }
319 | 
320 |   switchMockPhase(targetPhase: EvaluationPhase): Observable<any> {

src/app/Services/evaluation/evaluation-state.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { BehaviorSubject, Observable, combineLatest, forkJoin, of, timer, retry } from 'rxjs';
3 | import {
4 |   map,
5 |   distinctUntilChanged,
6 |   shareReplay,
7 |   switchMap,
8 |   catchError,
9 |   finalize,
10 |   take,
11 |   tap,
12 | } from 'rxjs/operators';
13 | 
14 | import {
15 |   EvaluationSubmissionDTO,
16 |   EvaluationCategoryDTO,
17 |   EvaluationDiscussionDTO,
18 |   EvaluationCommentDTO,
19 |   CreateEvaluationCommentDTO,
20 |   CreateEvaluationRatingDTO,
21 |   CommentStatsDTO,
22 |   AnonymousEvaluationUserDTO,
23 |   EvaluationPhase,
24 |   VoteUpdateData,
25 |   EvaluationRatingDTO,
26 |   RatingStatsDTO,
27 |   VoteResultDTO,
28 |   VoteType,
29 | } from '@DTOs/index';
30 | 
31 | import { EvaluationDiscussionService } from './evaluation-discussion.service';
32 | import { EvaluationMockDataService } from './evaluation-mock-data.service';
33 | 
34 | @Injectable({
35 |   providedIn: 'root',
36 | })
37 | export class EvaluationStateService {
38 |   // Core state subjects
39 |   private submissionSubject = new BehaviorSubject<EvaluationSubmissionDTO | null>(null);
40 |   private categoriesSubject = new BehaviorSubject<EvaluationCategoryDTO[]>([]);
41 |   private activeCategorySubject = new BehaviorSubject<number | null>(null);
42 |   private commentStatsSubject = new BehaviorSubject<CommentStatsDTO | null>(null);
43 |   private anonymousUserSubject = new BehaviorSubject<AnonymousEvaluationUserDTO | null>(null);
44 | 
45 |   // Discussion state by category (caching)
46 |   private discussionCache = new Map<number, BehaviorSubject<EvaluationDiscussionDTO[]>>();
47 | 
48 |   // Rating state
49 |   private ratingsSubject = new BehaviorSubject<EvaluationRatingDTO[]>([]);
50 |   private ratingStatsCache = new Map<number, BehaviorSubject<RatingStatsDTO>>();
51 | 
52 |   private commentIdToCategoryIdMap = new Map<string, number>();
53 | 
54 |   // UI state
55 |   private loadingSubject = new BehaviorSubject<boolean>(false);
56 |   private errorSubject = new BehaviorSubject<string | null>(null);
57 | 
58 |   // Race condition prevention
59 |   private commentCreationInProgress = new Set<string>(); // Track ongoing comment creations by category
60 |   private categoryLoadingStates = new Map<number, boolean>(); // Track loading state per category
61 | 
62 |   // Vote limits tracking (per category)
63 |   private voteLimitsSubject = new BehaviorSubject<
64 |     Map<number, { plusVotes: number; minusVotes: number }>
65 |   >(new Map());
66 | 
67 |   // Mock mode state
68 |   private isMockModeActive = false;
69 | 
70 |   constructor(
71 |     private evaluationService: EvaluationDiscussionService,
72 |     private mockDataService: EvaluationMockDataService,
73 |   ) {
74 |     // Warte auf das Laden der Kategorien und setze die erste verfügbare als aktiv
75 |     this.categories$.subscribe(categories => {
76 |       if (categories.length > 0 && this.activeCategorySubject.value === null) {
77 |         // Setze die erste Kategorie als Standard-aktive Kategorie
78 |         const firstCategory = categories[0];
79 |         console.log(
80 |           '🎯 Automatische Auswahl der ersten Kategorie:',
81 |           firstCategory.id,
82 |           firstCategory.displayName,
83 |         );
84 |         this.activeCategorySubject.next(firstCategory.id);
85 |       }
86 |     });
87 |   }
88 | 
89 |   // =============================================================================
90 |   // MOCK MODE MANAGEMENT
91 |   // =============================================================================
92 | 
93 |   /**
94 |    * Loads mock data for demonstration purposes
95 |    */
96 |   loadMockData(): void {
97 |     this.isMockModeActive = true;
98 |     this.setLoading(true);
99 |     this.clearError();
100 | 
101 |     // Load mock submission
102 |     this.mockDataService.getMockSubmission().subscribe(submission => {
103 |       this.submissionSubject.next(submission);
104 | 
105 |       // Load related mock data
106 |       const categories = this.mockDataService.getMockCategories();
107 |       this.categoriesSubject.next(categories);
108 |       this.initializeVoteLimits(categories);
109 | 
110 |       // Load mock comment stats
111 |       this.mockDataService.getMockCommentStats().subscribe(stats => {
112 |         this.commentStatsSubject.next(stats);
113 |       });
114 | 
115 |       // Load mock anonymous user
116 |       const anonymousUser = this.mockDataService.getMockAnonymousUser();
117 |       this.anonymousUserSubject.next(anonymousUser);
118 | 
119 |       // Load mock vote limits
120 |       this.mockDataService.getMockVoteLimits().subscribe(limits => {
121 |         this.voteLimitsSubject.next(limits);
122 |       });
123 | 
124 |       this.setLoading(false);
125 |     });
126 |   }
127 | 
128 |   /**
129 |    * Checks if the service is currently in mock mode
130 |    */
131 |   isMockMode(): boolean {
132 |     return this.isMockModeActive;
133 |   }
134 | 
135 |   // =============================================================================
136 |   // PUBLIC OBSERVABLES
137 |   // =============================================================================
138 | 
139 |   get submission$(): Observable<EvaluationSubmissionDTO | null> {
140 |     return this.submissionSubject.asObservable();
141 |   }
142 | 
143 |   get categories$(): Observable<EvaluationCategoryDTO[]> {
144 |     return this.categoriesSubject.asObservable();
145 |   }
146 | 
147 |   /**
148 |    * Observable for the currently active category ID
149 |    * @returns Observable<number> The active category ID
150 |    */
151 |   get activeCategory$(): Observable<number> {
152 |     return this.activeCategorySubject.asObservable().pipe(
153 |       map(categoryId => {
154 |         // Fallback: Falls keine Kategorie gesetzt ist, nutze die erste verfügbare
155 |         if (categoryId === null) {
156 |           const categories = this.categoriesSubject.value;
157 |           return categories.length > 0 ? categories[0].id : 1; // 1 als letzter Fallback
158 |         }
159 |         return categoryId;
160 |       }),
161 |       distinctUntilChanged(),
162 |     );
163 |   }
164 | 
165 |   get commentStats$(): Observable<CommentStatsDTO | null> {
166 |     return this.commentStatsSubject.asObservable();
167 |   }
168 | 
169 |   get anonymousUser$(): Observable<AnonymousEvaluationUserDTO | null> {
170 |     return this.anonymousUserSubject.asObservable();
171 |   }
172 | 
173 |   get loading$(): Observable<boolean> {
174 |     return this.loadingSubject.asObservable();
175 |   }
176 | 
177 |   get error$(): Observable<string | null> {
178 |     return this.errorSubject.asObservable();
179 |   }
180 | 
181 |   get voteLimits$(): Observable<Map<number, { plusVotes: number; minusVotes: number }>> {
182 |     return this.voteLimitsSubject.asObservable();
183 |   }
184 | 
185 |   // =============================================================================
186 |   // SUBMISSION MANAGEMENT
187 |   // =============================================================================
188 | 
189 |   loadSubmission(submissionId: string): void {
190 |     console.log('🎯 loadSubmission called with:', submissionId);
191 |     this.setLoading(true);
192 |     this.clearError();
193 | 
194 |     this.evaluationService.getSubmission(submissionId).subscribe({
195 |       next: submission => {
196 |         console.log('✅ Submission loaded:', submission);
197 |         this.submissionSubject.next(submission);
198 | 
199 |         // Prepare parallel operations array
200 |         const parallelOps: Observable<any>[] = [
201 |           this.evaluationService.getCommentStats(submissionId).pipe(
202 |             catchError(error => {
203 |               console.warn('⚠️ CommentStats loading failed:', error);
204 |               return of(null); // Continue with null if stats fail
205 |             }),
206 |           ),
207 |           this.evaluationService.getOrCreateAnonymousUser(submissionId).pipe(
208 |             tap(anonymousUser => {
209 |               console.log('🎭 Anonymous user loaded:', {
210 |                 submissionId,
211 |                 anonymousUser,
212 |                 id: anonymousUser?.id,
213 |                 idType: typeof anonymousUser?.id,
214 |                 displayName: anonymousUser?.displayName,
215 |               });
216 |             }),
217 |             catchError(error => {
218 |               console.error('⚠️ AnonymousUser loading failed:', error);
219 |               return of(null); // Continue with null if user fails
220 |             }),
221 |           ),
222 |         ];
223 | 
224 |         // Add categories loading if sessionId is available
225 |         if (submission.sessionId) {
226 |           console.log('📡 Adding categories loading for sessionId:', submission.sessionId);
227 |           parallelOps.push(
228 |             this.evaluationService.getCategories(submission.sessionId).pipe(
229 |               catchError(error => {
230 |                 console.warn('⚠️ Categories loading failed:', error);
231 |                 return of([]); // Continue with empty array if categories fail
232 |               }),
233 |             ),
234 |           );
235 |         }
236 | 
237 |         // Wait for ALL parallel operations to complete
238 |         console.log('🔄 Starting parallel operations. Count:', parallelOps.length);
239 |         forkJoin(parallelOps).subscribe({
240 |           next: results => {
241 |             console.log('✅ All parallel operations completed:', results);
242 | 
243 |             const [commentStats, anonymousUser, categories] = results;
244 | 
245 |             // Update states with results
246 |             if (commentStats) {
247 |               this.commentStatsSubject.next(commentStats);
248 |             }
249 |             if (anonymousUser) {
250 |               this.anonymousUserSubject.next(anonymousUser);
251 |             }
252 |             if (categories && categories.length > 0) {
253 |               console.log('✅ Categories loaded successfully. Count:', categories.length);
254 |               this.categoriesSubject.next(categories);
255 |               this.initializeVoteLimits(categories);
256 |             }
257 | 
258 |             // ONLY NOW set loading to false - after ALL operations are complete
259 |             console.log('🎉 All data loaded successfully. Setting loading to false.');
260 |             this.setLoading(false);
261 |           },
262 |           error: error => {
263 |             console.error('❌ Parallel operations failed:', error);
264 |             this.setError('Fehler beim Laden der Zusatzdaten');
265 |             this.setLoading(false);
266 |           },
267 |         });
268 |       },
269 |       error: error => {
270 |         console.error('❌ Submission loading failed:', error);
271 |         this.setError('Fehler beim Laden der Abgabe');
272 |         this.setLoading(false);
273 |       },
274 |     });
275 |   }
276 | 
277 |   // =============================================================================
278 |   // CATEGORY MANAGEMENT
279 |   // =============================================================================
280 | 
281 |   loadCategories(sessionId?: number): void {
282 |     if (!sessionId) {
283 |       this.setError('SessionId erforderlich zum Laden der Kategorien');
284 |       return;
285 |     }
286 | 
287 |     this.evaluationService.getCategories(sessionId).subscribe({
288 |       next: categories => {
289 |         this.categoriesSubject.next(categories);
290 |         // Initialize vote limits for all categories
291 |         this.initializeVoteLimits(categories);
292 |       },
293 |       error: error => {
294 |         this.setError('Fehler beim Laden der Kategorien');
295 |       },
296 |     });
297 |   }
298 | 
299 |   /**
300 |    * Sets the active category
301 |    * @param categoryId - The ID of the category to set as active
302 |    */
303 |   setActiveCategory(categoryId: number): void {
304 |     const currentCategory = this.activeCategorySubject.value;
305 |     if (currentCategory !== categoryId) {
306 |       this.activeCategorySubject.next(categoryId);
307 |     }
308 |   }
309 | 
310 |   get activeCategoryInfo$(): Observable<EvaluationCategoryDTO | null> {
311 |     return combineLatest([this.categories$, this.activeCategory$]).pipe(
312 |       map(([categories, activeId]) => categories.find(cat => cat.id === activeId) || null),
313 |       distinctUntilChanged(),
314 |     );
315 |   }
316 | 
317 |   // =============================================================================
318 |   // DISCUSSION MANAGEMENT
[TRUNCATED]
```
