src/app/Modules/code-game/services/code-game-task-data.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { environment } from '../../../../environments/environment';
3 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
5 | import { detailedQuestionDTO } from '@DTOs/detailedQuestion.dto';
6 | import { CodeGameEvaluationDTO } from '@DTOs/codeGame.dto';
7 | import { UserAnswerDataDTO } from '@DTOs/userAnswer.dto';
8 | import { userAnswerFeedbackDTO } from '@DTOs/userAnswer.dto';
9 | 
10 | @Injectable({
11 |   providedIn: 'root',
12 | })
13 | export class CodeGameTaskDataService {
14 |   private readonly apiCodeGameURL = `${environment.server}/code-game`;
15 |   private readonly apiQuestionDataURL = `${environment.server}/question-data`;
16 | 
17 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
18 | 
19 |   getCodeGameTask(id: number): Observable<detailedQuestionDTO> {
20 |     return this.http.get<detailedQuestionDTO>(`${this.apiCodeGameURL}/${id}`);
21 |   }
22 | 
23 |   executeCodeGameTask(
24 |     questionId: number | undefined,
25 |     language: string,
26 |     mainFile: { [p: string]: string },
27 |     additionalFiles: { [p: string]: string },
28 |     gameFile: { [p: string]: string },
29 |   ): Observable<{ success: boolean; message: string; result: CodeGameEvaluationDTO }> {
30 |     const body = {
31 |       questionId: questionId,
32 |       language: language,
33 |       mainFile: mainFile,
34 |       additionalFiles: additionalFiles,
35 |       gameFile: gameFile,
36 |     };
37 | 
38 |     const response: Observable<{
39 |       success: boolean;
40 |       message: string;
41 |       result: CodeGameEvaluationDTO;
42 |     }> = this.http.post<{ success: boolean; message: string; result: CodeGameEvaluationDTO }>(
43 |       `${this.apiCodeGameURL}/execute`,
44 |       body,
45 |     );
46 |     return response;
47 |   }
48 | 
49 |   submitCodeGameUserAnswer(
50 |     questionId: number,
51 |     contentElementId: number,
52 |     language: string,
53 |     codeGameEvaluation: CodeGameEvaluationDTO,
54 |   ): any {
55 |     const body: UserAnswerDataDTO = {
56 |       id: -1,
57 |       userId: -1,
58 |       questionId: questionId,
59 |       contentElementId: contentElementId,
60 |       codeGameEvaluation: codeGameEvaluation,
61 |     };
62 | 
63 |     const response: Observable<any> = this.http.post<any>(
64 |       `${this.apiQuestionDataURL}/userAnswer/create`,
65 |       body,
66 |     );
67 |     return response;
68 |   }
69 | }
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/assignment-container/assignment-container.component.html
```
1 | <div class="form-container" *ngIf="questionData && graphQuestionData; else noQuestion">
2 |   <div class="assignment box">
3 |     <button
4 |       class="navigation-button"
5 |       (click)="navigateToDashboard()"
6 |       aria-label="Zurück zum Dashboard"
7 |     >
8 |       Zurück zum Dashboard
9 |     </button>
10 |     <h2>{{ questionData.name }}</h2>
11 |     <p>
12 |       {{ questionData.text }}
13 |     </p>
14 |   </div>
15 |   <div class="evaluation box">
16 |     <h2>Feedback</h2>
17 |     <mat-button-toggle-group
18 |       class="feedback-type-toggle-group"
19 |       name="feedback-type"
20 |       aria-label="Feedback Type"
21 |       [(ngModel)]="feedbackTypeCurrent"
22 |       (ngModelChange)="onFeedbackTypeChange()"
23 |     >
24 |       <mat-button-toggle
25 |         class="feedback-type-toggle-item"
26 |         value="algoFeedback"
27 |         [disabled]="feedbackDisabled"
28 |         >Algo-Check</mat-button-toggle
29 |       >
30 |       <mat-button-toggle
31 |         class="feedback-type-toggle-item"
32 |         value="llmFeedback"
33 |         [disabled]="feedbackDisabled"
34 |         >KI-Feedback</mat-button-toggle
35 |       >
36 |     </mat-button-toggle-group>
37 | 
38 |     <hr style="margin-top: 1em" />
39 | 
40 |     <div
41 |       *ngIf="feedbackTypeCurrent === 'llmFeedback' && feedbackState === 'LLM'"
42 |       style="
43 |         display: flex;
44 |         flex-direction: column;
45 |         justify-content: start;
46 |         align-items: center;
47 |         background-color: #ddd;
48 |         border-radius: 0.5em;
49 |         padding: 0.5em 0;
50 |       "
51 |     >
52 |       <div
53 |         style="
54 |           flex: 1;
55 |           display: flex;
56 |           justify-content: flex-start;
57 |           align-items: center;
58 |           font-size: 0.9em;
59 |         "
60 |       >
61 |         <p style="margin: 0">Wie hilfreich war das Feedback?</p>
62 |       </div>
63 |       <div class="rating" style="margin: 0; flex: 1; display: flex; justify-content: flex-start">
64 |         <button
65 |           mat-icon-button
66 |           *ngFor="let star of [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]"
67 |           (click)="sendStudentFeedback(star)"
68 |           (mouseenter)="onMouseEnter(star)"
69 |           (mouseleave)="onMouseLeave()"
70 |           class="star-button"
71 |           [ngClass]="{ 'animate-star': rating === 0 }"
72 |         >
73 |           <mat-icon
74 |             [ngClass]="{
75 |               gold: star <= hoverState || star <= rating,
76 |               grey: !(star <= hoverState || star <= rating),
77 |               'glow-effect': rating === 0,
78 |             }"
79 |           >
80 |             {{ star <= hoverState || star <= rating ? 'star' : 'star_border' }}
81 |           </mat-icon>
82 |         </button>
83 |       </div>
84 |     </div>
85 | 
86 |     <p
87 |       *ngIf="!isSending"
88 |       [innerHTML]="feedbackTypeCurrent === 'algoFeedback' ? algoFeedback : llmFeedback"
89 |     ></p>
90 |     <div
91 |       *ngIf="isSending"
92 |       class="spinner-contaier"
93 |       style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 60%"
94 |     >
95 |       <mat-progress-spinner diameter="20" mode="indeterminate"></mat-progress-spinner>
96 |     </div>
97 |   </div>
98 |   <div class="solution box">
99 |     <app-graph-structure [toolbarEnabled]="false" />
100 |   </div>
101 | 
102 |   <div class="controls box">
103 |     <button class="image-button question" type="button" (click)="openTutorialDialog()">
104 |       <!-- Tutorial Video -->
105 |       <svg
106 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
107 |         width="16"
108 |         height="16"
109 |         fill="currentColor"
110 |         class="bi bi-question-circle-fill"
111 |         viewBox="0 0 16 16"
112 |       >
113 |         <path
114 |           d="M16 8A8 8 0 1 1 0 8a8 8 0 0 1 16 0M5.496 6.033h.825c.138 0 .248-.113.266-.25.09-.656.54-1.134 1.342-1.134.686 0 1.314.343 1.314 1.168 0 .635-.374.927-.965 1.371-.673.489-1.206 1.06-1.168 1.987l.003.217a.25.25 0 0 0 .25.246h.811a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-.105c0-.718.273-.927 1.01-1.486.609-.463 1.244-.977 1.244-2.056 0-1.511-1.276-2.241-2.673-2.241-1.267 0-2.655.59-2.75 2.286a.237.237 0 0 0 .241.247m2.325 6.443c.61 0 1.029-.394 1.029-.927 0-.552-.42-.94-1.029-.94-.584 0-1.009.388-1.009.94 0 .533.425.927 1.01.927z"
115 |         />
116 |       </svg>
117 |     </button>
118 | 
119 |     <mat-button-toggle-group
120 |       class="workspace-toggle-group"
121 |       name="mode"
122 |       aria-label="mode"
123 |       [(ngModel)]="workspaceModeCurrent"
124 |       (ngModelChange)="updateWorkspace()"
125 |     >
126 |       <mat-button-toggle class="workspace-toggle-item" value="assignment" [disabled]="isSending"
127 |         >Aufgabe</mat-button-toggle
128 |       >
129 |       <mat-button-toggle class="workspace-toggle-item" value="solution" [disabled]="isSending"
130 |         >Lösung</mat-button-toggle
131 |       >
132 |     </mat-button-toggle-group>
133 | 
134 |     <mat-button-toggle-group
135 |       class="solution-step-toggle-group"
136 |       *ngIf="graphQuestionData.stepsEnabled && workspaceModeCurrent === 'solution'"
137 |       name="solution-step"
138 |       aria-label="solution-step"
139 |       [(ngModel)]="solutionStepCurrent"
140 |       (ngModelChange)="updateWorkspace()"
141 |     >
142 |       <mat-button-toggle
143 |         class="solution-step-toggle-item"
144 |         *ngFor="let step of solutionGraph; let i = index; trackBy: trackByIndex"
145 |         [value]="i"
146 |         [disabled]="isSending"
147 |       >
148 |         {{ solutionStepCurrent === i ? 'Schritt' : '' }} {{ i + 1 }}
149 |       </mat-button-toggle>
150 |     </mat-button-toggle-group>
151 | 
152 |     <button
153 |       *ngIf="!isSending && graphQuestionData.stepsEnabled && workspaceModeCurrent === 'solution'"
154 |       class="image-button primary"
155 |       type="button"
156 |       (click)="addNewSolutionStep()"
157 |     >
158 |       <!-- Neuen Schritt -->
159 |       <svg
160 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
161 |         width="16"
162 |         height="16"
163 |         fill="currentColor"
164 |         class="bi bi-plus-lg"
165 |         viewBox="0 0 16 16"
166 |       >
167 |         <path
168 |           fill-rule="evenodd"
169 |           d="M8 2a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v5h5a.5.5 0 0 1 0 1h-5v5a.5.5 0 0 1-1 0v-5h-5a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1h5v-5A.5.5 0 0 1 8 2"
170 |         />
171 |       </svg>
172 |     </button>
173 | 
174 |     <button
175 |       *ngIf="
176 |         !isSending &&
177 |         graphQuestionData.stepsEnabled &&
178 |         workspaceModeCurrent === 'solution' &&
179 |         solutionGraph.length > 1
180 |       "
181 |       class="image-button warn"
182 |       type="button"
183 |       (click)="deleteCurrentSolutionStep()"
184 |     >
185 |       <!-- Schritt löschen -->
186 |       <svg
187 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
188 |         width="16"
189 |         height="16"
190 |         fill="currentColor"
191 |         class="bi bi-trash"
192 |         viewBox="0 0 16 16"
193 |       >
194 |         <path
195 |           d="M5.5 5.5A.5.5 0 0 1 6 6v6a.5.5 0 0 1-1 0V6a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5m2.5 0a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v6a.5.5 0 0 1-1 0V6a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5m3 .5a.5.5 0 0 0-1 0v6a.5.5 0 0 0 1 0z"
196 |         />
197 |         <path
198 |           d="M14.5 3a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H13v9a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4h-.5a1 1 0 0 1-1-1V2a1 1 0 0 1 1-1H6a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h2a1 1 0 0 1 1 1h3.5a1 1 0 0 1 1 1zM4.118 4 4 4.059V13a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h6a1 1 0 0 0 1-1V4.059L11.882 4zM2.5 3h11V2h-11z"
199 |         />
200 |       </svg>
201 |     </button>
202 | 
203 |     <button
204 |       *ngIf="!isSending && workspaceModeCurrent === 'solution'"
205 |       class="warn"
206 |       type="button"
207 |       (click)="resetSolution()"
208 |     >
209 |       Zurücksetzen
210 |       <!-- Die Lösung zurücksetzen -->
211 |       <!-- <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="currentColor" class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
212 |                 <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M8 3a5 5 0 1 1-4.546 2.914.5.5 0 0 0-.908-.417A6 6 0 1 0 8 2z"/>
213 |                 <path d="M8 4.466V.534a.25.25 0 0 0-.41-.192L5.23 2.308a.25.25 0 0 0 0 .384l2.36 1.966A.25.25 0 0 0 8 4.466"/>
214 |             </svg> -->
215 |     </button>
216 | 
217 |     <button
218 |       class="primary"
219 |       *ngIf="!isSending && workspaceModeCurrent === 'solution'"
220 |       type="button"
221 |       [disabled]="isSending"
222 |       (click)="onSubmitButtonClick()"
223 |     >
224 |       Abgeben

1 | .form-container {
2 |   padding: 0.3rem;
3 |   height: 100%;
4 |   width: 100%;
5 |   display: grid;
6 |   grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
7 |   grid-template-rows: repeat(10, 1fr);
8 |   gap: 0.5rem;
9 | }
10 | 
11 | .box {
12 |   position: relative;
13 |   padding: 1em 0;
14 |   background-color: #eee;
15 |   border: 1px solid #bbb;
16 |   border-radius: 0.5rem;
17 |   box-shadow:
18 |     0 1px 1px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
19 |     0 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
20 |     0 1px 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
21 | }
22 | 
23 | .assignment {
24 |   grid-column: 1 / span 1;
25 |   grid-row: 1 / span 5;
26 | }
27 | 
28 | .evaluation {
29 |   grid-column: 1 / span 1;
30 |   grid-row: 6 / span 5;
31 | }
32 | 
33 | .assignment,
34 | .evaluation {
35 |   overflow-wrap: break-word;
36 |   overflow-y: auto;
37 |   scrollbar-gutter: stable both-edges;
38 | }
39 | 
40 | .solution {
41 |   padding: 0;
42 |   grid-column: 2 / span 4;
43 |   grid-row: 1 / span 9;
44 |   background-color: rgb(248, 242, 233);
45 |   overflow-y: auto;
46 | }
47 | 
48 | .controls {
49 |   grid-column: 2 / span 4;
50 |   grid-row: 10 / span 1;
51 | }
52 | 
53 | .controls {
54 |   height: 100%;
55 |   border: none;
56 |   background-color: transparent;
57 |   box-shadow: none;
58 |   padding: 2em;
59 |   display: flex;
60 |   justify-content: start;
61 |   align-items: center;
62 |   gap: 1em;
63 | }
64 | 
65 | .controls button {
66 |   height: 85%;
67 |   display: flex;
68 |   justify-content: center;
69 |   align-items: center;
70 |   padding: 0.8em;
71 |   color: #eee;
72 |   font-size: 1.2em;
73 |   border: none;
74 |   border-radius: 0.3em;
75 |   box-shadow:
76 |     0 1px 1px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
77 |     0 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
78 |     0 1px 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
79 | }
80 | 
81 | .controls button:hover {
82 |   cursor: pointer;
83 | }
84 | 
85 | .controls button.primary {
86 |   background-color: rgb(63, 81, 181);
87 | }
88 | 
89 | .controls button.primary:hover {
90 |   background-color: rgb(83, 101, 201);
91 | }
92 | 
93 | .controls button.warn {
94 |   background-color: rgb(244, 67, 54);
95 | }
96 | 
97 | .controls button.warn:hover {
98 |   background-color: rgb(246, 103, 92);
99 | }
100 | 
101 | .controls button.question {
102 |   background-color: #fff;
103 |   // color:#aaa;
104 |   color: rgb(63, 81, 181);
105 | }
106 | 
107 | .controls button.question:hover {
108 |   background-color: #ddd;
109 | }
110 | 
111 | .controls button:disabled {
112 |   background-color: #bbb;
113 |   cursor: not-allowed;
114 |   background-color: #d3d3d3;
115 |   color: #808080;
116 | }
117 | 
118 | mat-button-toggle-group {

121 |     0 1px 1px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
122 |     0 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
123 |     0 1px 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
124 | }
125 | 
126 | .controls {

141 | }
142 | 
143 | .mat-button-toggle-appearance-standard.mat-button-toggle-checked:hover {
144 |   background-color: rgb(83, 101, 201);
145 | }
146 |

149 |     width: 100%;
150 |     border-radius: 0.4em;
151 |     background-color: transparent;
152 |   }

166 |     color: #fff;
167 |     background-color: rgb(63, 81, 181);

173 |   width: 100%;
174 |   background-color: rgb(63, 81, 181);

176 |   font-weight: 500;

178 |   padding: 0.4em;
179 |   margin-bottom: 2em;
180 | }
181 | 
182 | .navigation-button:hover {
183 |   background-color: rgb(83, 101, 201);
184 |   cursor: pointer;
185 | }
186 |

188 |   position: relative;
189 |   border: none;
190 |   cursor: pointer;
191 |   height: 80%;
192 |   border-radius: 1em;
193 |   width: 2.2em;
194 | }

202 |   height: 60%;

209 | }

212 |   0%,
213 |   100% {
214 |     transform: translateY(0);
215 |   }
216 |   50% {
217 |     transform: translateY(-5px);
218 |   }
219 | }
220 | 
221 | .star-button {
222 |   &.animate-star {
223 |     animation: bounce 1s infinite;
224 |     .mat-icon {
225 |       font-size: 28px;
226 |       width: 28px;
227 |       height: 28px;
228 |       line-height: 28px;
229 |     }
230 |   }
231 | 
232 |   .mat-icon {
233 |     &.gold {
234 |       color: gold;
235 |     }
236 | 
237 |     &.grey {
238 |       color: grey;
239 |     }
240 | 
241 |     &.glow-effect {
242 |       filter: drop-shadow(0 0 2px #ffd700);
243 |     }
244 |   }
245 | }

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/assignment-container/assignment-container.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
4 | import { GraphStructureDTO, GraphConfigurationDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
5 | import { GraphTaskService } from '../services/graph-task.service';
6 | import { QuestionDataService } from 'src/app/Services/question/question-data.service';
7 | import { GraphQuestionDTO, QuestionDTO } from '@DTOs/question.dto';
8 | import { questionType } from '@DTOs/question.dto';
9 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
10 | import { UserAnswerDataDTO, userAnswerFeedbackDTO } from '@DTOs/userAnswer.dto';
11 | import { ProgressService } from 'src/app/Services/progress/progress.service';
12 | import { ConfirmationService } from 'src/app/Services/confirmation/confirmation.service';
13 | import { structuresAreEqual } from '../utils';
14 | import { AiFeedbackService } from '../services/ai-feedback.service';
15 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
16 | import { MatDialogConfig } from '@angular/material/dialog';
17 | import { GraphTutorialDialogComponent } from '../graph-tutorial-dialog/graph-tutorial-dialog.component';
18 | 
19 | @Component({
20 |   selector: 'app-assignment-container',
21 |   templateUrl: './assignment-container.component.html',
22 |   styleUrls: ['./assignment-container.component.scss'],
23 | })
24 | export class AssignmentContainerComponent implements OnInit {
25 |   // ### workspace/solution related
26 |   workspaceModePrevious: string = 'assignment';
27 |   workspaceModeCurrent: string = 'assignment';
28 |   solutionStepPrevious: number = 0;
29 |   solutionStepCurrent: number = 0;
30 | 
31 |   initialStructure: GraphStructureDTO = {
32 |     nodes: [],
33 |     edges: [],
34 |   };
35 | 
36 |   solutionGraph: GraphStructureDTO[] = [];
37 | 
38 |   lastSubmittedGraph: GraphStructureDTO[] | null = null;
39 | 
40 |   thisQuestionType = questionType.GRAPH;
41 | 
42 |   questionData: QuestionDTO | null = null;
43 |   graphQuestionData: GraphQuestionDTO | null = null;
44 |   // ### feedback related
45 |   feedbackState: 'INITIAL' | 'ALGO' | 'LLM' | 'FEEDBACK_RATED' = 'INITIAL';
46 |   feedbackTypeCurrent: 'algoFeedback' | 'llmFeedback' | '' = '';
47 |   llmFeedbackId: number = -1;
48 |   algoFeedback: string = '';
49 |   llmFeedback: string = '';
50 |   feedbackDisabled: boolean = true;
51 | 
52 |   rating: number = 0;
53 |   hoverState: number = 0;
54 | 
55 |   userAnswerId: number = -1;
56 | 
57 |   isSending: boolean = false;
58 | 
59 |   private conceptId!: number;
60 |   private questionId!: number;
61 | 
62 |   constructor(
63 |     private readonly route: ActivatedRoute,
64 |     private readonly router: Router,
65 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
66 |     private readonly confirmationService: ConfirmationService,
67 |     private readonly progressService: ProgressService,
68 |     private readonly graphTaskService: GraphTaskService,
69 |     private readonly aiFeedbackService: AiFeedbackService,
70 |     private readonly questionDataService: QuestionDataService,
71 |     private readonly dialog: MatDialog,
72 |   ) {
73 |     this.route.queryParamMap.subscribe(params => {
74 |       this.conceptId = Number(params.get('concept'));
75 |       this.questionId = Number(params.get('questionId'));
76 |       console.log('AssignmentContainerComponent constructor', this.questionId, this.conceptId);
77 |     });
78 |   }
79 | 
80 |   ngOnInit(): void {
81 |     // get assignment id from url
82 |     if (!this.questionId) {
83 |       this.snackBar.open('Keine Frage ID gefunden!', 'Schließen', { duration: 5000 });
84 |       return;
85 |     }
86 |     // reset the state of the graph service
87 |     this.graphTaskService.resetGraph();
88 | 
89 |     // get question details
90 |     this.questionDataService.getGraphQuestion(this.questionId).subscribe({
91 |       next: graphQuestionData => {
92 |         this.questionDataService.getQuestionData(this.questionId).subscribe({
93 |           next: questionData => {
94 |             if (questionData.type === questionType.GRAPH) {
95 |               // TODO: entsprechende questionType anstelle des Strings, testen.
96 |               this.graphQuestionData = graphQuestionData;
97 |               this.initialStructure = JSON.parse(
98 |                 JSON.stringify(this.graphQuestionData.initialStructure),
99 |               );
100 |               this.questionData = questionData;
101 |               this.updateWorkspace();
102 |             } else {
103 |               this.snackBar.open(
104 |                 'ACHTUNG: Bei den vorhandenen Daten handelt es sich nicht um eine Graphaufgabe!',
105 |                 'Schließen',
106 |                 { duration: 5000 },
107 |               );
108 |               this.thisQuestionType = questionData.type as questionType;
109 |             }
110 |           },
111 |           error: err => {
112 |             this.snackBar.open('Fehler beim Laden der Frage!', 'Schließen', { duration: 5000 });
113 |           },
114 |         });
115 |       },
116 |       error: err => {
117 |         this.snackBar.open('Fehler beim Laden der Frage!', 'Schließen', { duration: 5000 });
118 |       },
119 |     });
120 | 
121 |     // get the last submitted solution by the user
122 |     this.questionDataService.getNewestUserAnswer(this.questionId).subscribe({
123 |       next: data => {
124 |         if (data.userGraphAnswer) {
125 |           this.solutionGraph = data.userGraphAnswer;
126 |           this.workspaceModeCurrent = 'solution';
127 |           this.updateWorkspace();
128 |         }
129 |       },
130 |       error: err => {
131 |         this.snackBar.open('Fehler beim Laden der letzten abgegebenen Antwort', 'Schließen', {
132 |           duration: 5000,
133 |         });
134 |       },
135 |     });
136 |   }
137 | 
138 |   onSubmitButtonClick() {
139 |     if (!this.graphQuestionData) {
140 |       return;
141 |     }
142 | 
143 |     // To save workpace content if it is in solution mode
144 |     this.updateWorkspace();
145 |     this.feedbackState = 'ALGO';
146 |     this.feedbackTypeCurrent = 'algoFeedback';
147 |     this.isSending = true;
148 |     this.algoFeedback = '';
149 |     this.llmFeedback = '';
150 | 
151 |     // reset userAnswerId as it is used to generate ai feedback for the last submitted user answer
152 |     this.userAnswerId = -1;
153 | 
154 |     const userAnswerData: UserAnswerDataDTO = {
155 |       id: -1,
156 |       questionId: this.graphQuestionData.questionId,
157 |       contentElementId: this.graphQuestionData.contentElementId,
158 |       userId: -1,
159 |       userGraphAnswer: this.solutionGraph,
160 |     };
161 | 
162 |     console.log(JSON.stringify(userAnswerData, null, 2));
163 |     this.questionDataService.createUserAnswer(userAnswerData).subscribe({
164 |       next: result => {
165 |         console.log(result);
166 |         this.lastSubmittedGraph = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.solutionGraph));
167 |         this.handleGraphSubmissionResponse(result);
168 |       },
169 |       error: err => {
170 |         this.snackBar.open('Fehler bei der Abgabe der Antwort!', 'Schließen', { duration: 5000 });
171 |         this.isSending = false;
172 |       },
173 |     });
174 |   }
175 | 
176 |   handleGraphSubmissionResponse(result: userAnswerFeedbackDTO): void {
177 |     console.log(result);
178 |     this.isSending = false;
179 | 
180 |     this.userAnswerId = result.userAnswerId;
181 | 
182 |     // for first submission, enable the feedback and set the feedback type to algoFeedback
183 |     if (this.feedbackDisabled) {
184 |       this.feedbackTypeCurrent = 'algoFeedback';
185 |     }
186 | 
187 |     this.feedbackDisabled = false;
188 |     if (result.feedbackText) {
189 |       this.algoFeedback = '<br>' + result.feedbackText.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
190 |     } else {
191 |       this.algoFeedback = '<br>Fehler beim Generieren des Algo Feedbacks';
192 |     }
193 | 
194 |     if (result.progress === 100) {
195 |       this.progressService.answerSubmitted();
196 |     }
197 |   }
198 | 
199 |   onFeedbackTypeChange() {
200 |     // To save workpace content if it is in solution mode, as it will check if the structure is the same as the last submitted one
201 |     this.updateWorkspace();
202 | 
203 |     if (this.feedbackTypeCurrent === 'llmFeedback') {
204 |       if (this.feedbackState === 'LLM' || this.feedbackState === 'FEEDBACK_RATED') {
205 |         return;
206 |       }
207 | 
208 |       // If structure has changed since last submission, ask for submission
209 |       let solutionsAreEqual = true;
210 | 
211 |       if (this.lastSubmittedGraph === null) {
212 |         solutionsAreEqual = false;
213 |       } else if (this.solutionGraph.length !== this.lastSubmittedGraph?.length) {
214 |         solutionsAreEqual = false;
215 |       } else {
216 |         for (let i = 0; i < this.solutionGraph.length; i++) {
217 |           if (!structuresAreEqual(this.solutionGraph[i], this.lastSubmittedGraph[i])) {
218 |             solutionsAreEqual = false;
219 |             break;
220 |           }
221 |         }
222 |       }
223 | 
224 |       if (!solutionsAreEqual) {
225 |         this.confirmationService.confirm({
226 |           title: 'Neue Lösung abgeben',
227 |           message:
228 |             'Die aktuelle Lösung unterscheidet sich von der zuletzt abgegeben Lösung. Sie müssen die aktuelle Lösung abgeben, um KI-Feedback zu erhalten. Abgeben?',
229 |           acceptLabel: 'Abgeben',
230 |           declineLabel: 'Abbrechen',
231 |           accept: () => {
232 |             this.onSubmitButtonClick();
233 |           },
234 |           decline: () => {
235 |             this.llmFeedback =
236 |               '<br> Die aktuelle Lösung muss abgegeben werden, um KI-Feedback zu erhalten.';
237 |           },
238 |         });
239 |         return;
240 |       }
241 | 
242 |       this.onGetAIFeedbackClick();
243 |     }
244 |   }
245 | 
246 |   onGetAIFeedbackClick() {
247 |     if (!this.graphQuestionData) {
248 |       return;
249 |     }
250 | 
251 |     // To save workpace content if it is in solution mode
252 |     this.updateWorkspace();
253 |     this.isSending = true;
254 |     this.feedbackTypeCurrent = 'llmFeedback';
255 |     this.llmFeedback = '<br> Feedback wird geladen...';
256 | 
257 |     this.aiFeedbackService.generateGraphAIFeedback(this.userAnswerId).subscribe({
258 |       next: result => {
259 |         this.llmFeedbackId = result.feedbackId;
260 |         this.llmFeedback = '<br>' + result.feedback.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
261 |         this.isSending = false;
262 |         this.feedbackState = 'LLM';
263 |       },
264 |       error: err => {
265 |         this.snackBar.open('Fehler beim Generieren des KI-Feedbacks!', 'Schließen', {
266 |           duration: 5000,
267 |         });
268 |         this.llmFeedbackId = -1;
269 |         this.llmFeedback = '';
270 |         this.isSending = false;
271 |         this.feedbackTypeCurrent = 'algoFeedback';
272 |       },
273 |     });
274 |   }
275 | 
276 |   sendStudentFeedback(starRating: number): void {
277 |     this.hoverState = 0;
278 | 
279 |     if (
280 |       starRating !== 1 &&
281 |       starRating !== 2 &&
282 |       starRating !== 3 &&
283 |       starRating !== 4 &&
284 |       starRating !== 5
285 |     ) {
286 |       throw new Error('Invalid star rating: ' + starRating);
287 |     }
288 | 
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/edge-graph/edge-graph.component.html
```
1 | <svg:path
2 |   *ngIf="edge.node1 === edge.node2"
3 |   [attr.d]="calculateSelfLoopPath(edge)"
4 |   style="stroke: rgb(129, 129, 129); stroke-width: 2; fill: none"
5 | />
6 | 
7 | <svg:polygon
8 |   *ngIf="edge.node1 === edge.node2 && edge.directed"
9 |   [attr.points]="calculateArrowPoints(edge.node1, edge.node2, this.reverseEdgeState)"
10 |   fill="black"
11 | />
12 | 
13 | <!-- Display if the edge is directed -->
14 | <!-- Edge - Line -->
15 | 
16 | <svg:line
17 |   *ngIf="edge.node1 !== edge.node2 && edge.directed"
18 |   [attr.x1]="calculateEdgeStart(edge.node1, edge.node2, this.reverseEdgeState).x"
19 |   [attr.y1]="calculateEdgeStart(edge.node1, edge.node2, this.reverseEdgeState).y"
20 |   [attr.x2]="calculateEdgeEnd(edge.node1, edge.node2, this.reverseEdgeState).x"
21 |   [attr.y2]="calculateEdgeEnd(edge.node1, edge.node2, this.reverseEdgeState).y"
22 |   style="stroke: rgb(129, 129, 129); stroke-width: 2"
23 | />
24 | 
25 | <!-- Edge - Arrow head -->
26 | <svg:polygon
27 |   *ngIf="edge.node1 !== edge.node2 && edge.directed"
28 |   [attr.points]="calculateArrowPoints(edge.node1, edge.node2, this.reverseEdgeState)"
29 |   fill="black"
30 | />
31 | 
32 | <!-- Display if the edge is undirected -->
33 | <!-- Edge - Line -->
34 | <svg:line
35 |   *ngIf="edge.node1 !== edge.node2 && !edge.directed"
36 |   [attr.x1]="edge.node1.center.x"
37 |   [attr.y1]="edge.node1.center.y"
38 |   [attr.x2]="edge.node2.center.x"
39 |   [attr.y2]="edge.node2.center.y"
40 |   style="stroke: rgb(129, 129, 129); stroke-width: 2"
41 | />
```

1 | import { Component, Input } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { IGraphEdge } from '../models/GraphEdge.interface';
3 | import {
4 |   calculateArrowPoints,
5 |   calculateEdgeStart,
6 |   calculateEdgeEnd,
7 |   calculateSelfLoopPath,
8 | } from '../utils';
9 | 
10 | @Component({
11 |   selector: 'g[app-edge-graph]',
12 |   templateUrl: './edge-graph.component.html',
13 |   styleUrls: ['./edge-graph.component.scss'],
14 | })
15 | export class EdgeGraphComponent {
16 |   // #############################
17 |   // Expose the enums to the template
18 |   public calculateArrowPoints = calculateArrowPoints;
19 |   public calculateEdgeStart = calculateEdgeStart;
20 |   public calculateEdgeEnd = calculateEdgeEnd;
21 |   public calculateSelfLoopPath = calculateSelfLoopPath;
22 | 
23 |   // #############################
24 |   // Inputs from parent component
25 |   @Input() edge!: IGraphEdge;
26 |   @Input() reverseEdgeState!: 0 | 1 | 2;
27 | 
28 |   // #############################
29 |   // Constructor
30 |   constructor() {}
31 | }

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/edge-toolset-graph/edge-toolset-graph.component.html
```
1 | <div
2 |   #edgeToolset
3 |   [style.zIndex]="weightZIndex"
4 |   [style.left.px]="calculateComponentPosition().x"
5 |   [style.top.px]="calculateComponentPosition().y"
6 |   [style.width.px]="componentSize.width"
7 |   [style.height.px]="componentSize.height"
8 |   (mouseenter)="onFieldHover($event)"
9 |   class="edge-weight-div"
10 |   (dblclick)="onEditNodeValueClick()"
11 | >
12 |   <!-- ################### -->
13 |   <!-- To edit edge properteies -->
14 |   <!-- Display if the weight is disabled for the edge -->
15 |   <svg
16 |     *ngIf="!edge.weight.enabled"
17 |     xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
18 |     width="16"
19 |     height="16"
20 |     fill="currentColor"
21 |     class="bi bi-pencil"
22 |     viewBox="0 0 16 16"
23 |   >
24 |     <path
25 |       d="M12.146.146a.5.5 0 0 1 .708 0l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-10 10a.5.5 0 0 1-.168.11l-5 2a.5.5 0 0 1-.65-.65l2-5a.5.5 0 0 1 .11-.168zM11.207 2.5 13.5 4.793 14.793 3.5 12.5 1.207zm1.586 3L10.5 3.207 4 9.707V10h.5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v.5h.5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v.5h.293zm-9.761 5.175-.106.106-1.528 3.821 3.821-1.528.106-.106A.5.5 0 0 1 5 12.5V12h-.5a.5.5 0 0 1-.5-.5V11h-.5a.5.5 0 0 1-.468-.325"
26 |     />
27 |   </svg>
28 | 
29 |   <!-- ################### -->
30 |   <!-- Input to edit edge weight -->
31 |   <!-- Display if the weight is enabled for the edge -->
32 |   <div
33 |     *ngIf="edge.weight.enabled"
34 |     [ngStyle]="{ display: editEdgeWeight ? 'block' : 'none' }"
35 |     class="edge-weight-value"
36 |     (mouseenter)="onFieldHover($event)"
37 |   >
38 |     <form (submit)="editEdgeWeight = false">
39 |       <input
40 |         #edgeWeightValueInput
41 |         type="number"
42 |         (change)="onInputValueChange($event)"
43 |         name="value"
44 |         placeholder="Wert eingeben"
45 |         (blur)="editEdgeWeight = false"
46 |       />
47 |     </form>
48 |   </div>
49 |   <div
50 |     *ngIf="edge.weight.enabled"
51 |     [ngStyle]="{ display: !editEdgeWeight ? 'block' : 'none' }"
52 |     class="edge-weight-value"
53 |     (mouseenter)="onFieldHover($event)"
54 |   >
55 |     <span style="display: flex; justify-content: center">{{ edge.weight.value }}</span>
56 |   </div>
57 | 
58 |   <!-- End - Input -->
59 |   <!-- ################### -->
60 | 
61 |   <!-- ################### -->
62 |   <!-- Toolset -->
63 |   <div
64 |     [ngStyle]="{
65 |       display: displayEdgeToolbar ? 'block' : 'none',
66 |       width: edge.weight.enabled ? '210%' : '350%',
67 |       height: edge.weight.enabled ? '350%' : '350%',
68 |     }"
69 |     (mouseleave)="onFieldLeave($event)"
70 |     class="container"
71 |   >
72 |     <!-- ################### -->
73 |     <!-- Delete the edge -->
74 |     <div
75 |       class="delete-edge container-item"
76 |       (click)="onRemoveEdge($event)"
77 |       title="Die Kante löschen"
78 |     >
79 |       <svg
80 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
81 |         width="16"
82 |         height="16"
83 |         fill="currentColor"
84 |         class="bi bi-trash"
85 |         viewBox="0 0 16 16"
86 |       >
87 |         <path
88 |           d="M5.5 5.5A.5.5 0 0 1 6 6v6a.5.5 0 0 1-1 0V6a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5m2.5 0a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v6a.5.5 0 0 1-1 0V6a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5m3 .5a.5.5 0 0 0-1 0v6a.5.5 0 0 0 1 0z"
89 |         />
90 |         <path
91 |           d="M14.5 3a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H13v9a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4h-.5a1 1 0 0 1-1-1V2a1 1 0 0 1 1-1H6a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h2a1 1 0 0 1 1 1h3.5a1 1 0 0 1 1 1zM4.118 4 4 4.059V13a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h6a1 1 0 0 0 1-1V4.059L11.882 4zM2.5 3h11V2h-11z"
92 |         />
93 |       </svg>
94 |     </div>
95 |     <!-- End - Delete -->
96 |     <!-- ################### -->
97 | 
98 |     <!-- ################### -->
99 |     <!-- Change edge weight -->
100 |     <!-- Display if the weight is enabled for the edge -->
101 |     <div
102 |       *ngIf="edge.weight.enabled"
103 |       class="change-weight container-item"
104 |       (click)="onEditNodeValueClick()"
105 |       title="Den Wert ändern"
106 |     >
107 |       <svg
108 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
109 |         width="16"
110 |         height="16"
111 |         fill="currentColor"
112 |         class="bi bi-pencil"
113 |         viewBox="0 0 16 16"
114 |       >
115 |         <path
116 |           d="M12.146.146a.5.5 0 0 1 .708 0l3 3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-10 10a.5.5 0 0 1-.168.11l-5 2a.5.5 0 0 1-.65-.65l2-5a.5.5 0 0 1 .11-.168zM11.207 2.5 13.5 4.793 14.793 3.5 12.5 1.207zm1.586 3L10.5 3.207 4 9.707V10h.5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v.5h.5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v.5h.293zm-9.761 5.175-.106.106-1.528 3.821 3.821-1.528.106-.106A.5.5 0 0 1 5 12.5V12h-.5a.5.5 0 0 1-.5-.5V11h-.5a.5.5 0 0 1-.468-.325"
117 |         />
118 |       </svg>
119 |     </div>
120 | 
121 |     <!-- End - Change Weight -->
122 |     <!-- ################### -->
123 | 
124 |     <!-- ################### -->
125 |     <!-- Change edge direction -->
126 |     <!-- Display if the edge is directed and edge does not connect a node with itself -->
127 |     <div
128 |       *ngIf="edge.directed && edge.node1 !== edge.node2"
129 |       class="change-direction container-item"
130 |       (click)="onChangeDirection($event)"
131 |       title="Die Richtung der Kante ändern"
132 |     >
133 |       <svg
134 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
135 |         width="16"
136 |         height="16"
137 |         fill="currentColor"
138 |         class="bi bi-arrow-left-right"
139 |         viewBox="0 0 16 16"
140 |       >
141 |         <path
142 |           fill-rule="evenodd"
143 |           d="M1 11.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h11.793l-3.147 3.146a.5.5 0 0 0 .708.708l4-4a.5.5 0 0 0 0-.708l-4-4a.5.5 0 0 0-.708.708L13.293 11H1.5a.5.5 0 0 0-.5.5m14-7a.5.5 0 0 1-.5.5H2.707l3.147 3.146a.5.5 0 1 1-.708.708l-4-4a.5.5 0 0 1 0-.708l4-4a.5.5 0 1 1 .708.708L2.707 4H14.5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5"
144 |         />
145 |       </svg>
146 |     </div>
147 | 
148 |     <!-- End - Change Direction -->
149 |     <!-- ################### -->
150 |   </div>
151 |   <!-- End - Toolset -->
152 |   <!-- ################### -->
153 | </div>
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/edge-toolset-graph/edge-toolset-graph.component.scss
```
1 | .edge-weight-div {
2 |   position: absolute;
3 |   border: solid 1px #858383;
4 |   border-radius: 20%;
5 |   color: #000000de;
6 |   cursor: pointer;
7 |   display: flex;
8 |   justify-content: center;
9 |   align-items: center;
10 |   text-align: center;
11 |   background: #e7e7e7;
12 |   z-index: 1;
13 |   transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);
14 |   box-shadow:
15 |     0 3px 1px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
16 |     0 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
17 |     0 1px 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
18 | }
19 | 
20 | .edge-weight-div:hover {
21 |   box-shadow:
22 |     0 5px 5px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
23 |     0 8px 10px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
24 |     0 3px 14px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
25 | }
26 | 
27 | .edge-weight-value {
28 |   width: 100%;
29 |   z-index: 1;
30 | }
31 | .edge-weight-value input {
32 |   width: 100%;
33 |   background-color: transparent;
34 | }
35 | 
36 | .container {
37 |   position: absolute;
38 |   width: 210%;
39 |   height: 350%;
40 |   border-radius: 50%;
41 |   border: dotted #ccc 2px;
42 | }
43 | 
44 | .container-item {
45 |   position: absolute;
46 |   width: 30px;
47 |   height: 30px;
48 |   background-color: white;
49 |   padding: 6px;
50 |   border-radius: 50%;
51 |   border: solid silver 1px;
52 |   opacity: 0.4;
53 | }
54 | 
55 | .container-item:hover {
56 |   opacity: 1;
57 |   transform: scale(1.2, 1.2);
58 |   box-shadow:
59 |     0 5px 5px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
60 |     0 8px 10px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
61 |     0 3px 14px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
62 | }
63 | 
64 | .delete-edge {
65 |   top: 0;
66 |   left: 0;
67 | }
68 | 
69 | .change-weight {
70 |   top: 0;
71 |   transform: translateX(-100%);
72 |   left: 100%;
73 | }
74 | 
75 | .change-weight:hover {
76 |   transform: translateX(-100%);
77 | }
78 | 
79 | .change-direction {
80 |   top: -10px;
81 |   left: 50%;
82 |   transform: translateX(-50%);
83 | }
84 | 
85 | .change-direction:hover {
86 |   transform: translateX(-50%);
87 | }
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/edge-toolset-graph/edge-toolset-graph.component.ts
```
1 | import { ElementRef, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, EventEmitter, Input, Output, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { IGraphEdge } from '../models/GraphEdge.interface';
4 | import { SizeDTO, PositionDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
5 | import { calculateLineCenter } from '../utils';
6 | 
7 | @Component({
8 |   selector: 'app-edge-toolset-graph',
9 |   templateUrl: './edge-toolset-graph.component.html',
10 |   styleUrls: ['./edge-toolset-graph.component.scss'],
11 | })
12 | export class EdgeToolsetGraphComponent implements OnInit {
13 |   // #############################
14 |   // References for HTML Elements
15 |   @ViewChild('edgeToolset') component!: ElementRef<HTMLInputElement>;
16 |   @ViewChild('edgeWeightValueInput') edgeWeightValueInput!: ElementRef<HTMLInputElement>;
17 | 
18 |   // #############################
19 |   // Inputs from parent component
20 |   @Input() edge!: IGraphEdge;
21 |   @Input() index!: number;
22 |   @Input() reverseEdgeState!: 0 | 1 | 2;
23 | 
24 |   // #############################
25 |   // Outputs for parent component
26 |   @Output() removeEdge: EventEmitter<number> = new EventEmitter<number>();
27 |   @Output() changeEdgeDirection: EventEmitter<number> = new EventEmitter<number>();
28 |   @Output() changeEdgeWeight: EventEmitter<{ edgeIndex: number; newWeight: number }> =
29 |     new EventEmitter<{ edgeIndex: number; newWeight: number }>();
30 | 
31 |   // #############################
32 |   // Class properties
33 |   weightZIndex: number;
34 |   displayEdgeToolbar: boolean;
35 |   editEdgeWeight: boolean;
36 |   componentSize!: SizeDTO;
37 | 
38 |   // #############################
39 |   // Constructor
40 |   constructor() {
41 |     this.weightZIndex = 1;
42 |     this.displayEdgeToolbar = false;
43 |     this.editEdgeWeight = false;
44 |   }
45 | 
46 |   // #############################
47 |   // Lifecycle hook methods
48 |   ngOnInit(): void {
49 |     // weight is enabled:
50 |     if (this.edge.weight.enabled) {
51 |       this.componentSize = {
52 |         width: 50,
53 |         height: 30,
54 |       };
55 |     } else {
56 |       // weight is disabled
57 |       this.componentSize = {
58 |         width: 25,
59 |         height: 25,
60 |       };
61 |     }
62 |   }
63 | 
64 |   // #############################
65 |   // Functions for interactions with UI
66 |   onRemoveEdge(event: MouseEvent) {
67 |     this.removeEdge.emit(this.index);
68 |   }
69 | 
70 |   onChangeDirection(event: MouseEvent) {
71 |     try {
72 |       this.changeEdgeDirection.emit(this.index);
73 |     } catch (err) {
74 |       console.error(err);
75 |     }
76 |   }
77 | 
78 |   onFieldHover(event: any) {
79 |     this.weightZIndex = 10;
80 |     this.displayEdgeToolbar = true;
81 |   }
82 | 
83 |   onFieldLeave(event: any) {
84 |     this.weightZIndex = 1;
85 |     this.displayEdgeToolbar = false;
86 |   }
87 | 
88 |   onEditNodeValueClick() {
89 |     if (this.edge.weight.enabled) {
90 |       this.editEdgeWeight = true;
91 | 
92 |       this.edgeWeightValueInput.nativeElement.value = '';
93 | 
94 |       // Ensure that the input element is mounted
95 |       setTimeout(() => {
96 |         this.edgeWeightValueInput.nativeElement.focus();
97 |       }, 0);
98 |     }
99 |   }
100 | 
101 |   onInputValueChange(event: any) {
102 |     let intValue = Number(event.target.value);
103 | 
104 |     intValue = isNaN(intValue) ? 0 : intValue;
105 | 
106 |     this.changeEdgeWeight.emit({
107 |       edgeIndex: this.index,
108 |       newWeight: intValue,
109 |     });
110 |   }
111 | 
112 |   // #############################
113 |   // Utility functions
114 | 
115 |   calculateComponentPosition(): PositionDTO {
116 |     let position: PositionDTO;
117 |     if (this.edge.node1 === this.edge.node2) {
118 |       // edges which connect a node with itself
119 |       return {
120 |         x: this.edge.node1.position.x - 20 - this.componentSize.width / 2,
121 |         y: this.edge.node1.position.y - 20 - this.componentSize.height / 2,
122 |       };
123 |     } else {
124 |       // edges which connect two different nodes
125 |       return calculateLineCenter(
126 |         this.edge.node1.center,
127 |         this.edge.node2.center,
128 |         this.componentSize,
129 |         this.reverseEdgeState,
130 |       );
131 |     }
132 |   }
133 | }
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/graph-structure/graph-structure.component.html

1 | <!-- ################### -->
2 | <!-- Toolbar -->
3 | <div #toolbar class="toolbar">

11 |         class="toolbar-item-icon"

14 |         (cdkDragEnded)="toolOnDragEnd($event)"

18 |   </div>
19 |   <!-- End - Elements -->
20 |   <!-- ################### -->
21 | 
22 |   <!-- ################### -->

45 |             d="M14 4.5V11h-1V4.5h-2A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 9.5 3V1H4a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v9H2V2a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h5.5zM4.151 15.29a1.2 1.2 0 0 1-.111-.449h.764a.58.58 0 0 0 .255.384q.105.073.25.114.142.041.319.041.245 0 .413-.07a.56.56 0 0 0 .255-.193.5.5 0 0 0 .084-.29.39.39 0 0 0-.152-.326q-.152-.12-.463-.193l-.618-.143a1.7 1.7 0 0 1-.539-.214 1 1 0 0 1-.352-.367 1.1 1.1 0 0 1-.123-.524q0-.366.19-.639.192-.272.528-.422.337-.15.777-.149.456 0 .779.152.326.153.5.41.18.255.2.566h-.75a.56.56 0 0 0-.12-.258.6.6 0 0 0-.246-.181.9.9 0 0 0-.37-.068q-.324 0-.512.152a.47.47 0 0 0-.185.384q0 .18.144.3a1 1 0 0 0 .404.175l.621.143q.326.075.566.211a1 1 0 0 1 .375.358q.135.222.135.56 0 .37-.188.656a1.2 1.2 0 0 1-.539.439q-.351.158-.858.158-.381 0-.665-.09a1.4 1.4 0 0 1-.478-.252 1.1 1.1 0 0 1-.29-.375m-3.104-.033a1.3 1.3 0 0 1-.082-.466h.764a.6.6 0 0 0 .074.27.5.5 0 0 0 .454.246q.285 0 .422-.164.137-.165.137-.466v-2.745h.791v2.725q0 .66-.357 1.005-.355.345-.985.345a1.6 1.6 0 0 1-.568-.094 1.15 1.15 0 0 1-.407-.266 1.1 1.1 0 0 1-.243-.39m9.091-1.585v.522q0 .384-.117.641a.86.86 0 0 1-.322.387.9.9 0 0 1-.47.126.9.9 0 0 1-.47-.126.87.87 0 0 1-.32-.387 1.55 1.55 0 0 1-.117-.641v-.522q0-.386.117-.641a.87.87 0 0 1 .32-.387.87.87 0 0 1 .47-.129q.265 0 .47.129a.86.86 0 0 1 .322.387q.117.255.117.641m.803.519v-.513q0-.565-.205-.973a1.46 1.46 0 0 0-.59-.63q-.38-.22-.916-.22-.534 0-.92.22a1.44 1.44 0 0 0-.589.628q-.205.407-.205.975v.513q0 .562.205.973.205.407.589.626.386.217.92.217.536 0 .917-.217.384-.22.589-.626.204-.41.205-.973m1.29-.935v2.675h-.746v-3.999h.662l1.752 2.66h.032v-2.66h.75v4h-.656l-1.761-2.676z"
46 |           />
47 |         </svg>
48 |       </button>

50 |     </div>
51 |     <!--

54 |         <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="currentColor" class="bi bi-diagram-2" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
55 |           <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M6 3.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 7.5 2h1A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 10 3.5v1A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 8.5 6v1H11a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v1a.5.5 0 0 1-1 0V8h-5v.5a.5.5 0 0 1-1 0v-1A.5.5 0 0 1 5 7h2.5V6A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 6 4.5zM8.5 5a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-1a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5h-1a.5.5 0 0 0-.5.5v1a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5zM3 11.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 4.5 10h1A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 7 11.5v1A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 5.5 14h-1A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 3 12.5zm1.5-.5a.5.5 0 0 0-.5.5v1a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h1a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-1a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5zm4.5.5a1.5 1.5 0 0 1 1.5-1.5h1a1.5 1.5 0 0 1 1.5 1.5v1a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5h-1A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 9 12.5zm1.5-.5a.5.5 0 0 0-.5.5v1a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h1a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-1a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5z"/>
56 |         </svg>
57 |       </button>
58 |       <span>Positionen anpassen</span>
59 |     </div>
60 |     -->
61 |     <div class="functionality">
62 |       <button class="image-button" (click)="onDownloadAsJSONClick()">
63 |         <svg
64 |           xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
65 |           width="16"
66 |           height="16"
67 |           fill="currentColor"
68 |           class="bi bi-file-arrow-down"
69 |           viewBox="0 0 16 16"
70 |         >
71 |           <path
72 |             d="M8 5a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v3.793l1.146-1.147a.5.5 0 0 1 .708.708l-2 2a.5.5 0 0 1-.708 0l-2-2a.5.5 0 1 1 .708-.708L7.5 9.293V5.5A.5.5 0 0 1 8 5"
73 |           />
74 |           <path
75 |             d="M4 0a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h8a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V2a2 2 0 0 0-2-2zm0 1h8a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v12a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H4a1 1 0 0 1-1-1V2a1 1 0 0 1 1-1"
76 |           />
77 |         </svg>
78 |       </button>
79 |       <span>Als JSON exportieren</span>
80 |     </div>
81 |     <div class="functionality">
82 |       <label class="image-button">
83 |         <input
84 |           type="file"
85 |           (change)="onJSONFileSelected($event)"
86 |           accept=".json"
87 |           style="display: none"
88 |         />
89 |         <svg
90 |           xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
91 |           width="16"
92 |           height="16"
93 |           fill="currentColor"
94 |           class="bi bi-file-arrow-up"
95 |           viewBox="0 0 16 16"
96 |         >
97 |           <path
98 |             d="M8 11a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5V6.707l1.146 1.147a.5.5 0 0 0 .708-.708l-2-2a.5.5 0 0 0-.708 0l-2 2a.5.5 0 1 0 .708.708L7.5 6.707V10.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5"
99 |           />
100 |           <path
[TRUNCATED]

1 | .workspace-boundary {

73 | }
74 | 
75 | .svg {
76 |   width: 100%;
77 |   height: 100%;
78 |   position: absolute;
79 |   z-index: 0;
80 | }

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/graph-structure/graph-structure.component.ts
```
1 | import { AfterViewInit, ElementRef, OnDestroy, OnInit, QueryList } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, Input, ViewChild, ViewChildren } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { GraphTaskService } from '../services/graph-task.service';
4 | import {
5 |   CdkDrag,
6 |   CdkDragEnd,
7 |   CdkDragMove,
8 |   CdkDragStart,
9 |   DragDropModule,
10 | } from '@angular/cdk/drag-drop';
11 | import { NodeGraphComponent } from '../node-graph/node-graph.component';
12 | import { IGraphNode } from '../models/GraphNode.interface';
13 | import { IGraphEdge } from '../models/GraphEdge.interface';
14 | import { IGraphNewEdge } from '../models/GraphNewEdge.interface';
15 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
16 | import { Subscription } from 'rxjs';
17 | import { readFile } from '../utils';
18 | import {
19 |   SizeDTO,
20 |   PositionDTO,
21 |   RectangleDTO,
22 |   GraphConfigurationDTO,
23 | } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
24 | 
25 | @Component({
26 |   selector: 'app-graph-structure',
27 |   templateUrl: './graph-structure.component.html',
28 |   styleUrls: ['./graph-structure.component.scss'],
29 | })
30 | export class GraphStructureComponent implements OnInit, AfterViewInit, OnDestroy {
31 |   // #############################
32 |   // References for HTML Elements
33 |   @ViewChild('workspace') workspace!: ElementRef;
34 |   @ViewChildren('tool') toolElements!: QueryList<ElementRef>;
35 |   @ViewChild('toolbar') toolbar!: ElementRef;
36 |   @ViewChildren(NodeGraphComponent) nodeComponents!: QueryList<NodeGraphComponent>;
37 | 
38 |   // #############################
39 |   // Class properties
40 |   dragPosition: PositionDTO;
41 |   wsRelativeToTb: PositionDTO;
42 |   workspaceRect: RectangleDTO;
43 |   toolbarRect: RectangleDTO;
44 |   // TODO: Find a proper way to listen to UI change to update workSpaceRect etc.
45 | 
46 |   mouseX: number;
47 |   mouseY: number;
48 | 
49 |   toolbarElements!: string[];
50 | 
51 |   private nodesSubscription!: Subscription;
52 |   private edgesSubscription!: Subscription;
53 |   private newEdgeSubscription!: Subscription;
54 |   private graphConfigurationSubscription!: Subscription;
55 | 
56 |   nodes!: IGraphNode[];
57 |   edges!: IGraphEdge[];
58 |   newEdge!: IGraphNewEdge;
59 |   graphConfiguration!: GraphConfigurationDTO;
60 | 
61 |   private _toolbarEnabled: boolean = false;
62 | 
63 |   @Input()
64 |   set toolbarEnabled(value: boolean | undefined) {
65 |     this._toolbarEnabled = value ?? this._toolbarEnabled;
66 |   }
67 | 
68 |   get toolbarEnabled(): boolean {
69 |     return this._toolbarEnabled;
70 |   }
71 | 
72 |   // #############################
73 |   // Constructor
74 |   constructor(
75 |     private readonly graphService: GraphTaskService,
76 |     private readonly router: Router,
77 |   ) {
78 |     // #############################
79 |     // Initialize Properties
80 |     this.dragPosition = { x: 0, y: 0 };
81 |     this.wsRelativeToTb = { x: 0, y: 0 };
82 |     this.workspaceRect = {
83 |       topLeft: { x: 0, y: 0 },
84 |       bottomRight: { x: 0, y: 0 },
85 |       size: { width: 0, height: 0 },
86 |     };
87 |     this.toolbarRect = {
88 |       topLeft: { x: 0, y: 0 },
89 |       bottomRight: { x: 0, y: 0 },
90 |       size: { width: 0, height: 0 },
91 |     };
92 | 
93 |     this.mouseX = 0;
94 |     this.mouseY = 0;
95 |   }
96 | 
97 |   // #############################
98 |   // Lifecycle hook methods
99 | 
100 |   ngOnInit(): void {
101 |     // #############################
102 |     // Initialize properties
103 |     this.toolbarElements = ['Toolbar1']; // TODO:
104 | 
105 |     // #############################
106 |     // Subscribe to Observables from the graphService
107 |     this.nodesSubscription = this.graphService.getNodes().subscribe(nodes => {
108 |       this.nodes = nodes;
109 |     });
110 | 
111 |     this.edgesSubscription = this.graphService.getEdges().subscribe(edges => {
112 |       this.edges = edges;
113 |     });
114 | 
115 |     this.newEdgeSubscription = this.graphService.getNewEdge().subscribe(newEdge => {
116 |       this.newEdge = newEdge;
117 |     });
118 | 
119 |     this.graphConfigurationSubscription = this.graphService
120 |       .getGraphConfiguration()
121 |       .subscribe(graphConfiguration => {
122 |         this.graphConfiguration = graphConfiguration;
123 |       });
124 | 
125 |     // #############################
126 |     // Set up event listeners
127 |     window.addEventListener('keydown', this.onKeyDown);
128 |     window.addEventListener('resize', this.onWindowResize);
129 |     window.addEventListener('scroll', this.onWindowScroll, true);
130 |   }
131 | 
132 |   ngAfterViewInit() {
133 |     setTimeout(() => {
134 |       this.calculateUI();
135 |     }, 0);
136 |   }
137 | 
138 |   ngOnDestroy() {
139 |     // #############################
140 |     // Remove event listeners
141 |     window.removeEventListener('keydown', this.onKeyDown);
142 |     window.removeEventListener('resize', this.onWindowResize);
143 |     window.removeEventListener('scroll', this.onWindowScroll, true);
144 | 
145 |     // #############################
146 |     // Unsubscribe from all subscriptions to prevent memory leaks
147 |     if (this.nodesSubscription) {
148 |       this.nodesSubscription.unsubscribe();
149 |     }
150 |     if (this.edgesSubscription) {
151 |       this.edgesSubscription.unsubscribe();
152 |     }
153 |     if (this.newEdgeSubscription) {
154 |       this.newEdgeSubscription.unsubscribe();
155 |     }
156 |     if (this.graphConfigurationSubscription) {
157 |       this.graphConfigurationSubscription.unsubscribe();
158 |     }
159 |   }
160 | 
161 |   // #############################
162 |   // Callback functions for event listeners
163 |   private readonly onKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
164 |     // to cancel new edge between nodes
165 |     if (event.key === 'Escape') {
166 |       if (this.newEdge.started) {
167 |         this.graphService.resetNewEdge();
168 |       }
169 |     }
170 |   };
171 | 
172 |   private readonly onWindowResize = () => {
173 |     this.calculateUI();
174 |   };
175 | 
176 |   private readonly onWindowScroll = () => {
177 |     this.calculateUI();
178 |   };
179 | 
180 |   // #############################
181 |   // Functions for children events
182 |   removeEdge(index: number) {
183 |     const edgeToDelete = this.edges[index];
184 |     this.graphService.removeEdge(edgeToDelete);
185 |   }
186 | 
187 |   changeEdgeDirection(index: number) {
188 |     const edgeToUpdate = this.edges[index];
189 |     try {
190 |       this.graphService.changeEdgeDirection(edgeToUpdate);
191 |     } catch (err) {
192 |       console.error(err);
193 |     }
194 |   }
195 | 
196 |   changeEdgeWeight(input: { edgeIndex: number; newWeight: number }) {
197 |     try {
198 |       const edgeToUpdate = this.edges[input.edgeIndex];
199 |       this.graphService.updateEdgeWeight(edgeToUpdate, input.newWeight);
200 |     } catch (err) {
201 |       console.error(err);
202 |     }
203 |   }
204 | 
205 |   // #############################
206 |   // Functions for interactions with UI
207 | 
208 |   notImplemented() {
209 |     alert('Noch nicht implementiert');
210 |   }
211 | 
212 |   onJSONToConsoleClick() {
213 |     const json = this.graphService.graphToJSON();
214 |     console.log(json);
215 |   }
216 | 
217 |   onDownloadAsJSONClick() {
218 |     this.graphService.downloadGraphAsJSON();
219 |   }
220 | 
221 |   onJSONFileSelected(event: any) {
222 |     const file: File = event.target.files[0];
223 | 
224 |     if (file) {
225 |       readFile(file).then(fileContent => {
226 |         this.graphService.graphFromJSON(fileContent);
227 |       });
228 |     }
229 |   }
230 | 
231 |   // #############################
232 |   // Functions for interactions with toolbar
233 | 
234 |   // Drag start
235 |   toolOnDragStart(event: any) {
236 |     // TODO: where to do this?
237 |     this.calculateUI();
238 |   }
239 | 
240 |   // Drag move
241 |   toolOnDragMove(event: any) {
242 |     // Update dragPosition
243 |     this.dragPosition.x =
244 |       event.source.getFreeDragPosition().x +
245 |       event.source.element.nativeElement.offsetLeft -
246 |       this.wsRelativeToTb.x;
247 |     this.dragPosition.y =
248 |       event.source.getFreeDragPosition().y +
249 |       +event.source.element.nativeElement.offsetTop -
250 |       this.wsRelativeToTb.y;
251 |   }
252 | 
253 |   // Drag end
254 |   toolOnDragEnd(event: any) {
255 |     // TODO:
256 |     this.calculateUI();
257 | 
258 |     // TODO: how to set size dynamically?
259 |     const newNodeSize: SizeDTO = {
260 |       width: 100,
261 |       height: 100,
262 |       // width: event.source.element.nativeElement.clientWidth,
263 |       // height: event.source.element.nativeElement.clientHeight
264 |     };
265 | 
266 |     // Get the drag point to set the size of new node
267 |     const newNodePosition: PositionDTO = {
268 |       x:
269 |         event.source.getFreeDragPosition().x +
270 |         event.source.element.nativeElement.offsetLeft -
271 |         this.wsRelativeToTb.x,
272 |       y:
273 |         event.source.getFreeDragPosition().y +
274 |         +event.source.element.nativeElement.offsetTop -
275 |         this.wsRelativeToTb.y,
276 |     };
277 | 
278 |     // Check if the position is inside the workspace and adjust it if it is not
279 |     if (newNodePosition.x < 0) {
280 |       newNodePosition.x = 0;
281 |     } else if (newNodePosition.x + newNodeSize.width > this.workspaceRect.size.width) {
282 |       newNodePosition.x = this.workspaceRect.size.width - newNodeSize.width;
283 |     }
284 | 
285 |     if (newNodePosition.y < 0) {
286 |       newNodePosition.y = 0;
287 |     } else if (newNodePosition.y + newNodeSize.height > this.workspaceRect.size.height) {
288 |       newNodePosition.y = this.workspaceRect.size.height - newNodeSize.height;
289 |     }
290 | 
291 |     // Reset the Toolbar Element
292 |     event.source.reset();
293 | 
294 |     // TODO: node is returned
295 |     this.graphService.addNode({ position: newNodePosition, size: newNodeSize });
296 |   }
297 | 
298 |   // #############################
299 |   // Functions for interactions with workspace
300 | 
301 |   onWorkspaceClick(event: MouseEvent) {
302 |     // Cancel the new edge creation if workspace is clicked
303 |     // Used stop event propogation on node click
304 |     if (this.newEdge.started) {
305 |       this.graphService.resetNewEdge();
306 |     }
307 |   }
308 | 
309 |   onMouseMove(event: MouseEvent) {
310 |     this.mouseX = event.clientX;
311 |     this.mouseY = event.clientY;
312 |   }
313 | 
314 |   // #############################
315 |   // Utility functions
316 | 
317 |   calculateUI() {
318 |     // Check if the UI elements initialized
319 |     if (this.workspace && this.toolbar) {
320 |       // Calculate Workspace rectangle
321 |       const {
322 |         x: wX,
323 |         y: wY,
324 |         width: wWidth,
325 |         height: wHeight,
326 |       } = this.workspace.nativeElement.getBoundingClientRect();
327 | 
328 |       this.workspaceRect = {
329 |         topLeft: { x: wX, y: wY },
330 |         bottomRight: { x: wX + wWidth, y: wY + wHeight },
331 |         size: { width: wWidth, height: wHeight },
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/graph-tutorial-dialog/graph-tutorial-dialog.component.html
```
1 | <div class="dialog-container">
2 |   <!-- Video Selection -->
3 |   <div class="video-selection-container">
4 |     <div class="video-selection-title">
5 |       <h2>Tutorial Videos</h2>
6 |       <div class="bottem-border"></div>
7 |     </div>
8 |     <div class="video-selection">
9 |       <!-- List - Tutorial Videos -->
10 |       <div
11 |         *ngFor="let tutorial of tutorials; let i = index"
12 |         [ngClass]="currentTutorial === i ? 'video-selection-item selected' : 'video-selection-item'"
13 |         (click)="currentTutorial = i"
14 |       >
15 |         <h4>{{ tutorial.title }}</h4>
16 |       </div>
17 |     </div>
18 |   </div>
19 | 
20 |   <!--VIDEO-->
21 |   <div class="video-container">
22 |     <video
23 |       #videoPlayer
24 |       [src]="tutorials[currentTutorial].videoUrl"
25 |       controls
26 |       width="100%"
27 |       height="100%"
28 |     >
29 |       Ihr Browser unterstützt das Video-Tag nicht.
30 |     </video>
31 |   </div>
32 | </div>
```

1 | .dialog-container {
2 |   position: relative;
3 |   height: 80vh;
4 |   width: 80vw;
5 |   display: flex;
6 |   flex-direction: row;
7 |   align-items: center;
8 |   justify-content: space-between;
9 |   gap: 1.5em;
10 |   padding: 1em;
11 |   padding-right: 2em;
12 |   overflow: hidden;
13 | }
14 | 
15 | .dialog-content-container {
16 |   width: 100%;
17 |   display: flex;
18 |   align-items: center;
19 |   justify-content: space-between;
20 |   gap: 1.5em;
21 |   padding: 1em;
22 | }
23 | 
24 | .video-container {
25 |   height: 100%;
26 |   width: 80%;
27 |   display: flex;
28 |   flex-direction: column;
29 |   align-items: center;
30 |   justify-content: center;
31 | }
32 | 
33 | .video-element {
34 |   width: 50%; /* Define a consistent width */
35 |   height: auto; /* Automatically adjust height based on aspect ratio */
36 |   object-fit: contain; /* Ensures video content scales properly */
37 | }
38 | 
39 | .video-selection-container {
40 |   height: 100%;
41 |   width: 20%;
42 |   display: flex;
43 |   flex-direction: column;
44 |   justify-content: start;
45 |   align-items: start;
46 |   gap: 0.2em;
47 |   padding-bottom: 2em;
48 | }

51 |   width: 100%;
52 |   height: 100%;
53 |   display: flex;
54 |   flex-direction: column;
55 |   justify-content: start;
56 |   align-items: start;
57 |   gap: 1em;
58 |   padding: 0.8em;
59 |   overflow-y: auto;
60 |   scrollbar-width: thin;
61 | }
62 |

64 |   width: 95%;
65 |   display: flex;
66 |   flex-direction: column;
67 |   justify-content: start;
68 |   align-items: start;
69 |   flex-shrink: 0;
70 |   padding: 0.5em;
71 |   padding-left: 1em;

88 |   padding: 0.7em;

90 |   background-color: #fff;
91 |   box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
92 |   overflow: hidden;
93 |   text-overflow: ellipsis;
94 |   white-space: nowrap;
95 |   transition: background-color 0.3s;
96 |   flex-shrink: 0; /* Prevent item from shrinking */
97 |   cursor: pointer;
98 | }
99 |

102 | }
103 | 
104 | .video-selection-item h4 {
105 |   margin: 0;
106 | }

110 |   color: #fff;
111 | }
112 | 
113 | .video-selection-item.selected:hover {

115 | }

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/graph-tutorial-dialog/graph-tutorial-dialog.component.ts
```
1 | import { ElementRef, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
3 | 
4 | @Component({
5 |   selector: 'app-graph-tutorial-dialog',
6 |   templateUrl: './graph-tutorial-dialog.component.html',
7 |   styleUrls: ['./graph-tutorial-dialog.component.scss'],
8 | })
9 | export class GraphTutorialDialogComponent implements OnDestroy {
10 |   @ViewChild('videoPlayer') videoPlayer!: ElementRef;
11 | 
12 |   videosFolder = '../../../assets//videos';
13 |   tutorials = [
14 |     {
15 |       title: 'Graphaufgaben',
16 |       videoUrl: `${this.videosFolder}/goals_graphaufgaben_tutorial.mp4`,
17 |     },
18 |     {
19 |       title: 'Dijkstra',
20 |       videoUrl: `${this.videosFolder}/goals_dijkstra_tutorial.mp4`,
21 |     },
22 |     {
23 |       title: 'Floyd',
24 |       videoUrl: `${this.videosFolder}/goals_floyd_tutorial.mp4`,
25 |     },
26 |     {
27 |       title: 'Transitive Hülle',
28 |       videoUrl: `${this.videosFolder}/goals_transitive_hülle_tutorial.mp4`,
29 |     },
30 |     {
31 |       title: 'Kruskal',
32 |       videoUrl: `${this.videosFolder}/goals_kruskal_tutorial.mp4`,
33 |     },
34 |   ];
35 | 
36 |   currentTutorial = 0;
37 | 
38 |   // preventing Premature close conncetion error by closing the modal while video is loading
39 |   ngOnDestroy() {
40 |     this.stopAndResetVideo();
41 |   }
42 | 
43 |   private stopAndResetVideo() {
44 |     if (this.videoPlayer?.nativeElement) {
45 |       this.videoPlayer.nativeElement.pause();
46 |       this.videoPlayer.nativeElement.src = '';
47 |       this.videoPlayer.nativeElement.load();
48 |     }
49 |   }
50 | }
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/models/GraphEdge.interface.ts
```
1 | import { IGraphNode } from './GraphNode.interface';
2 | 
3 | export interface IGraphEdge {
4 |   node1: IGraphNode; // startNode for directed edges
5 |   node2: IGraphNode; // endNode for directed edges
6 |   directed: boolean;
7 |   weight: {
8 |     enabled: boolean;
9 |     value: number | null;
10 |   };
11 | }
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/models/GraphNewEdge.interface.ts
```
1 | import { IGraphNode } from './GraphNode.interface';
2 | 
3 | export interface IGraphNewEdge {
4 |   started: boolean;
5 |   node1: IGraphNode | null; // startNode for directed edges
6 |   node2: IGraphNode | null; // endNode for directed edges
7 |   weight: number;
8 | }
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/models/GraphNode.interface.ts
```
1 | import { PositionDTO, SizeDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
2 | 
3 | export interface IGraphNode {
4 |   nodeId: number;
5 |   value: string;
6 |   selected: {
7 |     enabled: boolean;
8 |     value: boolean | null;
9 |   };
10 |   weight: {
11 |     enabled: boolean;
12 |     value: number | null;
13 |   };
14 |   position: PositionDTO;
15 |   size: SizeDTO;
16 |   center: PositionDTO;
17 | }
```
