src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/node-graph/node-graph.component.html
```
1 | <div
2 |   class="node-div"
3 |   cdkDrag
4 |   cdkDragBoundary=".workspace-boundary"
5 |   [cdkDragFreeDragPosition]="node.position"
6 |   (cdkDragStarted)="nodeOnDragStart($event)"
7 |   (cdkDragMoved)="nodeOnDragMove($event)"
8 |   (cdkDragEnded)="nodeOnDragEnd($event)"
9 |   (mouseenter)="onFieldHover($event)"
10 |   (click)="onClick($event)"
11 |   (dblclick)="onNodeDoubleClick()"
12 |   [style.zIndex]="nodeZIndex"
13 | >
14 |   <!-- ################### -->
15 |   <!-- Inputs to edit node properties -->
16 |   <div
17 |     class="node-properties"
18 |     [ngStyle]="{
19 |       'justify-content':
20 |         graphConfiguration.nodeWeight && graphConfiguration.nodeSelected
21 |           ? 'end'
22 |           : graphConfiguration.nodeWeight || graphConfiguration.nodeSelected
23 |             ? 'end'
24 |             : 'center',
25 |       gap:
26 |         graphConfiguration.nodeWeight && graphConfiguration.nodeSelected
27 |           ? 0
28 |           : graphConfiguration.nodeWeight || graphConfiguration.nodeSelected
29 |             ? '.7rem'
30 |             : 0,
31 |     }"
32 |   >
33 |     <!-- ################### -->
34 |     <!-- Node value -->
35 |     <div class="node-value form" (mouseenter)="onFieldHover($event)">
36 |       <form
37 |         (submit)="editNodeValue = false"
38 |         [ngStyle]="{ display: editNodeValue ? 'block' : 'none' }"
39 |       >
40 |         <input
41 |           #nodeValueInput
42 |           type="text"
43 |           [(ngModel)]="node.value"
44 |           (change)="updateNodeValue($event)"
45 |           name="value"
46 |           placeholder="Wert eingeben"
47 |           (blur)="editNodeValue = false"
48 |           style="text-align: center"
49 |         />
50 |       </form>
51 |     </div>
52 |     <div
53 |       [ngStyle]="{ display: !editNodeValue ? 'block' : 'none' }"
54 |       class="node-value display"
55 |       (mouseenter)="onFieldHover($event)"
56 |     >
57 |       <span style="display: flex; justify-content: center">{{ node.value }}</span>
58 |     </div>
59 |     <!-- End - Input -->
60 |     <!-- ################### -->
61 | 
62 |     <!-- Display if the node is weighted -->
63 |     <!-- ################### -->
64 |     <!-- Node weight -->
65 |     <div
66 |       *ngIf="graphConfiguration.nodeWeight"
67 |       class="node-weight form"
68 |       (mouseenter)="onFieldHover($event)"
69 |     >
70 |       <form
71 |         (submit)="editNodeWeight = false"
72 |         [ngStyle]="{ display: editNodeWeight ? 'block' : 'none' }"
73 |       >
74 |         <input
75 |           #nodeWeightInput
76 |           type="number"
77 |           [(ngModel)]="node.weight.value"
78 |           (change)="updateNodeWeight($event)"
79 |           name="weight"
80 |           placeholder="Gewicht eingeben"
81 |           (blur)="editNodeWeight = false"
82 |         />
83 |       </form>
84 |     </div>
85 |     <div
86 |       *ngIf="graphConfiguration.nodeWeight"
87 |       [ngStyle]="{ display: !editNodeWeight ? 'block' : 'none' }"
88 |       class="node-weight display"
89 |       (mouseenter)="onFieldHover($event)"
90 |       (dblclick)="onNodeWeightDoubleClick($event)"
91 |     >
92 |       <span style="display: flex; justify-content: center">
93 |         Gewicht: {{ getWeightDisplayValue() }}
94 |       </span>
95 |     </div>
96 |     <!-- End - Input -->
97 |     <!-- ################### -->
98 | 
99 |     <!-- Display if the node can be selected -->
100 | 
101 |     <!-- ################### -->
102 |     <div
103 |       *ngIf="graphConfiguration.nodeSelected"
104 |       class="node-selected display"
105 |       (mouseenter)="onFieldHover($event)"
106 |       (dblclick)="onNodeSelectedDoubleClick($event)"
107 |     >
108 |       <span *ngIf="node.selected.value === true" style="display: flex; justify-content: center">{{
109 |         graphConfiguration.nodeSelectedText !== undefined
110 |           ? graphConfiguration.nodeSelectedText.selected
111 |           : 'Selected'
112 |       }}</span>
113 |       <span *ngIf="node.selected.value === false" style="display: flex; justify-content: center">{{
114 |         graphConfiguration.nodeSelectedText !== undefined
115 |           ? graphConfiguration.nodeSelectedText.unselected
116 |           : 'Unselected'
117 |       }}</span>
118 |     </div>
119 |     <!-- End - Input -->
120 |     <!-- ################### -->
121 |   </div>
122 |   <!-- End - Node Properties -->
123 |   <!-- ################### -->
124 | 
125 |   <!-- ################### -->
126 |   <!-- Toolset -->
127 |   <div
128 |     [ngStyle]="{ display: displayNodeToolset ? 'block' : 'none' }"
129 |     (mouseleave)="onFieldLeave($event)"
130 |     class="container"
131 |   >
132 |     <!-- Display if the edge is directed -->
133 |     <!-- ################### -->
134 |     <!-- Generate new node connected to current node -->
135 |     <div
136 |       *ngIf="graphConfiguration.edgeDirected"
137 |       [ngStyle]="{ display: newEdge.started ? 'none' : 'block' }"
138 |       class="new-node-incoming container-item"
139 |       title="Eingehende Kante - Einen neuen Knoten erzeugen und verbinden"
140 |       (click)="onNewNodeClick($event, true)"
141 |     >
142 |       <svg
143 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
144 |         width="16"
145 |         height="16"
146 |         fill="currentColor"
147 |         class="bi bi-plus-lg"
148 |         viewBox="0 0 16 16"
149 |       >
150 |         <!-- Plus Symbol Path -->
151 |         <path
152 |           fill-rule="evenodd"
153 |           d="M8 2a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v5h5a.5.5 0 0 1 0 1h-5v5a.5.5 0 0 1-1 0v-5h-5a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1h5v-5A.5.5 0 0 1 8 2"
154 |         />
155 | 
156 |         <!-- Caret Path -->
157 |         <path
158 |           fill-rule="evenodd"
159 |           d="M7.5 15l3.646-3.646a.5.5 0 0 0-.707-.707L8 13.293l-2.439-2.939a.5.5 0 1 0-.707.707L7.5 15z"
160 |         />
161 |       </svg>
162 |     </div>
163 |     <div
164 |       *ngIf="graphConfiguration.edgeDirected"
165 |       [ngStyle]="{ display: newEdge.started ? 'none' : 'block' }"
166 |       class="new-node-outgoing container-item"
167 |       title="Ausgehende Kante - Einen neuen Knoten erzeugen und verbinden"
168 |       (click)="onNewNodeClick($event, false)"
169 |     >
170 |       <svg
171 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
172 |         width="16"
173 |         height="16"
174 |         fill="currentColor"
175 |         class="bi bi-plus-lg"
176 |         viewBox="0 0 16 16"
177 |       >
178 |         <!-- Plus Symbol Path -->
179 |         <path
180 |           fill-rule="evenodd"
181 |           d="M8 2a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v5h5a.5.5 0 0 1 0 1h-5v5a.5.5 0 0 1-1 0v-5h-5a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1h5v-5A.5.5 0 0 1 8 2"
182 |         />
183 | 
184 |         <!-- Caret Path -->
185 |         <path
186 |           fill-rule="evenodd"
187 |           d="M7.5 0l3.646 3.646a.5.5 0 0 1-.707.707L8 1.707l-2.439 2.939a.5.5 0 1 1-.707-.707L7.5 0z"
188 |         />
189 |       </svg>
190 |     </div>
191 |     <!-- End - Generate nodes -->
192 |     <!-- ################### -->
193 | 
194 |     <!-- ################### -->
195 |     <!-- Generate new edge to connect two existing nodes -->
196 |     <div
197 |       *ngIf="graphConfiguration.edgeDirected"
198 |       [ngStyle]="{ display: newEdge.started && newEdge.node2 !== null ? 'none' : 'block' }"
199 |       class="new-edge-incoming container-item"
200 |       title="Eingehende Kante - Mit einem Knoten verbinden"
201 |       (click)="onConnectNodeDirectedClick($event, true)"
202 |     >
203 |       <svg
204 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
205 |         width="16"
206 |         height="16"
207 |         fill="currentColor"
208 |         class="bi bi-arrow-up"
209 |         viewBox="0 0 16 16"
210 |       >
211 |         <path
212 |           fill-rule="evenodd"
213 |           d="M8 15a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5V2.707l3.146 3.147a.5.5 0 0 0 .708-.708l-4-4a.5.5 0 0 0-.708 0l-4 4a.5.5 0 1 0 .708.708L7.5 2.707V14.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5"
214 |         />
215 |       </svg>
216 |     </div>
217 | 
218 |     <div
219 |       *ngIf="graphConfiguration.edgeDirected"
220 |       [ngStyle]="{ display: newEdge.started && newEdge.node1 !== null ? 'none' : 'block' }"
221 |       class="new-edge-outgoing container-item"
222 |       title="Ausgehende Kante - Mit einem Knoten verbinden"
223 |       (click)="onConnectNodeDirectedClick($event, false)"
224 |     >
225 |       <svg
226 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
227 |         width="16"
228 |         height="16"
229 |         fill="currentColor"
230 |         class="bi bi-arrow-down"
231 |         viewBox="0 0 16 16"
232 |       >
233 |         <path
234 |           fill-rule="evenodd"
235 |           d="M8 1a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v11.793l3.146-3.147a.5.5 0 0 1 .708.708l-4 4a.5.5 0 0 1-.708 0l-4-4a.5.5 0 0 1 .708-.708L7.5 13.293V1.5A.5.5 0 0 1 8 1"
236 |         />
237 |       </svg>
238 |     </div>
239 |     <!-- End - Connect nodes -->
240 |     <!-- ################### -->
241 | 
242 |     <!-- Display if the edge is undirected -->
243 |     <!-- ################### -->
244 |     <!-- Generate new node connected to current node -->
245 |     <div
246 |       *ngIf="!graphConfiguration.edgeDirected"
247 |       [ngStyle]="{ display: newEdge.started ? 'none' : 'block' }"
248 |       class="new-node container-item"
249 |       title="Einen neuen Knoten erzeugen und verbinden"
250 |       (click)="onNewNodeClick($event)"
251 |     >
252 |       <svg
253 |         xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
254 |         width="16"
255 |         height="16"
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/node-graph/node-graph.component.scss
```
1 | .node-div {
2 |   position: absolute;
3 |   width: 100px;
4 |   height: 100px;
5 |   border: solid 1px #ccc;
6 |   border-radius: 20%;
7 |   color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.87);
8 |   cursor: move;
9 |   display: flex;
10 |   justify-content: center;
11 |   align-items: center;
12 |   text-align: center;
13 |   background: #fff;
14 |   transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);
15 |   box-shadow:
16 |     0 3px 1px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
17 |     0 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
18 |     0 1px 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
19 | }
20 | 
21 | .node-div:hover {
22 |   box-shadow:
23 |     0 5px 5px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
24 |     0 8px 10px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
25 |     0 3px 14px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
26 | }
27 | 
28 | .node-properties {
29 |   width: 100%;
30 |   height: 100%;
31 |   border-radius: 20%;
32 |   margin: 0;
33 |   padding: 0;
34 |   display: flex;
35 |   flex-direction: column;
36 |   align-items: center;
37 | }
38 | 
39 | .node-value,
40 | .node-weight,
41 | .node-selected {
42 |   width: 100%;
43 |   z-index: 1;
44 | }
45 | 
46 | .node-weight.display,
47 | .node-selected.display {
48 |   padding: 0.5em 0;
49 |   border-top: 0.1em solid #919191;
50 | }
51 | 
52 | .node-properties input {
53 |   width: 100%;
54 | }
55 | 
56 | .container {
57 |   position: absolute;
58 |   width: 170%;
59 |   height: 170%;
60 |   border-radius: 50%;
61 |   border: dotted #ccc 2px;
62 | }
63 | 
64 | .container-item {
65 |   position: absolute;
66 |   width: 30px;
67 |   height: 30px;
68 |   background-color: white;
69 |   padding: 6px;
70 |   border-radius: 50%;
71 |   border: solid silver 1px;
72 |   opacity: 0.4;
73 | }
74 | 
75 | .container-item:hover {
76 |   opacity: 1;
77 |   transform: scale(1.2, 1.2);
78 |   box-shadow:
79 |     0 5px 5px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
80 |     0 8px 10px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
81 |     0 3px 14px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
82 | }
83 | 
84 | .delete {
85 |   top: 50%;
86 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
87 | }
88 | 
89 | .delete:hover {
90 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
91 | }
92 | 
93 | .edit-value {
94 |   top: 50%;
95 |   left: 100%;
96 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
97 | }
98 | 
99 | .edit-value:hover {
100 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
101 | }
102 | 
103 | .edit-weight {
104 |   top: 25%;
105 |   left: 95%;
106 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
107 | }
108 | 
109 | .edit-weight:hover {
110 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
111 | }
112 | 
113 | .set-weight-infinity {
114 |   top: 25%;
115 |   left: 5%;
116 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
117 | }
118 | 
119 | .set-weight-infinity:hover {
120 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
121 | }
122 | 
123 | .edit-selected {
124 |   top: 75%;
125 |   left: 95%;
126 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
127 | }
128 | 
129 | .edit-selected:hover {
130 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
131 | }
132 | 
133 | /* For directed edges */
134 | .new-node-incoming {
135 |   top: 0;
136 |   left: 50%;
137 |   transform: translate(-110%, -50%);
138 | }
139 | 
140 | .new-node-incoming:hover {
141 |   transform: translate(-110%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
142 | }
143 | 
144 | .new-node-outgoing {
145 |   top: 0;
146 |   left: 50%;
147 |   transform: translate(10%, -50%);
148 | }
149 | 
150 | .new-node-outgoing:hover {
151 |   transform: translate(10%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
152 | }
153 | 
154 | .new-edge-incoming {
155 |   top: 100%;
156 |   left: 50%;
157 |   transform: translate(-110%, -50%);
158 | }
159 | 
160 | .new-edge-incoming:hover {
161 |   transform: translate(-110%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
162 | }
163 | 
164 | .new-edge-outgoing {
165 |   top: 100%;
166 |   left: 50%;
167 |   transform: translate(10%, -50%);
168 | }
169 | 
170 | .new-edge-outgoing:hover {
171 |   transform: translate(10%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
172 | }
173 | 
174 | /* For undirected edges */
175 | .new-node {
176 |   top: 0;
177 |   left: 50%;
178 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
179 | }
180 | 
181 | .new-node:hover {
182 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
183 | }
184 | 
185 | .new-edge {
186 |   top: 100%;
187 |   left: 50%;
188 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
189 | }
190 | 
191 | .new-edge:hover {
192 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2, 1.2);
193 | }
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/node-graph/node-graph.component.ts
```
1 | import { CdkDragEnd, CdkDragMove, CdkDragStart } from '@angular/cdk/drag-drop';
2 | import { ElementRef, OnDestroy, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { Component, Input, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { PositionDTO, GraphConfigurationDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
5 | import { IGraphNode } from '../models/GraphNode.interface';
6 | import { GraphTaskService } from '../services/graph-task.service';
7 | import { IGraphNewEdge } from '../models/GraphNewEdge.interface';
8 | import { Subscription } from 'rxjs';
9 | import { calculateShapeCenter } from '../utils';
10 | 
11 | @Component({
12 |   selector: 'app-node-graph',
13 |   templateUrl: './node-graph.component.html',
14 |   styleUrls: ['./node-graph.component.scss'],
15 | })
16 | export class NodeGraphComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
17 |   // #############################
18 |   // References for HTML Elements
19 |   @ViewChild('nodeValueInput') nodeValueInput!: ElementRef<HTMLInputElement>;
20 |   @ViewChild('nodeWeightInput') nodeWeightInput!: ElementRef<HTMLInputElement>;
21 | 
22 |   // #############################
23 |   // Inputs from parent component
24 |   @Input() node!: IGraphNode;
25 |   @Input() index!: number;
26 | 
27 |   // #############################
28 |   // Class properties
29 |   nodeZIndex: number;
30 |   displayNodeToolset: boolean;
31 |   editNodeValue: boolean;
32 |   editNodeWeight: boolean;
33 | 
34 |   private newEdgeSubscription!: Subscription;
35 |   private graphConfigurationSubscription!: Subscription;
36 | 
37 |   newEdge!: IGraphNewEdge;
38 |   graphConfiguration!: GraphConfigurationDTO;
39 | 
40 |   // #############################
41 |   // Constructor
42 |   constructor(private readonly graphTaskService: GraphTaskService) {
43 |     // Initalize properties
44 |     this.nodeZIndex = 1;
45 |     this.displayNodeToolset = false;
46 |     this.editNodeValue = false;
47 |     this.editNodeWeight = false;
48 |   }
49 | 
50 |   // #############################
51 |   // Lifecycle hook methods
52 |   ngOnInit(): void {
53 |     // Activate the input field for the node
54 |     this.activateEditNodeValueInput();
55 | 
56 |     // #############################
57 |     // Subscribe to Observables from the graphService
58 |     this.newEdgeSubscription = this.graphTaskService.getNewEdge().subscribe(newEdge => {
59 |       this.newEdge = newEdge;
60 |     });
61 | 
62 |     this.graphConfigurationSubscription = this.graphTaskService
63 |       .getGraphConfiguration()
64 |       .subscribe(graphConfiguration => {
65 |         this.graphConfiguration = graphConfiguration;
66 |       });
67 |   }
68 | 
69 |   ngOnDestroy(): void {
70 |     // #############################
71 |     // Unsubscribe from all subscriptions to prevent memory leaks
72 |     if (this.newEdgeSubscription) {
73 |       this.newEdgeSubscription.unsubscribe();
74 |     }
75 |     if (this.graphConfigurationSubscription) {
76 |       this.graphConfigurationSubscription.unsubscribe();
77 |     }
78 |   }
79 | 
80 |   // #############################
81 |   // Functions for interactions with node
82 |   onNodeDoubleClick() {
83 |     this.activateEditNodeValueInput();
84 |   }
85 | 
86 |   onNodeWeightDoubleClick(event: MouseEvent) {
87 |     event.stopPropagation();
88 |     this.activateEditNodeWeightInput();
89 |   }
90 | 
91 |   onNodeSelectedDoubleClick(event: MouseEvent) {
92 |     event.stopPropagation();
93 |     this.updateNodeSelected();
94 |   }
95 | 
96 |   onFieldHover(event: any) {
97 |     // Activate the toolset for the node and adjust z index
98 |     this.displayNodeToolset = true;
99 |     this.nodeZIndex = 10;
100 |   }
101 | 
102 |   onFieldLeave(event: any) {
103 |     // Deactivate the toolset for the node and adjust z index
104 |     this.displayNodeToolset = false;
105 |     this.nodeZIndex = 1;
106 |   }
107 | 
108 |   onClick(event: MouseEvent) {
109 |     event.stopPropagation(); // so that the click event is not propagated to the workspace
110 |     // Workspace click event is used to cancel the new edge creation
111 |   }
112 | 
113 |   // Drag start
114 |   nodeOnDragStart(event: CdkDragStart) {}
115 | 
116 |   // Drag end
117 |   nodeOnDragEnd(event: CdkDragEnd) {}
118 | 
119 |   // Drag move
120 |   nodeOnDragMove(event: CdkDragMove) {
121 |     // Update node data (position, center)
122 |     this.node.position.x = event.source.getFreeDragPosition().x;
123 |     this.node.position.y = event.source.getFreeDragPosition().y;
124 |     this.node.center = calculateShapeCenter(this.node.position, this.node.size);
125 |   }
126 | 
127 |   // #############################
128 |   // Functions for interactions with node toolset
129 |   onNewNodeClick(event: any, isIncoming: boolean | null = null) {
130 |     if (this.graphConfiguration.edgeDirected && isIncoming === null) {
131 |       throw new Error('The edges must be undirected');
132 |     }
133 | 
134 |     // TODO: Size is not being configured here, instead the default value in the service (100, 100) is being used
135 | 
136 |     const position: PositionDTO = {
137 |       x: this.node.position.x + 130,
138 |       y: this.node.position.y + 130,
139 |     };
140 | 
141 |     // Add the node
142 |     const newNode = this.graphTaskService.addNode({ position });
143 | 
144 |     // Add the edge between this node and new generated
145 |     if (isIncoming) {
146 |       // from newNode to this.node
147 |       this.graphTaskService.addEdge(newNode, this.node);
148 |     } else {
149 |       // from this.node to newNode
150 |       this.graphTaskService.addEdge(this.node, newNode);
151 |     }
152 |   }
153 | 
154 |   onConnectNodeDirectedClick(event: MouseEvent, isIncoming: boolean) {
155 |     // First node selection
156 |     if (this.newEdge.started === false) {
157 |       this.graphTaskService.updateNewEdge({ started: true });
158 | 
159 |       // Incoming edge - ends at current node
160 |       if (isIncoming) {
161 |         this.graphTaskService.updateNewEdge({ node2: this.node });
162 |       }
163 | 
164 |       // Outgoing edge - originates from current node
165 |       else {
166 |         // Check if the child role is provided
167 |         this.graphTaskService.updateNewEdge({ node1: this.node });
168 |       }
169 |     }
170 | 
171 |     // Second node selection
172 |     else {
173 |       // TODO: Can an edge points to two nodes at the same time or should be another edge created for this?
174 |       // Check if the edge already points to another node
175 |       if (isIncoming && this.newEdge.node2 !== null) {
176 |         throw new Error('The Edge already points to another node.');
177 |       }
178 | 
179 |       // Check if the edge already originates from another node
180 |       if (!isIncoming && this.newEdge.node1 !== null) {
181 |         throw new Error('The Edge already originates from another node.');
182 |       }
183 | 
184 |       // Incoming edge - ends at current node
185 |       if (isIncoming) {
186 |         this.graphTaskService.updateNewEdge({ node2: this.node });
187 |       }
188 | 
189 |       // Outgoing edge - originates from current node
190 |       else {
191 |         // Check if the child role is provided
192 |         this.graphTaskService.updateNewEdge({ node1: this.node });
193 |       }
194 | 
195 |       // Add new edge
196 |       try {
197 |         if (this.newEdge.node1 !== null && this.newEdge.node2 !== null) {
198 |           this.graphTaskService.addEdge(
199 |             this.newEdge.node1,
200 |             this.newEdge.node2,
201 |             this.newEdge.weight,
202 |           );
203 |         }
204 |       } catch (err) {
205 |         console.error(err);
206 |       }
207 | 
208 |       // Reset new link for future use
209 |       this.graphTaskService.resetNewEdge();
210 |     }
211 |   }
212 | 
213 |   onConnectNodeUndirectedClick(event: MouseEvent) {
214 |     // First node selection
215 |     if (this.newEdge.started === false) {
216 |       this.graphTaskService.updateNewEdge({ started: true, node1: this.node });
217 |     }
218 |     // Second node selection
219 |     else {
220 |       this.graphTaskService.updateNewEdge({ node2: this.node });
221 | 
222 |       // Add new edge
223 |       try {
224 |         if (this.newEdge.node1 !== null && this.newEdge.node2 !== null) {
225 |           this.graphTaskService.addEdge(
226 |             this.newEdge.node1,
227 |             this.newEdge.node2,
228 |             this.newEdge.weight,
229 |           );
230 |         }
231 |       } catch (err) {
232 |         console.error(err);
233 |       }
234 | 
235 |       // Reset new link for future use
236 |       this.graphTaskService.resetNewEdge();
237 |     }
238 |   }
239 | 
240 |   onDeleteNodeClick(event: any) {
241 |     this.graphTaskService.removeNode(this.node);
242 |   }
243 | 
244 |   activateEditNodeValueInput() {
245 |     this.editNodeValue = true;
246 | 
247 |     // Ensure that the input element is mounted
248 |     setTimeout(() => {
249 |       this.nodeValueInput.nativeElement.focus();
250 |     }, 0);
251 |   }
252 | 
253 |   activateEditNodeWeightInput() {
254 |     this.editNodeWeight = true;
255 |     if (this.node.weight.value === Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER) {
256 |       this.node.weight.value = null;
257 |     }
258 | 
259 |     // Ensure that the input element is mounted
260 |     setTimeout(() => {
261 |       this.nodeWeightInput.nativeElement.focus();
262 |     }, 0);
263 |   }
264 | 
265 |   updateNodeValue(event: any) {
266 |     const newValue = event.target.value;
267 |     this.graphTaskService.updateNode(this.node, { value: newValue });
268 |   }
269 | 
270 |   updateNodeWeight(event: any) {
271 |     let intValue = Number(event.target.value);
272 |     intValue = isNaN(intValue) ? 0 : intValue;
273 | 
274 |     this.graphTaskService.updateNode(this.node, { weight: { enabled: true, value: intValue } });
275 |   }
276 | 
277 |   updateNodeSelected() {
278 |     if (this.node.selected.value !== null) {
279 |       const current: boolean = this.node.selected.value;
280 |       this.graphTaskService.updateNode(this.node, { selected: { enabled: true, value: !current } });
281 |     }
282 |   }
283 | 
284 |   setWeightInfinity(): void {
285 |     this.node.weight.value = Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;
286 |     this.editNodeWeight = false;
287 |   }
288 | 
289 |   getWeightDisplayValue(): string | number {
290 |     const intValue = Number(this.node.weight.value);
291 |     const weightValue = isNaN(intValue) ? 0 : intValue;
292 | 
293 |     return weightValue === Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER ? '∞' : weightValue;
294 |   }
295 | }
```

1 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
2 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
5 | 
6 | @Injectable({
7 |   providedIn: 'root',
8 | })
9 | export class AiFeedbackService {
10 |   graphAIFeedbackUrl = environment.server + '/graph-ai-feedback';
11 | 
12 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
13 | 
14 |   generateGraphAIFeedback(
15 |     userAnswerId: number,
16 |   ): Observable<{ feedback: string; feedbackId: number }> {
17 |     return this.http.post<{ feedback: string; feedbackId: number }>(this.graphAIFeedbackUrl, {
18 |       userAnswerId,
19 |     });
20 |   }
21 | 
22 |   rateGraphAIFeedback(feedbackId: number, rating: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5): Observable<void> {
23 |     return this.http.patch<void>(`${this.graphAIFeedbackUrl}/${feedbackId}`, { rating });
24 |   }
25 | }

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/services/graph-task.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
3 | import { BehaviorSubject } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { IGraphNode } from '../models/GraphNode.interface';
5 | import { IGraphEdge } from '../models/GraphEdge.interface';
6 | import { IGraphNewEdge } from '../models/GraphNewEdge.interface';
7 | import {
8 |   GraphConfigurationDTO,
9 |   GraphNodeDTO,
10 |   GraphEdgeDTO,
11 |   GraphStructureSemanticDTO,
12 | } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
13 | import { calculateShapeCenter, downloadJSON, graphToSemantic } from '../utils';
14 | 
15 | @Injectable({
16 |   providedIn: 'root',
17 | })
18 | export class GraphTaskService {
19 |   private readonly graphConfiguration$!: BehaviorSubject<GraphConfigurationDTO>;
20 |   private readonly nodes$!: BehaviorSubject<IGraphNode[]>;
21 |   private readonly edges$!: BehaviorSubject<IGraphEdge[]>;
22 |   private readonly newEdge$!: BehaviorSubject<IGraphNewEdge>;
23 |   private idCounter!: number;
24 | 
25 |   constructor() {
26 |     // ##############
27 |     // Initialize
28 |     this.graphConfiguration$ = new BehaviorSubject<GraphConfigurationDTO>({
29 |       nodeWeight: true,
30 |       nodeSelected: true,
31 |       nodeSelectedText: { selected: '', unselected: '' },
32 |       edgeWeight: true,
33 |       edgeDirected: true,
34 |     });
35 |     this.nodes$ = new BehaviorSubject<IGraphNode[]>([]);
36 |     this.edges$ = new BehaviorSubject<IGraphEdge[]>([]);
37 |     this.newEdge$ = new BehaviorSubject<IGraphNewEdge>({
38 |       started: false,
39 |       node1: null,
40 |       node2: null,
41 |       weight: 0,
42 |     });
43 |     this.idCounter = 0;
44 |   }
45 | 
46 |   // ###########
47 |   // Getters
48 |   getGraphConfiguration(): Observable<GraphConfigurationDTO> {
49 |     return this.graphConfiguration$;
50 |   }
51 | 
52 |   getNodes(): Observable<IGraphNode[]> {
53 |     return this.nodes$;
54 |   }
55 | 
56 |   getEdges(): Observable<IGraphEdge[]> {
57 |     return this.edges$;
58 |   }
59 | 
60 |   getNewEdge(): Observable<IGraphNewEdge> {
61 |     return this.newEdge$;
62 |   }
63 | 
64 |   // ###########
65 |   // Update
66 |   configureGraph(graphConfiguration: GraphConfigurationDTO) {
67 |     this.graphConfiguration$.next(graphConfiguration);
68 |   }
69 | 
70 |   setNodes(nodes: IGraphNode[]) {
71 |     this.nodes$.next(nodes);
72 |   }
73 | 
74 |   setEdges(edges: IGraphEdge[]) {
75 |     this.edges$.next(edges);
76 |   }
77 | 
78 |   resetGraph() {
79 |     this.nodes$.next([]);
80 |     this.edges$.next([]);
81 |     this.resetNewEdge();
82 |     this.idCounter = 0;
83 |   }
84 | 
85 |   addNode(newNodeAttributes: Partial<IGraphNode>): IGraphNode {
86 |     // Destructure the attributes and assign default values if they are undefined
87 |     let {
88 |       nodeId = null,
89 |       value = '',
90 |       selected = null,
91 |       weight = null,
92 |       position = { x: 0, y: 0 },
93 |       size = { width: 100, height: 100 }, // TODO:
94 |     } = newNodeAttributes;
95 | 
96 |     // Adjust the properties according to the graphConfiguration
97 |     if (this.graphConfiguration$.getValue().nodeWeight) {
98 |       weight = { enabled: true, value: weight?.value || 0 };
99 |     } else {
100 |       weight = { enabled: false, value: null };
101 |     }
102 | 
103 |     if (this.graphConfiguration$.getValue().nodeSelected) {
104 |       selected = { enabled: true, value: selected?.value || false };
105 |     } else {
106 |       selected = { enabled: false, value: null };
107 |     }
108 | 
109 |     // Check if nodeId is provided
110 |     // graphFromJson: nodeId as parameter
111 |     // via UI: nodeId = idCounter
112 |     if (nodeId === null) {
113 |       nodeId = this.idCounter;
114 | 
115 |       // Increment id counter for the next nodes
116 |       this.idCounter += 1;
117 |     } else {
118 |       this.idCounter = nodeId + 1;
119 |     }
120 | 
121 |     // TODO: Check if the value is unique
122 | 
123 |     // Generate new node
124 |     const newNode: IGraphNode = {
125 |       nodeId: nodeId,
126 |       value: value,
127 |       selected: selected,
128 |       weight: weight,
129 |       position: position,
130 |       size: size,
131 |       center: calculateShapeCenter(position, size),
132 |     };
133 | 
134 |     // TODO: Can different nodes have same value?
135 | 
136 |     // Add node to the list of nodes
137 |     this.nodes$.next([...this.nodes$.getValue(), newNode]);
138 | 
139 |     // Return newNode, because it is required to addEdge
140 |     // TODO: Can this be done in a different way?
141 |     return newNode;
142 |   }
143 | 
144 |   addEdge(node1: IGraphNode, node2: IGraphNode, weightValue: number | null = null): void {
145 |     // For directed graphs:
146 |     // Check if an edge already exist which originates from the same node and points to the same node as the new edge
147 |     // For undirected graphs:
148 |     // Check if an edge already exist which aconnects these two nodes
149 |     // TODO: Is this allowed, or must it be prevented?
150 |     this.edges$.getValue().forEach(existingEdge => {
151 |       if (
152 |         this.graphConfiguration$.getValue().edgeDirected &&
153 |         existingEdge.node1 === node1 &&
154 |         existingEdge.node2 === node2
155 |       ) {
156 |         throw new Error(
157 |           'These two nodes already are connected with an edge in the same direction.',
158 |         );
159 |       }
160 |       if (
161 |         !this.graphConfiguration$.getValue().edgeDirected &&
162 |         ((existingEdge.node1 === node1 && existingEdge.node2 === node2) ||
163 |           (existingEdge.node2 === node1 && existingEdge.node1 === node2))
164 |       ) {
165 |         throw new Error('These two nodes already are connected with an edge.');
166 |       }
167 |     });
168 | 
169 |     // Adjust the properties according to the graphConfiguration
170 |     // TODO: use pre-defined type instead defining the type here
171 |     let weight: { enabled: boolean; value: number | null };
172 |     if (this.graphConfiguration$.getValue().edgeWeight) {
173 |       weight = { enabled: true, value: weightValue || 0 };
174 |     } else {
175 |       weight = { enabled: false, value: null };
176 |     }
177 | 
178 |     // Generate new edge
179 |     const newEdge: IGraphEdge = {
180 |       node1,
181 |       node2,
182 |       weight,
183 |       directed: this.graphConfiguration$.getValue().edgeDirected,
184 |     };
185 | 
186 |     // Add edge to the list of edges
187 |     this.edges$.next([...this.edges$.getValue(), newEdge]);
188 |   }
189 | 
190 |   removeNode(node: IGraphNode): void {
191 |     // get the nodes and edges as list
192 |     const nodesList = this.nodes$.getValue();
193 |     const edgesList = this.edges$.getValue();
194 | 
195 |     // Check if the node is in the list of nodes, and
196 |     // Find the index of the node if it is in the list
197 |     const indexOfNode = nodesList.indexOf(node);
198 |     if (indexOfNode === -1) {
199 |       throw new Error('Node not found.');
200 |     }
201 | 
202 |     // Remove edges containing the node
203 |     const updatedEdges = edgesList.filter(edge => edge.node1 !== node && edge.node2 !== node);
204 |     this.edges$.next(updatedEdges);
205 | 
206 |     // Remove the node
207 |     nodesList.splice(indexOfNode, 1);
208 |     this.nodes$.next(nodesList);
209 |   }
210 | 
211 |   removeEdge(edge: IGraphEdge): void {
212 |     // get the edges as list
213 |     const edgesList = this.edges$.getValue();
214 | 
215 |     // Check if the edge is in the list of edges, and
216 |     // Find the index of the edge if it is in the list
217 |     const indexOfEdge = edgesList.indexOf(edge);
218 |     if (indexOfEdge === -1) {
219 |       throw new Error('Edge not found');
220 |     }
221 | 
222 |     // Remove the edge
223 |     edgesList.splice(indexOfEdge, 1);
224 |     this.edges$.next(edgesList);
225 |   }
226 | 
227 |   updateNode(node: IGraphNode, newValues: Partial<IGraphNode>) {
228 |     const {
229 |       value = null,
230 |       selected = null,
231 |       weight, // TODO: just adjusted to be undefined if no value is assigned to be able to assign null value but this not consistent
232 |       position = null,
233 |     } = newValues;
234 | 
235 |     if (value !== null) {
236 |       // TODO: Check if the value is unique
237 |       node.value = value;
238 |     }
239 | 
240 |     // TODO: update also the attributes selected and weight
241 | 
242 |     if (position !== null) {
243 |       node.position = position;
244 |     }
245 | 
246 |     // TODO: just adjusted to be undefined if no value is assigned to be able to assign null value but this not consistent
247 |     if (weight !== undefined) {
248 |       node.weight.value = weight.value;
249 |     }
250 | 
251 |     if (selected !== null) {
252 |       node.selected.value = selected.value;
253 |     }
254 | 
255 |     // TODO: if i replace the object in the list with a new object, how will this effect the edges etc. ???
256 |     // for subscribers // TODO: is this required?
257 |     this.nodes$.next(this.nodes$.getValue());
258 |   }
259 | 
260 |   changeEdgeDirection(edge: IGraphEdge) {
261 |     // get the edges as list
262 |     const edgesList = this.edges$.getValue();
263 | 
264 |     // Check if the edges are directed according to graphConfiguration
265 |     if (!this.graphConfiguration$.getValue().edgeDirected) {
266 |       throw new Error('The edge is not directed.');
267 |     }
268 | 
269 |     // Check if there is already an edge which starts at edge.node2 and ends at edge.node1
270 |     const hasOppositeEdge = edgesList.some(
271 |       existingEdge => existingEdge.node1 === edge.node2 && existingEdge.node2 === edge.node1,
272 |     );
273 | 
274 |     if (hasOppositeEdge) {
275 |       throw new Error(
276 |         'There is already an edge which connects these nodes in the opposite direction.',
277 |       );
278 |     }
279 | 
280 |     // Get the nodes from the edge
281 |     const newNode2 = edge.node1;
282 |     const newNode1 = edge.node2;
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/utils/index.ts
```
1 | import { IGraphStructure } from '../models/GraphStructure.interface';
2 | import { IGraphEdge } from '../models/GraphEdge.interface';
3 | import { IGraphNode } from '../models/GraphNode.interface';
4 | import {
5 |   PositionDTO,
6 |   SizeDTO,
7 |   GraphNodeSemanticDTO,
8 |   GraphNodeDTO,
9 |   GraphEdgeSemanticDTO,
10 |   GraphEdgeDTO,
11 |   GraphStructureSemanticDTO,
12 |   GraphStructureDTO,
13 | } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
14 | 
15 | export function structuresAreEqual(
16 |   structure1: GraphStructureDTO,
17 |   structure2: GraphStructureDTO,
18 | ): boolean {
19 |   if (structure1.nodes.length !== structure2.nodes.length) {
20 |     return false;
21 |   }
22 | 
23 |   if (structure1.edges.length !== structure2.edges.length) {
24 |     return false;
25 |   }
26 | 
27 |   for (let i = 0; i < structure1.nodes.length; i++) {
28 |     const sameNode = structure2.nodes.find(
29 |       node =>
30 |         node.nodeId === structure1.nodes[i].nodeId && node.value === structure1.nodes[i].value,
31 |     );
32 | 
33 |     if (!sameNode) {
34 |       return false;
35 |     }
36 | 
37 |     if (structure1.nodes[i].value !== sameNode.value) {
38 |       return false;
39 |     }
40 |     if (structure1.nodes[i].weight !== sameNode.weight) {
41 |       return false;
42 |     }
43 |     if (structure1.nodes[i].selected !== sameNode.selected) {
44 |       return false;
45 |     }
46 |     if (structure1.nodes[i].position.x !== sameNode.position.x) {
47 |       return false;
48 |     }
49 |     if (structure1.nodes[i].position.y !== sameNode.position.y) {
50 |       return false;
51 |     }
52 |     if (structure1.nodes[i].nodeId !== sameNode.nodeId) {
53 |       return false;
54 |     }
55 |     if (structure1.nodes[i].size.width !== sameNode.size.width) {
56 |       return false;
57 |     }
58 |     if (structure1.nodes[i].size.height !== sameNode.size.height) {
59 |       return false;
60 |     }
61 |     if (structure1.nodes[i].center.x !== sameNode.center.x) {
62 |       return false;
63 |     }
64 |     if (structure1.nodes[i].center.y !== sameNode.center.y) {
65 |       return false;
66 |     }
67 |   }
68 | 
69 |   const structure1Semantic: GraphStructureSemanticDTO = graphJSONToSemantic(structure1);
70 |   const structure2Semantic: GraphStructureSemanticDTO = graphJSONToSemantic(structure1);
71 | 
72 |   for (let i = 0; i < structure1Semantic.edges.length; i++) {
73 |     const sameEdge = structure2Semantic.edges.find(
74 |       edge =>
75 |         edge.node1Value === structure1Semantic.edges[i].node1Value &&
76 |         edge.node2Value === structure1Semantic.edges[i].node2Value,
77 |     );
78 | 
79 |     if (!sameEdge) {
80 |       return false;
81 |     }
82 | 
83 |     if (sameEdge.weight !== structure1Semantic.edges[i].weight) {
84 |       return false;
85 |     }
86 |   }
87 | 
88 |   return true;
89 | }
90 | 
91 | export function calculateShapeCenter(position: PositionDTO, size: SizeDTO): PositionDTO {
92 |   const center: PositionDTO = {
93 |     x: position.x + size.width / 2,
94 |     y: position.y + size.height / 2,
95 |   };
96 |   return center;
97 | }
98 | 
99 | export function calculateLineCenter(
100 |   from: PositionDTO,
101 |   to: PositionDTO,
102 |   size: SizeDTO,
103 |   align: 0 | 1 | 2,
104 | ): PositionDTO {
105 |   let x = (from.x + to.x - size.width) / 2;
106 |   let y = (from.y + to.y - size.height) / 2;
107 | 
108 |   if (align === 0) {
109 |     return { x, y };
110 |   }
111 | 
112 |   // Calculate the perpendicular shift vector
113 |   // Calculate the difference between node centers
114 |   const diffX = to.x - from.x;
115 |   const diffY = to.y - from.y;
116 | 
117 |   // Calculate the perpendicular vector
118 |   const perpendicularX = -diffY;
119 |   const perpendicularY = diffX;
120 | 
121 |   // Normalize the perpendicular vector
122 |   const perpendicularDistance = Math.sqrt(
123 |     perpendicularX * perpendicularX + perpendicularY * perpendicularY,
124 |   );
125 |   const normPerpendicularX = perpendicularX / perpendicularDistance;
126 |   const normPerpendicularY = perpendicularY / perpendicularDistance;
127 | 
128 |   // If align is 1 or 2, adjust the start point perpendicularly
129 |   const perpendicularShift = 20; // Adjust this value to control spacing
130 |   x += normPerpendicularX * perpendicularShift;
131 |   y += normPerpendicularY * perpendicularShift;
132 | 
133 |   return { x, y };
134 | }
135 | 
136 | export function calculateEdgeStart(
137 |   from: IGraphNode,
138 |   to: IGraphNode,
139 |   align: 0 | 1 | 2,
140 | ): PositionDTO {
141 |   // Calculate the distance between the center of two nodes
142 |   const diffX = to.center.x - from.center.x;
143 |   const diffY = to.center.y - from.center.y;
144 |   const distance = Math.sqrt(diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY);
145 | 
146 |   // Handle edge case where the distance is zero to avoid division by zero
147 |   if (distance === 0) {
148 |     return from.center;
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   // Calculate the distance to the boundary so that the edge start is visible
152 |   let distanceToBoundary;
153 |   if (Math.abs(diffX) > Math.abs(diffY)) {
154 |     distanceToBoundary = from.size.width / 2;
155 |   } else {
156 |     distanceToBoundary = from.size.height / 2;
157 |   }
158 | 
159 |   // Add 20 units to the boundary distance to extend the edge outside the node
160 |   const extendedDistance = distanceToBoundary + 10;
161 | 
162 |   // Return the position for the start of the edge
163 |   let x = from.center.x + (diffX * extendedDistance) / distance;
164 |   let y = from.center.y + (diffY * extendedDistance) / distance;
165 | 
166 |   // Calculate the perpendicular shift vector
167 |   const { normPerpendicularX, normPerpendicularY } = calculatePerpendicularVector(from, to);
168 | 
169 |   // If align is 1 or 2, adjust the start point perpendicularly
170 |   if (align !== 0) {
171 |     const perpendicularShift = 20; // Adjust this value to control spacing
172 |     x += normPerpendicularX * perpendicularShift;
173 |     y += normPerpendicularY * perpendicularShift;
174 |   }
175 | 
176 |   return { x, y };
177 | }
178 | 
179 | export function calculateEdgeEnd(from: IGraphNode, to: IGraphNode, align: 0 | 1 | 2) {
180 |   // Calculate the distance between the center of two nodes
181 |   const diffX = from.center.x - to.center.x;
182 |   const diffY = from.center.y - to.center.y;
183 |   const distance = Math.sqrt(diffX * diffX + diffY * diffY);
184 | 
185 |   // Handle edge case where the distance is zero to avoid division by zero
186 |   if (distance === 0) {
187 |     return to.center;
188 |   }
189 | 
190 |   // Calculate the distance to the boundary so that the arrow head is visible
191 |   let distanceToBoundary;
192 |   if (Math.abs(diffX) > Math.abs(diffY)) {
193 |     distanceToBoundary = to.size.width / 2;
194 |   } else {
195 |     distanceToBoundary = to.size.height / 2;
196 |   }
197 | 
198 |   // Add 20 units to the boundary distance to extend the edge outside the node
199 |   const extendedDistance = distanceToBoundary + 10;
200 | 
201 |   // Return the position for the end of the edge
202 |   let x = to.center.x + (diffX * extendedDistance) / distance;
203 |   let y = to.center.y + (diffY * extendedDistance) / distance;
204 | 
205 |   // Calculate the perpendicular shift vector
206 |   const { normPerpendicularX, normPerpendicularY } = calculatePerpendicularVector(from, to);
207 | 
208 |   // If align is 1 or 2, adjust the end point perpendicularly
209 |   if (align !== 0) {
210 |     const perpendicularShift = 20; // Adjust this value to control spacing
211 |     x += normPerpendicularX * perpendicularShift;
212 |     y += normPerpendicularY * perpendicularShift;
213 |   }
214 | 
215 |   return { x, y };
216 | }
217 | 
218 | function calculatePerpendicularVector(from: IGraphNode, to: IGraphNode) {
219 |   // Calculate the difference between node centers
220 |   const diffX = to.center.x - from.center.x;
221 |   const diffY = to.center.y - from.center.y;
222 | 
223 |   // Calculate the perpendicular vector
224 |   const perpendicularX = -diffY;
225 |   const perpendicularY = diffX;
226 | 
227 |   // Normalize the perpendicular vector
228 |   const perpendicularDistance = Math.sqrt(
229 |     perpendicularX * perpendicularX + perpendicularY * perpendicularY,
230 |   );
231 |   const normPerpendicularX = perpendicularX / perpendicularDistance;
232 |   const normPerpendicularY = perpendicularY / perpendicularDistance;
233 | 
234 |   return { normPerpendicularX, normPerpendicularY };
235 | }
236 | 
237 | export function calculateArrowPoints(from: IGraphNode, to: IGraphNode, align: 0 | 1 | 2) {
238 |   // Specify where the arrowhead starts and ends
239 |   let start: PositionDTO;
240 |   let end: PositionDTO;
241 |   if (from === to) {
242 |     // connects the node with itself
243 |     const xOffset = 30;
244 |     const yOffset = -10;
245 |     start = { x: from.position.x + xOffset, y: from.position.y - 100 }; // -100 is not important it is just to specify the direction
246 |     end = { x: from.position.x + xOffset, y: from.position.y + yOffset };
247 |   } else {
248 |     start = from.center; // to specify the direction of the startpoint
249 |     end = calculateEdgeEnd(from, to, align);
250 |   }
251 | 
252 |   // Size of the arrowhead
253 |   const arrowSize = 15;
254 | 
255 |   // Angle of the edgeline
256 |   const angle = Math.atan2(end.y - start.y, end.x - start.x);
257 | 
258 |   // Points for the triangle (arrowhead)
[TRUNCATED]
```

1 | /**
2 |  * Modelle für Code-Submission und Feedback im tutor-kai Modul
3 |  */
4 | 
5 | export interface TestResult {
6 |   name: string;
7 |   passed: boolean;
8 |   exception?: string;
9 | }
10 | 
11 | export interface CodeSubmissionResult {
12 |   CodeSubmissionResult: {
13 |     output: string | null;
14 |     score: number;
15 |     testResults?: TestResult[];
16 |     testsPassed?: boolean;
17 |   };
18 |   encryptedCodeSubissionId: string;
19 | }
20 | 
21 | // Entspricht dem DTO auf der Server-Seite
22 | export type CodeSubmissionResultDto = CodeSubmissionResult;
23 | 
24 | export enum FeedbackLevel {
25 |   LOW = 'Wenig Unterstützung',
26 |   STANDARD = 'Standard Unterstützung',
27 |   HIGH = 'Viel Unterstützung',
28 | }
29 | 
30 | export enum FlavorType {
31 |   STANDARD = 'Standard Feedback',
32 |   CONCEPT = 'Feedback mit Konzept-Erklärung',
33 | }
34 | 
35 | export enum WorkspaceState {
36 |   START = 'start',
37 |   EDITING_CODE = 'editingCode',
38 |   SUBMITTED_CODE = 'submittedCode',
39 |   GENERATING_FEEDBACK = 'generatingFeedback',
40 |   RECEIVING_FEEDBACK = 'receivingFeedback',
41 |   FINISHED_FEEDBACK = 'finishedFeedback',
42 |   FEEDBACK_RATED = 'feedbackRated',
43 | }
44 | 
45 | export interface FeedbackRating {
46 |   rating: number;
47 |   comment: string;
48 |   submissionId: string;
49 | }
50 | 
51 | // Removed unused FeedbackCategory, FeedbackQuestion interfaces and FEEDBACK_CATEGORIES constant
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/services/file-system.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { BehaviorSubject, Observable } from 'rxjs';
3 | import { QuestionDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
4 | 
5 | /**
6 |  * Schnittstelle für eine Datei im Dateisystem
7 |  */
8 | export interface EditorFile {
9 |   id: string;
10 |   name: string;
11 |   path: string;
12 |   language: string;
13 |   content: string;
14 |   isActive: boolean;
15 |   isReadOnly?: boolean;
16 |   isModified?: boolean;
17 | }
18 | 
19 | /**
20 |  * Schnittstelle für einen Ordner im Dateisystem
21 |  */
22 | export interface EditorFolder {
23 |   id: string;
24 |   name: string;
25 |   path: string;
26 |   isExpanded?: boolean;
27 |   children: (EditorFile | EditorFolder)[];
28 | }
29 | 
30 | /**
31 |  * Typ für Dateisystemelemente (Datei oder Ordner)
32 |  */
33 | export type FileSystemItem = EditorFile | EditorFolder;
34 | 
35 | /**
36 |  * Service zur Verwaltung des virtuellen Dateisystems für den Code-Editor
37 |  */
38 | @Injectable({
39 |   providedIn: 'root',
40 | })
41 | export class FileSystemService {
42 |   // Subjects für die reaktive Verarbeitung
43 |   private readonly filesSubject = new BehaviorSubject<EditorFile[]>([]);
44 |   private readonly activeFileSubject = new BehaviorSubject<EditorFile | null>(null);
45 |   private readonly fileTreeSubject = new BehaviorSubject<FileSystemItem[]>([]);
46 |   private readonly projectRootSubject = new BehaviorSubject<string>('');
47 |   private readonly openTabsSubject = new BehaviorSubject<EditorFile[]>([]);
48 | 
49 |   // Observables für die Komponenten
50 |   readonly files$ = this.filesSubject.asObservable();
51 |   readonly activeFile$ = this.activeFileSubject.asObservable();
52 |   readonly fileTree$ = this.fileTreeSubject.asObservable();
53 |   readonly projectRoot$ = this.projectRootSubject.asObservable();
54 |   readonly openTabs$ = this.openTabsSubject.asObservable();
55 | 
56 |   constructor() {}
57 | 
58 |   /**
59 |    * Initialisiert das Dateisystem mit Dateien aus einer Aufgabe
60 |    */
61 |   initializeFromTask(task: QuestionDTO | null): void {
62 |     if (!task?.codingQuestion?.codeGerueste) {
63 |       this.reset();
64 |       return;
65 |     }
66 | 
67 |     const projectName = `Aufgabe_${task.id}`;
68 |     this.projectRootSubject.next(projectName);
69 | 
70 |     const files: EditorFile[] = [];
71 |     const fileSystemItems: FileSystemItem[] = [];
72 | 
73 |     // Einfache Ordnerstruktur erstellen
74 |     const mainFolder: EditorFolder = {
75 |       id: 'src',
76 |       name: 'src',
77 |       path: `${projectName}/src`,
78 |       isExpanded: true,
79 |       children: [],
80 |     };
81 | 
82 |     fileSystemItems.push(mainFolder);
83 | 
84 |     // Dateien aus der Aufgabe konvertieren
85 |     task.codingQuestion.codeGerueste.forEach((fileData, index) => {
86 |       const language = this.detectLanguage(fileData.codeFileName);
87 |       const file: EditorFile = {
88 |         id: `file_${index}`,
89 |         name: fileData.codeFileName,
90 |         path: `${projectName}/src/${fileData.codeFileName}`,
91 |         language: language,
92 |         content: fileData.code,
93 |         isActive: index === 0, // Erste Datei ist aktiv
94 |         isModified: false,
95 |       };
96 | 
97 |       files.push(file);
98 |       mainFolder.children.push(file);
99 |     });
100 | 
101 |     // Wenn keine Dateien vorhanden, eine leere Standarddatei einfügen
102 |     if (files.length === 0) {
103 |       const language = task.codingQuestion.programmingLanguage || 'python';
104 |       const defaultFileName = this.getDefaultFileName(language);
105 | 
106 |       const defaultFile: EditorFile = {
107 |         id: 'file_default',
108 |         name: defaultFileName,
109 |         path: `${projectName}/src/${defaultFileName}`,
110 |         language: language,
111 |         content: '',
112 |         isActive: true,
113 |         isModified: false,
114 |       };
115 | 
116 |       files.push(defaultFile);
117 |       mainFolder.children.push(defaultFile);
118 |     }
119 | 
120 |     this.filesSubject.next(files);
121 |     this.fileTreeSubject.next(fileSystemItems);
122 | 
123 |     // Alle Dateien als Tabs öffnen (in realen VS Code würde nur die erste geöffnet)
124 |     this.openTabsSubject.next(files);
125 |     this.activeFileSubject.next(files.find(f => f.isActive) || null);
126 |   }
127 | 
128 |   /**
129 |    * Setzt das Dateisystem zurück
130 |    */
131 |   reset(): void {
132 |     this.filesSubject.next([]);
133 |     this.activeFileSubject.next(null);
134 |     this.fileTreeSubject.next([]);
135 |     this.projectRootSubject.next('');
136 |     this.openTabsSubject.next([]);
137 |   }
138 | 
139 |   /**
140 |    * Aktualisiert den Inhalt einer Datei
141 |    */
142 |   updateFileContent(fileId: string, content: string): void {
143 |     const currentFiles = this.filesSubject.value;
144 |     const updatedFiles = currentFiles.map(file => {
145 |       if (file.id === fileId) {
146 |         return { ...file, content, isModified: true };
147 |       }
148 |       return file;
149 |     });
150 | 
151 |     this.filesSubject.next(updatedFiles);
152 | 
153 |     // Wenn die aktive Datei aktualisiert wurde, aktualisiere auch diese
154 |     const activeFile = this.activeFileSubject.value;
155 |     if (activeFile && activeFile.id === fileId) {
156 |       this.activeFileSubject.next({
157 |         ...activeFile,
158 |         content,
159 |         isModified: true,
160 |       });
161 |     }
162 | 
163 |     // Aktualisiere die Datei auch im Dateibaum
164 |     this.updateFileInTree(fileId, content);
165 |   }
166 | 
167 |   /**
168 |    * Aktualisiert eine Datei im Dateibaum
169 |    */
170 |   private updateFileInTree(fileId: string, content: string): void {
171 |     const updateItemInTree = (items: FileSystemItem[]): FileSystemItem[] => {
172 |       return items.map(item => {
173 |         if ('children' in item) {
174 |           // Es ist ein Ordner
175 |           return {
176 |             ...item,
177 |             children: updateItemInTree(item.children),
178 |           };
179 |         } else if (item.id === fileId) {
180 |           // Es ist die gesuchte Datei
181 |           return {
182 |             ...item,
183 |             content,
184 |             isModified: true,
185 |           };
186 |         }
187 |         return item;
188 |       });
189 |     };
190 | 
191 |     const updatedTree = updateItemInTree(this.fileTreeSubject.value);
192 |     this.fileTreeSubject.next(updatedTree);
193 |   }
194 | 
195 |   /**
196 |    * Setzt die aktive Datei
197 |    */
198 |   setActiveFile(fileId: string): void {
199 |     const currentFiles = this.filesSubject.value;
200 |     const currentTabs = this.openTabsSubject.value;
201 | 
202 |     // Aktualisiere Dateien
203 |     const updatedFiles = currentFiles.map(file => ({
204 |       ...file,
205 |       isActive: file.id === fileId,
206 |     }));
207 | 
208 |     // Aktualisiere Tabs
209 |     const updatedTabs = currentTabs.map(tab => ({
210 |       ...tab,
211 |       isActive: tab.id === fileId,
212 |     }));
213 | 
214 |     // Wenn die Datei nicht in den Tabs ist, öffne sie als Tab
215 |     if (!currentTabs.some(tab => tab.id === fileId)) {
216 |       const fileToOpen = currentFiles.find(file => file.id === fileId);
217 |       if (fileToOpen) {
218 |         updatedTabs.push({
219 |           ...fileToOpen,
220 |           isActive: true,
221 |         });
222 |       }
223 |     }
224 | 
225 |     this.filesSubject.next(updatedFiles);
226 |     this.openTabsSubject.next(updatedTabs);
227 |     this.activeFileSubject.next(updatedFiles.find(f => f.isActive) || null);
228 |   }
229 | 
230 |   /**
231 |    * Fügt eine neue Datei hinzu
232 |    */
233 |   addNewFile(fileName: string, content: string = ''): void {
234 |     const currentFiles = this.filesSubject.value;
235 |     const projectRoot = this.projectRootSubject.value;
236 |     const language = this.detectLanguage(fileName);
237 | 
238 |     const newFile: EditorFile = {
239 |       id: `file_${Date.now()}`,
240 |       name: fileName,
241 |       path: `${projectRoot}/src/${fileName}`,
242 |       language,
243 |       content,
244 |       isActive: false,
245 |       isModified: true,
246 |     };
247 | 
248 |     const updatedFiles = [...currentFiles, newFile];
249 |     this.filesSubject.next(updatedFiles);
250 | 
251 |     // Aktualisiere den Dateibaum
252 |     const currentTree = this.fileTreeSubject.value;
253 |     const updatedTree = this.addFileToTree(currentTree, newFile);
254 |     this.fileTreeSubject.next(updatedTree);
255 |   }
256 | 
257 |   /**
258 |    * Fügt eine Datei zum Dateibaum hinzu
259 |    */
260 |   private addFileToTree(tree: FileSystemItem[], newFile: EditorFile): FileSystemItem[] {
261 |     return tree.map(item => {
262 |       if ('children' in item && item.name === 'src') {
263 |         // Füge die Datei zum src-Ordner hinzu
264 |         return {
265 |           ...item,
266 |           children: [...item.children, newFile],
267 |         };
268 |       }
269 |       return item;
270 |     });
271 |   }
272 | 
273 |   /**
274 |    * Schließt einen Tab (ohne die Datei aus dem Explorer zu entfernen)
275 |    */
276 |   closeTab(fileId: string): void {
277 |     const currentTabs = this.openTabsSubject.value;
278 |     const fileToClose = currentTabs.find(f => f.id === fileId);
279 | 
280 |     if (!fileToClose) return;
281 | 
282 |     const updatedTabs = currentTabs.filter(f => f.id !== fileId);
283 | 
284 |     // Wenn die zu schließende Datei die aktive ist, aktiviere einen anderen Tab
285 |     if (fileToClose.isActive && updatedTabs.length > 0) {
286 |       updatedTabs[0].isActive = true;
287 | 
288 |       // Aktualisiere alle Dateien, um die neue aktive Datei zu reflektieren
289 |       const allFiles = this.filesSubject.value;
290 |       const updatedAllFiles = allFiles.map(file => ({
291 |         ...file,
292 |         isActive: file.id === updatedTabs[0].id,
293 |       }));
294 | 
295 |       this.filesSubject.next(updatedAllFiles);
296 |       this.activeFileSubject.next(updatedTabs[0]);
297 |     } else if (fileToClose.isActive && updatedTabs.length === 0) {
298 |       // Wenn kein Tab mehr offen ist, setze activeFile auf null
299 |       const allFiles = this.filesSubject.value;
300 |       const updatedAllFiles = allFiles.map(file => ({
301 |         ...file,
302 |         isActive: false,
303 |       }));
304 | 
305 |       this.filesSubject.next(updatedAllFiles);
306 |       this.activeFileSubject.next(null);
307 |     }
308 | 
309 |     this.openTabsSubject.next(updatedTabs);
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/services/runCode.service.ts
```
1 | import { CodeSubmissionResultDto } from '@DTOs/index';
2 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http'; // Removed unused imports
3 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
5 | import { catchError, map } from 'rxjs';
6 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
7 | import { FeedbackLevel, FlavorType } from '../models/code-submission.model'; // Import enums
8 | 
9 | /**
10 |  * A service for running and managing user code submissions.
11 |  */
12 | @Injectable({
13 |   providedIn: 'root',
14 | })
15 | export class RunCodeService {
16 |   private readonly runCodeApiUrl = environment.server + '/run-code'; // Renamed for clarity
17 |   private readonly langgraphApiUrl = environment.server + '/langgraph-feedback'; // New API base URL
18 | 
19 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
20 | 
21 |   /**
22 |    * Executes multiple files of user-submitted code on the server.
23 |    *
24 |    * @param taskId - The ID of the task the code is associated with.
25 |    * @param inputArgs - Arguments provided for execution.
26 |    * @param additionalFiles - A dictionary of filename (key) and source code (value) pairs for additional files.
27 |    * @returns An Observable with the server's response.
28 |    */
29 |   executeStudentCode(
30 |     taskId: number,
31 |     inputArgs: string[],
32 |     additionalFiles: { [fileName: string]: string },
33 |   ): Observable<CodeSubmissionResultDto> {
34 |     const body = {
35 |       taskId: taskId,
36 |       inputArgs: inputArgs,
37 |       CodeFiles: additionalFiles,
38 |     };
39 |     return this.http.post<CodeSubmissionResultDto>(`${this.runCodeApiUrl}/execute`, body);
40 |   }
41 | 
42 |   // --- New Agent-Specific Feedback Methods ---
43 | 
44 |   private getAgentFeedback(
45 |     endpoint: string,
46 |     questionId: number,
47 |     relatedCodeSubmissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto,
48 |   ): Observable<string> {
49 |     const body = {
50 |       questionId: questionId,
51 |       flavor: FlavorType.STANDARD, // Use default flavor
52 |       feedbackLevel: FeedbackLevel.STANDARD, // Use default level
53 |       relatedCodeSubmissionResult: relatedCodeSubmissionResult,
54 |     };
55 |     return this.http
56 |       .post<{ feedback: string | null }>(`${this.langgraphApiUrl}/${endpoint}`, body)
57 |       .pipe(
58 |         map(response => response?.feedback ?? ''), // Extract the feedback string, default to empty string if null/undefined
59 |         catchError(error => {
60 |           console.error(`Error fetching ${endpoint} feedback:`, error);
61 |           throw error; // Re-throw the error to be handled by the caller
62 |         }),
63 |       );
64 |   }
65 | 
66 |   getSupervisorFeedback(
67 |     questionId: number,
68 |     relatedCodeSubmissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto,
69 |   ): Observable<string> {
70 |     return this.getAgentFeedback('supervisor', questionId, relatedCodeSubmissionResult);
71 |   }
72 | 
73 |   getKcFeedback(
74 |     questionId: number,
75 |     relatedCodeSubmissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto,
76 |   ): Observable<string> {
77 |     return this.getAgentFeedback('kc', questionId, relatedCodeSubmissionResult);
78 |   }
79 | 
80 |   getKhFeedback(
81 |     questionId: number,
82 |     relatedCodeSubmissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto,
83 |   ): Observable<string> {
84 |     return this.getAgentFeedback('kh', questionId, relatedCodeSubmissionResult);
85 |   }
86 | 
87 |   getKmFeedback(
88 |     questionId: number,
89 |     relatedCodeSubmissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto,
90 |   ): Observable<string> {
91 |     return this.getAgentFeedback('km', questionId, relatedCodeSubmissionResult);
92 |   }
93 | 
94 |   getKtcFeedback(
95 |     questionId: number,
96 |     relatedCodeSubmissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto,
97 |   ): Observable<string> {
98 |     return this.getAgentFeedback('ktc', questionId, relatedCodeSubmissionResult);
99 |   }
100 | 
101 |   // Old getKiFeedback method removed
102 | 
103 |   /**
104 |    * Posts user feedback (rating and comment) on the code execution.
105 |    *
106 |    * @param rating - The rating given by the user (1-5).
107 |    * @param feedback - The user's written feedback on the code execution.
108 |    * @param lastSubmissionId - The ID of the last code submission (which is the submission associated with the feedback).
109 |    * @returns An Observable with the server's response.
110 |    */
111 |   postFeedback(rating: number, feedback: string, lastSubmissionId: string): Observable<any> {
112 |     const body = {
113 |       rating: rating,
114 |       feedback: feedback,
115 |       lastSubmissionId: lastSubmissionId,
116 |     };
117 |     return this.http.post<any>(`${this.runCodeApiUrl}/post-Feedback`, body);
118 |   }
119 | }
```
