src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/services/user.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | 
3 | /**
4 |  * A service that is responsible for handling user authentication tokens.
5 |  */
6 | @Injectable({
7 |   providedIn: 'root',
8 | })
9 | export class UserService {
10 |   constructor() {}
11 | 
12 |   /**
13 |    * Checks if the user is logged in by verifying the existence of authentication tokens.
14 |    * - `accessToken`: Gets from local storage
15 |    * - `refreshToken`: Gets from local storage
16 |    *
17 |    * @returns A boolean value representing whether the user is logged in
18 |    */
19 |   isUserLoggedIn(): boolean {
20 |     return Boolean(localStorage.getItem('accessToken') && localStorage.getItem('refreshToken'));
21 |   }
22 | 
23 |   /**
24 |    * Sets the authentication accessToken and refreshToken in local storage.
25 |    *
26 |    * @param accessToken - The user accessToken to be saved in local storage
27 |    * @param refreshToken - The refreshToken  to be saved in local storage
28 |    */
29 |   setTokens(accessToken: string, refreshToken: string): void {
30 |     localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken);
31 |     localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken);
32 |   }
33 | 
34 |   /**
35 |    * Removes both accessToken and refreshToken from local storage,
36 |    * if either of them exists.
37 |    */
38 |   removeTokens(): void {
39 |     const accessToken = 'accessToken';
40 |     const refreshToken = 'refreshToken';
41 | 
42 |     if (localStorage.getItem(accessToken)) {
43 |       localStorage.removeItem(accessToken);
44 |       localStorage.removeItem(refreshToken);
45 |     }
46 |   }
47 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/services/workspace-state.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
3 | import { BehaviorSubject, Subject, catchError, finalize, of, tap, throwError } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { QuestionDTO, CodeSubmissionResultDto } from '@DTOs/index';
5 | import { CodeSubmissionResult, TestResult } from '../models/code-submission.model';
6 | import { FeedbackLevel, FlavorType, WorkspaceState } from '../models/code-submission.model'; // Merged TestResult import
7 | import { TaskDataService } from './task-data.service';
8 | import { RunCodeService } from './runCode.service';
9 | 
10 | /**
11 |  * Service to manage the state of the student workspace
12 |  */
13 | @Injectable({
14 |   providedIn: 'root',
15 | })
16 | export class WorkspaceStateService {
17 |   // State subjects
18 |   private readonly currentTaskSubject = new BehaviorSubject<QuestionDTO | null>(null);
19 |   private readonly workspaceStateSubject = new BehaviorSubject<WorkspaceState>(
20 |     WorkspaceState.START,
21 |   );
22 |   private readonly codeSubmissionResultSubject =
23 |     new BehaviorSubject<CodeSubmissionResultDto | null>(null);
24 |   private readonly feedbackSubject = new BehaviorSubject<string>('');
25 |   private readonly isLoadingSubject = new BehaviorSubject<boolean>(false);
26 |   private readonly errorSubject = new BehaviorSubject<string | null>(null);
27 |   private readonly currentFeedbackIdSubject = new BehaviorSubject<string | null>(null); // Added for feedback ID
28 | 
29 |   // Public observables
30 |   readonly currentTask$ = this.currentTaskSubject.asObservable();
31 |   readonly workspaceState$ = this.workspaceStateSubject.asObservable();
32 |   readonly codeSubmissionResult$ = this.codeSubmissionResultSubject.asObservable();
33 |   readonly feedback$ = this.feedbackSubject.asObservable();
34 |   readonly isLoading$ = this.isLoadingSubject.asObservable();
35 |   readonly error$ = this.errorSubject.asObservable();
36 |   readonly currentFeedbackId$ = this.currentFeedbackIdSubject.asObservable(); // Added observable for feedback ID
37 | 
38 |   constructor(
39 |     private readonly taskDataService: TaskDataService,
40 |     private readonly runCodeService: RunCodeService,
41 |   ) {}
42 | 
43 |   /**
44 |    * Lädt eine Aufgabe anhand ihrer ID
45 |    */
46 |   loadTask(taskId: number): Observable<QuestionDTO> {
47 |     this.isLoadingSubject.next(true);
48 |     this.errorSubject.next(null);
49 | 
50 |     return this.taskDataService.getTask(taskId).pipe(
51 |       tap(task => {
52 |         this.currentTaskSubject.next(task);
53 |         this.workspaceStateSubject.next(WorkspaceState.EDITING_CODE);
54 |       }),
55 |       catchError(error => {
56 |         this.errorSubject.next(`Fehler beim Laden der Aufgabe ${taskId}: ${error.message}`);
57 |         return throwError(() => error);
58 |       }),
59 |       finalize(() => {
60 |         this.isLoadingSubject.next(false);
61 |       }),
62 |     );
63 |   }
64 | 
65 |   /**
66 |    * Führt den Code aus und gibt das Ergebnis zurück
67 |    */
68 |   executeCode(
69 |     taskId: number,
70 |     inputArgs: any[],
71 |     additionalFiles: Record<string, string>,
72 |   ): Observable<CodeSubmissionResultDto> {
73 |     this.isLoadingSubject.next(true);
74 |     this.errorSubject.next(null);
75 | 
76 |     return this.runCodeService.executeStudentCode(taskId, inputArgs, additionalFiles).pipe(
77 |       tap(result => {
78 |         // Default to null if result or nested properties are missing
79 |         let finalResultForSubject: CodeSubmissionResult | null = null;
80 | 
81 |         if (result?.CodeSubmissionResult) {
82 |           let frontendTestResults: TestResult[] = []; // Default to empty array
83 | 
84 |           // Transform backend results if they exist
85 |           if (result.CodeSubmissionResult.testResults) {
86 |             const backendTestResults = result.CodeSubmissionResult.testResults as any[];
87 |             frontendTestResults = backendTestResults.map((test: any) => {
88 |               const transformedTest: TestResult = {
89 |                 name: test.test || '',
90 |                 passed: test.status === 'SUCCESSFUL',
91 |                 exception: test.exception,
92 |               };
93 |               return transformedTest;
94 |             });
95 |           }
96 | 
97 |           // Create a new object conforming to the DTO structure expected by the Subject
98 |           finalResultForSubject = {
99 |             CodeSubmissionResult: {
100 |               output: result.CodeSubmissionResult.output ?? '', // Provide default empty string if null
101 |               score: result.CodeSubmissionResult.score,
102 |               testsPassed: result.CodeSubmissionResult.testsPassed ?? false, // Provide default false if null/undefined
103 |               testResults: frontendTestResults, // Use the transformed results
104 |             },
105 |             encryptedCodeSubissionId: result.encryptedCodeSubissionId,
106 |           };
107 |         }
108 | 
109 |         // Emit the correctly typed frontend object (or null)
110 |         this.codeSubmissionResultSubject.next(
111 |           finalResultForSubject as CodeSubmissionResultDto | null,
112 |         ); // Cast to satisfy Subject type
113 |         this.workspaceStateSubject.next(WorkspaceState.SUBMITTED_CODE);
114 |         console.log(JSON.stringify(this.codeSubmissionResultSubject));
115 |       }),
116 |       catchError(error => {
117 |         this.errorSubject.next(`Fehler beim Ausführen des Codes: ${error.message}`);
118 |         return throwError(() => error);
119 |       }),
120 |       finalize(() => {
121 |         this.isLoadingSubject.next(false);
122 |       }),
123 |     );
124 |   }
125 | 
126 |   // --- New Agent-Specific Feedback Request Methods ---
127 | 
128 |   /**
129 |    * Helper method to handle the common logic for requesting feedback from an agent.
130 |    */
131 |   private requestAgentFeedback(
132 |     agentRequest$: Observable<string>,
133 |     agentName: string, // For logging/error messages
134 |   ): Observable<string> {
135 |     this.workspaceStateSubject.next(WorkspaceState.GENERATING_FEEDBACK);
136 |     this.feedbackSubject.next('');
137 |     this.errorSubject.next(null);
138 | 
139 |     return agentRequest$.pipe(
140 |       tap(feedback => {
141 |         this.feedbackSubject.next(feedback);
142 |         this.workspaceStateSubject.next(WorkspaceState.RECEIVING_FEEDBACK);
143 |       }),
144 |       catchError(error => {
145 |         this.errorSubject.next(
146 |           `Fehler beim Generieren des ${agentName}-Feedbacks: ${error.message}`,
147 |         );
148 |         this.workspaceStateSubject.next(WorkspaceState.SUBMITTED_CODE); // Reset state on error
149 |         return throwError(() => error);
150 |       }),
151 |       finalize(() => {
152 |         // Ensure state transitions correctly even if there's an error before finalize
153 |         if (this.workspaceStateSubject.value === WorkspaceState.RECEIVING_FEEDBACK) {
154 |           this.workspaceStateSubject.next(WorkspaceState.FINISHED_FEEDBACK);
155 |         }
156 |       }),
157 |     );
158 |   }
159 | 
160 |   requestSupervisorFeedback(
161 |     taskId: number,
162 |     submissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto,
163 |   ): Observable<string> {
164 |     const agentRequest$ = this.runCodeService.getSupervisorFeedback(taskId, submissionResult);
165 |     return this.requestAgentFeedback(agentRequest$, 'Supervisor');
166 |   }
167 | 
168 |   requestKcFeedback(taskId: number, submissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto): Observable<string> {
169 |     const agentRequest$ = this.runCodeService.getKcFeedback(taskId, submissionResult);
170 |     return this.requestAgentFeedback(agentRequest$, 'KC');
171 |   }
172 | 
173 |   requestKhFeedback(taskId: number, submissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto): Observable<string> {
174 |     const agentRequest$ = this.runCodeService.getKhFeedback(taskId, submissionResult);
175 |     return this.requestAgentFeedback(agentRequest$, 'KH');
176 |   }
177 | 
178 |   requestKmFeedback(taskId: number, submissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto): Observable<string> {
179 |     const agentRequest$ = this.runCodeService.getKmFeedback(taskId, submissionResult);
180 |     return this.requestAgentFeedback(agentRequest$, 'KM');
181 |   }
182 | 
183 |   requestKtcFeedback(
184 |     taskId: number,
185 |     submissionResult: CodeSubmissionResultDto,
186 |   ): Observable<string> {
187 |     const agentRequest$ = this.runCodeService.getKtcFeedback(taskId, submissionResult);
188 |     return this.requestAgentFeedback(agentRequest$, 'KTC');
189 |   }
190 | 
191 |   // Old requestFeedback method removed
192 | 
193 |   /**
194 |    * Sendet eine Bewertung für das erhaltene Feedback
195 |    */
196 |   submitRating(rating: number, comment: string, submissionId: string): Observable<any> {
197 |     return this.runCodeService.postFeedback(rating, comment, submissionId).pipe(
198 |       tap(() => {
199 |         this.workspaceStateSubject.next(WorkspaceState.FEEDBACK_RATED);
200 |       }),
201 |       catchError(error => {
202 |         this.errorSubject.next(`Fehler beim Senden des Feedbacks: ${error.message}`);
203 |         return throwError(() => error);
204 |       }),
205 |     );
206 |   }
207 | 
208 |   /**
209 |    * Setzt den Zustand auf Code-Bearbeitung zurück, wenn der Code geändert wird
210 |    */
211 |   codeChanged(): void {
212 |     if (
213 |       this.workspaceStateSubject.value !== WorkspaceState.GENERATING_FEEDBACK &&
214 |       this.workspaceStateSubject.value !== WorkspaceState.RECEIVING_FEEDBACK
215 |     ) {
216 |       this.workspaceStateSubject.next(WorkspaceState.EDITING_CODE);
217 |     }
218 |   }
219 | 
220 |   /**
221 |    * Liefert den aktuellen Zustand zurück
222 |    */
223 |   getCurrentState(): WorkspaceState {
224 |     return this.workspaceStateSubject.value;
225 |   }
226 | 
227 |   /**
228 |    * Liefert das aktuelle Ergebnis der Code-Ausführung zurück
229 |    */
230 |   getCodeSubmissionResult(): CodeSubmissionResultDto | null {
231 |     return this.codeSubmissionResultSubject.value;
232 |   }
233 | 
234 |   /**
235 |    * Liefert die aktuelle Aufgabe zurück
236 |    */
237 |   getCurrentTask(): QuestionDTO | null {
238 |     return this.currentTaskSubject.value;
239 |   }
240 | 
241 |   /**
242 |    * Sets the current feedback ID.
243 |    */
244 |   setFeedbackId(id: string | null): void {
245 |     this.currentFeedbackIdSubject.next(id);
246 |   }
247 | 
248 |   /**
249 |    * Gets the current feedback ID synchronously.
250 |    */
251 |   getCurrentFeedbackId(): string | null {
252 |     return this.currentFeedbackIdSubject.value;
253 |   }
254 | }
```

src/app/Pages/admin/services/admin.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
3 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { environment } from '../../../../environments/environment';
5 | 
6 | interface UserListItem {
7 |   id: number;
8 |   email: string;
9 |   kiFeedbackCount: number;
10 |   chatBotMessageCount: number;
11 |   totalProgress: number;
12 |   subjects: { id: number; name: string; registeredForSL: boolean }[];
13 | }
14 | 
15 | interface Subject {
16 |   id: number;
17 |   name: string;
18 | }
19 | 
20 | export interface QuestionTypeProgress {
21 |   [key: string]: {
22 |     total: number;
23 |     completed: number;
24 |   };
25 | }
26 | 
27 | export interface DailyProgress {
28 |   date: string;
29 |   count: number;
30 | }
31 | 
32 | export interface AllUsersDailyProgress {
33 |   date: string;
34 |   type: string;
35 |   count: number;
36 | }
37 | 
38 | export interface UserDetails {
39 |   id: number;
40 |   email: string;
41 |   firstname: string;
42 |   lastname: string;
43 |   globalRole: string;
44 |   createdAt: string;
45 |   totalProgress: number;
46 | }
47 | 
48 | @Injectable({
49 |   providedIn: 'root',
50 | })
51 | export class AdminService {
52 |   private readonly apiUrl = environment.server + '/admin';
53 | 
54 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
55 | 
56 |   getAllUsers(): Observable<UserListItem[]> {
57 |     return this.http.get<UserListItem[]>(`${this.apiUrl}/users`);
58 |   }
59 | 
60 |   getUserTotalProgress(userId: number): Observable<any> {
61 |     return this.http.get(`${this.apiUrl}/users/${userId}/progress`);
62 |   }
63 | 
64 |   getUserProgressByQuestionType(userId: number): Observable<QuestionTypeProgress> {
65 |     return this.http.get<QuestionTypeProgress>(
66 |       `${this.apiUrl}/users/${userId}/progress-by-question-type`,
67 |     );
68 |   }
69 | 
70 |   getUserDailyProgress(userId: number): Observable<DailyProgress[]> {
71 |     return this.http.get<DailyProgress[]>(`${this.apiUrl}/users/${userId}/daily-progress`);
72 |   }
73 | 
74 |   getAllUsersDailyProgress(): Observable<AllUsersDailyProgress[]> {
75 |     return this.http.get<AllUsersDailyProgress[]>(`${this.apiUrl}/all-users-daily-progress`);
76 |   }
77 | 
78 |   getUserDetails(userId: number): Observable<UserDetails> {
79 |     return this.http.get<UserDetails>(`${this.apiUrl}/users/${userId}/details`);
80 |   }
81 | 
82 |   toggleRegisteredForSL(userId: number, subjectId: number, value: boolean): Observable<any> {
83 |     return this.http.patch(`${this.apiUrl}/users/${userId}/subjects/${subjectId}`, {
84 |       registeredForSL: value,
85 |     });
86 |   }
87 | 
88 |   getSubjects(): Observable<Subject[]> {
89 |     return this.http.get<Subject[]>(`${this.apiUrl}/subjects`);
90 |   }
91 | 
92 |   processEmailsForSubject(emails: string[], subjectId: number): Observable<any> {
93 |     return this.http.post(`${this.apiUrl}/process-emails`, { emails, subjectId });
94 |   }
95 | }
```

1 | import {
2 |   taskCreationPopupDTO,
3 |   taskInformationDTO,
4 |   tasksInformationDTO,
5 |   taskAttemptDTO,
6 |   taskAttemptDataDTO,
7 |   taskFeedbackDTO,
8 |   taskFeedbackDataDTO,
9 |   studentTaskStatusDTO,
10 |   tasksOverviewDTO,
11 |   taskDataDTO,
12 |   taskWorkspaceDataDTO,
13 |   editorDataDTO,
14 | } from '@DTOs/index';
15 | import { jaroWinklerDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
16 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
17 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
18 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
19 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
20 | 
21 | @Injectable({
22 |   providedIn: 'root',
23 | })
24 | export class DatabaseTaskCommunicationService {
25 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
26 | 
27 |   /**
28 |    * Finds a synonym for an attempt based on a solution.
29 |    * @param solution - The solution string.
30 |    * @param attempt - The attempt string.
31 |    * @returns An Observable that emits the new attempt string.
32 |    */
33 |   synonym(solution: string, attempt: string): Observable<{ newAttempt: string }> {
34 |     return this.http.get<{ newAttempt: string }>(
35 |       environment.server + `/database-task-communication/synonym/${solution}/${attempt}`,
36 |     );
37 |   }
38 | 
39 |   /**
40 |    * Retrieves the overview data for all tasks.
41 |    * @returns An Observable that emits the tasks overview data as a tasksOverviewDTO object.
42 |    */
43 |   getTasksOverview(): Observable<tasksOverviewDTO> {
44 |     return this.http.get<tasksOverviewDTO>(
45 |       environment.server + '/database-task-communication/taskOverviewData',
46 |     );
47 |   }
48 | 
49 |   /**
50 |    * Retrieves the information for all tasks.
51 |    * @returns An Observable that emits the tasks information as a tasksInformationDTO object.
52 |    */
53 |   getTasks(): Observable<tasksInformationDTO> {
54 |     return this.http.get<tasksInformationDTO>(
55 |       environment.server + '/database-task-communication/taskOverview',
56 |     );
57 |   }
58 | 
59 |   /**
60 |    * Creates a new task.
61 |    * @param taskCreationData - The data for creating the task.
62 |    * @returns An Observable that emits the created task data as a taskCreationPopupDTO object.
63 |    */
64 |   createTask(taskCreationData: taskCreationPopupDTO): Observable<taskCreationPopupDTO> {
65 |     return this.http.post<taskCreationPopupDTO>(
66 |       environment.server + '/database-task-communication/taskCreation',
67 |       taskCreationData,
68 |     );
69 |   }
70 | 
71 |   /**
72 |    * Sets the data for a task.
73 |    * @param taskData - The data to be set for the task.
74 |    * @returns An Observable that emits the updated task data as a taskDataDTO object.
75 |    */
76 |   setTaskData(taskData: taskDataDTO) {
77 |     return this.http.post<taskDataDTO>(
78 |       environment.server + '/database-task-communication/setTaskData',
79 |       taskData,
80 |     );
81 |   }
82 | 
83 |   /**
84 |    * Sets the image for a task.

86 |    * @returns An Observable that emits the task ID.
87 |    */
88 |   setTaskImage(data: { taskId: number; imageB64: string }): Observable<number> {
89 |     return this.http.post<number>(
90 |       environment.server + '/database-task-communication/setTaskImage',
91 |       data,
92 |     );
93 |   }
94 | 
95 |   /**
96 |    * Retrieves the image for a task.
97 |    * @param taskId - The ID of the task.
98 |    * @returns An Observable that emits the image in base64 format.
99 |    */
100 |   getTaskImage(taskId: number): Observable<{ imageB64: string }> {
101 |     return this.http.get<{ imageB64: string }>(
102 |       environment.server + `/database-task-communication/getTaskImage/${taskId}`,
103 |     );
104 |   }
105 | 
106 |   /**
107 |    * Deletes a task.
108 |    * @param taskId - The ID of the task to be deleted.
109 |    * @returns An Observable that emits the deleted task information as a taskInformationDTO object.
110 |    */
111 |   deleteTask(taskId: number): Observable<taskInformationDTO> {
112 |     return this.http.delete<taskInformationDTO>(
113 |       environment.server + '/database-task-communication/taskDeletion/' + taskId,
114 |     );
115 |   }
116 | 
117 |   /**
118 |    * Retrieves the task settings data for a given task ID.
119 |    * @param taskId - The ID of the task to retrieve settings data for.
120 |    * @returns An Observable that emits the task settings data as a taskSettingsDTO object.
121 |    */
122 |   getTaskData(taskId: number): Observable<taskDataDTO> {
123 |     return this.http.get<taskDataDTO>(
124 |       environment.server + `/database-task-communication/taskWorkspace/${taskId}`,
125 |     );
126 |   }
127 | 
128 |   /**
129 |    * Retrieves the task workspace data for a given task ID.
130 |    * @param taskId - The ID of the task to retrieve workspace data for.
131 |    * @returns An Observable that emits the task workspace data as a taskWorkspaceDataDTO object.
132 |    */
133 |   getTaskWorkspaceData(taskId: number): Observable<taskWorkspaceDataDTO> {
134 |     return this.http.get<taskDataDTO>(
135 |       environment.server + `/database-task-communication/taskWorkspaceData/${taskId}`,
136 |     );
137 |   }

181 |

src/app/Modules/umlearn/services/editor-communication.service.ts
```
1 | import { editorElementDTO, EditorModel, editorModelDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
2 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
3 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs/internal/Observable';
5 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
6 | 
7 | @Injectable({
8 |   providedIn: 'root',
9 | })
10 | export class EditorCommunicationService {
11 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
12 | 
13 |   /**
14 |    * Gets the editor models from the server
15 |    * @returns editorModelsDTO
16 |    */
17 |   getEditorModels(): Observable<editorModelDTO[]> {
18 |     return this.http.get<editorModelDTO[]>(environment.server + `/editor/models/`);
19 |   }
20 | 
21 |   /**
22 |    * Gets an editor model from the server by id
23 |    * @param editorModelId
24 |    * @returns
25 |    */
26 |   getEditorElements(editorModel: EditorModel): Observable<editorElementDTO[]> {
27 |     return this.http.get<editorElementDTO[]>(
28 |       environment.server + `/editor/elements/${editorModel}`,
29 |     );
30 |   }
31 | }
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/services/editor-edge.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
3 | 
4 | @Injectable({
5 |   providedIn: 'root',
6 | })
7 | export class EditorEdgeService {
8 |   movedNode = new Subject<string>();
9 |   positionedEdge = new Subject<string>();
10 |   reconnectedEdge = new Subject<{
11 |     id: string;
12 |     start?: string | HTMLElement;
13 |     end?: string | HTMLElement;
14 |   }>();
15 | 
16 |   mousePosition: { x: number; y: number } = { x: 0, y: 0 };
17 | 
18 |   constructor() {
19 |     document.addEventListener('mousemove', event => {
20 |       this.mousePosition = { x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY };
21 |     });
22 |   }
23 | 
24 |   /**
25 |    * Notifies subscribers when a node is moved.
26 |    * @param nodeId - The ID of the moved node.
27 |    */
28 |   positionConnected(nodeUuid: string) {
29 |     this.movedNode.next(nodeUuid);
30 |   }
31 | 
32 |   /**
33 |    * Notifies subscribers when an edge is positioned.
34 |    * @param edgeUuid - The UUID of the positioned edge.
35 |    */
36 |   positionEdge(edgeUuid: string) {
37 |     this.positionedEdge.next(edgeUuid);
38 |   }
39 | 
40 |   /**
41 |    * Notifies subscribers when an edge is reconnected.
42 |    * @param id - The ID of the reconnected edge.
43 |    * @param start - The start node or element of the edge.
44 |    * @param end - The end node or element of the edge.
45 |    */
46 |   reconnectEdge(id: string, start?: string | HTMLElement, end?: string | HTMLElement) {
47 |     this.reconnectedEdge.next({ id: id, start: start, end: end });
48 |   }
49 | 
50 |   /**
51 |    * Notifies subscribers to position all nodes.
52 |    */
53 |   positionAll() {
54 |     this.movedNode.next('all');
55 |   }
56 | 
57 |   /**
58 |    * Returns the current mouse position.
59 |    * @returns The current mouse position.
60 |    */
61 |   getMousePosition(): { x: number; y: number } {
62 |     return this.mousePosition;
63 |   }
64 | }
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/services/notification.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
3 | import { BehaviorSubject, Subject } from 'rxjs';
4 | import { INotification } from '../pages/notification/notification.models';
5 | import { NotificationType } from '../pages/notification/notification.models';
6 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
7 | import { ConfirmationComponent } from '../pages/confirmation/confirmation.component';
8 | 
9 | @Injectable({
10 |   providedIn: 'root',
11 | })
12 | export class NotificationService {
13 |   /*
14 |     USEFUL INFORMATION:
15 |     If we want to show a notification in a component, we need to inject the NotificationService in its constructor.
16 |     Then, we can call the notification service's methods to show a notification.
17 |     Example: this.notificationService.success("Success message", 1000);
18 |     This shows a success notification for 1 second, then it disappears. The default duration is 3 seconds so this parameter is optional.
19 |   */
20 | 
21 |   constructor(private readonly dialog: MatDialog) {}
22 | 
23 |   private readonly notification$: Subject<INotification> = new BehaviorSubject<INotification>({
24 |     message: '',
25 |     type: NotificationType.Info,
26 |     duration: 0,
27 |   });
28 |   private readonly defaultDuration: number = 3000;
29 | 
30 |   /**
31 |    * Shows a success notification
32 |    * @param message
33 |    * @param duration
34 |    */
35 |   success(message: string, duration: number = this.defaultDuration) {
36 |     this.notify(message, NotificationType.Success, duration);
37 |   }
38 | 
39 |   /**
40 |    * Shows a warning notification
41 |    * @param message
42 |    * @param duration
43 |    */
44 |   warning(message: string, duration: number = this.defaultDuration) {
45 |     this.notify(message, NotificationType.Warning, duration);
46 |   }
47 | 
48 |   /**
49 |    * Shows an error notification
50 |    * @param message
51 |    * @param duration
52 |    */
53 |   error(message: string, duration: number = this.defaultDuration) {
54 |     this.notify(message, NotificationType.Error, duration);
55 |   }
56 | 
57 |   /**
58 |    * Shows an info notification
59 |    * @param message
60 |    * @param duration
61 |    */
62 |   info(message: string, duration: number = this.defaultDuration) {
63 |     this.notify(message, NotificationType.Info, duration);
64 |   }
65 | 
66 |   /**
67 |    * Shows a confirmation dialog
68 |    * @param message
69 |    */
70 |   confirm(
71 |     title: string = 'Achtung!',
72 |     message: string = 'Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie diese Aktion durchführen möchten?',
73 |     decline: string = 'Abbrechen',
74 |     accept: string = 'Bestätigen',
75 |   ): Observable<boolean> {
76 |     const resultSubject = new Subject<boolean>();
77 |     const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(ConfirmationComponent, {
78 |       data: { title, message, decline, accept },
79 |       autoFocus: false,
80 |     });
81 |     dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {
82 |       if (result && typeof result === 'boolean') {
83 |         resultSubject.next(result);
84 |       } else {
85 |         resultSubject.next(false);
86 |       }
87 |       resultSubject.complete();
88 |     });
89 |     return resultSubject.asObservable();
90 |   }
91 | 
92 |   /**
93 |    * Shows a notification by passing the message, type and duration
94 |    * @param message
95 |    * @param type
96 |    * @param duration
97 |    */
98 |   private notify(message: string, type: NotificationType, duration: number) {
99 |     this.notification$.next({ message, type, duration } as INotification);
100 |   }
101 | 
102 |   /**
103 |    * Returns the notification as an observable
104 |    */
105 |   get notification() {
106 |     return this.notification$.asObservable();
107 |   }
108 | }
```

src/app/Pages/admin/user-list/user-list.component.html
```
1 | <div class="user-list-container">
2 |   <p class="info-text">
3 |     Hier können durch Semikolon getrennte Zimt-IDs in einer txt-Datei hochgeladen werden. Diese
4 |     werden für die SL in GOALS registriert. Falls noch kein Account für die Zimt ID existiert, wird
5 |     zuvor ein Account in GOALS erstellt.
6 |   </p>
7 | 
8 |   <div class="controls-container">
9 |     <mat-form-field class="search-field">
10 |       <input matInput (keyup)="applyFilter($event)" placeholder="Filter users" />
11 |     </mat-form-field>
12 | 
13 |     <div class="upload-container">
14 |       <mat-form-field class="subject-select">
15 |         <mat-label>Select Subject</mat-label>
16 |         <mat-select [(ngModel)]="selectedSubject">
17 |           <mat-option *ngFor="let subject of subjects" [value]="subject.id">
18 |             {{ subject.name }}
19 |           </mat-option>
20 |         </mat-select>
21 |       </mat-form-field>
22 | 
23 |       <div class="file-actions">
24 |         <div class="file-input-container">
25 |           <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="fileInput.click()">Choose File</button>
26 |           <input hidden (change)="onFileSelected($event)" #fileInput type="file" accept=".txt" />
27 |           <span class="file-name" *ngIf="selectedFile">{{ selectedFile.name }}</span>
28 |         </div>
29 | 
30 |         <button
31 |           mat-raised-button
32 |           color="accent"
33 |           (click)="uploadFile()"
34 |           [disabled]="!selectedFile || !selectedSubject"
35 |         >
36 |           Upload and Process
37 |         </button>
38 |       </div>
39 |     </div>
40 | 
41 |     <div class="logout-all-container">
42 |       <button mat-raised-button color="warn" (click)="logoutAllUsers()">
43 |         Alle Nutzer abmelden
44 |       </button>
45 |     </div>
46 |   </div>
47 | 
48 |   <mat-card class="content-management-container">
49 |     <mat-card-title>Lerninhalte Management</mat-card-title>
50 |     <mat-card-content>
51 |       <div class="content-actions">
52 |         <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="exportContent()">
53 |           Lerninhalte exportieren
54 |         </button>
55 | 
56 |         <div class="import-section">
57 |           <input
58 |             hidden
59 |             type="file"
60 |             accept=".json"
61 |             #contentFileInput
62 |             (change)="onContentFileSelected($event)"
63 |           />
64 |           <button mat-raised-button color="accent" (click)="contentFileInput.click()">
65 |             Datei auswählen
66 |           </button>
67 |           <span class="file-name" *ngIf="selectedContentFile">
68 |             {{ selectedContentFile.name }}
69 |           </span>
70 |           <button
71 |             mat-raised-button
72 |             color="accent"
73 |             (click)="importContent()"
74 |             [disabled]="!selectedContentFile"
75 |           >
76 |             Lerninhalte importieren
77 |           </button>
78 |         </div>
79 |       </div>
80 |     </mat-card-content>
81 |   </mat-card>
82 | 
83 |   <div class="data-container">
84 |     <table mat-table [dataSource]="dataSource" matSort class="mat-elevation-z8">
85 |       <ng-container matColumnDef="email">
86 |         <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef mat-sort-header>Email</th>
87 |         <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let user">{{ user.email }}</td>
88 |       </ng-container>
89 | 
90 |       <ng-container matColumnDef="id">
91 |         <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef mat-sort-header>User ID</th>
92 |         <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let user">{{ user.id }}</td>
93 |       </ng-container>
94 | 
95 |       <ng-container matColumnDef="kiFeedbackCount">
96 |         <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef mat-sort-header>KI Feedback Count</th>
97 |         <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let user">{{ user.kiFeedbackCount }}</td>
98 |       </ng-container>
99 | 
100 |       <ng-container matColumnDef="chatBotMessageCount">
101 |         <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef mat-sort-header>Chatbot Message Count</th>
102 |         <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let user">{{ user.chatBotMessageCount }}</td>
103 |       </ng-container>
104 | 
105 |       <ng-container matColumnDef="totalProgress">
106 |         <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef mat-sort-header>Total Progress</th>
107 |         <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let user">
108 |           <a class="clickable-progress" (click)="viewUserProgress(user.id)">{{
109 |             user.totalProgress | percent: '1.0-0'
110 |           }}</a>
111 |         </td>
112 |       </ng-container>
113 | 
114 |       <ng-container matColumnDef="subjects">
115 |         <th mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef>Subjects</th>
116 |         <td mat-cell *matCellDef="let user">
117 |           <div *ngFor="let subject of user.subjects">
118 |             {{ subject.name }}
119 |             <mat-checkbox
120 |               [checked]="subject.registeredForSL"
121 |               (change)="toggleRegisteredForSL(user.id, subject.id, subject.registeredForSL)"
122 |             >
123 |               Registered for SL
124 |             </mat-checkbox>
125 |           </div>
126 |         </td>
127 |       </ng-container>
128 | 
129 |       <tr mat-header-row *matHeaderRowDef="displayedColumns"></tr>
130 |       <tr mat-row *matRowDef="let row; columns: displayedColumns"></tr>
131 |     </table>
132 | 
133 |     <mat-paginator [pageSizeOptions]="[5, 10, 25, 100]" showFirstLastButtons></mat-paginator>
134 | 
135 |     <div class="chart-container">
136 |       <h2>All Users Daily Progress</h2>
137 |       <div *ngIf="allUsersDailyProgressData.length === 0" class="loading-indicator">
138 |         Loading chart data...
139 |       </div>
140 |       <ngx-charts-line-chart
141 |         *ngIf="allUsersDailyProgressData.length > 0"
142 |         [view]="view"
143 |         [scheme]="colorScheme"
144 |         [legend]="showLegend"
145 |         [showXAxisLabel]="showXAxisLabel"
146 |         [showYAxisLabel]="showYAxisLabel"
147 |         [xAxis]="showXAxis"
148 |         [yAxis]="showYAxis"
149 |         [xAxisLabel]="xAxisLabel"
150 |         [yAxisLabel]="yAxisLabel"
151 |         [timeline]="true"
152 |         [results]="allUsersDailyProgressData"
153 |         [autoScale]="true"
154 |       >
155 |       </ngx-charts-line-chart>
156 |     </div>
157 |   </div>
158 | </div>
```

107 | }

src/app/Pages/admin/user-list/user-list.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit, AfterViewInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
4 | import { MatTableDataSource } from '@angular/material/table';
5 | import { MatSort } from '@angular/material/sort';
6 | import { MatPaginator } from '@angular/material/paginator';
7 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
8 | import { AdminService, AllUsersDailyProgress } from '../services/admin.service';
9 | import { Color } from '@swimlane/ngx-charts';
10 | import { ScaleType } from '@swimlane/ngx-charts';
11 | import { ConfirmationBoxComponent } from '../../confirmation-box/confirmation-box.component';
12 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
13 | import { UserService } from '../../../Services/auth/user.service';
14 | import { ContentManagementService } from '../../../Services/admin/content-management.service';
15 | 
16 | interface UserListItem {
17 |   id: number;
18 |   email: string;
19 |   kiFeedbackCount: number;
20 |   chatBotMessageCount: number;
21 |   totalProgress: number;
22 |   subjects: { id: number; name: string; registeredForSL: boolean }[];
23 | }
24 | 
25 | interface Subject {
26 |   id: number;
27 |   name: string;
28 | }
29 | 
30 | @Component({
31 |   selector: 'app-user-list',
32 |   templateUrl: './user-list.component.html',
33 |   styleUrls: ['./user-list.component.scss'],
34 | })
35 | export class UserListComponent implements OnInit, AfterViewInit {
36 |   dataSource: MatTableDataSource<UserListItem> = new MatTableDataSource<UserListItem>([]);
37 |   displayedColumns: string[] = [
38 |     'email',
39 |     'id',
40 |     'kiFeedbackCount',
41 |     'chatBotMessageCount',
42 |     'totalProgress',
43 |     'subjects',
44 |   ];
45 |   subjects: Subject[] = [];
46 |   selectedSubject: number | null = null;
47 |   selectedFile: File | null = null;
48 |   selectedContentFile: File | null = null;
49 | 
50 |   @ViewChild(MatSort) sort!: MatSort;
51 |   @ViewChild(MatPaginator) paginator!: MatPaginator;
52 | 
53 |   // New properties for the all users daily progress chart
54 |   allUsersDailyProgressData: any[] = [];
55 |   view: [number, number] = [700, 400];
56 |   showXAxis: boolean = true;
57 |   showYAxis: boolean = true;
58 |   gradient: boolean = false;
59 |   showLegend: boolean = true;
60 |   showXAxisLabel: boolean = true;
61 |   xAxisLabel: string = 'Date';
62 |   showYAxisLabel: boolean = true;
63 |   yAxisLabel: string = 'Completed Tasks';
64 |   colorScheme: Color = {
65 |     name: 'custom',
66 |     selectable: true,
67 |     group: ScaleType.Ordinal,
68 |     domain: ['#5AA454', '#A10A28', '#C7B42C', '#AAAAAA'],
69 |   };
70 | 
71 |   constructor(
72 |     private readonly adminService: AdminService,
73 |     private readonly router: Router,
74 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
75 |     public dialog: MatDialog,
76 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
77 |     private readonly contentManagementService: ContentManagementService,
78 |   ) {}
79 | 
80 |   ngOnInit(): void {
81 |     this.loadUsers();
82 |     this.loadSubjects();
83 |     this.loadAllUsersDailyProgress();
84 |   }
85 | 
86 |   ngAfterViewInit() {
87 |     this.dataSource.sort = this.sort;
88 |     this.dataSource.paginator = this.paginator;
89 |   }
90 | 
91 |   loadUsers(): void {
92 |     this.adminService.getAllUsers().subscribe(
93 |       (users: UserListItem[]) => {
94 |         this.dataSource = new MatTableDataSource(users);
95 |         this.dataSource.sort = this.sort;
96 |         this.dataSource.paginator = this.paginator;
97 |       },
98 |       (error: any) => console.error('Error loading users:', error),
99 |     );
100 |   }
101 | 
102 |   loadSubjects(): void {
103 |     this.adminService.getSubjects().subscribe(
104 |       (subjects: Subject[]) => {
105 |         this.subjects = subjects;
106 |       },
107 |       (error: any) => console.error('Error loading subjects:', error),
108 |     );
109 |   }
110 | 
111 |   loadAllUsersDailyProgress(): void {
112 |     this.adminService.getAllUsersDailyProgress().subscribe(
113 |       (progress: AllUsersDailyProgress[]) => {
114 |         // Process the data for the chart
115 |         const progressByType: {
116 |           [key: string]: { name: string; series: { name: string; value: number }[] };
117 |         } = {};
118 | 
119 |         progress.forEach(item => {
120 |           if (!progressByType[item.type]) {
121 |             progressByType[item.type] = {
122 |               name: item.type,
123 |               series: [],
124 |             };
125 |           }
126 |           progressByType[item.type].series.push({
127 |             name: item.date,
128 |             value: item.count,
129 |           });
130 |         });
131 | 
132 |         this.allUsersDailyProgressData = Object.values(progressByType);
133 |       },
134 |       (error: any) => console.error('Error loading all users daily progress:', error),
135 |     );
136 |   }
137 | 
138 |   applyFilter(event: Event): void {
139 |     const filterValue = (event.target as HTMLInputElement).value;
140 |     this.dataSource.filter = filterValue.trim().toLowerCase();
141 | 
142 |     if (this.dataSource.paginator) {
143 |       this.dataSource.paginator.firstPage();
144 |     }
145 |   }
146 | 
147 |   viewUserProgress(userId: number): void {
148 |     this.router.navigate(['/admin/user-progress', userId]);
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   toggleRegisteredForSL(userId: number, subjectId: number, currentValue: boolean): void {
152 |     this.adminService.toggleRegisteredForSL(userId, subjectId, !currentValue).subscribe(
153 |       () => {
154 |         this.loadUsers(); // Reload the user list to reflect the changes
155 |       },
156 |       (error: any) => console.error('Error toggling registeredForSL:', error),
157 |     );
158 |   }
159 | 
160 |   onFileSelected(event: Event): void {
161 |     const element = event.target as HTMLInputElement;
162 |     const fileList: FileList | null = element.files;
163 |     if (fileList) {
164 |       this.selectedFile = fileList[0];
165 |     }
166 |   }
167 | 
168 |   uploadFile(): void {
169 |     if (this.selectedFile && this.selectedSubject !== null) {
170 |       const reader = new FileReader();
171 |       reader.onload = (e: ProgressEvent<FileReader>) => {
172 |         const content = e.target?.result as string;
173 |         const emails = content.split(';').map(email => email.trim());
174 |         this.adminService.processEmailsForSubject(emails, this.selectedSubject as number).subscribe(
175 |           (response: { message: string }) => {
176 |             console.log('File processed successfully');
177 |             this.snackBar.open(response.message, 'Close', {
178 |               duration: 5000,
179 |               horizontalPosition: 'center',
180 |               verticalPosition: 'bottom',
181 |             });
182 |             this.loadUsers(); // Reload the user list to reflect the changes
183 |           },
184 |           (error: any) => {
185 |             console.error('Error processing file:', error);
186 |             this.snackBar.open('Error processing file: ' + error.message, 'Close', {
187 |               duration: 5000,
188 |               horizontalPosition: 'center',
189 |               verticalPosition: 'bottom',
190 |             });
191 |           },
192 |         );
193 |       };
194 |       reader.readAsText(this.selectedFile);
195 |     } else {
196 |       this.snackBar.open('No file selected or subject not chosen', 'Close', {
197 |         duration: 5000,
198 |         horizontalPosition: 'center',
199 |         verticalPosition: 'bottom',
200 |       });
201 |     }
202 |   }
203 | 
204 |   logoutAllUsers(): void {
205 |     const dialog = this.dialog.open(ConfirmationBoxComponent, {
206 |       data: {
207 |         title: 'Alle Nutzer abmelden bestätigen',
208 |         message: 'Möchten Sie sich wirklich ALLE Nutzer abmelden?',
209 |         decline: 'Abbrechen',
210 |         accept: 'Abmelden',
211 |         swapButtons: false,
212 |         swapColors: true,
213 |       },
214 |     });
215 | 
216 |     dialog.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {
217 |       if (result) {
218 |         this.userService.logoutAllUser().then(() => {
219 |           // Open CAS logout URL in a new tab
220 |           window.open('https://cas.zimt.uni-siegen.de/cas/logout', '_blank');
221 | 
222 |           // Navigate to the login page in the current tab
223 |           this.router.navigate(['/login']);
224 |         });
225 |       }
226 |     });
227 |   }
228 | 
229 |   onContentFileSelected(event: any) {
230 |     const file = event.target.files[0];
231 |     if (file && file.type === 'application/json') {
232 |       this.selectedContentFile = file;
233 |     } else {
234 |       this.snackBar.open('Bitte wählen Sie eine JSON-Datei aus', 'Schließen', {
235 |         duration: 3000,
236 |       });
237 |       event.target.value = '';
238 |     }
239 |   }
240 | 
241 |   exportContent() {
242 |     this.contentManagementService.exportContent().subscribe({
243 |       next: data => {
244 |         // Create and download file
245 |         const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
246 |         const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
247 |         const link = document.createElement('a');
248 |         const date = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
249 |         link.href = url;
250 |         link.download = `learning-content-${date}.json`;
251 |         link.click();
252 |         window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
253 | 
254 |         this.snackBar.open('Lerninhalte wurden erfolgreich exportiert', 'Schließen', {
255 |           duration: 3000,
256 |         });
257 |       },
258 |       error: error => {
259 |         console.error('Export error:', error);
260 |         this.snackBar.open('Fehler beim Exportieren der Lerninhalte', 'Schließen', {
261 |           duration: 3000,
262 |         });
263 |       },
264 |     });
265 |   }
266 | 
267 |   importContent() {
268 |     if (!this.selectedContentFile) return;
269 | 
270 |     const reader = new FileReader();
271 |     reader.onload = e => {
272 |       try {
273 |         const data = JSON.parse(e.target?.result as string);
274 |         this.contentManagementService.importContent(data).subscribe({
275 |           next: () => {
276 |             this.snackBar.open('Lerninhalte wurden erfolgreich importiert', 'Schließen', {
277 |               duration: 3000,
278 |             });
279 |             this.selectedContentFile = null;
280 |           },
281 |           error: error => {
282 |             console.error('Import error:', error);
283 |             this.snackBar.open('Fehler beim Importieren der Lerninhalte', 'Schließen', {
284 |               duration: 3000,
285 |             });
286 |           },
287 |         });
288 |       } catch (err) {
289 |         console.error('JSON parse error:', err);
290 |         this.snackBar.open('Ungültiges Dateiformat', 'Schließen', {
291 |           duration: 3000,
292 |         });
293 |       }
294 |     };
295 |     reader.readAsText(this.selectedContentFile);
296 |   }
297 | }
```

src/app/Pages/admin/user-progress/user-progress.component.html

1 | <div class="user-progress-container" *ngIf="userDetails">
2 |   <mat-card class="user-details-card">
3 |     <mat-card-header>
4 |       <mat-card-title>User Details</mat-card-title>
5 |     </mat-card-header>
6 |     <mat-card-content>
7 |       <div class="user-info">
8 |         <p><strong>Name:</strong> {{ userDetails.firstname }} {{ userDetails.lastname }}</p>
9 |         <p><strong>Email:</strong> {{ userDetails.email }}</p>
10 |         <p><strong>Role:</strong> {{ userDetails.globalRole }}</p>
11 |         <p><strong>Created At:</strong> {{ userDetails.createdAt | date: 'medium' }}</p>
12 |       </div>
13 |       <div class="total-progress">
14 |         <h3>Total Progress</h3>
15 |         <mat-progress-bar
16 |           mode="determinate"
17 |           [value]="userDetails.totalProgress * 100"
18 |         ></mat-progress-bar>
19 |         <p>{{ userDetails.totalProgress | percent: '1.0-2' }}</p>
20 |       </div>
21 |     </mat-card-content>
22 |   </mat-card>
23 | 
24 |   <div class="chart-container">
25 |     <h2>Progress by Question Type</h2>
26 |     <ngx-charts-bar-vertical-stacked
27 |       [view]="view"
28 |       [scheme]="colorScheme"
29 |       [results]="questionTypeProgressData"
30 |       [gradient]="gradient"
31 |       [xAxis]="showXAxis"
32 |       [yAxis]="showYAxis"
33 |       [legend]="showLegend"
34 |       [showXAxisLabel]="showXAxisLabel"
35 |       [showYAxisLabel]="showYAxisLabel"
36 |       [xAxisLabel]="xAxisLabel"
37 |       [yAxisLabel]="yAxisLabel"
38 |     >
39 |     </ngx-charts-bar-vertical-stacked>
40 |   </div>
41 | 
42 |   <div class="chart-container">
43 |     <h2>Daily Progress</h2>
44 |     <ngx-charts-line-chart
45 |       [view]="dailyProgressView"
46 |       [scheme]="colorScheme"
47 |       [results]="dailyProgressData"
48 |       [gradient]="gradient"
49 |       [xAxis]="showXAxis"
50 |       [yAxis]="showYAxis"
51 |       [legend]="showLegend"
52 |       [showXAxisLabel]="showXAxisLabel"
53 |       [showYAxisLabel]="showYAxisLabel"
54 |       [xAxisLabel]="dailyProgressXAxisLabel"
55 |       [yAxisLabel]="dailyProgressYAxisLabel"
56 |       [autoScale]="true"
57 |     >
58 |     </ngx-charts-line-chart>
59 |   </div>
60 | </div>
61 | 
62 | <p *ngIf="!userDetails">Loading user progress...</p>
```

src/app/Pages/admin/user-progress/user-progress.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { ActivatedRoute } from '@angular/router';
4 | import {
5 |   AdminService,
6 |   QuestionTypeProgress,
7 |   DailyProgress,
8 |   UserDetails,
9 | } from '../services/admin.service';
10 | import { Color } from '@swimlane/ngx-charts';
11 | import { ScaleType } from '@swimlane/ngx-charts';
12 | 
13 | @Component({
14 |   selector: 'app-user-progress',
15 |   templateUrl: './user-progress.component.html',
16 |   styleUrls: ['./user-progress.component.scss'],
17 | })
18 | export class UserProgressComponent implements OnInit {
19 |   userId: number = 0;
20 |   userDetails: UserDetails | null = null;
21 |   questionTypeProgress: QuestionTypeProgress | null = null;
22 |   dailyProgress: DailyProgress[] | null = null;
23 | 
24 |   // ngx-charts data
25 |   questionTypeProgressData: any[] = [];
26 |   dailyProgressData: any[] = [];
27 | 
28 |   // Chart options
29 |   view: [number, number] = [700, 400];
30 |   showXAxis: boolean = true;
31 |   showYAxis: boolean = true;
32 |   gradient: boolean = false;
33 |   showLegend: boolean = true;
34 |   showXAxisLabel: boolean = true;
35 |   xAxisLabel: string = 'Question Types';
36 |   showYAxisLabel: boolean = true;
37 |   yAxisLabel: string = 'Questions';
38 |   colorScheme: Color = {
39 |     name: 'custom',
40 |     selectable: true,
41 |     group: ScaleType.Ordinal,
42 |     domain: ['#5AA454', '#A10A28', '#C7B42C', '#AAAAAA'],
43 |   };
44 | 
45 |   // Daily progress chart options
46 |   dailyProgressView: [number, number] = [700, 300];
47 |   dailyProgressXAxisLabel: string = 'Date';
48 |   dailyProgressYAxisLabel: string = 'Completed Tasks';
49 | 
50 |   constructor(
51 |     private readonly route: ActivatedRoute,
52 |     private readonly adminService: AdminService,
53 |   ) {}
54 | 
55 |   ngOnInit(): void {
56 |     this.userId = +this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('userId')!;
57 |     this.loadUserDetails();
58 |     this.loadUserProgress();
59 |   }
60 | 
61 |   loadUserDetails(): void {
62 |     this.adminService.getUserDetails(this.userId).subscribe(
63 |       (details: UserDetails) => {
64 |         this.userDetails = details;
65 |       },
66 |       (error: any) => console.error('Error loading user details:', error),
67 |     );
68 |   }
69 | 
70 |   loadUserProgress(): void {
71 |     this.adminService.getUserProgressByQuestionType(this.userId).subscribe(
72 |       (progress: QuestionTypeProgress) => {
73 |         this.questionTypeProgress = progress;
74 |         this.updateQuestionTypeProgressData();
75 |       },
76 |       (error: any) => console.error('Error loading question type progress:', error),
77 |     );
78 | 
79 |     this.adminService.getUserDailyProgress(this.userId).subscribe(
80 |       (progress: DailyProgress[]) => {
81 |         this.dailyProgress = progress;
82 |         this.updateDailyProgressData();
83 |       },
84 |       (error: any) => console.error('Error loading daily progress:', error),
85 |     );
86 |   }
87 | 
88 |   updateQuestionTypeProgressData(): void {
89 |     if (this.questionTypeProgress) {
90 |       this.questionTypeProgressData = Object.entries(this.questionTypeProgress).map(
91 |         ([type, data]) => ({
92 |           name: type,
93 |           series: [
94 |             {
95 |               name: 'Completed',
96 |               value: data.completed || 0,
97 |             },
98 |             {
99 |               name: 'Remaining',
100 |               value: (data.total || 0) - (data.completed || 0),
101 |             },
102 |           ],
103 |         }),
104 |       );
105 |     } else {
106 |       this.questionTypeProgressData = [];
107 |     }
108 |   }
109 | 
110 |   updateDailyProgressData(): void {
111 |     if (this.dailyProgress) {
112 |       this.dailyProgressData = [
113 |         {
114 |           name: 'Daily Progress',
115 |           series: this.dailyProgress.map(progress => ({
116 |             name: progress.date,
117 |             value: progress.count,
118 |           })),
119 |         },
120 |       ];
121 |     } else {
122 |       this.dailyProgressData = [];
123 |     }
124 |   }
125 | }
```

src/app/Pages/app-header/navigation-preference-toggle/navigation-preference-toggle.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit, Component } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
3 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
4 | import {
5 |   NavigationPreferenceService,
6 |   NavigationType,
7 | } from 'src/app/Services/navigation/navigation-preference.service';
8 | import { NavigationPreferenceSettingsComponent } from '../navigation-preference-settings/navigation-preference-settings.component';
9 | import { UserService } from 'src/app/Services/auth/user.service';
10 | 
11 | @Component({
12 |   selector: 'app-navigation-preference-toggle',
13 |   templateUrl: './navigation-preference-toggle.component.html',
14 |   styleUrls: ['./navigation-preference-toggle.component.scss'],
15 | })
16 | export class NavigationPreferenceToggleComponent implements OnInit {
17 |   currentPreference: NavigationType = 'graph';
18 |   isEditMode = false;
19 | 
20 |   constructor(
21 |     private readonly dialog: MatDialog,
22 |     private readonly navigationPreferenceService: NavigationPreferenceService,
23 |     private readonly router: Router,
24 |     private readonly userService: UserService,
25 |   ) {}
26 | 
27 |   ngOnInit(): void {
28 |     this.currentPreference = this.navigationPreferenceService.currentPreference;
29 | 
30 |     // Subscribe to changes in the navigation preference
31 |     this.navigationPreferenceService.preference$.subscribe(preference => {
32 |       this.currentPreference = preference;
33 |     });
34 | 
35 |     // Subscribe to edit mode changes
36 |     this.userService.hasEditModeActive$.subscribe(isEdit => {
37 |       this.isEditMode = isEdit;
38 | 
39 |       // Reload enabled navigation types when edit mode changes
40 |       // Using module ID 1 as default
41 |       this.navigationPreferenceService.loadEnabledNavigationTypes(1).subscribe();
42 |     });
43 |   }
44 | 
45 |   /**
46 |    * Toggles between navigation types and updates the current route
47 |    */
48 |   toggleNavigationPreference(): void {
49 |     this.navigationPreferenceService.toggleNavigationPreference();
50 | 
51 |     // Redirect to the appropriate navigation component based on the new preference
52 |     const currentUrl = this.router.url;
53 | 
54 |     // Only redirect if the user is currently on one of the navigation pages
55 |     if (
56 |       currentUrl.includes('/graph') ||
57 |       currentUrl.includes('/mobile-navigator') ||
58 |       currentUrl.includes('/highlight-navigator')
59 |     ) {
60 |       const newPreference = this.navigationPreferenceService.currentPreference;
61 |       const routes = {
62 |         graph: '/dashboard/graph',
63 |         mobile: '/dashboard/mobile-navigator',
64 |         highlight: '/dashboard/highlight-navigator',
65 |       };
66 |       this.router.navigate([routes[newPreference]]);
67 |     }
68 |   }
69 | 
70 |   /**
71 |    * Get the tooltip text based on the current preference
72 |    */
73 |   get toggleTooltip(): string {
74 |     switch (this.currentPreference) {
75 |       case 'graph':
76 |         return 'Wechseln zur mobilen Navigation';
77 |       case 'mobile':
78 |         return 'Wechseln zur Highlight-Navigation';
79 |       default:
80 |         return 'Wechseln zur Graph-Navigation';
81 |     }
82 |   }
83 | 
84 |   /**
85 |    * Get the toggle button label based on the current preference
86 |    */
87 |   get toggleLabel(): string {
88 |     switch (this.currentPreference) {
89 |       case 'graph':
90 |         return 'Graph-Navigation';
91 |       case 'mobile':
92 |         return 'Mobile Navigation';
93 |       default:
94 |         return 'Highlight Navigation';
95 |     }
96 |   }
97 | 
98 |   /**
99 |    * Get the toggle icon based on the current preference
100 |    */
101 |   get toggleIcon(): string {
102 |     switch (this.currentPreference) {
103 |       case 'graph':
104 |         return 'view_list'; // Material icon for mobile view
105 |       case 'mobile':
106 |         return 'stars'; // Material icon for highlight view
107 |       default:
108 |         return 'account_tree'; // Material icon for graph view
109 |     }
110 |   }
111 | 
112 |   /**
113 |    * Opens the settings dialog for navigation preferences
114 |    */
115 |   openSettings(): void {
116 |     const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(NavigationPreferenceSettingsComponent, {
117 |       width: '400px',
118 |       data: { moduleId: 3 }, // TODO: Get the current module ID
119 |     });
120 | 
121 |     dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(result => {
122 |       if (result) {
123 |         // Refresh available navigation types
124 |         this.navigationPreferenceService.loadEnabledNavigationTypes(1).subscribe();
125 |       }
126 |     });
127 |   }
128 | }
```

src/app/Pages/app-header/navigation-preference-settings/navigation-preference-settings.component.html
```
1 | <div class="settings-container mat-elevation-z2">
2 |   <h2>Navigationsmöglichkeiten konfigurieren</h2>
3 | 
4 |   <div class="options-list">
5 |     <mat-checkbox
6 |       *ngFor="let option of navigatorOptions"
7 |       [(ngModel)]="option.enabled"
8 |       [disabled]="isLastEnabledOption(option)"
9 |     >
10 |       {{ option.label }}
11 |     </mat-checkbox>
12 |   </div>
13 | 
14 |   <div class="actions">
15 |     <button mat-button mat-dialog-close>Abbrechen</button>
16 |     <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="onSave()" [disabled]="!hasEnabledOptions()">
17 |       Speichern
18 |     </button>
19 |   </div>
20 | </div>
```

7 |   }
