src/app/Pages/discussion/discussion-votebox/discussion-votebox.component.ts
```
1 | import { Component, Input, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { discussionMessageVoteCreationDTO, discussionMessageVoteDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
3 | import { DiscussionViewService } from 'src/app/Services/discussion/discussion-view.service';
4 | import { DiscussionVoteService } from 'src/app/Services/discussion/discussion-vote.service';
5 | 
6 | @Component({
7 |   selector: 'app-discussion-votebox',
8 |   templateUrl: './discussion-votebox.component.html',
9 |   styleUrls: ['./discussion-votebox.component.scss'],
10 | })
11 | export class DiscussionVoteboxComponent implements OnInit {
12 |   @Input() messageId: number = -1; // to be changed on init
13 |   @Input() isSolution: boolean = false;
14 |   @Input() canMarkAsSolution: boolean = false;
15 |   //@Input() userId: number = 1; //HAS TO BE CHANGED
16 | 
17 |   userVoteStatus: number = 0; /* 0 = nicht gevotet, 1 = upvote, -1 = downvote */
18 | 
19 |   timeoutID: any;
20 | 
21 |   voteData: discussionMessageVoteDTO = {
22 |     messageId: -1,
23 |     votes: 0,
24 |     userVoteStatus: 0,
25 |   };
26 | 
27 |   constructor(
28 |     private readonly discussionVoteService: DiscussionVoteService,
29 |     private readonly discussionViewService: DiscussionViewService,
30 |   ) {}
31 | 
32 |   /**
33 |    * Gets the vote data for the message
34 |    */
35 |   ngOnInit(): void {
36 |     this.discussionVoteService
37 |       .getVoteData(this.messageId)
38 |       .subscribe(voteData => (this.voteData = voteData));
39 |   }
40 | 
41 |   /**
42 |    * Changes the vote status of the user to upvote or removes the upvote
43 |    * To prevent too many requests to the server, the vote status is only set after a timeout of 1 second
44 |    */
45 |   onUpvote(event: Event) {
46 |     event.stopPropagation();
47 |     if (this.voteData.userVoteStatus != 1) {
48 |       this.voteData.userVoteStatus = 1;
49 |     } else {
50 |       this.voteData.userVoteStatus = 0;
51 |     }
52 |     this.resetTimerSetStatus();
53 |   }
54 | 
55 |   /**
56 |    * Changes the vote status of the user to downvote or removes the downvote
57 |    * To prevent too many requests to the server, the vote status is only set after a timeout of 1 second
58 |    */
59 |   onDownvote(event: Event) {
60 |     event.stopPropagation();
61 |     if (this.voteData.userVoteStatus != -1) {
62 |       this.voteData.userVoteStatus = -1;
63 |     } else {
64 |       this.voteData.userVoteStatus = 0;
65 |     }
66 |     this.resetTimerSetStatus();
67 |   }
68 | 
69 |   onMarkAsSolution(event: Event) {
70 |     event.stopPropagation();
71 |     this.discussionViewService
72 |       .toggleSolution(this.messageId)
73 |       .subscribe(isSolution => (this.isSolution = isSolution));
74 |   }
75 | 
76 |   /**
77 |    * Sets the vote status after a timeout of 1 second
78 |    * This is done to prevent too many requests to the server
79 |    * If the timeout is reached, the vote status is set
80 |    */
81 |   resetTimerSetStatus() {
82 |     if (this.timeoutID) {
83 |       clearTimeout(this.timeoutID);
84 |     }
85 |     this.timeoutID = setTimeout(() => {
86 |       const voteCreationData: discussionMessageVoteCreationDTO = {
87 |         messageId: this.messageId,
88 |         voteStatus: this.voteData.userVoteStatus,
89 |       };
90 |       this.discussionVoteService.createOrModifyVote(voteCreationData).subscribe();
91 |     }, 1000);
92 |   }
93 | }
```

src/app/Pages/graph/sprotty/actionHandler.ts
```
1 | // client_angular/src/app/Pages/graph/sprotty/actionHandlerInitializer.ts
2 | 
3 | import { inject, injectable } from 'inversify';
4 | import { ActionHandlerRegistry } from 'sprotty';
5 | import { TYPES } from 'sprotty';
6 | import { TouchEventActionHandler } from './touchEventActionHandler';
7 | import { CustomAction, TouchEventAction } from './actions';
8 | import { TYPESS } from './symbols';
9 | import { CustomActionHandler } from './customActionHandler';
10 | 
11 | @injectable()
12 | export class ActionHandlerInitializer {
13 |   constructor(
14 |     @inject(TYPESS.ActionHandlerRegistry) private readonly registry: ActionHandlerRegistry,
15 |     @inject(TYPESS.TouchEventActionHandler)
16 |     private readonly touchEventActionHandler: TouchEventActionHandler,
17 |     @inject(TYPESS.CustomActionHandler) private readonly customActionHandler: CustomActionHandler,
18 |   ) {}
19 | 
20 |   initialize(): void {
21 |     this.registry.register(TouchEventAction.KIND, this.touchEventActionHandler);
22 |     this.registry.register(CustomAction.KIND, this.customActionHandler);
23 |   }
24 | }
```

src/app/Pages/graph/sprotty/actions.ts
```
1 | import { Action } from 'sprotty-protocol';
2 | import { SprottyConceptNode } from './sprottyModels.interface';
3 | 
4 | // these actions are handled in the model-source.
5 | // to use, the actionDispatcher.dispatch() function is called with the action as an argument
6 | // it needs to be injected into the class that calls it, for an example see the mouse-interactions.ts file
7 | // @inject has to be imported from inversify for this to work, not from angular/core!
8 | 
9 | export interface TouchEventAction extends Action {
10 |   kind: typeof TouchEventAction.KIND;
11 |   touchEvent: TouchEvent;
12 | }
13 | 
14 | export namespace TouchEventAction {
15 |   export const KIND = 'touchEvent';
16 | 
17 |   export function create(touchEvent: TouchEvent): TouchEventAction {
18 |     return {
19 |       kind: KIND,
20 |       touchEvent: touchEvent,
21 |     };
22 |   }
23 | }
24 | export interface CreateConceptAction extends Action {
25 |   kind: typeof CreateConceptAction.KIND;
26 |   parentId: string;
27 | }
28 | export namespace CreateConceptAction {
29 |   export const KIND = 'createConcept';
30 | 
31 |   export function create(options: { parentId: string }): CreateConceptAction {
32 |     return {
33 |       kind: KIND,
34 |       parentId: options.parentId,
35 |     };
36 |   }
37 | }
38 | 
39 | export interface DeleteConceptAction extends Action {
40 |   kind: typeof DeleteConceptAction.KIND;
41 |   conceptId: string;
42 | }
43 | export namespace DeleteConceptAction {
44 |   export const KIND = 'deleteConcept';
45 | 
46 |   export function create(options: { conceptId: string }): DeleteConceptAction {
47 |     return {
48 |       kind: KIND,
49 |       conceptId: options.conceptId,
50 |     };
51 |   }
52 | }
53 | 
54 | // increases concept level of user by 1
55 | export interface AwardLevelAction extends Action {
56 |   kind: typeof AwardLevelAction.KIND;
57 |   conceptId: string;
58 | }
59 | 
60 | export namespace AwardLevelAction {
61 |   export const KIND = 'awardLevel';
62 | 
63 |   export function create(options: { conceptId: string }): AwardLevelAction {
64 |     return {
65 |       kind: KIND,
66 |       conceptId: options.conceptId,
67 |     };
68 |   }
69 | }
70 | 
71 | export interface CreateEdgeAction extends Action {
72 |   kind: typeof CreateEdgeAction.KIND;
73 |   conceptId: string;
74 |   connectionType: string;
75 | }
76 | 
77 | export namespace CreateEdgeAction {
78 |   export const KIND = 'createEdge';
79 | 
80 |   export function create(options: { conceptId: string; connectionType: string }): CreateEdgeAction {
81 |     return {
82 |       kind: KIND,
83 |       conceptId: options.conceptId,
84 |       connectionType: options.connectionType,
85 |     };
86 |   }
87 | }
88 | 
89 | export interface MoveNodeAction extends Action {
90 |   kind: typeof MoveNodeAction.KIND;
91 |   conceptId: string;
92 | }
93 | 
94 | export namespace MoveNodeAction {
95 |   export const KIND = 'moveNode';
96 | 
97 |   export function create(options: { conceptId: string }): MoveNodeAction {
98 |     return {
99 |       kind: KIND,
100 |       conceptId: options.conceptId,
101 |     };
102 |   }
103 | }
104 | 
105 | export interface CustomAction extends Action {
106 |   kind: typeof CustomAction.KIND;
107 |   nodeId: string;
108 | }
109 | 
110 | export namespace CustomAction {
111 |   export const KIND = 'custom';
112 | 
113 |   export function create(options: { nodeId: string }): CustomAction {
114 |     return {
115 |       kind: KIND,
116 |       nodeId: options.nodeId,
117 |     };
118 |   }
119 | }
```

12 |  * https://www.gnu.org/software/classpath/license.html.
13 |  *
14 |  * SPDX-License-Identifier: EPL-2.0 OR GPL-2.0 WITH Classpath-exception-2.0
15 |  ********************************************************************************/
16 | 
17 | import { inject, injectable } from 'inversify';
18 | import {
19 |   Anchor,
20 |   IActionDispatcher,
21 |   IContextMenuItemProvider,
22 |   IContextMenuService,
23 |   MenuItem,
24 |   SModelRootImpl,
25 |   ViewerOptions,
26 | } from 'sprotty';
27 | import { EMPTY_ROOT, LabeledAction, RequestExportSvgAction, SNodeImpl, TYPES } from 'sprotty';
28 | import { Point, SelectionResult } from 'sprotty-protocol';
29 | import {
30 |   CenterAction,
31 |   GetSelectionAction,
32 |   DeleteElementAction,
33 |   FitToScreenAction,
34 |   SetPopupModelAction,
35 |   CreateElementAction,
36 | } from 'sprotty-protocol';
37 | 
38 | import { SprottyConceptNode } from './sprottyModels.interface';
39 | import {
40 |   AwardLevelAction,
41 |   CreateConceptAction,
42 |   CreateEdgeAction,
43 |   DeleteConceptAction,
44 |   MoveNodeAction,
45 | } from './actions';
46 | @injectable()
47 | export class ClassContextMenuService implements IContextMenuService {
48 |   @inject(TYPES.IActionDispatcher) readonly actionDispatcher!: IActionDispatcher;
49 |   @inject(TYPES.ViewerOptions) protected viewerOptions!: ViewerOptions;
50 | 
51 |   show(items: MenuItem[], anchor: Anchor, onHide?: () => void): void {
52 |     this.actionDispatcher.dispatch(SetPopupModelAction.create(EMPTY_ROOT));
53 |     const container = document.getElementById(this.viewerOptions.baseDiv);
54 |     let menuNode: HTMLDivElement;
55 |     const hideMenu = () => {
56 |       container?.removeChild(menuNode);
57 |       if (onHide) {
58 |         onHide();
59 |       }
60 |     };
61 |     menuNode = this.createMenu(items, hideMenu);
62 |     menuNode.style.top = anchor.y - 100 + 'px';
63 |     menuNode.style.left = anchor.x - 100 + 'px';
64 |     menuNode.autofocus = true;
65 |     console.log(anchor);
66 | 
67 |     container?.appendChild(menuNode);
68 |     menuNode.onmouseleave = (e: MouseEvent) => hideMenu();
69 |   }
70 | 
71 |   protected createMenu(items: MenuItem[], closeCallback: () => void): HTMLDivElement {
72 |     const menuNode = document.createElement('div');
73 |     menuNode.id = 'class-context-menu';
74 |     menuNode.classList.add('class-context-menu');
75 |     items.forEach((item, index) => {
76 |       const menuItem = document.createElement('div');
77 |       menuItem.id = 'class-context-menu-item-' + index;
78 |       menuItem.classList.add('class-context-menu-item');
79 |       const itemEnabled = item.isEnabled ? item.isEnabled() : true;
80 |       if (!itemEnabled) menuItem.classList.add('disabled-action');
81 |       menuItem.textContent = item.label;
82 |       menuItem.onclick = (e: MouseEvent) => {
83 |         closeCallback();
84 |         if (itemEnabled && item.actions.length > 0) {
85 |           this.actionDispatcher.dispatchAll(item.actions);
86 |         }
87 |       };
88 |       menuNode.appendChild(menuItem);
89 |     });
90 |     return menuNode;
91 |   }
92 | }
93 | 
94 | @injectable()
95 | export class ClassContextMenuItemProvider implements IContextMenuItemProvider {
96 |   @inject(TYPES.IActionDispatcher) readonly actionDispatcher!: IActionDispatcher;
97 | 
98 |   async getItems(
99 |     root: Readonly<SModelRootImpl>,
100 |     lastMousePosition?: Point,
101 |   ): Promise<LabeledAction[]> {
102 |     const selectionResult = await this.actionDispatcher.request<SelectionResult>(
103 |       GetSelectionAction.create(),
104 |     );
105 |     const selectedElement = selectionResult.selectedElementsIDs[0];
106 |     return [
107 |       new LabeledAction('Fit Diagram to Screen', [
108 |         FitToScreenAction.create(root.children.map(child => child.id)),
109 |       ]),
110 |       new LabeledAction('Center Selection', [
111 |         CenterAction.create(selectionResult.selectedElementsIDs),
112 |       ]),
113 |       new LabeledAction('', []),
114 |       new LabeledAction('Export SVG', [RequestExportSvgAction.create()]),
115 |       new LabeledAction('', []),
116 | 
117 |       // custom options for admins
118 |       new LabeledAction('', []),
119 |       new LabeledAction('Add Concept here', [
120 |         CreateConceptAction.create({ parentId: selectedElement }),
121 |       ]),
122 |       new LabeledAction('Delete this Concept or Edge', [
123 |         DeleteConceptAction.create({ conceptId: selectedElement }),
124 |       ]),
125 |       new LabeledAction('Add prerequisite', [
126 |         CreateEdgeAction.create({ conceptId: selectedElement, connectionType: 'prerequisite' }),
127 |       ]),
128 |       new LabeledAction('Add successor', [
129 |         CreateEdgeAction.create({ conceptId: selectedElement, connectionType: 'successor' }),
130 |       ]),
131 |       new LabeledAction('Move to new Parent', [
132 |         MoveNodeAction.create({ conceptId: selectedElement }),
133 |       ]),
134 |       new LabeledAction('debug: Award 1 Level', [
135 |         AwardLevelAction.create({ conceptId: selectedElement }),
136 |       ]),
137 |     ];
138 |   }
139 | }
```

src/app/Pages/graph/sprotty/di.config.ts
```
1 | import { Container, ContainerModule } from 'inversify';
2 | import {
3 |   configureModelElement,
4 |   configureViewerOptions,
5 |   loadDefaultModules,
6 |   LocalModelSource,
7 |   PolylineEdgeView,
8 |   SCompartmentView,
9 |   SCompartmentImpl,
10 |   SEdgeImpl,
11 |   SGraphImpl,
12 |   SGraphView,
13 |   SLabelImpl,
14 |   SLabelView,
15 |   SNodeImpl,
16 |   TYPES,
17 |   RectangularNode,
18 |   expandFeature,
19 |   nameFeature,
20 |   SButtonImpl,
21 |   configureButtonHandler,
22 |   SRoutingHandleImpl,
23 |   SRoutingHandleView,
24 |   SModelElementImpl,
25 |   SPortImpl,
26 |   ConsoleLogger,
27 |   LogLevel,
28 |   moveFeature,
29 |   selectFeature,
30 |   editFeature,
31 | } from 'sprotty';
32 | import { ConceptNodeView, CustomExpandButtonView, LeafConceptView, MiniConceptView } from './views';
33 | import { ConceptGraphModelSource } from './model-source';
34 | import { LayoutOptions } from 'elkjs';
35 | import ElkConstructor from 'elkjs';
36 | import {
37 |   DefaultLayoutConfigurator,
38 |   ElkFactory,
39 |   ElkLayoutEngine,
40 |   ILayoutConfigurator,
41 |   elkLayoutModule,
42 | } from 'sprotty-elk/lib/inversify';
43 | import { SGraph as SGraphP, SModelIndex, SNode as SNodeP } from 'sprotty-protocol';
44 | import { Point } from 'sprotty-protocol';
45 | import { CustomMouseListener } from './mouse-interactions';
46 | import { CustomActionHandler } from './customActionHandler';
47 | import { TYPESS } from './symbols';
48 | import { ActionHandlerInitializer } from './actionHandler';
49 | 
50 | // This file creates an inversify container for the sprotty diagram.
51 | export default (containerId: string) => {
52 |   const elkFactory: ElkFactory = () =>
53 |     new ElkConstructor({
54 |       algorithms: ['layered'],
55 |     });
56 | 
57 |   const myModule = new ContainerModule((bind: any, unbind: any, isBound: any, rebind: any) => {
58 |     bind(TYPES.ModelSource).to(ConceptGraphModelSource).inSingletonScope();
59 |     rebind(TYPES.ILogger).to(ConsoleLogger).inSingletonScope();
60 |     rebind(TYPES.LogLevel).toConstantValue(LogLevel.error);
61 |     bind(TYPES.IModelLayoutEngine).toService(ElkLayoutEngine);
62 |     bind(ElkFactory).toConstantValue(elkFactory);
63 |     rebind(ILayoutConfigurator).to(RandomGraphLayoutConfigurator);
64 |     bind(TYPESS.CustomActionHandler).to(CustomActionHandler).inSingletonScope();
65 |     bind(ActionHandlerInitializer).toSelf().inSingletonScope();
66 |     //double click
67 |     bind(CustomMouseListener).toSelf().inSingletonScope();
68 |     bind(TYPES.MouseListener).toService(CustomMouseListener);
69 | 
70 |     const context = { bind, unbind, isBound, rebind };
71 |     configureModelElement(context, 'graph', SGraphImpl, SGraphView);
72 |     configureModelElement(context, 'node:concept', RectangularNode, ConceptNodeView, {
73 |       enable: [expandFeature],
74 |       disable: [moveFeature],
75 |     });
76 |     configureModelElement(context, 'node:mini-concept', RectangularNode, MiniConceptView, {
77 |       disable: [moveFeature],
78 |     });
79 |     configureModelElement(context, 'node:leaf-concept', RectangularNode, LeafConceptView, {
80 |       disable: [moveFeature],
81 |     });
82 |     configureModelElement(context, 'edge', SEdgeImpl, PolylineEdgeView, {
83 |       disable: [editFeature],
84 |     });
85 |     configureModelElement(context, 'label:heading', SLabelImpl, SLabelView);
86 |     configureModelElement(context, 'label:text', SLabelImpl, SLabelView);
87 |     configureModelElement(context, 'comp', SCompartmentImpl, SCompartmentView);
88 | 
89 |     //collapse expand button
90 |     configureModelElement(context, 'button:expand', SButtonImpl, CustomExpandButtonView);
91 | 
92 |     configureViewerOptions(context, {
93 |       needsClientLayout: true,
94 |       baseDiv: containerId,
95 |     });
96 |   });
97 | 
98 |   const container = new Container();
99 |   loadDefaultModules(container);
100 |   container.load(elkLayoutModule, myModule);
101 |   return container;
102 | };
103 | 
104 | // This class is used to configure the layouting done by elk.
105 | // elk-sprotty does some layouting beforehand to calculate the sizes of
106 | // labels and stuff, so not every elk configuration actually does something
107 | export class RandomGraphLayoutConfigurator extends DefaultLayoutConfigurator {
108 |   protected override graphOptions(sgraph: SGraphP, index: SModelIndex): LayoutOptions | undefined {
109 |     return {
110 |       'org.eclipse.elk.algorithm': 'org.eclipse.elk.layered',
111 |       'org.eclipse.elk.nodeLabels.padding': '[top=5, bottom=0, left=25, right=25]', // important for button-label spacing
112 |       'org.eclipse.elk.spacing.edgeNode': '20', // space between node and edge
113 |     };
114 |   }
115 | 
116 |   protected override nodeOptions(snode: SNodeP, index: SModelIndex): LayoutOptions | undefined {
117 |     if (snode.type === 'node:concept') {
118 |       return {
119 |         'org.eclipse.elk.nodeSize.constraints': 'PORTS PORT_LABELS NODE_LABELS MINIMUM_SIZE',
120 |         'org.eclipse.elk.nodeLabels.placement': 'INSIDE H_CENTER V_TOP', // very important
121 |         'org.eclipse.elk.nodeLabels.padding': '[top=5, bottom=0, left=25, right=25]',
122 |         'org.eclipse.elk.padding': '[top=30, bottom=20, left=20, right=20]',
123 |         'org.eclipse.elk.spacing.labelLabel': '5',
124 |         'org.eclipse.elk.spacing.edgeNode': '20', // space between node and edge
125 |         //'org.eclipse.elk.layered.spacing.nodeNodeBetweenLayers': '500', // space between two connected nodes
126 |       };
127 |     }
128 |     if (snode.type === 'node:leaf-concept') {
129 |       return {
130 |         'org.eclipse.elk.nodeSize.constraints': 'PORTS PORT_LABELS NODE_LABELS MINIMUM_SIZE',
131 |         'org.eclipse.elk.nodeSize.minimum': '(130, 40)',
132 |         'org.eclipse.elk.nodeLabels.placement': 'INSIDE H_CENTER V_CENTER', // very important
133 |         'org.eclipse.elk.nodeLabels.padding': '[top=10, bottom=10, left=25, right=25]',
134 |         'org.eclipse.elk.spacing.edgeNode': '20', // space between node and edge
135 |         'org.eclipse.elk.spacing.labelLabel': '5',
136 |       };
137 |     }
138 |     return {
139 |       'org.eclipse.elk.nodeSize.constraints': 'PORTS PORT_LABELS NODE_LABELS MINIMUM_SIZE',
140 |       'org.eclipse.elk.nodeLabels.placement': 'INSIDE H_CENTER V_TOP', // very important
141 |       'org.eclipse.elk.nodeLabels.padding': '[top=0, bottom=0, left=25, right=25]',
142 |       'org.eclipse.elk.spacing.labelLabel': '5',
143 |       'org.eclipse.elk.spacing.edgeNode': '20', // space between node and edge
144 |       //'org.eclipse.elk.layered.spacing.nodeNodeBetweenLayers': '500', // space between two connected nodes
145 |     };
146 |   }
147 | }
```

src/app/Pages/graph/sprotty/model-source.ts
```
1 | import { injectable } from 'inversify';
2 | import { ActionHandlerRegistry } from 'sprotty';
3 | import { LocalModelSource } from 'sprotty';
4 | import { ConceptGraphDTO, ConceptNodeDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
5 | import { SprottyConceptEdge, SprottyConceptNode } from './sprottyModels.interface';
6 | //import { SModelIndex } from 'sprotty-protocol/lib/utils/model-utils';
7 | import {
8 |   Action,
9 |   SEdge,
10 |   SGraph,
11 |   SLabel,
12 |   SNode,
13 |   SShapeElement,
14 |   Expandable,
15 | } from 'sprotty-protocol';
16 | import {
17 |   CollapseExpandAction,
18 |   SModelIndex,
19 |   SelectAction,
20 |   CenterAction,
21 |   FitToScreenAction,
22 | } from 'sprotty-protocol';
23 | import { GraphCommunicationService } from 'src/app/Services/graph/graphCommunication.service';
24 | import { GraphDataService } from 'src/app/Services/graph/graph-data.service';
25 | import { OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
26 | import { inject as injectAngular } from '@angular/core';
27 | import {
28 |   AwardLevelAction,
29 |   CreateConceptAction,
30 |   CreateEdgeAction,
31 |   DeleteConceptAction,
32 |   MoveNodeAction,
33 | } from './actions';
34 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
35 | import { CreateConceptDialogComponent } from '../graph-dialogs/create-concept-dialog/create-concept-dialog.component';
36 | import { Subscription } from 'rxjs';
37 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
38 | 
39 | @injectable()
40 | export class ConceptGraphModelSource extends LocalModelSource implements OnDestroy {
41 |   private readonly GraphCommunicationService: GraphCommunicationService =
42 |     GraphCommunicationService.getInstance();
43 |   private readonly graphUpdateSubscription: Subscription;
44 |   private flatGraph: ConceptGraphDTO = {
45 |     id: 0,
46 |     name: '',
47 |     nodeMap: {},
48 |     edgeMap: {},
49 |     trueRootId: 0,
50 |   };
51 |   graphData: GraphDataService | undefined;
52 |   private readonly dialog: MatDialog | undefined;
53 |   currentModule = 1;
54 |   router: Router | undefined;
55 |   // private variables for editing the graph
56 |   // undefined if no change is in progress
57 |   private EdgeCreator: { concept: string; type: string } | undefined;
58 |   private NodeMover: { concept: string } | undefined;
59 | 
60 |   constructor() {
61 |     super();
62 |     this.router = injectAngular(Router);
63 |     this.dialog = injectAngular(MatDialog);
64 |     this.graphData = injectAngular(GraphDataService);
65 |     this.getUserGraph();
66 |     this.graphUpdateSubscription = this.GraphCommunicationService.graphUpdateNeeded.subscribe(
67 |       () => {
68 |         this.getUserGraph();
69 |       },
70 |     );
71 |   }
72 | 
73 |   /**
74 |    * @description Initializes the model source.
75 |    * @param {ActionHandlerRegistry} registry - The action handler registry.
76 |    * @returns {void}
77 |    */
78 |   override initialize(registry: ActionHandlerRegistry): void {
79 |     super.initialize(registry);
80 |     // register all actions handled by this model source
81 |     registry.register(SelectAction.KIND, this);
82 |     registry.register(CollapseExpandAction.KIND, this);
83 |     registry.register(CreateConceptAction.KIND, this);
84 |     registry.register(DeleteConceptAction.KIND, this);
85 |     registry.register(AwardLevelAction.KIND, this);
86 |     registry.register(CreateEdgeAction.KIND, this);
87 |     registry.register(MoveNodeAction.KIND, this);
88 |   }
89 | 
90 |   /**
91 |    * @description Handles the action.
92 |    * @param {Action} action - The action to handle.
93 |    * @returns {void}
94 |    */
95 |   override handle(action: Action): void {
96 |     //console.log("action: ", action)
97 |     switch (action.kind) {
98 |       case SelectAction.KIND:
99 |         this.handleSelectAction(action as SelectAction);
100 |         break;
101 |       case CollapseExpandAction.KIND:
102 |         this.handleCollapseExpandAction(action as CollapseExpandAction);
103 |         break;
104 | 
105 |       case CreateConceptAction.KIND:
106 |         this.handleCreateConceptAction(action as CreateConceptAction);
107 |         break;
108 | 
109 |       case DeleteConceptAction.KIND:
110 |         this.handleDeleteConceptAction(action as DeleteConceptAction);
111 |         break;
112 | 
113 |       case AwardLevelAction.KIND:
114 |         this.handleAwardLevelAction(action as AwardLevelAction);
115 |         break;
116 | 
117 |       case CreateEdgeAction.KIND:
118 |         this.handleCreateEdgeAction(action as CreateEdgeAction);
119 |         break;
120 | 
121 |       case MoveNodeAction.KIND:
122 |         this.handleMoveNodeAction(action as MoveNodeAction);
123 |         break;
124 | 
125 |       default:
126 |         super.handle(action);
127 |     }
128 |   }
129 | 
130 |   /**
131 |    * @description Fetches the user graph from the server and initializes the graph
132 |    * @returns {void}
133 |    */
134 |   private getUserGraph(): void {
135 |     this.graphData!.fetchUserGraph(this.currentModule).subscribe(graph => {
136 |       this.initGraph(graph);
137 |       console.log('graph updated');
138 |     });
139 |   }
140 | 
141 |   /**
142 |    * @description Initializes the graph with the given flatGraph by creating the root node and adding the first layer of nodes and edges.
143 |    * The recursive function addChildren is called for each node to add its children.
144 |    * @param {ConceptGraphDTO} flatGraph - The graph to be initialized.
145 |    * @returns {void}
146 |    */
147 |   public initGraph(flatGraph: ConceptGraphDTO): void {
148 |     this.flatGraph = flatGraph;
149 | 
150 |     const graph: SGraph = {
151 |       type: 'graph',
152 |       id: 'root',
153 |       children: [],
154 |       layoutOptions: {
155 |         //hGap: 5,
156 |         hAlign: 'left',
157 |         // paddingLeft: 7,
158 |         // paddingRight: 7,
159 |         // paddingTop: 7,
160 |         // paddingBottom: 7
161 |       },
162 |     };
163 | 
164 |     // add first layer of nodes
165 |     this.flatGraph.nodeMap[this.flatGraph.trueRootId].childIds.forEach(childId => {
166 |       const flatChild: ConceptNodeDTO = this.flatGraph.nodeMap[childId];
167 |       if (flatChild) {
168 |         const expanded = flatChild.expanded !== undefined ? flatChild.expanded : true;
169 |         const level = flatChild.level ? flatChild.level : 0;
170 |         const hasChildren = flatChild.childIds.length > 0;
171 |         const newChild = this.createConceptNode(
172 |           'root',
173 |           'node_' + flatChild.databaseId,
174 |           flatChild.name,
175 |           expanded,
176 |           level,
177 |           flatChild.goal ? flatChild.goal : 0,
178 |           flatChild.databaseId,
179 |           hasChildren,
180 |         );
181 |         graph.children.push(newChild);
182 |         if (expanded) {
183 |           this.addChildren(newChild, 'concept');
184 |         } else {
185 |           this.addChildren(newChild, 'mini-concept');
186 |         }
187 |       }
188 |     });
189 | 
190 |     // add first layer of edges
191 |     this.flatGraph.nodeMap[this.flatGraph.trueRootId].edgeChildIds.forEach(edgeChildId => {
192 |       const flatChild = this.flatGraph.edgeMap[edgeChildId];
193 |       if (flatChild) {
194 |         const edgeChild = this.createEdge(
195 |           'edge_' + flatChild.databaseId,
196 |           'node_' + flatChild.sourceId,
197 |           'node_' + flatChild.targetId,
198 |           'root',
199 |           flatChild.databaseId,
200 |         );
201 |         graph.children.push(edgeChild);
202 |       }
203 |     });
204 | 
205 |     this.currentRoot = graph;
206 |     this.updateModel();
207 |   }
208 | 
209 |   /**
210 |    * @description This recursive function adds children to a node in the graph. It also calculates the level and goal summaries for parent nodes.
211 |    * @param {SprottyConceptNode} parentNode - The parent node to add children to.
212 |    * @param {string} type - The type of the children being added, is 'concept' for parent and leaf nodes, 'mini-concept' for mini concepts and 'not-visible' for dummy nodes.
213 |    * @returns {Object} levels and goals of leaf nodes
214 |    */
215 |   private addChildren(
216 |     parentNode: SprottyConceptNode,
217 |     type: string,
218 |   ): {
219 |     descendants: number;
220 |     descendantLevels: number[];
221 |     descendantLevelGoals: number[];
222 |   } {
223 |     const flatParentNode = this.flatGraph.nodeMap[parentNode.databaseId];
224 |     // variables for counting descendants
225 |     const descendantData = {
226 |       descendants: 0,
227 |       descendantLevels: [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0],
228 |       descendantLevelGoals: [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0],
229 |     };
230 |     let childDescData = {
231 |       descendants: 0,
232 |       descendantLevels: [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0],
233 |       descendantLevelGoals: [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0],
234 |     };
235 | 
236 |     // add children
237 |     if (flatParentNode.childIds.length > 0) {
238 |       flatParentNode.childIds.forEach(childId => {
239 |         const flatChild = this.flatGraph.nodeMap[childId];
240 |         if (flatChild) {
241 |           const expanded = flatChild.expanded !== undefined ? flatChild.expanded : true;
242 |           const level = flatChild.level ? flatChild.level : 0;
243 |           let newChild;
244 |           if (type === 'mini-concept') {
245 |             newChild = this.createMiniConceptNode(
246 |               parentNode.id,
247 |               'node_' + flatChild.databaseId,
248 |               flatChild.name,
249 |               level,
250 |               flatChild.goal ? flatChild.goal : 0,
251 |               flatChild.databaseId,
252 |             );
253 |             parentNode.children!.push(newChild);
254 |           } else if (type === 'concept') {
255 |             const hasChildren = flatChild.childIds.length > 0;
256 |             newChild = this.createConceptNode(
257 |               parentNode.id,
258 |               'node_' + flatChild.databaseId,
259 |               flatChild.name,
260 |               expanded,
261 |               level,
262 |               flatChild.goal ? flatChild.goal : 0,
263 |               flatChild.databaseId,
264 |               hasChildren,
265 |             );
266 |             parentNode.children!.push(newChild);
267 |           } else {
268 |             // type === 'not-visible'
269 |             // dummy node, is not added to the graph. we need to keep the recursion going for counting descendants
270 |             newChild = this.createMiniConceptNode(
271 |               parentNode.id,
272 |               'node_' + flatChild.databaseId,
273 |               flatChild.name,
274 |               level,
275 |               flatChild.goal ? flatChild.goal : 0,
276 |               flatChild.databaseId,
277 |             );
278 |           }
279 | 
280 |           if (expanded && type === 'concept') {
281 |             childDescData = this.addChildren(newChild, 'concept');
282 |           } else if (type === 'concept') {
283 |             childDescData = this.addChildren(newChild, 'mini-concept');
284 |           } else if (
285 |             (parentNode.numberDescendants === undefined && type === 'mini-concept') ||
286 |             type === 'not-visible'
287 |           ) {
288 |             // keep the recursion going for counting descendants, but don't add children to the graph
289 |             childDescData = this.addChildren(newChild, 'not-visible');
290 |           }
291 | 
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Pages/graph/sprotty/mouse-interactions.ts
```
1 | import {
2 |   ContextMenuProviderRegistry,
3 |   IActionDispatcher,
4 |   IContextMenuServiceProvider,
5 |   SModelElementImpl,
6 | } from 'sprotty';
7 | import {
8 |   ContextMenuMouseListener,
9 |   IButtonHandler,
10 |   IContextMenuService,
11 |   MouseListener,
12 |   TYPES,
13 |   findParentByFeature,
14 |   isExpandable,
15 |   isSelectable,
16 |   isSelected,
17 | } from 'sprotty';
18 | import { Action, SModelElement } from 'sprotty-protocol';
19 | import { CollapseExpandAction, Point, SelectAction } from 'sprotty-protocol';
20 | import { injectable, inject } from 'inversify';
21 | import { expand } from 'rxjs';
22 | import { SprottyConceptNode } from './sprottyModels.interface';
23 | import ElkConstructor from 'elkjs';
24 | //import { NodeCreator } from "./di.config";
25 | 
26 | export const NodeCreator = Symbol('NodeCreator');
27 | 
28 | export class CustomMouseListener extends MouseListener {
29 |   @inject(TYPES.IActionDispatcher) protected actionDispatcher!: IActionDispatcher;
30 |   // the last touch position is stored to calculate the panning distance
31 |   private lastTouchPosition: { x: number; y: number } | null = null;
32 |   constructor(
33 |     @inject(TYPES.IContextMenuServiceProvider)
34 |     protected readonly contextMenuService: IContextMenuServiceProvider,
35 |     @inject(TYPES.IContextMenuProviderRegistry)
36 |     protected readonly menuProvider: ContextMenuProviderRegistry,
37 |   ) {
38 |     super();
39 |   }
40 | 
41 |   // sends a collapse/expand action to the action dispatcher when a node is double-clicked
42 |   override doubleClick(target: SModelElement, event: MouseEvent): (Action | Promise<Action>)[] {
43 |     //console.log('double clicked ' + target.id, target)
44 | 
45 |     if (target.type === 'node:concept') {
46 |       const conceptNode = target as SprottyConceptNode;
47 |       const action = CollapseExpandAction.create({
48 |         expandIds: conceptNode.expanded ? [] : [conceptNode.id],
49 |         collapseIds: conceptNode.expanded ? [conceptNode.id] : [],
50 |       });
51 |       return [action];
52 |     } else {
53 |       return [];
54 |     }
55 |   }
56 | 
57 |   override contextMenu(target: SModelElementImpl, event: MouseEvent): (Action | Promise<Action>)[] {
58 |     // this function is called when the user right-clicks on an element
59 |     // it selects the right-clicked element and deselects all other elements
60 |     // the context menu is opened by the standard sprotty context menu service
61 |     //console.log('context menu ' + target.id, target)
62 | 
63 |     const root = target.root;
64 |     const options = {
65 |       selectedElementsIDs: [target.id],
66 |       deselectedElementsIDs: Array.from(root.index.all().filter(isSelected), val => {
67 |         return val.id;
68 |       }),
69 |     };
70 |     this.actionDispatcher.dispatch(SelectAction.create(options));
71 |     return [];
72 |   }
73 | 
74 |   // Touch event handlers
75 |   touchStart(event: TouchEvent): void {
76 |     console.log('Touch start');
77 |     event.preventDefault();
78 |     const touch = event.touches[0];
79 |     const targetElement = document.elementFromPoint(
80 |       touch.clientX,
81 |       touch.clientY,
82 |     ) as unknown as SModelElement;
83 |     if (!targetElement) return;
84 |     // Call any specific actions or create a new action if needed
85 |     console.log('Touch start on element', targetElement.id);
86 |     // Dispatch an action if necessary
87 |   }
88 | 
89 |   touchMove(event: TouchEvent): void {
90 |     console.log('Touch move');
91 |     event.preventDefault();
92 |     if (this.lastTouchPosition && event.touches.length === 1) {
93 |       const touch = event.touches[0];
94 |       const dx = touch.clientX - this.lastTouchPosition.x;
95 |       const dy = touch.clientY - this.lastTouchPosition.y;
96 |       this.panGraph(dx, dy);
97 |       this.lastTouchPosition = { x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY };
98 |       console.log('Touch move', dx, dy);
99 |     }
100 |   }
101 | 
102 |   touchEnd(event: TouchEvent): void {
103 |     event.preventDefault();
104 |     console.log('Touch end');
105 |     this.lastTouchPosition = null;
106 |   }
107 | 
108 |   touchCancel(target: SModelElement, event: TouchEvent): (Action | Promise<Action>)[] {
109 |     // Handle touch cancel event, if needed
110 |     console.log('Touch cancel');
111 |     this.lastTouchPosition = null;
112 |     return [];
113 |   }
114 | 
115 |   private panGraph(dx: number, dy: number): void {
116 |     // Implement graph panning here, typically adjusting the viewBox or a similar property of your SVG/graph rendering
117 |     console.log(`Graph panned by: dx=${dx}, dy=${dy}`);
118 |   }
119 | }
120 | 
121 | // can be used for drag-and-drop functionality, probably broken right now
122 | // @injectable()
123 | // export class DroppableMouseListener extends MouseListener {
124 | 
125 | //     @inject(NodeCreator) nodeCreator!: ((target: SModelElement, event: Event) => void);
126 | 
127 | //     override dragOver(target: SModelElement, event: MouseEvent): (Action | Promise<Action>)[] {
128 | //         event.preventDefault();
129 | //         return [];
130 | //     }
131 | 
132 | //     override drop(target: SModelElement, event: MouseEvent): (Action | Promise<Action>)[] {
133 | //         if(this.nodeCreator){
134 | //             this.nodeCreator(target, event);
135 | //         }
136 | //         return [];
137 | //     }
138 | // }
```

16 | 
17 | import { injectable, inject } from 'inversify';
18 | import { IModelFactory, IPopupModelProvider } from 'sprotty';
19 | import { TYPES } from 'sprotty';
20 | import {
21 |   PreRenderedElement,
22 |   RequestPopupModelAction,
23 |   SModelElement,
24 |   SModelRoot,
25 | } from 'sprotty-protocol';
26 | import { SprottyConceptNode } from './sprottyModels.interface';
27 | 
28 | @injectable()
29 | export class PopupModelProvider implements IPopupModelProvider {
30 |   @inject(TYPES.IModelFactory) modelFactory: IModelFactory | undefined;
31 | 
32 |   getPopupModel(request: RequestPopupModelAction, element?: SModelElement): SModelRoot | undefined {
33 |     console.log('PopupModelProvider.getPopupModel: request=', request, ' element=', element);
34 |     if (element !== undefined && element.type.startsWith('node:')) {
35 |       return {
36 |         type: 'html',
37 |         id: 'popup',
38 |         children: [
39 |           <PreRenderedElement>{
40 |             type: 'pre-rendered',
41 |             id: 'popup-title',
42 |             code: `<div class="sprotty-popup-title"><span class="fa fa-info-circle"/> Name </div>`,
43 |           },
44 |           <PreRenderedElement>{
45 |             type: 'pre-rendered',
46 |             id: 'popup-body',
47 |             code: '<div class="sprotty-popup-body">Description</div>',
48 |           },
49 |         ],
50 |       };
51 |     }
52 |     return undefined;
53 |   }
54 | }

src/app/Pages/graph/sprotty/sprottyModels.interface.ts
```
1 | import { Expandable } from 'sprotty';
2 | import { SNode } from 'sprotty-protocol';
3 | 
4 | import { SEdge } from 'sprotty-protocol';
5 | 
6 | // interface for concept nodes
7 | // needed for sprotty
8 | export interface SprottyConceptNode extends SNode, Expandable {
9 |   // inherited mandatory fields from SNode:
10 |   // id: string; // node_ + string der Datenbank-id, außer für die root node (id: 'root')
11 |   // type: string; // z.B. 'node:concept'
12 |   // children: element[]
13 | 
14 |   // neu:
15 |   name: string;
16 |   expanded: boolean;
17 | 
18 |   level?: number; //user level, currently only important for leaf nodes
19 |   levelGoal: number; //module goal for this level, currently only important for leaf nodes
20 |   numberDescendants?: number; // number of leaf node descendants
21 |   descendantLevels?: number[]; // array of six numbers, each number represents the number of descendants that have reached the corresponding level
22 |   descendantLevelGoals?: number[]; // array of six numbers, each number represents the number of descendants that have this level as goal
23 | 
24 |   // helper fields
25 |   databaseId: number;
26 |   parentIds: string[];
27 |   childIds?: string[];
28 |   prerequisiteEdgeIds?: string[];
29 |   successorEdgeIds?: string[];
30 |   edgeChildDatabaseIds?: number[];
31 | }
32 | 
33 | // interface for concept edges
34 | // needed for sprotty
35 | export interface SprottyConceptEdge extends SEdge {
36 |   //inherited mandatory fields from SEdge:
37 |   //id: string; // edge_ + string der Datenbank-id
38 |   //type: string; // z.B. 'edge:concept'
39 |   //sourceId: string;
40 |   //targetId: string;
41 | 
42 |   //
43 |   parentId: string;
44 |   databaseId: number;
45 | }
```

3 | import { injectable } from 'inversify';
4 | import { Action } from 'sprotty-protocol';
5 | import { TouchEventAction } from './actions';
6 | 
7 | @injectable()
8 | export class TouchEventActionHandler {
9 |   handle(action: Action): void {
10 |     if (action.kind === TouchEventAction.KIND) {
11 |       // Handle the touch event
12 |       const touchEventAction = action as TouchEventAction;
13 |       console.log(touchEventAction.touchEvent);
14 |     }
15 |   }
16 | }

src/app/Pages/graph/sprotty/views.tsx
```
1 | /** @jsx svg */
2 | import { svg } from 'sprotty/lib/lib/jsx';
3 | import { injectable } from 'inversify';
4 | import { VNode } from 'snabbdom';
5 | import {
6 |     IView, RectangularNodeView, RenderingContext, SButtonImpl,
7 |     SLabelImpl,
8 |     SLabelView, SNodeImpl, SPortImpl, ShapeView, findParentByFeature, isExpandable, setAttr
9 | } from 'sprotty';
10 | import { SprottyConceptNode } from "./sprottyModels.interface";
11 | 
12 | @injectable()
13 | export class ConceptNodeView extends RectangularNodeView {
14 |     override render(node: Readonly<SNodeImpl & SprottyConceptNode>, context: RenderingContext): VNode {
15 |         const renderAsOneProgressBar = () => {
16 | 
17 |             // sum up all the goals and achieved levels
18 | 
19 |             let goal = 0;
20 |             let achieved = 0;
21 |             let total = goal > achieved ? goal : achieved;
22 |             const max = node.descendantLevels ? node.descendantLevels.length : node.descendantLevelGoals ? node.descendantLevelGoals.length : 0;
23 |             for (let i = 0; i < max; i++) {
24 |                 goal =node.descendantLevelGoals? goal + node.descendantLevelGoals[i]:0;
25 |                 achieved = node.descendantLevels ? achieved + node.descendantLevels[i] : 0;
26 |                 total = goal > achieved ? goal : achieved;
27 |             }
28 |             
29 | 
30 |             const segments = [];
31 |             const gap = 0;
32 |             const segmentWidth = node.size.width - 2 * gap;
33 |             const segmentHeight = 10;
34 |             //console.log('nodeI:' + node.name + ' total: ' + total + ' goal: ' + goal + ' achieved: ' + achieved);
35 |             for (let i = 0; i < total; i++) {
36 |                 segments.push(<rect
37 |                     width={segmentWidth / total}
38 |                     y={-segmentHeight}
39 |                     x={i * (segmentWidth / total) + gap}
40 |                     height={segmentHeight}
41 | 
42 |                     //fill={i < achieved ? '#a3be8c' : i < goal ? "#ebcb8b" : "white"}
43 |                     class-sprotty-progress-bar-segment={true}
44 |                     class-achieved={i < achieved ? true : false}
45 |                     class-goal={i < goal && i >= achieved ? true : false}
46 |                 ></rect>);
47 |             }
48 |             // Add border
49 |             segments.push(
50 |                 <rect
51 |                     key="border"
52 |                     width={segmentWidth}
53 |                     y={-segmentHeight}
54 |                     x={gap}
55 |                     height={segmentHeight}
56 |                     class-sprotty-progress-bar-border={true}
57 |                 />
58 |             );
59 |             return <g className="sprotty-progress-bar">{segments}</g>;
60 |         };
61 | 
62 | 
63 |         // actual rendering of everything
64 |         return <g>
65 |             {/* <g class-sprotty-star="true">
66 |                 {petals}  
67 |             </g> */}
68 | 
69 | 
70 |             {/* Render the node here */}
71 |             <rect class-sprotty-node={true} class-concept={true}
72 |                 width={node.size.width}
73 |                 height={node.size.height}
74 |                 class-mouseover={node.hoverFeedback} class-selected={node.selected}
75 |             // rx={5}
76 |             >
77 |             </rect>
78 |             {/* hacky solution to get the blue background in the concept header */}
79 |             <rect width={node.size.width}
80 |                 height={30}
81 |                 class-sprotty-concept-header={true}
82 |                 x={0}
83 |                 y={0}
84 |             // rx={5}
85 |             ></rect>
86 | 
87 |             {!node.expanded && renderAsOneProgressBar()}
88 |             {context.renderChildren(node)}
89 |         </g>;
90 |     }
91 | }
92 | 
93 | export class LeafConceptView extends RectangularNodeView {
94 |     override render(node: Readonly<SNodeImpl & SprottyConceptNode>, context: RenderingContext): VNode {
95 |         // progress bar
96 |         const renderProgressBarSegment = (goal: number, achieved: number, segmentNumber: number) => {
97 |             const segments = [];
98 |             const gap = 2;
99 |             const cornerGap = 5;
100 |             const segmentWidth = (node.size.width - cornerGap * 2) / 6 - 2 * gap;
101 |             const segmentOffset = (node.size.width - cornerGap * 2) / 6;
102 |             const segmentHeight = 10;
103 |             //console.log('nodeI:' + node.name + ' total: ' + total + ' goal: ' + goal + ' achieved: ' + achieved + ' segmentNumber: ' + segmentNumber);
104 | 
105 |             segments.push(<rect
106 |                 width={segmentWidth}
107 |                 y={-10}
108 |                 x={segmentNumber * segmentOffset + gap + cornerGap}
109 |                 height={segmentHeight}
110 |                 class-sprotty-progress-bar-segment={true}
111 |                 class-achieved={0 < achieved ? true : false}
112 |                 class-goal={0 < goal && goal > achieved ? true : false}
113 |                 class-leaf={true}
114 |             ></rect>);
115 |             return <g >{segments}</g>;
116 |         };
117 | 
118 |         const renderAllSegments = () => {
119 |             const totalSegments = 6; // six levels
120 |             const allSegments = [];
121 |             let totalSubSegments = 0;
122 |             let achieved = 0;
123 |             let goal = 0;
124 | 
125 |             if (node.levelGoal !== undefined) {
126 |                 for (let i = 0; i < Math.max(node.levelGoal, node.level ? node.level : 0); i++) {
127 |                     achieved = node.level === undefined ? 0 : node.level > i ? 1 : 0;
128 |                     goal = node.levelGoal === undefined ? 0 : node.levelGoal > i ? 1 : 0;
129 | 
130 |                     allSegments.push(renderProgressBarSegment(goal, achieved, i));
131 |                 }
132 |             }
133 | 
134 |             return <g className="sprotty-all-segments">{allSegments}</g>;
135 |         };
136 |         return <g>
137 | 
138 |             {/* Render the node here */}
139 |             <rect class-sprotty-node={true} class-leaf-concept={true}
140 |                 width={node.size.width}
141 |                 height={node.size.height }
142 |                 class-mouseover={node.hoverFeedback} class-selected={node.selected}
143 |                 y={0}
144 |                 rx={5}
145 |             >
146 |             </rect>
147 |             {renderAllSegments()}
148 |             {context.renderChildren(node)}
149 |         </g>;
150 |     }
151 | }
152 | 
153 | export class MiniConceptView extends RectangularNodeView {
154 |     override render(node: Readonly<SNodeImpl & SprottyConceptNode>, context: RenderingContext): VNode {
155 |         return <g>
156 |             <rect class-sprotty-node={true} p class-mini-concept={true}
157 |                 class-mouseover={node.hoverFeedback} class-selected={node.selected}
158 |                 width={node.size.width}
159 |                 height={node.size.height}
160 |                 rx={2}
161 |             >
162 |             </rect>
163 |         </g>;
164 |     }
165 | }
166 | 
167 | 
168 | 
169 | @injectable()
170 | export class CustomExpandButtonView implements IView {
171 |     render(button: SButtonImpl, context: RenderingContext): VNode {
172 |         const expandable = findParentByFeature(button, isExpandable);
173 |         const path = expandable !== undefined && expandable.expanded
174 |             ? 'M 1,5 L 8,12 L 15,5 Z'
175 |             : 'M 1,1 L 8,8 L 1,15 Z';
176 |         return <g
177 |             class-sprotty-button="{true}" class-enabled="{button.enabled}">
178 |             <path d={path}></path>
179 |         </g>;
180 |     }
181 | }
182 |

190 |

212 | //             </g>

src/app/Pages/evaluation-discussion-forum/evaluation-discussion-forum/evaluation-discussion-forum.component.html
```
1 | <div class="evaluation-forum-wrapper" *ngIf="viewModel$ | async as vm">
2 |   <!-- Demo Mode Banner -->
3 |   <div class="demo-mode-banner" *ngIf="isMockMode()">
4 |     <mat-icon>preview</mat-icon>
5 |     <div class="banner-content">
6 |       <span class="banner-title">Demo-Modus</span>
7 |       <small class="banner-subtitle"
8 |         >Interaktive Beispieldaten zur Demonstration - Alle Aktionen werden nur lokal
9 |         gespeichert</small
10 |       >
11 |     </div>
12 |   </div>
13 | 
14 |   <!-- Loading Overlay -->
15 |   <div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="vm.loading">
16 |     <mat-spinner diameter="40"></mat-spinner>
17 |     <p>Lade Bewertungsdaten...</p>
18 |   </div>
19 | 
20 |   <!-- Error State -->
21 |   <div class="error-state" *ngIf="vm.error">
22 |     <mat-icon>error_outline</mat-icon>
23 |     <h2>Fehler beim Laden</h2>
24 |     <p>{{ vm.error }}</p>
25 |     <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="onRefresh()">Erneut versuchen</button>
26 |   </div>
27 | 
28 |   <!-- Main Content -->
29 |   <div class="evaluation-forum-container" *ngIf="!vm.loading && !vm.error">
30 |     <!-- Header Section -->
31 |     <header class="forum-header">
32 |       <h1>Bewertung: {{ vm.submission?.title || 'Entwurf "Stabile Rahmenkonstruktion"' }}</h1>
33 |       <div class="header-info">
34 |         <span class="author-info">
35 |           Verfasser: {{ vm.submission?.author?.firstname || 'Student A' }}
36 |           {{ vm.submission?.author?.lastname || '(anonymisiert)' }}
37 |         </span>
38 |         <span class="phase-badge" [class.evaluation]="vm.isEvaluationPhase">
39 |           {{ vm.isEvaluationPhase ? 'Bewertungsphase' : 'Diskussionsphase' }}
40 |         </span>
41 |       </div>
42 |     </header>
43 | 
44 |     <!-- Category Tabs - Full Width -->
45 |     <div class="category-tabs-wrapper">
46 |       <app-category-tabs
47 |         [categories]="vm.categories"
48 |         [activeCategory]="vm.activeCategory"
49 |         [commentStats]="vm.commentStats"
50 |         (categorySelected)="onCategorySelected($event)"
51 |       >
52 |       </app-category-tabs>
53 |     </div>
54 | 
55 |     <!-- Main Grid Layout (50/50) -->
56 |     <div class="main-content-grid">
57 |       <!-- Left Column: PDF Viewer -->
58 |       <div class="pdf-column">
59 |         <div class="panel card">
60 |           <div class="panel-header">
61 |             <h3>Abgabe Dokument</h3>
62 |             <a
63 |               [href]="vm.submission?.pdfMetadata?.downloadUrl"
64 |               target="_blank"
65 |               class="download-btn"
66 |               matTooltip="PDF herunterladen"
67 |             >
68 |               <mat-icon>download</mat-icon>
69 |               <span>PDF Herunterladen</span>
70 |             </a>
71 |           </div>
72 |           <div class="pdf-viewer-container">
73 |             <app-pdf-viewer-panel
74 |               [submission]="vm.submission"
75 |               [pdfUrl]="vm.submission?.pdfMetadata?.downloadUrl || null"
76 |             >
77 |             </app-pdf-viewer-panel>
78 |           </div>
79 |         </div>
80 |       </div>
81 | 
82 |       <!-- Right Column: Discussion -->
83 |       <div class="discussion-column">
84 |         <div class="panel card">
85 |           <div class="panel-header">
86 |             <h3>Diskussion: {{ vm.activeCategoryInfo?.displayName }}</h3>
87 |             <div class="points-info" *ngIf="vm.isDiscussionPhase">
88 |               <div class="point-counter plus">
89 |                 <span>+</span>
90 |                 <span>{{ vm.availableUpvotes }}/3 verfügbar</span>
91 |               </div>
92 |               <div class="point-counter minus">
93 |                 <span>-</span>
94 |                 <span>{{ vm.availableDownvotes }}/3 verfügbar</span>
95 |               </div>
96 |             </div>
97 |           </div>
98 | 
99 |           <!-- Discussion Content Area -->
100 |           <div class="discussion-content">
101 |             <!-- Error Fallback for Missing Anonymous User -->
102 |             <app-error-fallback
103 |               *ngIf="vm.isDiscussionPhase && !vm.anonymousUser && !vm.loading"
104 |               [title]="'Anonymer Benutzer konnte nicht geladen werden'"
105 |               [message]="
106 |                 'Die Diskussion kann ohne anonyme Benutzerdaten nicht angezeigt werden. Bitte laden Sie die Seite neu.'
107 |               "
108 |               [showRetry]="true"
109 |             >
110 |             </app-error-fallback>
111 | 
112 |             <!-- Discussion Phase -->
113 |             <div class="discussion-phase-content" *ngIf="vm.isDiscussionPhase && vm.anonymousUser">
114 |               <!-- Discussion Messages Area -->
115 |               <div class="discussion-messages">
116 |                 <app-discussion-thread
117 |                   [discussions]="vm.discussions"
118 |                   [anonymousUser]="vm.anonymousUser"
119 |                   [canComment]="vm.canComment"
120 |                   [canVote]="vm.canVote"
121 |                   [availableUpvotes]="vm.availableUpvotes"
122 |                   [availableDownvotes]="vm.availableDownvotes"
123 |                   [isReadOnly]="!vm.canComment"
124 |                   [isSubmittingComment]="vm.isSubmittingComment"
125 |                   [isVotingComment]="isVotingComment"
126 |                   [trackByFn]="trackByDiscussion"
127 |                   (commentSubmitted)="onCommentSubmitted($event)"
128 |                   (commentVoted)="onCommentVoted($event)"
129 |                   (replySubmitted)="onReplySubmitted($event)"
130 |                 >
131 |                 </app-discussion-thread>
132 |               </div>
133 | 
134 |               <!-- Action Area for Message Input (HTML Template Style) -->
135 |               <div class="action-area" *ngIf="vm.canComment">
136 |                 <div class="message-input">
137 |                   <input
138 |                     type="text"
139 |                     class="message-input-field"
140 |                     [(ngModel)]="currentMessageText"
141 |                     [placeholder]="'Antworten Sie auf die Diskussion...'"
142 |                     [disabled]="vm.isSubmittingComment"
143 |                     (keydown.enter)="onMessageSubmit()"
144 |                     maxlength="1000"
145 |                   />
146 |                   <button
147 |                     class="send-btn"
148 |                     [disabled]="!currentMessageText.trim() || vm.isSubmittingComment"
149 |                     (click)="onMessageSubmit()"
150 |                   >
151 |                     <span *ngIf="!vm.isSubmittingComment">Senden</span>
152 |                     <mat-spinner *ngIf="vm.isSubmittingComment" diameter="16"></mat-spinner>
153 |                   </button>
154 |                 </div>
155 |               </div>
156 |             </div>
157 | 
158 |             <!-- Evaluation Phase -->
159 |             <div class="evaluation-phase-content" *ngIf="vm.isEvaluationPhase">
160 |               <!-- Discussion History (Read-only) -->
161 |               <div class="discussion-messages">
162 |                 <app-discussion-thread
163 |                   [discussions]="vm.discussions"
164 |                   [anonymousUser]="vm.anonymousUser"
165 |                   [canComment]="false"
166 |                   [canVote]="false"
167 |                   [availableUpvotes]="0"
168 |                   [availableDownvotes]="0"
169 |                   [isReadOnly]="true"
170 |                   [isSubmittingComment]="false"
171 |                   [trackByFn]="trackByDiscussion"
172 |                 >
173 |                 </app-discussion-thread>
174 |               </div>
175 | 
176 |               <!-- Rating Section at Bottom -->
177 |               <div class="action-area">
178 |                 <div class="rating-section">
179 |                   <h4>Ihre Endbewertung für "{{ vm.activeCategoryInfo?.displayName }}"</h4>
180 |                   <app-rating-slider
181 |                     [categoryId]="vm.activeCategoryInfo?.id || 0"
182 |                     [categoryName]="vm.activeCategoryInfo?.displayName || ''"
183 |                     [currentRating]="getCurrentRating(vm.activeCategoryInfo?.id || 0) | async"
184 |                     [disabled]="!vm.canRate"
185 |                     (ratingSubmitted)="onRatingSubmitted($event)"
186 |                   >
187 |                   </app-rating-slider>
188 |                 </div>
189 |               </div>
190 |             </div>
191 |           </div>
192 |         </div>
193 |       </div>
194 |     </div>
195 | 
196 |     <!-- Development Phase Toggle (Bottom Right) -->
197 |     <button
198 |       class="dev-phase-toggle"
199 |       mat-fab
200 |       color="warn"
201 |       (click)="togglePhase()"
202 |       matTooltip="Entwickler: Phase wechseln"
203 |     >
204 |       <mat-icon>{{ vm.isEvaluationPhase ? 'forum' : 'star' }}</mat-icon>
205 |     </button>
206 |   </div>
207 | 
208 |   <!-- Empty State -->
209 |   <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="!vm.loading && !vm.error && !vm.submission">
210 |     <mat-icon class="empty-icon">description</mat-icon>
211 |     <h2>Kein Dokument ausgewählt</h2>
212 |     <p>Um das Bewertungsforum zu verwenden, benötigen Sie eine gültige Abgabe-ID.</p>
213 |     <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="onNavigateToDashboard()">
214 |       <mat-icon>dashboard</mat-icon>
215 |       Zum Dashboard
216 |     </button>
217 |   </div>
218 | </div>
```

src/app/Pages/evaluation-discussion-forum/evaluation-discussion-forum/evaluation-discussion-forum.component.scss
```
1 | // =============================================================================
2 | // EVALUATION DISCUSSION FORUM - COMPONENT STYLES
3 | // =============================================================================
4 | 
5 | // Variables
6 | $header-height: 120px;
7 | $tab-height: 56px;
8 | $background-color: #f5f7fa;
9 | $card-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
10 | $border-color: #e0e0e0;
11 | $text-primary: #2c3e50;
12 | $text-secondary: #7f8c8d;
13 | $primary-color: #3498db;
14 | $success-color: #27ae60;
15 | $error-color: #e74c3c;
16 | $warning-color: #e67e22;
17 | 
18 | // =============================================================================
19 | // DEMO MODE BANNER
20 | // =============================================================================
21 | 
22 | .demo-mode-banner {
23 |   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
24 |   color: white;
25 |   padding: 12px 24px;
26 |   display: flex;
27 |   align-items: center;
28 |   gap: 16px;
29 |   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
30 |   z-index: 1000;
31 |   
32 |   mat-icon {
33 |     font-size: 24px;
34 |     width: 24px;
35 |     height: 24px;
36 |     opacity: 0.9;
37 |   }
38 |   
39 |   .banner-content {
40 |     display: flex;
41 |     flex-direction: column;
42 |     gap: 2px;
43 |   }
44 |   
45 |   .banner-title {
46 |     font-weight: 600;
47 |     font-size: 16px;
48 |     line-height: 1.2;
49 |   }
50 |   
51 |   .banner-subtitle {
52 |     font-size: 13px;
53 |     opacity: 0.85;
54 |     line-height: 1.3;
55 |   }
56 |   
57 |   // Animation
58 |   animation: slideIn 0.3s ease-out;
59 | }
60 | 
61 | @keyframes slideIn {
62 |   from {
63 |     transform: translateY(-100%);
64 |     opacity: 0;
65 |   }
66 |   to {
67 |     transform: translateY(0);
68 |     opacity: 1;
69 |   }
70 | }
71 | 
72 | // Main wrapper
73 | .evaluation-forum-wrapper {
74 |   width: 100%;
75 |   height: 100vh;
76 |   background-color: $background-color;
77 |   font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
78 |   overflow: hidden;
79 |   display: flex;
80 |   flex-direction: column;
81 | }
82 | 
83 | // Container
84 | .evaluation-forum-container {
85 |   width: 100%;
86 |   max-width: 1400px;
87 |   margin: 0 auto;
88 |   padding: min(20px, 2vw);
89 |   flex: 1;
90 |   display: grid;
91 |   grid-template-rows: auto auto 1fr;
92 |   gap: min(20px, 2vw);
93 |   overflow: hidden;
94 |   box-sizing: border-box;
95 | }
96 | 
97 | // =============================================================================
98 | // HEADER SECTION
99 | // =============================================================================
100 | 
101 | .forum-header {
102 |   background: white;
103 |   border-radius: 12px;
104 |   padding: 24px;
105 |   box-shadow: $card-shadow;
106 |   margin-bottom: 20px;
107 | 
108 |   h1 {
109 |     color: $text-primary;
110 |     font-size: 24px;
111 |     margin: 0 0 8px 0;
112 |     font-weight: 600;
113 |   }
114 | 
115 |   .header-info {
116 |     display: flex;
117 |     flex-wrap: wrap;
118 |     gap: 20px;
119 |     align-items: center;
120 |     color: $text-secondary;
121 |     font-size: 14px;
122 | 
123 |     .author-info {
124 |       color: $text-secondary;
125 |     }
126 | 
127 |     .phase-badge {
128 |       background: $warning-color;
129 |       color: white;
130 |       padding: 4px 12px;
131 |       border-radius: 20px;
132 |       font-size: 12px;
133 |       font-weight: 500;
134 |       transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
135 | 
136 |       &.evaluation {
137 |         background: $success-color;
138 |       }
139 |     }
140 |   }
141 | }
142 | 
143 | // =============================================================================
144 | // CATEGORY TABS
145 | // =============================================================================
146 | 
147 | .category-tabs-wrapper {
148 |   background: white;
149 |   border-radius: 12px;
150 |   padding: 0;
151 |   box-shadow: $card-shadow;
152 |   margin-bottom: 20px;
153 |   overflow: hidden;
154 | }
155 | 
156 | // =============================================================================
157 | // MAIN GRID LAYOUT
158 | // =============================================================================
159 | 
160 | .main-content-grid {
161 |   display: grid;
162 |   grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
163 |   gap: min(20px, 2vw);
164 |   min-height: 0;
165 |   overflow: hidden;
166 |   width: 100%;
167 |   max-width: 100%;
168 | 
169 |   .pdf-column,
170 |   .discussion-column {
171 |     display: flex;
172 |     flex-direction: column;
173 |     min-height: 0;
174 |     min-width: 0; /* Allow shrinking below content size */
175 |     overflow: hidden;
176 |   }
177 | 
178 |   .panel {
179 |     background: white;
180 |     border-radius: 12px;
181 |     box-shadow: $card-shadow;
182 |     display: flex;
183 |     flex-direction: column;
184 |     height: 100%;
185 |     min-height: 0;
186 |     min-width: 0; /* Allow shrinking below content size */
187 |     overflow: hidden;
188 |     
189 |     // Special handling for discussion panel
190 |     &.card {
191 |       .discussion-column & {
192 |         height: 650px; /* Fixed height like in HTML template */
193 |         max-height: 650px;
194 |       }
195 |     }
196 |   }
197 | }
198 | 
199 | // =============================================================================
200 | // PANEL HEADER
201 | // =============================================================================
202 | 
203 | .panel-header {
204 |   display: flex;
205 |   justify-content: space-between;
206 |   align-items: center;
207 |   padding: 16px 24px;
208 |   border-bottom: 1px solid $border-color;
209 |   flex-shrink: 0;
210 | 
211 |   h3 {
212 |     color: $text-primary;
213 |     font-size: 18px;
214 |     font-weight: 600;
215 |     margin: 0;
216 |   }
217 | 
218 |   .download-btn {
219 |     display: inline-flex;
220 |     align-items: center;
221 |     gap: 8px;
222 |     background-color: #ecf0f1;
223 |     color: $text-primary;
224 |     padding: 6px 12px;
225 |     border-radius: 8px;
226 |     text-decoration: none;
227 |     font-size: 12px;
228 |     font-weight: 500;
229 |     transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
230 | 
231 |     mat-icon {
232 |       font-size: 18px;
233 |       width: 18px;
234 |       height: 18px;
235 |     }
236 | 
237 |     &:hover {
238 |       background-color: #d5dbdb;
239 |     }
240 |   }
241 | }
242 | 
243 | // =============================================================================
244 | // PDF VIEWER
245 | // =============================================================================
246 | 
247 | .pdf-viewer-container {
248 |   flex: 1;
249 |   overflow: hidden;
250 |   padding: 16px;
251 |   background: #fdfdfd;
252 | }
253 | 
254 | // =============================================================================
255 | // DISCUSSION PANEL
256 | // =============================================================================
257 | 
258 | .points-info {
259 |   display: flex;
260 |   gap: 15px;
261 |   font-size: 12px;
262 |   color: $text-secondary;
263 | 
264 |   .point-counter {
265 |     display: flex;
266 |     align-items: center;
267 |     gap: 4px;
268 | 
269 |     &.plus {
270 |       color: $success-color;
271 |     }
272 | 
273 |     &.minus {
274 |       color: $error-color;
275 |     }
276 |   }
277 | }
278 | 
279 | .discussion-content {
280 |   flex: 1;
281 |   overflow-y: auto;
282 |   padding: 0;
283 |   min-height: 0;
284 |   display: flex;
285 |   flex-direction: column;
286 | 
287 |   &::-webkit-scrollbar {
288 |     width: 6px;
289 |   }
290 | 
291 |   &::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
292 |     background: #f1f1f1;
293 |   }
294 | 
295 |   &::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
296 |     background: #bdc3c7;
297 |     border-radius: 3px;
298 | 
299 |     &:hover {
300 |       background: #95a5a6;
301 |     }
302 |   }
303 | }
304 |

306 | .discussion-phase-content {
307 |   display: flex;
308 |   flex-direction: column;

310 |

316 |   }
317 | }

328 | }

358 |   }
359 | }

362 |   background: #3498db;

364 |   border: none;

370 |   min-height: 42px;
371 |   display: flex;
372 |   align-items: center;
373 |   justify-content: center;
374 |   gap: 4px;
375 |   
376 |   &:hover:not(:disabled) { 
377 |     background: #2980b9; 
378 |   }
379 |   
380 |   &:disabled {
381 |     background: #ccc;
