src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-graph/edit-graph.component.ts
```
1 | import { AfterViewInit, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
3 | import {
4 |   AbstractControl,
5 |   FormBuilder,
6 |   FormGroup,
7 |   ValidationErrors,
8 |   ValidatorFn,
9 | } from '@angular/forms';
10 | import { Validators } from '@angular/forms';
11 | import { GraphConfigurationDTO, GraphNodeDTO, GraphStructureDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
12 | import { GraphEdgeDTO, GraphStructureSemanticDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
13 | import { GraphTaskService } from 'src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/services/graph-task.service';
14 | import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
15 | import { QuestionDataService } from 'src/app/Services/question/question-data.service';
16 | import { questionType } from '@DTOs/question.dto';
17 | import { detailedQuestionDTO } from '@DTOs/detailedQuestion.dto';
18 | import { ConfirmationService } from 'src/app/Services/confirmation/confirmation.service';
19 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
20 | import { TinymceComponent } from '../../tinymce/tinymce.component';
21 | import { GenerateDijkstraService } from './generate-graph/generate-dijkstra.service';
22 | import { GenerateKruskalService } from './generate-graph/generate-kruskal.service';
23 | import { GenerateFloydService } from './generate-graph/generate-floyd.service';
24 | import { GenerateExampleSolutionService } from './generateExampleSolution/generate-example-solution.service';
25 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
26 | import {
27 |   graphEdgeJSONToSemantic,
28 |   graphJSONToSemantic,
29 |   structuresAreEqual,
30 | } from 'src/app/Modules/graph-tasks/utils';
31 | 
32 | interface GraphQuestionConfiguration extends GraphConfigurationDTO {
33 |   stepsEnabled: boolean;
34 | }
35 | 
36 | @Component({
37 |   selector: 'app-edit-graph',
38 |   templateUrl: './edit-graph.component.html',
39 |   styleUrls: ['./edit-graph.component.scss'],
40 | })
41 | export class EditGraphComponent implements AfterViewInit, OnInit {
42 |   // ########################################
43 |   // Configuration for the graph question types
44 |   dijkstraConfig: GraphQuestionConfiguration = {
45 |     nodeSelected: true,
46 |     nodeSelectedText: { selected: 'Besucht', unselected: 'Nicht Besucht' },
47 |     nodeWeight: true,
48 |     edgeWeight: true,
49 |     edgeDirected: false,
50 |     stepsEnabled: true,
51 |   };
52 | 
53 |   kruskalConfig: GraphQuestionConfiguration = {
54 |     nodeSelected: false,
55 |     nodeSelectedText: { selected: '', unselected: '' },
56 |     nodeWeight: false,
57 |     edgeWeight: true,
58 |     edgeDirected: false,
59 |     stepsEnabled: true,
60 |   };
61 | 
62 |   floydConfig: GraphQuestionConfiguration = {
63 |     nodeSelected: true,
64 |     nodeSelectedText: { selected: 'Aktuell', unselected: '-' },
65 |     nodeWeight: false,
66 |     edgeWeight: true,
67 |     edgeDirected: true,
68 |     stepsEnabled: true,
69 |   };
70 | 
71 |   transitiveClosureConfig: GraphQuestionConfiguration = {
72 |     nodeSelected: false,
73 |     nodeSelectedText: { selected: '', unselected: '' },
74 |     nodeWeight: false,
75 |     edgeWeight: false,
76 |     edgeDirected: true,
77 |     stepsEnabled: false,
78 |   };
79 | 
80 |   getGraphQuestionConfigruation(graphQuestionType: string): GraphQuestionConfiguration {
81 |     if (graphQuestionType === 'dijkstra') {
82 |       return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.dijkstraConfig));
83 |     }
84 |     if (graphQuestionType === 'kruskal') {
85 |       return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.kruskalConfig));
86 |     }
87 |     if (graphQuestionType === 'floyd') {
88 |       return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.floydConfig));
89 |     }
90 |     if (graphQuestionType === 'transitive_closure') {
91 |       return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.transitiveClosureConfig));
92 |     }
93 |     throw new Error('Invalid question type');
94 |   }
95 | 
96 |   // ########################################
97 |   // Form related properties
98 |   @ViewChild('question', { static: false }) questionField!: TinymceComponent;
99 |   @ViewChild('expectations', { static: false }) expectationField!: TinymceComponent;
100 | 
101 |   graphForm: FormGroup;
102 |   generateGraphForm: FormGroup;
103 | 
104 |   thisQuestionType = questionType.GRAPH;
105 | 
106 |   isSaving = false;
107 | 
108 |   editorConfig = {
109 |     readonly: false,
110 |     plugins: 'autoresize lists table link image code codesample',
111 |     toolbar:
112 |       'undo redo | bold italic | alignleft aligncenter alignright | numlist bullist | table | image | codesample',
113 |     min_height: 300,
114 |     max_height: 600,
115 |     resize: false,
116 |   };
117 | 
118 |   detailedQuestionData: detailedQuestionDTO | null = null;
119 | 
120 |   questionDescriptionHTML: string = '';
121 |   expectationsHTML: string = '';
122 | 
123 |   // ########################################
124 |   // Workspace related properties
125 |   workspaceIsActive = false;
126 |   structureIsSet = false;
127 | 
128 |   workspaceModePrevious: string = 'assignment';
129 |   workspaceModeCurrent: string = 'assignment';
130 |   public solutionStepPrevious: number = 0;
131 |   public solutionStepCurrent: number = 0;
132 | 
133 |   assignmentGraphStructure: GraphStructureDTO = {
134 |     nodes: [],
135 |     edges: [],
136 |   };
137 |   initialUsedForExampleSolution: GraphStructureDTO = {
138 |     nodes: [],
139 |     edges: [],
140 |   };
141 | 
142 |   solutionGraphStructure: GraphStructureDTO[] = [
143 |     //   {
144 |     //   nodes: [], edges: []
145 |     // }
146 |   ];
147 | 
148 |   // Store the question id from the route so that we can update the current question and not the question with id from json when importing a task
149 |   questionId: number = -1;
150 |   graphQuestionId: number = -1;
151 | 
152 |   // #######################################################
153 |   // Constructor - Component lifecycle related
154 |   constructor(
155 |     private readonly fb: FormBuilder,
156 |     private readonly questionDataService: QuestionDataService,
157 |     private readonly graphTaskService: GraphTaskService,
158 |     private readonly route: ActivatedRoute,
159 |     private readonly confirmationService: ConfirmationService,
160 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
161 |     private readonly router: Router,
162 |     private readonly generateFloydService: GenerateFloydService,
163 |     private readonly generateDijkstraService: GenerateDijkstraService,
164 |     private readonly generateKruskalService: GenerateKruskalService,
165 |     private readonly generateExampleSolutionService: GenerateExampleSolutionService,
166 |   ) {
167 |     this.graphForm = this.fb.group({
168 |       questionTitle: ['', Validators.required],
169 |       questionDifficulty: ['', Validators.required],
170 |       questionDescription: ['', Validators.required],
171 |       questionScore: ['', Validators.required],
172 |       graphQuestionType: ['', Validators.required],
173 |     });
174 | 
175 |     this.generateGraphForm = this.fb.group({
176 |       graphNodeCount: [5],
177 |       graphEdgeCount: [7],
178 |       graphNodeWeightMin: [0],
179 |       graphNodeWeightMax: [7],
180 |       graphEdgeWeightMin: [0],
181 |       graphEdgeWeightMax: [7],
182 |       graphSelfEdgeCountMax: [0],
183 |     });
184 |   }
185 | 
186 |   ngOnInit(): void {
187 |     this.resetWorkspaceContent();
188 | 
189 |     // Subscribe for changes in the graph question type
190 |     this.graphForm.get('graphQuestionType')?.valueChanges.subscribe(type => {
191 |       // For each graph question type, apply required validators for generateGraphForm
192 |       this.applyValidatorsByType(type);
193 | 
194 |       // Set the default parameters for question generation based on the type
195 |       this.setDefaultsForGeneration(type);
196 |     });
197 |   }
198 | 
199 |   ngAfterViewInit(): void {
200 |     setTimeout(() => {
201 |       this.handleRouteParams();
202 |     }, 0);
203 |   }
204 | 
205 |   // #######################################################
206 |   // Fetching and submitting question data
207 |   private handleRouteParams() {
208 |     this.route.params.subscribe(params => {
209 |       this.questionId = parseInt(params['questionId']);
210 |       this.questionDataService
211 |         .getDetailedQuestionData(this.questionId, this.thisQuestionType)
212 |         .subscribe(data => {
213 |           if (data.type === questionType.GRAPH) {
214 |             // TODO: Kommentar Sven: hab hier auch die entsprechende questionType anstelle des Strings eingefügt. Bitte testen.
215 |             this.detailedQuestionData = data;
216 |             this.graphQuestionId = this.detailedQuestionData.graphQuestion?.id || -1;
217 |             console.log(this.detailedQuestionData);
218 |             this.setContent();
219 |           } else {
220 |             this.snackBar.open(
221 |               'ACHTUNG: Bei den vorhandenen Daten handelt es sich nicht um eine Graphaufgabe!',
222 |               'Schließen',
223 |               { duration: 10000 },
224 |             );
225 |             this.thisQuestionType = data.type as questionType;
226 |           }
227 |         });
228 |     });
229 |   }
230 | 
231 |   // TODO: complete missing fields
232 |   private setContent() {
233 |     this.resetWorkspaceContent();
234 | 
235 |     if (this.thisQuestionType === questionType.GRAPH && this.detailedQuestionData) {
236 |       this.graphForm.patchValue({
237 |         questionTitle: this.detailedQuestionData.name,
238 |         questionDifficulty: this.detailedQuestionData.level.toString(),
239 |         questionDescription: this.detailedQuestionData.description,
240 |         questionScore: this.detailedQuestionData.score,
241 |       });
242 |       if (this.detailedQuestionData.graphQuestion) {
243 |         this.questionField.setContent(
244 |           this.detailedQuestionData.graphQuestion.textHTML || this.detailedQuestionData.text,
245 |         );
246 |         this.expectationField.setContent(
247 |           this.detailedQuestionData.graphQuestion.expectationsHTML ||
248 |             this.detailedQuestionData.graphQuestion.expectations,
249 |         );
250 | 
251 |         // Update form controls
252 |         this.graphForm.patchValue({
253 |           graphQuestionType: this.detailedQuestionData.graphQuestion.type,
254 |         });
255 | 
256 |         const clonedInitialStructure: GraphStructureDTO = JSON.parse(
257 |           JSON.stringify(this.detailedQuestionData.graphQuestion.initialStructure),
258 |         );
259 |         this.assignmentGraphStructure = clonedInitialStructure;
260 | 
261 |         // const clonedExSolGraphSteps: GraphStructureDTO[] = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.detailedQuestionData.graphQuestion.exampleSolution))
262 |         // this.solutionGraphStructure = clonedExSolGraphSteps;
263 | 
264 |         this.structureIsSet = true;
265 |       }
266 |     }
267 |   }
268 | 
269 |   protected onOverwrite() {
270 |     this.confirmationService.confirm({
271 |       title: 'Frage aktualisieren',
272 |       message: 'Dies überschreibt die aktuelle Version der Frage. Fortfahren?',
273 |       acceptLabel: 'Aktualisieren',
274 |       declineLabel: 'Abbrechen',
275 |       accept: () => {
276 |         this.isSaving = true;
277 |         const submitData = this.buildDTO();
278 |         console.log(submitData);
279 |         if (submitData) {
280 |           this.questionDataService.updateWholeQuestion(submitData).subscribe({
281 |             next: response => {
282 |               console.log('Question updated successfully:', response);
283 |               this.snackBar.open('Frage erfolgreich aktualisiert', 'Schließen', { duration: 3000 });
284 |               this.isSaving = false;
285 |             },
286 |             error: error => {
287 |               console.error('Error updating question:', error);
288 |               this.snackBar.open('Fehler beim Aktualisieren der Frage', 'Schließen', {
289 |                 duration: 3000,
290 |               });
291 |               this.isSaving = false;
292 |             },
293 |           });
294 |         } else {
295 |           this.isSaving = false;
296 |         }
297 |       },
298 |       decline: () => {
299 |         console.log('Overwrite declined');
300 |       },
301 |     });
302 |   }
303 | 
304 |   protected onSaveNewVersion() {
305 |     return; // disabled for now
306 |   }
307 | 
308 |   protected onCancel() {
309 |     this.confirmationService.confirm({
310 |       title: 'Bearbeitung abbrechen',
311 |       message:
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-uml/edit-uml.component.html
```
1 | <div class="content mat-elevation-z8">
2 |   <h1 style="display: flex; justify-content: center">UML Aufgabe bearbeiten</h1>
3 |   <div #alignContainer class="horizontal-align-container">
4 |     <div #leftContainer class="text-container left-container">
5 |       <div class="wrap-container">
6 |         <div>
7 |           <h2>Aufgabe</h2>
8 |           <form [formGroup]="umlForm">
9 |             <mat-form-field appearance="outline" style="width: 100%">
10 |               <mat-label>Titel</mat-label>
11 |               <input matInput placeholder="Titel der Frage" formControlName="questionTitle" />
12 |               <mat-error *ngIf="umlForm.get('questionTitle')!.hasError('required')"
13 |                 >Titel der Frage ist erforderlich</mat-error
14 |               >
15 |             </mat-form-field>
16 | 
17 |             <mat-form-field appearance="outline" style="width: 100%">
18 |               <mat-label>Schwierigkeit</mat-label>
19 |               <mat-select formControlName="questionDifficulty">
20 |                 <mat-option value="1">Level 1: Erinnern</mat-option>
21 |                 <mat-option value="2">Level 2: Verstehen</mat-option>
22 |                 <mat-option value="3">Level 3: Anwenden</mat-option>
23 |                 <mat-option value="4">Level 4: Analysieren</mat-option>
24 |                 <mat-option value="5">Level 5: Evaluieren</mat-option>
25 |                 <mat-option value="6">Level 6: Kreieren</mat-option>
26 |               </mat-select>
27 |               <mat-error *ngIf="umlForm.get('questionDifficulty')!.hasError('required')"
28 |                 >Schwierigkeitsgrad ist erforderlich</mat-error
29 |               >
30 |             </mat-form-field>
31 | 
32 |             <mat-form-field appearance="outline" style="width: 100%">
33 |               <mat-label>Punkte</mat-label>
34 |               <input
35 |                 matInput
36 |                 type="number"
37 |                 min="0"
38 |                 step="1"
39 |                 placeholder="Punkte"
40 |                 formControlName="questionScore"
41 |               />
42 |               <mat-error *ngIf="umlForm.get('questionScore')!.hasError('required')"
43 |                 >Punkte sind erforderlich</mat-error
44 |               >
45 |             </mat-form-field>
46 |           </form>
47 |         </div>
48 | 
49 |         <div>
50 |           <h2>Aufgabentext</h2>
51 |           <div style="width: 100%">
52 |             <app-tinymce #question [config]="editorConfig"></app-tinymce>
53 |           </div>
54 |         </div>
55 | 
56 |         <div>
57 |           <h2>Vorlage und Lösung</h2>
58 |           <mat-button-toggle-group
59 |             [formControl]="selectedEditor"
60 |             (valueChange)="onEditorChange($event)"
61 |             aria-label="Edit"
62 |             style="width: 100%"
63 |           >
64 |             <mat-button-toggle value="prefab" style="width: 100%"
65 |               >Vorlage bearbeiten</mat-button-toggle
66 |             >
67 |             <mat-button-toggle value="solution" style="width: 100%"
68 |               >Lösung bearbeiten</mat-button-toggle
69 |             >
70 |           </mat-button-toggle-group>
71 |           <!-- TODO: vorlage mit loesung ueberschreiben button und vice versa -->
72 |           <div style="margin-top: 5px">
73 |             <button
74 |               *ngIf="selectedEditor.value === 'prefab'"
75 |               mat-raised-button
76 |               (click)="copyFromSolution()"
77 |             >
78 |               Von Lösung kopieren
79 |             </button>
80 |             <button
81 |               *ngIf="selectedEditor.value === 'solution'"
82 |               mat-raised-button
83 |               (click)="copyFromPrefab()"
84 |             >
85 |               Von Vorlage kopieren
86 |             </button>
87 |           </div>
88 |         </div>
89 | 
90 |         <div>
91 |           <h2>Optionen</h2>
92 |           <mat-expansion-panel>
93 |             <mat-expansion-panel-header>
94 |               <mat-panel-title>Erlaubte Knoten</mat-panel-title>
95 |             </mat-expansion-panel-header>
96 |             <div class="checkbox-list">
97 |               <mat-checkbox
98 |                 *ngFor="let nodeType of possibleNodeTypes"
99 |                 [checked]="isNodeTypeUsed(nodeType.element)"
100 |                 [disabled]="isNodeTypeUsed(nodeType.element, true)"
101 |                 (change)="onNodeTypeToggle(nodeType, $event)"
102 |               >
103 |                 {{ nodeType.title }}
104 |               </mat-checkbox>
105 |             </div>
106 |           </mat-expansion-panel>
107 | 
108 |           <mat-expansion-panel>
109 |             <mat-expansion-panel-header>
110 |               <mat-panel-title>Erlaubte Kanten</mat-panel-title>
111 |             </mat-expansion-panel-header>
112 |             <div class="checkbox-list">
113 |               <mat-checkbox
114 |                 *ngFor="let edgeType of possibleEdgeTypes"
115 |                 [checked]="isEdgeTypeUsed(edgeType.element)"
116 |                 [disabled]="isEdgeTypeUsed(edgeType.element, true)"
117 |                 (change)="onEdgeTypeToggle(edgeType, $event)"
118 |               >
119 |                 {{ edgeType.title }}
120 |               </mat-checkbox>
121 |             </div>
122 |           </mat-expansion-panel>
123 |         </div>
124 | 
125 |         <mat-expansion-panel>
126 |           <mat-expansion-panel-header>
127 |             <mat-panel-title>Erweiterte Optionen (optional)</mat-panel-title>
128 |           </mat-expansion-panel-header>
129 |           <div class="expansion">
130 |             <p>
131 |               Die Auswirkungen dieser Einstellungen sind in der Übersicht nicht sichtbar und
132 |               beziehen sich nur auf interne Datenbankparameter
133 |             </p>
134 |             <form [formGroup]="umlForm">
135 |               <mat-form-field appearance="outline" style="width: 100%">
136 |                 <mat-label>Beschreibung der Frage</mat-label>
137 |                 <textarea
138 |                   matInput
139 |                   placeholder="Beschreibung der Frage"
140 |                   formControlName="questionDescription"
141 |                 ></textarea>
142 |                 <mat-hint>Zum Beispiel "manuell erstellt" oder "automatisch importiert"</mat-hint>
143 |               </mat-form-field>
144 |             </form>
145 |           </div>
146 |         </mat-expansion-panel>
147 |       </div>
148 |     </div>
149 | 
150 |     <div #resizer class="resizer"></div>
151 | 
152 |     <div #rightContainer class="text-container right-container">
153 |       <div style="width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 5px; padding-left: 10px">
154 |         <app-editor
155 |           #umleditor
156 |           mode="create"
157 |           [addContainerText]="selectedEditorAddText"
158 |           [nodes]="currentEditorData.nodes"
159 |           [edges]="currentEditorData.edges"
160 |           [selectableEdges]="possibleEdgeTypes"
161 |           [selectableNodes]="possibleNodeTypes"
162 |           (nodeAdded)="onElementsChange($event)"
163 |           (edgeAdded)="onElementsChange($event)"
164 |           (nodeRemoved)="onElementsChange($event)"
165 |           (edgeRemoved)="onElementsChange($event)"
166 |         ></app-editor>
167 |       </div>
168 |     </div>
169 |   </div>
170 | 
171 |   <div class="button-container">
172 |     <mat-progress-spinner
173 |       *ngIf="isSaving"
174 |       diameter="20"
175 |       mode="indeterminate"
176 |     ></mat-progress-spinner>
177 |     <button mat-raised-button [disabled]="isSaving" color="primary" (click)="onOverwrite()">
178 |       Speichern (aktualisieren)
179 |     </button>
180 |     <div
181 |       matTooltip="Die aktuelle Version hat noch keine Freitextdaten."
182 |       [matTooltipDisabled]="!!detailedQuestionData?.freetextQuestion"
183 |     >
184 |       <button
185 |         mat-raised-button
186 |         color="primary"
187 |         (click)="onSaveNewVersion()"
188 |         [disabled]="!detailedQuestionData?.freetextQuestion || isSaving || true"
189 |       >
190 |         Als neue Version speichern
191 |       </button>
192 |     </div>
193 |     <button mat-raised-button color="warn" (click)="onCancel()">Abbrechen</button>
194 |   </div>
195 | </div>
```

src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-uml/edit-uml.component.ts
```
1 | import { ElementRef, AfterViewInit, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { TinymceComponent } from '../../tinymce/tinymce.component';
4 | import { FormBuilder, FormGroup } from '@angular/forms';
5 | import { FormControl, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
6 | import {
7 |   ClassEdge,
8 |   ClassNode,
9 |   detailedQuestionDTO,
10 |   editorDataDTO,
11 |   editorElementDTO,
12 |   EditorElement,
13 |   taskSettingsDTO,
14 | } from '@DTOs/index';
15 | import { EditorElementType, EditorModel, questionType } from '@DTOs/index';
16 | import { QuestionDataService } from 'src/app/Services/question/question-data.service';
17 | import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
18 | import { ConfirmationService } from 'src/app/Services/confirmation/confirmation.service';
19 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
20 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
21 | import { EditorComponent } from 'src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor.component';
22 | import { EditorCommunicationService } from '@UMLearnServices/editor-communication.service';
23 | import { MatCheckboxChange } from '@angular/material/checkbox';
24 | 
25 | @Component({
26 |   selector: 'app-edit-uml',
27 |   templateUrl: './edit-uml.component.html',
28 |   styleUrls: ['./edit-uml.component.scss'],
29 | })
30 | export class EditUmlComponent implements AfterViewInit, OnInit {
31 |   @ViewChild('question') questionField!: TinymceComponent;
32 |   @ViewChild('umleditor') umlEditor!: EditorComponent;
33 | 
34 |   @ViewChild('alignContainer', { static: false }) alignContainer!: ElementRef;
35 |   @ViewChild('leftContainer', { static: false }) leftContainer!: ElementRef;
36 |   @ViewChild('rightContainer', { static: false }) rightContainer!: ElementRef;
37 |   @ViewChild('resizer', { static: false }) resizer!: ElementRef;
38 | 
39 |   private isDragging = false;
40 |   private startX = 0;
41 |   private startLeftWidth = 0;
42 |   protected isSaving = false;
43 | 
44 |   protected umlForm: FormGroup;
45 |   protected selectedEditor = new FormControl('solution');
46 |   protected selectedEditorAddText: string = 'Elemente zur Lösung hinzufügen';
47 | 
48 |   protected thisQuestionType = questionType.UML;
49 |   protected detailedQuestionData: detailedQuestionDTO | null = null;
50 |   protected currentEditorData: editorDataDTO = {
51 |     nodes: [],
52 |     edges: [],
53 |   };
54 |   protected taskSettings: taskSettingsDTO = {
55 |     allowedEdgeTypes: [],
56 |     allowedNodeTypes: [],
57 |     editorModel: EditorModel.CLASSDIAGRAM,
58 |   };
59 |   protected possibleEdgeTypes: editorElementDTO[] = [];
60 |   protected possibleNodeTypes: editorElementDTO[] = [];
61 |   protected optionalNodeTypes: Set<EditorElement> = new Set();
62 |   protected optionalEdgeTypes: Set<EditorElement> = new Set();
63 | 
64 |   protected editorConfig = {
65 |     readonly: false,
66 |     plugins: 'autoresize lists table link image code codesample',
67 |     toolbar:
68 |       'undo redo | bold italic | alignleft aligncenter alignright | numlist bullist | table | image | codesample',
69 |     min_height: 300,
70 |     max_height: 600,
71 |     resize: false,
72 |   };
73 | 
74 |   constructor(
75 |     private readonly fb: FormBuilder,
76 |     private readonly questionDataService: QuestionDataService,
77 |     private readonly route: ActivatedRoute,
78 |     private readonly confirmationService: ConfirmationService,
79 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
80 |     private readonly router: Router,
81 |     private readonly dialog: MatDialog,
82 |     private readonly editorCommunicationService: EditorCommunicationService,
83 |   ) {
84 |     this.umlForm = this.fb.group({
85 |       questionTitle: ['', Validators.required],
86 |       questionDifficulty: ['', Validators.required],
87 |       questionDescription: [''],
88 |       questionScore: ['', Validators.required],
89 |     });
90 |     this.editorCommunicationService.getEditorElements(EditorModel.CLASSDIAGRAM).subscribe(data => {
91 |       this.possibleEdgeTypes = data.filter(e => e.elementType === EditorElementType.EDGE);
92 |       this.possibleNodeTypes = data.filter(e => e.elementType === EditorElementType.NODE);
93 |     });
94 |   }
95 | 
96 |   ngOnInit(): void {
97 |     //this.handleRouteParams();
98 |   }
99 | 
100 |   ngAfterViewInit(): void {
101 |     setTimeout(() => {
102 |       this.handleRouteParams();
103 |       this.setupResizer();
104 |     }, 0);
105 |   }
106 | 
107 |   /**
108 |    * Sets up the resizer functionality for adjusting the width of two containers.
109 |    * The resizer element is expected to be a child of the container element, and the left
110 |    * and right containers are siblings within the container.
111 |    *
112 |    * The resizing is bounded to a minimum width of 15% and a maximum width of 85% for the left container.
113 |    *
114 |    * @private
115 |    * @method setupResizer
116 |    * @returns {void}
117 |    */
118 |   private setupResizer(): void {
119 |     const container = this.alignContainer.nativeElement;
120 |     const leftSide = this.leftContainer.nativeElement;
121 |     const resizer = this.resizer.nativeElement;
122 | 
123 |     if (!container || !leftSide || !resizer) return;
124 | 
125 |     const onMouseDown = (e: MouseEvent) => {
126 |       this.isDragging = true;
127 |       this.startX = e.pageX;
128 |       this.startLeftWidth = leftSide.offsetWidth;
129 | 
130 |       resizer.classList.add('dragging');
131 | 
132 |       document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
133 |       document.addEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
134 | 
135 |       // Prevent text selection while dragging
136 |       document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
137 |     };
138 | 
139 |     const onMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
140 |       if (!this.isDragging) return;
141 | 
142 |       const deltaX = e.pageX - this.startX;
143 |       const newLeftWidth = ((this.startLeftWidth + deltaX) / container.offsetWidth) * 100;
144 | 
145 |       // Apply bounds (minimum 15%, maximum 85%)
146 |       const boundedWidth = Math.min(Math.max(newLeftWidth, 15), 85);
147 | 
148 |       leftSide.style.width = `${boundedWidth}%`;
149 |       const rightSide = this.rightContainer.nativeElement;
150 |       if (rightSide) {
151 |         rightSide.style.width = `${100 - boundedWidth}%`;
152 |       }
153 |     };
154 | 
155 |     const onMouseUp = () => {
156 |       this.isDragging = false;
157 |       resizer.classList.remove('dragging');
158 |       document.body.style.userSelect = '';
159 | 
160 |       document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
161 |       document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
162 |     };
163 | 
164 |     resizer.addEventListener('mousedown', onMouseDown);
165 |   }
166 | 
167 |   /**
168 |    * Handles route parameters and fetches detailed question data based on the question ID.
169 |    * Subscribes to route parameters and retrieves the question ID from the parameters.
170 |    * Fetches detailed question data using the question ID and updates the component's state accordingly.
171 |    * If the question type is UML, it processes the UML-specific data and updates the allowed node and edge types.
172 |    * If the question type is not UML, it displays a warning message.
173 |    *
174 |    * @private
175 |    * @returns {void}
176 |    */
177 |   private handleRouteParams() {
178 |     this.route.params.subscribe(params => {
179 |       const questionId = parseInt(params['questionId']);
180 |       this.questionDataService
181 |         .getDetailedQuestionData(questionId, this.thisQuestionType)
182 |         .subscribe((data: detailedQuestionDTO) => {
183 |           if (data.type === questionType.UML) {
184 |             this.detailedQuestionData = {
185 |               ...data,
186 |               umlQuestion: {
187 |                 ...data.umlQuestion,
188 |                 taskSettings: data.umlQuestion?.taskSettings || {
189 |                   allowedEdgeTypes: [],
190 |                   allowedNodeTypes: [],
191 |                   editorModel: EditorModel.CLASSDIAGRAM,
192 |                 },
193 |                 editorData: data.umlQuestion?.editorData || { nodes: [], edges: [] },
194 |                 startData: data.umlQuestion?.startData || { nodes: [], edges: [] },
195 |               },
196 |             };
197 | 
198 |             this.optionalNodeTypes = new Set(
199 |               this.detailedQuestionData
200 |                 .umlQuestion!.taskSettings!.allowedNodeTypes.filter(node => {
201 |                   return !this.detailedQuestionData!.umlQuestion!.editorData!.nodes.some(
202 |                     n => n.type === node.element,
203 |                   );
204 |                 })
205 |                 .map(node => node.element),
206 |             );
207 | 
208 |             this.optionalEdgeTypes = new Set(
209 |               this.detailedQuestionData
210 |                 .umlQuestion!.taskSettings!.allowedEdgeTypes.filter(edge => {
211 |                   return !this.detailedQuestionData!.umlQuestion!.editorData!.edges.some(
212 |                     e => e.type === edge.element,
213 |                   );
214 |                 })
215 |                 .map(edge => edge.element),
216 |             );
217 | 
218 |             this.updateAllowedEdges();
219 |             this.updateAllowedNodes();
220 |             this.taskSettings = this.detailedQuestionData.umlQuestion!.taskSettings!;
221 | 
222 |             this.setContent();
223 |           } else {
224 |             this.snackBar.open(
225 |               'ACHTUNG: Bei den vorhandenen Daten handelt es sich nicht um eine UML-Aufgabe!',
226 |               'Schließen',
227 |               { duration: 10000 },
228 |             );
229 |             this.thisQuestionType = data.type as questionType;
230 |           }
231 |         });
232 |     });
233 |   }
234 | 
235 |   /**
236 |    * Sets the content of the UML form based on the detailed question data.
237 |    *
238 |    * @private
239 |    */
240 |   private setContent() {
241 |     if (this.thisQuestionType === questionType.UML && this.detailedQuestionData) {
242 |       this.umlForm.patchValue({
243 |         questionTitle: this.detailedQuestionData.name,
244 |         questionDifficulty: this.detailedQuestionData.level.toString(),
245 |         questionDescription: this.detailedQuestionData.description,
246 |         questionScore: this.detailedQuestionData.score,
247 |       });
248 |       if (this.detailedQuestionData.umlQuestion) {
249 |         this.questionField.setContent(
250 |           this.detailedQuestionData.umlQuestion.textHTML || this.detailedQuestionData.text,
251 |         );
252 |         if (this.detailedQuestionData.umlQuestion.editorData) {
253 |           this.currentEditorData = this.detailedQuestionData?.umlQuestion?.editorData;
254 |         }
255 |       }
256 |     }
257 |   }
258 | 
259 |   /**
260 |    * Handles the overwrite action by showing a confirmation dialog to the user.
261 |    * If the user accepts, it builds the data transfer object (DTO) and sends it to update the question.
262 |    * Displays a success or error message based on the response.
263 |    *
264 |    * @protected
265 |    * @method onOverwrite
266 |    * @returns {void}
267 |    */
268 |   protected onOverwrite() {
269 |     this.confirmationService.confirm({
270 |       title: 'Frage aktualisieren',
271 |       message: 'Dies überschreibt die aktuelle Version der Frage. Fortfahren?',
272 |       acceptLabel: 'Aktualisieren',
273 |       declineLabel: 'Abbrechen',
274 |       accept: () => {
275 |         this.isSaving = true;
276 |         const submitData = this.buildDTO();
277 |         if (submitData) {
278 |           this.questionDataService.updateWholeQuestion(submitData).subscribe({
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-upload/edit-upload.component.html
```
1 | <h2 mat-dialog-title style="margin-left: 15px; margin-right: 15px">Upload-Frage bearbeiten</h2>
2 | 
3 | <div mat-dialog-content class="dialog-content">
4 |   <form [formGroup]="uploadForm" class="upload-form">
5 |     <!-- Title Field -->
6 |     <mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="full-width">
7 |       <mat-label>Titel</mat-label>
8 |       <input matInput formControlName="title" placeholder="Titel der Upload-Aufgabe" />
9 |       <mat-error *ngIf="uploadForm.get('title')?.hasError('required')">
10 |         Titel ist erforderlich
11 |       </mat-error>
12 |     </mat-form-field>
13 | 
14 |     <!-- Description/Instructions Field -->
15 |     <mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="full-width">
16 |       <mat-label>Aufgabenbeschreibung</mat-label>
17 |       <textarea
18 |         matInput
19 |         formControlName="text"
20 |         placeholder="Beschreiben Sie, was die Studierenden hochladen sollen..."
21 |         rows="4"
22 |       >
23 |       </textarea>
24 |       <mat-error *ngIf="uploadForm.get('text')?.hasError('required')">
25 |         Aufgabenbeschreibung ist erforderlich
26 |       </mat-error>
27 |     </mat-form-field>
28 | 
29 |     <!-- File Type Selection -->
30 |     <mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="full-width">
31 |       <mat-label>Erlaubte Dateitypen</mat-label>
32 |       <mat-select formControlName="fileType">
33 |         <mat-option *ngFor="let type of fileTypes" [value]="type.value">
34 |           {{ type.label }}
35 |         </mat-option>
36 |       </mat-select>
37 |       <mat-hint>Wählen Sie die erlaubten Dateiformate für den Upload</mat-hint>
38 |       <mat-error *ngIf="uploadForm.get('fileType')?.hasError('required')">
39 |         Dateityp ist erforderlich
40 |       </mat-error>
41 |     </mat-form-field>
42 | 
43 |     <!-- File Size Limit -->
44 |     <mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="full-width">
45 |       <mat-label>Maximale Dateigröße</mat-label>
46 |       <mat-select formControlName="maxSize">
47 |         <mat-option *ngFor="let size of fileSizes" [value]="size.value">
48 |           {{ size.label }}
49 |         </mat-option>
50 |       </mat-select>
51 |       <mat-hint>Maximale Größe pro hochgeladener Datei</mat-hint>
52 |       <mat-error *ngIf="uploadForm.get('maxSize')?.hasError('required')">
53 |         Maximale Dateigröße ist erforderlich
54 |       </mat-error>
55 |       <mat-error *ngIf="uploadForm.get('maxSize')?.hasError('min')">
56 |         Mindestens 1 MB erforderlich
57 |       </mat-error>
58 |       <mat-error *ngIf="uploadForm.get('maxSize')?.hasError('max')">
59 |         Maximum 100 MB erlaubt
60 |       </mat-error>
61 |     </mat-form-field>
62 | 
63 |     <!-- Additional HTML Content (optional) -->
64 |     <!-- <mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="full-width">
65 |       <mat-label>Zusätzliche HTML-Inhalte (optional)</mat-label>
66 |       <textarea
67 |         matInput
68 |         formControlName="textHTML"
69 |         placeholder="Zusätzliche formatierte Inhalte oder Hinweise..."
70 |         rows="3">
71 |       </textarea>
72 |       <mat-hint>Erweiterte Formatierung möglich (HTML)</mat-hint>
73 |     </mat-form-field> -->
74 |   </form>
75 | </div>
76 | 
77 | <div mat-dialog-actions class="dialog-actions">
78 |   <button mat-button (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">Abbrechen</button>
79 |   <button
80 |     mat-raised-button
81 |     color="primary"
82 |     (click)="onSave()"
83 |     [disabled]="isSaving || uploadForm.invalid"
84 |   >
85 |     <span *ngIf="isSaving">Speichern...</span>
86 |     <span *ngIf="!isSaving">Speichern</span>
87 |   </button>
88 | </div>
```

src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-upload/edit-upload.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, Inject } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { FormBuilder, FormGroup } from '@angular/forms';
4 | import { Validators, ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
5 | import { MatDialogRef } from '@angular/material/dialog';
6 | import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA, MatDialogModule } from '@angular/material/dialog';
7 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
8 | import { MatSnackBarModule } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
9 | import { detailedQuestionDTO, detailedUploadQuestionDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
10 | import { questionType } from '@DTOs/index';
11 | import { QuestionDataService } from 'src/app/Services/question/question-data.service';
12 | import { MatFormFieldModule } from '@angular/material/form-field';
13 | import { MatInputModule } from '@angular/material/input';
14 | import { MatSelectModule } from '@angular/material/select';
15 | import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
16 | import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
17 | 
18 | interface EditUploadDialogData {
19 |   questionId: number;
20 | }
21 | 
22 | @Component({
23 |   selector: 'app-edit-upload',
24 |   standalone: true,
25 |   imports: [
26 |     CommonModule,
27 |     ReactiveFormsModule,
28 |     MatDialogModule,
29 |     MatFormFieldModule,
30 |     MatInputModule,
31 |     MatSelectModule,
32 |     MatButtonModule,
33 |     MatSnackBarModule,
34 |   ],
35 |   templateUrl: './edit-upload.component.html',
36 |   styleUrl: './edit-upload.component.scss',
37 | })
38 | export class EditUploadComponent implements OnInit {
39 |   detailedQuestion: detailedQuestionDTO | undefined;
40 |   uploadForm: FormGroup;
41 |   isSaving = false;
42 | 
43 |   // Common file types for selection
44 |   fileTypes = [
45 |     { value: 'pdf', label: 'PDF' },
46 |     { value: 'doc,docx', label: 'Word Dokument' },
47 |     { value: 'jpg,jpeg,png', label: 'Bild (JPG, PNG)' },
48 |     { value: 'zip', label: 'ZIP Archiv' },
49 |     { value: 'txt', label: 'Text Datei' },
50 |     { value: '*', label: 'Alle Dateitypen' },
51 |   ];
52 | 
53 |   // Common file sizes (in MB)
54 |   fileSizes = [
55 |     { value: 1, label: '1 MB' },
56 |     { value: 5, label: '5 MB' },
57 |     { value: 10, label: '10 MB' },
58 |     { value: 25, label: '25 MB' },
59 |     { value: 50, label: '50 MB' },
60 |     { value: 100, label: '100 MB' },
61 |   ];
62 | 
63 |   constructor(
64 |     private readonly fb: FormBuilder,
65 |     private readonly questionDataService: QuestionDataService,
66 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
67 |     public dialogRef: MatDialogRef<EditUploadComponent>,
68 |     @Inject(MAT_DIALOG_DATA) public data: EditUploadDialogData,
69 |   ) {
70 |     this.uploadForm = this.fb.group({
71 |       title: ['', Validators.required],
72 |       text: ['', Validators.required],
73 |       textHTML: [''],
74 |       maxSize: [10, [Validators.required, Validators.min(1), Validators.max(100)]],
75 |       fileType: ['*', Validators.required],
76 |     });
77 |   }
78 | 
79 |   ngOnInit(): void {
80 |     this.questionDataService
81 |       .getDetailedQuestionData(this.data.questionId, questionType.UPLOAD)
82 |       .subscribe((data: detailedQuestionDTO) => {
83 |         console.log('Received detailed question data:', data);
84 |         this.detailedQuestion = data;
85 |         this.uploadForm.patchValue({
86 |           title: data.name,
87 |         });
88 |         if (this.detailedQuestion.uploadQuestion) {
89 |           this.detailedQuestion.uploadQuestion.maxSize = Math.floor(
90 |             (data.uploadQuestion?.maxSize || 10) / 1024 / 1024,
91 |           ); // Convert bytes to MB
92 |           this.setFormData(this.detailedQuestion.uploadQuestion);
93 |         }
94 |       });
95 |   }
96 | 
97 |   private setFormData(uploadQuestion: detailedUploadQuestionDTO): void {
98 |     this.uploadForm.patchValue({
99 |       title: uploadQuestion.title,
100 |       text: uploadQuestion.text,
101 |       textHTML: uploadQuestion.textHTML,
102 |       maxSize: uploadQuestion.maxSize,
103 |       fileType: uploadQuestion.fileType,
104 |     });
105 |   }
106 | 
107 |   onSave(): void {
108 |     if (this.uploadForm.valid && this.detailedQuestion) {
109 |       this.isSaving = true;
110 | 
111 |       this.detailedQuestion.name = this.uploadForm.value.title;
112 |       this.detailedQuestion.uploadQuestion = {
113 |         ...this.detailedQuestion.uploadQuestion,
114 |         ...this.uploadForm.value,
115 |         maxSize: this.uploadForm.value.maxSize * 1024 * 1024, // Convert MB to bytes
116 |       };
117 | 
118 |       // update and wait for the response
119 |       this.questionDataService.updateWholeQuestion(this.detailedQuestion).subscribe({
120 |         next: () => {
121 |           this.snackBar.open('Frage erfolgreich gespeichert!', 'Schließen', {
122 |             duration: 3000,
123 |           });
124 |           this.isSaving = false;
125 |         },
126 |         error: error => {
127 |           this.snackBar.open('Fehler beim Speichern der Frage: ' + error.message, 'Schließen', {
128 |             duration: 3000,
129 |           });
130 |           this.isSaving = false;
131 |         },
132 |       });
133 |     } else {
134 |       this.snackBar.open('Bitte füllen Sie alle Pflichtfelder aus.', 'Schließen', {
135 |         duration: 3000,
136 |       });
137 |     }
138 |   }
139 | 
140 |   onCancel(): void {
141 |     this.dialogRef.close();
142 |   }
143 | }
```

3 | import { ElementRef } from '@angular/core';

6 |   let elementRef: ElementRef;
7 |   let renderer: Renderer2;
8 | 
9 |   beforeEach(() => {
10 |     elementRef = new ElementRef(document.createElement('div'));
11 |     renderer = jasmine.createSpyObj('Renderer2', ['setStyle']);
12 |   });
13 | 
14 |   it('should create an instance', () => {
15 |     const directive = new BellDirective(elementRef, renderer);
16 |     expect(directive).toBeTruthy();
17 |   });
18 | });

src/app/Pages/notification/notification-bell/belldirective.directive.ts
```
1 | import { ElementRef, OnChanges, Renderer2, SimpleChanges, Directive, Input } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { NotificationDTO } from '@DTOs/notification.dto';
3 | import { NotificationType } from '@DTOs/notificationType.enum';
4 | 
5 | /**
6 |  * Directive to apply custom styles to notification elements based on their properties.
7 |  * This directive dynamically changes the appearance of a notification based on its read status and type.
8 |  */
9 | @Directive({
10 |   selector: '[appNotificationStyle]',
11 | })
12 | export class BellDirective implements OnChanges {
13 |   /**
14 |    * Input property to receive the notification object.
15 |    */
16 |   @Input() notification!: NotificationDTO;
17 | 
18 |   /**
19 |    * Creates an instance of BellDirective.
20 |    * @param {ElementRef} element - Reference to the host element.
21 |    * @param {Renderer2} renderer - Renderer2 for DOM manipulation.
22 |    */
23 |   constructor(
24 |     private readonly element: ElementRef,
25 |     private readonly renderer: Renderer2,
26 |   ) {}
27 | 
28 |   /**
29 |    * Lifecycle hook that is called when any data-bound property of a directive changes.
30 |    * It triggers the style application when the notification input changes.
31 |    * @param {SimpleChanges} changes - SimpleChanges object containing current and previous property values.
32 |    */
33 |   ngOnChanges(changes: SimpleChanges) {
34 |     if (changes['notification']) {
35 |       this.applyStylesAndText();
36 |     }
37 |   }
38 | 
39 |   /**
40 |    * Applies styles to the host element based on the notification properties.
41 |    * This method sets background color based on read status and border color based on notification type.
42 |    * @private
43 |    */
44 |   private applyStylesAndText() {
45 |     if (!this.notification) {
46 |       return;
47 |     }
48 | 
49 |     // Set background color based on read status
50 |     if (!this.notification.isRead) {
51 |       this.renderer.setStyle(this.element.nativeElement, 'backgroundColor', '#e0f7fa');
52 |     } else {
53 |       this.renderer.setStyle(this.element.nativeElement, 'backgroundColor', 'white');
54 |     }
55 | 
56 |     // Set border color based on notification type
57 |     switch (this.notification.type) {
58 |       case NotificationType.COMMENT:
59 |         this.renderer.setStyle(this.element.nativeElement, 'borderLeft', '4px solid darkblue');
60 |         break;
61 |       case NotificationType.SOLUTION:
62 |         this.renderer.setStyle(this.element.nativeElement, 'borderLeft', '4px solid darkgreen');
63 |         break;
64 |       case NotificationType.INFO:
65 |         this.renderer.setStyle(this.element.nativeElement, 'borderLeft', '4px solid red');
66 |         break;
67 |     }
68 |   }
69 | }
```

src/app/Pages/notification/notification-bell/notification-bell.component.html
```
1 | <div class="notification-bell" #notificationBell>
2 |   <button
3 |     mat-icon-button
4 |     class="notification-button"
5 |     (click)="toggleNotifications()"
6 |     aria-label="Notifications"
7 |   >
8 |     <div class="bell-container">
9 |       <mat-icon>notifications</mat-icon>
10 |       <ng-container *ngIf="unreadCount$ | async as count">
11 |         <div *ngIf="count > 0" class="notification-count">
12 |           {{ count > 99 ? '99+' : count }}
13 |         </div>
14 |       </ng-container>
15 |     </div>
16 |   </button>
17 |   <div class="notifications-panel" *ngIf="showNotifications" (scroll)="onScroll($event)">
18 |     <mat-accordion>
19 |       <mat-expansion-panel
20 |         *ngFor="let notification of allNotifications"
21 |         #panel
22 |         appNotificationStyle
23 |         [notification]="notification"
24 |       >
25 |         <mat-expansion-panel-header>
26 |           <mat-panel-title>
27 |             <span class="notification-date">{{ notification.formattedTimestampTitle }}</span>
28 |             <span class="notification-title">{{ notification.title }}</span>
29 |           </mat-panel-title>
30 |           <mat-panel-description>
31 |             <span *ngIf="!notification.isRead" class="notification-status">New</span>
32 |           </mat-panel-description>
33 |         </mat-expansion-panel-header>
34 |         <p>{{ notification.message }}</p>
35 |         <mat-divider class="divider"></mat-divider>
36 |         <p>{{ notification.formattedTimestamp }}</p>
37 |         <div class="buttons">
38 |           <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="onClick(notification, panel, 'view')">
39 |             Anzeigen
40 |           </button>
41 |           <button
42 |             mat-raised-button
43 |             color="accent"
44 |             (click)="onClick(notification, panel, 'read')"
45 |             [disabled]="notification.isRead"
46 |           >
47 |             als gelesen markieren
48 |           </button>
49 |         </div>
50 |       </mat-expansion-panel>
51 |     </mat-accordion>
52 |   </div>
53 | </div>
```

src/app/Pages/notification/notification-bell/notification-bell.component.ts
```
1 | import { Component, ViewChild, ViewChildren, ElementRef, OnInit, QueryList, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { NotificationService } from 'src/app/Services/notification/notification.service';
3 | import { NotificationDTO } from '@DTOs/notification.dto';
4 | import { MatExpansionPanel } from '@angular/material/expansion';
5 | import { NotificationType } from '@DTOs/notificationType.enum';
6 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
7 | import { Subject, merge } from 'rxjs';
8 | import { map, takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
9 | 
10 | /**
11 |  * NotificationBellComponent is responsible for displaying and managing notifications.
12 |  * It provides a notification bell icon that shows the number of unread notifications
13 |  * and a panel that displays all notifications when clicked.
14 |  */
15 | @Component({
16 |   selector: 'app-notification-bell',
17 |   templateUrl: './notification-bell.component.html',
18 |   styleUrls: ['./notification-bell.component.scss'],
19 | })
20 | export class NotificationBellComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
21 |   /** Stores all notifications */
22 |   allNotifications: NotificationDTO[] = [];
23 | 
24 |   /** Observable for the count of unread notifications */
25 |   unreadCount$: Observable<number>;
26 | 
27 |   /** Controls the visibility of the notifications panel */
28 |   showNotifications = false;
29 | 
30 |   /** Initial number of notifications to load */
31 |   readonly INITIAL_LIMIT = 10;
32 | 
33 |   /** Number of additional notifications to load when scrolling */
34 |   readonly LOAD_MORE_LIMIT = 10;
35 | 
36 |   /** Offset for pagination when loading more notifications */
37 |   private offset = 0;
38 | 
39 |   /** Subject used for unsubscribing from observables */
40 |   private readonly unsubscribe$ = new Subject<void>();
41 | 
42 |   /** Titles for different types of notifications */
43 |   private readonly notificationTitles: Record<NotificationType, string> = {
44 |     [NotificationType.COMMENT]: 'Kommentar',
45 |     [NotificationType.SOLUTION]: 'Lösung',
46 |     [NotificationType.INFO]: 'Information',
47 |     [NotificationType.EVALUATION_COMMENT]: 'Bewertungskommentar',
48 |     [NotificationType.EVALUATION_RATING]: 'Bewertung',
49 |     [NotificationType.PHASE_SWITCH]: 'Phasenwechsel',
50 |   } as const;
51 | 
52 |   /** Formatter for displaying timestamps with date and time */
53 |   private readonly dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('de-DE', {
54 |     year: 'numeric',
55 |     month: '2-digit',
56 |     day: '2-digit',
57 |     hour: '2-digit',
58 |     minute: '2-digit',
59 |   });
60 | 
61 |   /** Formatter for displaying timestamps with date only */
62 |   private readonly dateOnlyFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('de-DE', {
63 |     year: 'numeric',
64 |     month: '2-digit',
65 |     day: '2-digit',
66 |   });
67 | 
68 |   /** Reference to all MatExpansionPanel elements in the template */
69 |   @ViewChildren(MatExpansionPanel) panels!: QueryList<MatExpansionPanel>;
70 | 
71 |   /** Reference to the notification bell element in the template */
72 |   @ViewChild('notificationBell', { static: true }) notificationBellRef!: ElementRef;
73 | 
74 |   /**
75 |    * Creates an instance of NotificationBellComponent.
76 |    * @param {NotificationService} notificationService Service for handling notification-related operations
77 |    */
78 |   constructor(private readonly notificationService: NotificationService) {
79 |     this.unreadCount$ = this.notificationService.getUnreadCount();
80 |   }
81 | 
82 |   /**
83 |    * Initializes the component, sets up listeners, and loads initial notifications.
84 |    */
85 |   ngOnInit(): void {
86 |     this.initializeNotifications();
87 |     this.setupCloseNotificationListener();
88 |     this.setupOutsideClickListener();
89 |   }
90 | 
91 |   /**
92 |    * Cleans up subscriptions when the component is destroyed.
93 |    */
94 |   ngOnDestroy(): void {
95 |     this.unsubscribe$.next();
96 |     this.unsubscribe$.complete();
97 |     document.removeEventListener('click', this.handleOutsideClick.bind(this));
98 |   }
99 | 
100 |   /**
101 |    * Initializes notifications by fetching initial data and setting up streams.
102 |    */
103 |   private initializeNotifications(): void {
104 |     const initialNotifications$ = this.notificationService.fetchMoreNotifications(
105 |       this.INITIAL_LIMIT,
106 |       0,
107 |     );
108 |     const updatedNotifications$ = this.notificationService.getNotifications();
109 | 
110 |     merge(initialNotifications$, updatedNotifications$)
111 |       .pipe(
112 |         takeUntil(this.unsubscribe$),
113 |         map(notifications =>
114 |           notifications.map(notification => ({
115 |             ...notification,
116 |             formattedTimestamp: this.safeFormatTimeStamp(notification.timestamp, true),
117 |             formattedTimestampTitle: this.safeFormatTimeStampTitle(notification.timestamp),
118 |             title: this.getNotificationTitle(notification.type || NotificationType.INFO),
119 |           })),
120 |         ),
121 |       )
122 |       .subscribe(notifications => {
123 |         this.allNotifications = notifications;
124 |       });
125 | 
126 |     this.notificationService
127 |       .getUnreadCountFromServer()
128 |       .pipe(takeUntil(this.unsubscribe$))
129 |       .subscribe();
130 |   }
131 | 
132 |   /**
133 |    * Sets up a listener for closing the notification panel.
134 |    */
135 |   private setupCloseNotificationListener(): void {
136 |     this.notificationService.closeNotificationPanel$
137 |       .pipe(takeUntil(this.unsubscribe$))
138 |       .subscribe(shouldClose => {
139 |         if (shouldClose) {
140 |           this.showNotifications = false;
141 |         }
142 |       });
143 |   }
144 | 
145 |   /**
146 |    * Sets up a listener for clicks outside the notification panel to close it.
147 |    */
148 |   private setupOutsideClickListener(): void {
149 |     document.addEventListener('click', this.handleOutsideClick.bind(this));
150 |   }
151 | 
152 |   /**
153 |    * Handles clicks outside the notification bell to close the panel.
154 |    * @param {MouseEvent} event The mouse event
155 |    */
156 |   handleOutsideClick(event: MouseEvent): void {
157 |     if (!this.notificationBellRef.nativeElement.contains(event.target)) {
158 |       this.showNotifications = false;
159 |     }
160 |   }
161 | 
162 |   /**
163 |    * Loads more notifications when the user scrolls to the bottom of the panel.
164 |    */
165 |   loadMoreNotifications(): void {
166 |     this.offset += this.LOAD_MORE_LIMIT;
167 |     this.notificationService
168 |       .fetchMoreNotifications(this.LOAD_MORE_LIMIT, this.offset)
169 |       .pipe(takeUntil(this.unsubscribe$))
170 |       .subscribe(newNotifications => {
171 |         // Append new notifications to the existing list
172 |         this.allNotifications = [...this.allNotifications, ...newNotifications];
173 |       });
174 |   }
175 | 
176 |   /**
177 |    * Handles scroll events on the notification panel.
178 |    * @param {Event} event The scroll event
179 |    */
180 |   onScroll(event: Event): void {
181 |     const element = event.target as HTMLElement;
182 |     // Check if the user has scrolled to the bottom
183 |     if (element.scrollHeight - element.scrollTop === element.clientHeight) {
184 |       this.loadMoreNotifications();
185 |     }
186 |   }
187 | 
188 |   /**
189 |    * Handles clicks on individual notifications.
190 |    * @param {NotificationDTO} notification The clicked notification
191 |    * @param {MatExpansionPanel} panel The expansion panel containing the notification
192 |    * @param {string} action The action to perform ('view' or 'mark as read')
193 |    */
194 |   onClick(notification: NotificationDTO, panel: MatExpansionPanel, action: string): void {
195 |     this.notificationService
196 |       .handleNotificationClick(notification, action)
197 |       .pipe(takeUntil(this.unsubscribe$))
198 |       .subscribe(() => panel.close());
199 |   }
200 | 
201 |   /**
202 |    * Toggles the visibility of the notifications panel.
203 |    */
204 |   toggleNotifications(): void {
205 |     this.showNotifications = this.allNotifications.length > 0 ? !this.showNotifications : false;
206 |   }
207 | 
208 |   /**
209 |    * Formats a timestamp into a human-readable string.
210 |    * @param {Date | string | undefined} timestamp - timestamp to format
211 |    * @param {true} includeTime - whether to include the time in the formatted timestamp
212 |    * @returns {string} formatted timestamp
213 |    */
214 |   private safeFormatTimeStamp(timestamp: Date | string | undefined, includeTime: boolean): string {
215 |     if (!timestamp) return 'Unbekannte Zeit';
216 | 
217 |     let date: Date;
218 |     if (typeof timestamp === 'string') {
219 |       date = new Date(timestamp);
220 |     } else {
221 |       date = timestamp;
222 |     }
223 | 
224 |     if (isNaN(date.getTime())) {
225 |       return 'Ungültiges Datum';
226 |     }
227 | 
228 |     try {
229 |       return includeTime ? this.dateFormatter.format(date) : this.dateOnlyFormatter.format(date);
230 |     } catch (error) {
231 |       console.error('Error formatting date:', error);
232 |       return 'Formatierungsfehler';
233 |     }
234 |   }
235 | 
236 |   /**
237 |    * Formats a timestamp into a human-readable string for the title attribute.
238 |    * @param {Date | string | undefined} timestamp - timestamp to format
239 |    * @returns {string} formatted timestamp
240 |    */
241 |   private safeFormatTimeStampTitle(timestamp: Date | string | undefined): string {
242 |     return this.safeFormatTimeStamp(timestamp, false);
243 |   }
244 | 
245 |   /**
246 |    * Returns the title of a notification based on its type.
247 |    * @param {NotificationType} type - the type of the notification
248 |    * @returns {string} the title of the notification
249 |    */
250 |   private getNotificationTitle(type: NotificationType): string {
251 |     return this.notificationTitles[type] || 'Unbekannt';
252 |   }
253 | }
```

1 | <div class="grading-overview-container">
2 |   <h2>Teacher Grading Overview</h2>
3 | 
4 |   <div class="navigation-buttons">
5 |     <h3>Modular Navigation (Placeholder)</h3>
6 |     <button>Overview</button>
7 |     <button>Another Grading View</button>
8 |   </div>
9 | 
10 |   <h3 *ngIf="moduleId">Uploads for EntwurfUpload Questions (Module {{ moduleId }})</h3>
11 | 
12 |   <div *ngIf="isLoading" class="loading-indicator">
13 |     <p>Loading...</p>
14 |   </div>
15 | 
16 |   <div *ngIf="error" class="error-message">
17 |     <p>{{ error }}</p>
18 |   </div>
19 | 
20 |   <table *ngIf="!isLoading && !error">
21 |     <thead>
22 |       <tr>
23 |         <th>Question ID</th>
24 |         <th>User ID</th>
25 |         <th>Upload</th>
26 |       </tr>
27 |     </thead>
28 |     <tbody>
29 |       <tr *ngFor="let item of uploadOverview">
30 |         <td>{{ item.questionId }}</td>
31 |         <td>{{ item.userId }}</td>
32 |         <td>
33 |           <a *ngIf="item.uploadPath !== 'N/A'" [href]="item.uploadPath" target="_blank">{{
34 |             item.uploadPath
35 |           }}</a>
36 |           <span *ngIf="item.uploadPath === 'N/A'" class="no-upload-text">No Upload</span>
37 |         </td>
38 |       </tr>
39 |     </tbody>
40 |   </table>
41 | </div>

src/app/Pages/teacher/grading-overview/grading-overview.component.ts
```
1 | import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { ActivatedRoute } from '@angular/router';
3 | import { GradingService } from './services/grading.service';
4 | import { Question, UserAnswer, UserUploadAnswer } from './services/grading.service';
5 | import { forkJoin } from 'rxjs';
6 | 
7 | @Component({
8 |   selector: 'app-grading-overview',
9 |   templateUrl: './grading-overview.component.html',
10 |   styleUrls: ['./grading-overview.component.scss'],
11 | })
12 | export class GradingOverviewComponent implements OnInit {
13 |   uploadOverview: any[] = [];
14 |   moduleId: number | null = null;
15 |   isLoading = true;
16 |   error: string | null = null;
17 | 
18 |   constructor(
19 |     private readonly gradingService: GradingService,
20 |     private readonly route: ActivatedRoute,
21 |   ) {}
22 | 
23 |   ngOnInit(): void {
24 |     this.route.paramMap.subscribe(params => {
25 |       const id = params.get('moduleId');
26 |       if (id) {
27 |         this.moduleId = +id;
28 |         this.generateUploadOverview(this.moduleId);
29 |       }
30 |     });
31 |   }
32 | 
33 |   generateUploadOverview(moduleId: number): void {
34 |     this.isLoading = true;
35 |     this.error = null;
36 | 
37 |     forkJoin({
38 |       questions: this.gradingService.getQuestions(),
39 |       userAnswers: this.gradingService.getUserAnswers(),
40 |       userUploadAnswers: this.gradingService.getUserUploadAnswers(),
41 |     }).subscribe({
42 |       next: ({ questions, userAnswers, userUploadAnswers }) => {
43 |         const entwurfUploadQuestions = questions.filter(q => q.type === 'EntwurfUpload');
44 | 
45 |         this.uploadOverview = entwurfUploadQuestions
46 |           .map(question => {
47 |             const answersForQuestion = userAnswers.filter(
48 |               ua => ua.questionId === question.questionId,
49 |             );
50 |             return answersForQuestion.map(answer => {
51 |               const upload = userUploadAnswers.find(
52 |                 uua => uua.userId === answer.userId && uua.questionId === answer.questionId,
53 |               );
54 |               return {
55 |                 questionId: question.questionId,
56 |                 userId: answer.userId,
57 |                 uploadPath: upload ? upload.uploadPath : 'N/A',
58 |               };
59 |             });
60 |           })
61 |           .flat();
62 |         this.isLoading = false;
63 |       },
64 |       error: err => {
65 |         this.error = 'Failed to load data.';
66 |         this.isLoading = false;
67 |       },
68 |     });
69 |   }
70 | }
```

src/app/Pages/test/file-upload/file-upload.component.ts
```
1 | // This Component is just a test component to test the file upload and download functionality.
2 | import { Component } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { FileService } from '../../../Services/files/files.service';
4 | @Component({
5 |   selector: 'app-file-upload',
6 |   templateUrl: './file-upload.component.html',
7 |   styleUrls: ['./file-upload.component.css'],
8 | })
9 | export class FileUploadComponent {
10 |   fileToUpload: File | null = null;
11 |   uniqueIdentifier: string = '';
12 | 
13 |   constructor(private readonly fileService: FileService) {}
14 | 
15 |   /**
16 |    * Called when a file is selected via the UI.
17 |    *
18 |    * @param event The event object containing information about the selected file.
19 |    */
20 |   onFileSelected(event: Event): void {
21 |     const input = event.target as HTMLInputElement;
22 | 
23 |     if (input?.files?.length) {
24 |       this.fileToUpload = input.files[0];
25 |     }
26 |   }
27 | 
28 |   /**
29 |    * Uploads the selected file via the FileService.
30 |    */
31 |   uploadFile(): void {
32 |     if (this.fileToUpload) {
33 |       this.fileService.uploadFile(this.fileToUpload).subscribe(response => {
34 |         //console.log(response);
35 |         // Handle the response as needed.
36 |       });
37 |     }
38 |   }
39 | 
40 |   /**
41 |    * Downloads a file via its unique identifier.
42 |    *
43 |    * This method makes use of the FileService to fetch the file and its metadata and initiates a browser download.
44 |    */
45 |   downloadFile(): void {
46 |     if (this.uniqueIdentifier) {
47 |       this.fileService.downloadFile(this.uniqueIdentifier).subscribe(response => {
48 |         const blobData = response.body;
49 |         //console.log(JSON.stringify(response.headers));
50 |         if (blobData !== null) {
51 |           const blob = new Blob([blobData], {
52 |             type: 'application/octet-stream',
53 |           });
54 |           const fileName = response.headers.get('X-Filename') || 'error_no_file_name.txt';
55 |           const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
56 |           const a = document.createElement('a');
57 |           a.href = url;
58 |           a.download = fileName;
59 |           a.click();
60 |           window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
61 |         } else {
62 |           console.error('Download fehlgeschlagen: Blob-Daten sind null');
63 |         }
64 |       });
65 |     }
66 |   }
67 | }
```
