328 |         padding: 8px 16px;
329 |         border-left: 4px solid $nord-light-accent-frost-3;
330 |         background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
331 |         font-style: italic;
332 |       }
333 |     }
334 | 
335 |     .rating-section {
336 |       padding: 16px 20px;
337 | 
338 |       .rating-divider {
339 |         height: 1px;
340 |         background-color: $nord-light-border;
341 |         margin-bottom: 16px;
342 |       }
343 |     }
344 |   }
345 | }
346 | 
347 | // Responsive Anpassungen
348 | @media (max-width: 600px) {
349 |   .feedback-panel {
350 |     padding: 8px;
351 | 
352 |     .feedback-card {
353 |       padding: 10px 8px;
354 |       margin-bottom: 10px;
355 |     }
356 | 
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/feedback-panel/feedback-panel.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnDestroy, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { DomSanitizer, SafeHtml } from '@angular/platform-browser';
4 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
5 | import { Subject, takeUntil } from 'rxjs'; // Added Observable import
6 | import { WorkspaceStateService } from '../../services/workspace-state.service';
7 | import { WorkspaceState } from '../../models/code-submission.model'; // Removed unused imports
8 | import { MarkdownService } from '../../services/markdown/markdown.service';
9 | import { trigger, state, style, animate, transition } from '@angular/animations';
10 | 
11 | @Component({
12 |   selector: 'app-feedback-panel',
13 |   templateUrl: './feedback-panel.component.html',
14 |   styleUrls: ['./feedback-panel.component.scss'],
15 |   animations: [
16 |     trigger('bubbleAnimation', [
17 |       state(
18 |         'hidden',
19 |         style({
20 |           opacity: 0,
21 |           transform: 'translateY(-20px)',
22 |         }),
23 |       ),
24 |       state(
25 |         'visible',
26 |         style({
27 |           opacity: 1,
28 |           transform: 'translateY(0)',
29 |         }),
30 |       ),
31 |       transition('hidden => visible', [animate('300ms ease-out')]),
32 |       transition('visible => hidden', [animate('200ms ease-in')]),
33 |     ]),
34 |   ],
35 | })
36 | export class FeedbackPanelComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
37 |   feedbackContent = '';
38 |   sanitizedFeedback: SafeHtml = '';
39 |   isGenerating = false;
40 |   generatingMessage = 'Lass mich einen Augenblick über die Aufgabe nachdenken...';
41 | 
42 |   // Removed properties related to old feedback categories/questions
43 | 
44 |   // Zustand
45 |   currentState: WorkspaceState = WorkspaceState.START;
46 | 
47 |   private readonly destroy$ = new Subject<void>();
48 | 
49 |   constructor(
50 |     private readonly workspaceState: WorkspaceStateService,
51 |     private readonly markdownService: MarkdownService,
52 |     private readonly sanitizer: DomSanitizer,
53 |   ) {}
54 | 
55 |   ngOnInit(): void {
56 |     // Abonniere den Workspace-Zustand
57 |     this.workspaceState.workspaceState$.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(state => {
58 |       this.currentState = state;
59 |       this.isGenerating =
60 |         state === WorkspaceState.GENERATING_FEEDBACK || state === WorkspaceState.RECEIVING_FEEDBACK;
61 |     });
62 | 
63 |     // Abonniere Feedback-Inhalt
64 |     this.workspaceState.feedback$.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(feedback => {
65 |       this.feedbackContent = feedback;
66 |       if (feedback) {
67 |         const parsedMarkdown = this.markdownService.parse(feedback);
68 |         this.sanitizedFeedback = this.sanitizer.bypassSecurityTrustHtml(parsedMarkdown);
69 |       }
70 |     });
71 |   }
72 | 
73 |   ngOnDestroy(): void {
74 |     this.destroy$.next();
75 |     this.destroy$.complete();
76 |   }
77 | 
78 |   // --- New Agent-Specific Feedback Request Methods ---
79 | 
80 |   private requestAgentFeedback(
81 |     agentRequestFn: (taskId: number, submissionResult: any) => Observable<string>,
82 |   ): void {
83 |     const task = this.workspaceState.getCurrentTask();
84 |     const lastResult = this.workspaceState.getCodeSubmissionResult();
85 | 
86 |     if (task && lastResult) {
87 |       agentRequestFn
88 |         .call(this.workspaceState, task.id, lastResult)
89 |         .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
90 |         .subscribe({
91 |           // Optional: Add next/error handlers if needed for component-specific logic
92 |           error: (err: any) => console.error('Error requesting agent feedback in component:', err), // Added type for err
93 |         });
94 |     } else {
95 |       console.error('Cannot request feedback: Task or last submission result is missing.');
96 |       // Optionally show an error message to the user
97 |     }
98 |   }
99 | 
100 |   requestSupervisorFeedback(): void {
101 |     this.requestAgentFeedback(this.workspaceState.requestSupervisorFeedback);
102 |   }
103 | 
104 |   requestKcFeedback(): void {
105 |     this.requestAgentFeedback(this.workspaceState.requestKcFeedback);
106 |   }
107 | 
108 |   requestKhFeedback(): void {
109 |     this.requestAgentFeedback(this.workspaceState.requestKhFeedback);
110 |   }
111 | 
112 |   requestKmFeedback(): void {
113 |     this.requestAgentFeedback(this.workspaceState.requestKmFeedback);
114 |   }
115 | 
116 |   requestKtcFeedback(): void {
117 |     this.requestAgentFeedback(this.workspaceState.requestKtcFeedback);
118 |   }
119 | 
120 |   // Removed old methods: selectCategory, requestFeedbackForQuestion, closeQuestionBubble
121 | 
122 |   /**
123 |    * Behandelt die Bewertungsabgabe
124 |    */
125 |   onRatingSubmitted(rating: number): void {
126 |     const result = this.workspaceState.getCodeSubmissionResult();
127 | 
128 |     if (result) {
129 |       this.workspaceState
130 |         .submitRating(
131 |           rating,
132 |           '', // Leerer Kommentar
133 |           result.encryptedCodeSubissionId,
134 |         )
135 |         .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
136 |         .subscribe();
137 |     }
138 |   }
139 | 
140 |   /**
141 |    * Prüft, ob der aktuelle Zustand dem übergebenen Zustand entspricht
142 |    */
143 |   isState(state: WorkspaceState): boolean {
144 |     return this.currentState === state;
145 |   }
146 | 
147 |   /**
148 |    * Prüft, ob Feedback-Optionen angezeigt werden sollen
149 |    */
150 |   showFeedbackOptions(): boolean {
151 |     return this.currentState === WorkspaceState.SUBMITTED_CODE;
152 |   }
153 | 
154 |   /**
155 |    * Prüft, ob das Feedback-Bewertungssystem angezeigt werden soll
156 |    */
157 |   showRating(): boolean {
158 |     return this.currentState === WorkspaceState.FINISHED_FEEDBACK;
159 |   }
160 | 
161 |   // Removed getSelectedFeedbackName method
162 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback.component.html
```
1 | <div class="feedback-panel-tutor">
2 |   <div class="feedback-header">
3 |     <h2>Tutor Kai</h2>
4 |     <p class="ai-warning">
5 |       Das Feedback wird mittels generativer KI generiert und ist nicht immer perfekt.
6 |     </p>
7 |   </div>
8 |   <!-- Loading State -->
9 |   <div *ngIf="isLoading" class="loading-container">
10 |     <mat-spinner diameter="40"></mat-spinner>
11 |     <p>Das Feedback wird generiert...</p>
12 |   </div>
13 | 
14 |   <!-- Error State -->
15 |   <div *ngIf="error && !isLoading" class="error-container">
16 |     <mat-icon color="warn">error_outline</mat-icon>
17 |     <p>Error loading feedback:</p>
18 |     <p class="error-message">{{ error }}</p>
19 |     <!-- Optional: Add a retry button -->
20 |     <!-- <button mat-stroked-button color="warn" (click)="fetchFeedback()">Retry</button> -->
21 |   </div>
22 | 
23 |   <!-- Feedback Content -->
24 |   <div *ngIf="feedback && !isLoading && !error" class="feedback-content">
25 |     <div class="feedback-cards">
26 |       <!-- KM Feedback Card -->
27 |       <div *ngIf="feedback['KM']" class="feedback-card" [class.expanded]="expandedSections['KM']">
28 |         <button
29 |           class="card-header"
30 |           (click)="toggleSection('KM')"
31 |           [disabled]="expandedSections['KM']"
32 |         >
33 |           <span class="title">{{ feedbackTitles['KM'] || 'KM' }}</span>
34 |           <mat-icon *ngIf="!expandedSections['KM']">visibility</mat-icon>
35 |           <mat-icon *ngIf="expandedSections['KM']" class="visible-icon">visibility</mat-icon>
36 |         </button>
37 |         <div class="card-content" [@expandCollapse]="expandedSections['KM'] ? 'true' : 'false'">
38 |           <div class="feedback-text" [innerHTML]="parseMarkdown(feedback['KM'])"></div>
39 |         </div>
40 |       </div>
41 | 
42 |       <!-- KC Feedback Card -->
43 |       <div *ngIf="feedback['KC']" class="feedback-card" [class.expanded]="expandedSections['KC']">
44 |         <button
45 |           class="card-header"
46 |           (click)="toggleSection('KC')"
47 |           [disabled]="expandedSections['KC']"
48 |         >
49 |           <span class="title">{{ feedbackTitles['KC'] || 'KC' }}</span>
50 |           <mat-icon *ngIf="!expandedSections['KC']">visibility</mat-icon>
51 |           <mat-icon *ngIf="expandedSections['KC']" class="visible-icon">visibility</mat-icon>
52 |         </button>
53 |         <div class="card-content" [@expandCollapse]="expandedSections['KC'] ? 'true' : 'false'">
54 |           <div class="feedback-text" [innerHTML]="parseMarkdown(feedback['KC'])"></div>
55 |         </div>
56 |       </div>
57 | 
58 |       <!-- KH Feedback Card -->
59 |       <div *ngIf="feedback['KH']" class="feedback-card" [class.expanded]="expandedSections['KH']">
60 |         <button
61 |           class="card-header"
62 |           (click)="toggleSection('KH')"
63 |           [disabled]="expandedSections['KH']"
64 |         >
65 |           <span class="title">{{ feedbackTitles['KH'] || 'KH' }}</span>
66 |           <mat-icon *ngIf="!expandedSections['KH']">visibility</mat-icon>
67 |           <mat-icon *ngIf="expandedSections['KH']" class="visible-icon">visibility</mat-icon>
68 |         </button>
69 |         <div class="card-content" [@expandCollapse]="expandedSections['KH'] ? 'true' : 'false'">
70 |           <div class="feedback-text" [innerHTML]="parseMarkdown(feedback['KH'])"></div>
71 |         </div>
72 |       </div>
73 | 
74 |       <!-- SPS Feedback Card -->
75 |       <div *ngIf="feedback['SPS']" class="feedback-card" [class.expanded]="expandedSections['SPS']">
76 |         <button
77 |           class="card-header"
78 |           (click)="toggleSection('SPS')"
79 |           [disabled]="expandedSections['SPS']"
80 |         >
81 |           <span class="title">{{ feedbackTitles['SPS'] || 'SPS' }}</span>
82 |           <mat-icon *ngIf="!expandedSections['SPS']">visibility</mat-icon>
83 |           <mat-icon *ngIf="expandedSections['SPS']" class="visible-icon">visibility</mat-icon>
84 |         </button>
85 |         <div class="card-content" [@expandCollapse]="expandedSections['SPS'] ? 'true' : 'false'">
86 |           <markdown [data]="feedback['SPS']"></markdown>
87 |         </div>
88 |       </div>
89 |     </div>
90 | 
91 |     <!-- Rating Section
92 |     <div *ngIf="showRating()" class="rating-section">
93 |       <div class="rating-divider"></div>
94 |       <app-rating (ratingSubmitted)="onRatingSubmitted($event)"></app-rating>
95 |     </div>
96 |   </div>-->
97 | 
98 |     <!-- Initial state / No feedback yet (Optional)
99 |   <div *ngIf="!feedback && !isLoading && !error" class="initial-state">
100 |   </div> -->
101 |   </div>
102 | </div>
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback.component.scss
```
1 | @import '../../nord-light-theme';
2 | 
3 | .feedback-panel-tutor {
4 |   height: 100%;
5 |   overflow-y: auto;
6 |   display: flex;
7 |   flex-direction: column;
8 |   background-color: $nord-light-bg-primary;
9 |   color: $nord-light-text-primary;
10 |   font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
11 | 
12 |   .feedback-header {
13 |     height: $tab-height;
14 |     display: flex;
15 |     justify-content: space-between;
16 |     align-items: center;
17 |     padding: 5px 10px;
18 |     background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
19 |     border-bottom: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
20 | 
21 |     h2 {
22 |       margin: 0;
23 |       font-size: 18px;
24 |       font-weight: 500;
25 |       flex-grow: 1;
26 |     }
27 |     .ai-warning {
28 |       margin: 0;
29 |       font-size: 12px;
30 |       font-weight: 100;
31 |       max-width: 75%;
32 |     }
33 |   }
34 | 
35 |   // Loading State
36 |   .loading-container {
37 |     display: flex;
38 |     flex-direction: column;
39 |     align-items: center;
40 |     justify-content: center;
41 |     padding: 40px 0;
42 |     color: $nord-light-ui-dark;
43 | 
44 |     mat-spinner {
45 |       margin-bottom: 16px;
46 |     }
47 |   }
48 | 
49 |   // Error State
50 |   .error-container {
51 |     display: flex;
52 |     flex-direction: column;
53 |     align-items: center;
54 |     justify-content: center;
55 |     padding: 40px 20px;
56 |     text-align: center;
57 |     color: var(--mat-warn-color, $nord-light-error);
58 | 
59 |     mat-icon {
60 |       font-size: 48px;
61 |       width: 48px;
62 |       height: 48px;
63 |       margin-bottom: 16px;
64 |     }
65 | 
66 |     p {
67 |       margin-bottom: 8px;
68 |     }
69 | 
70 |     .error-message {
71 |       font-style: italic;
72 |       color: $nord-light-ui-dark;
73 |       margin-bottom: 16px;
74 |     }
75 |   }
76 | 
77 |   // Feedback Content Area
78 |   .feedback-content {
79 |     flex-grow: 1; // Allow content to take available space
80 |     display: flex;
81 |     flex-direction: column;
82 | 
83 |     .feedback-cards {
84 |       flex-grow: 1; // Allow cards to take space before rating
85 |     }
86 | 
87 |     // Custom Feedback Cards
88 |     .feedback-card {
89 |       background-color: $nord-light-bg-primary;
90 |       border-radius: 8px;
91 |       box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba($nord-light-text-secondary, 0.1);
92 |       margin-top: 8px;
93 |       margin-bottom: 8px;
94 |       transition: all 0.3s ease;
95 |       overflow: hidden; // Prevent content overflow before expansion
96 |       border-left: 4px solid $nord-light-accent-frost-4;
97 | 
98 |       &.expanded {
99 |         background-color: $nord-light-bg-primary;
100 |         border-left-color: $nord-light-accent-frost-2;
101 |         box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba($nord-light-text-secondary, 0.15);
102 | 
103 |         // Add a subtle top/bottom border to better visually separate expanded cards
104 |         border-top: 1px solid rgba($nord-light-border, 0.7);
105 |         border-bottom: 1px solid rgba($nord-light-border, 0.7);
106 | 
107 |         // Slightly increase spacing between expanded cards
108 |         margin-bottom: 16px;
109 |         margin-top: 16px;
110 |       }
111 | 
112 |       // Card Header/Button Styling
113 |       .card-header {
114 |         display: flex;
115 |         justify-content: space-between;
116 |         align-items: center;
117 |         width: 100%;
118 |         padding: 16px 20px;
119 |         background: none;
120 |         border: none;
121 |         text-align: left;
122 |         font-weight: 500;
123 |         color: $nord-light-text-primary;
124 |         cursor: pointer;
125 |         transition: all 0.2s ease;
126 | 
127 |         // Styling for when button is disabled (section expanded)
128 |         &:disabled {
129 |           cursor: default;
130 |           opacity: 1; // Keep text fully visible
131 |           background-color: transparent;
132 | 
133 |           .title {
134 |             color: $nord-light-text-primary; // Keep title visible
135 |           }
136 |         }
137 | 
138 |         &:not(:disabled):hover {
139 |           background-color: rgba($nord-light-accent-frost-2, 0.08);
140 |         }
141 | 
142 |         &:not(:disabled):focus {
143 |           outline: none;
144 |           background-color: rgba($nord-light-accent-frost-2, 0.12);
145 |         }
146 | 
147 |         .title {
148 |           font-size: 16px;
149 |           font-weight: 500;
150 |         }
151 | 
152 |         mat-icon {
153 |           transition: all 0.3s ease;
154 |           color: $nord-light-accent-frost-3;
155 |           font-size: 22px;
156 |           width: 22px;
157 |           height: 22px;
158 | 
159 |           // Style for the visible icon (when section is expanded)
160 |           &.visible-icon {
161 |             color: $nord-light-accent-frost-2;
162 |           }
163 |         }
164 |       }
165 | 
166 |       // Card Content Styling
167 |       .card-content {
168 |         padding: 0 20px;
169 |       }
170 |     }
171 | 
172 |     // Styles for rendered markdown content
173 |     .feedback-text {
174 |       line-height: 1.6;
175 |       color: $nord-light-text-secondary;
176 |       padding-bottom: 20px;
177 | 
178 |       h1,
179 |       h2,
180 |       h3,
181 |       h4,
182 |       h5,
183 |       h6 {
184 |         margin-top: 1.2em;
185 |         margin-bottom: 0.6em;
186 |         color: $nord-light-text-primary;
187 |         font-weight: 600;
188 |       }
189 | 
190 |       h1 {
191 |         font-size: 1.8em;
192 |       }
193 |       h2 {
194 |         font-size: 1.5em;
195 |       }
196 |       h3 {
197 |         font-size: 1.3em;
198 |       }
199 |       h4 {
200 |         font-size: 1.1em;
201 |       }
202 |       h5 {
203 |         font-size: 1em;
204 |       }
205 |       h6 {
206 |         font-size: 0.9em;
207 |       }
208 | 
209 |       p {
210 |         margin-bottom: 1em;
211 |       }
212 | 
213 |       ul,
214 |       ol {
215 |         margin-bottom: 1em;
216 |         padding-left: 24px;
217 |         list-style-position: outside; // Explicitly set default position
218 |       }
219 | 
220 |       ul {
221 |         list-style-type: disc; // Set default bullet style for unordered lists
222 |       }
223 | 
224 |       ol {
225 |         list-style-type: decimal; // Set default number style for ordered lists
226 |       }
227 | 
228 |       ul li,
229 |       ol li {
230 |         margin-bottom: 0.5em;
231 |       }
232 | 
233 |       pre {
234 |         background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
235 |         padding: 12px;
236 |         border-radius: 4px;
237 |         overflow-x: auto;
238 |         margin: 16px 0;
239 |         font-family: 'Consolas', 'Courier New', monospace;
240 |         border-left: 3px solid $nord-light-accent-frost-3;
241 |         font-size: 0.9em;
242 |       }
243 | 
244 |       code:not(pre code) {
245 |         // Inline code
246 |         background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
247 |         padding: 2px 4px;
248 |         border-radius: 3px;
249 |         font-family: 'Consolas', 'Courier New', monospace;
250 |         font-size: 0.9em;
251 |         color: $nord-light-accent-frost-4;
252 |       }
253 | 
254 |       blockquote {
255 |         margin: 16px 0;
256 |         padding: 8px 16px;
257 |         border-left: 4px solid $nord-light-accent-frost-3;
258 |         background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
259 |         font-style: italic;
260 |         color: $nord-light-text-tertiary;
261 |       }
262 | 
263 |       a {
264 |         color: $nord-light-accent-frost-4;
265 |         text-decoration: underline;
266 | 
267 |         &:hover {
268 |           color: $nord-light-accent-frost-2;
269 |         }
270 |       }
271 | 
272 |       // Special styling for potential important notes
273 |       strong {
274 |         color: $nord-light-accent-frost-4;
275 |       }
276 | 
277 |       // Tables, if used in markdown
278 |       table {
279 |         border-collapse: collapse;
280 |         width: 100%;
281 |         margin: 16px 0;
282 | 
283 |         th {
284 |           background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
285 |           border: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
286 |           padding: 8px;
287 |           text-align: left;
288 |           font-weight: bold;
289 |         }
290 | 
291 |         td {
292 |           border: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
293 |           padding: 8px;
294 |         }
295 | 
296 |         tr:nth-child(even) {
297 |           background-color: rgba($nord-light-bg-secondary, 0.5);
298 |         }
299 |       }
300 |     }
301 | 
302 |     // Rating Section Styles
303 |     .rating-section {
304 |       padding: 16px 20px;
305 |       margin-top: auto; // Push rating to the bottom if space allows
306 | 
307 |       .rating-divider {
308 |         height: 1px;
309 |         background-color: $nord-light-border;
310 |         margin-bottom: 16px;
311 |       }
312 |     }
313 |   }
314 | 
315 |   // Initial State Styles (Optional)
316 |   .initial-state {
317 |     text-align: center;
318 |     padding: 40px 20px;
319 |     color: $nord-light-ui-dark;
320 |   }
321 | }
322 | 
323 | // Responsive Adjustments
324 | @media (max-width: 600px) {
325 |   .feedback-panel-tutor {
326 |     padding: 12px;
327 | 
328 |     .feedback-content {
329 |       .feedback-card {
330 |         margin-bottom: 12px;
331 | 
332 |         .card-header {
333 |           padding: 12px 16px;
334 |         }
335 | 
336 |         .card-content {
337 |           padding: 0 16px;
338 |         }
339 |       }
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
4 | import { DomSanitizer, SafeHtml } from '@angular/platform-browser';
5 | import { trigger, state, style, animate, transition } from '@angular/animations';
6 | import { Subject, takeUntil, finalize, catchError, throwError, Observable, filter } from 'rxjs';
7 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
8 | import { WorkspaceStateService } from '../../services/workspace-state.service';
9 | import { WorkspaceState } from '../../models/code-submission.model';
10 | import { MarkdownService } from '../../services/markdown/markdown.service';
11 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
12 | import { FeedbackHintConfirmationDialogComponent } from './feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog/feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog.component';
13 | // TODO: Import FeedbackOutput and KcrOutput types/interfaces from shared DTOs
14 | // import { FeedbackOutput, KcrOutput } from '@DTOs/tutorKaiDtos/feedback-output.dto'; // Adjust path as needed
15 | // TODO: Import EvaluateRequestDto type/interface from shared DTOs
16 | // import { EvaluateRequestDto } from '@DTOs/tutorKaiDtos/EvaluateRequest.dto'; // Adjust path as needed
17 | // TODO: Import CodeSubmissionResultDto type/interface from shared DTOs
18 | // import { CodeSubmissionResultDto } from '@DTOs/tutorKaiDtos/submission.dto'; // Adjust path as needed
19 | 
20 | // Placeholder types/interfaces (replace with actual imports when available)
21 | interface KcrData {
22 |   explanation: string;
23 |   steps: string[];
24 | }
25 | interface FeedbackOutput {
26 |   IT?: string; // Optional internal thoughts
27 |   SPS?: string;
28 |   KM?: string;
29 |   KC?: string;
30 |   KH?: string;
31 |   [key: string]: any; // Allow other potential keys if needed, though we filter
32 | }
33 | type FeedbackKey = 'SPS' | 'KM' | 'KC' | 'KH'; // Define specific keys for feedback types
34 | 
35 | type EvaluateRequestDto = any;
36 | type CodeSubmissionResultDto = any;
37 | 
38 | @Component({
39 |   selector: 'app-feedback-panel-tutor-feedback',
40 |   templateUrl: './feedback-panel-tutor-feedback.component.html',
41 |   styleUrls: ['./feedback-panel-tutor-feedback.component.scss'],
42 |   animations: [
43 |     trigger('expandCollapse', [
44 |       state(
45 |         'false',
46 |         style({
47 |           height: '0',
48 |           opacity: '0',
49 |           overflow: 'hidden',
50 |         }),
51 |       ),
52 |       state(
53 |         'true',
54 |         style({
55 |           height: '*',
56 |           opacity: '1',
57 |         }),
58 |       ),
59 |       transition('false <=> true', animate('300ms ease-in-out')),
60 |     ]),
61 |   ],
62 | })
63 | export class FeedbackPanelTutorFeedbackComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
64 |   feedback: FeedbackOutput | null = null;
65 |   // feedbackId: string | null = null; // No longer needed here, managed by WorkspaceStateService
66 |   isLoading = false;
67 |   // feedbackId: string | null = null; // Removed duplicate, managed by WorkspaceStateService
68 |   // Track expansion state for each feedback section
69 |   expandedSections: Record<FeedbackKey, boolean> = {
70 |     SPS: false,
71 |     KM: false,
72 |     KC: false,
73 |     KH: false,
74 |   };
75 |   error: string | null = null;
76 |   // Track if usage has been sent for each section to prevent duplicates
77 |   usageTracked: Record<FeedbackKey, boolean> = {
78 |     SPS: false,
79 |     KM: false,
80 |     KC: false,
81 |     KH: false,
82 |   };
83 |   currentState: WorkspaceState = WorkspaceState.START;
84 | 
85 |   // Use Record for type safety with FeedbackKey
86 |   feedbackTitles: Record<FeedbackKey, string> = {
87 |     SPS: 'Strategische Vorgehensweise',
88 |     KM: 'Probleme finden',
89 |     KC: 'Erklärungen und Beispiele',
90 |     KH: 'Hinweis zum nächsten Schritt',
91 |   };
92 | 
93 |   private readonly destroy$ = new Subject<void>();
94 |   // Set of feedback keys that require confirmation before revealing
95 |   private readonly keysRequiringConfirmation: Set<FeedbackKey> = new Set(['KH', 'SPS']);
96 | 
97 |   constructor(
98 |     private readonly http: HttpClient,
99 |     private readonly workspaceState: WorkspaceStateService,
100 |     private readonly markdownService: MarkdownService,
101 |     private readonly sanitizer: DomSanitizer,
102 |     private readonly dialog: MatDialog,
103 |   ) {}
104 | 
105 |   ngOnInit(): void {
106 |     // Subscribe to workspace state
107 |     this.workspaceState.workspaceState$.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(state => {
108 |       this.currentState = state;
109 |       // Optionally reset feedback when state changes, e.g., back to START
110 |       // if (state === WorkspaceState.START) {
111 |       //   this.feedback = null;
112 |       //   this.error = null;
113 |       // }
114 |     });
115 |   }
116 | 
117 |   ngOnDestroy(): void {
118 |     this.destroy$.next();
119 |     this.destroy$.complete();
120 |   }
121 | 
122 |   fetchFeedback(): void {
123 |     const task = this.workspaceState.getCurrentTask();
124 |     const lastResult = this.workspaceState.getCodeSubmissionResult();
125 | 
126 |     if (!task || !lastResult) {
127 |       this.error = 'Cannot fetch feedback: Task or submission result is missing.';
128 |       console.error(this.error);
129 |       return;
130 |     }
131 | 
132 |     this.isLoading = true;
133 |     this.error = null;
134 |     this.feedback = null; // Clear previous feedback
135 |     // Reset usage tracking flags
136 |     this.workspaceState.setFeedbackId(null); // Clear feedback ID in service
137 |     this.usageTracked = { SPS: false, KM: false, KC: false, KH: false };
138 |     // Reset expansion state
139 |     this.expandedSections = { SPS: false, KM: false, KC: false, KH: false };
140 | 
141 |     const requestBody: EvaluateRequestDto = {
142 |       questionId: task.id, // Assuming task has an id property
143 |       relatedCodeSubmissionResult: lastResult,
144 |       // Add flavor/feedbackLevel if needed based on final DTO
145 |     };
146 | 
147 |     // Expect the new response structure
148 |     this.http
149 |       .post<{ feedback: FeedbackOutput; feedbackId: string }>(
150 |         environment.server + '/tutoring-feedback/structured',
151 |         requestBody,
152 |       )
153 |       .pipe(
154 |         takeUntil(this.destroy$),
155 |         finalize(() => (this.isLoading = false)),
156 |         catchError(err => {
157 |           console.error('Error fetching tutoring feedback:', err);
158 |           this.error = `Failed to load feedback. ${err.error?.message || err.message || 'Unknown error'}`;
159 |           return throwError(() => err); // Re-throw the error
160 |         }),
161 |       )
162 |       .subscribe(response => {
163 |         this.feedback = response.feedback; // Store the feedback object
164 |         this.workspaceState.setFeedbackId(response.feedbackId); // Set feedback ID in service
165 |       });
166 |   }
167 | 
168 |   // --- Usage Tracking ---
169 |   // Helper to get the current feedback ID from the service
170 |   private getCurrentFeedbackId(): string | null {
171 |     return this.workspaceState.getCurrentFeedbackId();
172 |   }
173 | 
174 |   private trackUsage(feedbackType: FeedbackKey): void {
175 |     const currentFeedbackId = this.getCurrentFeedbackId(); // Get ID from service
176 |     if (!currentFeedbackId) {
177 |       console.warn('Cannot track usage: feedbackId is missing from WorkspaceStateService.');
178 |       return;
179 |     }
180 |     if (this.usageTracked[feedbackType]) {
181 |       // console.log(`Usage for ${feedbackType} already tracked.`);
182 |       return; // Already tracked, do nothing
183 |     }
184 | 
185 |     const url = `${environment.server}/tutoring-feedback/${currentFeedbackId}/usage`; // Use ID from service
186 |     const body = { feedbackType };
187 | 
188 |     this.http
189 |       .patch(url, body)
190 |       .pipe(
191 |         takeUntil(this.destroy$),
192 |         catchError(err => {
193 |           console.error(
194 |             `Error tracking usage for ${feedbackType} on feedback ${currentFeedbackId}:`,
195 |             err,
196 |           ); // Use ID from service
197 |           // Don't block UI, just log the error
198 |           return throwError(() => err); // Re-throw or return EMPTY/of(null) if you want to swallow
199 |         }),
200 |       )
201 |       .subscribe(() => {
202 |         this.usageTracked[feedbackType] = true; // Mark as tracked only on success
203 |       });
204 |   }
205 | 
206 |   // Adjust signature to handle potential undefined from template access
207 |   parseMarkdown(content: string | undefined): SafeHtml {
208 |     if (!content) return ''; // Return empty string if content is null or undefined
209 | 
210 |     // Convert HTML code blocks to Markdown before parsing
211 |     const contentWithMarkdownCodeBlocks = this.convertHtmlCodeBlocksToMarkdown(content);
212 |     const parsed = this.markdownService.parse(contentWithMarkdownCodeBlocks);
213 |     return this.sanitizer.bypassSecurityTrustHtml(parsed);
214 |   }
215 | 
216 |   /**
217 |    * Converts HTML code blocks to Markdown format for proper syntax highlighting
218 |    * Handles both <pre><code class="language-xxx">...</code></pre> and <pre><code>...</code></pre>
219 |    */
220 |   private convertHtmlCodeBlocksToMarkdown(content: string): string {
221 |     // First, handle code blocks with a specified language
222 |     let result = content.replace(
223 |       /<pre><code\s+class="language-(\w+)">([\s\S]*?)<\/code><\/pre>/g,
224 |       (_, language, codeContent) => {
225 |         // Unescape any HTML entities in the code content and trim trailing whitespace
226 |         const cleanedContent = this.unescapeHtml(codeContent).trimRight();
227 | 
228 |         // Create the Markdown code block with proper format - add newlines before and after
229 |         return `\n\`\`\`${language}\n${cleanedContent}\n\`\`\`\n`;
230 |       },
231 |     );
232 | 
233 |     // Then, handle code blocks without a specified language
234 |     result = result.replace(/<pre><code>([\s\S]*?)<\/code><\/pre>/g, (_, codeContent) => {
235 |       // Unescape any HTML entities in the code content and trim trailing whitespace
236 |       const cleanedContent = this.unescapeHtml(codeContent).trimRight();
237 | 
238 |       // Create the Markdown code block with proper format - add newlines before and after
239 |       return `\n\`\`\`\n${cleanedContent}\n\`\`\`\n`;
240 |     });
241 |     return result;
242 |   }
243 | 
244 |   /**
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/file-explorer/file-explorer.component.html
```
1 | <div class="file-explorer" [class.collapsed]="isExplorerCollapsed">
2 |   <!-- Toggle Button außerhalb der normalen Header-Struktur, damit er immer sichtbar bleibt -->
3 |   <button
4 |     mat-icon-button
5 |     class="toggle-explorer-button"
6 |     [class.collapsed]="isExplorerCollapsed"
7 |     (click)="toggleExplorer()"
8 |     matTooltip="Explorer {{ isExplorerCollapsed ? 'ausklappen' : 'einklappen' }}"
9 |   >
10 |     <mat-icon>{{ isExplorerCollapsed ? 'chevron_right' : 'chevron_left' }}</mat-icon>
11 |   </button>
12 | 
13 |   <div class="explorer-header">
14 |     <div class="header-content">
15 |       <span class="section-title">EXPLORER</span>
16 |     </div>
17 |   </div>
18 | 
19 |   <!-- Projektname als Root-Element -->
20 |   <div class="project-root" *ngIf="projectRoot">
21 |     <div class="folder-header expanded">
22 |       <mat-icon class="folder-icon">folder_open</mat-icon>
23 |       <span class="folder-name">{{ projectRoot }}</span>
24 |     </div>
25 |   </div>
26 | 
27 |   <!-- Rekursive Anzeige des Dateibaums -->
28 |   <div class="file-tree">
29 |     <ng-container *ngFor="let item of fileTree">
30 |       <ng-container *ngTemplateOutlet="fileSystemItem; context: { $implicit: item }"></ng-container>
31 |     </ng-container>
32 |   </div>
33 | </div>
34 | 
35 | <!-- Template für Dateisystem-Elemente (Ordner oder Datei) -->
36 | <ng-template #fileSystemItem let-item>
37 |   <div *ngIf="isFolder(item)" class="folder-item">
38 |     <div class="folder-header" [class.expanded]="item.isExpanded" (click)="toggleFolder(item)">
39 |       <mat-icon class="folder-icon">{{ item.isExpanded ? 'folder_open' : 'folder' }}</mat-icon>
40 |       <span class="folder-name">{{ item.name }}</span>
41 |     </div>
42 |     <div class="folder-content" *ngIf="item.isExpanded">
43 |       <div
44 |         class="folder-items"
45 |         *ngFor="let childItem of item.children"
46 |         [style.padding-left.px]="16"
47 |       >
48 |         <ng-container
49 |           *ngTemplateOutlet="fileSystemItem; context: { $implicit: childItem }"
50 |         ></ng-container>
51 |       </div>
52 |     </div>
53 |   </div>
54 | 
55 |   <div *ngIf="!isFolder(item)" class="file-item" (click)="openFile(item.id)">
56 |     <div class="icon-container">
57 |       <div class="file-icon" [ngClass]="getFileClass(item.name)"></div>
58 |     </div>
59 |     <span class="file-name" [class.modified]="item.isModified">{{ item.name }}</span>
60 |   </div>
61 | </ng-template>
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/file-explorer/file-explorer.component.scss
```
1 | // Import Nord Light theme variables
2 | @import '../../_nord-light-theme.scss';
3 | 
4 | // File Explorer specific variables mapped to Nord Light theme
5 | $explorer-bg: $nord-light-bg-primary;
6 | $explorer-item-hover: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
7 | $explorer-item-selected: $nord-light-accent-frost-3;
8 | $explorer-text: $nord-light-text-primary;
9 | $explorer-inactive-text: $nord-light-text-tertiary;
10 | $explorer-border: $nord-light-border;
11 | $folder-icon-color: $nord-light-ui-dark;
12 | $file-icon-size: 16px;
13 | 
14 | .file-explorer {
15 |   height: 100%;
16 |   width: 220px; // Reduzierte Breite im ausgeklappten Zustand
17 |   background-color: $explorer-bg;
18 |   color: $explorer-text;
19 |   font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
20 |   font-size: 13px;
21 |   display: flex;
22 |   flex-direction: column;
23 |   user-select: none;
24 |   transition: width 0.3s ease-in-out;
25 | 
26 |   // Neuer Stil für den Toggle-Button
27 |   .toggle-explorer-button {
28 |     position: absolute;
29 |     top: 6px;
30 |     right: 8px;
31 |     z-index: 100;
32 |     width: 24px;
33 |     height: 24px;
34 |     min-width: 24px;
35 |     padding: 0;
36 |     border-radius: 4px;
37 |     color: $nord-light-text-primary;
38 |     background-color: rgba($nord-light-accent-frost-3, 0.8);
39 |     transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
40 |     border: 1px solid transparent;
41 | 
42 |     &:hover {
43 |       background-color: $nord-light-accent-frost-4;
44 |       border: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
45 |       box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba($nord-light-ui-dark, 0.2);
46 |     }
47 | 
48 |     &:active {
49 |       background-color: $nord-light-primary;
50 |     }
51 | 
52 |     &.collapsed {
53 |       right: 0;
54 |       left: auto; // Button wird an der rechten Seite positioniert
55 |       border-radius: 4px 0 0 4px;
56 |       background-color: $nord-light-primary;
57 |       box-shadow: -2px 0 5px rgba($nord-light-ui-dark, 0.1);
58 | 
59 |       &:hover {
60 |         background-color: $nord-light-accent-frost-4;
61 |       }
62 |     }
63 | 
64 |     ::ng-deep .mat-icon {
65 |       font-size: 18px;
66 |       width: 18px;
67 |       height: 18px;
68 |       line-height: 18px;
69 |     }
70 |   }
71 | 
72 |   &.collapsed {
73 |     width: 24px !important; // Exakt so breit wie der Button
74 |     min-width: 24px;
75 |     padding: 0; // Kein Padding nötig
76 |     margin: 0; // Kein Margin nötig
77 |     overflow: visible; // Erlaubt dem Button, sichtbar zu sein
78 |     position: relative; // Für korrekte Button-Positionierung
79 | 
80 |     .project-root,
81 |     .file-tree,
82 |     .section-title,
83 |     .folder-name,
84 |     .file-name,
85 |     .header-content {
86 |       display: none;
87 |     }
88 | 
89 |     .explorer-header {
90 |       opacity: 0;
91 |       overflow: hidden;
92 |       border-bottom: none;
93 |     }
94 | 
95 |     .toggle-explorer-button {
96 |       position: absolute;
97 |       right: 0;
98 |       top: 6px;
99 |     }
100 |   }
101 | }
102 | 
103 | .explorer-header {
104 |   height: 22px;
105 |   display: flex;
106 |   align-items: center;
107 |   justify-content: space-between;
108 |   padding: 0 8px;
109 |   font-size: 11px;
110 |   text-transform: uppercase;
111 |   font-weight: 600;
112 |   color: $explorer-inactive-text;
113 |   letter-spacing: 0.5px;
114 |   border-bottom: 1px solid $explorer-border;
115 |   position: relative;
116 | 
117 |   .header-content {
118 |     display: flex;
119 |     align-items: center;
120 |     flex: 1;
121 |   }
122 | 
123 |   .actions {
124 |     display: none; // Wird nicht mehr benötigt, da der Toggle-Button außerhalb platziert ist
125 |   }
126 | }
127 | 
128 | .project-root {
129 |   padding: 5px 0;
130 | 
131 |   .folder-header {
132 |     padding-left: 8px;
133 |     display: flex;
134 |     align-items: center;
135 | 
136 |     .folder-icon {
137 |       font-size: 16px;
138 |       width: 16px;
139 |       height: 16px;
140 |       color: $folder-icon-color;
141 |     }
142 | 
143 |     .folder-name {
144 |       margin-left: 4px;
145 |       font-weight: 600;
146 |     }
147 |   }
148 | }
149 | 
150 | .file-tree {
151 |   padding: 0;
152 |   overflow-y: auto;
153 |   overflow-x: hidden;
154 |   flex-grow: 1;
155 | }
156 | 
157 | .folder-item {
158 |   width: 100%;
159 | 
160 |   .folder-header {
161 |     height: 22px;
162 |     display: flex;
163 |     align-items: center;
164 |     padding: 0 8px;
165 |     cursor: pointer;
166 | 
167 |     &:hover {
168 |       background-color: $explorer-item-hover;
169 |     }
170 | 
171 |     &.expanded {
172 |       .folder-icon {
173 |         transform: rotate(90deg);
174 |       }
175 |     }
176 | 
177 |     .folder-icon {
178 |       font-size: $file-icon-size;
179 |       width: $file-icon-size;
180 |       height: $file-icon-size;
181 |       color: $folder-icon-color;
182 |     }
183 | 
184 |     .folder-name {
185 |       margin-left: 4px;
186 |     }
187 |   }
188 | }
189 | 
190 | .file-item {
191 |   height: 22px;
192 |   display: flex;
193 |   align-items: center;
194 |   padding: 0 8px;
195 |   cursor: pointer;
196 | 
197 |   &:hover {
198 |     background-color: $explorer-item-hover;
199 |   }
200 | 
201 |   &.active {
202 |     background-color: $explorer-item-selected;
203 |   }
204 | 
205 |   .icon-container {
206 |     width: $file-icon-size;
207 |     height: $file-icon-size;
208 |     display: flex;
209 |     align-items: center;
210 |     justify-content: center;
211 | 
212 |     .file-icon {
213 |       width: $file-icon-size;
214 |       height: $file-icon-size;
215 |       background-size: 16px;
216 |       background-repeat: no-repeat;
217 |       background-position: center;
218 | 
219 |       // Standardicon für unbekannte Dateien
220 |       background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZpZXdCb3g9IjAgMCAxNiAxNiI+PHBhdGggZmlsbD0iIzRDNTY2QSIgZD0iTTEwLjUgMS41bDMgM3YxMC41aC04VjEuNWg1ek0xMSA0aDEuNUwxMSAyLjV2MS41ek0xMSAxNFY1SDR2OWg3eiIvPjwvc3ZnPg==');
221 |     }
222 | 
223 |     // Spezifische Icons für verschiedene Dateitypen
224 |     .js-file {
225 |       background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZpZXdCb3g9IjAgMCAxNiAxNiI+PHBhdGggZmlsbD0iI0QwODc3MCIgZD0iTTEwLjUgMS41bDMgM3YxMC41aC04VjEuNWg1ek0xMSA0aDEuNUwxMSAyLjV2MS41ek0xMCAxM3YtMUg3LjVWOC4zSDZ2My44YzAgLjUuNS45IDEgLjloM3ptLTYtMXYxYzAgLjUtLjUuOS0xIC45SDJ2LTEuOGgxVjEySDNaIi8+PC9zdmc+');
226 |     }
227 | 
228 |     .ts-file {
229 |       background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZpZXdCb3g9IjAgMCAxNiAxNiI+PHBhdGggZmlsbD0iIzVFODFBQyIgZD0iTTEwLjUgMS41bDMgM3YxMC41aC04VjEuNWg1ek0xMSA0aDEuNUwxMSAyLjV2MS41ek05IDExdi0xSDd2LTFoMlY4SDR2MWgydjFINHYxaDJWOWgxdjJIOXptMiAwdi00SDEwdjRoMXoiLz48L3N2Zz4=');
230 |     }
231 | 
232 |     .py-file {
233 |       background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');
234 |     }
235 | 
236 |     .java-file {
237 |       background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');
238 |     }
239 | 
240 |     .html-file {
241 |       background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,');
242 |     }
243 |   }
244 | 
245 |   .file-name {
246 |     margin-left: 6px;
247 | 
248 |     &.modified::after {
249 |       content: '●';
250 |       margin-left: 6px;
251 |       font-size: 8px;
252 |       color: $nord-light-success;
253 |       position: relative;
254 |       top: -1px;
255 |     }
256 |   }
257 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/file-explorer/file-explorer.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnDestroy, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, EventEmitter, Output } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { Subject, takeUntil } from 'rxjs';
4 | import {
5 |   EditorFolder,
6 |   FileSystemItem,
7 |   FileSystemService,
8 | } from '../../services/file-system.service';
9 | 
10 | @Component({
11 |   selector: 'app-file-explorer',
12 |   templateUrl: './file-explorer.component.html',
13 |   styleUrls: ['./file-explorer.component.scss'],
14 | })
15 | export class FileExplorerComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
16 |   fileTree: FileSystemItem[] = [];
17 |   projectRoot: string = '';
18 |   isExplorerCollapsed: boolean = true; // Standardmäßig eingeklappt
19 |   @Output() explorerCollapsedChange = new EventEmitter<boolean>();
20 |   private readonly destroy$ = new Subject<void>();
21 | 
22 |   constructor(private readonly fileSystemService: FileSystemService) {}
23 | 
24 |   ngOnInit(): void {
25 |     // Abonniere Dateibaum-Änderungen
26 |     this.fileSystemService.fileTree$.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(tree => {
27 |       this.fileTree = tree;
28 |     });
29 | 
30 |     // Abonniere Projekt-Root-Änderungen
31 |     this.fileSystemService.projectRoot$.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(root => {
32 |       this.projectRoot = root;
33 |     });
34 |   }
35 | 
36 |   ngOnDestroy(): void {
37 |     this.destroy$.next();
38 |     this.destroy$.complete();
39 |   }
40 | 
41 |   /**
42 |    * Prüft, ob ein Element ein Ordner ist
43 |    */
44 |   isFolder(item: FileSystemItem): boolean {
45 |     return 'children' in item;
46 |   }
47 | 
48 |   /**
49 |    * Expandiert oder kollabiert einen Ordner
50 |    */
51 |   toggleFolder(folder: EditorFolder): void {
52 |     folder.isExpanded = !folder.isExpanded;
53 |   }
54 | 
55 |   /**
56 |    * Öffnet oder aktiviert eine Datei
57 |    */
58 |   openFile(fileId: string): void {
59 |     this.fileSystemService.openFileAsTab(fileId);
60 |   }
61 | 
62 |   /**
63 |    * Klappt den File Explorer ein oder aus
64 |    */
65 |   toggleExplorer(): void {
66 |     this.isExplorerCollapsed = !this.isExplorerCollapsed;
67 |     this.explorerCollapsedChange.emit(this.isExplorerCollapsed);
68 |   }
69 | 
70 |   /**
71 |    * Liefert ein Icon für einen Dateityp basierend auf der Dateierweiterung
72 |    */
73 |   getFileIcon(fileName: string): string {
74 |     const extension = fileName.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() || '';
75 | 
76 |     switch (extension) {
77 |       case 'js':
78 |         return 'javascript-icon';
79 |       case 'ts':
80 |         return 'typescript-icon';
81 |       case 'py':
82 |         return 'python-icon';
83 |       case 'java':
84 |         return 'java-icon';
85 |       case 'html':
86 |         return 'html-icon';
87 |       case 'css':
88 |         return 'css-icon';
89 |       case 'json':
90 |         return 'json-icon';
91 |       case 'md':
92 |         return 'markdown-icon';
93 |       case 'cpp':
94 |       case 'c':
95 |         return 'cpp-icon';
96 |       case 'h':
97 |         return 'h-icon';
98 |       default:
99 |         return 'file-icon';
100 |     }
101 |   }
102 | 
103 |   /**
104 |    * Gibt die CSS-Klasse basierend auf dem Dateityp zurück
105 |    */
106 |   getFileClass(fileName: string): string {
107 |     const extension = fileName.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() || '';
108 | 
109 |     switch (extension) {
110 |       case 'js':
111 |         return 'js-file';
112 |       case 'ts':
113 |         return 'ts-file';
114 |       case 'py':
115 |         return 'py-file';
116 |       case 'java':
117 |         return 'java-file';
118 |       case 'html':
119 |         return 'html-file';
120 |       case 'css':
121 |         return 'css-file';
122 |       case 'json':
123 |         return 'json-file';
124 |       case 'md':
125 |         return 'md-file';
126 |       case 'cpp':
127 |       case 'c':
128 |       case 'h':
129 |         return 'cpp-file';
130 |       default:
131 |         return 'unknown-file';
132 |     }
133 |   }
134 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/privacy-consent-dialog/privacy-consent-dialog.component.html
```
1 | <h1 mat-dialog-title>Datenschutzerklärung für Tutor Kai Feedback</h1>
2 | <div mat-dialog-content>
3 |   <p>
4 |     Um die KI-gestützte Feedback-Funktion ("Tutor Kai") zu nutzen, lesen und akzeptieren Sie bitte
5 |     Folgendes:
6 |   </p>
7 |   <br />
8 |   <p>
9 |     Ihr Code wird <strong>anonymisiert an OpenAI gesendet</strong>, um mithilfe des GPT-4.1-Modells
10 |     Feedback zu generieren. Die Nutzung der Feedback-Funktionen (z.B. Häufigkeit, Arten des
11 |     angesehenen Feedbacks) sowie Nutzungsdaten der Aufgabentypen in GOALS werden im Rahmen des
12 |     Promotionsprojekts von Sven Jacobs analysiert. Alle für Forschungszwecke erhobenen Daten sind
13 |     pseudonymisiert. Ergebnisse werden nur in aggregierter Form veröffentlicht (z.B. "85% der
14 |     Studierenden haben mehr als 5 Feedback-Instanzen angefordert"), wodurch sichergestellt wird,
15 |     dass <strong>keine Rückschlüsse auf einzelne Personen gezogen werden können</strong>.
16 |   </p>
17 |   <br />
18 |   <p>Sie können Ihre Zustimmung jederzeit widerrufen.</p>
19 |   <br />
20 |   <p>Durch Klicken auf "Ich stimme zu" akzeptieren Sie diese Bedingungen.</p>
21 | </div>
22 | <div mat-dialog-actions align="end">
23 |   <button mat-button (click)="onCancel()">Abbrechen</button>
24 |   <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="onAgree()" class="consent-button">
25 |     Ich stimme zu
26 |   </button>
27 | </div>
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/privacy-consent-dialog/privacy-consent-dialog.component.ts
```
1 | import { Component } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { MatDialogRef } from '@angular/material/dialog';
3 | import { MatButtonModule } from '@angular/material/button';
4 | import { MatDialogModule } from '@angular/material/dialog';
5 | 
6 | @Component({
7 |   selector: 'app-privacy-consent-dialog',
8 |   templateUrl: './privacy-consent-dialog.component.html',
9 |   styleUrls: ['./privacy-consent-dialog.component.scss'],
10 |   standalone: true, // Assuming standalone components are used, adjust if not
11 |   imports: [MatDialogModule, MatButtonModule], // Import necessary Angular Material modules
12 | })
13 | export class PrivacyConsentDialogComponent {
14 |   constructor(public dialogRef: MatDialogRef<PrivacyConsentDialogComponent>) {}
15 | 
16 |   /**
17 |    * Called when the user clicks the "Ich stimme zu" button.
18 |    * Closes the dialog and returns true to indicate agreement.
19 |    */
20 |   onAgree(): void {
21 |     this.dialogRef.close(true); // Return true when agreed
22 |   }
23 | 
24 |   /**
25 |    * Called when the user clicks the "Abbrechen" or closes the dialog.
26 |    * Closes the dialog and returns false (or undefined).
27 |    */
28 |   onCancel(): void {
29 |     this.dialogRef.close(false); // Return false or simply close without value
30 |   }
31 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/rating/rating.component.ts
```
1 | import { Component, EventEmitter, Input, Output } from '@angular/core';
2 | 
3 | @Component({
4 |   selector: 'app-rating',
5 |   templateUrl: './rating.component.html',
6 |   styleUrls: ['./rating.component.scss'],
7 | })
8 | export class RatingComponent {
9 |   @Output() ratingSubmitted = new EventEmitter<number>();
10 | 
11 |   rating = 0;
12 |   hoverState = 0;
13 | 
14 |   /**
15 |    * Setzt das Rating beim Klick auf einen Stern
16 |    */
17 |   onStar(star: number): void {
18 |     this.rating = star;
19 |   }
20 | 
21 |   /**
22 |    * Aktualisiert den Hover-Zustand beim Mauszeigereintritt
23 |    */
24 |   onMouseEnter(star: number): void {
25 |     this.hoverState = star;
26 |   }
27 | 
28 |   /**
29 |    * Setzt den Hover-Zustand zurück beim Verlassen mit dem Mauszeiger
30 |    */
31 |   onMouseLeave(): void {
32 |     this.hoverState = 0;
33 |   }
34 | 
35 |   /**
36 |    * Emittiert das Rating an die übergeordnete Komponente
37 |    */
38 |   submitRating(): void {
39 |     if (this.rating > 0) {
40 |       this.ratingSubmitted.emit(this.rating);
41 |     }
42 |   }
43 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/terminal-output/terminal-output.component.html
```
1 | <div class="terminal-container">
2 |   <div class="terminal-header">
3 |     <h2>Compiler Output</h2>
4 |     <div class="header-buttons">
5 |       <!-- Schriftgröße verkleinern -->
6 |       <button
7 |         mat-icon-button
8 |         class="font-size-button"
9 |         (click)="decreaseFontSize()"
10 |         aria-label="Schriftgröße verkleinern"
11 |         [disabled]="fontSizePercent <= MIN_FONT_SIZE"
12 |       >
13 |         <mat-icon>text_decrease</mat-icon>
14 |       </button>
15 | 
16 |       <!-- Schriftgröße vergrößern -->
17 |       <button
18 |         mat-icon-button
19 |         class="font-size-button"
20 |         (click)="increaseFontSize()"
21 |         aria-label="Schriftgröße vergrößern"
22 |         [disabled]="fontSizePercent >= MAX_FONT_SIZE"
23 |       >
24 |         <mat-icon>text_increase</mat-icon>
25 |       </button>
26 | 
27 |       <!-- Bestehender Kopier-Button -->
28 |       <button
29 |         mat-icon-button
30 |         class="copy-button"
31 |         (click)="copyOutput()"
32 |         aria-label="Inhalt kopieren"
33 |       >
34 |         <mat-icon>content_copy</mat-icon>
35 |       </button>
36 |     </div>
37 |   </div>
38 | 
39 |   <div class="terminal-body">
40 |     <div *ngIf="isLoading" class="loading-spinner">
41 |       <div class="spinner"></div>
42 |       <span>Ausführung läuft...</span>
43 |     </div>
44 | 
45 |     <div *ngIf="!isLoading" class="terminal-content" [style.fontSize.%]="fontSizePercent">
46 |       <p *ngFor="let line of formattedOutput" [innerHTML]="line"></p>
47 |       <div *ngIf="formattedOutput.length === 0" class="empty-message">Keine Ausgabe vorhanden</div>
48 |     </div>
49 |   </div>
50 | </div>
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/terminal-output/terminal-output.component.scss
```
1 | @import '../../_nord-light-theme.scss';
2 | 
3 | .terminal-container {
4 |   display: flex;
5 |   flex-direction: column;
6 |   height: 100%;
7 |   min-height: 150px;
8 |   background-color: $nord-light-bg-primary;
9 |   color: $nord-light-text-primary;
10 |   border-radius: 6px;
11 |   overflow: hidden;
12 |   font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', 'Courier New', monospace;
13 |   box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba($nord-light-text-primary, 0.15);
14 | 
15 |   .terminal-header {
16 |     height: $tab-height;
17 |     display: flex;
18 |     justify-content: space-between;
19 |     align-items: center;
20 |     padding: 5px 10px;
21 |     background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
22 |     border-bottom: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
23 | 
24 |     h2 {
25 |       margin: 0;
26 |       font-size: 18px;
27 |       font-weight: 500;
28 |       flex-grow: 1;
29 |     }
30 | 
31 |     .header-buttons {
32 |       display: flex;
33 |       gap: 4px;
34 | 
35 |       .font-size-button,
36 |       .copy-button {
37 |         color: $nord-light-text-tertiary;
38 | 
39 |         &:hover {
40 |           color: $nord-light-text-primary;
41 |         }
42 | 
43 |         &:disabled {
44 |           color: rgba($nord-light-ui-dark, 0.5);
45 |         }
46 |       }
47 |     }
48 |   }
49 | 
50 |   .terminal-body {
51 |     flex: 1;
52 |     padding: 10px;
53 |     overflow-y: auto;
54 |     overflow-x: auto;
55 |     background-color: $nord-light-bg-primary;
56 |     position: relative;
57 | 
58 |     .loading-spinner {
59 |       display: flex;
60 |       flex-direction: column;
61 |       align-items: center;
62 |       justify-content: center;
63 |       height: 100%;
64 | 
65 |       .spinner {
66 |         width: 20px;
67 |         height: 20px;
68 |         border: 2px solid $nord-light-border;
69 |         border-radius: 50%;
70 |         border-top-color: $nord-light-primary;
71 |         animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
72 |         margin-bottom: 10px;
73 |       }
74 | 
75 |       span {
76 |         color: $nord-light-text-tertiary;
77 |         font-size: 14px;
78 |       }
79 |     }
80 | 
81 |     .terminal-content {
82 |       p {
83 |         margin: 0;
84 |         padding: 2px 0;
85 |         white-space: pre-wrap;
86 |         word-break: break-all;
87 |         // Keine feste Schriftgröße, sondern erben
88 |         font-size: inherit;
89 |         line-height: 1.5;
90 |       }
91 | 
92 |       // Stellen Sie sicher, dass auch die direkt eingefügten Inhalte die Schriftgröße erben
93 |       span,
94 |       .error,
95 |       .warning,
96 |       .success {
97 |         font-size: inherit;
98 |       }
99 | 
100 |       .empty-message {
101 |         color: $nord-light-ui-dark;
102 |         font-style: italic;
103 |         padding: 10px 0;
104 |         text-align: center;
105 |         font-size: inherit;
106 |       }
107 | 
108 |       .error {
109 |         color: $nord-light-error;
110 |       }
111 | 
112 |       .warning {
113 |         color: $nord-light-warning;
114 |       }
115 | 
116 |       .success {
117 |         color: $nord-light-success;
118 |       }
119 |     }
120 |   }
121 | }
122 | 
123 | @keyframes spin {
124 |   to {
125 |     transform: rotate(360deg);
126 |   }
127 | }
128 | 
129 | // Responsives Design
130 | @media (max-width: 768px) {
131 |   .terminal-container {
132 |     min-height: 120px;
133 |     font-size: 13px;
134 | 
135 |     .terminal-header {
136 |       padding: 4px 8px;
137 | 
138 |       .terminal-title {
139 |         font-size: 13px;
140 |       }
141 |     }
142 | 
143 |     .terminal-body {
144 |       padding: 8px;
145 | 
146 |       .terminal-content p {
147 |         // Nicht die feste Schriftgröße verwenden, sondern erben
148 |         font-size: inherit;
149 |         line-height: 1.4;
150 |       }
151 |     }
152 |   }
153 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/terminal-output/terminal-output.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnChanges, SimpleChanges } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, Input } from '@angular/core';
3 | 
4 | @Component({
5 |   selector: 'app-terminal-output',
6 |   templateUrl: './terminal-output.component.html',
7 |   styleUrls: ['./terminal-output.component.scss'],
8 | })
9 | export class TerminalOutputComponent implements OnChanges {
10 |   @Input() output: string | null = null;
11 |   @Input() isLoading: boolean = false;
12 | 
13 |   // Schriftgröße für Terminal-Output
14 |   fontSizePercent: number = 90; // Standardgröße (90%)
15 |   readonly MIN_FONT_SIZE: number = 70; // Minimale Schriftgröße (70%)
16 |   readonly MAX_FONT_SIZE: number = 150; // Maximale Schriftgröße (150%)
17 |   readonly FONT_SIZE_STEP: number = 10; // Schrittgröße der Änderung (10%)
18 | 
19 |   formattedOutput: string[] = [];
20 | 
21 |   ngOnChanges(changes: SimpleChanges): void {
22 |     if (changes['output'] && this.output) {
23 |       this.parseOutput(this.output);
24 |     }
25 |   }
26 | 
27 |   /**
28 |    * Parst die Terminal-Ausgabe und fügt CSS-Klassen für Farbmarkierungen hinzu
29 |    */
30 |   private parseOutput(output: string): void {
31 |     if (!output) {
32 |       this.formattedOutput = ['Keine Ausgabe'];
33 |       return;
34 |     }
35 | 
36 |     // Teile den Output an Zeilenumbrüchen
37 |     const lines = output.split('\n');
38 | 
39 |     // Formatiere jede Zeile
40 |     this.formattedOutput = lines.map(line => {
41 |       if (line.toLowerCase().includes('error') || line.toLowerCase().includes('fehler')) {
42 |         return `<span class="error">${line}</span>`;
43 |       } else if (line.toLowerCase().includes('warning') || line.toLowerCase().includes('warnung')) {
44 |         return `<span class="warning">${line}</span>`;
45 |       } else if (line.toLowerCase().includes('success') || line.toLowerCase().includes('erfolg')) {
46 |         return `<span class="success">${line}</span>`;
47 |       } else {
48 |         return line;
49 |       }
50 |     });
51 |   }
52 | 
53 |   /**
54 |    * Kopiert den Terminal-Output in die Zwischenablage
55 |    */
56 |   copyOutput(): void {
57 |     if (this.output) {
58 |       navigator.clipboard
59 |         .writeText(this.output)
60 |         .then(() => console.log('Output copied to clipboard'))
61 |         .catch(err => console.error('Could not copy text: ', err));
62 |     }
63 |   }
64 | 
65 |   /**
66 |    * Vergrößert die Schriftgröße des Terminal-Outputs
67 |    */
68 |   increaseFontSize(): void {
69 |     if (this.fontSizePercent < this.MAX_FONT_SIZE) {
70 |       this.fontSizePercent += this.FONT_SIZE_STEP;
71 |     }
72 |   }
73 | 
74 |   /**
75 |    * Verkleinert die Schriftgröße des Terminal-Outputs
76 |    */
77 |   decreaseFontSize(): void {
78 |     if (this.fontSizePercent > this.MIN_FONT_SIZE) {
79 |       this.fontSizePercent -= this.FONT_SIZE_STEP;
80 |     }
81 |   }
82 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/test-indicators/test-indicators.component.html
```
1 | <div
2 |   class="test-indicators-container"
3 |   *ngIf="testResults && testResults.length > 0"
4 |   [class.active]="isNewResult"
5 | >
6 |   <div class="test-indicators">
7 |     <div
8 |       *ngFor="let test of testResults"
9 |       class="test-indicator"
10 |       [class.passed]="test.passed"
11 |       [class.failed]="!test.passed"
12 |       [class.new-result]="isNewResult"
13 |       [matTooltip]="test.name"
14 |       (click)="openTestDetails(test)"
15 |     ></div>
16 |   </div>
17 | 
18 |   <div class="test-summary" [ngClass]="getSummaryClass()" (click)="openAllTestsDetails()">
19 |     {{ getTestSummary() }}
20 |   </div>
21 | </div>
22 | 
23 | <div class="test-indicators-container empty" *ngIf="!testResults || testResults.length === 0">
24 |   <span>Keine Tests verfügbar</span>
25 | </div>
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/test-indicators/test-indicators.component.scss
```
1 | @import '../../_nord-light-theme.scss';
2 | 
3 | .test-indicators-container {
4 |   display: flex;
5 |   align-items: center;
6 |   padding: 8px 12px;
7 |   background-color: $nord-light-bg-primary;
8 |   border-radius: 4px;
9 |   border: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
10 |   min-height: 32px;
11 | 
12 |   &.active {
13 |     border-color: $nord-light-accent-frost-4;
14 |   }
15 | 
16 |   &.empty {
17 |     color: $nord-light-text-tertiary;
18 |     justify-content: center;
19 |     background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
20 |     font-size: 13px;
21 |   }
22 | }
23 | 
24 | .test-indicators {
25 |   display: flex;
26 |   flex-wrap: wrap;
27 |   gap: 6px;
28 |   margin-right: 12px;
29 |   overflow-x: auto;
30 | }
31 | 
32 | .test-indicator {
33 |   width: 16px;
34 |   height: 16px;
35 |   border-radius: 50%;
36 |   cursor: pointer;
37 | 
38 |   &.passed {
39 |     background-color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-4;
40 |   }
41 | 
42 |   &.failed {
43 |     background-color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-1;
44 |   }
45 | 
46 |   &.new-result {
47 |     opacity: 0.8;
48 |   }
49 | }
50 | 
51 | .test-summary {
52 |   font-size: 14px;
53 |   font-weight: normal;
54 |   white-space: nowrap;
55 |   display: flex;
56 |   align-items: center;
57 | 
58 |   &.all-passed {
59 |     color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-4;
60 |   }
61 | 
62 |   &.some-failed {
63 |     color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-2;
64 |   }
65 | 
66 |   &.all-failed {
67 |     color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-1;
68 |   }
69 | }
70 | 
71 | // Responsives Design für kleinere Bildschirme bleibt erhalten
72 | 
73 | // Responsives Design
74 | @media (max-width: 600px) {
75 |   .test-indicators-container {
76 |     flex-direction: column;
77 |     align-items: flex-start;
78 | 
79 |     .test-indicators {
80 |       margin-bottom: 12px;
81 |       margin-right: 0;
82 |       width: 100%;
83 |     }
84 |   }
85 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/test-indicators/test-indicators.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnChanges, SimpleChanges, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, Input } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
4 | import { TestResult } from '../../models/code-submission.model';
5 | import { TestDetailsDialogComponent } from './test-details-dialog/test-details-dialog.component';
6 | 
7 | @Component({
8 |   selector: 'app-test-indicators',
9 |   templateUrl: './test-indicators.component.html',
10 |   styleUrls: ['./test-indicators.component.scss'],
11 | })
12 | export class TestIndicatorsComponent implements OnChanges, OnInit {
13 |   @Input() testResults: TestResult[] | undefined;
14 | 
15 |   passedTests: number = 0;
16 |   totalTests: number = 0;
17 | 
18 |   // Neue Eigenschaften für verbesserte Visualisierung
19 |   isNewResult: boolean = false;
20 |   lastResultsHash: string = '';
21 | 
22 |   constructor(private readonly dialog: MatDialog) {}
23 | 
24 |   ngOnInit(): void {
25 |     // Initialisierung
26 |   }
27 | 
28 |   ngOnChanges(changes: SimpleChanges): void {
29 |     if (changes['testResults'] && this.testResults) {
30 |       // Berechne Test-Zusammenfassung
31 |       this.calculateTestSummary();
32 | 
33 |       // Überprüfen, ob es neue Ergebnisse gibt
34 |       const newResultsHash = this.calculateResultsHash();
35 |       if (newResultsHash !== this.lastResultsHash) {
36 |         this.lastResultsHash = newResultsHash;
37 |         this.triggerNewResultAnimation();
38 |       }
39 |     }
40 |   }
41 | 
42 |   /**
43 |    * Berechnet die Zusammenfassung der Testergebnisse
44 |    */
45 |   private calculateTestSummary(): void {
46 |     if (!this.testResults) {
47 |       this.passedTests = 0;
48 |       this.totalTests = 0;
49 |       return;
50 |     }
51 | 
52 |     this.totalTests = this.testResults.length;
53 |     this.passedTests = this.testResults.filter(test => test.passed).length;
54 |   }
55 | 
56 |   /**
57 |    * Gibt die Zusammenfassung der Testergebnisse zurück
58 |    */
59 |   getTestSummary(): string {
60 |     return `${this.passedTests}/${this.totalTests} Tests bestanden`;
61 |   }
62 | 
63 |   /**
64 |    * Gibt das CSS-Klassen-Objekt für den Zusammenfassungs-Text zurück
65 |    */
66 |   getSummaryClass(): { [key: string]: boolean } {
67 |     return {
68 |       'all-passed': this.passedTests === this.totalTests && this.totalTests > 0,
69 |       'some-failed': this.passedTests < this.totalTests && this.passedTests > 0,
70 |       'all-failed': this.passedTests === 0 && this.totalTests > 0,
71 |     };
72 |   }
73 | 
74 |   /**
75 |    * Öffnet den Dialog mit den Testdetails für einen Test
76 |    */
77 |   openTestDetails(test: TestResult): void {
78 |     this.dialog.open(TestDetailsDialogComponent, {
79 |       width: '500px',
80 |       data: test,
81 |     });
82 |   }
83 | 
84 |   /**
85 |    * Öffnet den Dialog mit allen Testdetails
86 |    */
87 |   openAllTestsDetails(): void {
88 |     if (this.testResults && this.testResults.length > 0) {
89 |       this.dialog.open(TestDetailsDialogComponent, {
90 |         width: '600px',
91 |         data: {
92 |           allTests: this.testResults,
93 |           isListView: true,
94 |         },
95 |       });
96 |     }
97 |   }
98 | 
99 |   /**
100 |    * Generiert einen detaillierten Tooltip für den Test
101 |    */
102 |   getDetailedTooltip(test: TestResult): string {
103 |     let tooltip = `Test ${test.name}: ${test.passed ? 'Bestanden' : 'Fehlgeschlagen'}`;
104 | 
105 |     if (!test.passed && test.exception) {
106 |       // Zeige den ersten Teil der Fehlermeldung, wenn vorhanden
107 |       const shortError = test.exception.split('\n')[0].substring(0, 50);
108 |       tooltip += `\nFehler: ${shortError}${test.exception.length > 50 ? '...' : ''}`;
109 |     }
110 | 
111 |     return tooltip;
112 |   }
113 | 
114 |   /**
115 |    * Generiert einen Hash basierend auf den Testergebnissen,
116 |    * um Änderungen zu erkennen
117 |    */
118 |   private calculateResultsHash(): string {
119 |     if (!this.testResults || this.testResults.length === 0) {
120 |       return '';
121 |     }
122 | 
123 |     return this.testResults.map(test => `${test.name}:${test.passed ? 'pass' : 'fail'}`).join('|');
124 |   }
125 | 
126 |   /**
127 |    * Löst die Animation für neue Ergebnisse aus
128 |    */
129 |   private triggerNewResultAnimation(): void {
130 |     this.isNewResult = true;
131 | 
132 |     // Animation nach kurzer Zeit zurücksetzen
133 |     setTimeout(() => {
134 |       this.isNewResult = false;
135 |     }, 2000);
136 |   }
137 | }
```
