src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/services/markdown/markdown.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import MarkdownIt from 'markdown-it';
3 | import markdownItFootnote from 'markdown-it-footnote';
4 | import hljs from 'highlight.js';
5 | 
6 | @Injectable({
7 |   providedIn: 'root',
8 | })
9 | export class MarkdownService {
10 |   private readonly md: MarkdownIt;
11 | 
12 |   constructor() {
13 |     this.md = new MarkdownIt({
14 |       highlight: (str: string, lang: string) => {
15 |         if (lang && hljs.getLanguage(lang)) {
16 |           try {
17 |             return (
18 |               '<pre class="hljs"><code class="language-' +
19 |               lang +
20 |               '">' +
21 |               hljs.highlight(str, { language: lang, ignoreIllegals: true }).value +
22 |               '</code></pre>'
23 |             );
24 |           } catch (__) {}
25 |         }
26 |         return '<pre class="hljs"><code>' + this.escapeHtml(str) + '</code></pre>';
27 |       },
28 |       breaks: true,
29 |       html: true,
30 |       linkify: true,
31 |       typographer: true,
32 |     });
33 | 
34 |     this.md.use(markdownItFootnote);
35 | 
36 |     // Anpassen der Listenelemente-Rendering
37 |     this.md.renderer.rules['list_item_open'] = (tokens, idx, options, env, self) => {
38 |       const token = tokens[idx];
39 |       if (token.markup === '1.') {
40 |         return '<li class="ordered-list-item">';
41 |       }
42 |       return '<li>';
43 |     };
44 | 
45 |     this.md.renderer.rules['list_item_close'] = () => '</li>';
46 | 
47 |     // Anpassen des Inhalts-Renderings für Listenelemente
48 |     this.md.renderer.rules['paragraph_open'] = (tokens, idx, options, env, self) => {
49 |       const token = tokens[idx];
50 |       if (token.level > 0 && tokens[idx - 1] && tokens[idx - 1].type === 'list_item_open') {
51 |         return ''; // Kein zusätzliches <p>-Tag innerhalb von Listenelementen
52 |       }
53 |       return '<p>';
54 |     };
55 | 
56 |     this.md.renderer.rules['paragraph_close'] = (tokens, idx, options, env, self) => {
57 |       const token = tokens[idx];
58 |       if (token.level > 0 && tokens[idx + 1] && tokens[idx + 1].type === 'list_item_close') {
59 |         return ''; // Kein schließendes </p>-Tag innerhalb von Listenelementen
60 |       }
61 |       return '</p>';
62 |     };
63 | 
64 |     // Anpassungen für Fußnoten mit blauer Farbe und Unterstreichung
65 |     this.md.renderer.rules['footnote_ref'] = (tokens, idx, options, env, slf) => {
66 |       const caption = slf.rules['footnote_caption']?.(tokens, idx, options, env, slf);
67 |       return `<sup class="footnote-ref"><a style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">${caption}</a></sup>`;
68 |     };
69 | 
70 |     this.md.renderer.rules['footnote_anchor'] = () =>
71 |       ' <a class="footnote-backref" style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">\u21a9\uFE0E</a>';
72 | 
73 |     this.md.renderer.rules['footnote_block_open'] = () =>
74 |       '<h4 class="mt-3">Quellen (Links zum Video):</h4>\n<section class="footnotes">\n<ol class="footnotes-list">\n';
75 | 
76 |     // Regel für Links mit blauer Farbe und Unterstreichung
77 |     this.md.renderer.rules['link_open'] = (tokens, idx, options, env, self) => {
78 |       const token = tokens[idx];
79 |       const hrefIndex = token.attrIndex('href');
80 |       const href = token.attrs?.[hrefIndex]?.[1] ?? '#';
81 |       return `<a href="${href}" style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">`;
82 |     };
83 |   }
84 | 
85 |   parse(markdown: string): string {
86 |     return this.md.render(markdown);
87 |   }
88 | 
89 |   private escapeHtml(str: string): string {
90 |     return str.replace(/[&<>"']/g, tag => {
91 |       const charsToReplace: { [key: string]: string } = {
92 |         '&': '&amp;',
93 |         '<': '<',
94 |         '>': '>',
95 |         '"': '"',
96 |         "'": '&#39;',
97 |       };
98 |       return charsToReplace[tag] || tag;
99 |     });
100 |   }
101 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/sites/student-workspace/student-workspace.component.html
```
1 | <div class="student-workspace">
2 |   <!-- Mobile Navigation für Tab-basiertes Layout (oben statt unten) -->
3 |   <div class="mobile-navigation">
4 |     <button mat-button [class.active]="activeTab === 'task'" (click)="setActiveTab('task')">
5 |       Aufgabe
6 |     </button>
7 |     <button mat-button [class.active]="activeTab === 'code'" (click)="setActiveTab('code')">
8 |       Code
9 |     </button>
10 |     <button mat-button [class.active]="activeTab === 'output'" (click)="setActiveTab('output')">
11 |       Ausgabe
12 |     </button>
13 |     <button mat-button [class.active]="activeTab === 'feedback'" (click)="setActiveTab('feedback')">
14 |       Feedback
15 |     </button>
16 |   </div>
17 | 
18 |   <!-- Neue Workspace-Container-Struktur -->
19 |   <div class="workspace-container" [attr.data-active-tab]="activeTab">
20 |     <!-- Obere Zeile: Aufgabe + Editor -->
21 |     <div class="top-row" [style.height.%]="topRowHeight">
22 |       <div class="task-panel" [style.width.%]="taskPanelWidth">
23 |         <div class="panel-header">
24 |           <h2>{{ taskTitle }}</h2>
25 |           <div class="header-buttons">
26 |             <!-- Schriftgröße verkleinern -->
27 |             <button
28 |               mat-icon-button
29 |               class="font-size-button"
30 |               (click)="decreaseFontSize()"
31 |               aria-label="Schriftgröße verkleinern"
32 |               [disabled]="fontSizePercent <= MIN_FONT_SIZE"
33 |             >
34 |               <mat-icon>text_decrease</mat-icon>
35 |             </button>
36 | 
37 |             <!-- Schriftgröße vergrößern -->
38 |             <button
39 |               mat-icon-button
40 |               class="font-size-button"
41 |               (click)="increaseFontSize()"
42 |               aria-label="Schriftgröße vergrößern"
43 |               [disabled]="fontSizePercent >= MAX_FONT_SIZE"
44 |             >
45 |               <mat-icon>text_increase</mat-icon>
46 |             </button>
47 | 
48 |             <!-- Bestehender Toggle-Button -->
49 |             <button
50 |               mat-icon-button
51 |               class="toggle-button"
52 |               (click)="toggleTaskPanel()"
53 |               [attr.aria-label]="taskTitle + ' ein-/ausklappen'"
54 |             >
55 |               <mat-icon>{{ isTaskPanelCollapsed ? 'chevron_right' : 'chevron_left' }}</mat-icon>
56 |             </button>
57 |           </div>
58 |         </div>
59 |         <div class="task-description" [style.fontSize.%]="fontSizePercent">
60 |           <markdown [data]="taskDescription"></markdown>
61 |         </div>
62 |       </div>
63 | 
64 |       <!-- Horizontaler Resize-Handle -->
65 |       <!-- <div class="horizontal-resize-handle" (mousedown)="startHorizontalResize($event)"></div> -->
66 | 
67 |       <div class="editor-section" [style.width.%]="100 - taskPanelWidth">
68 |         <!-- VSCode-ähnliches Layout mit Explorer und Editor -->
69 |         <div class="vscode-layout">
70 |           <!-- File Explorer (links)
71 |           <div class="explorer-panel" [class.collapsed]="fileExplorerCollapsed">
72 |             <app-file-explorer #fileExplorer
73 |                                [class.collapsed]="fileExplorerCollapsed"
74 |                                (explorerCollapsedChange)="fileExplorerCollapsed = $event"></app-file-explorer>
75 |           </div>-->
76 | 
77 |           <!-- Code Editor (rechts) -->
78 |           <div class="editor-panel">
79 |             <app-code-editor-wrapper
80 |               [currentTask]="workspaceState.getCurrentTask()"
81 |               (executionStarted)="onCodeExecutionStart()"
82 |               (codeSubmitted)="onCodeSubmitted($event)"
83 |             >
84 |             </app-code-editor-wrapper>
85 |           </div>
86 |         </div>
87 |       </div>
88 |     </div>
89 | 
90 |     <!-- Vertikaler Resize-Handle zwischen Top und Middle -->
91 |     <div class="vertical-resize-handle" (mousedown)="startVerticalResizeTop($event)"></div>
92 | 
93 |     <!-- Mittlere Zeile: Test-Indikatoren + Execute-Button -->
94 |     <div class="middle-row" [style.height.px]="middleRowHeight">
95 |       <!-- Verbesserte Struktur für die mittlere Zeile -->
96 |       <div class="middle-row-content">
97 |         <!-- Test-Indikatoren anzeigen -->
98 |         <div
99 |           class="test-indicators-container"
100 |           [class.empty]="!testResults || testResults.length === 0"
101 |         >
102 |           <app-test-indicators
103 |             *ngIf="testResults && testResults.length > 0"
104 |             [testResults]="testResults"
105 |           >
106 |           </app-test-indicators>
107 |           <span *ngIf="!testResults || testResults.length === 0" class="no-tests-message">
108 |             Führe den Code aus, um die Tests zu starten
109 |           </span>
110 |           <button
111 |             *ngIf="showStructuredFeedback && canRequestStructuredFeedback() && hasConsent"
112 |             (click)="structuredFeedbackPanel?.fetchFeedback()"
113 |             class="kai-flat-button"
114 |           >
115 |             <img
116 |               src="../../../../../assets/img/tutorKai/tutor_kai_face_small_icon.webp"
117 |               alt="Tutor Kai Icon"
118 |               class="kai-button-icon"
119 |               style="width: 22px; height: 22px; vertical-align: middle"
120 |             />
121 |             Tutor Kai fragen
122 |           </button>
123 |         </div>
124 | 
125 |         <!-- Execute-Button mit verbessertem Styling -->
126 |         <div class="execute-button-container">
127 |           <button
128 |             class="kai-flat-button"
129 |             [class.loading]="isCompiling"
130 |             (click)="executeCode()"
131 |             [disabled]="isCompiling || !workspaceState.getCurrentTask()"
132 |           >
133 |             <mat-icon>play_arrow</mat-icon>
134 |             Code ausführen
135 |           </button>
136 |         </div>
137 |       </div>
138 |     </div>
139 | 
140 |     <!-- Vertikaler Resize-Handle zwischen Middle und Bottom -->
141 |     <!-- Vertikaler<div class="vertical-resize-handle" (mousedown)="startVerticalResizeBottom($event)"></div>-->
142 | 
143 |     <!-- Untere Zeile: Feedback + Terminal -->
144 |     <div class="bottom-row" [style.height.%]="bottomRowHeight">
145 |       <div class="feedback-area" [style.width.%]="feedbackAreaWidth">
146 |         <!-- Feedback View Toggle
147 |         <div class="feedback-controls">
148 |           <mat-slide-toggle
149 |             [(ngModel)]="showStructuredFeedback"
150 |             (change)="onFeedbackViewChange()"
151 |             labelPosition="before">
152 |             Structured View
153 |           </mat-slide-toggle>
154 |         </div>-->
155 | 
156 |         <!-- Conditional Feedback Panels -->
157 |         <!-- Conditional Feedback Panels -->
158 |         <app-feedback-panel *ngIf="!showStructuredFeedback"></app-feedback-panel>
159 | 
160 |         <!-- Tutor Kai Feedback Panel (shown only if structured feedback is enabled AND consent is given) -->
161 |         <app-feedback-panel-tutor-feedback
162 |           *ngIf="showStructuredFeedback && hasConsent"
163 |           #structuredFeedbackPanel
164 |         >
165 |         </app-feedback-panel-tutor-feedback>
166 | 
167 |         <!-- Privacy Consent UI (shown if structured feedback is enabled, consent is NOT given, and not currently checking) -->
168 |         <div
169 |           *ngIf="showStructuredFeedback && !hasConsent && !isCheckingConsent"
170 |           class="privacy-consent-container"
171 |         >
172 |           <div class="privacy-consent-header">
173 |             <mat-icon class="info-icon">info</mat-icon>
174 |             <h3>Datenschutzhinweis</h3>
175 |           </div>
176 |           <div class="privacy-consent-content">
177 |             <p>
178 |               Hallo, um automatisch Feedback zu bekommen, musst du noch der Datenschutzerklärung
179 |               zustimmen. Wir nutzen GPT 4.1 von OpenAI um dir Hinweise zu Problemen, Beispiele und
180 |               Erklärungen sowie Hinweise zu den nächsten Schritten zu zeigen. Die Nutzung der
181 |               Feedback-Funktion ist optional und freiwillig.
182 |             </p>
183 |           </div>
184 |           <div class="privacy-consent-action">
185 |             <button
186 |               mat-raised-button
187 |               color="primary"
188 |               (click)="openConsentDialog()"
189 |               class="consent-button"
190 |             >
191 |               Datenschutzerklärung anzeigen & Feedback aktivieren
192 |             </button>
193 |           </div>
194 |         </div>
195 | 
196 |         <!-- Loading indicator while checking consent -->
197 |         <div *ngIf="isCheckingConsent" class="loading-container">
198 |           <mat-spinner diameter="40"></mat-spinner>
199 |           <p>Checking privacy consent status...</p>
200 |         </div>
201 |       </div>
202 | 
203 |       <!-- Horizontaler Resize-Handle -->
204 |       <!-- <div class="horizontal-resize-handle" (mousedown)="startHorizontalResizeBottom($event)"></div>-->
205 | 
206 |       <div class="terminal-section" [style.width.%]="100 - feedbackAreaWidth">
207 |         <app-terminal-output [output]="compilerOutput" [isLoading]="isCompiling">
208 |         </app-terminal-output>
209 |       </div>
210 |     </div>
211 |   </div>
212 | </div>
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/sites/student-workspace/student-workspace.component.scss
```
1 | // Import Nord Light theme
2 | @import '../../_nord-light-theme.scss';
3 | 
4 | // Common button style for Tutor Kai module
5 | .kai-flat-button {
6 |   display: flex;
7 |   align-items: center;
8 |   gap: 8px;
9 |   padding: 8px 16px;
10 |   margin-left: 8px;
11 |   background-color: $nord-light-accent-frost-4;
12 |   color: white;
13 |   border-radius: 4px;
14 |   font-weight: 500;
15 |   border: none;
16 |   cursor: pointer;
17 |   transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
18 | 
19 |   &:hover:not(:disabled) {
20 |     background-color: darken($nord-light-accent-frost-4, 10%);
21 |   }
22 | 
23 |   &:focus {
24 |     outline: none;
25 |     border: 1px solid lighten($nord-light-accent-frost-4, 20%);
26 |   }
27 | 
28 |   &:disabled {
29 |     background-color: $nord-light-ui-dark;
30 |     opacity: 0.7;
31 |     cursor: not-allowed;
32 |   }
33 | 
34 |   &.loading {
35 |     background-color: darken($nord-light-accent-frost-4, 15%);
36 |   }
37 | 
38 |   mat-icon {
39 |     font-size: 18px;
40 |     height: 18px;
41 |     width: 18px;
42 |   }
43 | }
44 | 
45 | .feedback-controls {
46 |   position: absolute;
47 |   left: 3px;
48 |   bottom: 3px;
49 | }
50 | .student-workspace {
51 |   display: flex;
52 |   flex-direction: column;
53 |   height: 100%;
54 |   border-radius: 7px;
55 |   overflow: hidden;
56 | 
57 |   // Header immer oben
58 |   .header {
59 |     display: flex;
60 |     align-items: center;
61 |     padding: 10px 15px;
62 |     background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
63 |     box-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba($nord-light-text-primary, 0.1);
64 |     z-index: 10;
65 | 
66 |     h1 {
67 |       margin: 0;
68 |       margin-left: 10px;
69 |       font-size: 24px;
70 |       font-weight: 500;
71 |     }
72 |   }
73 | 
74 |   // Mobile Navigation (für Tablets und kleinere Geräte)
75 |   .mobile-navigation {
76 |     display: none; // standardmäßig ausgeblendet, nur für mobile sichtbar
77 |     background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
78 |     border-bottom: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
79 |     padding: 5px;
80 |     justify-content: space-around;
81 |     z-index: 5;
82 | 
83 |     button {
84 |       flex: 1;
85 |       padding: 8px 0;
86 |       font-size: 14px;
87 |       text-transform: uppercase;
88 |       border-radius: 0;
89 |       margin: 0 2px;
90 | 
91 |       &.active {
92 |         background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
93 |         color: $nord-light-primary;
94 |         font-weight: 500;
95 |       }
96 |     }
97 |   }
98 | 
99 |   // Hauptcontainer
100 |   .workspace-container {
101 |     flex: 1;
102 |     display: flex;
103 |     flex-direction: column;
104 |     overflow: hidden;
105 |     position: relative;
106 | 
107 |     // Obere Zeile: Aufgabe + Editor
108 |     .top-row {
109 |       display: flex;
110 |       flex-direction: row;
111 |       overflow: hidden;
112 | 
113 |       // Linkes Panel: Aufgabenbeschreibung
114 |       .task-panel {
115 |         display: flex;
116 |         flex-direction: column;
117 |         min-width: 250px;
118 |         overflow: hidden;
119 |         border-right: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
120 |         transition: all 0.3s ease;
121 | 
122 |         &.collapsed {
123 |           width: 50px !important;
124 |           min-width: 50px;
125 | 
126 |           .panel-header h2,
127 |           .task-description {
128 |             display: none;
129 |           }
130 |         }
131 | 
132 |         .panel-header {
133 |           height: $tab-height;
134 |           display: flex;
135 |           justify-content: space-between;
136 |           align-items: center;
137 |           padding: 5px 10px;
138 |           background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
139 |           border-bottom: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
140 | 
141 |           h2 {
142 |             margin: 0;
143 |             font-size: 18px;
144 |             font-weight: 500;
145 |             flex-grow: 1;
146 |           }
147 | 
148 |           .header-buttons {
149 |             display: flex;
150 |             gap: 4px;
151 | 
152 |             .font-size-button,
153 |             .toggle-button {
154 |               color: $nord-light-text-tertiary;
155 | 
156 |               &:disabled {
157 |                 color: $nord-light-border;
158 |               }
159 |             }
160 |           }
161 |         }
162 | 
163 |         .task-description {
164 |           flex: 1;
165 |           padding: 15px;
166 |           overflow-y: auto;
167 |           background-color: $nord-light-bg-primary;
168 | 
169 |           h1,
170 |           h2,
171 |           h3 {
172 |             margin-top: 0;
173 |           }
174 | 
175 |           ul,
176 |           ol {
177 |             padding-left: 20px;
178 |           }
179 | 
180 |           pre {
181 |             background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
182 |             padding: 10px;
183 |             border-radius: 4px;
184 |             overflow-x: auto;
185 |           }
186 | 
187 |           code {
188 |             background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
189 |             padding: 2px 4px;
190 |             border-radius: 4px;
191 |           }
192 |         }
193 |       }
194 | 
195 |       // Horizontaler Resize-Handle
196 |       .horizontal-resize-handle {
197 |         width: 8px;
198 |         cursor: ew-resize;
199 |         background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
200 |         border-left: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
201 |         border-right: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
202 |         position: relative;
203 | 
204 |         &:hover {
205 |           background-color: $nord-light-border;
206 |         }
207 | 
208 |         &:active {
209 |           background-color: $nord-light-accent-frost-1;
210 |         }
211 | 
212 |         &::after {
213 |           content: '';
214 |           position: absolute;
215 |           left: 3px;
216 |           top: 50%;
217 |           transform: translateY(-50%);
218 |           height: 30px;
219 |           width: 2px;
220 |           background-color: $nord-light-ui-dark;
221 |           border-radius: 1px;
222 |         }
223 |       }
224 | 
225 |       // Rechte Seite: Code-Editor
226 |       .editor-section {
227 |         flex: 1;
228 |         display: flex;
229 |         flex-direction: column;
230 |         overflow: hidden;
231 | 
232 |         // VSCode-ähnliches Layout mit Explorer und Editor
233 |         .vscode-layout {
234 |           display: flex;
235 |           flex-direction: row;
236 |           height: 100%;
237 |           background-color: $nord-light-bg-primary;
238 |           color: $nord-light-text-primary;
239 | 
240 |           // File Explorer Panel (links)
241 |           .explorer-panel {
242 |             width: 250px;
243 |             height: 100%;
244 |             flex-shrink: 0;
245 |             border-right: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
246 |             background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
247 |             overflow: hidden;
248 |             position: relative;
249 |             transition: width 0.3s ease;
250 | 
251 |             &.collapsed {
252 |               width: 40px !important;
253 |               min-width: 40px;
254 |             }
255 | 
256 |             // Toggle-Button zum Ein-/Ausklappen des Explorers
257 |             .toggle-explorer-button {
258 |               position: absolute;
259 |               top: 5px;
260 |               right: 0;
261 |               z-index: 10;
262 |               color: $nord-light-text-tertiary;
263 |               background-color: transparent;
264 |               width: 20px;
265 |               height: 20px;
266 |               padding: 0;
267 |               line-height: 20px;
268 |               transition: all 0.3s ease;
269 | 
270 |               &:hover {
271 |                 color: $nord-light-text-primary;
272 |               }
273 | 
274 |               mat-icon {
275 |                 font-size: 14px;
276 |                 width: 14px;
277 |                 height: 14px;
278 |                 line-height: 14px;
279 |               }
280 |             }
281 |           }
282 | 
283 |           // Editor Panel (rechts)
284 |           .editor-panel {
285 |             flex: 1;
286 |             height: 100%;
287 |             display: flex;
288 |             flex-direction: column;
289 |             overflow: hidden;
290 | 
291 |             app-code-editor-wrapper {
292 |               flex: 1;
293 |               display: flex;
294 |               flex-direction: column;
295 |             }
296 |           }
297 |         }
298 |       }
299 |     }
300 | 
301 |     // Vertikaler Resize-Handle
302 |     .vertical-resize-handle {
303 |       height: 8px;
304 |       background-color: $nord-light-border;
305 |       border-top: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
306 |       cursor: ns-resize;
307 |       position: relative;
308 | 
309 |       &:hover {
310 |         background-color: #d2d7e2;
311 |       }
312 | 
313 |       &:active {
314 |         background-color: $nord-light-accent-frost-1;
315 |       }
316 | 
317 |       &::after {
318 |         content: '';
319 |         position: absolute;
320 |         top: 3px;
321 |         left: 50%;
322 |         transform: translateX(-50%);
323 |         width: 30px;
324 |         height: 2px;
325 |         background-color: $nord-light-ui-dark;
326 |         border-radius: 1px;
327 |       }
328 |     }
329 | 
330 |     // Mittlere Zeile: Test-Indikatoren + Execute-Button
331 |     .middle-row {
332 |       display: flex;
333 |       align-items: center;
334 |       justify-content: space-between;
335 |       padding: 2px 2px;
336 |       background: linear-gradient(to right, $nord-light-bg-secondary, $nord-light-bg-primary);
337 |       border-top: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
338 |       // border-bottom: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
339 |       min-height: 40px; // Feste Mindesthöhe für die Zeile
340 |       box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba($nord-light-text-primary, 0.05);
341 |       position: relative;
342 |       z-index: 5;
343 | 
344 |       // Container für beide Bereiche
345 |       .middle-row-content {
346 |         display: flex;
347 |         width: 100%;
348 |         justify-content: space-between;
349 |         align-items: center;
350 | 
351 |         // Bereich für Test-Indikatoren
352 |         .test-indicators-container {
353 |           flex: 2; // Nimmt mehr Platz ein
354 |           margin-right: 16px;
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/sites/student-workspace/student-workspace.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnDestroy, OnInit, Renderer2 } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, HostListener, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http'; // Added HttpClient
4 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
5 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
6 | import { Title } from '@angular/platform-browser';
7 | import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
8 | import { Subject, takeUntil, catchError, finalize, throwError, filter } from 'rxjs'; // Added RxJS operators
9 | import { CodeSubmissionResultDto } from '@DTOs/index';
10 | import { ConfettiService } from 'src/app/Services/animations/confetti.service';
11 | import { ProgressService } from 'src/app/Services/progress/progress.service';
12 | import { VideoTimeStampComponent } from '../video-time-stamp/video-time-stamp.component';
13 | import { WorkspaceStateService } from '../../services/workspace-state.service';
14 | import { TestResult } from '../../models/code-submission.model';
15 | import { WorkspaceState } from '../../models/code-submission.model';
16 | import { CodeEditorWrapperComponent } from '../../components/code-editor-wrapper/code-editor-wrapper.component';
17 | import { FileExplorerComponent } from '../../components/file-explorer/file-explorer.component';
18 | import { FeedbackPanelTutorFeedbackComponent } from '../../components/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback.component';
19 | import { PrivacyConsentDialogComponent } from '../../components/privacy-consent-dialog/privacy-consent-dialog.component'; // Added Consent Dialog
20 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment'; // Added environment
21 | 
22 | @Component({
23 |   selector: 'app-student-workspace',
24 |   templateUrl: './student-workspace.component.html',
25 |   styleUrls: ['./student-workspace.component.scss'],
26 | })
27 | export class StudentWorkspaceComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
28 |   @ViewChild(CodeEditorWrapperComponent) codeEditorWrapper!: CodeEditorWrapperComponent;
29 |   @ViewChild('fileExplorer') fileExplorer!: FileExplorerComponent;
30 |   @ViewChild('structuredFeedbackPanel')
31 |   structuredFeedbackPanel?: FeedbackPanelTutorFeedbackComponent;
32 | 
33 |   // TaskID aus der Route
34 |   currentTaskId: number = 0;
35 |   private conceptId!: number;
36 | 
37 |   // Beschreibungstext und Titel
38 |   taskDescription: string =
39 |     'Hi :)\n ich bin Kai. Ich bin hier, um dir Feedback zu deinen Lösungen zu geben.';
40 |   taskTitle: string = 'Aufgabe';
41 | 
42 |   // Schriftgröße für die Aufgabenbeschreibung
43 |   fontSizePercent: number = 100; // Standardgröße (90%) - leicht reduziert
44 |   readonly MIN_FONT_SIZE: number = 70; // Minimale Schriftgröße (70%)
45 |   readonly MAX_FONT_SIZE: number = 160; // Maximale Schriftgröße (150%)
46 |   readonly FONT_SIZE_STEP: number = 10; // Schrittgröße der Änderung (10%)
47 | 
48 |   // Layout-States
49 |   isTaskPanelCollapsed: boolean = false;
50 |   fileExplorerCollapsed: boolean = true; // Standardmäßig eingeklappt
51 |   activeTab: 'task' | 'code' | 'output' | 'feedback' = 'code';
52 | 
53 |   // Neue Layout-Properties für das Grid-Layout
54 |   topRowHeight: number = 50; // 50% der Höhe
55 |   middleRowHeight: number = 50; // 55px Höhe
56 |   bottomRowHeight: number = 50; // 50% der Höhe
57 | 
58 |   taskPanelWidth: number = 50; // 48% der Breite - some space for file explorer of code editor
59 |   feedbackAreaWidth: number = 50; // 50% der Breite
60 | 
61 |   // Alte Property für die Migration
62 |   workAreaHeight: number = 70; // Wird entfernt, wenn die Migration abgeschlossen ist
63 | 
64 |   // Terminal- und Test-Properties
65 |   compilerOutput: string | null = null;
66 |   isCompiling: boolean = false;
67 |   testResults: TestResult[] | null = null;
68 | 
69 |   // Feedback Panel State
70 |   showStructuredFeedback: boolean = true;
71 |   // Privacy Consent State
72 |   hasConsent: boolean = false;
73 |   isCheckingConsent: boolean = false;
74 |   // Resize-Properties für das neue Layout
75 |   private isHorizontalResizingTop: boolean = false;
76 |   private isHorizontalResizingBottom: boolean = false;
77 |   private isVerticalResizingTop: boolean = false;
78 |   private isVerticalResizingBottom: boolean = false;
79 | 
80 |   private startX: number = 0;
81 |   private startY: number = 0;
82 | 
83 |   private startTaskPanelWidth: number = 0;
84 |   private startFeedbackAreaWidth: number = 0;
85 |   private startTopRowHeight: number = 0;
86 |   private startBottomRowHeight: number = 0;
87 | 
88 |   // Alte Resize-Properties
89 |   private isMainResizing: boolean = false;
90 |   private readonly isResizing: boolean = false;
91 |   private readonly startHeight: number = 0;
92 |   private startWorkAreaHeight: number = 0;
93 | 
94 |   // Für Unsubscribe
95 |   private readonly destroy$ = new Subject<void>();
96 | 
97 |   // Event-Listener-Abräumer
98 |   private mouseMoveListener?: () => void;
99 |   private mouseUpListener?: () => void;
100 |   private mainMouseMoveListener?: () => void;
101 |   private mainMouseUpListener?: () => void;
102 | 
103 |   constructor(
104 |     private readonly progressService: ProgressService,
105 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
106 |     private readonly dialog: MatDialog,
107 |     private readonly route: ActivatedRoute,
108 |     private readonly confettiService: ConfettiService,
109 |     private readonly title: Title,
110 |     private readonly router: Router,
111 |     public workspaceState: WorkspaceStateService,
112 |     private readonly renderer: Renderer2,
113 |     private readonly http: HttpClient, // Added HttpClient
114 |   ) {
115 |     this.route.paramMap.subscribe(params => {
116 |       this.conceptId = Number(params.get('concept')); // Dies könnte undefined sein, wenn 'concept' ein Query-Parameter ist
117 |       this.currentTaskId = Number(params.get('taskId'));
118 |     });
119 |   }
120 | 
121 |   ngOnInit(): void {
122 |     this.title.setTitle('GOALS: Tutor Kai');
123 |     this.loadCurrentTask();
124 |     this.checkConsentStatus(); // Check consent on init
125 | 
126 |     // Abonniere Änderungen am aktuellen Task
127 |     this.workspaceState.currentTask$.pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$)).subscribe(task => {
128 |       if (task) {
129 |         // Verwende text (Markdown) statt textHTML für Markdown-Rendering
130 |         this.taskDescription = task.codingQuestion?.textHTML ?? '';
131 |         // Extrahiere den Namen als Titel aus dem Task-Objekt
132 |         this.taskTitle = task.name ?? 'Aufgabe';
133 |       }
134 |     });
135 |   }
136 | 
137 |   ngOnDestroy(): void {
138 |     this.destroy$.next();
139 |     this.destroy$.complete();
140 | 
141 |     // Event-Listener entfernen
142 |     this.cleanupEventListeners();
143 |   }
144 | 
145 |   /**
146 |    * Lädt die aktuelle Aufgabe basierend auf der Route
147 |    */
148 |   private loadCurrentTask(): void {
149 |     if (this.currentTaskId > 0) {
150 |       this.workspaceState.loadTask(this.currentTaskId).subscribe({
151 |         error: err => {
152 |           console.error('Error fetching task:', err);
153 |           this.snackBar.open('Fehler beim Laden der Aufgabe.', 'Schließen', { duration: 3000 });
154 |         },
155 |       });
156 |     }
157 |   }
158 | 
159 |   /**
160 |    * Event-Handler für Klicks auf Links zu Video-Zeitstempeln
161 |    */
162 |   @HostListener('click', ['$event'])
163 |   public onClick(event: MouseEvent): void {
164 |     const target = event.target as HTMLElement;
165 |     if (target.tagName === 'A' && target.getAttribute('href')) {
166 |       event.preventDefault();
167 |       this.openModal(target.getAttribute('href'));
168 |     }
169 |   }
170 | 
171 |   /**
172 |    * Öffnet das Video-Modal für Zeitstempel-Links
173 |    */
174 |   private openModal(href: string | null) {
175 |     this.dialog.open(VideoTimeStampComponent, { data: { href } });
176 |   }
177 | 
178 |   /**
179 |    * Behandelt den Start der Code-Ausführung
180 |    */
181 |   onCodeExecutionStart(): void {
182 |     this.isCompiling = true;
183 |     this.compilerOutput = 'Ausführung läuft...';
184 | 
185 |     // Mobile View: Wechsle zur Output-Ansicht
186 |     if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
187 |       this.setActiveTab('output');
188 |     }
189 |   }
190 | 
191 |   /**
192 |    * Behandelt das abgeschlossene Code-Submission-Ergebnis
193 |    */
194 |   onCodeSubmitted(result: CodeSubmissionResultDto): void {
195 |     // Zeige Konfetti-Animation bei 100% Score
196 |     if (result.CodeSubmissionResult.score === 100) {
197 |       this.confettiService.celebrate(6, 800);
198 |       this.progressService.answerSubmitted();
199 |     }
200 | 
201 |     // Aktualisiere Terminal-Output
202 |     this.isCompiling = false;
203 |     this.compilerOutput = result.CodeSubmissionResult.output || 'Keine Ausgabe';
204 | 
205 |     // Hole die bereits transformierten Test-Ergebnisse vom Service
206 |     const latestResult = this.workspaceState.getCodeSubmissionResult();
207 |     // Stelle sicher, dass testResults ein Array ist oder null, falls keine Ergebnisse vorhanden sind
208 |     // Assert the type to the local TestResult[] as we know the service transformed it
209 |     this.testResults =
210 |       (latestResult?.CodeSubmissionResult?.testResults as TestResult[] | undefined) ?? null;
211 | 
212 |     // Mobile View: Wechsle zur Output-Ansicht nach Code-Ausführung
213 |     if (window.innerWidth <= 768) {
214 |       this.setActiveTab('output');
215 |     }
216 |   }
217 | 
218 |   /**
219 |    * Klappt das Aufgabenpanel ein oder aus
220 |    */
221 |   toggleTaskPanel(): void {
222 |     this.isTaskPanelCollapsed = !this.isTaskPanelCollapsed;
223 | 
224 |     // Anpassen der Breite, wenn das Panel ein-/ausgeklappt wird
225 |     if (this.isTaskPanelCollapsed) {
226 |       this.taskPanelWidth = 15; // Minimale Breite, wenn eingeklappt
227 |     } else {
228 |       this.taskPanelWidth = 50; // Standard-Breite, wenn ausgeklappt
229 |     }
230 |   }
231 | 
232 |   /**
233 |    * Klappt den File Explorer ein oder aus
234 |    */
235 |   toggleFileExplorer(): void {
236 |     this.fileExplorerCollapsed = !this.fileExplorerCollapsed;
237 | 
238 |     // Rufe ggf. die Toggle-Methode in der FileExplorer-Komponente auf
239 |     if (this.fileExplorer) {
240 |       this.fileExplorer.toggleExplorer();
241 |     }
242 |   }
243 | 
244 |   /**
245 |    * Vergrößert die Schriftgröße der Aufgabenstellung
246 |    */
247 |   increaseFontSize(): void {
248 |     if (this.fontSizePercent < this.MAX_FONT_SIZE) {
249 |       this.fontSizePercent += this.FONT_SIZE_STEP;
250 |     }
251 |   }
252 | 
253 |   /**
254 |    * Verkleinert die Schriftgröße der Aufgabenstellung
255 |    */
256 |   decreaseFontSize(): void {
257 |     if (this.fontSizePercent > this.MIN_FONT_SIZE) {
258 |       this.fontSizePercent -= this.FONT_SIZE_STEP;
259 |     }
260 |   }
261 | 
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/sites/code-editor/code-editor.component.ts
```
1 | import { AfterViewInit, ChangeDetectorRef, ElementRef, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, EventEmitter, Input, Output, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
3 | 
4 | /**
5 |  * A component that wraps the ngx-monaco-editor and provides additional functionality.
6 |  */
7 | @Component({
8 |   selector: 'app-code-editor',
9 |   templateUrl: './code-editor.component.html',
10 |   styleUrls: ['./code-editor.component.scss'],
11 | })
12 | export class CodeEditorComponent implements AfterViewInit, OnInit {
13 |   @ViewChild('resizeHandle', { static: false }) resizeHandle!: ElementRef;
14 |   @ViewChild('monacoEditor', { static: false }) monacoEditor!: any;
15 | 
16 |   @Input() selectedLanguage: string | undefined = 'java';
17 |   @Input() code: string = '';
18 |   @Output() codeChange = new EventEmitter<string>();
19 | 
20 |   editorHeight: number = 800; // Default height
21 |   private isDragging: boolean = false;
22 |   private startY: number = 0;
23 |   private startHeight: number = 0;
24 | 
25 |   // For Monaco Code Editor
26 |   editorOptions = {
27 |     theme: 'vs',
28 |     language: this.selectedLanguage,
29 |     minimap: { enabled: false },
30 |     automaticLayout: true,
31 |   };
32 | 
33 |   constructor(private readonly cdr: ChangeDetectorRef) {}
34 | 
35 |   ngAfterViewInit() {
36 |     this.setupResizeListener();
37 |   }
38 | 
39 |   ngOnInit(): void {
40 |     this.editorOptions = {
41 |       ...this.editorOptions,
42 |       language: this.selectedLanguage,
43 |     };
44 |   }
45 | 
46 |   /**
47 |    * Sets up event listeners for resizing the editor.
48 |    */
49 |   private setupResizeListener(): void {
50 |     const resizeHandle = this.resizeHandle.nativeElement;
51 | 
52 |     resizeHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => {
53 |       this.isDragging = true;
54 |       this.startY = e.clientY;
55 |       this.startHeight = this.editorHeight;
56 |       document.addEventListener('mousemove', this.resize);
57 |       document.addEventListener('mouseup', this.stopResize);
58 |     });
59 |   }
60 | 
61 |   /**
62 |    * Handles the resizing of the editor.
63 |    */
64 |   private readonly resize = (e: MouseEvent) => {
65 |     if (!this.isDragging) return;
66 |     const deltaY = e.clientY - this.startY;
67 |     this.editorHeight = Math.max(200, Math.min(800, this.startHeight + deltaY));
68 |     this.cdr.detectChanges(); // Trigger change detection
69 |     if (this.monacoEditor?.editor) {
70 |       this.monacoEditor.editor.layout();
71 |     }
72 |   };
73 | 
74 |   /**
75 |    * Stops the resizing operation.
76 |    */
77 |   private readonly stopResize = () => {
78 |     this.isDragging = false;
79 |     document.removeEventListener('mousemove', this.resize);
80 |     document.removeEventListener('mouseup', this.stopResize);
81 |   };
82 | 
83 |   /**
84 |    * Change the language of the editor.
85 |    * @param language - The new language to set for the editor.
86 |    */
87 |   changeLanguage(language: string | undefined): void {
88 |     if (language === undefined) return;
89 |     this.selectedLanguage = language;
90 |     this.editorOptions = {
91 |       ...this.editorOptions,
92 |       language: this.selectedLanguage,
93 |     };
94 |   }
95 | 
96 |   /**
97 |    * Emit the new code to the parent component (student-workspace) when the code is changed.
98 |    * @param code - The updated code from the editor.
99 |    */
100 |   changeCode(code: string): void {
101 |     this.codeChange.emit(code);
102 |   }
103 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/sites/video-time-stamp/video-time-stamp.component.ts
```
1 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
2 | import { ElementRef, OnInit, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { Component, Inject, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA } from '@angular/material/dialog';
5 | import { WorkspaceStateService } from '../../services/workspace-state.service'; // Import WorkspaceStateService
6 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
7 | 
8 | @Component({
9 |   selector: 'app-video-time-stamp',
10 |   templateUrl: './video-time-stamp.component.html',
11 |   styleUrls: ['./video-time-stamp.component.scss'],
12 | })
13 | export class VideoTimeStampComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
14 |   videoUrl: string = '';
15 |   videoLoading: boolean = false;
16 |   startTime: number = 0;
17 |   title: string = '';
18 |   private lastLoggedTime: number = 0;
19 |   private readonly logIntervalSeconds: number = 5;
20 |   private readonly apiUrl = `${environment.server}/event-log`;
21 |   @ViewChild('videoPlayer') videoPlayer!: ElementRef;
22 | 
23 |   constructor(
24 |     @Inject(MAT_DIALOG_DATA) public data: { href: string },
25 |     private readonly httpClient: HttpClient,
26 |     private readonly workspaceState: WorkspaceStateService, // Inject WorkspaceStateService
27 |   ) {}
28 | 
29 |   ngOnInit(): void {
30 |     const params = this.parseHref(this.data.href);
31 |     const fileName = params['fileName'];
32 |     const timeStamp = params['timeStamp'];
33 |     this.title = `Video: ${fileName} - Start: ${timeStamp.substring(0, 8)}`;
34 | 
35 |     if (fileName) {
36 |       this.videoFromName(fileName);
37 |     }
38 |     if (timeStamp) {
39 |       this.startTime = this.parseTimeStamp(timeStamp);
40 |     }
41 |   }
42 | 
43 |   /**
44 |    * Parses the provided href string to extract query parameters.
45 |    * @param href The full URL string from which to extract query parameters.
46 |    * @returns An object containing the query parameters as key-value pairs.
47 |    */
48 |   private parseHref(href: string): Record<string, string> {
49 |     const query = href.split('?')[1];
50 |     return query.split('&').reduce(
51 |       (params, param) => {
52 |         const [key, value] = param.split('=');
53 |         params[key] = decodeURIComponent(value);
54 |         return params;
55 |       },
56 |       {} as Record<string, string>,
57 |     );
58 |   }
59 | 
60 |   /**
61 |    * Converts a timestamp string into seconds.
62 |    * @param timeStamp The timestamp string in the format "HH:MM:SS,SSS".
63 |    * @returns The time in seconds.
64 |    */
65 |   private parseTimeStamp(timeStamp: string): number {
66 |     const [hours, minutes, seconds] = timeStamp.split(',')[0].split(':').map(Number);
67 |     return hours * 3600 + minutes * 60 + seconds;
68 |   }
69 | 
70 |   /**
71 |    * Sets the videoUrl for video playback based on the provided name.
72 |    * @param name The name of the video file.
73 |    */
74 |   private videoFromName(name: string): void {
75 |     this.videoLoading = true;
76 |     this.videoUrl = `${environment.server}/files/download/VideoByName/${name}.mp4`;
77 |   }
78 | 
79 |   /**
80 |    * Logs video player events to a backend service.
81 |    * @param action The action performed (e.g., "play", "pause").
82 |    * @param currentTime The current playback time in seconds (optional).
83 |    */
84 |   logEvent(action: string, currentTime?: number): void {
85 |     const message =
86 |       currentTime !== undefined
87 |         ? `${action} video: ${this.title} at ${currentTime.toFixed(2)} seconds`
88 |         : `${action} video: ${this.title}`;
89 |     const currentFeedbackId = this.workspaceState.getCurrentFeedbackId(); // Get feedback ID
90 |     const logData = {
91 |       level: 'info',
92 |       type: 'tutor-kai/videoplayer',
93 |       message,
94 |       data: {
95 |         name: this.title,
96 |         action,
97 |         time: currentTime?.toFixed(2),
98 |         videoUrl: this.videoUrl,
99 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
100 |         feedbackId: currentFeedbackId, // Add feedback ID to data payload
101 |       },
102 |     };
103 | 
104 |     this.httpClient.post(this.apiUrl, logData).subscribe({
105 |       error: error => console.error('Error logging video event:', error),
106 |     });
107 |   }
108 | 
109 |   /**
110 |    * Tracks video progress and logs watching events at defined intervals.
111 |    * @param event The video playback event containing the current time.
112 |    */
113 |   trackVideoProgress(event: any): void {
114 |     const currentTime = event.target.currentTime;
115 |     const timeSinceLastLog = currentTime - this.lastLoggedTime;
116 | 
117 |     // log every 2 seconds
118 |     if (timeSinceLastLog >= this.logIntervalSeconds || Math.abs(timeSinceLastLog) > 2) {
119 |       this.logEvent('watching', currentTime);
120 |       this.lastLoggedTime = currentTime;
121 |     }
122 |   }
123 | 
124 |   // preventing Premature close conncetion error by closing the modal while video is loading
125 |   ngOnDestroy() {
126 |     this.stopAndResetVideo();
127 |   }
128 | 
129 |   private stopAndResetVideo() {
130 |     if (this.videoPlayer?.nativeElement) {
131 |       this.videoPlayer.nativeElement.pause();
132 |       this.videoPlayer.nativeElement.src = '';
133 |       this.videoPlayer.nativeElement.load();
134 |     }
135 |     this.videoUrl = '';
136 |   }
137 | }
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor.component.html
```
1 | <div #editorContainer class="editor-container">
2 |   <button mat-mini-fab class="download-button" (click)="onSavePicture()">
3 |     <mat-icon>download</mat-icon>
4 |   </button>
5 | 
6 |   <div *ngIf="mode === 'create'">
7 |     <div #widthReference style="position: absolute; width: 100%"></div>
8 | 
9 |     <div
10 |       class="add-container"
11 |       [ngClass]="{ 'connection-0-mode': activeConnectionMode }"
12 |       [ngClass]="{ 'connection-1-mode': nodesToConnect.length == 1 }"
13 |       [style.width]="(editorContainer.offsetWidth / widthReference.offsetWidth) * 100 + '%'"
14 |       [attr.data-content]="addContainerText"
15 |     >
16 |       <div class="add-container-content interactable">
17 |         <div class="item-box">
18 |           <div
19 |             *ngFor="let node of selectableNodes"
20 |             class="item-node"
21 |             cdkDropList
22 |             (cdkDropListDropped)="drop($event, node)"
23 |           >
24 |             <app-editor-node
25 |               [ngClass]="{ 'disable-interaction': activeConnectionMode }"
26 |               [ngStyle]="{ cursor: activeConnectionMode ? 'crosshair' : 'default' }"
27 |               cdkDrag
28 |               matTooltipShowDelay="1000"
29 |               matTooltip="{{ node.title }} - {{ node.description }}"
30 |               [elementData]="{
31 |                 identification: '',
32 |                 type: node.element,
33 |                 id: 'dummy-uuid-v1-lol',
34 |                 position: { x: 0, y: 0 },
35 |                 width: 0,
36 |                 height: 0,
37 |                 title: node.title,
38 |                 attributes: [],
39 |                 methods: [],
40 |               }"
41 |             >
42 |             </app-editor-node>
43 |           </div>
44 |         </div>
45 | 
46 |         <div class="item-box" style="display: flex; gap: 10px">
47 |           <div
48 |             *ngFor="let edge of selectableEdges"
49 |             style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center"
50 |           >
51 |             <mat-card
52 |               class="item-edge"
53 |               [ngClass]="{ 'active-edge': edge.element === activeEdge }"
54 |               (click)="onConnectionMode(edge.element)"
55 |               matTooltip="{{ edge.title }} - {{ edge.description }}"
56 |               matTooltipShowDelay="1000"
57 |             >
58 |               <svg width="100" height="50" [innerHTML]="getSvgForEdgeType(edge.element)"></svg>
59 |             </mat-card>
60 |           </div>
61 |         </div>
62 |       </div>
63 |     </div>
64 |     <div [style.height.px]="editorContainer.offsetHeight / 10"></div>
65 |   </div>
66 | 
67 |   <div
68 |     [ngClass]="mode === 'create' ? 'workspace-container' : 'workspace-container-highlight'"
69 |     (wheel)="zoomEditor(scrollContainer, $event)"
70 |   >
71 |     <div
72 |       #scrollContainer
73 |       (mousedown)="dragStart(scrollContainer, $event)"
74 |       (mousemove)="dragMove(scrollContainer, $event)"
75 |       (mouseup)="dragEnd($event)"
76 |       class="scroll-container"
77 |     >
78 |       <!-- editorField -->
79 |       <div #editorField class="editor-field" style="user-select: none">
80 |         <div
81 |           #domNode
82 |           *ngFor="let node of nodes"
83 |           [attr.id]="'node_' + node.id"
84 |           class="node-container"
85 |           cdkDrag
86 |           [cdkDragBoundary]="'.editor-field'"
87 |           [cdkDragFreeDragPosition]="node.position"
88 |           (cdkDragStarted)="onCdkDragStart($event, node)"
89 |           (cdkDragMoved)="onCdkDragMove($event, node); nodeClickDisabled = true"
90 |           (cdkDragEnded)="setNodePosition(node.id)"
91 |         >
92 |           <app-editor-node
93 |             [model]="testElement.title"
94 |             [elementData]="node"
95 |             (click)="mode === 'create' ? onNodeClick($event, node) : ''"
96 |             [backgroundColor]="node.id === activeNode ? '#D3D3D3' : 'white'"
97 |           >
98 |           </app-editor-node>
99 |         </div>
100 | 
101 |         <app-editor-edge-new
102 |           *ngFor="let edge of edges"
103 |           [attr.id]="'edge_' + edge.id"
104 |           [startElem]="'node_' + edge.start"
105 |           [endElem]="'node_' + edge.end"
106 |           [viewportElem]="editorField"
107 |           [edgeData]="edge"
108 |           [draggable]="mode === 'create'"
109 |           (edgeClicked)="onEdgeClick(edge)"
110 |           (edgeUpdated)="onEdgeUpdate(edge, $event)"
111 |         >
112 |         </app-editor-edge-new>
113 |       </div>
114 |     </div>
115 |   </div>
116 |   <div class="zoom-level" [class.fade-out]="fadeOut">{{ zoomLevel * 100 | number: '1.2-2' }}%</div>
117 | </div>
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor.component.scss
```
1 | @use '../../umlearntheme.scss' as theme;
2 | @use '@angular/material' as mat;
3 | 
4 | .editor-container {
5 |   width: 100%;
6 |   height: 100%;
7 |   position: relative;
8 |   display: flex;
9 |   flex-direction: column;
10 |   justify-content: flex-start;
11 |   align-items: stretch;
12 |   gap: 15px;
13 | }
14 | 
15 | .download-button {
16 |   left: 40px;
17 |   bottom: 50px;
18 |   position: absolute;
19 |   z-index: 1;
20 | }
21 | 
22 | .interactable {
23 |   pointer-events: auto;
24 | }
25 | 
26 | .active-edge {
27 |   background-color: #3f51b5; // Hardcoded indigo color instead of using variable
28 |   transition: background-color 0.5s;
29 | }
30 | .disable-interaction {
31 |   pointer-events: none;
32 |   background-color: grey;
33 |   opacity: 0.5;
34 | }
35 | 
36 | .add-container {
37 |   position: absolute;
38 |   height: 10%;
39 |   z-index: 1000;
40 |   border-radius: 15px;
41 |   overflow: hidden;
42 |   background-color: #fcfcfc;
43 |   transition: height 0.3s;
44 |   outline: 1px solid #ccc;
45 | }
46 | 
47 | .add-container::before {
48 |   content: attr(data-content);
49 |   pointer-events: none;
50 |   position: absolute;
51 |   top: 50%;
52 |   left: 50%;
53 |   transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
54 |   z-index: 1;
55 |   color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
56 |   font-size: 24px;
57 |   opacity: 1;
58 |   transition: opacity 0.1s;
59 |   border: 2px solid black;
60 |   font-weight: bold;
61 |   background-color: #fcfcfc;
62 |   border-radius: 10px;
63 |   padding: 10px;
64 | }
65 | 
66 | .add-container:hover::before {
67 |   opacity: 0;
68 | }
69 | 
70 | .add-container.connection-0-mode::before {
71 |   content: 'Wähle dein Startelement';
72 |   border: 2px solid black;
73 |   font-weight: bold;
74 |   border-radius: 10px;
75 |   padding: 10px;
76 | }
77 | 
78 | .add-container.connection-1-mode::before {
79 |   content: 'Wähle dein Zielelement';
80 |   border: 2px solid black;
81 |   font-weight: bold;
82 |   border-radius: 10px;
83 |   padding: 10px;
84 | }
85 | 
86 | .add-container:hover {
87 |   height: 30%;
88 |   overflow: hidden;
89 | }
90 | 
91 | .add-container-content {
92 |   display: flex;
93 |   flex-direction: row;
94 |   flex-wrap: nowrap;
95 |   justify-content: flex-start;
96 |   align-items: center;
97 |   filter: blur(3px);
98 |   transition: filter 0.3s;
99 |   height: 100%;
100 | }
101 | 
102 | .add-container:hover .add-container-content {
103 |   filter: blur(0);
104 | }
105 | 
106 | .workspace-container {
107 |   top: 200px;
108 |   height: calc(90% - 15px);
109 |   width: calc(100%);
110 |   padding: 20px;
111 |   border-radius: 15px;
112 |   outline: 1px solid #ccc;
113 |   overflow: hidden;
114 | }
115 | 
116 | .scroll-container {
117 |   width: 100%;
118 |   height: 100%;
119 |   overflow: auto;
120 |   position: relative;
121 | }
122 | 
123 | .workspace-container-highlight {
124 |   height: calc(100% - 40px);
125 |   width: calc(100% - 40px);
126 |   padding: 20px;
127 |   border-radius: 15px;
128 | }
129 | 
130 | .editor-field {
131 |   width: 5000px;
132 |   height: 5000px;
133 |   position: relative;
134 |   display: flex;
135 |   background-color: #f5f5f5;
136 |   outline: 1px solid #ccc;
137 |   transform-origin: center;
138 |   will-change: transform;
139 |   backface-visibility: hidden;
140 |   -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
141 |   -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
142 |   margin: 0;
143 |   padding: 0;
144 |   min-width: 100%;
145 |   min-height: 100%;
146 | }
147 | 
148 | .node-container {
149 |   position: absolute;
150 |   z-index: 101;
151 | }
152 | 
153 | .cdk-drag {
154 |   cursor: grab;
155 | }
156 | 
157 | .example-box {
158 |   width: 100px;
159 |   height: 100px;
160 |   border: solid 1px #ccc;
161 |   color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.87);
162 |   cursor: move;
163 |   display: flex;
164 |   justify-content: center;
165 |   align-items: center;
166 |   text-align: center;
167 |   background: #fff;
168 |   border-radius: 4px;
169 |   position: absolute;
170 |   transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);
171 |   box-shadow:
172 |     0 3px 1px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
173 |     0 2px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
174 |     0 1px 5px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
175 | }
176 | 
177 | .example-box:active {
178 |   box-shadow:
179 |     0 5px 5px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
180 |     0 8px 10px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
181 |     0 3px 14px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
182 | }
183 | 
184 | .example-line {
185 |   width: 500px;
186 |   height: 10px;
187 |   background-color: black;
188 |   margin: 0 auto;
189 | }
190 | 
191 | mat-tooltip-component {
192 |   pointer-events: none;
193 | }
194 | 
195 | .item-box {
196 |   display: flex;
197 |   flex-direction: column;
198 |   flex-wrap: wrap;
199 |   align-items: center;
200 |   margin: 10px;
201 |   border: 1px solid black;
202 |   border-radius: 10px;
203 |   background-color: rgb(211, 207, 207);
204 |   position: relative;
205 |   justify-content: flex-start;
206 |   overflow-y: hidden;
207 |   overflow-x: auto;
208 |   height: 70%;
209 |   width: 50%;
210 |   padding: 20px;
211 | }
212 | 
213 | .item-edge {
214 |   width: 100px;
215 |   height: 50px;
216 |   border: solid 1px #090000;
217 |   border-radius: 5px;
218 | }
219 | 
220 | .item-edge:hover {
221 |   transform: scale(1.1);
222 |   transition: transform 0.1s ease-in-out;
223 | }
224 | 
225 | .item-node {
226 |   transform: scale(0.65);
227 |   display: flex;
228 |   justify-content: center;
229 |   margin-top: -50px;
230 | }
231 | 
232 | .item-node:hover {
233 |   transform: scale(0.7);
234 |   transition: transform 0.1s ease-in-out;
235 | }
236 | 
237 | .zoom-level {
238 |   position: absolute;
239 |   bottom: 50px;
240 |   right: 50px;
241 |   transition: opacity 1s;
242 | }
243 | .fade-out {
244 |   opacity: 0;
245 | }
246 | 
247 | .crosshair {
248 |   cursor: crosshair;
249 | }
250 | 
251 | .default {
252 |   cursor: default;
253 | }
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor.component.ts
```
1 | import { ElementRef, OnDestroy, AfterViewInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, EventEmitter, HostListener, Input, Output, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { ClassEdge, ClassNode, Side, editorDataDTO, editorElementDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
4 | import {
5 |   EditorElement,
6 |   EditorElementType,
7 |   EditorModel,
8 |   dataType,
9 |   visibilityType,
10 | } from '@DTOs/index';
11 | import { MatDialog, MatDialogConfig } from '@angular/material/dialog';
12 | 
13 | import { EditorEdgeService } from '@UMLearnServices/editor-edge.service';
14 | import { CdkDrag, CdkDragDrop, CdkDragMove, CdkDragStart } from '@angular/cdk/drag-drop';
15 | import { moveItemInArray } from '@angular/cdk/drag-drop';
16 | import { NotificationService } from '@UMLearnServices/notification.service';
17 | import { v1 as uuidv1 } from 'uuid';
18 | import { EditorPopupComponent } from './editor-popup/editor-popup.component';
19 | import { DomSanitizer, SafeHtml } from '@angular/platform-browser';
20 | import * as htmlToImage from 'html-to-image';
21 | import { Subscription } from 'rxjs/internal/Subscription';
22 | 
23 | @Component({
24 |   selector: 'app-editor',
25 |   templateUrl: './editor.component.html',
26 |   styleUrls: ['./editor.component.scss'],
27 | })
28 | export class EditorComponent implements OnDestroy, AfterViewInit {
29 |   private readonly subscriptions: Subscription[] = []; // Array to store subscriptions to unsubscribe later
30 | 
31 |   @Input() mode: string = 'create';
32 |   @Input() selectableNodes: editorElementDTO[] = [];
33 |   @Input() selectableEdges: editorElementDTO[] = [];
34 |   @Input() nodes: ClassNode[] = [];
35 |   @Input() edges: ClassEdge[] = [];
36 |   @Input() syncedValue: string = 'Child Initial Wert';
37 |   @Input() addContainerText: string = 'Elemente hinzufügen';
38 | 
39 |   @Output() nodeSelected = new EventEmitter<editorElementDTO>();
40 |   @Output() edgeSelected = new EventEmitter<editorElementDTO>();
41 |   @Output() nodeAdded = new EventEmitter<ClassNode>();
42 |   @Output() nodeRemoved = new EventEmitter<ClassNode>();
43 |   @Output() edgeAdded = new EventEmitter<ClassEdge>();
44 |   @Output() edgeRemoved = new EventEmitter<ClassEdge>();
45 |   @Output() activeConnectionModeChange = new EventEmitter<boolean>();
46 |   @Output() syncedValueChange: EventEmitter<string> = new EventEmitter<string>();
47 | 
48 |   @ViewChild('editorField') editorField!: ElementRef;
49 |   @ViewChild('scrollContainer') scrollContainer!: ElementRef;
50 | 
51 |   nodeClickDisabled: boolean = false;
52 |   activeConnectionMode: boolean = false;
53 |   nodesToConnect: ClassNode[] = [];
54 |   activeEdge: EditorElement | null = null;
55 |   activeNode: EditorElement | null = null;
56 |   dataType = dataType;
57 |   visibilityType = visibilityType;
58 |   connectionEdge: EditorElement = EditorElement.CD_ASSOCIATION;
59 |   nodeElements: string[] = [];
60 |   mousePosition = { x: 0, y: 0 };
61 |   relativePosition: { x: number; y: number } | undefined;
62 |   nodePositionOnMove = { x: 0, y: 0 };
63 |   zoomLevel: number = 1;
64 |   fadeOut = true;
65 |   dragging = false;
66 |   startX = 0;
67 |   startY = 0;
68 | 
69 |   testElement: editorElementDTO = {
70 |     id: 0,
71 |     element: EditorElement.CD_CLASS,
72 |     elementType: EditorElementType.NODE,
73 |     editorModelId: 0,
74 |     title: 'Klasse',
75 |     description: 'Eine Klasse ist eine abstrakte Darstellung eines Objekts.',
76 |     data: 'gar nix',
77 |   };
78 | 
79 |   color: string = 'red';
80 |   editorModel: string = EditorModel.CLASSDIAGRAM;
81 |   refTable: { [keyId: number]: ElementRef } = {};
82 | 
83 |   constructor(
84 |     private readonly dialog: MatDialog,
85 |     private readonly edgeService: EditorEdgeService,
86 |     private readonly notification: NotificationService,
87 |     private readonly sanitizer: DomSanitizer,
88 |     private readonly el: ElementRef,
89 |   ) {}
90 | 
91 |   /**
92 |    * Lifecycle hook that is called after Angular has fully initialized the component's view.
93 |    * It is called only once after the first ngAfterContentChecked.
94 |    */
95 |   ngAfterViewInit() {
96 |     const itemBoxes = this.el.nativeElement.querySelectorAll('.item-box');
97 |     itemBoxes.forEach(
98 |       (itemBox: {
99 |         addEventListener: (
100 |           arg0: string,
101 |           arg1: (event: WheelEvent) => void,
102 |           arg2: { passive: boolean },
103 |         ) => void;
104 |         scrollLeft: number;
105 |       }) => {
106 |         itemBox.addEventListener(
107 |           'wheel',
108 |           (event: WheelEvent) => {
109 |             event.preventDefault();
110 |             itemBox.scrollLeft += event.deltaY;
111 |           },
112 |           { passive: false },
113 |         );
114 |       },
115 |     );
116 |   }
117 | 
118 |   /**
119 |    * Zooms the editor by adjusting the zoom level based on the wheel event.
120 |    * @param scrollContainer - The HTML element that contains the editor.
121 |    * @param event - The wheel event that triggered the zoom.
122 |    */
123 |   zoomEditor(scrollContainer: HTMLElement, event: WheelEvent) {
124 |     event.preventDefault();
125 | 
126 |     // Get container's viewport dimensions
127 |     const containerRect = scrollContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
128 | 
129 |     // Calculate mouse position relative to the container's viewport
130 |     const viewportX = event.clientX - containerRect.left;
131 |     const viewportY = event.clientY - containerRect.top;
132 | 
133 |     // Calculate the point in the content space (before zoom)
134 |     const contentX = (scrollContainer.scrollLeft + viewportX) / this.zoomLevel;
135 |     const contentY = (scrollContainer.scrollTop + viewportY) / this.zoomLevel;
136 | 
137 |     // Store old zoom for ratio calculation
138 |     const oldZoom = this.zoomLevel;
139 | 
140 |     // Update zoom level
141 |     if (event.deltaY < 0) {
142 |       this.zoomLevel = Math.min(this.zoomLevel + 0.1, 10);
143 |     } else {
144 |       this.zoomLevel = Math.max(this.zoomLevel - 0.1, 0.1);
145 |     }
146 | 
147 |     // Calculate the zoom ratio for smooth transitions
148 |     const zoomRatio = this.zoomLevel / oldZoom;
149 | 
150 |     // Apply zoom transform with high-performance settings
151 |     requestAnimationFrame(() => {
152 |       this.editorField.nativeElement.style.transformOrigin = '0 0';
153 |       this.editorField.nativeElement.style.transform = `scale3d(${this.zoomLevel}, ${this.zoomLevel}, 1)`;
154 |     });
155 | 
156 |     // Calculate new scroll position to keep the mouse point fixed
157 |     const newScrollLeft = contentX * this.zoomLevel - viewportX;
158 |     const newScrollTop = contentY * this.zoomLevel - viewportY;
159 | 
160 |     // Apply new scroll position
161 |     scrollContainer.scrollLeft = newScrollLeft;
162 |     scrollContainer.scrollTop = newScrollTop;
163 | 
164 |     // Update zoom level display
165 |     this.fadeOut = false;
166 |     setTimeout(() => (this.fadeOut = true), 2000);
167 | 
168 |     // Ensure edges are properly positioned after zoom
169 |     this.edgeService.positionAll();
170 |   }
171 | 
172 |   /**
173 |    * Handles the drag start event.
174 |    *
175 |    * @param scrollContainer - The scroll container element.
176 |    * @param event - The mouse event.
177 |    */
178 |   dragStart(scrollContainer: HTMLElement, event: MouseEvent) {
179 |     if (
180 |       (event.target as HTMLElement).classList.contains('editor-field') ||
181 |       event.target === scrollContainer
182 |     ) {
183 |       this.dragging = true;
184 |       this.startX = event.clientX;
185 |       this.startY = event.clientY;
186 |     }
187 |   }
188 | 
189 |   /**
190 |    * Moves the scroll container based on the drag movement.
191 |    *
192 |    * @param scrollContainer - The HTML element representing the scroll container.
193 |    * @param event - The mouse event that triggered the drag movement.
194 |    */
195 |   dragMove(scrollContainer: HTMLElement, event: MouseEvent) {
196 |     if (!this.dragging) {
197 |       return;
198 |     }
199 |     const dx = event.clientX - this.startX;
200 |     const dy = event.clientY - this.startY;
201 |     scrollContainer.scrollLeft -= dx;
202 |     scrollContainer.scrollTop -= dy;
203 |     this.startX = event.clientX;
204 |     this.startY = event.clientY;
205 |   }
206 | 
207 |   /**
208 |    * Handles the drag end event.
209 |    *
210 |    * @param {MouseEvent} event - The mouse event object.
211 |    * @returns {void}
212 |    */
213 |   @HostListener('document:mouseup', ['$event'])
214 |   dragEnd(event: MouseEvent) {
215 |     this.dragging = false;
216 |     setTimeout(() => {
217 |       this.nodeClickDisabled = false;
218 |     }, 0);
219 |   }
220 | 
221 |   /**
222 |    * Scrolls the element to the right by a specified amount.
223 |    *
224 |    * @param {HTMLElement} element - The HTML element to scroll.
225 |    */
226 |   onScrollRight(element: HTMLElement) {
227 |     element.scrollLeft += 100;
228 |   }
229 | 
230 |   /**
231 |    * Retrieves the SVG string representation for a given edge type.
232 |    *
233 |    * @param edgeType - The type of the editor element.
234 |    * @returns The SVG string representation of the edge type.
235 |    */
236 |   getSvgForEdgeType(edgeType: EditorElement): SafeHtml {
237 |     let svgString: string;
238 |     switch (edgeType) {
239 |       case EditorElement.CD_ASSOCIATION:
240 |         svgString =
241 |           '<svg width="100" height="50"><line x1="10" y1="25" x2="90" y2="25" stroke="black" stroke-width="3"/></svg>';
242 |         break;
243 |       case EditorElement.CD_BIDIRECTIONAL_ASSOCIATION:
244 |         svgString =
245 |           '<svg width="100" height="50"><line x1="20" y1="35" x2="10" y2="25" stroke="black" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="20" y1="15" x2="10" y2="25" stroke="black" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="80" y1="15" x2="90" y2="25" stroke="black" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="80" y1="35" x2="90" y2="25" stroke="black" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="10" y1="25" x2="90" y2="25" stroke="black" stroke-width="3"/></svg>';
246 |         break;
247 |       case EditorElement.CD_DIRECTIONAL_ASSOCIATION:
248 |         svgString =
249 |           '<svg width="100" height="50"><line x1="80" y1="15" x2="90" y2="25" stroke="black" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="80" y1="35" x2="90" y2="25" stroke="black" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="10" y1="25" x2="90" y2="25" stroke="black" stroke-width="3"/></svg></svg>';
250 |         break;
251 |       case EditorElement.CD_AGGREGATION:
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/notification/notification.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, ElementRef, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { NotificationService } from '@UMLearnServices/notification.service';
4 | import { INotification } from './notification.models';
5 | import { Subscription } from 'rxjs';
6 | import { trigger, transition, animate, style } from '@angular/animations';
7 | 
8 | @Component({
9 |   selector: 'app-notification',
10 |   templateUrl: './notification.component.html',
11 |   styleUrls: ['./notification.component.scss'],
12 |   animations: [
13 |     trigger('fadeInOut', [
14 |       transition(':enter', [style({ opacity: 0 }), animate('0.1s', style({ opacity: 1 }))]),
15 |       transition(':leave', [animate('0.1s', style({ opacity: 0 }))]),
16 |     ]),
17 |   ],
18 | })
19 | export class NotificationComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
20 |   private readonly subscription: Subscription = new Subscription();
21 |   notifications: INotification[] = [];
22 | 
23 |   constructor(private readonly service: NotificationService) {}
24 | 
25 |   /**
26 |    * When the component is initialized, subscribe to the notification service to get notified when a new notification is called
27 |    * Then, save the notification in the notifications array
28 |    * Also, if the notification has a duration (it should by default), remove it after the duration has passed
29 |    */
30 |   ngOnInit(): void {
31 |     this.subscription.add(
32 |       this.service.notification.subscribe(notification => {
33 |         if (notification.message) {
34 |           this.notifications.push(notification);
35 |           if (notification.duration > 0) {
36 |             setTimeout(() => {
37 |               const index = this.notifications.indexOf(notification);
38 |               this.notifications.splice(index, 1);
39 |             }, notification.duration);
40 |           }
41 |         }
42 |       }),
43 |     );
44 |   }
45 | 
46 |   /**
47 |    * When the component is destroyed, unsubscribe from the notification service to prevent memory leaks
48 |    */
49 |   ngOnDestroy(): void {
50 |     this.subscription.unsubscribe();
51 |   }
52 | }
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/notification/notification.models.ts
```
1 | export interface INotification {
2 |   message: string;
3 |   type: NotificationType;
4 |   duration: number;
5 | }
6 | 
7 | export enum NotificationType {
8 |   Success = 'success',
9 |   Warning = 'warning',
10 |   Error = 'error',
11 |   Info = 'info',
12 | }
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/task-creation/task-creation.component.html
```
1 | <div class="h-box">
2 |   <div
3 |     class="config-container mat-elevation-z8"
4 |     [ngClass]="{ 'grey-out': activeConnectionModeChange }"
5 |   >
6 |     <div class="scroll-container">
7 |       <div class="settings-container">
8 |         <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic" style="padding-top: 5px">
9 |           <mat-label>Name der Aufgabe</mat-label>
10 |           <input matInput [(ngModel)]="taskTitle" name="taskTitle" placeholder="Name der Aufgabe" />
11 |         </mat-form-field>
12 | 
13 |         <button mat-raised-button color="primary" style="min-height: 36px" (click)="openDialog()">
14 |           Beschreibung bearbeiten
15 |         </button>
16 | 
17 |         <app-tooltipp [isVisible]="true" [tooltipContent]="maxPointsTooltipp">
18 |           <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
19 |             <mat-label>max. Punkte</mat-label>
20 |             <input
21 |               matInput
22 |               type="number"
23 |               [(ngModel)]="maxPoints"
24 |               (ngModelChange)="onMaxPointsChange($event)"
25 |               name="maxPoints"
26 |               placeholder="max. Punkte"
27 |               [value]="calculateMaxPoints()"
28 |             />
29 |           </mat-form-field>
30 |         </app-tooltipp>
31 |         <div>
32 |           <mat-accordion>
33 |             <mat-expansion-panel>
34 |               <mat-expansion-panel-header>
35 |                 <app-tooltipp [isVisible]="true" [tooltipContent]="CheckBoxTooltipp">
36 |                   <mat-panel-title> Erlaubte Knoten </mat-panel-title>
37 |                 </app-tooltipp>
38 |               </mat-expansion-panel-header>
39 |               <div class="checkbox-item" *ngFor="let node of nodes; index as i">
40 |                 <mat-checkbox
41 |                   [checked]="checkboxStatesNode[node.id]"
42 |                   (click)="onClickCheckboxNode(node, $event)"
43 |                   >{{ node.title }}</mat-checkbox
44 |                 >
45 |               </div>
46 |             </mat-expansion-panel>
47 |             <mat-expansion-panel>
48 |               <mat-expansion-panel-header>
49 |                 <app-tooltipp [isVisible]="true" [tooltipContent]="CheckBoxTooltipp">
50 |                   <mat-panel-title> Erlaubte Kanten </mat-panel-title>
51 |                 </app-tooltipp>
52 |               </mat-expansion-panel-header>
53 |               <div class="checkbox-item" *ngFor="let edge of edges; index as i">
54 |                 <mat-checkbox
55 |                   [checked]="checkboxStatesEdge[edge.id]"
56 |                   (click)="onClickCheckboxEdge(edge, $event)"
57 |                   >{{ edge.title }}</mat-checkbox
58 |                 >
59 |               </div>
60 |             </mat-expansion-panel>
61 |           </mat-accordion>
62 |         </div>
63 |       </div>
64 |     </div>
65 |     <!-- End of scroll-container -->
66 |     <div class="button-container">
67 |       <button mat-raised-button color="accent" (click)="onCancel()">Abbrechen</button>
68 |       <button
69 |         mat-raised-button
70 |         color="primary"
71 |         (click)="onAccept(editor.getSaveData(), editor.takeSnapshot())"
72 |       >
73 |         Speichern
74 |       </button>
75 |       <button mat-raised-button color="warn" (click)="onDelete()">Aufgabe löschen</button>
76 |     </div>
77 |   </div>
78 |   <div class="task-container">
79 |     <app-editor
80 |       #editor
81 |       (activeConnectionModeChange)="activeConnectionModeChange = $event"
82 |       (edgeSelected)="onEdgeSelected($event)"
83 |       (nodeSelected)="onNodeSelected($event)"
84 |       [selectableNodes]="nodes"
85 |       [selectableEdges]="edges"
86 |       (nodeRemoved)="onNodeRemoved($event)"
87 |       (edgeRemoved)="onEdgeRemoved($event)"
88 |       [nodes]="editorData.nodes"
89 |       [edges]="editorData.edges"
90 |     ></app-editor>
91 |   </div>
92 | </div>
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/task-creation/task-creation.component.scss
```
1 | .h-box {
2 |   width: 100%;
3 |   height: 100%;
4 |   display: flex;
5 |   flex-direction: row;
6 |   gap: 15px;
7 |   transition: background-color 0.5s ease;
8 | }
9 | 
10 | .config-container {
11 |   width: 20%;
12 |   height: calc(100% - 40px);
13 |   gap: 15px;
14 |   display: flex;
15 |   flex-direction: column;
16 |   align-items: center;
17 |   align-content: center !important;
18 |   border-radius: 15px;
19 |   transition: background-color 0.5s ease;
20 |   justify-content: space-between;
21 |   padding: 20px;
22 |   flex-shrink: 0;
23 | }
24 | 
25 | .scroll-container {
26 |   width: calc(100% - 2px); // 2px bug fix
27 |   height: 100%;
28 |   overflow: auto;
29 |   display: flex;
30 | }
31 | 
32 | .settings-container {
33 |   flex: 1;
34 |   display: flex;
35 |   flex-direction: column;
36 |   justify-content: flex-start;
37 |   gap: 15px;
38 |   flex-shrink: 0;
39 | }
40 | 
41 | .task-container {
42 |   width: calc(80% - 55px); // 55px = 20% of config-container + 15px gap + 20px padding
43 |   height: 100%;
44 | }
45 | 
46 | .checkbox-container {
47 |   flex-grow: 1;
48 |   overflow-y: auto;
49 | }
50 | 
51 | .mat-checkbox:hover {
52 |   background-color: #f5f5f5;
53 | }
54 | 
55 | .checkbox-item {
56 |   margin-bottom: 10px;
57 | }
58 | 
59 | .grey-out {
60 |   background-color: grey;
61 |   opacity: 0.5;
62 |   pointer-events: none;
63 | }
64 | 
65 | .no-gray-out {
66 |   filter: none !important;
67 | }
68 | 
69 | .button-container {
70 |   width: 100%;
71 |   display: flex;
72 |   flex-direction: column;
73 |   gap: 10px;
74 | }
```
