src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/free-text-task/free-text-task.component.ts
```
1 | import { UserAnswerDataDTO, freeTextQuestionDTO } from '@DTOs/index';
2 | import { DialogRef } from '@angular/cdk/dialog';
3 | import { Component, Inject, EventEmitter, Output, Input } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA } from '@angular/material/dialog';
5 | import { QuestionDataService } from 'src/app/Services/question/question-data.service';
6 | import { Location } from '@angular/common';
7 | interface TaskViewData {
8 |   contentNodeId: number;
9 |   contentElementId: number;
10 |   id: number;
11 |   name: string;
12 |   type: string;
13 |   progress: number;
14 |   description?: string;
15 | }
16 | 
17 | @Component({
18 |   selector: 'app-free-text-task',
19 |   templateUrl: './free-text-task.component.html',
20 |   styleUrls: ['./free-text-task.component.scss'],
21 | })
22 | export class FreeTextTaskComponent {
23 |   @Output() submitClicked = new EventEmitter<any>();
24 |   @Input() conceptId!: number;
25 |   @Input() questionId!: number;
26 | 
27 |   editorConfig = {
28 |     //tinyMCE
29 |     readonly: false,
30 |     plugins: 'autoresize lists table link image code codesample',
31 |     toolbar:
32 |       'undo redo | bold italic | alignleft aligncenter alignright | numlist bullist | table | link image | code codesample',
33 |     min_height: 300,
34 |     max_height: 500,
35 |     resize: false,
36 |   };
37 | 
38 |   answerText: string = '';
39 |   feedbackText: string = '';
40 |   isSending: boolean = false;
41 | 
42 |   taskViewData: TaskViewData;
43 | 
44 |   freeTextQuestion: freeTextQuestionDTO = {
45 |     questionId: -1,
46 |     contentElementId: -1,
47 |     title: '',
48 |     text: '',
49 |     expectations: '',
50 |     maxPoints: 0,
51 |   };
52 | 
53 |   constructor(
54 |     public dialogRef: DialogRef,
55 |     @Inject(MAT_DIALOG_DATA) public data: any,
56 |     private readonly questionService: QuestionDataService,
57 |     private readonly location: Location,
58 |   ) {
59 |     this.taskViewData = data.taskViewData;
60 |     this.questionService.getFreeTextQuestion(this.taskViewData.id).subscribe(data => {
61 |       this.freeTextQuestion = data;
62 |       this.freeTextQuestion.contentElementId = this.taskViewData.contentElementId;
63 |     });
64 |     this.questionService.getNewestUserAnswer(this.taskViewData.id).subscribe(data => {
65 |       this.answerText = data.userFreetextAnswer || '';
66 |     });
67 |   }
68 | 
69 |   onSubmit(text: string, rawText: string) {
70 |     this.isSending = true;
71 |     this.answerText = text;
72 |     this.feedbackText = '';
73 |     //console.log(this.answerText);
74 |     const userAnswerData: UserAnswerDataDTO = {
75 |       id: -1,
76 |       questionId: this.freeTextQuestion.questionId,
77 |       contentElementId: this.freeTextQuestion.contentElementId,
78 |       userId: -1,
79 |       userFreetextAnswer: text,
80 |       userFreetextAnswerRaw: rawText,
81 |     };
82 |     this.questionService.createUserAnswer(userAnswerData).subscribe(data => {
83 |       console.log(data);
84 |       this.feedbackText = data.feedbackText.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
85 |       this.isSending = false;
86 |       this.submitClicked.emit(data.progress);
87 |     });
88 |   }
89 | 
90 |   private replaceNewLines(text: string) {
91 |     //replace all "\n" with "<br>"
92 |   }
93 | 
94 |   onClose(): void {
95 |     if (this.dialogRef) {
96 |       this.dialogRef.close();
97 |     }
98 |     if (this.conceptId && this.questionId) {
99 |       this.location.replaceState(`/dashboard/conceptOverview/${this.conceptId}`);
100 |     } else if (this.conceptId) {
101 |       this.location.replaceState(`/dashboard/conceptOverview`);
102 |     } else {
103 |       this.location.replaceState(`/dashboard`);
104 |     }
105 |   }
106 | }
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/mc-task-creation/mc-task-creation.component.html
```
1 | <div class="content mat-elevation-z8 container wrapper" style="margin: 0 auto; max-width: 90%">
2 |   <form [formGroup]="taskForm" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()" class="task-form">
3 |     <mat-horizontal-stepper #stepper="matHorizontalStepper">
4 |       <!-- Step 1-->
5 |       <mat-step [completed]="false" label="Step 1">
6 |         <mat-divider class="divider"></mat-divider>
7 |         <div class="step-content">
8 |           <div class="row">
9 |             <mat-form-field appearance="fill" class="conceptinput">
10 |               <mat-label>Concept</mat-label>
11 |               <input
12 |                 type="text"
13 |                 placeholder="Concepts"
14 |                 matInput
15 |                 formControlName="conceptName"
16 |                 [matAutocomplete]="auto"
17 |               />
18 |               <mat-autocomplete #auto="matAutocomplete">
19 |                 <mat-option *ngFor="let concept of filteredConcepts | async" [value]="concept">
20 |                   {{ concept }}
21 |                 </mat-option>
22 |               </mat-autocomplete>
23 |             </mat-form-field>
24 |             <mat-form-field appearance="fill" class="half-width-input">
25 |               <mat-label>Options</mat-label>
26 |               <input
27 |                 matInput
28 |                 type="number"
29 |                 placeholder="in Total"
30 |                 formControlName="numberOfOptions"
31 |                 value="4"
32 |                 max="6"
33 |               />
34 |             </mat-form-field>
35 |           </div>
36 |           <div class="buttonrow">
37 |             <button mat-raised-button color="warn" type="button" (click)="clearAllFields()">
38 |               Clear
39 |             </button>
40 |             <button mat-raised-button color="primary" type="button" matStepperNext>Next</button>
41 |           </div>
42 |         </div>
43 |       </mat-step>
44 |       <mat-step [completed]="false" label="Step 2">
45 |         <mat-divider class="divider"></mat-divider>
46 |         <div class="step-content">
47 |           <div class="row">
48 |             <mat-form-field class="full-width-input">
49 |               <textarea
50 |                 matInput
51 |                 cdkTextareaAutosize
52 |                 #autosize="cdkTextareaAutosize"
53 |                 cdkAutosizeMinRows="1"
54 |                 formControlName="text"
55 |                 [placeholder]="fetchingTitle ? 'Fetching...' : 'Title...'"
56 |                 formControlName="title"
57 |               >
58 |               </textarea>
59 |               <button
60 |                 type="button"
61 |                 *ngIf="!taskForm.get('title')?.value"
62 |                 matSuffix
63 |                 mat-icon-button
64 |                 aria-label="Clear"
65 |                 (click)="generateTitle()"
66 |               >
67 |                 <mat-icon> sync </mat-icon>
68 |               </button>
69 |               <button
70 |                 type="button"
71 |                 *ngIf="taskForm.get('title')?.value"
72 |                 matSuffix
73 |                 mat-icon-button
74 |                 aria-label="Clear"
75 |                 (click)="clearTitle()"
76 |                 type="button"
77 |               >
78 |                 <mat-icon>close</mat-icon>
79 |               </button>
80 |               <mat-error *ngIf="taskForm.controls['title'].invalid" align="start">
81 |                 Title is required
82 |               </mat-error>
83 |             </mat-form-field>
84 |             <!--<mat-checkbox> immediately generate options?</mat-checkbox>-->
85 |           </div>
86 |           <div class="buttonrow">
87 |             <button mat-raised-button color="warn" (onclick)="clearAllFields()" matStepperPrevious>
88 |               Back
89 |             </button>
90 |             <button
91 |               [disabled]="!titleAndNumberOfOptionsFilled()"
92 |               mat-raised-button
93 |               color="primary"
94 |               type="button"
95 |               matStepperNext
96 |               (click)="generate()"
97 |             >
98 |               Next
99 |             </button>
100 |           </div>
101 |         </div>
102 |       </mat-step>
103 |       <mat-step [completed]="false" label="Step 3">
104 |         <mat-divider class="divider"></mat-divider>
105 |         <div class="step-content3">
106 |           <!-- Loop through options with *ngFor -->
107 |           <div formArrayName="options" class="options-container">
108 |             <ng-container *ngFor="let option of getOptions().controls; let i = index">
109 |               <div class="option-pair" *ngIf="i % 2 === 0">
110 |                 <div class="option-group" [formGroupName]="i">
111 |                   <mat-form-field>
112 |                     <textarea
113 |                       class="textarea"
114 |                       matInput
115 |                       cdkTextareaAutosize
116 |                       #autosize="cdkTextareaAutosize"
117 |                       cdkAutosizeMinRows="1"
118 |                       formControlName="text"
119 |                       required="false"
120 |                       [placeholder]="fetchingStates[i] ? 'Fetching...' : placeholder + (i + 1)"
121 |                     >
122 |                     </textarea>
123 |                     <button
124 |                       *ngIf="getOptions().at(i).get('text')?.value"
125 |                       matSuffix
126 |                       mat-icon-button
127 |                       aria-label="Clear"
128 |                       type="button"
129 |                       (click)="clearOption(i)"
130 |                     >
131 |                       <mat-icon>close</mat-icon>
132 |                     </button>
133 |                     <mat-error *ngIf="taskForm.controls['options'].invalid" align="end">
134 |                       Option must be set
135 |                     </mat-error>
136 |                   </mat-form-field>
137 |                   <div class="buttons">
138 |                     <mat-checkbox formControlName="correct">Correct</mat-checkbox>
139 |                     <button
140 |                       mat-raised-button
141 |                       color="primary"
142 |                       type="button"
143 |                       (click)="generateOption(i)"
144 |                     >
145 |                       {{ getButtonLabel(i) }}
146 |                     </button>
147 |                   </div>
148 |                 </div>
149 | 
150 |                 <div *ngIf="getOptions().at(i + 1)" [formGroupName]="i + 1" class="option-group">
151 |                   <mat-form-field>
152 |                     <textarea
153 |                       class="textarea"
154 |                       matInput
155 |                       cdkTextareaAutosize
156 |                       #autosize="cdkTextareaAutosize"
157 |                       cdkAutosizeMinRows="1"
158 |                       formControlName="text"
159 |                       required="false"
160 |                       [placeholder]="fetchingStates[i + 1] ? 'Fetching...' : placeholder + (i + 2)"
161 |                     >
162 |                     </textarea>
163 |                     <button
164 |                       *ngIf="
165 |                         getOptions()
166 |                           .at(i + 1)
167 |                           .get('text')?.value
168 |                       "
169 |                       matSuffix
170 |                       mat-icon-button
171 |                       aria-label="Clear"
172 |                       (click)="clearOption(i + 1)"
173 |                       type="button"
174 |                     >
175 |                       <mat-icon>close</mat-icon>
176 |                     </button>
177 |                     <mat-error *ngIf="taskForm.controls['options'].invalid" align="end">
178 |                       Option must be set
179 |                     </mat-error>
180 |                   </mat-form-field>
181 |                   <div class="buttons">
182 |                     <mat-checkbox formControlName="correct">Correct</mat-checkbox>
183 |                     <button
184 |                       mat-raised-button
185 |                       color="primary"
186 |                       (click)="generateOption(i + 1)"
187 |                       type="button"
188 |                     >
189 |                       {{ getButtonLabel(i + 1) }}
190 |                     </button>
191 |                   </div>
192 |                 </div>
193 |               </div>
194 |             </ng-container>
195 |             <div class="buttonrow">
196 |               <button
197 |                 mat-raised-button
198 |                 color="warn"
199 |                 (onclick)="clearAllFields()"
200 |                 matStepperPrevious
201 |               >
202 |                 Back
203 |               </button>
204 |               <button mat-raised-button color="primary" type="button" matStepperNext type="submit">
205 |                 Submit
206 |               </button>
207 |               <mat-checkbox
208 |                 style="margin-right: 400px"
209 |                 (change)="onCheckboxChange($event)"
210 |                 [disabled]="mcDisabled"
211 |                 [checked]="getCorrectOptionsCount() >= 2"
212 |                 >Multiple Choice</mat-checkbox
213 |               >
214 |             </div>
215 |           </div>
216 |         </div>
217 |       </mat-step>
218 |     </mat-horizontal-stepper>
219 |   </form>
220 | </div>
```

1 | :host {
2 |   display: flex;
3 |   flex-direction: column;
4 | 
5 |   //padding-right: 450px;
6 |   //background-color: #cd3939;
7 | 
8 |   box-shadow: 0 0 0px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
9 |   width: 100%;
10 |   height: 100%;
11 | }

15 | }

18 |   width: 100%;
19 | 
20 |   .section {
21 |     margin-top: 10px;
22 |     display: flex;
23 |     //flex: ;
24 |     justify-content: flex-start;
25 |     // flex-direction: row;
26 |     align-items: center;
27 |     gap: 185px;
28 |

31 |     }
