src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/mc-task-creation/mc-task-creation.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit, Component, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { AbstractControl, FormGroup, Validators, FormArray, FormControl } from '@angular/forms';
3 | import { QuestionDataService } from 'src/app/Services/question/question-data.service';
4 | import {
5 |   McQuestionDTO,
6 |   QuestionDTO,
7 |   QuestionVersionDTO,
8 |   MCOptionDTO,
9 |   McqGenerationDTO,
10 |   OptionDTO,
11 | } from '@DTOs/question.dto';
12 | import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
13 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
14 | import { of, switchMap, startWith, map, max } from 'rxjs';
15 | import { McQuestionOptionDTO } from '@DTOs/question.dto';
16 | import { CdkTextareaAutosize } from '@angular/cdk/text-field';
17 | import { MCScoreComponent } from './score/score.component';
18 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
19 | import { MCDescriptionDialogComponent } from './description-dialog/description-dialog.component';
20 | import { McqcreationService } from 'src/app/Services/mcqCreation/mcqcreation.service';
21 | import { MatCheckboxChange } from '@angular/material/checkbox';
22 | import { ContentService } from 'src/app/Services/content/content.service';
23 | import {
24 |   Answer,
25 |   McqEvaluation,
26 |   McqEvaluations,
27 | } from 'src/app/Services/mcqCreation/mcqcreation.types';
28 | 
29 | @Component({
30 |   selector: 'app-mc-task-creation',
31 |   templateUrl: './mc-task-creation.component.html',
32 |   styleUrls: ['./mc-task-creation.component.scss'],
33 | })
34 | export class McTaskCreationComponent implements OnInit {
35 |   editorConfig = {
36 |     readonly: false,
37 |     plugins: 'autoresize lists table link image code codesample',
38 |     toolbar: false,
39 |     min_height: 100,
40 |     max_height: 500,
41 |     min_width: 300,
42 |     max_width: 500,
43 |     resize: false,
44 |   };
45 |   questions: QuestionDTO[] = [];
46 |   taskForm: FormGroup;
47 |   placeholder: string = 'Option ';
48 |   disabled: boolean = true;
49 |   @ViewChild('autosize') autosize: CdkTextareaAutosize | undefined;
50 | 
51 |   questionData: QuestionDTO = {
52 |     id: -1,
53 |     name: '',
54 |     description: '',
55 |     author: 1,
56 |     score: 0,
57 |     type: '',
58 |     text: '',
59 |   } as QuestionDTO;
60 |   versionData: QuestionVersionDTO = {
61 |     id: 1,
62 |     version: 1,
63 |     isApproved: false,
64 |     successor: null,
65 |   } as QuestionVersionDTO;
66 | 
67 |   mcQuestion: McQuestionDTO = {
68 |     id: -1,
69 |     questionId: -1,
70 |     questionVersion: this.versionData,
71 |     isSC: false,
72 |     shuffleOptions: false,
73 |     mcQuestionOption: [],
74 |   };
75 | 
76 |   mcQuestionOption: McQuestionOptionDTO = {} as McQuestionOptionDTO;
77 | 
78 |   questionId: number = 1;
79 |   isSC: string | undefined;
80 |   mcOptions: MCOptionDTO[] = [] as MCOptionDTO[];
81 | 
82 |   autogeneratedAnswers$?: Observable<McqGenerationDTO>;
83 |   autogeneratedQuestionAndAnswers$?: Observable<McqGenerationDTO>;
84 |   reevaluatedQuestionAndAnswers$!: Observable<{ mcq: McqGenerationDTO; reasoning: string }[]>;
85 |   evaluation$?: Observable<McqEvaluations>;
86 |   mcDisabled: boolean = false;
87 |   color: string = 'warn';
88 |   concepts: string[] = [];
89 |   conceptControl = new FormControl();
90 |   filteredConcepts: Observable<string[]> | undefined;
91 |   setScore: boolean = false;
92 |   fetchingTitle: boolean = false;
93 |   fetchingStates: boolean[] = [false, false, false, false, false, false];
94 |   Questiontitle: string = '';
95 |   immediateGeneration: boolean = false;
96 | 
97 |   constructor(
98 |     private readonly questionService: QuestionDataService,
99 |     private readonly dialog: MatDialog,
100 |     private readonly _snackBar: MatSnackBar,
101 |     private readonly mcqService: McqcreationService,
102 |     private readonly contentService: ContentService,
103 |   ) {
104 |     this.taskForm = new FormGroup({
105 |       title: new FormControl(null, Validators.required),
106 |       numberOfOptions: new FormControl(4, [Validators.required]),
107 |       description: new FormControl(null),
108 |       score: new FormControl(null, Validators.required),
109 |       type: new FormControl('', Validators.required),
110 |       options: new FormArray([], [Validators.required, Validators.min(2)]),
111 |       conceptName: new FormControl('', Validators.required),
112 |     });
113 |   }
114 | 
115 |   ngOnInit(): void {
116 |     this.updateOptions(this.taskForm.get('numberOfOptions')?.value);
117 |     this.onChanges();
118 |     this.contentService.fetchAllConceptNames().subscribe(concepts => {
119 |       concepts.forEach(concept => {
120 |         this.concepts.push(concept);
121 |       });
122 |     });
123 |     this.filteredConcepts = this.taskForm.get('conceptName')?.valueChanges.pipe(
124 |       startWith(''),
125 |       map(value => this.filter(value)),
126 |     );
127 |   }
128 | 
129 |   private filter(value: string): string[] {
130 |     const filterValue = value.toLowerCase();
131 |     if (!filterValue) {
132 |       return this.concepts;
133 |     }
134 |     return this.concepts.filter(concept => concept.toLowerCase().includes(filterValue));
135 |   }
136 | 
137 |   onChanges(): void {
138 |     this.Questiontitle = this.taskForm.get('title')?.value;
139 |     this.taskForm.get('text')?.valueChanges.subscribe(val => {
140 |       this.Questiontitle = val;
141 |     });
142 |     this.taskForm.get('numberOfOptions')?.valueChanges.subscribe(value => {
143 |       this.updateOptions(value);
144 |     });
145 |     this.getOptions().valueChanges.subscribe(value => {
146 |       this.updateIsSC();
147 |       this.countCorrectOptions();
148 |     });
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   updateOptions(numOfOptions: number): void {
152 |     if (this.taskForm.get('numberOfOptions')?.value < 0) {
153 |       this.taskForm.get('numberOfOptions')?.setValue(0);
154 |     }
155 |     const options = this.taskForm.get('options') as FormArray;
156 |     const numberOfOptions = this.taskForm.get('numberOfOptions')?.value;
157 | 
158 |     if (numberOfOptions < 0 || numOfOptions === null) {
159 |       this.taskForm.get('numberOfOptions')?.setValue(0);
160 |       return;
161 |     }
162 |     if (numberOfOptions > 6) {
163 |       this.taskForm.get('numberOfOptions')?.setValue(6);
164 |       alert('Sie können nicht mehr als 6 Optionen hinzufügen');
165 |       return;
166 |     }
167 | 
168 |     while (options.length !== numberOfOptions) {
169 |       if (options.length < numberOfOptions) {
170 |         options.push(
171 |           new FormGroup({
172 |             text: new FormControl('', Validators.required),
173 |             correct: new FormControl(false, Validators.required),
174 |           }),
175 |         );
176 |       } else {
177 |         options.removeAt(options.length - 1);
178 |       }
179 |     }
180 |   }
181 | 
182 |   getOptions(): FormArray {
183 |     return this.taskForm.get('options') as FormArray;
184 |   }
185 | 
186 |   clearTitle(): void {
187 |     this.taskForm.get('title')?.setValue('');
188 |   }
189 | 
190 |   titleAndNumberOfOptionsFilled(): boolean {
191 |     return (
192 |       this.taskForm.get('title')?.value != null &&
193 |       this.taskForm.get('numberOfOptions')?.value != null
194 |     );
195 |   }
196 | 
197 |   generateTitle(): void {
198 |     if (!this.taskForm.get('conceptName')?.value) {
199 |       this._snackBar.open('You need to enter a Concept', 'Close', {
200 |         duration: 5000,
201 |       });
202 |     }
203 |     if (this.taskForm.get('conceptName')?.value) {
204 |       this.fetchingTitle = true;
205 |       this.mcqService
206 |         .getQuestionTitle(this.taskForm.get('conceptName')?.value)
207 |         .subscribe((questionTitle: { question: string }) => {
208 |           this.taskForm.get('title')?.setValue(questionTitle.question);
209 |           this.fetchingTitle = false;
210 |         });
211 |     }
212 |   }
213 | 
214 |   getButtonLabel(index: number): string {
215 |     const option = this.getOptions().at(index) as FormControl;
216 |     return option.get('text')?.value ? 'Regenerate' : 'Generate Answer';
217 |   }
218 | 
219 |   clearOption(index: number): void {
220 |     const option = this.getOptions().at(index) as FormControl;
221 |     option.get('text')?.setValue('');
222 |   }
223 | 
224 |   updateIsSC(): void {
225 |     if (
226 |       this.getOptions().controls.filter(control => control.get('correct')?.value === true).length >
227 |       1
228 |     ) {
229 |       this.mcDisabled = true;
230 |       this.taskForm.get('type')?.setValue('MC');
231 |     } else if (
232 |       this.getOptions().controls.filter(control => control.get('correct')?.value === true)
233 |         .length === 1
234 |     ) {
235 |       this.mcDisabled = false;
236 |       this.taskForm.get('type')?.setValue('SC');
237 |     } else if (
238 |       this.getOptions().controls.filter(control => control.get('correct')?.value === true)
239 |         .length === 0
240 |     ) {
241 |       this.mcDisabled = false;
242 |       this.taskForm.get('type')?.setValue('');
243 |     }
244 |   }
245 | 
246 |   generate(): void {
247 |     const title = this.taskForm.get('title')?.value;
248 |     const numberOfOptions = this.taskForm.get('numberOfOptions')?.value;
249 |     if (title && numberOfOptions) {
250 |       this.generateOptions();
251 |     } else {
252 |       if (!title && numberOfOptions) {
253 |         this.fetchingTitle = true;
254 |         this.generateQuestionAndOptions();
255 |       }
256 |     }
257 |   }
258 | 
259 |   generateQuestionAndOptions(): void {
260 |     const numberOfOptions = this.taskForm.get('numberOfOptions')?.value;
261 |     const concept = this.taskForm.get('conceptName')?.value;
262 |     if (concept && numberOfOptions) {
263 |       for (let i = 0; i < this.getOptions().length; i++) {
264 |         const option = this.getOptions().at(i) as FormGroup;
265 |         this.fetchingStates[i] = !option.get('text')?.value;
266 |       }
267 |       this.mcqService
268 |         .getQuestionAndAnswers(concept, numberOfOptions)
269 |         .subscribe((questionAndAnswers: McqGenerationDTO) => {
270 |           this.taskForm.get('title')?.setValue(questionAndAnswers.question);
271 |           this.autogeneratedQuestionAndAnswers$ = of(questionAndAnswers);
272 |           this.autogeneratedQuestionAndAnswers$.subscribe(answers => {
273 |             this.taskForm.get('description')?.setValue(questionAndAnswers.description);
274 |             this.taskForm.get('score')?.setValue(questionAndAnswers.score);
275 | 
276 |             for (let i = 0; i < this.getOptions().length; i++) {
277 |               const option = this.getOptions().at(i) as FormGroup;
278 |               option.get('text')?.setValue(answers.answers?.[i].answer);
279 |               option.get('correct')?.setValue(answers.answers?.[i].correct);
280 |               this.fetchingStates[i] = false;
281 |             }
282 |             this.fetchingTitle = false;
283 |           });
284 |         });
285 |     } else {
286 |       alert('Please enter a concept and the number of options');
287 |     }
288 |   }
289 | 
290 |   generateOptions(): void {
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/mcSliderTask/mc-slider-task.component.html
```
1 | <div class="mc-slider-task mc-slider-task--responsive">
2 |   <!-- Loading state -->
3 |   <div *ngIf="componentState === McSliderTaskState.LOADING" class="loading-container">
4 |     <div class="loading">
5 |       <div class="loading__spinner" role="progressbar" aria-label="Fragen werden geladen"></div>
6 |       <p class="loading__text">Fragen werden geladen...</p>
7 |     </div>
8 |   </div>
9 | 
10 |   <!-- Close button -->
11 |   <div *ngIf="componentState !== McSliderTaskState.LOADING" class="close-button">
12 |     <button mat-icon-button (click)="onClose()" aria-label="Fragen schließen">
13 |       <mat-icon aria-hidden="true">close</mat-icon>
14 |     </button>
15 |   </div>
16 | 
17 |   <!-- Rhino Switch Button -->
18 |   <div *ngIf="componentState !== McSliderTaskState.LOADING" class="rhino-switch-button">
19 |     <button
20 |       mat-icon-button
21 |       (click)="switchToRhino()"
22 |       [disabled]="isRhinoSwitching"
23 |       aria-label="Zu Rhino wechseln"
24 |       [matTooltip]="getRhinoButtonTooltip()"
25 |       [class.rhino-switch-button--loading]="isRhinoSwitching"
26 |       [class.rhino-switch-button--available]="isRhinoAvailable()"
27 |       [class.rhino-switch-button--unavailable]="!isRhinoAvailable()">
28 | 
29 |       <mat-icon *ngIf="!isRhinoSwitching" aria-hidden="true">launch</mat-icon>
30 |       <mat-spinner *ngIf="isRhinoSwitching" diameter="20" aria-hidden="true"></mat-spinner>
31 |     </button>
32 |   </div>
33 | 
34 |   <!-- Questions view -->
35 |   <div
36 |     *ngIf="
37 |       (componentState === McSliderTaskState.QUESTIONS ||
38 |         componentState === McSliderTaskState.SUBMITTING) &&
39 |       getCurrentQuestionState()
40 |     "
41 |     class="questions-container"
42 |   >
43 |     <!-- Scrollable content area -->
44 |     <div class="scrollable-content">
45 |       <!-- Progress header -->
46 |       <div class="progress-header">
47 |         <h2 class="progress-title">Multiple Choice Quiz</h2>
48 |         <div class="progress-info">
49 |           <span class="progress-text">
50 |             Frage {{ currentQuestionIndex + 1 }} von {{ questionStates.length }}
51 |           </span>
52 |           <span class="progress-score">
53 |             {{ getAnsweredCount() }} von {{ questionStates.length }} beantwortet
54 |           </span>
55 |         </div>
56 |       </div>
57 | 
58 |       <!-- Progress dots -->
59 |       <div class="progress-dots" role="tablist" aria-label="Fragen Navigation">
60 |         <button
61 |           *ngFor="let state of questionStates; let i = index"
62 |           class="progress-dot"
63 |           [class.progress-dot--current]="i === currentQuestionIndex"
64 |           [class.progress-dot--answered]="state.selectedOptions.length > 0 || state.isSubmitted"
65 |           [class.progress-dot--correct]="state.isCorrect === true"
66 |           [class.progress-dot--incorrect]="state.isCorrect === false"
67 |           (click)="goToQuestion(i)"
68 |           [attr.aria-selected]="i === currentQuestionIndex"
69 |           [attr.aria-label]="'Zu Frage ' + (i + 1) + ' gehen'"
70 |           role="tab"
71 |         >
72 |           <mat-icon *ngIf="state.isCorrect === true">check</mat-icon>
73 |           <mat-icon *ngIf="state.isCorrect === false">close</mat-icon>
74 |           <span *ngIf="state.isCorrect === undefined">{{ i + 1 }}</span>
75 |         </button>
76 |       </div>
77 | 
78 |       <!-- Question content -->
79 |       <div
80 |         class="question-content"
81 |         [class.celebrate]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.isCorrect === true"
82 |       >
83 |         <!-- Question header -->
84 |         <div class="content-section__header">
85 |           <h3 class="content-section__header-title">
86 |             <span
87 |               [innerHTML]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.questionData.text"
88 |               aria-live="polite"
89 |             ></span>
90 |           </h3>
91 |         </div>
92 | 
93 |         <!-- Score information -->
94 |         <div class="content-section__score">
95 |           <mat-icon class="score-icon" aria-hidden="true">grade</mat-icon>
96 |           <span>
97 |             {{
98 |               getCurrentQuestionState()?.mcQuestion?.isSC ? 'Einfachauswahl' : 'Mehrfachauswahl'
99 |             }}
100 |             - Maximale Punktzahl: {{ getCurrentQuestionState()?.questionData.score || 0 }}
101 |           </span>
102 |         </div>
103 | 
104 |         <!-- Single Choice Options -->
105 |         <section *ngIf="getCurrentQuestionState()?.mcQuestion?.isSC" class="options">
106 |           <h4 class="sr-only">Wähle eine Antwort:</h4>
107 |           <div class="options__container" role="radiogroup" aria-labelledby="question-title">
108 |             <div
109 |               *ngFor="let option of getCurrentQuestionState()?.options; let i = index"
110 |               class="option-item"
111 |               [class.option-item--selected]="
112 |                 getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
113 |               "
114 |               [class.option-item--disabled]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted"
115 |               [class.option-item--correct]="
116 |                 getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted && option.isCorrect === true
117 |               "
118 |               [class.option-item--incorrect]="
119 |                 getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted &&
120 |                 option.isCorrect === false &&
121 |                 getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
122 |               "
123 |               (click)="!getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted && selectSingleOption(option.id)"
124 |               [attr.aria-checked]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)"
125 |               role="radio"
126 |               [tabindex]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted ? -1 : 0"
127 |               [attr.aria-disabled]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted"
128 |               [attr.aria-label]="'Option ' + (i + 1)"
129 |             >
130 |               <div class="option-item-content">
131 |                 <div class="item-indicator">
132 |                   <mat-icon
133 |                     class="item-icon"
134 |                     *ngIf="
135 |                       !getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted &&
136 |                       getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
137 |                     "
138 |                     >radio_button_checked</mat-icon
139 |                   >
140 |                   <mat-icon
141 |                     class="item-icon"
142 |                     *ngIf="
143 |                       !getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted &&
144 |                       !getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
145 |                     "
146 |                     >radio_button_unchecked</mat-icon
147 |                   >
148 |                   <mat-icon
149 |                     *ngIf="
150 |                       getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted &&
151 |                       getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
152 |                     "
153 |                     >radio_button_checked</mat-icon
154 |                   >
155 |                   <mat-icon
156 |                     *ngIf="
157 |                       getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted &&
158 |                       !getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
159 |                     "
160 |                     >radio_button_unchecked</mat-icon
161 |                   >
162 |                 </div>
163 |                 <div class="item-text" [innerHTML]="option.text"></div>
164 |               </div>
165 |             </div>
166 |           </div>
167 |         </section>
168 | 
169 |         <!-- Multiple Choice Options -->
170 |         <section *ngIf="!(getCurrentQuestionState()?.mcQuestion)!.isSC" class="options">
171 |           <h4 class="sr-only">Wähle eine oder mehrere Antworten:</h4>
172 |           <div class="options__container" role="group" aria-labelledby="question-title">
173 |             <div
174 |               *ngFor="let option of getCurrentQuestionState()?.options; let i = index"
175 |               class="option-item"
176 |               [class.option-item--selected]="
177 |                 getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
178 |               "
179 |               [class.option-item--disabled]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted"
180 |               [class.option-item--correct]="
181 |                 getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted && option.isCorrect === true
182 |               "
183 |               [class.option-item--incorrect]="
184 |                 getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted &&
185 |                 option.isCorrect === false &&
186 |                 getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
187 |               "
188 |               (click)="!getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted && toggleOption(option.id)"
189 |               [attr.aria-checked]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)"
190 |               role="checkbox"
191 |               [tabindex]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted ? -1 : 0"
192 |               [attr.aria-disabled]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted"
193 |               [attr.aria-label]="'Option ' + (i + 1)"
194 |             >
195 |               <div class="option-item-content">
196 |                 <div class="item-indicator">
197 |                   <mat-icon
198 |                     class="item-icon"
199 |                     *ngIf="
200 |                       !getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted &&
201 |                       getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
202 |                     "
203 |                     >check_box</mat-icon
204 |                   >
205 |                   <mat-icon
206 |                     class="item-icon"
207 |                     *ngIf="
208 |                       !getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted &&
209 |                       !getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
210 |                     "
211 |                     >check_box_outline_blank</mat-icon
212 |                   >
213 |                   <mat-icon
214 |                     *ngIf="
215 |                       getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted &&
216 |                       getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
217 |                     "
218 |                     >check_box</mat-icon
219 |                   >
220 |                   <mat-icon
221 |                     *ngIf="
222 |                       getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted &&
223 |                       !getCurrentQuestionState()?.selectedOptions?.includes(option.id)
224 |                     "
225 |                     >check_box_outline_blank</mat-icon
226 |                   >
227 |                 </div>
228 |                 <div class="item-text" [innerHTML]="option.text"></div>
229 |               </div>
230 |             </div>
231 |           </div>
232 |         </section>
233 | 
234 |         <!-- Individual question feedback -->
235 |         <section
236 |           *ngIf="getCurrentQuestionState()?.isSubmitted && getCurrentQuestionState()?.feedback"
237 |           class="feedback-section"
238 |           [class.feedback-section--success]="getCurrentQuestionState()?.isCorrect === true"
239 |           [class.feedback-section--partial]="
240 |             getCurrentQuestionState()?.isCorrect === false &&
241 |             (getCurrentQuestionState()?.feedback?.score || 0) > 0
242 |           "
243 |           [class.feedback-section--error]="(getCurrentQuestionState()?.feedback?.score || 0) === 0"
244 |           aria-live="polite"
245 |         >
246 |           <div class="feedback-section__header feedback-section__header--compact">
247 |             <div
248 |               class="feedback-section__header-icon"
249 |               [class.feedback-section__header-icon--success]="
250 |                 getCurrentQuestionState()?.isCorrect === true
251 |               "
252 |               [class.feedback-section__header-icon--partial]="
253 |                 getCurrentQuestionState()?.isCorrect === false &&
254 |                 (getCurrentQuestionState()?.feedback?.score || 0) > 0
255 |               "
256 |               [class.feedback-section__header-icon--error]="
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/mcSliderTask/mc-slider-task.component.scss
```
1 | // Nord Theme Colors
2 | $nord-polar-night-1: #2e3440;
3 | $nord-polar-night-2: #3b4252;
4 | $nord-polar-night-3: #434c5e;
5 | $nord-polar-night-4: #4c566a;
6 | $nord-snow-storm-1: #d8dee9;
7 | $nord-snow-storm-2: #e5e9f0;
8 | $nord-snow-storm-3: #eceff4;
9 | $nord-frost-1: #8fbcbb;
10 | $nord-frost-2: #88c0d0;
11 | $nord-frost-3: #81a1c1;
12 | $nord-frost-4: #5e81ac;
13 | $nord-aurora-1: #bf616a; // Red
14 | $nord-aurora-2: #d08770; // Orange
15 | $nord-aurora-3: #ebcb8b; // Yellow
16 | $nord-aurora-4: #a3be8c; // Green
17 | $nord-aurora-5: #b48ead; // Purple
18 | 
19 | // Main container
20 | .mc-slider-task {
21 |   display: flex;
22 |   flex-direction: column;
23 |   height: 100%;
24 |   max-height: 85vh;
25 |   background: linear-gradient(135deg, $nord-snow-storm-3 0%, $nord-snow-storm-2 100%);
26 |   font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
27 |   position: relative;
28 | 
29 |   &--responsive {
30 |     padding: 8px;
31 |     width: 100%;
32 |     height: 100%;
33 |     max-height: 85vh;
34 |     display: flex;
35 |     flex-direction: column;
36 |   }
37 | }
38 | 
39 | // Loading state
40 | .loading-container {
41 |   display: flex;
42 |   justify-content: center;
43 |   align-items: center;
44 |   min-height: 50vh;
45 | }
46 | 
47 | .loading {
48 |   text-align: center;
49 | 
50 |   &__spinner {
51 |     width: 40px;
52 |     height: 40px;
53 |     border: 4px solid $nord-snow-storm-1;
54 |     border-top: 4px solid $nord-frost-3;
55 |     border-radius: 50%;
56 |     animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
57 |     margin: 0 auto 16px;
58 |   }
59 | 
60 |   &__text {
61 |     color: $nord-polar-night-2;
62 |     font-size: 16px;
63 |     margin: 0;
64 |   }
65 | }
66 | 
67 | @keyframes spin {
68 |   0% {
69 |     transform: rotate(0deg);
70 |   }
71 |   100% {
72 |     transform: rotate(360deg);
73 |   }
74 | }
75 | 
76 | // Close button
77 | .close-button {
78 |   position: absolute;
79 |   top: 10px;
80 |   right: 10px;
81 |   z-index: 1000;
82 | 
83 |   button {
84 |     background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
85 |     border: 1px solid $nord-snow-storm-1;
86 | 
87 |     &:hover {
88 |       background-color: white;
89 |     }
90 |   }
91 | }
92 | 
93 | // Rhino Switch Button
94 | .rhino-switch-button {
95 |   position: absolute;
96 |   top: 10px;
97 |   right: 50px; // Neben Close-Button
98 |   z-index: 1000;
99 | 
100 |   button {
101 |     background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
102 |     border: 1px solid $nord-frost-3;
103 |     transition: all 0.3s ease;
104 |     width: 36px;
105 |     height: 36px;
106 | 
107 |     &:hover:not(:disabled) {
108 |       background-color: $nord-frost-3;
109 |       color: white;
110 |       transform: scale(1.05);
111 |     }
112 | 
113 |     &:disabled {
114 |       opacity: 0.6;
115 |       cursor: not-allowed;
116 |     }
117 | 
118 |     // Loading state
119 |     &--loading {
120 |       background-color: $nord-aurora-3;
121 |       color: $nord-polar-night-1;
122 | 
123 |       &:hover {
124 |         background-color: $nord-aurora-3;
125 |         transform: none;
126 |       }
127 |     }
128 | 
129 |     // Available state
130 |     &--available {
131 |       border-color: $nord-aurora-4;
132 | 
133 |       &:hover {
134 |         background-color: $nord-aurora-4;
135 |         color: white;
136 |         border-color: $nord-aurora-4;
137 |       }
138 |     }
139 | 
140 |     // Unavailable state
141 |     &--unavailable {
142 |       opacity: 0.5;
143 |       border-color: $nord-aurora-1;
144 | 
145 |       &:hover {
146 |         background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
147 |         color: $nord-aurora-1;
148 |         transform: none;
149 |       }
150 |     }
151 | 
152 |     mat-icon {
153 |       font-size: 18px;
154 |       width: 18px;
155 |       height: 18px;
156 |     }
157 | 
158 |     mat-spinner {
159 |       width: 20px !important;
160 |       height: 20px !important;
161 |     }
162 |   }
163 | }
164 | 
165 | // Questions container
166 | .questions-container {
167 |   display: flex;
168 |   flex-direction: column;
169 |   flex: 1;
170 |   min-height: 0; // Important for flex child to shrink
171 |   overflow: hidden;
172 | }
173 | 
174 | // Scrollable content area
175 | .scrollable-content {
176 |   flex: 1;
177 |   overflow-y: auto;
178 |   padding-right: 4px; // Space for scrollbar
179 |   margin-bottom: 8px;
180 | }
181 | 
182 | // Fixed footer area
183 | .fixed-footer {
184 |   flex-shrink: 0;
185 |   background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
186 |   border-top: 1px solid $nord-snow-storm-1;
187 |   padding: 6px 8px 4px 8px;
188 |   margin: 0 -8px -8px -8px;
189 |   backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
190 | }
191 | 
192 | .footer-content {
193 |   display: flex;
194 |   align-items: center;
195 |   justify-content: space-between;
196 |   gap: 12px;
197 | }
198 | 
199 | // Progress header
200 | .progress-header {
201 |   text-align: center;
202 |   margin-bottom: 12px;
203 | }
204 | 
205 | .progress-title {
206 |   font-size: 20px;
207 |   font-weight: 600;
208 |   color: $nord-polar-night-1;
209 |   margin: 0 0 6px 0;
210 | }
211 | 
212 | .progress-info {
213 |   display: flex;
214 |   justify-content: space-between;
215 |   align-items: center;
216 |   font-size: 13px;
217 |   color: $nord-polar-night-3;
218 |   margin-top: 4px;
219 |   padding-right: 40px; // Space for close button
220 | }
221 | 
222 | .progress-text {
223 |   font-weight: 500;
224 | }
225 | 
226 | .progress-score {
227 |   color: $nord-frost-4;
228 |   font-weight: 500;
229 | }
230 | 
231 | // Progress dots
232 | .progress-dots {
233 |   display: flex;
234 |   justify-content: center;
235 |   gap: 6px;
236 |   margin: 12px 0;
237 |   flex-wrap: wrap;
238 | }
239 | 
240 | .progress-dot {
241 |   width: 32px;
242 |   height: 32px;
243 |   border-radius: 50%;
244 |   border: 2px solid $nord-snow-storm-1;
245 |   background-color: white;
246 |   display: flex;
247 |   align-items: center;
248 |   justify-content: center;
249 |   cursor: pointer;
250 |   transition: all 0.3s ease;
251 |   font-size: 12px;
252 |   font-weight: 500;
253 |   color: $nord-polar-night-3;
254 | 
255 |   &:hover {
256 |     border-color: $nord-frost-3;
257 |     transform: scale(1.05);
258 |   }
259 | 
260 |   &--current {
261 |     border-color: $nord-frost-3;
262 |     background-color: $nord-frost-3;
263 |     color: white;
264 |     transform: scale(1.05);
265 |   }
266 | 
267 |   &--answered {
268 |     border-color: $nord-frost-4;
269 |     background-color: $nord-frost-4;
270 |     color: white;
271 |   }
272 | 
273 |   &--correct {
274 |     border-color: $nord-aurora-4;
275 |     background-color: $nord-aurora-4;
276 |     color: white;
277 |   }
278 | 
279 |   &--incorrect {
280 |     border-color: $nord-aurora-1;
281 |     background-color: $nord-aurora-1;
282 |     color: white;
283 |   }
284 | 
285 |   mat-icon {
286 |     font-size: 16px;
287 |     width: 16px;
288 |     height: 16px;
289 |   }
290 | }
291 | 
292 | // Question content
293 | .question-content {
294 |   background-color: white;
295 |   border-radius: 12px;
296 |   padding: 20px;
297 |   box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
298 |   border: 1px solid $nord-snow-storm-1;
299 |   transition: all 0.3s ease;
300 |   margin: 0 auto;
301 |   max-width: 100%;
302 | 
303 |   &.celebrate {
304 |     animation: celebrate 1.5s ease-in-out;
305 |   }
306 | }
307 | 
308 | @keyframes celebrate {
309 |   0%,
310 |   100% {
311 |     transform: scale(1);
312 |   }
313 |   50% {
314 |     transform: scale(1.01);
315 |   }
316 | }
317 | 
318 | // Content sections
319 | .content-section__header {
320 |   margin-bottom: 20px;
321 |   padding-bottom: 12px;
322 |   border-bottom: 1px solid $nord-snow-storm-1;
323 | }
324 | 
325 | .content-section__header-title {
326 |   font-size: 18px;
327 |   font-weight: 600;
328 |   color: $nord-polar-night-1;
329 |   margin: 0;
330 |   line-height: 1.4;
331 |   text-align: center;
332 |   padding: 0 8px;
333 | }
334 | 
335 | .content-section__score {
336 |   display: flex;
337 |   align-items: center;
338 |   gap: 6px;
339 |   margin-bottom: 16px;
340 |   padding: 8px 12px;
341 |   background-color: $nord-snow-storm-2;
342 |   border-radius: 6px;
343 |   font-size: 13px;
344 |   color: $nord-polar-night-2;
345 | }
346 | 
347 | .score-icon {
348 |   color: $nord-aurora-3;
349 |   font-size: 16px;
350 | }
351 | 
352 | // Options
353 | .options {
354 |   margin-bottom: 20px;
355 | }
356 | 
357 | .options__container {
358 |   display: flex;
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/mcSliderTask/mc-slider-task.component.spec.ts
```
1 | import { ComponentFixture } from '@angular/core/testing';
2 | import { TestBed } from '@angular/core/testing';
3 | import { MatDialogRef, MAT_DIALOG_DATA } from '@angular/material/dialog';
4 | import { MatIconModule } from '@angular/material/icon';
5 | import { Location } from '@angular/common';
6 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
7 | import { ChangeDetectorRef } from '@angular/core';
8 | import { of } from 'rxjs';
9 | 
10 | import { McSliderTaskComponent } from './mc-slider-task.component';
11 | import { QuestionDataService } from 'src/app/Services/question/question-data.service';
12 | import { QuestionDTO, McQuestionDTO } from '@DTOs/question.dto';
13 | import { TaskViewData } from '@DTOs/index';
14 | 
15 | describe('McSliderTaskComponent', () => {
16 |   let component: McSliderTaskComponent;
17 |   let fixture: ComponentFixture<McSliderTaskComponent>;
18 |   let mockQuestionDataService: jasmine.SpyObj<QuestionDataService>;
19 |   let mockDialogRef: jasmine.SpyObj<MatDialogRef<McSliderTaskComponent>>;
20 |   let mockLocation: jasmine.SpyObj<Location>;
21 |   let mockRouter: jasmine.SpyObj<Router>;
22 | 
23 |   const mockTaskViewData: TaskViewData = {
24 |     contentNodeId: 1,
25 |     contentElementId: 1,
26 |     id: 1,
27 |     name: 'Test Task',
28 |     type: 'MC',
29 |     progress: 0,
30 |   };
31 | 
32 |   const mockQuestions: QuestionDTO[] = [
33 |     {
34 |       id: 1,
35 |       name: 'Question 1',
36 |       text: 'What is 2+2?',
37 |       type: 'MC',
38 |       conceptNodeId: 1,
39 |       isApproved: true,
40 |       level: 1,
41 |       score: 10,
42 |     },
43 |     {
44 |       id: 2,
45 |       name: 'Question 2',
46 |       text: 'What is 3+3?',
47 |       type: 'MC',
48 |       conceptNodeId: 1,
49 |       isApproved: true,
50 |       level: 1,
51 |       score: 10,
52 |     },
53 |   ];
54 | 
55 |   const mockMcQuestion: McQuestionDTO = {
56 |     id: 1,
57 |     questionId: 1,
58 |     isSC: true,
59 |     shuffleOptions: false,
60 |     mcQuestionOption: [],
61 |   };
62 | 
63 |   const mockOptions = [
64 |     { id: 1, text: 'Option 1' },
65 |     { id: 2, text: 'Option 2' },
66 |   ];
67 | 
68 |   beforeEach(async () => {
69 |     const questionDataServiceSpy = jasmine.createSpyObj('QuestionDataService', [
70 |       'getMCQuestion',
71 |       'getMCOptions',
72 |       'createUserAnswer',
73 |     ]);
74 |     const dialogRefSpy = jasmine.createSpyObj('MatDialogRef', ['close']);
75 |     const locationSpy = jasmine.createSpyObj('Location', ['replaceState']);
76 |     const routerSpy = jasmine.createSpyObj('Router', ['navigate']);
77 | 
78 |     await TestBed.configureTestingModule({
79 |       declarations: [McSliderTaskComponent],
80 |       imports: [MatIconModule],
81 |       providers: [
82 |         { provide: QuestionDataService, useValue: questionDataServiceSpy },
83 |         { provide: MatDialogRef, useValue: dialogRefSpy },
84 |         { provide: Location, useValue: locationSpy },
85 |         { provide: Router, useValue: routerSpy },
86 |         {
87 |           provide: MAT_DIALOG_DATA,
88 |           useValue: {
89 |             taskViewData: mockTaskViewData,
90 |             conceptId: 1,
91 |             questions: mockQuestions,
92 |           },
93 |         },
94 |       ],
95 |     }).compileComponents();
96 | 
97 |     mockQuestionDataService = TestBed.inject(
98 |       QuestionDataService,
99 |     ) as jasmine.SpyObj<QuestionDataService>;
100 |     mockDialogRef = TestBed.inject(MatDialogRef) as jasmine.SpyObj<
101 |       MatDialogRef<McSliderTaskComponent>
102 |     >;
103 |     mockLocation = TestBed.inject(Location) as jasmine.SpyObj<Location>;
104 |     mockRouter = TestBed.inject(Router) as jasmine.SpyObj<Router>;
105 | 
106 |     // Setup default mocks
107 |     mockQuestionDataService.getMCQuestion.and.returnValue(of(mockMcQuestion));
108 |     mockQuestionDataService.getMCOptions.and.returnValue(of(mockOptions));
109 |     mockQuestionDataService.createUserAnswer.and.returnValue(
110 |       of({
111 |         id: 1,
112 |         userAnswerId: 1,
113 |         score: 10,
114 |         feedbackText: 'Correct!',
115 |         elementDone: true,
116 |         progress: 100,
117 |       }),
118 |     );
119 | 
120 |     fixture = TestBed.createComponent(McSliderTaskComponent);
121 |     component = fixture.componentInstance;
122 |   });
123 | 
124 |   it('should create', () => {
125 |     expect(component).toBeTruthy();
126 |   });
127 | 
128 |   it('should initialize with dialog data', () => {
129 |     expect(component.taskViewData).toEqual(mockTaskViewData);
130 |     expect(component.conceptId).toBe(1);
131 |     expect(component.questions).toEqual(mockQuestions);
132 |   });
133 | 
134 |   it('should load questions data on init', () => {
135 |     fixture.detectChanges();
136 |     expect(mockQuestionDataService.getMCQuestion).toHaveBeenCalledWith(1);
137 |     expect(mockQuestionDataService.getMCOptions).toHaveBeenCalled();
138 |   });
139 | 
140 |   it('should navigate between questions', () => {
141 |     fixture.detectChanges();
142 | 
143 |     // Should start at first question
144 |     expect(component.currentQuestionIndex).toBe(0);
145 | 
146 |     // Navigate to next question
147 |     component.nextQuestion();
148 |     expect(component.currentQuestionIndex).toBe(1);
149 | 
150 |     // Navigate to previous question
151 |     component.previousQuestion();
152 |     expect(component.currentQuestionIndex).toBe(0);
153 |   });
154 | 
155 |   it('should handle single choice selection', () => {
156 |     fixture.detectChanges();
157 | 
158 |     component.selectSingleOption(1);
159 |     const currentState = component.getCurrentQuestionState();
160 | 
161 |     expect(currentState?.selectedOptions).toContain(1);
162 |     expect(currentState?.selectedOptions.length).toBe(1);
163 |   });
164 | 
165 |   it('should handle multiple choice selection', () => {
166 |     // Mock multiple choice question
167 |     const mcQuestion = { ...mockMcQuestion, isSC: false };
168 |     mockQuestionDataService.getMCQuestion.and.returnValue(of(mcQuestion));
169 | 
170 |     fixture.detectChanges();
171 | 
172 |     component.toggleOption(1);
173 |     component.toggleOption(2);
174 | 
175 |     const currentState = component.getCurrentQuestionState();
176 |     expect(currentState?.selectedOptions).toContain(1);
177 |     expect(currentState?.selectedOptions).toContain(2);
178 |     expect(currentState?.selectedOptions.length).toBe(2);
179 |   });
180 | 
181 |   it('should close dialog on close', () => {
182 |     component.onClose();
183 |     expect(mockDialogRef.close).toHaveBeenCalled();
184 |   });
185 | 
186 |   it('should calculate answered questions count', () => {
187 |     fixture.detectChanges();
188 | 
189 |     // Initially no questions answered
190 |     expect(component.getAnsweredCount()).toBe(0);
191 | 
192 |     // Answer first question
193 |     component.selectSingleOption(1);
194 |     expect(component.getAnsweredCount()).toBe(1);
195 |   });
196 | 
197 |   it('should check if all questions are answered', () => {
198 |     fixture.detectChanges();
199 | 
200 |     // Initially not all answered
201 |     expect(component.allQuestionsAnswered()).toBe(false);
202 | 
203 |     // Answer all questions
204 |     component.selectSingleOption(1);
205 |     component.nextQuestion();
206 |     component.selectSingleOption(2);
207 | 
208 |     expect(component.allQuestionsAnswered()).toBe(true);
209 |   });
210 | 
211 |   it('should handle component destruction', () => {
212 |     const destroySpy = spyOn(component['destroy$'], 'next');
213 |     const completeSpy = spyOn(component['destroy$'], 'complete');
214 | 
215 |     component.ngOnDestroy();
216 | 
217 |     expect(destroySpy).toHaveBeenCalled();
218 |     expect(completeSpy).toHaveBeenCalled();
219 |   });
220 | });
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/mcSliderTask/mc-slider-task.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit, OnDestroy, ChangeDetectorRef } from '@angular/core';
2 | import {
3 |   Component,
4 |   Input,
5 |   Inject,
6 |   EventEmitter,
7 |   Output,
8 |   Optional,
9 |   ChangeDetectionStrategy,
10 | } from '@angular/core';
11 | import { MCOptionViewDTO, McQuestionDTO } from '@DTOs/question.dto';
12 | import { QuestionDTO, McQuestionOptionDTO } from '@DTOs/question.dto';
13 | import { UserAnswerDataDTO, userAnswerFeedbackDTO } from '@DTOs/userAnswer.dto';
14 | import { QuestionDataService } from 'src/app/Services/question/question-data.service';
15 | import { MatDialogRef } from '@angular/material/dialog';
16 | import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA } from '@angular/material/dialog';
17 | import { TaskViewData } from '@DTOs/index';
18 | import { Router } from '@angular/router';
19 | import { Location } from '@angular/common';
20 | import { firstValueFrom, Subject } from 'rxjs';
21 | import { takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
22 | import { RhinoFocusService } from 'src/app/Services/rhino-focus.service';
23 | import { MatSnackBar } from '@angular/material/snack-bar';
24 | 
25 | // Extended interface for our options to include correctness information
26 | interface MCOptionViewModel extends MCOptionViewDTO {
27 |   id: number;
28 |   isCorrect?: boolean;
29 | }
30 | 
31 | // Question state interface for tracking individual questions
32 | interface QuestionState {
33 |   questionData: any; // Can be QuestionDTO or taskViewDTO
34 |   mcQuestion: McQuestionDTO;
35 |   options: MCOptionViewModel[];
36 |   selectedOptions: number[];
37 |   feedback?: userAnswerFeedbackDTO;
38 |   isSubmitted: boolean;
39 |   isCorrect?: boolean;
40 | }
41 | 
42 | // Component state enum
43 | enum McSliderTaskState {
44 |   LOADING,
45 |   QUESTIONS,
46 |   SUBMITTING,
47 |   FEEDBACK,
48 | }
49 | 
50 | @Component({
51 |   selector: 'app-mc-slider-task',
52 |   templateUrl: './mc-slider-task.component.html',
53 |   styleUrls: ['./mc-slider-task.component.scss'],
54 |   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush,
55 | })
56 | export class McSliderTaskComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy {
57 |   @Output() submitClicked = new EventEmitter<any>();
58 | 
59 |   @Input() conceptId!: number;
60 |   @Input() questions: any[] = []; // Using any[] to handle both QuestionDTO and taskViewDTO
61 |   @Input() isSelfAssessment: boolean = false;
62 |   @Input() taskViewData!: TaskViewData;
63 | 
64 |   // Make enum accessible in template
65 |   McSliderTaskState = McSliderTaskState;
66 | 
67 |   // Component state
68 |   componentState: McSliderTaskState = McSliderTaskState.LOADING;
69 |   currentQuestionIndex: number = 0;
70 | 
71 |   // Questions data
72 |   questionStates: QuestionState[] = [];
73 | 
74 |   // Overall submission state
75 |   allSubmitted: boolean = false;
76 |   totalScore: number = 0;
77 |   maxScore: number = 0;
78 | 
79 |   // Rhino integration state
80 |   isRhinoSwitching: boolean = false;
81 | 
82 |   // For handling RxJS subscriptions cleanup
83 |   private readonly destroy$ = new Subject<void>();
84 | 
85 |   constructor(
86 |     @Optional()
87 |     @Inject(MAT_DIALOG_DATA)
88 |     public data: {
89 |       taskViewData: TaskViewData;
90 |       conceptId: number;
91 |       questions: any[];
92 |     },
93 |     private readonly questionDataService: QuestionDataService,
94 |     private readonly router: Router,
95 |     private readonly dialogRef: MatDialogRef<McSliderTaskComponent>,
96 |     private readonly location: Location,
97 |     private readonly cdr: ChangeDetectorRef,
98 |     private readonly rhinoFocusService: RhinoFocusService,
99 |     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar,
100 |   ) {
101 |     if (data) {
102 |       this.taskViewData = data.taskViewData;
103 |       this.conceptId = data.conceptId;
104 |       this.questions = data.questions || [];
105 |     }
106 |   }
107 | 
108 |   ngOnInit() {
109 |     this.loadQuestionsData();
110 |   }
111 | 
112 |   ngOnDestroy() {
113 |     this.destroy$.next();
114 |     this.destroy$.complete();
115 |   }
116 | 
117 |   /**
118 |    * Load all questions data sequentially
119 |    */
120 |   private loadQuestionsData(): void {
121 |     if (this.questions.length === 0) {
122 |       this.componentState = McSliderTaskState.QUESTIONS;
123 |       this.cdr.detectChanges();
124 |       return;
125 |     }
126 | 
127 |     this.loadQuestionAtIndex(0);
128 |   }
129 | 
130 |   /**
131 |    * Load question data at specific index
132 |    */
133 |   private loadQuestionAtIndex(index: number): void {
134 |     if (index >= this.questions.length) {
135 |       this.componentState = McSliderTaskState.QUESTIONS;
136 |       this.cdr.detectChanges();
137 |       return;
138 |     }
139 | 
140 |     const questionData = this.questions[index];
141 | 
142 |     // Initialize question state
143 |     const questionState: QuestionState = {
144 |       questionData,
145 |       mcQuestion: this.getEmptyMcQuestion(),
146 |       options: [],
147 |       selectedOptions: [],
148 |       isSubmitted: false,
149 |     };
150 | 
151 |     // Load MC question data
152 |     this.questionDataService
153 |       .getMCQuestion(questionData.id)
154 |       .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
155 |       .subscribe(mcQuestionData => {
156 |         questionState.mcQuestion = mcQuestionData as McQuestionDTO;
157 | 
158 |         // Load options
159 |         this.questionDataService
160 |           .getMCOptions((mcQuestionData as McQuestionDTO).id)
161 |           .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
162 |           .subscribe(optionsData => {
163 |             questionState.options = (optionsData as MCOptionViewDTO[]).map((option: MCOptionViewDTO) => ({
164 |               ...option,
165 |               isCorrect: undefined,
166 |             }));
167 | 
168 |             // Shuffle options if enabled
169 |             if (questionState.mcQuestion.shuffleOptions) {
170 |               questionState.options.sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
171 |             }
172 | 
173 |             this.questionStates[index] = questionState;
174 |             this.maxScore += questionData.score || 0;
175 | 
176 |             // Load next question or finish loading
177 |             this.loadQuestionAtIndex(index + 1);
178 |           });
179 |       });
180 |   }
181 | 
182 |   /**
183 |    * Get empty MC question structure
184 |    */
185 |   private getEmptyMcQuestion(): McQuestionDTO {
186 |     return {
187 |       id: -1,
188 |       questionId: -1,
189 |       isSC: false,
190 |       shuffleOptions: false,
191 |       mcQuestionOption: [],
192 |     };
193 |   }
194 | 
195 |   /**
196 |    * Get current question state
197 |    */
198 |   getCurrentQuestionState(): QuestionState | null {
199 |     return this.questionStates[this.currentQuestionIndex] || null;
200 |   }
201 | 
202 |   /**
203 |    * Navigate to previous question
204 |    */
205 |   previousQuestion(): void {
206 |     if (this.currentQuestionIndex > 0) {
207 |       this.currentQuestionIndex--;
208 |       this.cdr.detectChanges();
209 |     }
210 |   }
211 | 
212 |   /**
213 |    * Navigate to next question
214 |    */
215 |   nextQuestion(): void {
216 |     if (this.currentQuestionIndex < this.questionStates.length - 1) {
217 |       this.currentQuestionIndex++;
218 |       this.cdr.detectChanges();
219 |     }
220 |   }
221 | 
222 |   /**
223 |    * Navigate to specific question
224 |    */
225 |   goToQuestion(index: number): void {
226 |     if (index >= 0 && index < this.questionStates.length) {
227 |       this.currentQuestionIndex = index;
228 |       this.cdr.detectChanges();
229 |     }
230 |   }
231 | 
232 |   /**
233 |    * Handle single choice selection
234 |    */
235 |   selectSingleOption(optionId: number): void {
236 |     const currentState = this.getCurrentQuestionState();
237 |     if (!currentState || currentState.isSubmitted) return;
238 | 
239 |     currentState.selectedOptions = [optionId];
240 |     this.updateOptionSelection(currentState);
241 |   }
242 | 
243 |   /**
244 |    * Handle multiple choice selection
245 |    */
246 |   toggleOption(optionId: number): void {
247 |     const currentState = this.getCurrentQuestionState();
248 |     if (!currentState || currentState.isSubmitted) return;
249 | 
250 |     const index = currentState.selectedOptions.indexOf(optionId);
251 |     if (index > -1) {
252 |       currentState.selectedOptions.splice(index, 1);
253 |     } else {
254 |       currentState.selectedOptions.push(optionId);
255 |     }
256 |     this.updateOptionSelection(currentState);
257 |   }
258 | 
259 |   /**
260 |    * Update option selection state
261 |    */
262 |   private updateOptionSelection(questionState: QuestionState): void {
263 |     questionState.options.forEach(option => {
264 |       option.selected = questionState.selectedOptions.includes(option.id);
265 |     });
266 |     this.cdr.detectChanges();
267 |   }
268 | 
269 |   /**
270 |    * Submit current question
271 |    */
272 |   submitCurrentQuestion(): void {
273 |     const currentState = this.getCurrentQuestionState();
274 |     if (!currentState || currentState.selectedOptions.length === 0 || currentState.isSubmitted) {
275 |       return;
276 |     }
277 | 
278 |     this.componentState = McSliderTaskState.SUBMITTING;
279 | 
280 |     const userAnswerData: UserAnswerDataDTO = {
281 |       id: -1,
282 |       contentElementId: this.taskViewData.contentElementId,
283 |       userId: -1,
284 |       questionId: currentState.questionData.id,
285 |       userMCAnswer: currentState.selectedOptions,
286 |     };
287 | 
288 |     this.questionDataService
289 |       .createUserAnswer(userAnswerData)
290 |       .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))
291 |       .subscribe(feedback => {
292 |         currentState.feedback = feedback as userAnswerFeedbackDTO;
293 |         currentState.isSubmitted = true;
294 | 
295 |         // Update option correctness
296 |         this.updateOptionCorrectness(currentState);
297 | 
298 |         // Check if answer is correct
299 |         currentState.isCorrect = this.checkQuestionCorrect(currentState);
300 | 
301 |         // Update total score
302 |         this.updateTotalScore();
303 | 
304 |         this.componentState = McSliderTaskState.QUESTIONS;
305 |         this.cdr.detectChanges();
306 | 
307 |         // Automatic Rhino integration removed - users can manually focus Rhino using the button
308 |         console.log('Question submitted successfully. Use the Rhino button to manually focus if needed.');
309 |       });
310 |   }
311 | 
312 |   /**
313 |    * Update option correctness after submission
314 |    */
315 |   private updateOptionCorrectness(questionState: QuestionState): void {
316 |     if (
317 |       !questionState.mcQuestion.mcQuestionOption ||
318 |       questionState.mcQuestion.mcQuestionOption.length === 0
319 |     ) {
320 |       return;
321 |     }
322 | 
323 |     const correctOptionIds = questionState.mcQuestion.mcQuestionOption
324 |       .filter(opt => opt.option && opt.option.correct)
325 |       .map(opt => opt.id);
326 | 
327 |     questionState.options.forEach(option => {
328 |       option.isCorrect = correctOptionIds.includes(option.id);
329 |     });
330 |   }
331 | 
332 |   /**
333 |    * Check if question was answered correctly
334 |    */
335 |   private checkQuestionCorrect(questionState: QuestionState): boolean {
336 |     const questionScore = questionState.questionData.score || 0;
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/mcTask/mcTask.component.html
```
1 | <div class="mc-task mc-task--responsive">
2 |   <!-- Loading state -->
3 |   <div *ngIf="!dataLoaded" class="loading-container">
4 |     <div class="loading">
5 |       <div class="loading__spinner" role="progressbar" aria-label="Frage wird geladen"></div>
6 |       <p class="loading__text">Frage wird geladen...</p>
7 |     </div>
8 |   </div>
9 | 
10 |   <!-- Close button (outside the content section) -->
11 |   <div *ngIf="dataLoaded" class="close-button">
12 |     <button mat-icon-button (click)="onClose()" aria-label="Frage schließen">
13 |       <mat-icon aria-hidden="true">close</mat-icon>
14 |     </button>
15 |   </div>
16 | 
17 |   <!-- Question header -->
18 |   <div *ngIf="dataLoaded" class="content-section__header" [class.celebrate]="justAnsweredCorrectly">
19 |     <h2 class="content-section__header-title">
20 |       <span [innerHTML]="questionData.text" aria-live="polite"></span>
21 |     </h2>
22 |   </div>
23 |   <!-- Score information -->
24 |   <div *ngIf="dataLoaded" class="content-section__score">
25 |     <mat-icon class="score-icon" aria-hidden="true">grade</mat-icon>
26 |     <span
27 |       >{{ mcQuestion.isSC ? 'Einfachauswahl' : 'Mehrfachauswahl' }} - Maximale Punktzahl:
28 |       {{ questionData.score || 0 }}</span
29 |     >
30 |   </div>
31 | 
32 |   <!-- Single Choice Options -->
33 |   <section *ngIf="dataLoaded && mcQuestion.isSC" class="options">
34 |     <h3 class="sr-only">Wähle eine Antwort:</h3>
35 |     <div class="options__container" role="radiogroup" aria-labelledby="question-title">
36 |       <div
37 |         *ngFor="let option of options; let i = index"
38 |         class="option-item"
39 |         [class.option-item--selected]="selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
40 |         [class.option-item--disabled]="submitDisabled"
41 |         (click)="!submitDisabled && selectSingleOption(option.id)"
42 |         [attr.aria-checked]="selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
43 |         role="radio"
44 |         [tabindex]="submitDisabled ? -1 : 0"
45 |         [attr.aria-disabled]="submitDisabled"
46 |         [attr.aria-label]="'Option ' + (i + 1)"
47 |       >
48 |         <div class="option-item-content">
49 |           <div class="item-indicator">
50 |             <mat-icon
51 |               class="item-icon"
52 |               *ngIf="!submitDisabled && selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
53 |               >radio_button_checked</mat-icon
54 |             >
55 |             <mat-icon
56 |               class="item-icon"
57 |               *ngIf="!submitDisabled && !selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
58 |               >radio_button_unchecked</mat-icon
59 |             >
60 |             <mat-icon *ngIf="submitDisabled && selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
61 |               >radio_button_checked</mat-icon
62 |             >
63 |             <mat-icon *ngIf="submitDisabled && !selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
64 |               >radio_button_unchecked</mat-icon
65 |             >
66 |           </div>
67 |           <div class="item-text" [innerHTML]="option.text"></div>
68 |         </div>
69 |       </div>
70 |     </div>
71 |   </section>
72 | 
73 |   <!-- Multiple Choice Options -->
74 |   <section *ngIf="dataLoaded && !mcQuestion.isSC" class="options">
75 |     <h3 class="sr-only">Wähle eine oder mehrere Antworten:</h3>
76 |     <div class="options__container" role="group" aria-labelledby="question-title">
77 |       <div
78 |         *ngFor="let option of options; let i = index"
79 |         class="option-item"
80 |         [class.option-item--selected]="selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
81 |         [class.option-item--disabled]="submitDisabled"
82 |         (click)="!submitDisabled && toggleOption(option.id)"
83 |         [attr.aria-checked]="selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
84 |         role="checkbox"
85 |         [tabindex]="submitDisabled ? -1 : 0"
86 |         [attr.aria-disabled]="submitDisabled"
87 |         [attr.aria-label]="'Option ' + (i + 1)"
88 |       >
89 |         <div class="option-item-content">
90 |           <div class="item-indicator">
91 |             <mat-icon
92 |               class="item-icon"
93 |               *ngIf="!submitDisabled && selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
94 |               >check_box</mat-icon
95 |             >
96 |             <mat-icon
97 |               class="item-icon"
98 |               *ngIf="!submitDisabled && !selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
99 |               >check_box_outline_blank</mat-icon
100 |             >
101 |             <mat-icon *ngIf="submitDisabled && selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
102 |               >check_box</mat-icon
103 |             >
104 |             <mat-icon *ngIf="submitDisabled && !selectedOptions.includes(option.id)"
105 |               >check_box_outline_blank</mat-icon
106 |             >
107 |           </div>
108 |           <div class="item-text" [innerHTML]="option.text"></div>
109 |         </div>
110 |       </div>
111 |     </div>
112 |   </section>
113 | 
114 |   <!-- Action buttons -->
115 |   <div *ngIf="dataLoaded" class="content-section__footer">
116 |     <!-- Submit button -->
117 |     <button
118 |       *ngIf="!submitDisabled"
119 |       class="mc-button mc-button--primary"
120 |       (click)="onSubmit()"
121 |       [disabled]="submitDisabled || selectedOptions.length === 0"
122 |       aria-label="Antwort absenden"
123 |     >
124 |       <mat-icon aria-hidden="true">send</mat-icon>
125 |       Antwort absenden
126 |     </button>
127 | 
128 |     <!-- Retry button -->
129 |     <button
130 |       *ngIf="submitDisabled && !checkCorrect()"
131 |       class="mc-button mc-button--warning"
132 |       (click)="retry()"
133 |       aria-label="Erneut versuchen"
134 |     >
135 |       <mat-icon aria-hidden="true">refresh</mat-icon>
136 |       Erneut versuchen
137 |     </button>
138 | 
139 |     <!-- Close button after correct answer -->
140 |     <button
141 |       *ngIf="submitDisabled && checkCorrect()"
142 |       class="mc-button mc-button--success"
143 |       (click)="onClose()"
144 |       aria-label="Fortfahren"
145 |     >
146 |       <mat-icon aria-hidden="true">check</mat-icon>
147 |       Fortfahren
148 |     </button>
149 |   </div>
150 | 
151 |   <!-- Feedback panel -->
152 |   <section
153 |     *ngIf="submitDisabled"
154 |     class="feedback-section"
155 |     [class.feedback-section--success]="checkCorrect()"
156 |     [class.feedback-section--partial]="!checkCorrect() && feedback.score > 0"
157 |     [class.feedback-section--error]="feedback.score === 0"
158 |     aria-live="polite"
159 |   >
160 |     <div class="feedback-section__header feedback-section__header--compact">
161 |       <div
162 |         class="feedback-section__header-icon"
163 |         [class.feedback-section__header-icon--success]="checkCorrect()"
164 |         [class.feedback-section__header-icon--partial]="!checkCorrect() && feedback.score > 0"
165 |         [class.feedback-section__header-icon--error]="feedback.score === 0"
166 |       >
167 |         <mat-icon *ngIf="checkCorrect()" aria-hidden="true">sentiment_very_satisfied</mat-icon>
168 |         <mat-icon *ngIf="!checkCorrect() && feedback.score > 0" aria-hidden="true"
169 |           >sentiment_satisfied</mat-icon
170 |         >
171 |         <mat-icon *ngIf="feedback.score === 0" aria-hidden="true">sentiment_dissatisfied</mat-icon>
172 |       </div>
173 |       <h3 class="feedback-section__header-title">
174 |         <span *ngIf="checkCorrect()">Ausgezeichnet!</span>
175 |         <span *ngIf="!checkCorrect() && feedback.score > 0">Fast geschafft!</span>
176 |         <span *ngIf="feedback.score === 0">Versuche es erneut!</span>
177 |       </h3>
178 |     </div>
179 | 
180 |     <div class="feedback-section__score feedback-section__score--compact">
181 |       <div class="feedback-section__score-progress">
182 |         <div
183 |           class="feedback-section__score-progress-bar"
184 |           [class.feedback-section__score-progress-bar--success]="checkCorrect()"
185 |           [class.feedback-section__score-progress-bar--partial]="
186 |             !checkCorrect() && feedback.score > 0
187 |           "
188 |           [class.feedback-section__score-progress-bar--error]="feedback.score === 0"
189 |           [style.width.%]="
190 |             questionData.score && questionData.score > 0
191 |               ? (feedback.score / questionData.score) * 100
192 |               : 0
193 |           "
194 |         ></div>
195 |       </div>
196 |       <div class="feedback-section__score-text">
197 |         Punktzahl: {{ feedback.score }} von {{ questionData.score || 0 }} Punkten
198 |       </div>
199 |     </div>
200 | 
201 |     <p
202 |       *ngIf="feedback.feedbackText"
203 |       class="feedback-section__message feedback-section__message--compact"
204 |     >
205 |       {{ feedback.feedbackText }}
206 |     </p>
207 |   </section>
208 | </div>
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/mcTask/mcTask.component.scss
```
1 | // Nord Theme Color Variables
2 | $nord0: #2e3440; // Polar Night (darkest)
3 | $nord1: #3b4252; // Polar Night
4 | $nord2: #434c5e; // Polar Night
5 | $nord3: #4c566a; // Polar Night (lightest)
6 | $nord4: #d8dee9; // Snow Storm (darkest)
7 | $nord5: #e5e9f0; // Snow Storm
8 | $nord6: #eceff4; // Snow Storm (lightest)
9 | $nord7: #8fbcbb; // Frost
10 | $nord8: #88c0d0; // Frost
11 | $nord9: #81a1c1; // Frost
12 | $nord10: #5e81ac; // Frost (darkest)
13 | $nord11: #bf616a; // Aurora (red)
14 | $nord12: #d08770; // Aurora (orange)
15 | $nord13: #ebcb8b; // Aurora (yellow)
16 | $nord14: #a3be8c; // Aurora (green)
17 | $nord15: #b48ead; // Aurora (purple)
18 | 
19 | // Animation keyframes
20 | @keyframes fadeIn {
21 |   from {
22 |     opacity: 0;
23 |   }
24 |   to {
25 |     opacity: 1;
26 |   }
27 | }
28 | 
29 | @keyframes slideIn {
30 |   from {
31 |     transform: translateY(-20px);
32 |     opacity: 0;
33 |   }
34 |   to {
35 |     transform: translateY(0);
36 |     opacity: 1;
37 |   }
38 | }
39 | 
40 | @keyframes pulse {
41 |   0% {
42 |     transform: scale(1);
43 |   }
44 |   50% {
45 |     transform: scale(1.05);
46 |   }
47 |   100% {
48 |     transform: scale(1);
49 |   }
50 | }
51 | 
52 | // Focus mixin
53 | @mixin focus-visible {
54 |   &:focus-visible {
55 |     outline: 2px solid $nord10;
56 |     outline-offset: 2px;
57 |   }
58 | }
59 | 
60 | // Border mixin for responsive borders
61 | @mixin subtle-border($color: $nord4, $width: 1px) {
62 |   border: $width solid $color;
63 | }
64 | 
65 | // Base component styles
66 | .mc-task {
67 |   font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
68 |   color: $nord0;
69 |   max-width: 100%;
70 |   margin: 0;
71 |   width: 100%;
72 | 
73 |   padding: 8px 16px;
74 |   box-sizing: border-box;
75 |   position: relative;
76 | 
77 |   &--responsive {
78 |     border-radius: 0;
79 |     box-shadow: none;
80 |     width: 100%;
81 |   }
82 | 
83 |   @media (max-width: 600px) {
84 |     padding: 0 8px;
85 |     width: 100%;
86 |     margin: 0;
87 |   }
88 | }
89 | 
90 | // Main content section - previously a card
91 | .content-section {
92 |   padding: 12px 0;
93 |   margin-bottom: 8px;
94 |   background-color: transparent;
95 |   position: relative;
96 |   border-bottom: none;
97 |   animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease-in-out;
98 |   transition: all 0.3s ease;
99 | 
100 |   &--compact {
101 |     padding: 8px 0;
102 |   }
103 | 
104 |   &__header {
105 |     display: flex;
106 |     justify-content: flex-start;
107 |     align-items: flex-start;
108 |     margin-bottom: 8px;
109 | 
110 |     &-title {
111 |       font-size: 1.4rem;
112 |       font-weight: 500;
113 |       color: $nord0;
114 |       margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0;
115 |       animation: slideIn 0.4s ease-out;
116 | 
117 |       // For HTML content rendering
118 |       ::ng-deep p {
119 |         margin: 0;
120 |       }
121 | 
122 |       ::ng-deep pre {
123 |         background-color: rgba($nord5, 0.5);
124 |         padding: 12px;
125 |         border-radius: 5px;
126 |         font-family: 'Monaco', 'Consolas', monospace;
127 |         font-size: 0.9rem;
128 |         overflow-x: auto;
129 |       }
130 | 
131 |       ::ng-deep code {
132 |         background-color: rgba($nord5, 0.5);
133 |         padding: 2px 4px;
134 |         border-radius: 3px;
135 |         font-family: 'Monaco', 'Consolas', monospace;
136 |         font-size: 0.9rem;
137 |       }
138 |     }
139 | 
140 |     &--compact {
141 |       margin-bottom: 4px;
142 |       display: block;
143 |       align-items: center;
144 |     }
145 |   }
146 | 
147 |   &__score {
148 |     font-size: 0.9rem;
149 |     display: flex;
150 |     align-items: center;
151 |     color: $nord3;
152 |     margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
153 | 
154 |     .score-icon {
155 |       margin-right: 6px;
156 |       color: $nord10;
157 |       font-size: 18px;
158 |     }
159 | 
160 |     &--compact {
161 |       margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
162 |     }
163 |   }
164 | 
165 |   // Footer with buttons
166 |   &__footer {
167 |     display: flex;
168 |     justify-content: flex-end;
169 |     margin-top: 20px;
170 |     gap: 12px;
171 | 
172 |     &--compact {
173 |       margin-top: 8px;
174 |       justify-content: center;
175 |     }
176 | 
177 |     @media (max-width: 600px) {
178 |       flex-direction: column;
179 |     }
180 |   }
181 | }
182 | 
183 | // Loading container
184 | .loading-container {
185 |   padding: 16px 0;
186 |   margin-bottom: 8px;
187 | }
188 | 
189 | // Close button
190 | .close-button {
191 |   position: fixed;
192 |   top: 15px;
193 |   z-index: 100;
194 |   background-color: rgba(white, 0.5);
195 |   right: 10px;
196 |   z-index: 10;
197 | 
198 |   button {
199 |     transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
200 | 
201 |     &:hover {
202 |       background-color: rgba($nord4, 0.3);
203 |     }
204 | 
205 |     .mat-icon {
206 |       color: $nord3;
207 |     }
208 |   }
209 | }
210 | 
211 | // Options styling
212 | .options {
213 |   margin: 8px 0;
214 |   padding: 8px 0 6px;
215 |   background-color: transparent;
216 | 
217 |   &--compact {
218 |     margin: 6px 0;
219 |     padding: 6px 0;
220 |   }
221 | 
222 |   &__container {
223 |     display: flex;
224 |     flex-direction: column;
225 |     gap: 10px;
226 | 
227 |     &--compact {
228 |       gap: 10px;
229 |     }
230 |   }
231 | }
232 | 
233 | // Option items (previously card-based)
234 | .option-item {
235 |   background-color: rgba($nord5, 0.1);
236 |   border-left: none;
237 |   border-radius: 4px;
238 |   padding: 6px 8px;
239 |   margin-bottom: 6px;
240 |   cursor: pointer;
241 | 
242 |   transition: all 0.2s ease;
243 |   position: relative;
244 |   @include focus-visible;
245 | 
246 |   &:hover:not(.option-item--disabled) {
247 |     background-color: rgba($nord5, 0.2);
248 |   }
249 | 
250 |   &--selected {
251 |     background-color: rgba($nord9, 0.05);
252 |   }
253 | 
254 |   &--disabled {
255 |     opacity: 0.85;
256 |     cursor: not-allowed;
257 |   }
258 | 
259 |   &-content {
260 |     display: flex;
261 |     align-items: flex-start;
262 |     gap: 12px;
263 | 
264 |     &--compact {
265 |       gap: 8px;
266 |     }
267 | 
268 |     .item-indicator {
269 |       flex-shrink: 0;
270 |       margin-top: 2px;
271 | 
272 |       .mat-icon {
273 |         color: $nord9;
274 |       }
275 |     }
276 | 
277 |     .item-text {
278 |       flex-grow: 1;
279 | 
280 |       ::ng-deep * {
281 |         margin: 0;
282 |       }
283 | 
284 |       ::ng-deep pre {
285 |         background-color: rgba($nord6, 0.7);
286 |         padding: 12px;
287 |         border-radius: 5px;
288 |         font-family: 'Monaco', 'Consolas', monospace;
289 |         font-size: 0.9rem;
290 |         overflow-x: auto;
291 |         margin-top: 8px;
292 |       }
293 | 
294 |       ::ng-deep code {
295 |         background-color: rgba($nord6, 0.7);
296 |         padding: 2px 4px;
297 |         border-radius: 3px;
298 |         font-family: 'Monaco', 'Consolas', monospace;
299 |         font-size: 0.9rem;
300 |       }
301 |     }
302 |   }
303 | }
304 | 
305 | // Button styling
306 | .mc-button {
307 |   border-radius: 8px;
308 |   padding: 8px 16px;
309 |   display: flex;
310 |   align-items: center;
311 |   gap: 8px;
312 |   font-weight: 500;
313 |   text-transform: none;
314 |   letter-spacing: 0.3px;
315 | 
316 |   &--compact {
317 |     padding: 6px 12px;
318 |   }
319 |   transition: all 0.2s ease;
320 | 
321 |   &--primary {
322 |     background-color: $nord10;
323 |     color: white;
324 | 
325 |     &:hover:not([disabled]) {
326 |       background-color: darken($nord10, 5%);
327 |       transform: translateY(-2px);
328 |     }
329 | 
330 |     &:active:not([disabled]) {
331 |       transform: translateY(0);
332 |     }
333 | 
334 |     &[disabled] {
335 |       background-color: lighten($nord10, 20%);
336 |       color: rgba(white, 0.7);
337 |     }
338 |   }
339 | 
340 |   &--secondary {
341 |     background-color: $nord4;
342 |     color: $nord0;
343 | 
344 |     &:hover:not([disabled]) {
345 |       background-color: darken($nord4, 5%);
346 |       transform: translateY(-2px);
347 |     }
348 | 
349 |     &:active:not([disabled]) {
350 |       transform: translateY(0);
351 |     }
352 | 
353 |     &[disabled] {
354 |       background-color: lighten($nord4, 5%);
355 |       color: rgba($nord0, 0.5);
356 |     }
357 |   }
358 | 
359 |   &--success {
360 |     background-color: $nord14;
361 |     color: white;
362 | 
363 |     &:hover:not([disabled]) {
364 |       background-color: darken($nord14, 5%);
365 |       transform: translateY(-2px);
366 |     }
367 | 
368 |     &:active:not([disabled]) {
369 |       transform: translateY(0);
370 |     }
371 |   }
372 | 
373 |   &--warning {
374 |     background-color: $nord13;
375 |     color: $nord0;
376 | 
377 |     &:hover:not([disabled]) {
378 |       background-color: darken($nord13, 5%);
379 |       transform: translateY(-2px);
380 |     }
381 | 
382 |     &:active:not([disabled]) {
383 |       transform: translateY(0);
384 |     }
385 |   }
386 | 
387 |   &--error {
388 |     background-color: $nord11;
389 |     color: white;
390 | 
391 |     &:hover:not([disabled]) {
[TRUNCATED]
```
