src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-fillin/image-upload-dialog/image-upload-dialog.component.ts
```
1 | import { Component, Inject } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { MatDialogRef } from '@angular/material/dialog';
3 | import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA } from '@angular/material/dialog';
4 | 
5 | @Component({
6 |   selector: 'app-image-upload-dialog',
7 |   templateUrl: './image-upload-dialog.component.html',
8 |   styleUrls: ['./image-upload-dialog.component.scss'],
9 | })
10 | export class ImageUploadDialogComponent {
11 |   activeTab: 'general' | 'upload' = 'upload';
12 |   selectedFile: File | null = null;
13 |   imagePreviewUrl: string | null = null;
14 |   altDescription: string = '';
15 |   imageWidth: string = '';
16 |   imageHeight: string = '';
17 | 
18 |   constructor(
19 |     public dialogRef: MatDialogRef<ImageUploadDialogComponent>,
20 |     @Inject(MAT_DIALOG_DATA) public data: any,
21 |   ) {}
22 | 
23 |   /**
24 |    * Handles file selection
25 |    * @param {any} event The file input change event
26 |    */
27 |   onFileSelected(event: any): void {
28 |     const file: File = event.target.files[0];
29 |     if (file) {
30 |       this.selectedFile = file;
31 |       this.createImagePreview(file);
32 |     }
33 |   }
34 | 
35 |   /**
36 |    * Handles file drop
37 |    * @param {DragEvent} event The drag and drop event
38 |    */
39 |   onFileDrop(event: DragEvent): void {
40 |     event.preventDefault();
41 |     const file = event.dataTransfer?.files[0];
42 |     if (file) {
43 |       this.selectedFile = file;
44 |       this.createImagePreview(file);
45 |     }
46 |   }
47 | 
48 |   /**
49 |    * Creates a preview of the selected image
50 |    * @param file The selected image file
51 |    */
52 |   private createImagePreview(file: File): void {
53 |     const reader = new FileReader();
54 |     reader.onload = (e: any) => {
55 |       this.imagePreviewUrl = e.target.result;
56 |       // Get image dimensions
57 |       const img = new Image();
58 |       img.onload = () => {
59 |         this.imageWidth = img.width.toString();
60 |         this.imageHeight = img.height.toString();
61 |       };
62 |       img.src = e.target.result;
63 |     };
64 |     reader.readAsDataURL(file);
65 |   }
66 | 
67 |   /**
68 |    * Prevents default behavior for drag over event
69 |    * @param {DragEvent} event The drag over event
70 |    */
71 |   onDragOver(event: DragEvent): void {
72 |     event.preventDefault();
73 |   }
74 | 
75 |   /**
76 |    * Closes the dialog
77 |    */
78 |   onCancel(): void {
79 |     this.dialogRef.close();
80 |   }
81 | 
82 |   /**
83 |    * Saves the selected image and closes the dialog
84 |    */
85 |   onSave(): void {
86 |     if (this.selectedFile && this.imagePreviewUrl) {
87 |       this.dialogRef.close({
88 |         file: this.selectedFile,
89 |         url: this.imagePreviewUrl,
90 |         altDescription: this.altDescription,
91 |         width: this.imageWidth,
92 |         height: this.imageHeight,
93 |       });
94 |     } else {
95 |       this.dialogRef.close();
96 |     }
97 |   }
98 | 
99 |   /**
100 |    * Switches between tabs
101 |    * @param tab The tab to switch to
102 |    */
103 |   switchTab(tab: 'general' | 'upload'): void {
104 |     this.activeTab = tab;
105 |   }
106 | 
107 |   /**
108 |    * Checks whether the dialog can be saved
109 |    * @returns Whether the dialog can be saved
110 |    */
111 |   canSave(): boolean {
112 |     return this.selectedFile !== null;
113 |   }
114 | }
```

src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-graph/generate-graph/generate-dijkstra.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { GraphEdgeDTO, GraphNodeDTO, GraphStructureDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
3 | import { GenerateGraphService } from './generate-graph.service';
4 | 
5 | export interface GenerateDijkstraConfiguration {
6 |   nodesCount: number;
7 |   edgesCount: number;
8 |   edgeWeight: {
9 |     enabled: true;
10 |     min: number;
11 |     max: number;
12 |   };
13 | }
14 | 
15 | @Injectable({
16 |   providedIn: 'root',
17 | })
18 | export class GenerateDijkstraService {
19 |   constructor(private readonly generateGraphService: GenerateGraphService) {}
20 | 
21 |   generate(configuration: GenerateDijkstraConfiguration): GraphStructureDTO {
22 |     if (configuration.nodesCount < 1) {
23 |       throw new Error('Number of nodes must be at least 1');
24 |     }
25 | 
26 |     if (configuration.edgeWeight.min < 0 || configuration.edgeWeight.max < 0) {
27 |       throw new Error('Edge weight cannot be negative');
28 |     }
29 | 
30 |     if (configuration.edgeWeight.min > configuration.edgeWeight.max) {
31 |       throw new Error('Min edge weight cannot be less than max edge weight');
32 |     }
33 | 
34 |     const _configuration = {
35 |       ...configuration,
36 |       maxSelfEdges: 0,
37 |       edgeDirected: false,
38 |       nodeWeight: {
39 |         // disabled, as it won't be generated randomly
40 |         enabled: false,
41 |         min: 0,
42 |         max: 0,
43 |       },
44 |       nodeSelected: true, // It is enabled and the attribute selected will be set to false automatically for all nodes
45 |     };
46 | 
47 |     const { nodes, edges } = this.generateGraphService.generateGraph(_configuration);
48 | 
49 |     // Randomly select a starting node for Dijkstra's algorithm
50 |     const startNodeIndex = this.generateGraphService.getRandomNumber(
51 |       0,
52 |       configuration.nodesCount - 1,
53 |     );
54 |     const startNode = nodes[startNodeIndex];
55 | 
56 |     // TODO: Find a proper solution for this
57 |     // For now, prevent the start node having an edge with weight 0
58 |     // as it causes multiple nodes to have the weight 0
59 |     // but for now we distinguish the start node by setting its weight to 0
60 |     edges.forEach(edge => {
61 |       if (edge.node1 === startNode && edge.weight === 0) {
62 |         edge.weight = 1;
63 |       }
64 |       if (edge.node2 === startNode && edge.weight === 0) {
65 |         edge.weight = 1;
66 |       }
67 |     });
68 | 
69 |     // Calculate initial state for Dijkstra's algorithm
70 |     const updatedNodes = this.calculateInitialStateWithWeights(startNode, nodes, edges);
71 | 
72 |     const updatedEdges: GraphEdgeDTO[] = [];
73 | 
74 |     edges.forEach(edge => {
75 |       updatedEdges.push({
76 |         node1Id: edge.node1.nodeId,
77 |         node2Id: edge.node2.nodeId,
78 |         weight: edge.weight,
79 |       });
80 |     });
81 | 
82 |     return { nodes: updatedNodes, edges: updatedEdges };
83 |   }
84 | 
85 |   // Function to calculate initial state for Dijkstra's algorithm
86 |   calculateInitialStateWithWeights(startNode: GraphNodeDTO, nodes: GraphNodeDTO[], edges: any[]) {
87 |     // Step 1: Initialize all node weights to Infinity except the start node
88 |     nodes.forEach(node => {
89 |       node.weight = Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER; // Initially set to a large number (Infinity)
90 |     });
91 |     startNode.weight = 0;
92 | 
93 |     edges.forEach(edge => {
94 |       if (edge.node1 === startNode) {
95 |         edge.node2.weight = edge.weight;
96 |       }
97 |       if (edge.node2 === startNode) {
98 |         edge.node1.weight = edge.weight;
99 |       }
100 |     });
101 | 
102 |     // Return updated nodes with calculated weights for shortest paths
103 |     return nodes;
104 |   }
105 | }
```

src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-graph/generate-graph/generate-floyd.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { GenerateGraphService } from './generate-graph.service';
3 | import { GraphEdgeDTO, GraphStructureDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
4 | 
5 | export interface GenerateFloydConfiguration {
6 |   nodesCount: number;
7 |   edgesCount: number;
8 |   edgeWeight: {
9 |     enabled: boolean;
10 |     min: number;
11 |     max: number;
12 |   };
13 |   maxSelfEdges: number;
14 | }
15 | 
16 | @Injectable({
17 |   providedIn: 'root',
18 | })
19 | export class GenerateFloydService {
20 |   constructor(private readonly generateGraphService: GenerateGraphService) {}
21 | 
22 |   generate(configuration: GenerateFloydConfiguration): GraphStructureDTO {
23 |     if (configuration.nodesCount < 1) {
24 |       throw new Error('Number of nodes must be at least 1');
25 |     }
26 | 
27 |     if (configuration.edgeWeight.min > configuration.edgeWeight.max) {
28 |       throw new Error('Min edge weight cannot be less than max edge weight');
29 |     }
30 | 
31 |     const { nodes, edges } = this.generateGraphService.generateGraph({
32 |       ...configuration,
33 |       edgeDirected: true,
34 |       nodeWeight: {
35 |         enabled: false,
36 |         min: 0,
37 |         max: 0,
38 |       },
39 |       nodeSelected: false,
40 |     });
41 | 
42 |     const updatedEdges: GraphEdgeDTO[] = [];
43 | 
44 |     edges.forEach(edge => {
45 |       updatedEdges.push({
46 |         node1Id: edge.node1.nodeId,
47 |         node2Id: edge.node2.nodeId,
48 |         weight: configuration.edgeWeight.enabled ? edge.weight : null,
49 |       });
50 |     });
51 | 
52 |     return { nodes, edges: updatedEdges };
53 |   }
54 | }
```

src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-graph/generate-graph/generate-graph.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { GraphNodeDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
3 | 
4 | export interface GenerateGraphConfiguration {
5 |   nodesCount: number;
6 |   edgesCount: number;
7 |   maxSelfEdges: number;
8 |   edgeDirected: boolean;
9 |   edgeWeight: {
10 |     enabled: boolean;
11 |     min: number;
12 |     max: number;
13 |   };
14 |   nodeWeight: {
15 |     enabled: boolean;
16 |     min: number;
17 |     max: number;
18 |   };
19 |   nodeSelected: boolean;
20 | }
21 | 
22 | @Injectable({
23 |   providedIn: 'root',
24 | })
25 | export class GenerateGraphService {
26 |   constructor() {}
27 | 
28 |   generateGraph(configuration: GenerateGraphConfiguration): {
29 |     nodes: GraphNodeDTO[];
30 |     edges: any[];
31 |   } {
32 |     // Generate nodes
33 |     const nodes: GraphNodeDTO[] = [];
34 |     let nodeIndex = 0;
35 | 
36 |     while (nodeIndex < configuration.nodesCount) {
37 |       const node = this.generateNode(nodeIndex, configuration);
38 |       nodes.push(node);
39 |       nodeIndex++;
40 |     }
41 | 
42 |     // Generate edges
43 |     const edges = this.generateEdges(nodes, configuration);
44 | 
45 |     return {
46 |       nodes,
47 |       edges,
48 |     };
49 |   }
50 | 
51 |   generateNode(nodeIndex: number, configuration: GenerateGraphConfiguration): GraphNodeDTO {
52 |     // Generate node
53 |     const nodeValue = this.generateNodeValue(nodeIndex);
54 |     const { nodePosition, nodeSize, nodeCenter } = this.generateNodeGeometry(
55 |       nodeIndex,
56 |       configuration.nodesCount,
57 |     );
58 | 
59 |     const node: any = {
60 |       nodeId: nodeIndex,
61 |       value: nodeValue,
62 |       position: nodePosition,
63 |       size: nodeSize,
64 |       center: nodeCenter,
65 |     };
66 | 
67 |     // Generate optional attributes according to the configuration
68 |     if (configuration.nodeWeight) {
69 |       node.weight = this.getRandomNumber(
70 |         configuration.nodeWeight.min,
71 |         configuration.nodeWeight.max,
72 |       ); // generate random number
73 |     }
74 | 
75 |     if (configuration.nodeSelected) {
76 |       node.selected = false;
77 |     }
78 | 
79 |     return node;
80 |   }
81 | 
82 |   generateEdges(nodes: GraphNodeDTO[], configuration: GenerateGraphConfiguration) {
83 |     const edges: any[] = [];
84 |     let edgeIndex = 0;
85 |     let selfEdgesCounter = 0;
86 |     const maxAttempts = 1000; // Limit attempts for generating valid edges
87 | 
88 |     // Calculate maximum number of unique edges based on configuration
89 |     const maxEdges = configuration.edgeDirected
90 |       ? nodes.length * (nodes.length - 1) + configuration.maxSelfEdges
91 |       : (nodes.length * (nodes.length - 1)) / 2 + configuration.maxSelfEdges;
92 | 
93 |     const targetEdgeCount = Math.min(configuration.edgesCount, maxEdges);
94 | 
95 |     while (edgeIndex < targetEdgeCount) {
96 |       let attemptCount = 0;
97 | 
98 |       let node1Index = 0; //generate random number between 0 - nodes.length - 1
99 |       let node2Index = 0; //generate random number between 0 - nodes.length - 1
100 |       let sameEdge = 0;
101 | 
102 |       // Ensure we do not endlessly loop trying to find unique edges
103 |       while (attemptCount < maxAttempts) {
104 |         attemptCount++;
105 | 
106 |         // Generate random node indices
107 |         node1Index = this.getRandomNumber(0, nodes.length - 1);
108 |         node2Index = this.getRandomNumber(0, nodes.length - 1);
109 | 
110 |         // Check if it's a valid self-edge (if allowed)
111 |         if (node1Index === node2Index) {
112 |           if (selfEdgesCounter >= configuration.maxSelfEdges) {
113 |             continue; // Skip if self-edge limit reached
114 |           }
115 |         }
116 | 
117 |         // Check for duplicate edges based on directed/undirected configuration
118 |         if (configuration.edgeDirected) {
119 |           sameEdge = edges.find(
120 |             edge => edge.node1 === nodes[node1Index] && edge.node2 === nodes[node2Index],
121 |           );
122 |         } else if (!configuration.edgeDirected) {
123 |           sameEdge = edges.find(
124 |             edge =>
125 |               (edge.node1 === nodes[node1Index] && edge.node2 === nodes[node2Index]) ||
126 |               (edge.node1 === nodes[node2Index] && edge.node2 === nodes[node1Index]),
127 |           );
128 |         }
129 | 
130 |         if (!sameEdge) break; // Valid unique edge found
131 |       }
132 | 
133 |       // Check if max attempts or time limit reached
134 |       if (attemptCount >= maxAttempts) {
135 |         console.warn('Max attempts reached, exiting edge generation early');
136 |         break;
137 |       }
138 | 
139 |       if (node1Index === node2Index) {
140 |         selfEdgesCounter++;
141 |       }
142 | 
143 |       const edge: any = {
144 |         node1: nodes[node1Index],
145 |         node2: nodes[node2Index],
146 |       };
147 | 
148 |       if (configuration.edgeWeight.enabled) {
149 |         edge.weight = this.getRandomNumber(
150 |           configuration.edgeWeight.min,
151 |           configuration.edgeWeight.max,
152 |         ); // Generate random weight
153 |       }
154 | 
155 |       edges.push(edge);
156 |       edgeIndex++;
157 |     }
158 | 
159 |     return edges;
160 |   }
161 | 
162 |   generateNodeGeometry(nodeIndex: number, nodesCount: number) {
163 |     const nodeSize = { width: 100, height: 100 };
164 |     const positionOffset = { x: 50, y: 50 };
165 |     const distance = 100;
166 | 
167 |     const halfNodesCount = Math.floor(nodesCount / 2);
168 | 
169 |     const nodePosition = {
170 |       x: positionOffset.x + Math.floor(nodeIndex / halfNodesCount) * (nodeSize.width + distance),
171 |       y: positionOffset.y + Math.floor(nodeIndex % halfNodesCount) * (nodeSize.width + distance), // using positionOffset.y for vertical spacing
172 |     };
173 | 
174 |     const nodeCenter = {
175 |       x: nodePosition.x + nodeSize.width / 2,
176 |       Y: nodePosition.y + nodeSize.height / 2,
177 |     };
178 | 
179 |     return {
180 |       nodePosition,
181 |       nodeSize,
182 |       nodeCenter,
183 |     };
184 |   }
185 | 
186 |   generateNodeValue(index: number): string {
187 |     let result = '';
188 |     let current = index;
189 | 
190 |     // Loop through alphabet until we reach the target index
191 |     while (current >= 0) {
192 |       result = String.fromCharCode((current % 26) + 65) + result;
193 |       current = Math.floor(current / 26) - 1;
194 |     }
195 |     return result;
196 |   }
197 | 
198 |   getRandomNumber(min: number, max: number): number {
199 |     return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
200 |   }
201 | }
```

src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-graph/generate-graph/generate-kruskal.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { GenerateGraphService } from './generate-graph.service';
3 | import { GraphEdgeDTO, GraphStructureDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
4 | 
5 | export interface GenerateKruskalConfiguration {
6 |   nodesCount: number;
7 |   edgesCount: number;
8 |   edgeWeight: {
9 |     enabled: true;
10 |     min: number;
11 |     max: number;
12 |   };
13 | }
14 | 
15 | @Injectable({
16 |   providedIn: 'root',
17 | })
18 | export class GenerateKruskalService {
19 |   constructor(private readonly generateGraphService: GenerateGraphService) {}
20 | 
21 |   generate(configuration: GenerateKruskalConfiguration): GraphStructureDTO {
22 |     if (configuration.nodesCount < 1) {
23 |       throw new Error('Number of nodes must be at least 1');
24 |     }
25 | 
26 |     if (configuration.edgesCount < configuration.nodesCount - 1) {
27 |       throw new Error('Number of edges must be at least number of nodes - 1');
28 |     }
29 | 
30 |     if (configuration.edgeWeight.min > configuration.edgeWeight.max) {
31 |       throw new Error('Min edge weight cannot be less than max edge weight');
32 |     }
33 | 
34 |     const _configuration = {
35 |       ...configuration,
36 |       maxSelfEdges: 0,
37 |       edgeDirected: false,
38 |       nodeSelected: false,
39 |       nodeWeight: {
40 |         enabled: false,
41 |         min: 0,
42 |         max: 0,
43 |       },
44 |     };
45 | 
46 |     const { nodes, edges } = this.generateGraphService.generateGraph(_configuration);
47 | 
48 |     const updatedEdges: GraphEdgeDTO[] = [];
49 | 
50 |     edges.forEach(edge => {
51 |       updatedEdges.push({
52 |         node1Id: edge.node1.nodeId,
53 |         node2Id: edge.node2.nodeId,
54 |         weight: edge.weight,
55 |       });
56 |     });
57 | 
58 |     return { nodes, edges: updatedEdges };
59 |   }
60 | }
```

src/app/Pages/lecturersView/edit-graph/generateExampleSolution/generate-example-solution.service.ts
```
1 | import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
2 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { GraphStructureDTO } from '@DTOs/graphTask.dto';
4 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
5 | import { environment } from 'src/environments/environment';
6 | 
7 | @Injectable({
8 |   providedIn: 'root',
9 | })
10 | export class GenerateExampleSolutionService {
11 |   private readonly genSolutionUrl = `${environment.server}/graph-example-solution-generation`;
12 | 
13 |   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
14 | 
15 |   generateTransitiveClosureExampleSolution(
16 |     initialStructure: GraphStructureDTO,
17 |   ): Observable<GraphStructureDTO[]> {
18 |     return this.http.post<GraphStructureDTO[]>(`${this.genSolutionUrl}/transitive-closure`, {
19 |       initialStructure,
20 |     });
21 |   }
22 | 
23 |   generateFloydExampleSolution(
24 |     initialStructure: GraphStructureDTO,
25 |   ): Observable<GraphStructureDTO[]> {
26 |     return this.http.post<GraphStructureDTO[]>(`${this.genSolutionUrl}/floyd`, {
27 |       initialStructure,
28 |     });
29 |   }
30 | 
31 |   generateKruskalExampleSolution(
32 |     initialStructure: GraphStructureDTO,
33 |   ): Observable<GraphStructureDTO[]> {
34 |     return this.http.post<GraphStructureDTO[]>(`${this.genSolutionUrl}/kruskal`, {
35 |       initialStructure,
36 |     });
37 |   }
38 | 
39 |   generateDijkstraExampleSolution(
40 |     initialStructure: GraphStructureDTO,
41 |   ): Observable<GraphStructureDTO[]> {
42 |     return this.http.post<GraphStructureDTO[]>(`${this.genSolutionUrl}/dijkstra`, {
43 |       initialStructure,
44 |     });
45 |   }
46 | }
```

src/app/Pages/teacher/grading-overview/services/grading.service.ts
```
1 | import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
3 | import { of } from 'rxjs';
4 | 
5 | export interface Question {
6 |   questionId: number;
7 |   type: string;
8 | }
9 | 
10 | export interface UserAnswer {
11 |   userId: number;
12 |   questionId: number;
13 |   answer: string;
14 | }
15 | 
16 | export interface UserUploadAnswer {
17 |   userId: number;
18 |   questionId: number;
19 |   uploadPath: string;
20 | }
21 | 
22 | @Injectable({
23 |   providedIn: 'root',
24 | })
25 | export class GradingService {
26 |   private readonly questions: Question[] = [
27 |     { questionId: 101, type: 'EntwurfUpload' },
28 |     { questionId: 102, type: 'MultipleChoice' },
29 |     { questionId: 103, type: 'EntwurfUpload' },
30 |     { questionId: 104, type: 'Freetext' },
31 |   ];
32 | 
33 |   private readonly userAnswers: UserAnswer[] = [
34 |     { userId: 1, questionId: 101, answer: 'upload_ref_101_user1' },
35 |     { userId: 2, questionId: 101, answer: 'upload_ref_101_user2' },
36 |     { userId: 1, questionId: 102, answer: 'A' },
37 |     { userId: 2, questionId: 102, answer: 'C' },
38 |     { userId: 1, questionId: 103, answer: 'upload_ref_103_user1' },
39 |   ];
40 | 
41 |   private readonly userUploadAnswers: UserUploadAnswer[] = [
42 |     { userId: 1, questionId: 101, uploadPath: '/uploads/module1/q101_user1.pdf' },
43 |     { userId: 2, questionId: 101, uploadPath: '/uploads/module1/q101_user2.jpg' },
44 |     { userId: 1, questionId: 103, uploadPath: '/uploads/module1/q103_user1.zip' },
45 |   ];
46 | 
47 |   constructor() {}
48 | 
49 |   getQuestions(): Observable<Question[]> {
50 |     return of(this.questions);
51 |   }
52 | 
53 |   getUserAnswers(): Observable<UserAnswer[]> {
54 |     return of(this.userAnswers);
55 |   }
56 | 
57 |   getUserUploadAnswers(): Observable<UserUploadAnswer[]> {
58 |     return of(this.userUploadAnswers);
59 |   }
60 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback/feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog/feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog.component.html
```
1 | <div class="feedback-hint-dialog">
2 |   <div class="dialog-header">
3 |     <h2 mat-dialog-title>Hinweis</h2>
4 |   </div>
5 | 
6 |   <mat-dialog-content>
7 |     <p class="warning-message">
8 |       Vorsicht, hier werden schon die nächsten Schritte verraten. Möchten Sie das?
9 |     </p>
10 |   </mat-dialog-content>
11 | 
12 |   <mat-dialog-actions>
13 |     <button mat-flat-button class="confirm-button" (click)="confirm()">
14 |       Ja, ich brauche weitere Informationen
15 |     </button>
16 | 
17 |     <button mat-flat-button class="cancel-button" (click)="cancel()">
18 |       Nein, vielleicht finde ich die Informationen noch
19 |     </button>
20 |   </mat-dialog-actions>
21 | </div>

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback/feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog/feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog.component.scss
```
1 | // Nord theme palette colors
2 | $nord0: #2e3440; // Darkest background
3 | $nord1: #3b4252; // Darker background
4 | $nord2: #434c5e; // Dark background (lighter)
5 | $nord3: #4c566a; // Lightest background variant
6 | $nord4: #d8dee9; // Light text
7 | $nord5: #e5e9f0; // Lighter text
8 | $nord6: #eceff4; // Lightest text
9 | $nord7: #8fbcbb; // Aqua accent
10 | $nord8: #88c0d0; // Light blue
11 | $nord9: #81a1c1; // Mid blue
12 | $nord10: #5e81ac; // Blue (for confirm button)
13 | $nord11: #bf616a; // Red
14 | $nord12: #d08770; // Orange
15 | $nord13: #ebcb8b; // Yellow
16 | $nord14: #a3be8c; // Green (for cancel button)
17 | $nord15: #b48ead; // Purple
18 | 
19 | // Box shadow variables
20 | $soft-shadow:
21 |   0 2px 8px rgba($nord0, 0.08),
22 |   0 1px 2px rgba($nord0, 0.04);
23 | $hover-shadow:
24 |   0 4px 12px rgba($nord0, 0.12),
25 |   0 2px 4px rgba($nord0, 0.06);
26 | 
27 | .feedback-hint-dialog {
28 |   font-family: 'Roboto', 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;
29 |   border-radius: 8px;
30 |   overflow: hidden;
31 |   max-width: 650px;
32 |   width: 100%;
33 |   background-color: white;
34 |   box-shadow: $soft-shadow;
35 | }
36 | 
37 | .dialog-header {
38 |   padding: 20px 24px 0;
39 |   border-bottom: 1px solid rgba($nord4, 0.5);
40 | 
41 |   h2 {
42 |     color: $nord1;
43 |     font-size: 1.5rem;
44 |     font-weight: 500;
45 |     margin: 0 0 16px;
46 |     letter-spacing: -0.01em;
47 |   }
48 | }
49 | 
50 | mat-dialog-content {
51 |   padding: 24px;
52 |   color: $nord3;
53 | }
54 | 
55 | .warning-message {
56 |   font-size: 1rem;
57 |   line-height: 1.6;
58 |   margin: 0;
59 |   color: $nord2;
60 |   max-width: 560px;
61 | }
62 | 
63 | mat-dialog-actions {
64 |   display: flex;
65 |   justify-content: flex-end;
66 |   gap: 16px;
67 |   padding: 16px 24px 24px;
68 |   margin-bottom: 0;
69 |   flex-wrap: wrap;
70 | }
71 | 
72 | .cancel-button {
73 |   background-color: $nord14;
74 |   color: $nord0;
75 |   font-weight: 500;
76 |   border: none;
77 |   border-radius: 4px;
78 |   padding: 8px 24px;
79 |   height: 40px;
80 |   font-size: 0.95rem;
81 |   letter-spacing: 0.01em;
82 |   box-shadow: $soft-shadow;
83 |   transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
84 |   text-transform: none;
85 | 
86 |   &:hover {
87 |     background-color: darken($nord14, 5%);
88 |     box-shadow: $hover-shadow;
89 |     transform: translateY(-1px);
90 |   }
91 | 
92 |   &:focus {
93 |     outline: none;
94 |     box-shadow:
95 |       0 0 0 2px rgba($nord14, 0.4),
96 |       $soft-shadow;
97 |   }
98 | }
99 | 
100 | .confirm-button {
101 |   background-color: $nord10;
102 |   color: white;
103 |   font-weight: 500;
104 |   border: none;
105 |   border-radius: 4px;
106 |   padding: 8px 24px;
107 |   height: 40px;
108 |   font-size: 0.95rem;
109 |   letter-spacing: 0.01em;
110 |   box-shadow: $soft-shadow;
111 |   transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
112 |   text-transform: none;
113 | 
114 |   &:hover {
115 |     background-color: darken($nord10, 5%);
116 |     box-shadow: $hover-shadow;
117 |     transform: translateY(-1px);
118 |   }
119 | 
120 |   &:focus {
121 |     outline: none;
122 |     box-shadow:
123 |       0 0 0 2px rgba($nord10, 0.4),
124 |       $soft-shadow;
125 |   }
126 | }
127 | 
128 | // Responsive styles
129 | @media screen and (max-width: 600px) {
130 |   .feedback-hint-dialog {
131 |     border-radius: 8px;
132 |   }
133 | 
134 |   .dialog-header h2 {
135 |     font-size: 1.3rem;
136 |   }
137 | 
138 |   mat-dialog-content {
139 |     padding: 20px;
140 |   }
141 | 
142 |   mat-dialog-actions {
143 |     flex-direction: column;
144 |     padding: 0 20px 20px;
145 |     gap: 12px;
146 |   }
147 | 
148 |   .cancel-button,
149 |   .confirm-button {
150 |     width: 100%;
151 |     margin: 0;
152 |     white-space: normal;
153 |     height: auto;
154 |     min-height: 44px; // Larger touch target
155 |     padding: 10px 20px;
156 |     font-size: 0.95rem;
157 |     line-height: 1.4;
158 |   }
159 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/feedback-panel-tutor-feedback/feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog/feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog.component.ts
```
1 | import { Component } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { MatDialogRef } from '@angular/material/dialog';
3 | 
4 | @Component({
5 |   selector: 'app-feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog',
6 |   templateUrl: './feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog.component.html',
7 |   styleUrls: ['./feedback-hint-confirmation-dialog.component.scss'],
8 | })
9 | export class FeedbackHintConfirmationDialogComponent {
10 |   constructor(public dialogRef: MatDialogRef<FeedbackHintConfirmationDialogComponent>) {}
11 | 
12 |   /**
13 |    * Close the dialog when the user cancels (chooses "Nein")
14 |    */
15 |   cancel(): void {
16 |     this.dialogRef.close(false);
17 |   }
18 | 
19 |   /**
20 |    * Close the dialog when the user confirms (chooses "Ja")
21 |    */
22 |   confirm(): void {
23 |     this.dialogRef.close(true);
24 |   }
25 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/test-indicators/test-details-dialog/test-details-dialog.component.html
```
1 | <!-- Einzelner Test Details Ansicht -->
2 | <ng-container *ngIf="!isListView">
3 |   <h2 mat-dialog-title class="test-title" [ngClass]="{ passed: data.passed, failed: !data.passed }">
4 |     <mat-icon>{{ data.passed ? 'check_circle' : 'error' }}</mat-icon>
5 |     <span>{{ getShortTestName(data.name || '') }}</span>
6 |   </h2>
7 | 
8 |   <!-- Vollständiger Testname als Untertitel, falls vom Kurznamen verschieden -->
9 |   <div *ngIf="data.name && data.name !== getShortTestName(data.name)" class="full-test-name">
10 |     <small>{{ data.name }}</small>
11 |   </div>
12 | 
13 |   <mat-dialog-content>
14 |     <div class="test-status">
15 |       <span class="status-label">Status:</span>
16 |       <span class="status-value" [ngClass]="{ passed: data.passed, failed: !data.passed }">
17 |         {{ data.passed ? 'Bestanden' : 'Fehlgeschlagen' }}
18 |       </span>
19 |     </div>
20 | 
21 |     <div class="exception-section" *ngIf="hasException()">
22 |       <div class="exception-header" (click)="toggleStack()">
23 |         <span class="error-label">Fehler:</span>
24 |         <button mat-icon-button>
25 |           <mat-icon>{{ showStack ? 'keyboard_arrow_up' : 'keyboard_arrow_down' }}</mat-icon>
26 |         </button>
27 |       </div>
28 | 
29 |       <div class="exception-preview" *ngIf="!showStack">
30 |         {{ data.exception!.split('\n')[0] }}
31 |       </div>
32 | 
33 |       <pre class="exception-stack" *ngIf="showStack">{{ data.exception }}</pre>
34 |     </div>
35 |   </mat-dialog-content>
36 | </ng-container>
37 | 
38 | <!-- Liste aller Tests Ansicht -->
39 | <ng-container *ngIf="isListView">
40 |   <h2 mat-dialog-title>Test-Ergebnisse</h2>
41 | 
42 |   <mat-dialog-content>
43 |     <table class="test-results-table">
44 |       <thead>
45 |         <tr>
46 |           <th>Test</th>
47 |           <th>Status</th>
48 |           <th>Details</th>
49 |         </tr>
50 |       </thead>
51 |       <tbody>
52 |         <tr
53 |           *ngFor="let test of allTests; let i = index"
54 |           [ngClass]="{ 'passed-row': test.passed, 'failed-row': !test.passed }"
55 |         >
56 |           <td [title]="test.name">{{ getShortTestName(test.name) }}</td>
57 |           <td>
58 |             <span
59 |               class="status-indicator"
60 |               [ngClass]="{ passed: test.passed, failed: !test.passed }"
61 |             >
62 |               {{ test.passed ? 'Bestanden' : 'Fehlgeschlagen' }}
63 |             </span>
64 |           </td>
65 |           <td>
66 |             <button
67 |               *ngIf="!test.passed && test.exception"
68 |               mat-icon-button
69 |               (click)="toggleExceptionDetails(i)"
70 |             >
71 |               <mat-icon>{{ isExceptionShown(i) ? 'expand_less' : 'expand_more' }}</mat-icon>
72 |             </button>
73 |           </td>
74 |         </tr>
75 |         <tr
76 |           *ngFor="let test of allTests; let i = index"
77 |           [hidden]="test.passed || !test.exception || !isExceptionShown(i)"
78 |           class="error-details-row"
79 |         >
80 |           <td colspan="3">
81 |             <pre class="error-details">{{ test.exception }}</pre>
82 |           </td>
83 |         </tr>
84 |       </tbody>
85 |     </table>
86 |   </mat-dialog-content>
87 | </ng-container>
88 | 
89 | <mat-dialog-actions align="end">
90 |   <button mat-button mat-dialog-close>Schließen</button>
91 | </mat-dialog-actions>
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/test-indicators/test-details-dialog/test-details-dialog.component.scss
```
1 | // Import Nord Light theme
2 | @import '../../../_nord-light-theme.scss';
3 | 
4 | // Einzelner Test Details Stile
5 | .test-title {
6 |   display: flex;
7 |   align-items: center;
8 |   gap: 8px;
9 |   margin-bottom: 0;
10 | 
11 |   &.passed {
12 |     color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-4; // Success/Passed
13 |   }
14 | 
15 |   &.failed {
16 |     color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-1; // Error/Failed
17 |   }
18 | 
19 |   mat-icon {
20 |     margin-right: 4px;
21 |   }
22 | }
23 | 
24 | .full-test-name {
25 |   padding: 0 8px 12px 8px;
26 |   margin-top: -5px;
27 |   opacity: 0.7;
28 |   font-size: 13px;
29 |   color: $nord-light-text-tertiary;
30 |   text-overflow: ellipsis;
31 |   overflow: hidden;
32 |   white-space: nowrap;
33 | 
34 |   &:hover {
35 |     white-space: normal;
36 |     word-break: break-all;
37 |   }
38 | }
39 | 
40 | .test-status {
41 |   margin: 12px 0;
42 |   display: flex;
43 |   align-items: center;
44 | 
45 |   .status-label {
46 |     font-weight: 500;
47 |     margin-right: 8px;
48 |   }
49 | 
50 |   .status-value {
51 |     font-weight: 500;
52 | 
53 |     &.passed {
54 |       color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-4; // Success/Passed
55 |     }
56 | 
57 |     &.failed {
58 |       color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-1; // Error/Failed
59 |     }
60 |   }
61 | }
62 | 
63 | .exception-section {
64 |   background-color: $nord-light-bg-primary;
65 |   border: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
66 |   border-radius: 4px;
67 |   margin-top: 12px;
68 |   overflow: hidden;
69 | 
70 |   .exception-header {
71 |     display: flex;
72 |     justify-content: space-between;
73 |     align-items: center;
74 |     padding: 8px 12px;
75 |     cursor: pointer;
76 | 
77 |     .error-label {
78 |       font-weight: 500;
79 |       color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-1; // Error/Failed
80 |     }
81 |   }
82 | 
83 |   .exception-preview {
84 |     padding: 8px 12px;
85 |     white-space: nowrap;
86 |     overflow: hidden;
87 |     text-overflow: ellipsis;
88 |     font-family: 'Consolas', 'Courier New', monospace;
89 |     font-size: 13px;
90 |     color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-1; // Error/Failed
91 |     background-color: rgba($nord-light-accent-aurora-1, 0.1); // Light error background
92 |   }
93 | 
94 |   .exception-stack {
95 |     padding: 12px;
96 |     margin: 0;
97 |     background-color: rgba($nord-light-accent-aurora-1, 0.1); // Light error background
98 |     color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-1; // Error/Failed
99 |     font-family: 'Consolas', 'Courier New', monospace;
100 |     font-size: 13px;
101 |     overflow-x: auto;
102 |     max-height: 300px;
103 |     overflow-y: auto;
104 |   }
105 | }
106 | 
107 | // Stile für die Tabellendarstellung aller Tests
108 | .test-results-table {
109 |   width: 100%;
110 |   border-collapse: collapse;
111 | 
112 |   th {
113 |     text-align: left;
114 |     padding: 8px;
115 |     background-color: $nord-light-bg-secondary;
116 |     border-bottom: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
117 |     font-size: 13px;
118 |     font-weight: 500;
119 |     color: $nord-light-text-tertiary;
120 |   }
121 | 
122 |   td {
123 |     padding: 8px;
124 |     border-bottom: 1px solid $nord-light-border;
125 |     font-size: 13px;
126 |     vertical-align: middle;
127 |   }
128 | 
129 |   .passed-row {
130 |     background-color: rgba($nord-light-accent-aurora-4, 0.05); // Light success background
131 |   }
132 | 
133 |   .failed-row {
134 |     background-color: rgba($nord-light-accent-aurora-1, 0.05); // Light error background
135 |   }
136 | 
137 |   .status-indicator {
138 |     font-size: 12px;
139 |     padding: 2px 6px;
140 |     border-radius: 4px;
141 | 
142 |     &.passed {
143 |       background-color: rgba($nord-light-accent-aurora-4, 0.1); // Light success background
144 |       color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-4; // Success/Passed
145 |     }
146 | 
147 |     &.failed {
148 |       background-color: rgba($nord-light-accent-aurora-1, 0.1); // Light error background
149 |       color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-1; // Error/Failed
150 |     }
151 |   }
152 | 
153 |   .error-details-row {
154 |     background-color: $nord-light-bg-primary;
155 |   }
156 | 
157 |   .error-details {
158 |     font-family: 'Consolas', 'Courier New', monospace;
159 |     font-size: 12px;
160 |     padding: 8px;
161 |     margin: 0;
162 |     white-space: pre-wrap;
163 |     background-color: rgba($nord-light-accent-aurora-1, 0.1); // Light error background
164 |     border-left: 2px solid $nord-light-accent-aurora-1; // Error/Failed
165 |     overflow-x: auto;
166 |     max-height: 200px;
167 |     overflow-y: auto;
168 |     color: $nord-light-accent-aurora-1; // Error/Failed
169 |   }
170 | }
171 | 
172 | // Responsive Design für kleinere Bildschirme
173 | @media (max-width: 500px) {
174 |   .test-results-table {
175 |     th:nth-child(3),
176 |     td:nth-child(3) {
177 |       display: none; // Verberge die Details-Spalte auf kleinen Bildschirmen
178 |     }
179 |   }
180 | }
```

src/app/Modules/tutor-kai/components/test-indicators/test-details-dialog/test-details-dialog.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, Inject } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA } from '@angular/material/dialog';
4 | import { TestResult } from '../../../models/code-submission.model';
5 | 
6 | // Dialog-Daten können entweder ein einzelnes TestResult oder ein Objekt mit allTests sein
7 | export interface TestDetailsDialogData {
8 |   allTests?: TestResult[];
9 |   isListView?: boolean;
10 |   name?: string;
11 |   passed?: boolean;
12 |   exception?: string;
13 | }
14 | 
15 | @Component({
16 |   selector: 'app-test-details-dialog',
17 |   templateUrl: './test-details-dialog.component.html',
18 |   styleUrls: ['./test-details-dialog.component.scss'],
19 | })
20 | export class TestDetailsDialogComponent implements OnInit {
21 |   // Für Einzeltest-Ansicht
22 |   showStack: boolean = false;
23 | 
24 |   // Für Listenansicht
25 |   isListView: boolean = false;
26 |   allTests: TestResult[] = [];
27 |   shownExceptions: Set<number> = new Set(); // Speichert Indizes der angezeigten Ausnahmen
28 | 
29 |   constructor(@Inject(MAT_DIALOG_DATA) public data: TestResult | TestDetailsDialogData) {}
30 | 
31 |   ngOnInit(): void {
32 |     // Analysiere die übergebenen Daten und bereite die entsprechende Ansicht vor
33 |     this.isListView = this.isDataWithAllTests(this.data) && !!this.data.isListView;
34 | 
35 |     if (this.isListView && this.isDataWithAllTests(this.data) && this.data.allTests) {
36 |       this.allTests = this.data.allTests;
37 |     }
38 |   }
39 | 
40 |   /**
41 |    * Type Guard, um zu prüfen, ob die Daten die allTests-Eigenschaft haben
42 |    */
43 |   private isDataWithAllTests(data: any): data is TestDetailsDialogData {
44 |     return 'allTests' in data || 'isListView' in data;
45 |   }
46 | 
47 |   /**
48 |    * Wechselt die Anzeige des Stacktraces (für Einzelansicht)
49 |    */
50 |   toggleStack(): void {
51 |     this.showStack = !this.showStack;
52 |   }
53 | 
54 |   /**
55 |    * Schaltet die Anzeige der Ausnahmedetails für einen bestimmten Test um (für Listenansicht)
56 |    */
57 |   toggleExceptionDetails(index: number): void {
58 |     if (this.shownExceptions.has(index)) {
59 |       this.shownExceptions.delete(index);
60 |     } else {
61 |       this.shownExceptions.add(index);
62 |     }
63 |   }
64 | 
65 |   /**
66 |    * Prüft, ob die Ausnahmedetails für einen bestimmten Test angezeigt werden sollen
67 |    */
68 |   isExceptionShown(index: number): boolean {
69 |     return this.shownExceptions.has(index);
70 |   }
71 | 
72 |   /**
73 |    * Prüft, ob ein Exception-Stacktrace vorhanden ist (für Einzelansicht)
74 |    */
75 |   hasException(): boolean {
76 |     if (!this.isDataWithAllTests(this.data)) {
77 |       return !!this.data.exception && this.data.exception.trim().length > 0;
78 |     }
79 |     return false;
80 |   }
81 | 
82 |   /**
83 |    * Extrahiert den benutzerfreundlichen Testnamen aus dem vollqualifizierten Testnamen
84 |    * Verschiedene Formate:
85 |    * - "test_durchschnitt (test_main.TestFussballStatistik.test_durchschnitt)" -> "test_durchschnitt"
86 |    * - "test" Property vom Backend -> Teil vor Klammer oder bei Punkt den letzten Teil
87 |    */
88 |   getShortTestName(fullTestName: string): string {
89 |     if (!fullTestName) return '';
90 | 
91 |     // Fall 1: Format mit Klammern (Python-Unittests)
92 |     if (fullTestName.includes('(')) {
93 |       return fullTestName.split('(')[0].trim();
94 |     }
95 | 
96 |     // Fall 2: Format mit Punkten (Java-Tests oder andere qualifizierte Namen)
97 |     if (fullTestName.includes('.')) {
98 |       const parts = fullTestName.split('.');
99 |       return parts[parts.length - 1].trim(); // Letzten Teil verwenden
100 |     }
101 | 
102 |     // Fallback: Original-Name verwenden
103 |     return fullTestName;
104 |   }
105 | }
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor-edge-new/editor-edge-new.component.html
```
1 | <svg
2 |   #svgElem
3 |   class="svg-container"
4 |   [attr.width]="viewPortElemProps.width"
5 |   [attr.height]="viewPortElemProps.height"
6 | ></svg>
7 | <app-edge-grab-point
8 |   #grabStart
9 |   *ngIf="options.draggableStart"
10 |   style="position: absolute"
11 |   [targetElem]="startElem"
12 |   [targetSide]="calculatedClosestSides.startSide"
13 |   [sideOffset]="options.startDirectionOffset"
14 |   [visible]="options.draggableStart"
15 |   (onPointDrag)="setDragPointOptions('start', $event.side, $event.offset)"
16 | >
17 | </app-edge-grab-point>
18 | <app-edge-grab-point
19 |   #grabEnd
20 |   *ngIf="options.draggableEnd"
21 |   style="position: absolute"
22 |   [targetElem]="endElem"
23 |   [targetSide]="calculatedClosestSides.endSide"
24 |   [sideOffset]="options.endDirectionOffset"
25 |   [visible]="options.draggableEnd"
26 |   (onPointDrag)="setDragPointOptions('end', $event.side, $event.offset)"
27 | >
28 | </app-edge-grab-point>
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor-edge-new/editor-edge-new.component.ts
```
1 | import { ElementRef, Renderer2, SimpleChanges, OnChanges, AfterViewInit } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, EventEmitter, Input, Output, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { Plug, PlugOptions } from './plugs';
4 | import { availablePlugs, plugs } from './plugs';
5 | import { TextLabel, highlightedLineElements } from '@DTOs/index';
6 | import { Side } from '@DTOs/index'; // Changed from @Interfaces
7 | import { EditorEdgeService } from '@UMLearnServices/editor-edge.service';
8 | import { EditorElement } from '@DTOs/index';
9 | import { lineOptions } from './line-options';
10 | import { umlLineOptions } from './line-options';
11 | import { ClassEdge } from '@DTOs/index'; // Changed from @Interfaces
12 | import { EdgeGrabPointComponent } from './edge-grab-point/edge-grab-point.component';
13 | 
14 | @Component({
15 |   selector: 'app-editor-edge-new',
16 |   templateUrl: './editor-edge-new.component.html',
17 |   styleUrls: ['./editor-edge-new.component.scss'],
18 | })
19 | export class EditorEdgeNewComponent implements OnChanges, AfterViewInit {
20 |   @Input() viewportElem: HTMLElement | undefined;
21 |   @Input() startElem: HTMLElement | string | undefined;
22 |   @Input() endElem: HTMLElement | string | undefined;
23 |   @Input() draggable: boolean = false;
24 |   @Input() customOptions: lineOptions = {};
25 |   @Input() edgeData: ClassEdge | undefined;
26 |   @Input() interactionsDisabled: boolean = false;
27 | 
28 |   @Output() edgeClicked = new EventEmitter();
29 |   @Output() edgeUpdated = new EventEmitter<{
30 |     startDirection?: Side;
31 |     startDirectionOffset?: number;
32 |     endDirection?: Side;
33 |     endDirectionOffset?: number;
34 |   }>();
35 | 
36 |   @ViewChild('svgElem') svgElem!: ElementRef<SVGElement>;
37 |   @ViewChild('grabStart', { static: false }) grabStart!: EdgeGrabPointComponent;
38 |   @ViewChild('grabEnd', { static: false }) grabEnd!: EdgeGrabPointComponent;
39 | 
40 |   options: lineOptions = {};
41 |   viewPortElemProps: { width: number; height: number } = { width: 0, height: 0 };
42 |   startElemProps: { x: number; y: number; width: number; height: number } = {
43 |     x: 0,
44 |     y: 0,
45 |     width: 0,
46 |     height: 0,
47 |   };
48 |   endElemProps: { x: number; y: number; width: number; height: number } = {
49 |     x: 0,
50 |     y: 0,
51 |     width: 0,
52 |     height: 0,
53 |   };
54 |   calculatedClosestSides: { startSide: Side; endSide: Side } = {
55 |     startSide: Side.NONE,
56 |     endSide: Side.NONE,
57 |   };
58 |   highlightedElements: highlightedLineElements = {};
59 | 
60 |   private allInputsSet = false;
61 |   private viewInitialized = false;
62 | 
63 |   constructor(
64 |     private readonly renderer: Renderer2,
65 |     private readonly edgeService: EditorEdgeService,
66 |   ) {
67 |     // handle edgeService events
68 |     this.edgeService.movedNode.subscribe((nodeUuid: string) => {
69 |       if (
70 |         nodeUuid === this.edgeData?.start ||
71 |         nodeUuid === this.edgeData?.end ||
72 |         nodeUuid === 'all'
73 |       ) {
74 |         this.tryDrawLine();
75 |       }
76 |     });
77 |     this.edgeService.positionedEdge.subscribe((edgeUuid: string) => {
78 |       if (edgeUuid === this.edgeData?.id) {
79 |         this.tryDrawLine();
80 |       }
81 |     });
82 |     this.edgeService.reconnectedEdge.subscribe(
83 |       (edge: { id: string; start?: string | HTMLElement; end?: string | HTMLElement }) => {
84 |         if (edge.id === this.edgeData?.id) {
85 |           if (edge.start) {
86 |             this.startElem = edge.start;
87 |           }
88 |           if (edge.end) {
89 |             this.endElem = edge.end;
90 |           }
91 |           // reconnect after dom update
92 |           setTimeout(() => {
93 |             this.tryDrawLine();
94 |           }, 0);
95 |         }
96 |       },
97 |     );
98 |   }
99 | 
100 |   /**
101 |    * Called whenever the input properties of the component change.
102 |    * @param changes - An object containing the changed input properties.
103 |    * @returns void
104 |    */
105 |   ngOnChanges(changes: SimpleChanges) {
106 |     if (
107 |       changes['viewportElem'] &&
108 |       changes['startElem'] &&
109 |       changes['endElem'] &&
110 |       changes['viewportElem'].currentValue &&
111 |       changes['startElem'].currentValue &&
112 |       changes['endElem'].currentValue
113 |     ) {
114 |       this.allInputsSet = true;
115 |       this.tryDrawLine();
116 |     }
117 |     if (changes['edgeData']?.currentValue) {
118 |       this.edgeData = changes['edgeData'].currentValue;
119 |       this.handleHighlighting();
120 |       this.setCustomOptions();
121 |     }
122 |   }
123 | 
124 |   /**
125 |    * Lifecycle hook that is called after Angular has fully initialized the component's view.
126 |    * It is called only once after the first ngAfterContentChecked.
127 |    * Use this hook to perform any initialization logic that relies on the component's view.
128 |    */
129 |   ngAfterViewInit(): void {
130 |     this.viewInitialized = true;
131 |     setTimeout(() => {
132 |       this.tryDrawLine();
133 |     }, 0);
134 |   }
135 | 
136 |   /**
137 |    * Tries to draw the line if all inputs are set and svgElem is accessible
138 |    */
139 |   private tryDrawLine() {
140 |     if (
141 |       this.allInputsSet &&
142 |       this.viewInitialized &&
143 |       this.viewportElem &&
144 |       this.startElem &&
145 |       this.endElem
146 |     ) {
147 |       this.position();
148 |     }
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   /**
152 |    * The main operation for drawing the line. It requests and calculates all needed data and draws the line.
153 |    */
154 |   private drawLine(): void {
155 |     const closestSides = this.calculateClosestSides();
156 |     this.calculatedClosestSides = closestSides;
157 |     const startPoint = this.getElemSideMidPoint('startElement', closestSides.startSide);
158 |     const endPoint = this.getElemSideMidPoint('endElement', closestSides.endSide);
159 |     const direction: { start: number; end: number } = { start: 0, end: 0 };
160 |     const noPlugOffset = 0; // could be configurable
161 |     const plugOffset: { start: number; end: number } = {
162 |       start:
163 |         (this.options.startPlug
164 |           ? plugs[this.options.startPlug.plug].lineOffset || noPlugOffset
165 |           : noPlugOffset) * (this.options.startPlug ? this.options.startPlug.scale || 1 : 1),
166 |       end:
167 |         (this.options.endPlug
168 |           ? plugs[this.options.endPlug.plug].lineOffset || noPlugOffset
169 |           : noPlugOffset) * (this.options.endPlug ? this.options.endPlug.scale || 1 : 1),
170 |     };
171 |     let line: SVGElement;
172 | 
173 |     // point offset
174 |     if (this.options.startDirectionOffset) {
175 |       startPoint.x +=
176 |         closestSides.startSide === Side.TOP || closestSides.startSide === Side.BOTTOM
177 |           ? this.options.startDirectionOffset
178 |           : 0;
179 |       startPoint.y +=
180 |         closestSides.startSide === Side.LEFT || closestSides.startSide === Side.RIGHT
181 |           ? this.options.startDirectionOffset
182 |           : 0;
183 |     }
184 |     if (this.options.endDirectionOffset) {
185 |       endPoint.x +=
186 |         closestSides.endSide === Side.TOP || closestSides.endSide === Side.BOTTOM
187 |           ? this.options.endDirectionOffset
188 |           : 0;
189 |       endPoint.y +=
190 |         closestSides.endSide === Side.LEFT || closestSides.endSide === Side.RIGHT
191 |           ? this.options.endDirectionOffset
192 |           : 0;
193 |     }
194 |     let midLabelPos = {
195 |       x: startPoint.x + (endPoint.x - startPoint.x) / 2,
196 |       y: startPoint.y + (endPoint.y - startPoint.y) / 2,
197 |     };
198 | 
199 |     // lineType: direct
200 |     if (!this.options.lineType || this.options.lineType === 'direct') {
201 |       direction.start =
202 |         (Math.atan2(endPoint.y - startPoint.y, endPoint.x - startPoint.x) * 180) / Math.PI;
203 |       direction.end = direction.start + 180;
204 |       const lineCalc = this.setupDirect(startPoint, endPoint, plugOffset);
205 |       line = lineCalc.line;
206 |       midLabelPos = lineCalc.textPoint;
207 | 
208 |       // lineType: manhattan
209 |     } else if (this.options.lineType === 'manhattan') {
210 |       direction.start =
211 |         closestSides.startSide === Side.RIGHT
212 |           ? 0
213 |           : closestSides.startSide === Side.LEFT
214 |             ? 180
215 |             : closestSides.startSide === Side.TOP
216 |               ? 270
217 |               : 90;
218 |       direction.end =
219 |         closestSides.endSide === Side.RIGHT
220 |           ? 0
221 |           : closestSides.endSide === Side.LEFT
222 |             ? 180
223 |             : closestSides.endSide === Side.TOP
224 |               ? 270
225 |               : 90;
226 |       const lineCalc = this.setupManhattan(startPoint, endPoint, closestSides, plugOffset);
227 |       line = lineCalc.line;
228 |       midLabelPos = lineCalc.textPoint;
229 | 
230 |       // other to be implemented
231 |     } else {
232 |       throw new Error('lineType not supported!');
233 |     }
234 | 
235 |     this.renderer.setAttribute(
236 |       line,
237 |       'style',
238 |       `stroke:${this.options.lineColor || 'black'}; stroke-width: ${this.options.size || '5'}; ${this.options.dash ? `stroke-dasharray: ${this.options.dash.len} ${this.options.dash.gap};` : ''} fill: none; stroke-linecap: ${!this.options.lineType || this.options.lineType === 'direct' ? 'round' : 'round'};`,
239 |     );
240 |     this.renderer.addClass(line, 'line');
241 | 
242 |     // prepare plugs
243 |     let startPlug: SVGElement | undefined = undefined;
244 |     let endPlug: SVGElement | undefined = undefined;
245 |     if (this.options.startPlug) {
246 |       startPlug = this.drawPlug(this.options.startPlug, startPoint, direction.start);
247 |     }
248 |     if (this.options.endPlug) {
249 |       endPlug = this.drawPlug(this.options.endPlug, endPoint, direction.end);
250 |     }
251 | 
252 |     // prepare text
253 |     let startLabel: SVGElement | undefined = undefined;
254 |     let middleLabel: SVGElement | undefined = undefined;
255 |     let endLabel: SVGElement | undefined = undefined;
256 |     if (this.options.startLabel) {
257 |       startLabel = this.drawText(this.options.startLabel, startPoint, closestSides.startSide);
258 |     }
259 |     if (this.options.middleLabel) {
260 |       middleLabel = this.drawText(this.options.middleLabel, midLabelPos, Side.NONE);
261 |     }
262 |     if (this.options.endLabel) {
263 |       endLabel = this.drawText(this.options.endLabel, endPoint, closestSides.endSide);
264 |     }
265 | 
266 |     // prepare lineGrabPoints
[TRUNCATED]
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor-edge-new/line-options.ts
```
1 | import { EditorElement } from '@DTOs/index';
2 | import { PlugOptions } from './plugs';
3 | import { availablePlugs } from './plugs';
4 | import { Side, TextLabel } from '@DTOs/index'; // Changed from @Interfaces
5 | 
6 | export interface lineOptions {
7 |   lineType?: 'direct' | 'manhattan'; // default: manhattan, currently only straight and manhattan is supported
8 |   startDirection?: Side;
9 |   startDirectionOffset?: number;
10 |   endDirection?: Side;
11 |   endDirectionOffset?: number;
12 |   draggableStart?: boolean;
13 |   draggableEnd?: boolean;
14 |   size?: number;
15 |   lineColor?: string;
16 |   dash?: { len: number; gap: number };
17 | 
18 |   startLabel?: TextLabel;
19 |   middleLabel?: TextLabel;
20 |   endLabel?: TextLabel;
21 |   startPlug?: PlugOptions;
22 |   endPlug?: PlugOptions;
23 | }
24 | 
25 | export const umlLineOptions: { [key: string]: { normal: lineOptions; highlight?: lineOptions } } = {
26 |   [EditorElement.CD_GENERALISATION]: {
27 |     //      ________|>
28 |     normal: {
29 |       size: 5,
30 |       lineColor: 'black',
31 |       dash: undefined,
32 |       startPlug: undefined,
33 |       endPlug: {
34 |         plug: availablePlugs.TRIANGLE,
35 |         color: 'white',
36 |         scale: 1.7,
37 |         outline: 0.5,
38 |         outlineColor: 'black',
39 |       },
40 |     },
41 |   },
42 |   [EditorElement.CD_IMPLEMENTATION]: {
43 |     //      --------|>
44 |     normal: {
45 |       size: 5,
46 |       lineColor: 'black',
47 |       dash: { len: 8, gap: 9 },
48 |       startPlug: undefined,
49 |       endPlug: {
50 |         plug: availablePlugs.TRIANGLE,
51 |         color: 'white',
52 |         scale: 1.7,
53 |         outline: 0.5,
54 |         outlineColor: 'black',
55 |       },
56 |     },
57 |   },
58 |   //TODO edgeType.containment               //      ________(x)
59 |   //TODO edgeType.informationFlow           //      -------->    <<flow>>
60 |   [EditorElement.CD_DEPENDENCY]: {
61 |     //      -------->
62 |     normal: {
63 |       size: 5,
64 |       lineColor: 'black',
65 |       dash: { len: 8, gap: 9 },
66 |       startPlug: undefined,
67 |       endPlug: {
68 |         plug: availablePlugs.ARROW1,
69 |         color: 'black',
70 |         scale: 1.5,
71 |       },
72 |     },
73 |   },
74 |   //TODO edgeType.abstraction               //      -------->    <<abstraction>>
75 |   //TODO edgeType.substitution              //      -------->    <<substitute>>
76 |   //TODO edgeType.usage                     //      -------->    <<use>>
77 |   [EditorElement.CD_ASSOCIATION]: {
78 |     //      ________
79 |     normal: {
80 |       size: 5,
81 |       lineColor: 'black',
82 |       dash: undefined,
83 |       startPlug: undefined,
84 |       endPlug: undefined,
85 |     },
86 |   },
87 | 
88 |   [EditorElement.CD_DIRECTIONAL_ASSOCIATION]: {
89 |     //      ________>
90 |     normal: {
91 |       size: 5,
92 |       lineColor: 'black',
93 |       dash: undefined,
94 |       startPlug: undefined,
95 |       endPlug: {
96 |         plug: availablePlugs.ARROW1,
97 |         color: 'black',
98 |         scale: 1.5,
99 |       },
100 |     },
101 |   },
102 | 
103 |   [EditorElement.CD_BIDIRECTIONAL_ASSOCIATION]: {
104 |     //     <________>
105 |     normal: {
106 |       size: 5,
107 |       lineColor: 'black',
108 |       dash: undefined,
109 |       startPlug: {
110 |         plug: availablePlugs.ARROW1,
111 |         color: 'black',
112 |         scale: 1.5,
113 |       },
114 |       endPlug: {
115 |         plug: availablePlugs.ARROW1,
116 |         color: 'black',
117 |         scale: 1.5,
118 |       },
119 |     },
120 |   },
121 | 
122 |   [EditorElement.CD_AGGREGATION]: {
123 |     //      ________<  >
124 |     normal: {
125 |       size: 5,
126 |       lineColor: 'black',
127 |       dash: undefined,
128 |       startPlug: undefined,
129 |       endPlug: {
130 |         plug: availablePlugs.DIAMOND,
131 |         color: 'white',
132 |         scale: 1.5,
133 |         outline: 0.6,
134 |         outlineColor: 'black',
135 |       },
136 |     },
137 |   },
138 |   [EditorElement.CD_COMPOSITION]: {
139 |     //      ________<<>>
140 |     normal: {
141 |       size: 5,
142 |       lineColor: 'black',
143 |       dash: undefined,
144 |       startPlug: undefined,
145 |       endPlug: {
146 |         plug: availablePlugs.DIAMOND,
147 |         color: 'black',
148 |         scale: 1.5,
149 |       },
150 |     },
151 |   },
152 | };

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor-edge-new/plugs.ts
```
1 | /* USEFUL INFORMATION TO CREATE NEW PLUGS:
2 |   Plug svgs:
3 | 
4 |   Diamond:
5 |   <svg width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 32 32" style="transform-origin: center; transform: rotate(0deg)">
6 |     <polygon points="16,16 24,10 32,16 24,22" style="fill: black;"/>
7 |     <polygon points="16,16 24,10 32,16 24,22" style="fill: orange ; transform-origin: 75% 50%; transform: scale(0.5)"/>
8 |   </svg>
9 | 
10 |   Arrow1:
11 |   <svg width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 32 32" style="transform-origin: center; transform: rotate(0deg)">
12 |     <polygon points="16,16 24,10 26,12 21,16 26,20 24,22" style="fill: black;"/>
13 |     <!--               l     o     o2    l2    u2    u              -->
14 |   </svg>
15 | 
16 |   Arrow2:
17 |   <svg width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 32 32" style="transform-origin: center; transform: rotate(0deg)">
18 |     <polygon points="16,16 24,10 24,22" style="fill: black;"/>
19 |     <polygon points="16,16 24,10 24,22" style="fill: orange ; transform-origin: 66% 50%; transform: scale(0.5)"/>
20 |   </svg>
21 | 
22 |   Important are the viewBox, width, height and the polygon points. The second polygon is just an outline example.
23 |   The viewBox should be quadratic to ensure a correct rotation.
24 |   The pit is the center of the svg. The box is bigger to make sure the svg is not cut off when rotated.
25 | */
26 | 
27 | export enum availablePlugs {
28 |   DIAMOND = 'diamond',
29 |   ARROW1 = 'arrow1',
30 |   TRIANGLE = 'triangle',
31 | }
32 | 
33 | export interface Plug {
34 |   width: number;
35 |   height: number;
36 |   direction: number;
37 |   viewBox: string;
38 |   lineOffset: number; // the x-offset of the line from the center of the plug
39 |   scaleOrigin?: string; // the middle of the plug for scaling; if not set, the plug can not have an outline
40 |   polygon?: string;
41 |   path?: string;
42 | }
43 | 
44 | export interface PlugOptions {
45 |   plug: availablePlugs;
46 |   color?: string;
47 |   scale?: number;
48 |   outline?: number;
49 |   outlineColor?: string;
50 | }
51 | 
52 | export const plugs: { [key: string]: Plug } = {
53 |   [availablePlugs.DIAMOND]: {
54 |     width: 32,
55 |     height: 32,
56 |     direction: -90,
57 |     lineOffset: 8,
58 |     scaleOrigin: '75% 50%',
59 |     viewBox: '0 0 32 32',
60 |     polygon: '16,16 24,10 32,16 24,22',
61 |   },
62 |   [availablePlugs.ARROW1]: {
63 |     width: 32,
64 |     height: 32,
65 |     direction: -90,
66 |     lineOffset: 5,
67 |     viewBox: '0 0 32 32',
68 |     polygon: '16,16 24,10 26,12 21,16 26,20 24,22',
69 |   },
70 |   [availablePlugs.TRIANGLE]: {
71 |     width: 32,
72 |     height: 32,
73 |     direction: -90,
74 |     lineOffset: 8,
75 |     scaleOrigin: '66% 50%',
76 |     viewBox: '0 0 32 32',
77 |     polygon: '16,16 24,10 24,22',
78 |   },
79 | };
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor-node/editor-node.component.html
```
1 | <mat-card class="container" [style.background-color]="backgroundColor">
2 |   <div class="section-1">
3 |     <div *ngIf="elementData.type === editorElementEnum.CD_CLASS">
4 |       <div class="small-text">
5 |         <span
6 |           [ngStyle]="{
7 |             'background-color': elementData.highlighted?.updated?.type
8 |               ? 'hsl(60, 100%, 90%)'
9 |               : 'none',
10 |           }"
11 |           >&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span
12 |         >
13 |       </div>
14 |     </div>
15 |     <div *ngIf="elementData.type === editorElementEnum.CD_ABSTRACT_CLASS">
16 |       <div class="small-text">
17 |         <span [ngStyle]="{ 'background-color': updatedType ? 'hsl(60, 100%, 90%)' : 'none' }"
18 |           >&lt;&lt;Abstract&gt;&gt;</span
19 |         >
20 |       </div>
21 |     </div>
22 |     <div *ngIf="elementData.type === editorElementEnum.CD_INTERFACE">
23 |       <div class="small-text">
24 |         <span [ngStyle]="{ 'background-color': updatedType ? 'hsl(60, 100%, 90%)' : 'none' }"
25 |           >&lt;&lt;Interface&gt;&gt;</span
26 |         >
27 |       </div>
28 |     </div>
29 |     <b [ngStyle]="{ 'background-color': updatedTitle ? 'yellow' : 'none' }">{{
30 |       elementData.title
31 |     }}</b>
32 |   </div>
33 |   <hr [hidden]="elementData.type === editorElementEnum.CD_INTERFACE" />
34 |   <div *ngIf="elementData.type !== editorElementEnum.CD_INTERFACE" class="section-2">
35 |     <!-- attributes -->
36 |     <div *ngFor="let attribute of elementData.attributes; let i = index">
37 |       <span
38 |         [ngStyle]="{
39 |           'background-color':
40 |             updatedAttributes[i]?.dataType || addedAttributes[i] ? 'yellow' : 'none',
41 |         }"
42 |       >
43 |         {{ attribute.visibility }}
44 |       </span>
45 |       <span
46 |         [ngStyle]="{
47 |           'background-color': updatedAttributes[i]?.name || addedAttributes[i] ? 'yellow' : 'none',
48 |         }"
49 |       >
50 |         {{ attribute.name }}:
51 |       </span>
52 |       <span
53 |         [ngStyle]="{
54 |           'background-color':
55 |             updatedAttributes[i]?.dataType || addedAttributes[i] ? 'yellow' : 'none',
56 |         }"
57 |       >
58 |         {{ attribute.dataType }}
59 |       </span>
60 |     </div>
61 |     <!-- deletedAttributes -->
62 |     <div class="del-error" *ngFor="let attribute of deletedAttributes">
63 |       {{ attribute.visibility }} {{ attribute.name }}: {{ attribute.dataType }}
64 |     </div>
65 |   </div>
66 |   <hr />
67 |   <div class="section-3">
68 |     <!-- methods -->
69 |     <div *ngFor="let method of elementData.methods; let i = index">
70 |       <span
71 |         [ngStyle]="{
72 |           'background-color': updatedMethods[i]?.dataType || addedMethods[i] ? 'yellow' : 'none',
73 |         }"
74 |       >
75 |         {{ method.visibility }}
76 |       </span>
77 |       <span
78 |         [ngStyle]="{
79 |           'background-color': updatedMethods[i]?.name || addedMethods[i] ? 'yellow' : 'none',
80 |         }"
81 |       >
82 |         {{ method.name }}:
83 |       </span>
84 |       <span
85 |         [ngStyle]="{
86 |           'background-color': updatedMethods[i]?.dataType || addedMethods[i] ? 'yellow' : 'none',
87 |         }"
88 |       >
89 |         {{ method.dataType }}
90 |       </span>
91 |     </div>
92 |     <!-- deletedMethoden -->
93 |     <div class="del-error" *ngFor="let method of deletedMethods">
94 |       {{ method.visibility }} {{ method.name }}: {{ method.dataType }}
95 |     </div>
96 |   </div>
97 | </mat-card>
```

1 | .container {
2 |   display: flex;
3 |   flex-direction: column;
4 |   align-items: stretch;
5 |   min-width: 200px;
6 |   min-height: 250px;
7 |   border-radius: 10px;
8 |   border: 1px solid black;
9 |   transition: background-color 0.5s ease;
10 | }
11 | 
12 | .section-1 {
13 |   flex-grow: 0;
14 |   display: flex;
15 |   align-items: center;
16 |   justify-content: center;
17 |   height: 50px;
18 | }
19 | 
20 | .section-2 {
21 |   flex-grow: 1;
22 |   display: flex;
23 |   align-items: center;

25 |   flex-direction: column;
26 | }

29 |   flex-grow: 1;
30 |   display: flex;

51 |   font-style: italic;

53 |

55 |   position: relative;
56 | }

61 |   opacity: 0.3;

64 | }
65 |

68 |   margin: -25px;
69 |   padding: 0;
70 | }
71 | 
72 | .type-error {
73 |   color: #fb0000;
74 |   margin: -17px;
75 |   padding: 0;
76 | }
