src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor-node/editor-node.component.ts
```
1 | import { EditorElement } from '@DTOs/index';
2 | import { ClassNode } from '@DTOs/index';
3 | import { ElementRef, SimpleChanges, OnChanges } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { Component, Input } from '@angular/core';
5 | import { NotificationService } from '@UMLearnServices/notification.service';
6 | 
7 | @Component({
8 |   selector: 'app-editor-node',
9 |   templateUrl: './editor-node.component.html',
10 |   styleUrls: ['./editor-node.component.scss'],
11 | })
12 | export class EditorNodeComponent implements OnChanges {
13 |   @Input() model!: string;
14 |   @Input() backgroundColor: string | undefined;
15 |   @Input() elementData: ClassNode = {
16 |     identification: '',
17 |     type: EditorElement.CD_CLASS,
18 |     id: '',
19 |     position: { x: 0, y: 0 },
20 |     width: 0,
21 |     height: 0,
22 |   };
23 | 
24 |   editorElementEnum = EditorElement;
25 |   updatedTitle: any = null;
26 |   updatedType: any = null;
27 |   addedAttributes: any[] = [];
28 |   updatedAttributes: any[] = [];
29 |   deletedAttributes: any[] = [];
30 |   updatedMethods: any[] = [];
31 |   addedMethods: any[] = [];
32 |   deletedMethods: any[] = [];
33 | 
34 |   constructor(public el: ElementRef) {}
35 | 
36 |   ngOnChanges(changes: SimpleChanges) {
37 |     if (this.elementData.highlighted) {
38 |       if (this.elementData.highlighted.updated) {
39 |         if (this.elementData.highlighted.updated.title) {
40 |           this.updatedTitle = this.elementData.highlighted.updated.title;
41 |         }
42 |         if (this.elementData.highlighted.updated.attributes) {
43 |           this.updatedAttributes = this.elementData.highlighted.updated.attributes;
44 |         }
45 |         if (this.elementData.highlighted.updated.methods) {
46 |           this.updatedMethods = this.elementData.highlighted.updated.methods;
47 |         }
48 |       }
49 | 
50 |       if (this.elementData.highlighted.added) {
51 |         if (this.elementData.highlighted.added.attributes) {
52 |           this.addedAttributes = this.elementData.highlighted.added.attributes;
53 |         }
54 |         if (this.elementData.highlighted.added.methods) {
55 |           this.addedMethods = this.elementData.highlighted.added.methods;
56 |         }
57 |       }
58 | 
59 |       if (this.elementData.highlighted.deleted) {
60 |         if (this.elementData.highlighted.deleted.attributes) {
61 |           this.deletedAttributes = this.elementData.highlighted.deleted.attributes;
62 |         }
63 |         if (this.elementData.highlighted.deleted.methods) {
64 |           this.deletedMethods = this.elementData.highlighted.deleted.methods;
65 |         }
66 |       }
67 | 
68 |       if (this.elementData.highlighted.code == 'missing') {
69 |         this.backgroundColor = '#A9A9A9';
70 |       }
71 |       if (this.elementData.highlighted.code == 'not_found') {
72 |         this.backgroundColor = '#FFFFE0';
73 |       }
74 |     }
75 |   }
76 | }
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor-popup/editor-popup.component.html
```
1 | <div *ngIf="elementType === 'node'" class="node-container">
2 |   <div class="scroll-container">
3 |     <mat-card class="mat-card">
4 |       <div class="section-1">
5 |         <mat-form-field appearance="outline">
6 |           <mat-label>Name der Klasse</mat-label>
7 |           <input
8 |             matInput
9 |             [ngModel]="nodeData?.title"
10 |             (ngModelChange)="updateNodeTitle($event)"
11 |             *ngIf="elementType === 'node'"
12 |           />
13 |         </mat-form-field>
14 | 
15 |         <mat-form-field appearance="outline">
16 |           <mat-label>Typ</mat-label>
17 |           <mat-select [(ngModel)]="elementData.type">
18 |             <mat-option *ngFor="let type of nodeTypes" [value]="type">{{ type }}</mat-option>
19 |           </mat-select>
20 |         </mat-form-field>
21 |       </div>
22 | 
23 |       <div class="divider-container">
24 |         <hr class="divider" />
25 |       </div>
26 | 
27 |       <div class="section-2" *ngIf="elementData.type !== editorElement.CD_INTERFACE">
28 |         <div class="node-table-heading-container">
29 |           <h4 style="text-align: center; margin-top: 16px">Attribute</h4>
30 |           <button mat-icon-button color="primary" class="add-button" (click)="addAttributeRow()">
31 |             <mat-icon>add_circle</mat-icon>
32 |           </button>
33 |         </div>
34 | 
35 |         <mat-table class="attribute-table" [dataSource]="attributesDataSource">
36 |           <ng-container matColumnDef="visibility">
37 |             <mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef> Sichtbarkeit </mat-header-cell>
38 |             <mat-cell *matCellDef="let row">
39 |               <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
40 |                 <mat-select [(value)]="row.visibility">
41 |                   <mat-option *ngFor="let visibility of visibilityTypes" [value]="visibility">{{
42 |                     visibility
43 |                   }}</mat-option>
44 |                 </mat-select>
45 |               </mat-form-field>
46 |             </mat-cell>
47 |           </ng-container>
48 | 
49 |           <ng-container matColumnDef="name">
50 |             <mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef> Name </mat-header-cell>
51 |             <mat-cell *matCellDef="let row">
52 |               <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
53 |                 <input matInput [(ngModel)]="row.name" />
54 |               </mat-form-field>
55 |             </mat-cell>
56 |           </ng-container>
57 | 
58 |           <ng-container matColumnDef="dataType">
59 |             <mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef> Datentyp </mat-header-cell>
60 |             <mat-cell *matCellDef="let row">
61 |               <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
62 |                 <mat-select [(value)]="row.dataType">
63 |                   <mat-option *ngFor="let dataType of dataTypes" [value]="dataType">{{
64 |                     dataType
65 |                   }}</mat-option>
66 |                 </mat-select>
67 |               </mat-form-field>
68 |             </mat-cell>
69 |           </ng-container>
70 | 
71 |           <ng-container matColumnDef="delete">
72 |             <mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef></mat-header-cell>
73 |             <mat-cell *matCellDef="let row; let i = index">
74 |               <button
75 |                 mat-icon-button
76 |                 color="warn"
77 |                 class="trash-button"
78 |                 (click)="deleteRow(i, 'attribute')"
79 |               >
80 |                 <mat-icon>delete</mat-icon>
81 |               </button>
82 |             </mat-cell>
83 |           </ng-container>
84 | 
85 |           <mat-header-row
86 |             *matHeaderRowDef="['visibility', 'name', 'dataType', 'delete']"
87 |           ></mat-header-row>
88 |           <mat-row
89 |             *matRowDef="let row; columns: ['visibility', 'name', 'dataType', 'delete']"
90 |           ></mat-row>
91 |         </mat-table>
92 |       </div>
93 | 
94 |       <div class="divider-container" *ngIf="elementData.type !== editorElement.CD_INTERFACE">
95 |         <hr class="divider" />
96 |       </div>
97 | 
98 |       <div class="section-3">
99 |         <div class="node-table-heading-container">
100 |           <h4 style="text-align: center; margin-top: 16px">Methoden</h4>
101 |           <button mat-icon-button color="primary" class="add-button" (click)="addMethodRow()">
102 |             <mat-icon>add_circle</mat-icon>
103 |           </button>
104 |         </div>
105 | 
106 |         <mat-table class="method-table" [dataSource]="methodsDataSource">
107 |           <ng-container matColumnDef="visibility">
108 |             <mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef> Sichtbarkeit </mat-header-cell>
109 |             <mat-cell *matCellDef="let row">
110 |               <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
111 |                 <mat-select [(value)]="row.visibility">
112 |                   <mat-option *ngFor="let visibility of visibilityTypes" [value]="visibility">{{
113 |                     visibility
114 |                   }}</mat-option>
115 |                 </mat-select>
116 |               </mat-form-field>
117 |             </mat-cell>
118 |           </ng-container>
119 | 
120 |           <ng-container matColumnDef="name">
121 |             <mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef> Name </mat-header-cell>
122 |             <mat-cell *matCellDef="let row">
123 |               <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
124 |                 <input matInput [(ngModel)]="row.name" />
125 |               </mat-form-field>
126 |             </mat-cell>
127 |           </ng-container>
128 | 
129 |           <ng-container matColumnDef="dataType">
130 |             <mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef> Datentyp </mat-header-cell>
131 |             <mat-cell *matCellDef="let row">
132 |               <mat-form-field appearance="outline" subscriptSizing="dynamic">
133 |                 <mat-select [(value)]="row.dataType">
134 |                   <mat-option *ngFor="let dataType of dataTypes" [value]="dataType">{{
135 |                     dataType
136 |                   }}</mat-option>
137 |                 </mat-select>
138 |               </mat-form-field>
139 |             </mat-cell>
140 |           </ng-container>
141 | 
142 |           <ng-container matColumnDef="delete">
143 |             <mat-header-cell *matHeaderCellDef></mat-header-cell>
144 |             <mat-cell *matCellDef="let row; let i = index">
145 |               <button
146 |                 mat-icon-button
147 |                 color="warn"
148 |                 class="trash-button"
149 |                 (click)="deleteRow(i, 'method')"
150 |               >
151 |                 <mat-icon>delete</mat-icon>
152 |               </button>
153 |             </mat-cell>
154 |           </ng-container>
155 | 
156 |           <mat-header-row
157 |             *matHeaderRowDef="['visibility', 'name', 'dataType', 'delete']"
158 |           ></mat-header-row>
159 |           <mat-row
160 |             *matRowDef="let row; columns: ['visibility', 'name', 'dataType', 'delete']"
161 |           ></mat-row>
162 |         </mat-table>
163 |       </div>
164 |     </mat-card>
165 |   </div>
166 | 
167 |   <div mat-dialog-actions class="button_container">
168 |     <div>
169 |       <button mat-raised-button color="warn" (click)="onDelete()">Knoten löschen</button>
170 |     </div>
171 |     <div>
172 |       <button mat-raised-button color="accent" (click)="onCancel()">Abbrechen</button>
173 |       <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="onAccept()">Speichern</button>
174 |     </div>
175 |   </div>
176 | </div>
177 | <!-- End  of Content for NODE element -->
178 | 
179 | <!-- Content for EDGE element -->
180 | <div *ngIf="elementType === 'edge'" class="edge-container">
181 |   <div class="edge-heading-container">
182 |     <mat-form-field class="class-name-container" appearance="outline" style="width: 100%">
183 |       <mat-label>Pfeiltyp:</mat-label>
184 |       <mat-select [(value)]="elementData.type" (valueChange)="updateEdgeType()">
185 |         <mat-option *ngFor="let edgeType of edgeTypes" [value]="edgeType">{{
186 |           edgeType
187 |         }}</mat-option>
188 |       </mat-select>
189 |     </mat-form-field>
190 |   </div>
191 | 
192 |   <div
193 |     class="edge-line-edit-container"
194 |     [ngStyle]="{ 'flex-direction': switchPosition ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }"
195 |   >
196 |     <mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="cardinality-container">
197 |       <mat-label>Kardinalität Start:</mat-label>
198 |       <input
199 |         matInput
200 |         [ngModel]="edgeData?.cardinalityStart"
201 |         (ngModelChange)="updateEdgeCardinalityStart($event)"
202 |         *ngIf="elementType === 'edge'"
203 |         placeholder="Bsp. 1..*"
204 |       />
205 |     </mat-form-field>
206 | 
207 |     <mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="cardinality-container">
208 |       <mat-label>Beschriftung:</mat-label>
209 |       <input
210 |         matInput
211 |         [ngModel]="edgeData?.description"
212 |         (ngModelChange)="updateEdgeDescription($event)"
213 |         *ngIf="elementType === 'edge'"
214 |         placeholder="Bsp. AssignedTo"
215 |       />
216 |     </mat-form-field>
217 | 
218 |     <mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="cardinality-container">
219 |       <mat-label>Kardinalität Ziel:</mat-label>
220 |       <input
221 |         matInput
222 |         [ngModel]="edgeData?.cardinalityEnd"
223 |         (ngModelChange)="updateEdgeCardinalityEnd($event)"
224 |         *ngIf="elementType === 'edge'"
225 |         placeholder="Bsp. 0..1"
226 |       />
227 |     </mat-form-field>
228 |   </div>
229 | 
230 |   <div
231 |     *ngIf="edgeData"
232 |     #previewViewport
233 |     [ngStyle]="{ 'flex-direction': switchPosition ? 'row-reverse' : 'row' }"
234 |     style="
235 |       display: flex;
236 |       justify-content: space-around;
237 |       align-items: center;
238 |       width: calc(100% - 10px);
239 |       height: 100px;
240 |       position: relative;
241 |       background-color: white;
242 |       border: 1px solid white;
243 |       border-radius: 10px;
244 |     "
245 |   >
246 |     <div #start style="width: 10px; height: 10px"></div>
247 |     <app-editor-edge-new
[TRUNCATED]
```

```

2 |   display: flex;
3 |   align-items: center;
4 |   justify-content: center;
5 |   width: 100%;
6 |   margin-bottom: -20px;
7 | }
8 | 
9 | .edge-container {
10 |   display: flex;
11 |   flex-direction: column;
12 |   align-items: stretch;
13 |   border-radius: 3px;
14 |   border: 1.5px solid black;
15 |   overflow: auto;
16 |   padding: 10px;
17 | }
18 | 
19 | .edge-heading-container {
20 |   display: flex;
21 |   align-items: center;
22 |   justify-content: center;
23 | }

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor-popup/editor-popup.component.ts
```
1 | import {
2 |   ClassAttribute,
3 |   ClassEdge,
4 |   ClassMethod,
5 |   ClassNode,
6 |   EditorElementType,
7 | } from '@DTOs/index';
8 | import { dataType, EditorElement, visibilityType } from '@DTOs/index';
9 | 
10 | import { OnInit } from '@angular/core';
11 | import { Component, Inject, ViewChild } from '@angular/core';
12 | import { MatDialogRef } from '@angular/material/dialog';
13 | import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA } from '@angular/material/dialog';
14 | import { EditorCommunicationService } from '@UMLearnServices/editor-communication.service';
15 | import { NotificationService } from '@UMLearnServices/notification.service';
16 | import { MatTableDataSource } from '@angular/material/table';
17 | import { EditorEdgeNewComponent } from '../editor-edge-new/editor-edge-new.component';
18 | import { timer } from 'rxjs';
19 | 
20 | @Component({
21 |   selector: 'app-editor-popup',
22 |   templateUrl: './editor-popup.component.html',
23 |   styleUrls: ['./editor-popup.component.scss'],
24 | })
25 | export class EditorPopupComponent implements OnInit {
26 |   elementType: string;
27 |   elementData: ClassNode | ClassEdge;
28 |   nodeData?: ClassNode;
29 |   edgeData?: ClassEdge;
30 |   edgeDisplayData?: ClassEdge;
31 |   switchPosition?: boolean;
32 |   visibilityTypes: string[] = Object.values(visibilityType) as string[];
33 |   dataTypes: string[] = Object.values(dataType) as string[];
34 | 
35 |   editorElement = EditorElement;
36 | 
37 |   // first table data
38 |   attributes?: ClassAttribute[] = [
39 |     { name: '', dataType: dataType.empty, visibility: visibilityType.empty },
40 |   ];
41 |   attributesDataSource: MatTableDataSource<ClassAttribute>;
42 | 
43 |   // second table data
44 |   methods?: ClassMethod[] = [
45 |     { name: '', dataType: dataType.empty, visibility: visibilityType.empty },
46 |   ];
47 |   methodsDataSource: MatTableDataSource<ClassMethod>;
48 | 
49 |   nodeTypes: string[] = [
50 |     EditorElement.CD_CLASS,
51 |     EditorElement.CD_INTERFACE,
52 |     EditorElement.CD_ABSTRACT_CLASS,
53 |   ];
54 | 
55 |   edgeTypes: string[] = [
56 |     EditorElement.CD_ASSOCIATION,
57 |     EditorElement.CD_DIRECTIONAL_ASSOCIATION,
58 |     EditorElement.CD_BIDIRECTIONAL_ASSOCIATION,
59 |     EditorElement.CD_COMPOSITION,
60 |     EditorElement.CD_AGGREGATION,
61 |     EditorElement.CD_DEPENDENCY,
62 |   ];
63 | 
64 |   @ViewChild('previewLine') previewLine!: EditorEdgeNewComponent;
65 | 
66 |   constructor(
67 |     public dialogRef: MatDialogRef<EditorPopupComponent>,
68 |     @Inject(MAT_DIALOG_DATA)
69 |     public data: {
70 |       elementData: ClassNode | ClassEdge;
71 |       elementType: EditorElementType;
72 |       switchPosition: boolean;
73 |       additionalDataTypes: string[];
74 |     },
75 |     private readonly notification: NotificationService,
76 |     private readonly ecs: EditorCommunicationService,
77 |   ) {
78 |     this.attributesDataSource = new MatTableDataSource(this.attributes || []);
79 |     this.methodsDataSource = new MatTableDataSource(this.methods || []);
80 |     this.dataTypes = [...(Object.values(dataType) as string[]), ...this.data.additionalDataTypes];
81 | 
82 |     this.elementType = data.elementType;
83 |     this.elementData = { ...data.elementData };
84 | 
85 |     if ('attributes' in this.elementData) {
86 |       this.attributes = this.elementData.attributes;
87 |       this.attributesDataSource = new MatTableDataSource(this.attributes);
88 |     }
89 | 
90 |     if ('methods' in this.elementData) {
91 |       this.methods = this.elementData.methods;
92 |       this.methodsDataSource = new MatTableDataSource(this.methods);
93 |     }
94 | 
95 |     if ('switchPosition' in this.data) {
96 |       this.switchPosition = this.data.switchPosition;
97 |     }
98 |   }
99 | 
100 |   ngOnInit(): void {
101 |     if (this.elementType === 'node') {
102 |       this.nodeData = this.elementData as ClassNode;
103 |     } else if (this.elementType === 'edge') {
104 |       this.edgeData = this.elementData as ClassEdge;
105 |       this.edgeDisplayData = {
106 |         ...this.edgeData,
107 |         startDirection: undefined,
108 |         startDirectionOffset: undefined,
109 |         endDirection: undefined,
110 |         endDirectionOffset: undefined,
111 |       };
112 |     }
113 |   }
114 | 
115 |   /**
116 |    * Checks if the element is a ClassEdge by checking if it has the properties 'start' and 'end'.
117 |    * @param element
118 |    * @returns the
119 |    */
120 |   isClassEdge(): ClassEdge | undefined {
121 |     return 'start' in this.elementData && 'end' in this.elementData ? this.elementData : undefined;
122 |   }
123 | 
124 |   /**
125 |    * Adds a new attribute row to the list of attributes.
126 |    */
127 |   addAttributeRow(): void {
128 |     if (this.attributes) {
129 |       this.attributes.push({
130 |         name: '',
131 |         dataType: dataType.empty,
132 |         visibility: visibilityType.empty,
133 |       });
134 |       this.attributesDataSource.data = [...this.attributes];
135 |     }
136 |   }
137 | 
138 |   /**
139 |    * Adds a new method row to the methods.
140 |    */
141 |   addMethodRow(): void {
142 |     if (this.methods) {
143 |       this.methods.push({ name: '', dataType: dataType.empty, visibility: visibilityType.empty });
144 |       this.methodsDataSource.data = [...this.methods];
145 |     }
146 |   }
147 | 
148 |   /**
149 |    * Deletes a row from the specified table.
150 |    * @param index - The index of the row to delete.
151 |    * @param tableType - The type of table ('attribute' or 'method').
152 |    */
153 |   deleteRow(index: number, tableType: string): void {
154 |     if (tableType === 'attribute' && this.attributes) {
155 |       this.attributes.splice(index, 1);
156 |       this.attributesDataSource.data = [...this.attributes];
157 |     } else if (tableType === 'method' && this.methods) {
158 |       this.methods.splice(index, 1);
159 |       this.methodsDataSource.data = [...this.methods];
160 |     }
161 |   }
162 | 
163 |   /**
164 |    * Closes the dialog when the cancel button is clicked.
165 |    */
166 |   onCancel(): void {
167 |     this.dialogRef.close();
168 |   }
169 | 
170 |   /**
171 |    * Closes the dialog and sends the changed data to the editor component.
172 |    */
173 |   onAccept() {
174 |     // if interface, delete attributes
175 |     if (this.elementData.type === EditorElement.CD_INTERFACE) {
176 |       (this.elementData as ClassNode).attributes = [];
177 |     }
178 |     const result = {
179 |       command: 'update',
180 |       changedData: this.elementData,
181 |     };
182 |     this.dialogRef.close(result);
183 |   }
184 | 
185 |   /**
186 |    * Closes the dialog and sends the changed data to the editor component.
187 |    */
188 |   onDelete() {
189 |     const result = {
190 |       command: 'delete',
191 |       changedData: this.elementData,
192 |     };
193 |     this.dialogRef.close(result);
194 |   }
195 | 
196 |   /**
197 |    * Updates the title of the node.
198 |    * @param newTitle - The new title for the node.
199 |    */
200 |   updateNodeTitle(newTitle: string): void {
201 |     if (this.nodeData) {
202 |       this.nodeData.title = newTitle;
203 |     }
204 |   }
205 | 
206 |   /**
207 |    * Updates the edge type based on the current edge data and edge display data.
208 |    * Refreshes the preview line.
209 |    */
210 |   updateEdgeType(): void {
211 |     if (this.edgeData && this.edgeDisplayData) {
212 |       this.edgeDisplayData.type = this.edgeData.type;
213 |       this.previewLine.refresh();
214 |     }
215 |   }
216 | 
217 |   /**
218 |    * Updates the cardinality start of the edge.
219 |    *
220 |    * @param newCardinalityStart - The new cardinality start value.
221 |    */
222 |   updateEdgeCardinalityStart(newCardinalityStart: string): void {
223 |     if (this.edgeData) {
224 |       this.edgeData.cardinalityStart = newCardinalityStart;
225 |       this.edgeDisplayData!.cardinalityStart = newCardinalityStart;
226 |       this.previewLine.refresh();
227 |     }
228 |   }
229 | 
230 |   /**
231 |    * Updates the cardinality end of the edge.
232 |    *
233 |    * @param newCardinalityEnd - The new cardinality end value.
234 |    */
235 |   updateEdgeCardinalityEnd(newCardinalityEnd: string): void {
236 |     if (this.edgeData) {
237 |       this.edgeData.cardinalityEnd = newCardinalityEnd;
238 |       this.edgeDisplayData!.cardinalityEnd = newCardinalityEnd;
239 |       this.previewLine.refresh();
240 |     }
241 |   }
242 | 
243 |   /**
244 |    * Updates the edge description.
245 |    *
246 |    * @param newDescription - The new description.
247 |    */
248 |   updateEdgeDescription(newDescription: string): void {
249 |     if (this.edgeData) {
250 |       this.edgeData.description = newDescription;
251 |       this.edgeDisplayData!.description = newDescription;
252 |       this.previewLine.refresh();
253 |     }
254 |   }
255 | 
256 |   /**
257 |    * Swaps the direction of the edge.
258 |    */
259 |   onSwapEdgeDirection(): void {
260 |     if (this.edgeData) {
261 |       const temp = this.edgeData.start;
262 |       this.edgeData.start = this.edgeData.end;
263 |       this.edgeData.end = temp;
264 | 
265 |       this.switchPosition == true ? (this.switchPosition = false) : (this.switchPosition = true);
266 |       setTimeout(() => {
267 |         this.previewLine.refresh();
268 |       }, 0);
269 |     }
270 |   }
271 | }
```

1 | <div class="content">
2 |   <h2 mat-dialog-title>Beschreibung der Aufgabe "{{ taskTitle }}":</h2>
3 |   <div mat-dialog-content>
4 |     <app-tinymce
5 |       [content]="taskDescription"
6 |       [tinymceConfig]="tinyMceConfig"
7 |       #tinyMceEditor
8 |     ></app-tinymce>
9 |   </div>
10 |   <div mat-dialog-actions style="justify-content: flex-end">
11 |     <button mat-flat-button color="accent" (click)="onCancel()">Abbrechen</button>
12 |     <button
13 |       mat-flat-button
14 |       color="primary"
15 |       (click)="onAccept(tinyMceEditor)"
16 |       [mat-dialog-close]="data.description"
17 |       cdkFocusInitial
18 |     >
19 |       Speichern
20 |     </button>
21 |   </div>
22 | </div>

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/task-creation/task-description-popup/task-description-popup.component.ts
```
1 | import { OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
2 | import { Component, Inject } from '@angular/core';
3 | import { MatDialogRef } from '@angular/material/dialog';
4 | import { MAT_DIALOG_DATA } from '@angular/material/dialog';
5 | import { TinymceComponent } from '../../tinymce/tinymce.component';
6 | import { NotificationService } from '@UMLearnServices/notification.service';
7 | import { Subscription } from 'rxjs/internal/Subscription';
8 | 
9 | @Component({
10 |   selector: 'app-task-description-popup',
11 |   templateUrl: './task-description-popup.component.html',
12 |   styleUrls: ['./task-description-popup.component.scss'],
13 | })
14 | export class TaskDescriptionPopupComponent implements OnDestroy {
15 |   private readonly subscriptions: Subscription[] = []; // Array to store subscriptions to unsubscribe later
16 | 
17 |   taskDescription: string;
18 |   taskTitle: string;
19 | 
20 |   tinyMceConfig: any = {
21 |     plugins: 'autoresize lists table link image code codesample',
22 |     toolbar:
23 |       'undo redo | bold italic | alignleft aligncenter alignright | numlist bullist | table | link image | code codesample',
24 |     min_height: window.innerHeight * 0.6,
25 |     max_height: window.innerHeight * 0.6,
26 |     menubar: false,
27 |     statusbar: false,
28 |     resize: false,
29 |   };
30 | 
31 |   constructor(
32 |     public dialogRef: MatDialogRef<TaskDescriptionPopupComponent>,
33 |     private readonly notification: NotificationService,
34 |     @Inject(MAT_DIALOG_DATA) public data: { description: string; taskTitle: string },
35 |   ) {
36 |     this.taskDescription = data.description;
37 |     this.taskTitle = data.taskTitle;
38 |   }
39 | 
40 |   /**
41 |    * Closes the dialog and passes the content of the Tinymce editor to the dialogRef.
42 |    * @param tinymceEditor - The TinymceComponent instance.
43 |    */
44 |   onAccept(tinymceEditor: TinymceComponent): void {
45 |     this.dialogRef.close(tinymceEditor.getContent());
46 |   }
47 | 
48 |   /**
49 |    * Logs the content of the TinymceComponent instance to the console.
50 |    *
51 |    * @param instance - The TinymceComponent instance.
52 |    */
53 |   onContent(instance: TinymceComponent): void {
54 |     console.log(instance.getContent());
55 |   }
56 | 
57 |   /**
58 |    * Cancels the edit of the description.
59 |    *
60 |    * @remarks
61 |    * This method displays a confirmation dialog to the user, asking if they want to cancel the edit of the description. If the user confirms, the dialog is closed.
62 |    *
63 |    * @returns void
64 |    */
65 |   onCancel(): void {
66 |     const confirmSubscription = this.notification
67 |       .confirm('Bearbeitung abbrechen?', 'Alle Änderungen gehen verloren.', 'Nein', 'Ja, abbrechen')
68 |       .subscribe(confirmed => {
69 |         if (confirmed) {
70 |           this.dialogRef.close();
71 |         }
72 |       });
73 |     this.subscriptions.push(confirmSubscription);
74 |   }
75 | 
76 |   /**
77 |    * Called when the component is about to be destroyed.
78 |    * Unsubscribes from all subscriptions to prevent memory leaks.
79 |    *
80 |    * @memberof CourseEditComponent
81 |    * @public
82 |    * @returns {void}
83 |    */
84 |   ngOnDestroy() {
85 |     this.subscriptions.forEach(subscription => subscription.unsubscribe());
86 |   }
87 | }
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/fill-in-task-new/dynamic-blank/dynamic-blank.component.html
```
1 | <mat-form-field
2 |   *ngIf="id && blankMode === fillinTypes.FillinText"
3 |   subscriptSizing="dynamic"
4 |   class="text-blank fitting"
5 |   appearance="outline"
6 | >
7 |   <input matInput [id]="id" [(ngModel)]="answer" (ngModelChange)="onValueChange()" />
8 | </mat-form-field>
9 | 
10 | <mat-form-field
11 |   *ngIf="id && blankMode === fillinTypes.FillinDropdown"
12 |   class="select-blank fitting"
13 |   appearance="outline"
14 | >
15 |   <mat-select [id]="id" [(ngModel)]="answer" (ngModelChange)="onValueChange()">
16 |     <mat-option *ngFor="let option of blankOptions" [value]="option">
17 |       {{ option }}
18 |     </mat-option>
19 |   </mat-select>
20 | </mat-form-field>
21 | 
22 | <div
23 |   *ngIf="id && blankMode === fillinTypes.FillinDrag"
24 |   cdkDropList
25 |   [id]="id"
26 |   [cdkDropListData]="blankOptions"
27 |   [cdkDropListConnectedTo]="otherBlankIds.concat('drag-drop-global-list')"
28 |   [cdkDropListEnterPredicate]="canDrop"
29 |   (cdkDropListDropped)="drop($event)"
30 |   class="drag-blank fitting"
31 | >
32 |   <div cdkDrag class="drag-item" *ngFor="let item of blankOptions; let i = index">
33 |     <div class="custom-placeholder" *cdkDragPlaceholder></div>
34 |     <div class="drag-item-content" [innerHTML]="item"></div>
35 |   </div>
36 | </div>
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/fill-in-task-new/dynamic-blank/dynamic-blank.component.scss
```
1 | .fitting {
2 |   margin-left: 2px;
3 |   margin-right: 5px;
4 | }
5 | 
6 | .text-blank {
7 |   display: inline-flex;
8 |   align-items: center;
9 |   margin-right: 5px;
10 |   margin-bottom: 5px;
11 |   font-size: 18px;
12 | }
13 | 
14 | /* drag and drop */
15 | 
16 | .drag-blank {
17 |   width: auto;
18 |   min-width: 100px;
19 |   border: solid 1px #ccc;
20 |   min-height: 50px;
21 |   display: inline-block;
22 |   background: white;
23 |   border-radius: 4px;
24 |   overflow: hidden;
25 |   vertical-align: middle;
26 | }
27 | 
28 | .drag-item {
29 |   min-width: 100px;
30 |   padding: 20px 10px;
31 |   border-bottom: solid 1px #ccc;
32 |   color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.87);
33 |   display: flex;
34 |   flex-direction: row;
35 |   align-items: center;
36 |   justify-content: space-between;
37 |   box-sizing: border-box;
38 |   cursor: move;
39 |   background: white;
40 |   font-size: 14px;
41 | }
42 | 
43 | .custom-placeholder {
44 |   background: #ccc;
45 |   border: dotted 3px #999;
46 |   min-height: 50px;
47 |   min-width: 100px;
48 |   transition: transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);
49 | }
50 | 
51 | .cdk-drag-preview {
52 |   box-sizing: border-box;
53 |   border-radius: 4px;
54 |   box-shadow:
55 |     0 5px 5px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
56 |     0 8px 10px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14),
57 |     0 3px 14px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
58 | }
59 | 
60 | .cdk-drag-animating {
61 |   transition: transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);
62 | }
63 | 
64 | .drag-item:last-child {
65 |   border: none;
66 | }
67 | 
68 | .drag-blank.cdk-drop-list-dragging .drag-item:not(.cdk-drag-placeholder) {
69 |   transition: transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);
70 | }
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/fill-in-task-new/dynamic-blank/dynamic-blank.component.ts
```
1 | import { CdkDragDrop } from '@angular/cdk/drag-drop';
2 | import { moveItemInArray, transferArrayItem } from '@angular/cdk/drag-drop';
3 | import { OnInit } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { Component, EventEmitter, Input, Output } from '@angular/core';
5 | import { FillinQuestionType } from '@DTOs/fillInType.enum';
6 | import { UserFillinAnswer } from '@DTOs/userAnswer.dto';
7 | 
8 | @Component({
9 |   selector: 'app-dynamic-blank',
10 |   templateUrl: './dynamic-blank.component.html',
11 |   styleUrls: ['./dynamic-blank.component.scss'],
12 | })
13 | export class DynamicBlankComponent implements OnInit {
14 |   @Input() id: string | null = '';
15 |   @Input() otherBlankIds: string[] = [];
16 |   @Input() blankMode: string = FillinQuestionType.FillinText;
17 |   @Input() blankOptions: string[] = [];
18 | 
19 |   @Output() valueChange = new EventEmitter<UserFillinAnswer>();
20 | 
21 |   protected fillinTypes = FillinQuestionType;
22 |   protected answer: string = '';
23 | 
24 |   ngOnInit() {}
25 | 
26 |   /**
27 |    * Handles the value change event.
28 |    * Emits an event with the position and answer if the id is defined.
29 |    *
30 |    * @returns {void}
31 |    */
32 |   onValueChange() {
33 |     if (!this.id) return;
34 |     this.valueChange.emit({ position: this.id.slice(4), answer: this.answer });
35 |   }
36 | 
37 |   drop(event: CdkDragDrop<string[]>) {
38 |     if (event.previousContainer === event.container) {
39 |       moveItemInArray(event.container.data, event.previousIndex, event.currentIndex);
40 |     } else if (this.blankOptions.length < 1) {
41 |       transferArrayItem(
42 |         event.previousContainer.data,
43 |         event.container.data,
44 |         event.previousIndex,
45 |         event.currentIndex,
46 |       );
47 |     }
48 |     this.answer = this.blankOptions[0] || '';
49 |     this.onValueChange();
50 |   }
51 | 
52 |   // we need to bind the this, because the function is called from the template
53 |   canDrop = (): boolean => {
54 |     if (this.blankOptions && this.blankOptions.length >= 1) {
55 |       return false;
56 |     } else {
57 |       return true;
58 |     }
59 |   };
60 | }
```

src/app/Pages/contentView/contentElement/mc-task-creation/description-dialog/description-dialog.component.html
```
1 | <h1 mat-dialog-title>Set a Description</h1>
2 | <div mat-dialog-content>
3 |   <mat-form-field>
4 |     <textarea
5 |       class="area"
6 |       matInput
7 |       [(ngModel)]="data.description"
8 |       type="text"
9 |       placeholder="Description"
10 |       cdkTextareaAutosize
11 |       #autosize="cdkTextareaAutosize"
12 |       cdkAutosizeMinRows="1"
13 |     >
14 |     </textarea>
15 |   </mat-form-field>
16 | </div>
17 | <div mat-dialog-actions class="size-buttons">
18 |   <button
19 |     mat-raised-button
20 |     color="primary"
21 |     type="button"
22 |     [mat-dialog-close]="data.description"
23 |     cdkFocusInitial
24 |   >
25 |     Accept
26 |   </button>
27 |   <button mat-raised-button color="warn" type="button" (click)="onNoClick()">Delete</button>
28 | </div>
```

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor-edge-new/edge-grab-point/edge-grab-point.component.html
```
1 | <div
2 |   #dragElem
3 |   class="grabPoint"
4 |   cdkDrag
5 |   (cdkDragStarted)="isDragging = true; opacity = 1"
6 |   (cdkDragMoved)="calculateOffset($event, dragElem)"
7 |   (cdkDragEnded)="onDragEnded()"
8 |   (click)="onClick()"
9 |   [style.top.px]="position.y - 10"
10 |   [style.left.px]="position.x - 10"
11 |   [style.opacity]="opacity"
12 |   matTooltip="Klicken und ziehen zum Verschieben. Klicken zum Zurücksetzen."
13 |   matTooltipShowDelay="500"
14 |   [matTooltipDisabled]="isDragging"
15 | >
16 |   <svg
17 |     class="svgElem"
18 |     width="20"
19 |     height="20"
20 |     viewBox="0 0 20 20"
21 |     xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
22 |   >
23 |     <circle
24 |       class="svgCircle"
25 |       cx="10"
26 |       cy="10"
27 |       r="10"
28 |       [style.fill]="sideOffset && sideOffset != 0 ? 'red' : 'grey'"
29 |     />
30 |   </svg>
31 | </div>
```

2 |   position: absolute;

4 | }

16 |   z-index: 999;
17 |   opacity: 0.5;
18 | }
19 |

21 |   opacity: 1;
22 | }

src/app/Modules/umlearn/pages/editor/editor-edge-new/edge-grab-point/edge-grab-point.component.ts
```
1 | import { Side } from '@DTOs/index'; // Changed from @Interfaces
2 | import { CdkDragMove } from '@angular/cdk/drag-drop';
3 | import { SimpleChanges, OnChanges } from '@angular/core';
4 | import { Component, EventEmitter, Input, Output } from '@angular/core';
5 | 
6 | @Component({
7 |   selector: 'app-edge-grab-point',
8 |   templateUrl: './edge-grab-point.component.html',
9 |   styleUrls: ['./edge-grab-point.component.scss'],
10 | })
11 | export class EdgeGrabPointComponent implements OnChanges {
12 |   @Input() targetElem: HTMLElement | string | undefined = undefined;
13 |   @Input() targetSide: Side | undefined = undefined;
14 |   @Input() sideOffset: number | undefined;
15 |   @Input() visible: boolean = true;
16 | 
17 |   @Output() onPointDrag = new EventEmitter<{ side: Side; offset: number }>();
18 | 
19 |   targetElemProps: { x: number; y: number; width: number; height: number } = {
20 |     x: 0,
21 |     y: 0,
22 |     width: 0,
23 |     height: 0,
24 |   };
25 |   position: { x: number; y: number } = { x: 0, y: 0 };
26 |   radius: number = 0;
27 |   isDragging: boolean = false;
28 |   opacity: number = 0;
29 | 
30 |   /**
31 |    * Lifecycle hook that is called when any input property changes.
32 |    * @param changes - The changed properties.
33 |    */
34 |   ngOnChanges(changes: SimpleChanges) {
35 |     if (changes['targetElem'] || changes['targetSide'] || changes['sideOffset']) {
36 |       if (typeof this.targetElem === 'string') {
37 |         this.targetElem = document.getElementById(this.targetElem) || undefined;
38 |       }
39 |       if (this.targetElem && this.targetSide) {
40 |         this.updateTargetPosition();
41 |         this.updatePosition(this.targetSide, this.sideOffset || 0);
42 |       }
43 |     }
44 |   }
45 | 
46 |   /**
47 |    * Sets the visibility of the edge grab point.
48 |    * @param visibility - The visibility flag.
49 |    */
50 |   setVisible(visibility: boolean) {
51 |     if (!this.isDragging) {
52 |       this.opacity = visibility ? 0.5 : 0;
53 |     }
54 |   }
55 | 
56 |   /**
57 |    * Handles the click event on the edge grab point.
58 |    */
59 |   onClick() {
60 |     if (this.isDragging) {
61 |       this.isDragging = false;
62 |       this.opacity = 0;
63 |       return;
64 |     }
65 |     this.onPointDrag.emit({ side: Side.NONE, offset: 0 });
66 |   }
67 | 
68 |   /**
69 |    * Handles the drag ended event on the edge grab point.
70 |    */
71 |   onDragEnded() {
72 |     setTimeout(() => {
73 |       this.isDragging = false;
74 |       this.opacity = 0;
75 |     }, 0);
76 |   }
77 | 
78 |   /**
79 |    * Updates the edge grab point.
80 |    */
81 |   update() {
82 |     this.updateTargetPosition();
83 |     if (this.targetElem && this.targetSide) {
84 |       this.updatePosition(this.targetSide, this.sideOffset || 0);
85 |     }
86 |   }
87 | 
88 |   /**
89 |    * Updates the position of the target element.
90 |    */
91 |   private updateTargetPosition() {
92 |     if (typeof this.targetElem === 'string') return;
93 | 
94 |     this.targetElemProps.x = this.targetElem?.offsetLeft || 0;
95 |     this.targetElemProps.y = this.targetElem?.offsetTop || 0;
96 |     this.targetElemProps.width = this.targetElem?.offsetWidth || 0;
97 |     this.targetElemProps.height = this.targetElem?.offsetHeight || 0;
98 |     //if it has a transform, add it to the position
99 |     this.targetElemProps.x += this.targetElem!.style.transform
100 |       ? parseInt(this.targetElem!.style.transform.split('(')[1].split('px')[0])
101 |       : 0;
102 |     this.targetElemProps.y += this.targetElem!.style.transform
103 |       ? parseInt(this.targetElem!.style.transform.split(',')[1].split('px')[0])
104 |       : 0;
105 |   }
106 | 
107 |   /**
108 |    * Updates the position of the edge grab point.
109 |    * @param side - The target side.
110 |    * @param sideOffset - The side offset.
111 |    */
112 |   private updatePosition(side: Side, sideOffset: number) {
113 |     switch (side) {
114 |       case Side.TOP:
115 |         this.position.x =
116 |           this.targetElemProps.x + this.targetElemProps.width / 2 + sideOffset - this.radius;
117 |         this.position.y = this.targetElemProps.y - this.radius * 2;
118 |         break;
119 |       case Side.BOTTOM:
120 |         this.position.x =
121 |           this.targetElemProps.x + this.targetElemProps.width / 2 + sideOffset - this.radius;
122 |         this.position.y = this.targetElemProps.y + this.targetElemProps.height - this.radius * 2;
123 |         break;
124 |       case Side.LEFT:
125 |         this.position.x = this.targetElemProps.x - this.radius;
126 |         this.position.y =
127 |           this.targetElemProps.y + this.targetElemProps.height / 2 + sideOffset - this.radius * 2;
128 |         break;
129 |       case Side.RIGHT:
130 |         this.position.x = this.targetElemProps.x + this.targetElemProps.width - this.radius;
131 |         this.position.y =
132 |           this.targetElemProps.y + this.targetElemProps.height / 2 + sideOffset - this.radius * 2;
133 |         break;
134 |     }
135 |   }
136 | 
137 |   /**
138 |    * Calculates the offset of the edge grab point during drag.
139 |    * @param event - The drag move event.
140 |    * @param draggable - The draggable element.
141 |    * @returns The calculated offset.
142 |    */
143 |   calculateOffset(event: CdkDragMove, draggable: HTMLElement): { side: Side; offset: number } {
144 |     if (!this.targetElem || typeof this.targetElem == 'string')
145 |       return { side: this.targetSide || Side.NONE, offset: 0 };
146 | 
147 |     const targetElemProps = this.targetElem.getBoundingClientRect();
148 |     const mousePosition = event.pointerPosition;
149 |     const centerX = targetElemProps.left + targetElemProps.width / 2;
150 |     const centerY = targetElemProps.top + targetElemProps.height / 2;
151 |     const relativeX = mousePosition.x - centerX;
152 |     const relativeY = mousePosition.y - centerY;
153 | 
154 |     // closest side of targetElem
155 |     let closestSide: Side;
156 |     if (Math.abs(relativeX) > Math.abs(relativeY)) {
157 |       closestSide = relativeX > 0 ? Side.RIGHT : Side.LEFT;
158 |     } else {
159 |       closestSide = relativeY > 0 ? Side.BOTTOM : Side.TOP;
160 |     }
161 | 
162 |     // new x and y position of draggable, based on closest side of targetElem, so that the draggable is always on the side of the targetElem
163 |     let newOffset;
164 |     if (closestSide == Side.TOP || closestSide == Side.BOTTOM) {
165 |       newOffset =
166 |         (mousePosition.x > targetElemProps.left + targetElemProps.width / 2
167 |           ? Math.min(mousePosition.x, targetElemProps.left + targetElemProps.width)
168 |           : Math.max(mousePosition.x, targetElemProps.left)) -
169 |         (targetElemProps.left + targetElemProps.width / 2);
170 |     } else {
171 |       newOffset =
172 |         (mousePosition.y > targetElemProps.top + targetElemProps.height / 2
173 |           ? Math.min(mousePosition.y, targetElemProps.top + targetElemProps.height)
174 |           : Math.max(mousePosition.y, targetElemProps.top)) -
175 |         (targetElemProps.top + targetElemProps.height / 2);
176 |     }
177 | 
178 |     draggable.style.transform = 'none';
179 | 
180 |     //this.updatePosition(closestSide, newOffset);
181 |     this.onPointDrag.emit({ side: closestSide, offset: newOffset });
182 | 
183 |     return { side: closestSide, offset: newOffset };
184 |   }
185 | }
```
